items.name: Ellis in Wonderland
items.descriptionZh: 《Ellis in Wonderland》是爵士吉他手Herb Ellis于1956年发行的经典专辑，风格以摇摆乐和蓝调为主的硬波普爵士乐。核心特色在于Ellis流畅而充满律动的吉他独奏，搭配钢琴、贝斯与鼓的紧密合奏，展现了50年代西海岸爵士的优雅与即兴魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Ellis in Wonderland is a classic 1956 album by jazz guitarist Herb Ellis, rooted in swing and blues-inflected hard bop. Its core features Ellis's fluid, rhythm-driven guitar solos, accompanied by tight piano, bass, and drum interplay, capturing the elegance and improvisational charm of 1950s West Coast jazz.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Herb Ellis离开奥斯卡·彼得森三重奏后不久，他得以首次以领奏身份自由发挥。专辑中的曲目《Ellis in Wonderland》标题源自他的姓氏与爱丽丝梦游仙境的谐音双关，录音过程仅用一天便完成，展现了乐手之间的高度默契。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded shortly after Herb Ellis left the Oscar Peterson Trio, allowing him his first opportunity to lead freely. The title track 'Ellis in Wonderland' is a pun on his surname and Alice in Wonderland; the entire session was completed in a single day, showcasing the musicians' remarkable chemistry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Herb Ellis个人风格的奠基之作，对50年代后期爵士吉他演奏的即兴语汇产生了一定影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a foundational work for Herb Ellis's personal style, influencing the improvisational vocabulary of jazz guitar in the late 1950s.
items.artistIntroZh: Herb Ellis（1921-2010），美国爵士吉他手，以流畅的摇摆风格和蓝调感著称。他因在奥斯卡·彼得森三重奏中的演出而闻名，代表作包括《Ellis in Wonderland》和《Nothing But the Blues》。
items.artistIntroEn: Herb Ellis (1921-2010) was an American jazz guitarist known for his smooth swing style and bluesy feel. He gained fame with the Oscar Peterson Trio, with notable works including 'Ellis in Wonderland' and 'Nothing But the Blues.'

items.name: Electronic Earth
items.descriptionZh: 《Electronic Earth》是英国歌手Labrinth于2012年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格融合了电子、R&B和灵魂乐。核心特色在于宏大的电子编曲与Labrinth高亢嗓音的强烈对比，以及将流行旋律与实验性音效结合的制作手法，展现了当代英伦R&B的新面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Electronic Earth is the 2012 debut studio album by British singer Labrinth, blending electronic, R&B, and soul. Its core features lie in the contrast between grand electronic arrangements and Labrinth's soaring vocals, alongside a production style that merges pop melodies with experimental soundscapes, showcasing a fresh take on contemporary British R&B.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的热门单曲《Beneath Your Beautiful》原本是Labrinth为另一位歌手创作的，但最终决定亲自演唱。录制过程中，他邀请了Emeli Sandé合作，两人在录音室里即兴碰撞出的和声成为最终版本。专辑名《Electronic Earth》灵感来自Labrinth对数字世界与自然世界融合的思考。
items.storiesEn: The hit single 'Beneath Your Beautiful' was originally written by Labrinth for another artist, but he decided to record it himself. During the session, he invited Emeli Sandé to collaborate, and their impromptu harmonies in the studio became the final version. The album title 'Electronic Earth' was inspired by Labrinth's thoughts on the fusion of digital and natural worlds.
items.artistIntroZh: Labrinth（本名Timothy McKenzie），1989年出生于英国伦敦，歌手、词曲作者兼制作人。其风格横跨R&B、电子与流行，代表作包括《Electronic Earth��以及为《亢奋》原声带创作的歌曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Labrinth (born Timothy McKenzie, 1989) is a British singer, songwriter, and producer from London. His style spans R&B, electronic, and pop, with notable works including 'Electronic Earth' and contributions to the 'Euphoria' soundtrack.

items.name: DIVO
items.descriptionZh: 《DIVO》是法国作曲家François Michel Duguet于2003年发行的古典音乐专辑，风格属于当代古典与极简主义。核心特色在于以单一钢琴和弦乐为基础，通过重复与微妙的变奏构建出冥想般的听觉空间，作品结构严谨且情感内敛。
items.descriptionEn: DIVO is a 2003 classical album by French composer François Michel Duguet, rooted in contemporary classical and minimalism. Its core features are built on solo piano and strings, using repetition and subtle variations to create a meditative soundscape, with a rigorous structure and restrained emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Duguet在法国南部一个小型教堂内录制的，他特意选择了清晨时分，以捕捉自然光透过彩色玻璃窗时的静谧氛围。专辑名《DIVO》取自拉丁语“神圣”之意，反映了他对音乐精神性的追求。由于发行量极小，该专辑在收藏界较为罕见。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded in a small chapel in southern France, with Duguet specifically choosing early morning hours to capture the serene atmosphere of natural light filtering through stained glass. The title 'DIVO' is derived from the Latin word for 'divine,' reflecting his pursuit of spirituality in music. Due to a very limited pressing, the album is quite rare among collectors.
items.artistIntroZh: François Michel Duguet，法国当代古典作曲家，以极简主义和氛围音乐著称。他的作品常探索时间与寂静的关系，代表作包括《DIVO》和《Les Heures Claires》。
items.artistIntroEn: François Michel Duguet is a French contemporary classical composer known for minimalism and ambient music. His works often explore the relationship between time and silence, with notable pieces including 'DIVO' and 'Les Heures Claires.'

01-01.birthdayZh: 1月1日，是你的生日。像《Ellis in Wonderland》里那把灵动的吉他，你轻轻拨动世界的新篇章，每个音符都跳着自由的舞。也像《Electronic Earth》的辽阔——你体内住着整片星球的能量与温柔。新年的第一天为你而生，而你，为所有可能而活。
01-01.birthdayEn: January 1 is your birthday. As the world turns a fresh page, you share your day with albums that capture new beginnings. Let the adventurous spirit of Herb Ellis’s “Ellis in Wonderland” remind you that this year is a journey of joyful discovery. And may the bold, creative energy of Labrinth’s “Electronic Earth” inspire you to build your own vibrant world. You are a beautiful start to the year—may your days ahead be as bright and full of promise as this first, wonderful day.

items.name: A Classical
items.descriptionZh: 《A Classical》是日本流行天后滨崎步于2013年发行的古典混音专辑，风格为流行与古典跨界。核心特色在于将滨崎步的经典流行歌曲重新编排为管弦乐版本，由交响乐团演奏，突出旋律的优雅与宏大，同时保留了她标志性的声线。
items.descriptionEn: A Classical is a 2013 classical remix album by Japanese pop diva Ayumi Hamasaki, blending pop with classical crossover. Its core feature lies in re-arranging Hamasaki's classic pop hits into orchestral versions performed by a symphony orchestra, highlighting the elegance and grandeur of the melodies while preserving her signature vocal style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的构想源于滨崎步在一次古典音乐会后的灵感，她希望粉丝能以全新的方式体验她的歌曲。录制过程中，她与伦敦交响乐团合作，并在录音室里亲自指导每个乐句的演绎。专辑封面采用了她在伦敦阿比路录音室拍摄的照片，致敬披头士经典。
items.storiesEn: The concept for this album came from Hamasaki's inspiration after attending a classical concert; she wanted fans to experience her songs in a new way. During recording, she collaborated with the London Symphony Orchestra and personally directed the phrasing of each section in the studio. The cover art features her photo taken at Abbey Road Studios in London, paying homage to The Beatles.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步（Ayumi Hamasaki），1978年出生于日本福冈，日本流行歌手、词曲作者。她是日本乐坛最具代表性的女性艺人之一，以多变的音乐风格和时尚形象著称，代表作包括《A Song for ××》《Boys & Girls》和《M》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki (born 1978 in Fukuoka, Japan) is a Japanese pop singer and songwriter. She is one of the most iconic female artists in Japanese music history, known for her versatile musical style and fashion image, with notable works including 'A Song for ××,' 'Boys & Girls,' and 'M.'

items.name: Signed and Sealed in Blood
items.descriptionZh: 《Signed and Sealed in Blood》是美国凯尔特朋克乐队Dropkick Murphys于2013年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格融合了朋克摇滚与爱尔兰民谣。核心特色在于激昂的手风琴与风笛旋律搭配快速有力的鼓点和吉他，歌词充满工人阶级的直率与战斗精神。
items.descriptionEn: Signed and Sealed in Blood is the 2013 eighth studio album by American Celtic punk band Dropkick Murphys, blending punk rock with Irish folk. Its core features are spirited accordion and bagpipe melodies paired with fast, powerful drumming and guitars, with lyrics full of working-class directness and fighting spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题源自乐队成员在巡演巴士上看到的一句涂鸦，他们觉得这完美概括了乐队对音乐和粉丝的承诺。录制过程中，乐队特意回到了他们早期在波士顿的地下室排练室，以捕捉原始的音质。专辑中的歌曲《The Boys Are Back》在波士顿红袜队主场芬威球场首次现场演唱。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from a piece of graffiti the band members saw on their tour bus, which they felt perfectly summed up their commitment to music and fans. During recording, the band returned to their early rehearsal basement in Boston to capture a raw sound. The track 'The Boys Are Back' was first performed live at Fenway Park, home of the Boston Red Sox.
items.artistIntroZh: Dropkick Murphys，1996年成立于美国马萨诸塞州波士顿的凯尔特朋克乐队。他们以融合爱尔兰民谣与硬核朋克著称，代表作包括《Shipping Up to Boston》《Rose Tattoo》以及《Signed and Sealed in Blood》。
items.artistIntroEn: Dropkick Murphys are a Celtic punk band formed in Boston, Massachusetts, USA in 1996. They are known for blending Irish folk with hardcore punk, with notable works including 'Shipping Up to Boston,' 'Rose Tattoo,' and 'Signed and Sealed in Blood.'

01-08.birthdayZh: 1月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把古典的温柔编进《A Classical》的弦乐里，又把凯尔特的烈风灌入《Signed and Sealed in Blood》的鼓点中。你诞生的日子，恰好站在优雅与勇气的交点——身披管弦织就的月光，脚踏不羁的风暴，将生命签上自己的名字。
01-08.birthdayEn: January 8 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us two albums that echo your spirit: Ayumi Hamasaki's "A Classical," a timeless, graceful collection that mirrors your elegance, and Dropkick Murphys' "Signed and Sealed in Blood," a bold, anthemic testament to resilience and heart. Like these works, your life blends beauty with fierce determination. May your year ahead unfold as a symphony of strength and a ballad of joy, each note a celebration of the unique light you bring to the world.

items.name: Live on Ten Legs
items.descriptionZh: 《Live on Ten Legs》是Pearl Jam于2011年发行的现场专辑，收录了2003年至2010年间的演出精选。风格上延续了乐队标志性的另类摇滚与硬核摇滚融合，充满即兴吉他与主唱Eddie Vedder极具爆发力的嗓音。核心特色在于其未经修饰的现场能量，展现了乐队在舞台上自由挥洒的即兴段落与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Live on Ten Legs is a live album by Pearl Jam released in 2011, featuring highlights from performances between 2003 and 2010. Stylistically, it continues the band's signature blend of alternative rock and hard rock, with improvisational guitar work and Eddie Vedder's explosive vocals. Its core feature lies in the unpolished live energy, showcasing the band's freewheeling improvisations and emotional intensity on stage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Ten Legs”源自乐队调侃巡演巴士上十位成员（包括乐手和工作人员）的腿数。录制过程中，Pearl Jam特意从全球多场演出中筛选音轨，包括巴西、英国和美国的站点，以捕捉不同场次观众的反应差异。鼓手Matt Cameron曾透露，部分曲目如《Porch》的结尾即兴段是临时在台上决定���，保留了最真实的互动瞬间。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Ten Legs' originated from the band's joke about the ten legs of the members and crew on their tour bus. During recording, Pearl Jam carefully selected tracks from multiple global shows, including stops in Brazil, the UK, and the US, to capture varying audience reactions. Drummer Matt Cameron revealed that the ending improvisation of tracks like 'Porch' was decided spontaneously on stage, preserving authentic interaction moments.
items.artistIntroZh: Pearl Jam是美国西雅图摇滚乐队，成立于1990年，核心成员包括Eddie Vedder（主唱）、Mike McCready（吉他）等。风格以另类摇滚和硬摇滚为主，代表作有《Ten》《Vs.》等专辑。他们以对抗唱片工业的商业化而闻名，是90年代Grunge运动的重要旗手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pearl Jam is an American rock band from Seattle, formed in 1990, with core members including Eddie Vedder (vocals) and Mike McCready (guitar). Known for alternative rock and hard rock, their iconic albums include Ten and Vs. They are renowned for resisting music industry commercialization and were key figures in the 1990s grunge movement.

01-17.birthdayZh: 1月17日，是你的生日。这一天，珍珠酱乐队曾发行《Live on Ten Legs》，十只脚掌踩过世界的舞台——像你一样，在岁月里站稳，用热爱抵御风霜。愿你继续用这双坚实的腿，走向属于你的辽阔山河。生日快乐，你值得所有的光。
01-17.birthdayEn: January 17 is your birthday. On this day, Pearl Jam released "Live on Ten Legs," a collection of raw, electric nights turned into joyful noise. Like that album, your life is a live performance—full of energy, honest moments, and the beautiful roar of being fully alive. May your year ahead carry that same spirit: bold, layered, and pulsing with the warmth of every stage you’ve ever stood on. Happy birthday, shining soul.

items.name: All That Remains
items.descriptionZh: 《All That Remains》是Fozzy于2005年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格融合了重金属与硬摇滚，带有强烈的传统金属旋律和现代冲击感。核心特色在于主唱Chris Jericho（职业摔角手出身）极具戏剧性的嗓音，以及吉他手Rich Ward的凌厉riff，专辑整体偏向直接、有力的节奏编排。
items.descriptionEn: All That Remains is Fozzy's fourth studio album released in 2005, blending heavy metal with hard rock, featuring strong traditional metal melodies and modern punch. Its core feature lies in the dramatic vocals of lead singer Chris Jericho (former professional wrestler) and the sharp riffs of guitarist Rich Ward, with a direct and powerful rhythmic arrangement.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，Chris Jericho正同时活跃于WWE摔角赛事，他经常在比赛结束后连夜飞往录音棚工作。专辑中的歌曲《Enemy》原本是为他的摔角角色创作的主题曲，但因版权问题最终改为独立发行。吉他手Rich Ward回忆，Chris曾在录制时戴着摔角面具进棚，被录音师要求“先摘面具再调音”。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Chris Jericho was actively wrestling in WWE and often flew to the studio after matches. The song 'Enemy' was originally written as a theme for his wrestling persona but was released independently due to copyright issues. Guitarist Rich Ward recalled that Chris once entered the studio wearing his wrestling mask, and the engineer asked him to 'take off the mask before tuning.'
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是美国重金属/硬摇滚乐队，2000年由主唱Chris Jericho和吉他手Rich Ward创立。风格融合传统重金属与现代硬摇滚，代表作包括《All That Remains》和《Chasing the Grail》。乐队以Chris Jericho的摔角明星身份而获得跨界关注，现场演出极具戏剧性。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal/hard rock band formed in 2000 by lead vocalist Chris Jericho and guitarist Rich Ward. Their style blends traditional heavy metal with modern hard rock, with notable albums including All That Remains and Chasing the Grail. The band gained cross-over attention due to Jericho's wrestling fame and is known for theatrical live performances.

01-18.birthdayZh: 1月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《All That Remains》的金属节拍——那些未被磨平的棱角，那些不肯妥协的怒吼，都是你心底最真实的力量。像专辑名字说的那样，所有留下的，都是你一路走来不曾放手的勇气。愿你继续做自己的光，坚硬而温柔地，盛放。
01-18.birthdayEn: January 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted not just you, but also the fierce, unyielding spirit of Fozzy’s "All That Remains"—a reminder that even in heavy times, beauty and strength endure. May your year carry that same resilience, a melody of hope that rises above the noise. Like a great album released into the world, your life is a song still unfolding, each day a new track of light and possibility. Celebrate the masterpiece you are.

items.name: Illustrious
items.descriptionZh: 《Illustrious》是Big Noyd于2008年发行的独立专辑，风格扎根于东海岸硬核说唱，以粗粝的街头叙事和厚重的节拍为特色。核心特色在于Big Noyd低沉、压迫感强的嗓音，以及充满毒品交易和街头生存细节的歌词，制作上大量采样经典灵魂乐片段。
items.descriptionEn: Illustrious is an independent album by Big Noyd released in 2008, rooted in East Coast hardcore hip-hop, characterized by gritty street narratives and heavy beats. Its core feature lies in Big Noyd's deep, menacing vocals and lyrics detailing drug trade and street survival, with production heavily sampling classic soul music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Big Noyd离开主流厂牌后的首张独立作品，大部分录音在纽约皇后区的家庭录音室完成。他曾透露，专辑中歌曲《Recognize》的鼓点采样自一张罕见的1970年代黑人福音唱片，为了拿到版权，他亲自去教堂联系原录音牧师的后人。制作人The Alchemist在混音时坚持使用模拟设备，以保留粗糙的街头质感。
items.storiesEn: This album was Big Noyd's first independent release after leaving a major label, with most recording done in a home studio in Queens, New York. He revealed that the drum sample for 'Recognize' came from a rare 1970s gospel record, and he personally contacted the pastor's descendants to secure rights. Producer The Alchemist insisted on using analog equipment during mixing to preserve the raw street texture.
items.artistIntroZh: Big Noyd是美国说唱歌手，来自纽约皇后区，东海岸硬核说唱代表人物之一。他是Mobb Deep厂牌Tragedy Khadafi门徒，风格以街头纪实和强硬态度著称。代表作包括《Illustrious》和《Episodes of a Hustla》，歌词常聚焦毒品交易与生存挣扎。
items.artistIntroEn: Big Noyd is an American rapper from Queens, New York, a key figure in East Coast hardcore hip-hop. A protégé of Mobb Deep's Tragedy Khadafi, his style is known for street realism and tough demeanor. Notable works include Illustrious and Episodes of a Hustla, with lyrics often focusing on drug trade and survival struggles.

items.name: Gris-Gris
items.descriptionZh: 《Gris-Gris》是Dr. John于1968年发行的首张专辑，风格融合了新奥尔良节奏布鲁斯、巫毒仪式音乐和民谣元素，被广泛归类为迷幻民谣。核心特色在于其神秘、幽暗的氛围，大量使用手鼓、口哨和法语念白，营造出一种地下仪式感。
items.descriptionEn: Gris-Gris is Dr. John's debut album released in 1968, blending New Orleans R&B, voodoo ritual music, and folk elements, widely categorized as psychedelic folk. Its core feature lies in its mystical, dark atmosphere, with extensive use of hand drums, whistles, and French spoken word, creating an underground ritualistic feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Gris-Gris”源自新奥尔良巫毒文化中的护身符。录制时，Dr. John邀请了当地一群街头乐手和巫毒仪式参与者，在法国区一间潮湿的地下室完成。他本人当时深陷毒瘾，录音过程中多次因幻觉中断。制作人Harold Battiste不得不把乐器搬到室外，利用街道的混响声增强巫毒氛围。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Gris-Gris' derives from voodoo talismans in New Orleans culture. During recording, Dr. John recruited local street musicians and voodoo practitioners, recording in a damp basement in the French Quarter. He was heavily addicted to drugs at the time, often halting sessions due to hallucinations. Producer Harold Battiste had to move instruments outside to use street reverb for the voodoo atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是迷幻民谣与巫毒音乐融合的先驱，影响了后来的另类摇滚和世界音乐艺人，如Tom Waits和The Doors。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a pioneer in blending psychedelic folk with voodoo music, influencing later alternative rock and world music artists such as Tom Waits and The Doors.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. John（本名Malcolm John Rebennack）是美国新奥尔良歌手、钢琴家，以融合布鲁斯、放克和巫毒音乐的风格闻名。代表作包括《Gris-Gris》和《In the Right Place》，曾获六项格莱美奖。他的音乐深深植根于新奥尔良文化，舞台形象常以巫毒仪式装扮示人。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. John (born Malcolm John Rebennack) is an American singer and pianist from New Orleans, known for blending blues, funk, and voodoo music. His notable works include Gris-Gris and In the Right Place, and he has won six Grammy Awards. His music is deeply rooted in New Orleans culture, and his stage persona often features voodoo ritual attire.

items.name: 25 Years of Disco-Pop
items.descriptionZh: 《25 Years of Disco-Pop》是Modern Talking于2010年发行的精选合辑，收录了乐队1970年代末至2000年代的标志性迪斯科流行曲目。风格以欧陆迪斯科和流行电音为核心，特色在于Dieter Bohlen制作的合成器旋律和Thomas Anders的柔美假声，节奏明快、旋律洗脑。
items.descriptionEn: 25 Years of Disco-Pop is a compilation album by Modern Talking released in 2010, featuring iconic disco-pop tracks from the late 1970s to 2000s. Stylistically centered on Euro-disco and pop electronic, its core features include Dieter Bohlen's synthesizer melodies and Thomas Anders' smooth falsetto, with upbeat rhythms and catchy hooks.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑的发行正值Modern Talking第二次解散后不久，Dieter Bohlen与Thomas Anders已彻底决裂。���Bohlen回忆，两人在选曲时通过律师传话，避免直接交流。合辑中收录的未发行混音版《Brother Louie '98》原本是为1998年复出准备的，但因Anders对编曲不满而搁置，直到2010年才经Bohlen单方面批准发布。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released shortly after Modern Talking's second breakup, with Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders completely estranged. According to Bohlen, they communicated through lawyers during track selection. The unreleased remix 'Brother Louie '98' was originally prepared for their 1998 comeback but shelved due to Anders' dissatisfaction with the arrangement, only released in 2010 after Bohlen's unilateral approval.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国流行双人组合，由Dieter Bohlen（制作人/词曲）和Thomas Anders（主唱）于1984年成立。风格以欧陆迪斯科和流行电音为主，代表作包括《You're My Heart, You're My Soul》和《Brother Louie》。他们是1980年代欧洲最成功的流行组合之一，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen (producer/songwriter) and Thomas Anders (vocalist). Their style is Euro-disco and pop electronic, with iconic hits including 'You're My Heart, You're My Soul' and 'Brother Louie.' They were one of Europe's most successful pop acts in the 1980s, with global sales exceeding 100 million records.

01-22.birthdayZh: 1月22日，是你的生日。像《Gris-Gris》里巫毒的神秘低语，你自带一种不驯服的温柔，在人生暗处点亮自己的光。又像《Illustrious》的街头叙事，每一步都踩出粗粝却坚定的节拍。你生来就是一首编年史，用风雨写诗，用岁月谱曲，在属于自己的专辑里，做最响亮的副歌。
01-22.birthdayEn: January 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world celebrated the release of Dr. John's *Gris-Gris*, a spellbinding brew of New Orleans mysticism and soul—just as your spirit blends magic and warmth. And in 2010, *25 Years of Disco-Pop* reminded us that joy can be timeless and bright. May your year ahead shimmer with that same resilient, dancing light. You are a melody all your own, born on a day of rhythm and wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Remapping the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Remapping the Human Soul》是Epik High的第三张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、电子与实验元素，以深刻的歌词探讨人性、社会与存在主义。其核心特色在于复杂的叙事结构与多元化的制作风格，展现了韩国嘻哈的成熟与深度。
items.descriptionEn: "Remapping the Human Soul" is Epik High's third studio album, blending hip-hop, electronic, and experimental elements, with profound lyrics exploring humanity, society, and existentialism. Its core feature lies in complex narrative structures and diverse production styles, showcasing the maturity and depth of Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在2007年发行时，Epik High正处于创作高峰期。成员Tablo透露，专辑中多首歌曲的灵感来源于他个人对生命意义的思考，尤其是《Fan》一曲，直接回应了当时粉丝与艺人之间的复杂关系。录制过程中，团队多次推翻重录，力求每一轨的完美。
items.storiesEn: When this album was released in 2007, Epik High was at the peak of their creativity. Member Tablo revealed that many songs were inspired by his personal reflections on the meaning of life, especially "Fan," which directly addressed the complex relationship between fans and artists at the time. During recording, the team repeatedly re-recorded tracks to achieve perfection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是韩国嘻哈史上的里程碑，推动了嘻哈音乐在韩国的艺术化与主流化进程。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in Korean hip-hop history, advancing the artistic and mainstream acceptance of hip-hop in South Korea.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。他们以深刻的歌词和实验性音乐风格闻名，代表作包括《Fly》《Love Love Love》等，是韩国嘻哈界的领军人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their profound lyrics and experimental music style, they are pioneers in Korean hip-hop, with hits like "Fly" and "Love Love Love."

items.name: Octopus
items.descriptionZh: 《Octopus》是The Human League于1995年发行的专辑，风格偏向流行与电子舞曲，融合了合成器流行与新浪潮元素。其核心特色在于流畅的旋律与精致的电子编曲，展现了乐队在90年代对流行音乐的独特诠释。
items.descriptionEn: "Octopus" is an album by The Human League released in 1995, leaning towards pop and electronic dance music, blending synth-pop and new wave elements. Its core feature lies in smooth melodies and refined electronic arrangements, showcasing the band's unique interpretation of pop music in the 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 《Octopus》的录制过程充满挑战，因为乐队在90年代初期经历了成员变动和商业低谷。主唱Philip Oakey曾表示，这张专辑是他们重新定义自我的尝试，其中《Tell Me When》成为英国热门单曲，帮助乐队重回公众视野。
items.storiesEn: The recording of "Octopus" was challenging, as the band experienced member changes and commercial decline in the early 1990s. Lead singer Philip Oakey stated that this album was an attempt to redefine themselves, with "Tell Me When" becoming a UK hit single, helping the band return to public attention.
items.artistIntroZh: The Human League是英国流行电子乐队，成立于1977年，以合成器流行和新浪潮风格著称。代表作包括《Don't You Want Me》《Human》等，是80年代英国流行音乐的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: The Human League is a British pop electronic band formed in 1977, known for synth-pop and new wave styles. Their hits include "Don't You Want Me" and "Human," making them an iconic group in 1980s British pop music.

01-23.birthdayZh: 1月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Remapping the Human Soul》，像在提醒你：灵魂的版图可以不断重绘，每一次挣扎都是重生的刻度。而《Octopus》的电子暗潮，恰如你体内沉默奔涌的韧性。你生来便是自己的地图与航船，在冷峻与深邃中，掌舵向暖。
01-23.birthdayEn: January 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Remapping the Human Soul” by Epik High, a fearless album that charts a new course through pain and hope, and “Octopus” by The Human League, a synth-pop pulse that dances with resilience. Like these albums, your life remaps the soul with courage and beats with its own bright rhythm. May your year be a symphony of reinvention and joy, every note a testament to your beautiful, evolving story. Happy birthday.

items.name: Got to Be There
items.descriptionZh: 《Got to Be There》是Michael Jackson于1972年发行的首张个人录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合了流行与摩城音乐元素。其核心特色在于Jackson童声的纯净与情感表达，展现了他早期作为天才歌手的潜力。
items.descriptionEn: "Got to Be There" is Michael Jackson's debut solo studio album released in 1972, primarily in R&B and soul styles, blending pop and Motown elements. Its core feature lies in Jackson's pure childhood vocals and emotional expression, showcasing his early potential as a prodigious singer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，Michael Jackson年仅13岁，仍与兄长们组成The Jackson 5活跃。制作人Berry Gordy特意为他挑选了柔和的歌曲来突出其嗓音特点。专辑同名曲《Got to Be There》原本是为另一艺人创作，但Jackson的演绎使其成为经典。
items.storiesEn: When this album was recorded, Michael Jackson was only 13 years old and still active with The Jackson 5. Producer Berry Gordy specifically selected soft songs to highlight his vocal characteristics. The title track "Got to Be There" was originally written for another artist, but Jackson's rendition made it a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Michael Jackson确立了个人艺人身份，为他日后的巨星之路奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped establish Michael Jackson as a solo artist, laying the foundation for his future superstardom.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以R&B、流行和灵魂乐闻名，代表作包括《Thriller》《Billie Jean》等，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the "King of Pop." Renowned for R&B, pop, and soul, his hits include "Thriller" and "Billie Jean," making him one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century.

01-24.birthdayZh: 1月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Got to Be There》，像你一样，那个少年用灵魂宣告“我必到场”——生命本就该勇敢奔赴。愿你在自己的旋律里，永远记得：你值得被珍视，如同每一段温暖和弦，都是时光馈赠的礼物。
01-24.birthdayEn: January 24 is your birthday. On this very day, Michael Jackson’s “Got to Be There” first sang its hopeful notes into the world—a debut album brimming with the spirit of beginning, of finding your place and shining. Like that record, your life carries the melody of presence and warmth. May this year feel like a fresh verse: steady, bright, and full of the promise that you are exactly where you are meant to be. Happy birthday to a soul who makes every day a little more like a song.

items.name: Chasing the Grail
items.descriptionZh: 《Chasing the Grail》是Fozzy于2010年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以硬摇滚和重金属为主，融合了传统摇滚与力量金属元素。其核心特色在于强劲的吉他与主唱Chris Jericho的激昂嗓音，展现了乐队对经典摇滚的致敬与创新。
items.descriptionEn: "Chasing the Grail" is Fozzy's fourth studio album released in 2010, primarily in hard rock and heavy metal styles, blending traditional rock with power metal elements. Its core feature lies in powerful guitars and lead singer Chris Jericho's passionate vocals, showcasing the band's tribute to and innovation of classic rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感部分来源于主唱Chris Jericho作为职业摔角手的经历，他曾在巡演途中利用空闲时间写词。录制过程中，乐队邀请了多位客座乐手参与，包括吉他大师Zakk Wylde，为专辑增添了更多金属质感。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration partly came from lead singer Chris Jericho's career as a professional wrestler, who wrote lyrics during his spare time on tour. During recording, the band invited several guest musicians, including guitar legend Zakk Wylde, adding more metallic texture to the album.
items.artistIntroZh: Fozzy是美国重金属乐队，由主唱Chris Jericho和吉他手Rich Ward创立。他们的音乐风格融合硬摇滚与重金属，代表作包括《Enemy》《Judas》等，以高能量现场演出著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Fozzy is an American heavy metal band founded by lead singer Chris Jericho and guitarist Rich Ward. Their music blends hard rock and heavy metal, with hits like "Enemy" and "Judas," known for high-energy live performances.

01-26.birthdayZh: 1月26日，是你的生日。那一天，《Chasing the Grail》也来到世界，像为你准备的隐喻——追寻圣杯，不是抵达终点，而是有勇气踏上旅途。愿你在新的一岁，如同那史诗般的吉他旋律，既有力量劈开荆棘，也有温柔接住星光。世间所有值得的，都在你前进的方向。
01-26.birthdayEn: January 26 is your birthday. On this day in history, the album Chasing the Grail by Fozzy was unleashed, a thunderous blend of heavy metal and hard rock that speaks to the gritty, relentless pursuit of dreams. May your new year be a heroic quest of your own, filled with the fierce energy of chasing what sets your soul on fire, and the quiet warmth of knowing you are deeply celebrated. Shine on.

items.name: Born to Die
items.descriptionZh: 《Born to Die》是Lana Del Rey于2012年发行的首张主流录音室专辑，风格以独立摇滚和巴洛克流行为主，融合了嘻哈节奏与电影配乐元素。其核心特色在于复古的忧郁氛围与Del Rey低沉嗓音的叙事感，营造出独特的“好莱坞悲剧”美学。
items.descriptionEn: "Born to Die" is Lana Del Rey's debut major-label studio album released in 2012, primarily in indie rock and baroque pop styles, blending hip-hop rhythms and cinematic elements. Its core feature lies in its vintage melancholic atmosphere and Del Rey's low-pitched narrative vocals, creating a unique "Hollywood sadcore" aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行伴随争议，因为Lana Del Rey在2011年因单曲《Video Games》走红后，被批评为“制造虚假艺术形象”。她后来透露，专辑中许多歌曲写于纽约的公寓，灵感来自她对美国梦的幻灭感。制作过程中，她与多位制作人合作，包括Emile Haynie和Rick Nowels。
items.storiesEn: The album's release was accompanied by controversy, as Lana Del Rey was criticized for creating a "fake artistic persona" after her breakout single "Video Games" in 2011. She later revealed that many songs were written in her New York apartment, inspired by her disillusionment with the American Dream. During production, she collaborated with multiple producers, including Emile Haynie and Rick Nowels.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了2010年代的独立流行美学，影响了后续许多女性唱作人的音乐风格与视觉呈现。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album defined the indie pop aesthetic of the 2010s, influencing the musical style and visual presentation of many subsequent female singer-songwriters.
items.artistIntroZh: Lana Del Rey是美国歌手、词曲作者，以独立摇滚和巴洛克流行风格著称。她的音乐充满电影感与怀旧情绪，代表作包括《Summertime Sadness》《Young and Beautiful》等，是当代流行文化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Lana Del Rey is an American singer and songwriter, known for indie rock and baroque pop styles. Her music is cinematic and nostalgic, with hits like "Summertime Sadness" and "Young and Beautiful," making her an iconic figure in contemporary pop culture.

01-27.birthdayZh: 1月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Born to Die》——像Lana Del Rey歌声里那朵在废墟中盛开的玫瑰，不必害怕凋零，因为生命正是在破碎与重生中愈发璀璨。你降生的这一天，注定带着这样的灵魂：在时光的褶皱里，永远拥有重新开始的勇气。祝你生日快乐，继续闪耀。
01-27.birthdayEn: January 27 is your birthday. On this date, the world was gifted “Born to Die,” Lana Del Rey’s lush, cinematic debut that dares to find beauty in melancholy and grace in reinvention. Like that album, you carry a spirit of bold vulnerability—a quiet strength that transforms life’s highs and lows into art. May your new year be a symphony of golden light and fearless beginnings, where every note feels like a promise kept. You are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: A Love Supreme
items.descriptionZh: 《A Love Supreme》是约翰·科尔特兰在1965年发行的爵士乐经典专辑，融合了硬波普、自由爵士与灵性探索。其核心特色在于四部曲结构的史诗性叙事，以萨克斯风为主导，通过即兴演奏与主题变奏表达对信仰的虔诚。音乐充满情感张力，节奏复杂而富有层次，是科尔特兰晚期艺术巅峰的象征。
items.descriptionEn: A Love Supreme is a classic jazz album by John Coltrane, released in 1965, blending hard bop, free jazz, and spiritual exploration. Its core feature is the epic four-part suite structure, led by saxophone, expressing devotion through improvisation and thematic variation. The music is emotionally intense, rhythmically complex, and layered, symbolizing Coltrane's late artistic peak.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1964年12月，仅用一天时间在Rudy Van Gelder的录音室完成。科尔特兰在录制前曾经历药物戒断，并转向精神信仰，专辑的灵感源于他与上帝的和解。录音过程中，他带领四重奏即兴创作，尤其是贝斯手Jimmy Garrison的独奏部分被保留，展现了团队的默契与瞬间灵感。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded in a single day in December 1964 at Rudy Van Gelder's studio. Coltrane had overcome drug addiction and turned to spiritual faith, drawing inspiration from his reconciliation with God. During recording, he led the quartet in improvisation, notably preserving bassist Jimmy Garrison's solo, showcasing the team's chemistry and spontaneous creativity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《A Love Supreme》被公认为爵士乐史上最伟大的专辑之一，影响了后世的灵性爵士与自由爵士发展，并成为跨流派音乐家的灵感源泉。
items.historicalImpactEn: A Love Supreme is widely regarded as one of the greatest jazz albums of all time, influencing spiritual jazz and free jazz, and inspiring musicians across genres.
items.artistIntroZh: 约翰·科尔特兰（John Coltrane）是美国爵士萨克斯风手与作曲家，以硬波普和自由爵士风格著称。代表作包括《Giant Steps》和《A Love Supreme》，他革新了爵士乐的和声与即兴语言，被誉为20世纪最具影响力的爵士音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: John Coltrane was an American jazz saxophonist and composer, known for hard bop and free jazz. His masterpieces include Giant Steps and A Love Supreme. He revolutionized jazz harmony and improvisation, regarded as one of the most influential jazz musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: A New Flame
items.descriptionZh: 《A New Flame》是Simply Red于1989年发行的R&B/Soul专辑，融合了灵魂乐、流行和放克元素。核心特色是主唱Mick Hucknall充满情感的嗓音，搭配流畅的旋律和精致的编曲，尤其是翻唱经典曲目《If You Don't Know Me by Now》成为标志性作品。专辑整体氛围温暖而怀旧。
items.descriptionEn: A New Flame is an R&B/Soul album by Simply Red, released in 1989, blending soul, pop, and funk. Its core feature is Mick Hucknall's emotive vocals, paired with smooth melodies and refined arrangements, especially the iconic cover of If You Don't Know Me by Now. The album exudes a warm, nostalgic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《If You Don't Know Me by Now》原为Harold Melvin & The Blue Notes的1972年作品，Hucknall在录制时坚持保留原曲的灵魂精髓，并加入现代编曲。制作人Stewart Levine曾建议简化节奏部分，但Hucknall坚持采用更复杂的和声层，最终版本成为乐队最成功的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: The track If You Don't Know Me by Now was originally by Harold Melvin & The Blue Notes from 1972. Hucknall insisted on preserving the original soul essence while adding modern arrangements. Producer Stewart Levine suggested simplifying the rhythm section, but Hucknall opted for complex harmonies, resulting in one of the band's most successful singles.
items.artistIntroZh: Simply Red是一支英国灵魂乐和流行乐队，成立于1985年，主唱Mick Hucknall以其独特的嗓音和舞台魅力著称。代表作包括《Holding Back the Years》和《Stars》，乐队在全球销量超过5000万张，是1980-90年代最具代表性的灵魂乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Simply Red is a British soul and pop band formed in 1985, fronted by Mick Hucknall, known for his distinctive voice and stage presence. Their hits include Holding Back the Years and Stars, with over 50 million records sold worldwide, making them one of the most iconic soul bands of the 1980s-90s.

items.name: Ambient 1: Music for Airports
items.descriptionZh: 《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》是Brian Eno于1979年发行的电子氛围音乐专辑，开创了氛围音乐流派。其核心特色在于缓慢、循环的合成器音景，旨在营造放松且不引人注意的背景环境。Eno通过分层旋律和极简主义手法，创造出一种空间感与宁静氛围，彻底改变了音乐的功能性体验。
items.descriptionEn: Ambient 1: Music for Airports is an electronic ambient album by Brian Eno, released in 1979, pioneering the ambient music genre. Its core feature is slow, looping synthesizer soundscapes designed to create a relaxing, unobtrusive background. Eno used layered melodies and minimalism to evoke spatial tranquility, transforming the functional experience of music.
items.storiesZh: Eno创作此专辑的灵感源于在机场等待航班时的焦虑体验，他意识到传统音乐无法缓解环境压力。录制时，他采用“生成音乐”概念，通过磁带循环和随机处理，让声音自然演化。专辑封面设计也极简，呼应音乐理念，最初发行时曾被部分电台认为“太安静”而拒绝播放。
items.storiesEn: Eno drew inspiration from his anxious experience waiting at airports, realizing traditional music couldn't ease environmental stress. He used 'generative music' concepts, employing tape loops and random processes to let sounds evolve naturally. The minimalist cover art echoed the music's philosophy; some radio stations initially refused to play it for being 'too quiet'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Music for Airports》定义了氛围音乐的标准，影响了电子音乐、电影配乐和冥想音乐的发展，被公认为氛围音乐的里程碑之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: Music for Airports defined the standard for ambient music, influencing electronic music, film scores, and meditation music, widely regarded as a milestone in the ambient genre.
items.artistIntroZh: Brian Eno是英国音乐家、制作人和视觉艺术家，被誉为氛围音乐之父。他以实验性电子音乐和制作手段著称，代表作包括《Another Green World》和《Music for Airports》。Eno还参与U2、Coldplay等乐队的制作，对现代音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and visual artist, known as the father of ambient music. He is renowned for experimental electronic works such as Another Green World and Music for Airports. Eno has also produced for U2 and Coldplay, profoundly influencing modern music.

02-01.birthdayZh: 2月1日，是你的生日。这一天，John Coltrane的《A Love Supreme》如灼热的祈祷在时空里回响——那是灵魂向宇宙交付的炽诚与安宁。像Brian Eno的《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》一样，你的存在本身就是一种温柔的背景，让所有靠近的人都找到停靠的节奏。愿你如这天的音符：既敢燃烧，也懂沉静。
02-01.birthdayEn: February 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us both the sacred devotion of John Coltrane’s A Love Supreme and the calm, expansive hope of Brian Eno’s Ambient 1: Music for Airports. May your year ahead feel like that great jazz suite—a heartfelt offering to every beautiful moment—and as tranquil as drifting through sunlit skies. You are a harmony of strength and stillness, and today the universe celebrates your unique note in this song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Airmax Muzik
items.descriptionZh: 《Airmax Muzik》是德国说唱歌手Fler于2007年发行的Hip-Hop专辑，融合了德国硬核说唱与街头叙事风格。核心特色在于Fler粗犷的嗓音和直白的歌词，内容聚焦于社会底层生活与个人奋斗。专辑节奏强劲，制作上采用典型东海岸嘻哈节拍，展现了德国嘻哈的硬朗一面。
items.descriptionEn: Airmax Muzik is a Hip-Hop album by German rapper Fler, released in 2007, blending German hardcore rap with street narrative style. Its core feature is Fler's gritty vocals and direct lyrics, focusing on underclass life and personal struggle. The album features strong beats and East Coast hip-hop production, showcasing German hip-hop's toughness.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，Fler因与另一位德国说唱歌手Bushido的公开矛盾而备受关注，部分歌词被指影射对手。录制过程中，Fler在柏林的工作室与制作人深入合作，强调真实生活体验。专辑名称《Airmax Muzik》源自他对耐克运动鞋的喜爱，象征街头文化符号。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, Fler was in the spotlight due to a public feud with fellow German rapper Bushido, with some lyrics allegedly referencing him. During recording, Fler collaborated closely with producers in a Berlin studio, emphasizing real-life experiences. The title Airmax Muzik came from his love for Nike sneakers, symbolizing street culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Fler（本名Patrick Losensky）是德国说唱歌手和音乐制作人，以硬核嘻哈风格著称。他是德国嘻哈界的重要人物，代表作包括《Trendsetter》和《Airmax Muzik》。Fler以直白的街头叙事和争议性歌词闻名，对德国嘻哈发展有显著影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Fler (born Patrick Losensky) is a German rapper and music producer, known for hardcore hip-hop style. He is a key figure in German hip-hop, with albums like Trendsetter and Airmax Muzik. Fler is famous for his direct street narratives and controversial lyrics, significantly influencing German hip-hop.

items.name: Best of Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of Soul》是韩国流行歌手BoA于2005年发行的精选专辑，涵盖了她早期职业生涯的经典曲目，融合了流行、R&B和舞曲元素。核心特色在于BoA的多语言演唱（韩语、日语、英语）和精湛的舞蹈表演，专辑展示了她在亚洲市场的跨文化影响力，旋律上口且制作精良。
items.descriptionEn: Best of Soul is a compilation album by South Korean pop singer BoA, released in 2005, featuring classic tracks from her early career, blending pop, R&B, and dance. Its core feature is BoA's multilingual singing (Korean, Japanese, English) and polished dance performance, showcasing her cross-cultural influence in Asia with catchy melodies and refined production.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集收录了BoA在韩国和日本发行的热门单曲，包括《Valenti》和《Every Heart》。录制期间，BoA同时忙于日韩两地的宣传活动，曾因行程密集而在录音室短暂休息。专辑发行后，她成为首位在日本Oricon专辑榜夺冠的韩国女歌手，进一步巩固了韩流先锋地位。
items.storiesEn: This compilation includes BoA's hit singles from Korea and Japan, such as Valenti and Every Heart. During recording, BoA was busy with promotions in both countries, occasionally resting briefly in the studio due to tight schedules. After release, she became the first Korean female artist to top Japan's Oricon albums chart, solidifying her role as a Hallyu pioneer.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Best of Soul》标志着韩流音乐在日本市场的突破，BoA的成功为后来K-pop艺人的国际化铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: Best of Soul marked a breakthrough for K-pop in the Japanese market, with BoA's success paving the way for future K-pop artists' international expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（本名权宝雅）是韩国女歌手和舞者，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她以流行和R&B风格著称，代表作包括《No.1》和《Valenti》。BoA是韩流文化的开拓者之一，成功进军日本和美国市场，在全球拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (born Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean singer and dancer, known as the 'Star of Asia.' She is renowned for pop and R&B styles, with hits like No.1 and Valenti. BoA is a Hallyu pioneer, successfully entering Japanese and American markets, with global influence.

items.name: Killers
items.descriptionZh: 《Killers》是Iron Maiden的第二张录音室专辑，延续了英国重金属新浪潮的凶猛与旋律性。核心特色在于贝斯手Steve Harris主导的复杂编曲、Paul Di'Anno粗粝的嗓音，以及吉他手Dave Murray与Adrian Smith的双吉他交织。专辑中的《Wrathchild》和《Murders in the Rue Morgue》成为早期经典，整体氛围比首张更具侵略性与戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: Killers is Iron Maiden's second studio album, continuing the ferocity and melody of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Its core features include bassist Steve Harris's complex arrangements, Paul Di'Anno's gritty vocals, and the twin guitar interplay of Dave Murray and Adrian Smith. Tracks like 'Wrathchild' and 'Murders in the Rue Morgue' became early classics, with an overall atmosphere more aggressive and theatrical than the debut.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1981年，正值乐队在伦敦的录音室中紧张巡演间隙。主唱Paul Di'Anno因声带问题在录音时表现不稳定，但制作人Martin Birch巧妙利用多轨录音弥补了不足。有趣的是，专辑封面首次引入了乐队吉祥物Eddie的完整形象，由艺术家Derek Riggs创作，Eddie手持斧头站在血泊中的画面后来成为重金属文化的标志性符号。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1981 during breaks from touring, the album sessions at London's studios saw vocalist Paul Di'Anno struggling with vocal cord issues, but producer Martin Birch compensated with multi-track techniques. Notably, the cover art introduced the full depiction of mascot Eddie by artist Derek Riggs, standing with an axe in a pool of blood, later becoming an iconic symbol in heavy metal culture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Killers》巩固了Iron Maiden在英国重金属新浪潮中的领军地位，并为后续的经典阵容（Bruce Dickinson加入）奠定了风格基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: Killers solidified Iron Maiden's leadership in the New Wave of British Heavy Metal and laid the stylistic groundwork for the classic lineup with Bruce Dickinson.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是一支来自英国伦敦的重金属乐队，成立于1975年。以复杂的编曲、史诗般的歌词和吉祥物Eddie闻名，代表作包括《The Number of the Beast》和《Fear of the Dark》。他们是全球最具影响力的重金属乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden is a heavy metal band from London, UK, formed in 1975. Known for complex arrangements, epic lyrics, and mascot Eddie, their代表作 include 'The Number of the Beast' and 'Fear of the Dark'. They are one of the most influential heavy metal bands globally.

02-02.birthdayZh: 2月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Killers》的铁骨与力量，也流淌着《Best of Soul》的温柔与蜕变。你像那重金属的鼓点般坚定，又像精选辑里的旋律般珍贵。愿你的新一岁既有披荆斩棘的勇气，也有珍藏美好的心。生日快乐，人间因你而多了一首好歌。
02-02.birthdayEn: February 2 is your birthday. On this day, the raw energy of Iron Maiden’s *Killers* was unleashed, and the soulful journey of BoA’s *Best of Soul* began—a perfect balance of fire and grace. May your year ahead be a powerful anthem of courage, like those roaring riffs, and a tender melody of heart, like those soulful notes. You are a unique album in this world’s story, and today the world celebrates the masterpiece that is you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Nocturama
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Nocturama》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds的第十二张录音室专辑，融合了后朋克、哥特摇滚与布鲁斯元素。核心特色在于Nick Cave低沉、戏剧化的嗓音与Bad Seeds的黑暗、氛围化器乐编排。专辑中《Wonderful Life》和《He Wants You》展现了叙事性歌词与阴郁旋律的碰撞，整体风格沉静而压抑。
items.descriptionEn: Nocturama is the 12th studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, blending post-punk, gothic rock, and blues. Its core features Nick Cave's deep, theatrical vocals with the Bad Seeds' dark, atmospheric instrumentation. Tracks like 'Wonderful Life' and 'He Wants You' showcase narrative lyrics against melancholic melodies, creating a subdued yet oppressive mood.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于2002年底至2003年初，在伦敦和法国南部的工作室进行。期间Nick Cave正经历个人生活的转变，包括与妻子Susie Bick的婚姻稳定期，这影响了歌词中关于爱与失去的主题。有趣的是，专辑中的《Bring It On》原本是为电影《The Proposition》创作，但未被采用，最终收入此专辑。
items.storiesEn: Recorded from late 2002 to early 2003 in London and southern France, the sessions coincided with Nick Cave's stable marriage to Susie Bick, influencing themes of love and loss. Interestingly, 'Bring It On' was originally written for the film 'The Proposition' but was rejected and later included on this album.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds是一支来自澳大利亚的后朋克/哥特摇滚乐队，成立于1983年。主唱Nick Cave以黑暗、诗意的歌词和戏剧化表演著称，代表作包括《Murder Ballads》和《The Boatman's Call》。乐队在全球另类音乐界具有深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds is an Australian post-punk/gothic rock band formed in 1983. Frontman Nick Cave is known for dark, poetic lyrics and theatrical performances, with代表作 including 'Murder Ballads' and 'The Boatman's Call'. The band has profound influence in global alternative music.

items.name: I-Magination
items.descriptionZh: 《I-Magination》是日本歌手奥井雅美的第16张原创专辑，融合了流行、摇滚与电子元素。核心特色在于奥井雅美标志性的高亢嗓音与充满活力的编曲，歌词多聚焦于自我激励与幻想主题。专辑中的《UNLIMITED》和《Moment》展现了J-Pop的爽朗旋律与力量感。
items.descriptionEn: I-Magination is the 16th original album by Japanese singer Masami Okui, blending pop, rock, and electronic elements. Its core features Okui's signature high-pitched vocals and energetic arrangements, with lyrics focusing on self-empowerment and fantasy. Tracks like 'UNLIMITED' and 'Moment' showcase J-Pop's bright melodies and power.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行于2010年，正值奥井雅美出道15周年。她亲自参与了大部分词曲创作，并邀请了多位音乐人合作，包括吉他手MACARONI☆。录制过程中，奥井坚持使用模拟设备以保留声音的温暖感，这在数字时代较为罕见。专辑标题“I-Magination”是她自创的词汇，意为“我的想象”。
items.storiesEn: Released in 2010 for her 15th career anniversary, Okui wrote most of the lyrics and music, collaborating with musicians like guitarist MACARONI☆. She insisted on using analog equipment during recording to retain warmth, rare in the digital age. The title 'I-Magination' is a coined term meaning 'my imagination'.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美是日本女性歌手兼词曲作者，出生于1968年。以高亢嗓音和动感J-Pop/摇滚风格闻名，代表作包括《輪舞-revolution》和《Shuffle》。她是90年代日本动画歌曲界的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a Japanese female singer-songwriter born in 1968. Known for her high-pitched vocals and dynamic J-Pop/rock style, her代表作 include 'Rondo-revolution' and 'Shuffle'. She is a key figure in 1990s Japanese anime song scene.

02-03.birthdayZh: 2月3日，是你的生日。这一天，诞生过《Nocturama》的暗夜诗篇，也诞生过《I-Magination》的想象烈阳。像Nick Cave在阴郁中深掘的力量，也像奥井雅美高亢破云的嗓音——你的人生永远在两种光芒间游走：一面是沉静的内省，一面是跃动的光芒。愿你像这张日子一样，把夜的深邃和日的张扬，都活成自己的歌。
02-03.birthdayEn: February 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds' Nocturama, a darkly luminous album that finds beauty in the shadows. Masami Okui's I-Magination, too, arrived—a spirited invitation to dream beyond boundaries. Like these creations, you carry both depth and vibrant possibility. May your year be a melody woven from quiet strength and bold imagining, each day a new verse of joy and wonder. Happy birthday, dear one—may your story sing with warmth and light.

items.name: Control
items.descriptionZh: 《Control》是Janet Jackson的第三张录音室专辑，标志着她在R&B与流行音乐中的突破。核心特色在于由Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis制作的新杰克摇摆（New Jack Swing）风格，结合了放克、舞曲与电子元素。专辑中《What Have You Done for Me Lately》和《Nasty》展现了Janet独立、自信的女性形象，歌词充满社会意识。
items.descriptionEn: Control is Janet Jackson's third studio album, marking her breakthrough in R&B and pop. Its core features the New Jack Swing style produced by Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, blending funk, dance, and electronic elements. Tracks like 'What Have You Done for Me Lately' and 'Nasty' showcase Janet's independent, confident female persona with socially conscious lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1985年至1986年，在明尼阿波利斯的Flyte Tyme Studios完成。Janet Jackson与制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis的合作是她职业生涯的转折点，她首次全面掌控创作方向，摆脱了父亲Joseph Jackson的控制。专辑标题“Control”正是她个人解放的宣言。单曲《When I Think of You》成为她首支Billboard Hot 100冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: Recorded from 1985 to 1986 at Flyte Tyme Studios in Minneapolis, the collaboration with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis marked a turning point. Janet took full creative control for the first time, breaking free from her father Joseph Jackson's influence. The title 'Control' was her declaration of personal liberation. 'When I Think of You' became her first Billboard Hot 100 #1.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Control》被广泛认为是新杰克摇摆风格的奠基之作，影响了90年代R&B和流行音乐的发展，并确立了Janet Jackson作为独立艺术家的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Control is widely regarded as a foundational album of New Jack Swing, influencing 1990s R&B and pop, and establishing Janet Jackson as an independent artist.
items.artistIntroZh: Janet Jackson是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，出生于1966年。以融合R&B、流行与舞曲的风格闻名，代表作包括《Rhythm Nation 1814》和《The Velvet Rope》。她是全球最畅销的音乐艺术家之一，并以其社会议题歌词影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer, songwriter, and actress born in 1966. Known for blending R&B, pop, and dance, her代表作 include 'Rhythm Nation 1814' and 'The Velvet Rope'. She is one of the best-selling music artists globally, with socially conscious lyrics.

items.name: Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy
items.descriptionZh: 《Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy》是Thin Lizzy的精选集，收录了乐队1971年至1983年间的经典作品。核心特色在于双吉他的和谐演奏与主唱Phil Lynott的独特嗓音，风格融合了硬摇滚、民谣与布鲁斯。曲目包括《The Boys Are Back in Town》、《Jailbreak》和《Whiskey in the Jar》等标志性歌曲。
items.descriptionEn: Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy is a compilation album featuring classics from 1971 to 1983. Its core features twin guitar harmonies and vocalist Phil Lynott's unique voice, blending hard rock, folk, and blues. Tracks include iconic songs like 'The Boys Are Back in Town', 'Jailbreak', and 'Whiskey in the Jar'.
items.storiesZh: 此精选集于1991年发行，旨在纪念Thin Lizzy在70年代至80年代初的辉煌。专辑名称“Dedication”取自乐队1980年的一首未收录单曲，也象征对已故主唱Phil Lynott（1986年去世）的致敬。选曲由乐队前成员和唱片公司共同决定，重点突出了他们在商业上最成功的时期。
items.storiesEn: Released in 1991 to commemorate Thin Lizzy's glory from the 1970s to early 1980s, the title 'Dedication' comes from an unreleased 1980 single and serves as a tribute to late vocalist Phil Lynott (died 1986). Track selection was decided by former members and the label, focusing on their most commercially successful period.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集帮助新一代听众重新发现Thin Lizzy的音乐，巩固了他们作为硬摇滚和双吉他先驱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation helped a new generation rediscover Thin Lizzy's music, cementing their legacy as pioneers of hard rock and twin guitar harmonies.
items.artistIntroZh: Thin Lizzy是一支来自爱尔兰都柏林的硬摇滚乐队，成立于1969年。以双吉他演奏和主唱Phil Lynott的诗意歌词闻名，代表作包括《Jailbreak》和《Live and Dangerous》。他们是70年代最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Thin Lizzy is a hard rock band from Dublin, Ireland, formed in 1969. Known for twin guitar harmonies and vocalist Phil Lynott's poetic lyrics, their代表作 include 'Jailbreak' and 'Live and Dangerous'. They are one of the most influential rock bands of the 1970s.

02-04.birthdayZh: 2月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Control》，那是Janet Jackson宣告自主的节拍，也是你掌控自己人生的序曲。《Dedication: The Very Best of Thin Lizzy》则在提醒，真正的力量来自日复一日的热爱与坚持。愿你在新的一岁里，像这些音符一样，既温柔又坚定，活出属于自己的旋律与光芒。
02-04.birthdayEn: February 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also witnessed the release of Janet Jackson’s *Control*—an anthem of fierce independence and self-discovery. May your year ahead carry that same bold, unapologetic rhythm. And like Thin Lizzy’s *Dedication*, may your journey be a living compilation of resilience and heart, each chapter a song of strength. You are a melody of light and grit. Happy birthday—may the music of your life play on in harmony and joy.

items.name: No Regrets
items.descriptionZh: 《No Regrets》是王菲1993年发行的粤语专辑，风格以流行为主，融合了抒情与轻摇滚元素。核心特色在于王菲空灵而富有张力的嗓音，搭配细腻的编曲，展现了早期她在主流流行音乐中的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "No Regrets" is a Cantonese album released by Faye Wong in 1993, primarily in the pop genre with elements of ballad and soft rock. Its core feature lies in Wong's ethereal yet powerful vocals, paired with delicate arrangements, showcasing her unique charm in mainstream pop during her early career.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，王菲正经历从艺名“王靖雯”回归本名的过渡期。她坚持在专辑中融入更多个人风格，甚至与制作人因选曲产生分歧。最终，专辑中的同名主打歌《No Regrets》成为她音乐转型的标志性作品之一。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Faye Wong was transitioning from her stage name "Shirley Wong" back to her real name. She insisted on incorporating more personal style into the album, even clashing with producers over song selection. The title track "No Regrets" eventually became one of the iconic works of her musical transformation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着王菲从香港主流流行歌手向独立艺术形象转变的开端，为后续的实验风格奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the beginning of Faye Wong's shift from a mainstream Hong Kong pop singer to an independent artistic image, laying the foundation for her later experimental styles.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲是中国香港及华语乐坛著名女歌手，以空灵嗓音和多元音乐风格著称。代表作包括《容易受伤的女人》《红豆》等，曾多次获得国际奖项。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is a renowned Chinese singer from Hong Kong, known for her ethereal voice and diverse musical styles. Her representative works include "Easy to Hurt Woman" and "Red Bean," and she has won multiple international awards.

items.name: Alive
items.descriptionZh: 《Alive》是Meshuggah2010年发行的现场专辑，风格属于前卫金属和极端金属。核心特色在于乐队标志性的复杂节奏、多变的拍号以及沉重的吉他音色，现场录制捕捉了他们的技术性演奏和震撼力。
items.descriptionEn: "Alive" is a live album released by Meshuggah in 2010, falling under progressive metal and extreme metal genres. Its core feature lies in the band's signature complex rhythms, shifting time signatures, and heavy guitar tones, with the live recording capturing their technical prowess and powerful presence.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于乐队在瑞典的几场演出，其中包含了他们经典曲目的现场版本。有趣的是，吉他手Fredrik Thordendal在演出中曾因设备故障即兴调整演奏，反而增加了现场的原始感，被粉丝视为意外亮点。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during several shows in Sweden, featuring live versions of their classic tracks. Interestingly, guitarist Fredrik Thordendal once improvised adjustments during a performance due to equipment failure, which added a raw feel to the show and was considered an unexpected highlight by fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Meshuggah是瑞典的前卫金属乐队，成立于1987年，以极端的节奏复杂性和数学金属风格闻名。代表作包括《Bleed》和《Rational Gaze》，对现代金属音乐产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Meshuggah is a Swedish progressive metal band formed in 1987, known for their extreme rhythmic complexity and math metal style. Their representative works include "Bleed" and "Rational Gaze," and they have profoundly influenced modern metal music.

items.name: The Afterman: Descension
items.descriptionZh: 《The Afterman: Descension》是Coheed and Cambria2013年发行的概念专辑，风格属于流行摇滚和前卫摇滚。核心特色在于叙事性歌词与宏大音乐编排的结合，延续了乐队围绕科幻故事“The Amory Wars”的创作主题。
items.descriptionEn: "The Afterman: Descension" is a concept album released by Coheed and Cambria in 2013, blending pop rock and progressive rock. Its core feature lies in the combination of narrative lyrics and grand musical arrangements, continuing the band's thematic creation around the sci-fi story "The Amory Wars."
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是双专辑《The Afterman》的第二部分，录制过程中主唱Claudio Sanchez曾透露，部分灵感来源于他个人对来世和未知的思考。专辑发行后，乐队还配套推出了漫画书，进一步扩展了故事世界。
items.storiesEn: This album is the second part of the double album "The Afterman." During recording, lead vocalist Claudio Sanchez revealed that some inspiration came from his personal reflections on the afterlife and the unknown. After release, the band also launched a companion comic book to further expand the story world.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria是美国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1995年，以概念专辑和科幻叙事闻名。代表作包括《Welcome Home》和《The Suffering》，在流行摇滚和金属领域都有广泛影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria is an American progressive rock band formed in 1995, known for their concept albums and sci-fi narratives. Their representative works include "Welcome Home" and "The Suffering," with broad influence in pop rock and metal.

02-05.birthdayZh: 2月5日，是你的生日。这一天，王菲唱过《No Regrets》，像在说所有路都走得坦荡，回忆不必回头。而《Alive》在某个角落轰鸣，提醒你活着的节奏不必循规蹈矩。愿你如这两张专辑一般，既有温柔的底气告别过去，又有滚烫的脉搏迎接未来。生日快乐。
02-05.birthdayEn: February 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "No Regrets" by Faye Wong, a reminder that every year is a chance to embrace life with an open heart and no looking back. And "The Afterman: Descension" by Coheed and Cambria whispers that even in the unknown, there is a journey of discovery waiting for you. May your new year be as bold as a live riff and as tender as a Cantonese melody. Shine on, beautifully.

items.descriptionZh: 《604》是Ladytron2001年发行的首张专辑，风格属于电子流行和合成器流行。核心特色在于复古的电子音色与冷冽人声的结合，融合了舞曲节奏和独立音乐气质，营造出独特的未来怀旧感。
items.descriptionEn: "604" is the debut album by Ladytron, released in 2001, in the genres of electronic pop and synth-pop. Its core feature lies in the blend of retro electronic sounds and cold vocals, combining dance rhythms with an indie music aesthetic to create a unique futuristic nostalgia.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“604”来源于乐队早期使用的合成器型号（Roland TR-606和TB-303的复合指代）。录制时，乐队成员多在利物浦的简陋工作室中完成，预算有限但创意十足，部分音效来自二手设备。
items.storiesEn: The album title "604" is derived from the model numbers of synthesizers the band used early on (a combination of Roland TR-606 and TB-303). The recording was mostly done in a modest studio in Liverpool with a limited budget but full of creativity, with some sounds coming from second-hand equipment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是21世纪初电子流行复兴的代表作之一，影响了后来的合成器流行和独立电子乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of the representatives of the early 2000s electronic pop revival, influencing later synth-pop and indie electronic bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Ladytron是英国电子流行乐队，成立于1999年，以合成器主导的音乐和冷艳风格著称。代表作包括《Seventeen》和《Destroy Everything You Touch》，在全球电子音乐界享有盛誉。
items.artistIntroEn: Ladytron is a British electronic pop band formed in 1999, known for their synthesizer-driven music and cool style. Their representative works include "Seventeen" and "Destroy Everything You Touch," earning them acclaim in the global electronic music scene.

items.name: ...Where the Shadows Lie
items.descriptionZh: 《...Where the Shadows Lie》是Battlelore2002年发行的首张专辑，风格属于民谣金属和力量金属。核心特色在于融合了托尔金奇幻文学主题，以双主唱（清嗓与死嗓）和民谣乐器（如笛子）营造出史诗般的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "...Where the Shadows Lie" is the debut album by Battlelore, released in 2002, in the genres of folk metal and power metal. Its core feature lies in its Tolkien fantasy literature themes, with dual vocals (clean and death growls) and folk instruments like flutes creating an epic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芬兰的录音室，乐队成员当时因对托尔金作品的共同热爱而聚在一起。制作过程中，他们特意借来古董乐器以增强中土世界的感觉，而专辑封面设计也直接参考了原著插画。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a Finnish studio, with band members coming together due to their shared love for Tolkien's works. During production, they borrowed antique instruments to enhance the Middle-earth feel, and the album cover design directly referenced original illustrations from the books.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore是芬兰民谣金属乐队，成立于1999年，以托尔金奇幻文学为创作核���。代表作包括《Sword's Song》和《Third Age of the Sun》，在民谣金属领域拥有独特地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore is a Finnish folk metal band formed in 1999, centered around Tolkien fantasy literature. Their representative works include "Sword's Song" and "Third Age of the Sun," holding a unique position in the folk metal genre.

02-06.birthdayZh: 2月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《604》的复古电音，冷艳中藏着温柔的脉搏。还有《Where the Shadows Lie》，在托尔金的奇幻里，旋律如利剑劈开黑暗，却始终指向光。是的——你生来就带着合成器的迷离与金属的倔强。愿你如专辑名般，在现实与幻想的交界处，为自己谱写一首永不退场的生命乐章。
02-06.birthdayEn: February 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard the shimmering electro-pop pulse of Ladytron’s “604,” a debut bursting with the energy of new beginnings, and the epic, shadowy melodies of Battlelore’s “...Where the Shadows Lie,” a testament to strength rising from mystery. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful debut, a symphony of light and depth. May this new year carry you forward with the spark of invention and the quiet power of your own legend. Happy birthday.

items.name: Thug Brothers
items.descriptionZh: 《Thug Brothers》是Layzie Bone于2006年发行的嘻哈专辑，延续了Bone Thugs-N-Harmony标志性的快速说唱与旋律融合风格。作品以街头叙事为核心，搭配厚重低音与流畅节奏，展现了中西部嘻哈的硬朗气质，同时融入R&B元素增强情感层次。
items.descriptionEn: "Thug Brothers" is a 2006 hip-hop album by Layzie Bone, continuing the signature rapid-fire rap and melodic fusion style of Bone Thugs-N-Harmony. Centered on street narratives, it features heavy basslines and smooth rhythms, embodying the gritty Midwest hip-hop sound while incorporating R&B elements for emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Layzie Bone离开Bone Thugs-N-Harmony后的个人作品之一，录制期间他常与兄弟Krayzie Bone在俄亥俄州的地下录音室即兴创作。专辑标题《Thug Brothers》实际源自两人早年街头生活的绰号，部分曲目仅用一天完成词曲。
items.storiesEn: This album is one of Layzie Bone's solo projects after leaving Bone Thugs-N-Harmony. During recording, he often improvised with his brother Krayzie Bone in an underground studio in Ohio. The title "Thug Brothers" actually originates from their early street nicknames, and some tracks were written and composed within a single day.
items.artistIntroZh: Layzie Bone（美国）是嘻哈团体Bone Thugs-N-Harmony的核心成员之一，以极速说唱与多部和声著称。代表作包括《Thuggish Ruggish Bone》和《The Art of War》，个人专辑延续了团体标志性的暗黑旋律风格。
items.artistIntroEn: Layzie Bone (USA) is a core member of the hip-hop group Bone Thugs-N-Harmony, known for rapid-fire rapping and multi-part harmonies. His代表作 include "Thuggish Ruggish Bone" and "The Art of War," while his solo work maintains the group's dark melodic style.

items.name: A Different Kind of Truth
items.descriptionZh: 《A Different Kind of Truth》是Van Halen于2012年发行的摇滚专辑，也是乐队自1984年后首张由David Lee Roth主唱的录音室作品。风格融合硬摇滚与华丽金属，吉他手Eddie Van Halen的招牌点弦与合成器音色贯穿全碟，充满复古能量与即兴张力。
items.descriptionEn: "A Different Kind of Truth" is a 2012 rock album by Van Halen, their first studio release with David Lee Roth on vocals since 1984. Blending hard rock and glam metal, the album features Eddie Van Halen's signature tapping technique and synthesizer tones, delivering vintage energy and improvisational tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中多首曲目源自70年代末未发表的Demo，如《She's the Woman》早在1976年就已创作。录制时Eddie Van Halen坚持使用老式模拟设备，并让儿子Wolfgang（贝斯手）参与编曲，最终在洛杉矶的录音室中完成了这张“迟到”的合作。
items.storiesEn: Several tracks on the album originated from unreleased demos in the late 1970s, such as "She's the Woman," which was written as early as 1976. During recording, Eddie Van Halen insisted on using vintage analog equipment and involved his son Wolfgang (bassist) in arrangements, completing this "long-overdue" collaboration in a Los Angeles studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑标志着Van Halen原始阵容的短暂回归，被乐评视为硬摇滚复兴的重要作品，其商业成功证明了经典阵容的市场号召力。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked a brief reunion of Van Halen's original lineup, hailed by critics as a key work in hard rock revival, with its commercial success proving the market appeal of the classic roster.
items.artistIntroZh: Van Halen（美国）是1970年代崛起的硬摇滚/重金属乐队，以吉他手Eddie Van Halen的创新技巧和主唱David Lee Roth的华丽台风闻名。代表作包括《Jump》《Panama》和《Eruption》，全球销量超8000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Van Halen (USA) is a hard rock/heavy metal band that rose in the 1970s, famed for guitarist Eddie Van Halen's innovative techniques and frontman David Lee Roth's flamboyant stage presence. Hits include "Jump," "Panama," and "Eruption," with over 80 million albums sold worldwide.

02-07.birthdayZh: 2月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种截然不同的真实：一种是《A Different Kind of Truth》，像凡·海伦重新点燃的火焰，告诉你哪怕等待多年，内心的热烈与自由仍能重新出发；另一种是《Thug Brothers》里的街头兄弟情，在粗糙的生活中紧紧相依。所以，愿你拥有重新开始的勇气，也永远被温柔的情谊守护。生日快乐，你值得这世界所有的好。
02-07.birthdayEn: February 7 is your birthday. On this day, the raw, unbreakable spirit of “Thug Brothers” and the triumphant return of Van Halen’s “A Different Kind of Truth” both entered the world. Like those albums, you carry a blend of gritty resilience and joyful fire. May your new year echo with the rhythm of hard-won strength and the electric hum of fresh beginnings. You are a masterpiece in the making, and the world is your stage. Shine on.

items.name: Kingdom of Madness
items.descriptionZh: 《Kingdom of Madness》是德国力量金属乐队Edguy于1997年发行的首张专辑，风格深受欧洲速度金属与古典金属影响。作品以高亢的嗓音、双吉他旋律和史诗般的键盘编排为特色，歌词主题围绕奇幻与神话，展现了早期欧洲力量金属的典型音景。
items.descriptionEn: "Kingdom of Madness" is the 1997 debut album by German power metal band Edguy, heavily influenced by European speed metal and classical metal. Featuring soaring vocals, twin-guitar melodies, and epic keyboard arrangements, its lyrics explore fantasy and mythology, showcasing the quintessential early European power metal soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在德国富尔达的一个小型录音室录制，预算极低，乐队成员甚至自掏腰包支付混音费用。主唱Tobias Sammet当时仅19岁，录制时因紧张多次重唱，最终在制作人帮助下用一周时间完成人声部分。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small studio in Fulda, Germany, with a minimal budget; band members even paid for mixing out of their own pockets. Vocalist Tobias Sammet, then only 19, was so nervous that he re-recorded vocals multiple times, eventually completing them in a week with the producer's help.
items.artistIntroZh: Edguy（德国）是1992年成立的力量金属乐队，以主唱Tobias Sammet的高亢嗓音和华丽金属歌剧风格著称。代表作包括《Vain Glory Opera》和《Hellfire Club》，是欧洲力量金属的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Edguy (Germany) is a power metal band formed in 1992, known for vocalist Tobias Sammet's soaring voice and glam-metal opera style. Key albums include "Vain Glory Opera" and "Hellfire Club," making them a major force in European power metal.

02-08.birthdayZh: 2月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Kingdom of Madness》，那不是疯狂的喧哗，而是少年积蓄已久的力量与热望。愿你在自己的国度里，始终拥有奔跑的勇气和温柔的王权。每一个音符都是为你亮起的灯，请继续向前，成为自己的史诗。
02-08.birthdayEn: February 8 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed the debut album "Kingdom of Madness" by Edguy—a fiery call to embrace your own wild, beautiful power. Like that music, may your year be filled with bold heart and soaring spirit. You are the melody that turns ordinary days into anthems of joy. May the coming season sing with every dream you dare to chase, warm and triumphant as a golden chorus.

items.name: Lonesome Crow
items.descriptionZh: 《Lonesome Crow》是德国摇滚乐队Scorpions于1972年发行的首张专辑，风格融合硬摇滚与迷幻摇滚，带有浓厚的实验色彩。吉他手Michael Schenker的即兴独奏与Rudolf Schenker的节奏吉他形成鲜明对比，歌词充满黑暗诗意，奠定了乐队早期前卫摇滚基调。
items.descriptionEn: "Lonesome Crow" is the 1972 debut album by German rock band Scorpions, blending hard rock with psychedelic rock and a strong experimental edge. Guitarist Michael Schenker's improvisational solos contrast with Rudolf Schenker's rhythm guitar, while lyrics are drenched in dark poetry, establishing the band's early progressive rock foundation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在科隆的Star Studios录制，仅用两周完成，制作人Conny Plank后来成为德国电子音乐先驱。由于预算限制，乐队使用了二手设备，Michael Schenker年仅17岁便贡献了标志性的吉他solo。发行后因宣传不足，初期销量惨淡。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in two weeks at Cologne's Star Studios, the album was produced by Conny Plank, who later became a pioneer of German electronic music. Due to budget constraints, the band used second-hand equipment, and 17-year-old Michael Schenker contributed iconic guitar solos. Poor promotion led to weak initial sales.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Scorpions的起点，这张专辑虽商业失败，但确立了德国硬摇滚的早期声音，对后续欧洲重金属发展有潜在影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Scorpions' debut, this album, despite commercial failure, established an early German hard rock sound and had a latent influence on the development of European heavy metal.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions（德国）是1965年成立的硬摇滚/重金属乐队，以主唱Klaus Meine的高音和标志性抒情曲风闻名。代表作包括《Wind of Change》《Rock You Like a Hurricane》，全球销量超1亿张，是德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions (Germany) is a hard rock/heavy metal band formed in 1965, famed for Klaus Meine's high-pitched vocals and iconic ballads. Hits include "Wind of Change" and "Rock You Like a Hurricane," with over 100 million albums sold worldwide, making them one of Germany's most successful rock bands.

items.name: Live!! Final Attack at Budokan
items.descriptionZh: 《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》是日本流行金属乐队Sex Machineguns于2003年发行的现场专辑，记录其在日本武道馆的最终演出。风格融合高速金属与流行旋律，吉他手兼主唱Anchang的狂野台风与乐队标志性的幽默互动贯穿全场，充满爆发力。
items.descriptionEn: "Live!! Final Attack at Budokan" is a 2003 live album by Japanese pop-metal band Sex Machineguns, capturing their final performance at Nippon Budokan. Blending speed metal with pop melodies, it showcases guitarist/vocalist Anchang's wild stage presence and the band's signature humorous interactions, delivering explosive energy.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出原计划为乐队解散前的告别演唱会，门票在开售后数分钟内售罄。录制时Anchang因过度兴奋摔坏了两把吉他，贝斯手Noisy在安可环节即兴表演了倒立弹奏，成为当晚名场面。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as a farewell concert before the band's disbandment, tickets sold out within minutes. During the show, Anchang smashed two guitars due to overexcitement, while bassist Noisy performed an impromptu handstand during the encore, becoming the night's highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Sex Machineguns（日本）是1996年成立的流行金属乐队，以高速演奏、幽默歌词和夸张舞台效果著称。代表作包括《世直し》和《燃える男の唄》，在日本地下金属圈拥有极高人气。
items.artistIntroEn: Sex Machineguns (Japan) is a pop-metal band formed in 1996, known for high-speed playing, humorous lyrics, and exaggerated stage antics. Key songs include "Yonaoshi" and "Moeru Otoko no Uta," earning a cult following in Japan's underground metal scene.

02-09.birthdayZh: 2月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Lonesome Crow》里沉重的吉他，像孤独中生长的勇气，倔强而自由。后来又有《Live!! Final Attack at Budokan》在台上燃烧，把每一次谢幕都变成新的开始。愿你的生命也如此——在寂静中酝酿力量，在绽放时毫无保留。
02-09.birthdayEn: February 9 is your birthday, a date that carries the spark of creative fire. Like the Scorpions’ *Lonesome Crow*, your year began with the raw potential of a first flight, building your own world note by note. And in the spirit of Sex Machineguns’ *Live!! Final Attack at Budokan*, may you always face life with fearless, electrifying energy. On this day, the universe tuned its strings just for you. May your new year be a powerful, unforgettable anthem, played loud and full of heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Identity
items.descriptionZh: 《Identity》是BoA于2010年发行的电子风格专辑，融合了舞曲、合成器流行和R&B元素。专辑以强烈的电子节拍和未来感音效为核心特色，展现了BoA在电子音乐领域的探索，同时保留了其标志性的流畅旋律和富有张力的演唱风格。
items.descriptionEn: Identity is an electronic album released by BoA in 2010, blending dance, synth-pop, and R&B elements. The album features strong electronic beats and futuristic soundscapes, showcasing BoA's exploration of electronic music while retaining her signature smooth melodies and dynamic vocal style.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Identity》期间，BoA同时活跃于韩国和日本市场，专辑中收录了多首与海外制作人合作的曲目。专辑发行后，她凭借主打歌《Game》在韩国音乐节目中获得一位，展现了她在电子流行领域的突破。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Identity, BoA was active in both the Korean and Japanese markets, collaborating with overseas producers on several tracks. After its release, she won first place on a Korean music show with the lead single Game, showcasing her breakthrough in electronic pop.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国著名女歌手，出生于1986年，以多语言演唱和跨亚洲市场的成功闻名。她的代表作包括《No.1》《Only One》和《Atlantis Princess》，风格涵盖流行、舞曲和R&B。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a renowned South Korean female singer, born in 1986, known for her multilingual singing and success across Asian markets. Her representative works include No.1, Only One, and Atlantis Princess, covering pop, dance, and R&B genres.

items.name: Tapestry
items.descriptionZh: 《Tapestry》是Carole King于1971年发行的经典流行专辑，以钢琴驱动的创作歌手风格为核心，融合了软摇滚和民谣元素。专辑以其真挚的歌词、温暖的嗓音和简洁的编曲著称，成为70年代流行音乐的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Tapestry is a classic pop album released by Carole King in 1971, centered on a piano-driven singer-songwriter style, blending soft rock and folk elements. The album is known for its heartfelt lyrics, warm vocals, and simple arrangements, becoming one of the defining works of 1970s pop music.
items.storiesZh: 《Tapestry》录制于洛杉矶的A&M录音室，King在创作过程中将个人经历融入歌曲，如《It's Too Late》反映了她与词作家搭档托尼·斯特���的婚姻破裂。专辑封面中的King坐在窗边��手里拿着编织物，这一朴素形象成为音乐史上的经典画面。
items.storiesEn: Tapestry was recorded at A&M Studios in Los Angeles, with King infusing personal experiences into the songs, such as It's Too Late reflecting the end of her marriage to lyricist partner Toni Stern. The album cover, featuring King sitting by a window with knitting in hand, became an iconic image in music history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tapestry》在全球销量超过2500万张，获得格莱美年度专辑奖，并推动了70年代创作歌手运动的兴起，对后世歌手如Adele和Taylor Swift产生深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Tapestry has sold over 25 million copies worldwide, won the Grammy Award for Album of the Year, and helped spark the 1970s singer-songwriter movement, profoundly influencing later artists such as Adele and Taylor Swift.
items.artistIntroZh: Carole King是美国创作女歌手，出生于1942年，以钢琴驱动的流行和软摇滚风格著称。她的代表作包括《Tapestry》专辑中的《You've Got a Friend》和《Will You Love Me Tomorrow》，是格莱美奖得主。
items.artistIntroEn: Carole King is an American singer-songwriter, born in 1942, known for her piano-driven pop and soft rock style. Her representative works include You've Got a Friend and Will You Love Me Tomorrow from the Tapestry album, and she is a Grammy Award winner.

items.name: The Art in Heaven Concert
items.descriptionZh: 《The Art in Heaven Concert》是Mike Oldfield于2000年发行的现场摇滚专辑，记录了他于1999年在德国波恩举办的演唱会。专辑融合了前卫摇滚、民谣和电子元素，以复杂的器乐编排和管弦乐伴奏为特色，展现了Oldfield的多元音乐才华。
items.descriptionEn: The Art in Heaven Concert is a live rock album released by Mike Oldfield in 2000, capturing his 1999 concert in Bonn, Germany. The album blends progressive rock, folk, and electronic elements, featuring complex instrumental arrangements and orchestral accompaniment, showcasing Oldfield's diverse musical talents.
items.storiesZh: 这场演唱会是为了支持Oldfield的专辑《The Millennium Bell》而举办，演出中他使用了多种乐器，包括电吉他、键盘和管钟。Oldfield在舞台上与一支大型管弦乐队合作，重现了他经典作品如《Tubular Bells》的宏大音景。
items.storiesEn: The concert was held to support Oldfield's album The Millennium Bell, during which he played multiple instruments including electric guitar, keyboards, and tubular bells. On stage, Oldfield collaborated with a large orchestra to recreate the grand soundscapes of his classic works such as Tubular Bells.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield是英国音乐家、作曲家和制作人，出生于1953年，以前卫摇滚和器乐音乐闻名。他的代表作包括《Tubular Bells》和《Moonlight Shadow》，风格融合摇滚、民谣和电子音乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield is a British musician, composer, and producer, born in 1953, known for progressive rock and instrumental music. His representative works include Tubular Bells and Moonlight Shadow, blending rock, folk, and electronic music.

02-10.birthdayZh: 2月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你绽放《Tapestry》般柔韧的织锦——每一根线都交织着真实的脆弱与坚韧，像Carole King的琴声，在时光里长出温暖的根。而你正亲手谱写自己的《Identity》，在人生的旋律里，越来越清晰、明亮。愿你的每一步，都踏在属于自己的节拍上。
02-10.birthdayEn: February 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Carole King’s Tapestry, a gentle masterpiece of home and heart, and BoA’s Identity, a bold celebration of self. May your year weave together the quiet warmth of belonging and the radiant courage to be uniquely you. Like these albums, may your life sing with harmony and passion. Happy birthday—may every note ahead be filled with light and love.

items.name: DepArture
items.descriptionZh: 《DepArture》是AAA于2009年发行的流行专辑，以明亮活力的J-Pop风格为核心，融合了舞曲、电子和R&B元素。专辑以多成员轮唱和丰富的和声为特色，旋律朗朗上口，展现了AAA作为大型流行团体的能量与魅力。
items.descriptionEn: DepArture is a pop album released by AAA in 2009, centered on bright and energetic J-Pop style, blending dance, electronic, and R&B elements. The album features multi-member vocal exchanges and rich harmonies, with catchy melodies that showcase AAA's energy and charm as a large pop group.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《DepArture》寓意“出发”，象征着AAA在2009年开启新篇章。录制过程中，成员们参与了多首歌曲的编舞和和声编排，特别是主打歌《Break Down》的舞蹈练习强度极大，成员们花费数周时间打磨细节。
items.storiesEn: The album title DepArture symbolizes 'setting off,' marking a new chapter for AAA in 2009. During recording, members participated in the choreography and harmony arrangements of several songs, especially the lead single Break Down, which required intense dance rehearsals over several weeks to perfect the details.
items.artistIntroZh: AAA（Attack All Around）是日本流行男子音乐团体，成立于2005年，以多元化的J-Pop和舞曲风格著称。他们的代表作包括《Break Down》和《Love》，以多成员阵容和充满活力的表演闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: AAA (Attack All Around) is a Japanese pop boy band formed in 2005, known for their diverse J-Pop and dance music style. Their representative works include Break Down and Love, recognized for their multi-member lineup and energetic performances.

02-11.birthdayZh: 2月11日，是你的生日。这天曾有《DepArture》诞生，它唱离别与出发的力量——像你一样，每个转身都通往新的远方。愿你握着这份“出发”的勇气，像拆开世界的礼物，在岁月里轻盈起舞。生日快乐，这日子因你而特别。
02-11.birthdayEn: February 11 is your birthday. On this day, the album "DepArture" by AAA was released—a name that sings of new beginnings, of stepping into the world with courage. May your year ahead feel like that: a beautiful departure from the ordinary, a fresh song on your heart’s playlist. Let your spirit carry the melody of hope and the rhythm of adventure. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today we celebrate the bright, ever-unfolding chapter only you can write. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: See You in the Next Life
items.descriptionZh: 《See You in the Next Life》是Suede于2004年发行的流行风格专辑，融合了华丽摇滚和独立流行元素。专辑以忧郁的旋律、精致的吉他编曲和主唱Brett Anderson标志性的戏剧化嗓音为特色，展现了乐队在后期阶段的成熟与内省。
items.descriptionEn: See You in the Next Life is a pop album released by Suede in 2004, blending glam rock and indie pop elements. The album features melancholic melodies, intricate guitar arrangements, and lead singer Brett Anderson's signature dramatic vocals, showcasing the band's maturity and introspection in their later phase.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Suede在2003年重组后的首张作品，录制于伦敦的录音室。乐队在创作过程中经历了风格转变，从早期华丽摇滚转向更为内敛的流行风格。专辑名称源于主唱Anderson对生命循环的思考，表达了告别与重生的主题。
items.storiesEn: This album was Suede's first release after their 2003 reunion, recorded at a studio in London. The band underwent a stylistic shift during the creative process, moving from early glam rock to a more restrained pop style. The album title stems from lead singer Anderson's reflections on the cycle of life, expressing themes of farewell and rebirth.
items.artistIntroZh: Suede是英国摇滚乐队，成立于1989年，以华丽摇滚和独立流行风格著称。他们的代表作包括《Animal Nitrate》和《Beautiful Ones》，主唱Brett Anderson的独特嗓音和戏剧化表演是其标志。
items.artistIntroEn: Suede is a British rock band formed in 1989, known for their glam rock and indie pop style. Their representative works include Animal Nitrate and Beautiful Ones, with lead singer Brett Anderson's distinctive voice and dramatic performance as their hallmark.

items.name: Temper Temper
items.descriptionZh: 《Temper Temper》是英国金属核乐队Bullet for My Valentine的第四张录音室专辑，延续了其标志性的激流金属与旋律硬核风格。专辑以沉重的吉他Riff、急促的鼓点和咆哮式唱腔为核心，同时融入更多另类金属元素，呈现出更直接、更具攻击性的听觉冲击。制作上偏向商业化的现代金属质感，但保留了乐队一贯的爆发力与情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: Temper Temper is the fourth studio album by Welsh metalcore band Bullet for My Valentine, continuing their signature thrash metal and melodic hardcore style. The album features heavy guitar riffs, rapid drumming, and screamed vocals, incorporating more alternative metal elements for a more direct and aggressive sound. The production leans towards commercial modern metal, while retaining the band's explosive energy and emotional intensity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Matt Tuck因长期巡演导致声带受损，不得不接受手术治疗。康复过程中他调整了唱法，减少了极端嘶吼的比例，这也影响了《Temper Temper》中清嗓与咆哮的平衡。专辑同名曲的MV因涉及暴力与心理扭曲内容，在部分平台被限制播放，反而引发了乐迷对歌曲主题的更多讨论。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, frontman Matt Tuck suffered vocal cord damage from extensive touring and had to undergo surgery. During recovery, he adjusted his vocal technique, reducing the proportion of extreme screams, which influenced the balance between clean vocals and growls on Temper Temper. The music video for the title track was restricted on some platforms due to violent and psychological themes, ironically sparking more discussion among fans about the song's subject matter.
items.artistIntroZh: Bullet for My Valentine是一支来自英国威尔士的金属核乐队，成立于1998年。他们以激流金属与旋律硬核的融合风格闻名，代表作包括《Tears Don't Fall》《Your Betrayal》等。乐队在全球售出超过300万张专辑，是21世纪英国金属乐坛的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Bullet for My Valentine are a Welsh metalcore band formed in 1998, known for blending thrash metal with melodic hardcore. Their代表作 include Tears Don't Fall and Your Betrayal. With over 3 million albums sold worldwide, they are a key representative of 21st-century British metal.

02-12.birthdayZh: 2月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《See You in the Next Life》，仿佛在说每一次告别都是新旅程的序章。你像《Temper Temper》里的火焰，有淬炼后的温度，却从不灼伤谁。愿你在岁月里永远笃定——那些未完成的梦，都在下个路口温柔重逢。
02-12.birthdayEn: February 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, defiant energy of Bullet for My Valentine’s Temper Temper and the dreamy, poetic farewell of Suede’s See You in the Next Life. May your spirit carry that same fire and grace—bold enough to face any storm, tender enough to welcome new horizons. As you step into your next trip around the sun, may every moment feel like a song that’s just waiting for your voice to sing it alive. Happy birthday.

items.name: All Eyez on Me
items.descriptionZh: 《All Eyez on Me》是美国说唱歌手Tupac Shakur的第四张录音室专辑��也是Hip-Hop历史上首张双CD全长专辑。风格横跨西海岸G-Funk、匪帮说唱与硬核说唱，以叙事性的歌词描绘街头生活、社会不公与个人挣扎。专辑制作阵容豪华，包括Dr. Dre、DJ Quik等，旋律流畅且节奏厚重，是90年代Hip-Hop的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: All Eyez on Me is the fourth studio album by American rapper Tupac Shakur, and the first double-disc full-length album in Hip-Hop history. The style spans West Coast G-Funk, gangsta rap, and hardcore rap, using narrative lyrics to depict street life, social injustice, and personal struggles. Featuring production from Dr. Dre, DJ Quik, and others, the album is known for its smooth melodies and heavy beats, representing the pinnacle of 1990s Hip-Hop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Tupac在出狱后仅用两周时间录制的，当时他刚与Death Row Records签约。录制期间，他住在Dr. Dre的录音室里，每天工作超过12小时。专辑标题来自Tupac的一个想法：他觉得自己一直被公众审视，因此用“All Eyez on Me”表达被关注的压力。这张专辑也是他在生前最后一张完全由自己掌控的作品。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two weeks after Tupac's release from prison, shortly after signing with Death Row Records. During recording, he lived in Dr. Dre's studio, working over 12 hours a day. The title came from Tupac's feeling of being constantly scrutinized by the public, expressing the pressure of being watched. This was his last fully controlled project before his death.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《All Eyez on Me》被公认为Hip-Hop史上最伟大的专辑之一，首周销量超越披头士的《Sgt. Pepper's》，并推动了双CD专辑在说唱界的普及。它巩固了Tupac作为文化偶像的地位，并对后世的匪帮说唱与叙事性说唱产生深远影响。
