items.historicalImpactEn: All Eyez on Me is widely regarded as one of the greatest Hip-Hop albums of all time, outselling The Beatles' Sgt. Pepper's in its first week and popularizing the double-disc format in rap. It cemented Tupac's status as a cultural icon and deeply influenced subsequent gangsta rap and narrative rap.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（2Pac）是美国说唱歌手、演员与社会活动家，1971年出生于纽约，是Hip-Hop史上最具影响力的艺人之一。他的音乐融合了政治意识与街头叙事，代表作包括《California Love》《Dear Mama》等。1996年遭枪击身亡，年仅25岁，但其作品至今仍被全球传颂。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (2Pac) was an American rapper, actor, and social activist born in 1971 in New York. One of the most influential figures in Hip-Hop history, his music blended political consciousness with street narratives. His代表作 include California Love and Dear Mama. He was fatally shot in 1996 at age 25, but his work continues to be celebrated worldwide.

items.name: Black Swan Songs
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Swan Songs》是韩国Hip-Hop组合Epik High的第五张录音室专辑，风格融合了流行旋律与嘻哈节奏，呈现出独特的叙事性抒情说唱。专辑以黑天鹅为隐喻，探讨内心矛盾、社会压力与艺术家的孤独感。编曲上大量采用钢琴、弦乐与电子元素，打破了传统嘻哈的界限，展现出强烈的艺术实验性。
items.descriptionEn: Black Swan Songs is the fifth studio album by South Korean Hip-Hop group Epik High, blending pop melodies with hip-hop rhythms to create a unique narrative lyrical rap. Using the black swan as a metaphor, the album explores inner conflict, social pressure, and the loneliness of artists. The arrangement heavily features piano, strings, and electronic elements, breaking traditional hip-hop boundaries and showcasing strong artistic experimentation.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Epik High成员Tablo经历网络暴力与学历争议的低谷期，他通过音乐宣泄情感。专辑中多首歌���的歌词直接反映了他的心理状态，例如《Fan》讽刺了网络仇恨文化。制作人DJ Tukutz因兵役问题中途暂停参与，导致部分曲目由Tablo独自完成，反而让专辑更显个人化。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a low point for Epik High member Tablo, who was experiencing online harassment and academic controversy. He channeled his emotions through music, with several songs directly reflecting his psychological state. For example, Fan satirizes online hate culture. Producer DJ Tukutz had to pause participation due to military service issues, leaving Tablo to complete some tracks alone, which made the album more personal.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Black Swan Songs》被韩国乐评界视为Epik High艺术转型的里程碑，推动了韩国嘻哈向更情感化、文学化方向发展的潮流。专辑中多首歌曲成为后来韩国独立音乐人尝试跨界融合的范本。
items.historicalImpactEn: Black Swan Songs is regarded by Korean music critics as a milestone in Epik High's artistic transformation, pushing Korean hip-hop towards a more emotional and literary direction. Several tracks became templates for later Korean indie artists experimenting with cross-genre fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国Hip-Hop组合，成立于2003年，成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz。他们以诗意化的歌词和跨越嘻哈、流行、摇滚的多元风格著称，代表作有《Fly》《One》等。组合在韩国及亚洲乐坛拥有极高影响力，被誉为韩国嘻哈的开拓者之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High are a South Korean Hip-Hop group formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics and diverse style spanning hip-hop, pop, and rock, their代表作 include Fly and One. They are highly influential in Korean and Asian music, regarded as pioneers of Korean hip-hop.

items.name: Black Sabbath
items.descriptionZh: 《Black Sabbath》是英国乐队Black Sabbath的首张同名专辑，被公认为重金属音乐的奠基之作。风格以低沉的蓝调摇滚为基础，融合了阴暗的吉他Riff、缓慢而沉重的节奏以及主唱Ozzy Osbourne的诡异唱腔。专辑歌词涉及神秘主义、超自然与死亡主题，营造出前所未有的黑暗氛围，彻底改变了摇滚乐的面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Black Sabbath is the debut self-titled album by British band Black Sabbath, widely recognized as the founding work of heavy metal music. Based on dark blues rock, the style features ominous guitar riffs, slow and heavy rhythms, and Ozzy Osbourne's eerie vocals. The lyrics explore mysticism, the supernatural, and death, creating an unprecedented dark atmosphere that fundamentally changed rock music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制仅用两天时间，费用极低，乐队在录音室里现场演奏完成大部分曲目。标志性的开场曲《Black Sabbath》的Riff源自吉他手Tony Iommi在工厂事故中失去指尖后，因使用自制塑料指尖而弹奏出的独特低沉音色。贝斯手Geezer Butler曾回忆，他梦到一个黑色身影站在床边，这个噩梦直接催生了专辑同名曲的歌词。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two days on a very low budget, with most tracks played live in the studio. The iconic riff of the opening track Black Sabbath came from guitarist Tony Iommi's unique low tone, produced by homemade plastic fingertips after he lost his fingertips in a factory accident. Bassist Geezer Butler recalled a nightmare about a black figure standing at his bedside, which directly inspired the lyrics of the title track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Black Sabbath》被公认为第一张重金属专辑，定义了该流派的音乐特征与美学。它启发了无数金属乐队，包括Metallica、Iron Maiden等，并推动了黑暗主题在摇滚乐中的主流化。2005年，该专辑被美国国会图书馆列入国家录音登记册。
items.historicalImpactEn: Black Sabbath is widely considered the first heavy metal album, defining the genre's musical characteristics and aesthetics. It inspired countless metal bands, including Metallica and Iron Maiden, and mainstreamed dark themes in rock music. In 2005, it was inducted into the National Recording Registry by the U.S. Library of Congress.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Sabbath是英国重金属乐队，1968年成立于伯明翰，被尊为重金属音乐的鼻祖。经典阵容包括主唱Ozzy Osbourne、吉他手Tony Iommi、贝斯手Geezer Butler和鼓手Bill Ward。他们的音乐以阴暗的Riff和神秘主义歌词著称，代表作包括《Paranoid》《Iron Man》等，全球销量超过7000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Black Sabbath are a British heavy metal band formed in Birmingham in 1968, revered as the pioneers of heavy metal. The classic lineup includes Ozzy Osbourne (vocals), Tony Iommi (guitar), Geezer Butler (bass), and Bill Ward (drums). Known for dark riffs and mystical lyrics, their代表作 include Paranoid and Iron Man, with over 70 million albums sold worldwide.

02-13.birthdayZh: 2月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Black Sabbath》的沉重与黑暗，也流淌着《All Eyez on Me》的炽热与不驯。可你不必像它们一样对抗什么——只需像此刻一样，安静地接过属于自己的光。那些音符替你活过了风暴，而你值得在风暴之后，成为温柔本身。
02-13.birthdayEn: February 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, unbreakable spirit of Tupac's "All Eyez on Me" and the thunderous dawn of "Black Sabbath"—albums born of power and transformation. Like those records, you carry a soul that is both deep and defiant. May your new year be a masterpiece of your own making, filled with the rhythm of joy and the melody of hope. Shine on, legend.

items.name: Whitney Houston
items.descriptionZh: 《Whitney Houston》是美国歌手Whitney Houston的首张同名录音室专辑，风格以流行灵魂乐和成人当代为主，融合了R&B、舞曲与福音元素。专辑展现了Houston惊人的嗓音跨度与情感表现力，制作精良，旋律优美且富有感染力。歌曲内容以爱情与自我赋权为主，确立了其作为全球流行天后的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Whitney Houston is the debut self-titled studio album by American singer Whitney Houston, primarily in the style of pop soul and adult contemporary, blending R&B, dance, and gospel elements. The album showcases Houston's extraordinary vocal range and emotional expressiveness, with polished production, beautiful melodies, and infectious energy. The lyrics focus on love and self-empowerment, establishing her as a global pop diva.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Houston年仅21岁，但制作人Clive Davis坚持让她在录音中展现最自然的嗓音，避免过度修饰。热门单曲《Saving All My Love for You》原定由男歌手演唱，Davis改由Houston演绎并调整了歌词性别，使之成为经典。专辑录制过程中，Houston的母亲Cissy Houston（福音歌手）经常在旁指导，确保她保持福音唱法的根基。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Houston was only 21, but producer Clive Davis insisted she showcase her natural voice without over-polishing. The hit single Saving All My Love for You was originally intended for a male singer; Davis reassigned it to Houston and adjusted the lyrics' gender, creating a classic. Throughout recording, Houston's mother Cissy Houston (a gospel singer) often guided her to maintain her gospel vocal roots.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Whitney Houston》成为历史上首张由黑人女歌手发行的登上Billboard 200榜首的专辑，并诞生了多首冠军单曲。它打破了种族与性别壁垒，为后来的黑人女性流行歌手如Mariah Carey、Beyoncé铺平了道路。专辑全球销量超过2500万张，是史上最畅销的首张专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Whitney Houston became the first album by a black female artist to top the Billboard 200 chart and spawned multiple number-one singles. It broke racial and gender barriers, paving the way for later black female pop singers like Mariah Carey and Beyoncé. With over 25 million copies sold worldwide, it is one of the best-selling debut albums of all time.
items.artistIntroZh: Whitney Houston是美国歌手、演员与制片人，1963年出生于新泽西州，是史上最畅销的音乐艺人之一。她以跨越五个八度的嗓音和流行灵魂乐风格著称，代表作包括《I Will Always Love You》《Greatest Love of All》等。她获得6项格莱美奖，并在全球售出超过2亿张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Whitney Houston was an American singer, actress, and producer born in 1963 in New Jersey, one of the best-selling music artists of all time. Known for her five-octave vocal range and pop soul style, her代表作 include I Will Always Love You and Greatest Love of All. She won 6 Grammy Awards and sold over 200 million records worldwide.

items.name: Cooleyhighharmony
items.descriptionZh: 《Cooleyhighharmony》是Boyz II Men于1991年发行的首张专辑，虽被标记为Folk/Country，但其核心是R&B和灵魂乐，融合了柔和的和声与流行节奏。专辑以无伴奏合唱为特色，展现了成员们精湛的声乐技巧，情感真挚，旋律流畅，奠定了他们在90年代R&B界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Cooleyhighharmony is the debut album by Boyz II Men, released in 1991. Though tagged as Folk/Country, its core is R&B and soul, blending soft harmonies with pop rhythms. The album features a cappella excellence, showcasing the group's vocal prowess and emotional depth, establishing their status in 1990s R&B.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Boyz II Men仍是费城高中学生，经常在课后赶往录音室。制作人Michael Bivins最初通过朋友介绍听到他们的和声，被深深打动，决定签约。专辑中的《Motownphilly》灵感来自他们少年时期的街头表演经历，歌词中的“Cooleyhighharmony”实际上是他们自创的短语，意为“酷炫的高中和声”。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Boyz II Men were still high school students in Philadelphia, often rushing to the studio after class. Producer Michael Bivins first heard their harmonies through a friend and was deeply moved, deciding to sign them. The track 'Motownphilly' was inspired by their teenage street performances, and the phrase 'Cooleyhighharmony' was their own creation, meaning 'cool high harmony.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了R&B和声团体在90年代的复兴，影响了后来的无伴奏合唱和流行R&B发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album revitalized R&B vocal groups in the 1990s, influencing later a cappella and pop R&B trends.
items.artistIntroZh: Boyz II Men是美国R&B和灵魂乐团体，成立于1988年，来自费城。以多声部和声和情感演绎著称，代表作包括《End of the Road》《I'll Make Love to You》。他们多次获得格莱美奖，是90年代最成功的男子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Boyz II Men is an American R&B and soul group formed in 1988 in Philadelphia. Known for their multi-part harmonies and emotional delivery, their hits include 'End of the Road' and 'I'll Make Love to You.' They have won multiple Grammy Awards and are one of the most successful male groups of the 1990s.

items.name: Evernight
items.descriptionZh: 《Evernight》是芬兰乐队Battlelore于2007年发行的第五张专辑，风格为旋律死亡金属与力量金属的融合，属于Rock范畴。专辑以史诗般的双吉他旋律、沉重鼓点和女声清嗓与男声咆哮的对比为特色，主题围绕托尔金的中土世界传说，营造出黑暗而宏大的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Evernight is the fifth album by Finnish band Battlelore, released in 2007, blending melodic death metal with power metal under the Rock category. It features epic twin-guitar melodies, heavy drums, and contrasting female clean vocals with male growls, themed around Tolkien's Middle-earth legends, creating a dark and grand atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芬兰的Sundi Coop Studios，制作人由乐队吉他手Jyri Vahvanen和Miika Kokkola共同担纲。乐队成员都是托尔金迷，专辑中的歌曲如《House of Heroes》和《The Undying Fire》直接取材于《精灵宝钻》和《魔戒》。主唱Kaisa Jouhki在录制时因感冒嗓音沙哑，但乐队决定保留这种质感，意外增强了歌曲的沧桑感。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Sundi Coop Studios in Finland, co-produced by guitarists Jyri Vahvanen and Miika Kokkola. All band members are Tolkien enthusiasts; songs like 'House of Heroes' and 'The Undying Fire' are directly inspired by 'The Silmarillion' and 'The Lord of the Rings.' Lead vocalist Kaisa Jouhki had a cold during recording, but the band kept her raspy vocals, which added an unintended raw edge to the tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Battlelore是芬兰旋律死亡金属乐队，成立于1999年，来自拉赫蒂。风格融合力量金属和民谣元素，歌词多基于J.R.R.托尔金的奇幻文学。代表作包括《Sword's Song》和《The Last Alliance》，以双主唱（女声清嗓与男声嘶吼）和史诗旋律著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Battlelore is a Finnish melodic death metal band formed in 1999 in Lahti. Their style blends power metal and folk elements, with lyrics based on J.R.R. Tolkien's fantasy works. Notable albums include 'Sword's Song' and 'The Last Alliance,' known for dual vocals (female clean and male growls) and epic melodies.

02-14.birthdayZh: 2月14日，是你的生日。如同惠特妮·休斯顿的首张同名专辑，注定在岁月里闪耀黄金般的光芒——你本身就是一首未完成的流行诗，能唱出灵魂深处的悠扬与力量。也像《Cooleyhighharmony》里那些青春的和声，稚嫩却饱满，每个声部都托起彼此。愿你在自己的节拍里，永远柔软，永远明亮。
02-14.birthdayEn: February 14 is your birthday, a day etched in both love and legend. Like the soul-stirring debut of Whitney Houston, your arrival brought a voice of pure light into the world. And just as Cooleyhighharmony wove harmonies of joy and unity, your spirit connects hearts with effortless grace. May your year ahead echo with that same uplifting melody, a song of hope, resilience, and the kind of love that only a Valentine’s Day child can carry. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: 200 Po Vstrechnoy
items.descriptionZh: 《200 Po Vstrechnoy》是俄罗斯双人组合t.A.T.u.于2002年发行的首张专辑，风格为电子流行（Electronic），融合了舞曲节拍、合成器音效和叛逆的青少年主题。专辑以大胆的歌词和挑衅性形象著称，歌曲《All the Things She Said》成为国际热门，旋律抓耳，节奏强劲。
items.descriptionEn: 200 Po Vstrechnoy is the debut album by Russian duo t.A.T.u., released in 2002, blending electronic pop with dance beats and synthesizers. Known for its provocative lyrics and rebellious teen themes, the track 'All the Things She Said' became an international hit, featuring catchy melodies and strong rhythms.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员Julia Volkova和Lena Katina年仅17岁，制作人Ivan Shapovalov精心策划了她们的争议性形象。歌曲《All the Things She Said》的灵感来自Shapovalov对青少年心理的观察，而MV因描绘同性接吻在多个国家被禁播。专辑俄语版《200 Po Vstrechnoy》名称意为“迎面的200”，象征她们对主流社会的挑战。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members Julia Volkova and Lena Katina were only 17. Producer Ivan Shapovalov crafted their controversial image. The song 'All the Things She Said' was inspired by his observations of teenage psychology, and its music video, featuring a same-sex kiss, was banned in several countries. The Russian title '200 Po Vstrechnoy' means '200 Against the Traffic,' symbolizing their challenge to mainstream society.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了俄罗斯流行音乐的国际突破，并引发了关于青少年性别和性取向的广泛讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album propelled Russian pop music onto the global stage and sparked widespread debate about teenage gender and sexuality.
items.artistIntroZh: t.A.T.u.是俄罗斯电子流行双人组合，由Julia Volkova和Lena Katina组成，成立于1999年。风格以电子舞曲和争议性主题著称，代表作包括《All the Things She Said》和《Not Gonna Get Us》。她们是21世纪初最成功的俄罗斯流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: t.A.T.u. is a Russian electronic pop duo consisting of Julia Volkova and Lena Katina, formed in 1999. Known for their dance-pop sound and controversial themes, their hits include 'All the Things She Said' and 'Not Gonna Get Us.' They were one of the most successful Russian pop acts of the early 2000s.

items.name: Outgrow
items.descriptionZh: 《Outgrow》是韩国歌手BoA于2006年发行的第五张日语专辑，风格为流行（Pop），融合了J-pop、R&B和舞曲元素。专辑以轻快的旋律和成熟的声线为特色，展现了BoA从青少年偶像向全能艺人的转型，主打歌《OUTGROW～Ready butterfly～》充满活力，歌词鼓舞人心。
items.descriptionEn: Outgrow is the fifth Japanese album by South Korean singer BoA, released in 2006, blending J-pop, R&B, and dance elements under the Pop genre. Featuring upbeat melodies and a mature vocal style, it marks BoA's transition from teen idol to all-round artist. The lead track 'OUTGROW～Ready butterfly～' is energetic and lyrically uplifting.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，BoA同时忙于韩国和日本两地的宣传活动，经常在飞机上写歌词。主打歌《OUTGROW～Ready butterfly～》的编曲最初由日本制作人完成，但BoA坚持加入自己的和声部分，使歌曲更具个人色彩。专辑名称“Outgrow”象征她摆脱童星形象，专辑发行后获得日本公信榜周榜第四名。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, BoA was juggling promotional activities in both South Korea and Japan, often writing lyrics on planes. The lead track 'OUTGROW～Ready butterfly～' was initially arranged by Japanese producers, but BoA insisted on adding her own harmonies, giving it a more personal touch. The album title 'Outgrow' symbolizes her shedding her child star image, and it reached No. 4 on the Oricon weekly chart.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（宝儿）是韩国流行女歌手，出生于1986年，活跃于韩国和日本乐坛。以精湛的舞蹈和跨语言演唱能力著称，代表作包括《No.1》《Every Heart》和《Only One》。她是推动K-pop国际化的重要人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA is a South Korean pop singer, born in 1986, active in both Korean and Japanese music scenes. Known for her exceptional dance skills and multilingual singing, her hits include 'No.1,' 'Every Heart,' and 'Only One.' She is a key figure in globalizing K-pop.

items.name: Fly by Night
items.descriptionZh: 《Fly by Night》是加拿大摇滚乐队Rush于1975年发行的第二张专辑，风格为硬摇滚和前卫摇滚（Rock）。专辑以复杂的编曲、激进的吉他riff和Neil Peart富有哲理的歌词为特色，歌曲《Fly by Night》和《Anthem》展现了乐队从布鲁斯摇滚向更技术化风格的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Fly by Night is the second album by Canadian rock band Rush, released in 1975, blending hard rock with progressive rock. Known for complex arrangements, aggressive guitar riffs, and Neil Peart's philosophical lyrics, tracks like 'Fly by Night' and 'Anthem' mark the band's shift from blues rock to a more technical style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是鼓手兼词作者Neil Peart加入Rush后的首张作品，他几乎包办了所有歌词，并引入了科幻和奇幻主题。录制在多伦多的Thunder Sound Studios进行，仅用两周完成。歌曲《By-Tor and the Snow Dog》灵感来自Peart养的两只宠物狗，但被赋予了史诗般的叙事结构，成为乐队早期前卫摇滚的雏形。
items.storiesEn: This album was the first with drummer and lyricist Neil Peart, who wrote nearly all the lyrics, introducing sci-fi and fantasy themes. Recorded at Thunder Sound Studios in Toronto in just two weeks. The track 'By-Tor and the Snow Dog' was inspired by Peart's two pet dogs but given an epic narrative structure, becoming an early blueprint for the band's progressive rock sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着Rush从布鲁斯摇滚向前卫摇滚转型的关键一步，影响了后来无数前卫金属乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked Rush's crucial transition from blues rock to progressive rock, influencing countless later progressive metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Rush是加拿大前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，来自多伦多。以技术性演奏、复杂编曲和科幻主题著称，核心成员包括Geddy Lee、Alex Lifeson和Neil Peart。代表作有《2112》《Tom Sawyer》和《The Spirit of Radio》。他们被誉为前卫摇滚的先锋之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rush is a Canadian progressive rock band formed in 1968 in Toronto. Known for technical musicianship, complex arrangements, and sci-fi themes, key members include Geddy Lee, Alex Lifeson, and Neil Peart. Iconic works include '2112,' 'Tom Sawyer,' and 'The Spirit of Radio.' They are regarded as pioneers of progressive rock.

02-15.birthdayZh: 2月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Fly by Night》与《200 Po Vstrechnoy》——两张关于“蜕变”的专辑。就像Rush乐队从硬摇滚飞向更广阔的前卫天空，也像t.A.T.u.以青春叛逆宣告不被定义的自由。你的出生日，本就是一场勇敢的起飞。愿你像这些旋律一样，在成长中温柔而锋利，成为自己故事里最动人的那首歌。
02-15.birthdayEn: February 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like t.A.T.u.’s “200 Po Vstrechnoy,” a bold debut of electric energy, and Rush’s “Fly by Night,” a soaring leap into new horizons. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful blend of fearless beginnings and adventurous turns. May your year ahead hum with that same spirit—unapologetically loud, endlessly curious, and always reaching for the light. Here’s to you, the masterpiece written every day. Happy birthday.

items.name: Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…
items.descriptionZh: 《Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…》是Tupac Shakur的第二张录音室专辑，融合了西海岸G-Funk与硬核说唱元素，歌词尖锐地探讨了种族不平等、街头暴力与社会压迫。专辑以粗粝的节奏和强烈的叙事性著称，展现了Tupac作为街头诗人的锋芒。
items.descriptionEn: Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.… is Tupac Shakur's second studio album, blending West Coast G-Funk with hardcore hip-hop. Its lyrics sharply address racial inequality, street violence, and social oppression, showcasing Tupac's raw narrative power as a street poet.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Tupac曾因多次法律纠纷而分心，但他仍坚持在加利福尼亚州奥克兰的录音室中完成大部分创作。他曾透露，专辑标题中的“N.I.G.G.A.Z.”代表“Never Ignorant Getting Goals Accomplished”，意在将贬义词转化为自我赋权的宣言。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Tupac was often distracted by legal troubles but still insisted on completing most tracks at a studio in Oakland, California. He revealed that the acronym 'N.I.G.G.A.Z.' stands for 'Never Ignorant Getting Goals Accomplished,' aiming to reclaim a derogatory term as a statement of empowerment.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Tupac在90年代嘻哈界的核心地位，其政治意识与情感张力影响了后来无数说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Tupac's central role in 1990s hip-hop, with its political awareness and emotional intensity influencing countless later rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（美国，1971-1996）是嘻哈史上最具影响力的艺术家之一，以激进的社会评论和情感充沛的叙事著称。代表作包括《All Eyez on Me》和《Me Against the World》。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (American, 1971-1996) is one of the most influential figures in hip-hop history, known for his radical social commentary and emotionally charged storytelling. Key works include 'All Eyez on Me' and 'Me Against the World'.

items.name: Years of Refusal
items.descriptionZh: 《Years of Refusal》是Morrissey的第四张个人录音室专辑，风格偏向硬摇滚与独立摇滚，带有浓厚的朋克与力量流行色彩。专辑以轰鸣的吉他、急促的鼓点和Morrissey标志性的讽刺唱腔为特色，歌词充满对爱情、衰老与社会的冷嘲热讽。
items.descriptionEn: Years of Refusal is Morrissey's fourth solo studio album, leaning toward hard rock and indie rock with strong punk and power pop influences. It features roaring guitars, driving drums, and Morrissey's signature sardonic vocals, with lyrics mocking love, aging, and society.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Morrissey与制作人Jerry Finn合作紧密，但Finn在专辑发行前因脑溢血去世。Morrissey后来表示，Finn的离世让这张专辑蒙上了一层悲伤的阴影。此外，专辑封面使用了Morrissey少年时期的照片，象征对青春与反抗的怀念。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Morrissey worked closely with producer Jerry Finn, who died of a brain hemorrhage shortly before the album's release. Morrissey later said Finn's death cast a sad shadow over the album. The cover art features a photo of Morrissey as a teenager, symbolizing nostalgia for youth and rebellion.
items.artistIntroZh: Morrissey（英国，1959年出生）是独立摇滚传奇，前The Smiths主唱，以其忧郁的诗意歌词和独特的舞台魅力闻名。代表作包括《Viva Hate》和《You Are the Quarry》。
items.artistIntroEn: Morrissey (British, born 1959) is an indie rock legend and former lead singer of The Smiths, known for his melancholic, poetic lyrics and distinctive stage presence. Key works include 'Viva Hate' and 'You Are the Quarry'.

02-16.birthdayZh: 2月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.…》，像Tupac那样，教你用诗意直面生活的重量；也诞生了《Years of Refusal》，像Morrissey那样，温柔接纳所有倔强的孤独。你来到这世界，带着抗争的勇气与柔软的真心。愿这一年，你被岁月温柔托举，像音乐一样，声声不息。
02-16.birthdayEn: February 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed the fierce, unbreakable spirit of Tupac’s *Strictly 4 My N.I.G.G.A.Z.*—a call to rise with grit and grace. And like Morrissey’s *Years of Refusal*, you carry a quiet, stubborn strength beneath your warmth. May your new year glow with the raw poetry of your own making, and may every step feel like a beat only you can dance to. Happy birthday.

items.name: Cloud Nine
items.descriptionZh: 《Cloud Nine》是The Temptations的第十张录音室专辑，融合了灵魂乐、放克与迷幻摇滚，展现了摩城音乐向更复杂编曲的转型。专辑以华丽的弦乐、多声部和声和Norman Whitfield的精良制作著称，核心歌曲《Cloud Nine》以其社会意识歌词开创了“迷幻灵魂乐”的先河。
items.descriptionEn: Cloud Nine is The Temptations' tenth studio album, blending soul, funk, and psychedelic rock, marking Motown's shift toward more complex arrangements. Known for lush strings, multi-part harmonies, and Norman Whitfield's polished production, the title track pioneered 'psychedelic soul' with its socially conscious lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Cloud Nine》原本由Norman Whitfield为The Temptations量身打造，但乐队成员最初因歌词涉及吸毒隐喻而犹豫不决。Whitfield说服他们录制，结果这首歌不仅成为热门单曲，还为乐队赢得了1969年格莱美最佳R&B演唱奖。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Cloud Nine' was originally written by Norman Whitfield for The Temptations, but band members initially hesitated due to its drug-related metaphors. Whitfield persuaded them to record it, and the song became a hit, earning the group the 1969 Grammy for Best R&B Vocal Performance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Cloud Nine》被公认为“迷幻灵魂乐”的开端，影响了整个70年代灵魂乐与放克的发展方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Cloud Nine' is widely regarded as the beginning of 'psychedelic soul,' influencing the direction of soul and funk music throughout the 1970s.
items.artistIntroZh: The Temptations（美国，1960年成立）是摩城唱片旗下最成功的男子声乐团体之一，以精密的舞蹈编排和丰富的和声著称。代表作包括《My Girl》和《Papa Was a Rollin' Stone》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Temptations (American, formed 1960) are one of Motown's most successful vocal groups, known for their intricate choreography and rich harmonies. Key works include 'My Girl' and 'Papa Was a Rollin' Stone'.

items.name: Fighting the World
items.descriptionZh: 《Fighting the World》是Manowar的第四张录音室专辑，风格为典型的史诗重金属，以雄壮的战歌、快速的吉他独奏和神话主题著称。专辑充满力量与战斗精神，强调“真金属”理念，反对商业化的流行摇滚。
items.descriptionEn: Fighting the World is Manowar's fourth studio album, epitomizing epic heavy metal with anthemic battle hymns, rapid guitar solos, and mythological themes. The album exudes power and warrior spirit, championing 'true metal' against commercialized pop rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Manowar曾因与唱片公司CBS Records在艺术方向上的冲突而陷入僵局。乐队坚持要录制一张纯粹的金属专辑，拒绝任何商业妥协。最终，他们自费完成录音，专辑发行后成为重金属地下圈子的经典。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Manowar clashed with label CBS Records over artistic direction. The band insisted on a pure metal album, rejecting any commercial compromises. They eventually self-financed the recording, and the album became a classic in the underground heavy metal scene after its release.
items.artistIntroZh: Manowar（美国，1980年成立）是史诗重金属的代表乐队，以神话主题、高亢嗓音和“真金属”宣言闻名。代表作包括《Hail to England》和《Kings of Metal》。
items.artistIntroEn: Manowar (American, formed 1980) is a representative epic heavy metal band, known for mythological themes, soaring vocals, and their 'true metal' manifesto. Key works include 'Hail to England' and 'Kings of Metal'.

items.name: No Protection
items.descriptionZh: 《No Protection》是Massive Attack与Mad Professor合作的混音专辑，将《Protection》中的电子/迷幻Trip-hop曲目解构为更黑暗、更实验性的Dub版本。专辑以厚重的低音线、延迟效果和迷幻氛围著称，展现了Trip-hop与Dub融合的极致。
items.descriptionEn: No Protection is a remix album by Massive Attack in collaboration with Mad Professor, deconstructing tracks from 'Protection' into darker, more experimental dub versions. Known for heavy basslines, delay effects, and psychedelic atmospheres, it exemplifies the fusion of trip-hop and dub.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于一次即兴合作：Massive Attack在录音室中邀请Mad Professor即兴混音，结果Mad Professor在短短几周内完成了全部作品。由于混音过程极为自由，乐队成员甚至对最终成品感到惊讶，但一致认为它展现了Trip-hop的另一面。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from an impromptu collaboration: Massive Attack invited Mad Professor to remix tracks on the spot, and he completed the entire project within a few weeks. The band members were surprised by the final result but agreed it revealed another side of trip-hop.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《No Protection》被广泛认为是史上最优秀的混音专辑之一，影响了后来电子音乐中Dub与Trip-hop的跨界实验。
items.historicalImpactEn: No Protection is widely regarded as one of the greatest remix albums ever, influencing later cross-genre experiments between dub and trip-hop in electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Massive Attack（英国，1988年成立）是Trip-hop流派的先驱，以黑暗氛围、缓拍节奏和电影感著称。代表作包括《Blue Lines》和《Mezzanine》。
items.artistIntroEn: Massive Attack (British, formed 1988) are pioneers of the trip-hop genre, known for dark atmospheres, slow beats, and cinematic soundscapes. Key works include 'Blue Lines' and 'Mezzanine'.

02-17.birthdayZh: 2月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Cloud Nine》的勇敢转身，像是灵魂挣脱旧壳，飞向更高远的天空；也诞生过《Fighting the World》的坚韧，像心底不灭的火，在风里愈烧愈亮。愿你在自己的节奏里，既有云的轻盈，也有斗士的笃定。生日快乐，愿你一直被温柔托举。
02-17.birthdayEn: February 17 is your birthday, a date that dances with musical magic. On this day, the soulful revolution of The Temptations’ "Cloud Nine" was born, lifting hearts with its message of rising above struggle. And the raw, unbreakable spirit of Manowar’s "Fighting the World" roared to life, a call to stand strong. Like these albums, your presence is a blend of gentle resilience and powerful joy. May your year be a symphony of hope, where every note carries you higher, and every day feels like a victory worth celebrating.

items.name: The King of Limbs
items.descriptionZh: 《The King of Limbs》是Radiohead在2011年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格以电子音乐为核心，融合了实验性节拍、环境音效和复杂的采样循环。专辑特色在于其抽象、碎片化的结构，以及Thom Yorke飘渺的人声，营造出一种迷离而充满张力的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: The King of Limbs is Radiohead's eighth studio album, released in 2011. Centered on electronic music, it features experimental beats, ambient textures, and intricate sample loops. Its abstract, fragmented structure and Thom Yorke's ethereal vocals create a mesmerizing and tense atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称源自威尔特郡的一棵古老橡树，乐队成员曾在那里进行创作。专辑发行方式颇为独特，最初仅在官网提供数字下载，随后才发布实体版本。为了宣传，Radiohead还制作了互动音乐视频和报纸广告，展现了他们对传统发行模式的颠覆。
items.storiesEn: The album title refers to an ancient oak tree in Wiltshire, where band members once created. It was initially released as a digital download exclusively on their website, with physical versions following later. For promotion, Radiohead created interactive music videos and newspaper ads, showcasing their unconventional approach to distribution.
items.artistIntroZh: Radiohead是一支来自英国牛津郡的另类摇滚乐队，成立于1985年。他们以创新的音乐风格和深沉的歌词闻名，代表作包括《OK Computer》、《Kid A》和《In Rainbows》。
items.artistIntroEn: Radiohead is an alternative rock band from Oxfordshire, England, formed in 1985. They are renowned for their innovative musical style and profound lyrics, with notable works including OK Computer, Kid A, and In Rainbows.

items.name: Feel My Mind
items.descriptionZh: 《Feel My Mind》是日本歌手倖田來未于2004年发行的单曲，风格为流行乐，融合了R&B和舞曲元素。核心特色在于其充满活力的节奏、流畅的旋律以及倖田來未标志性的性感嗓音，展现了她在千禧年初期的时尚与自信。
items.descriptionEn: Feel My Mind is a single by Japanese singer Kumi Koda, released in 2004. Stylistically pop, it blends R&B and dance elements. Its core features include an energetic beat, smooth melody, and Koda's signature sultry vocals, showcasing her fashion-forward and confident persona in the early 2000s.
items.storiesZh: 这首单曲是倖田來未早期职业生涯的重要作品，发行时正值她人气上升期。单曲封面和音乐视频都强调了她性感的形象，这成为她当时的一大标志。此外，该单曲还作为她同年发行的专辑《Koda Kumi Driving Hit's》的宣传曲之一。
items.storiesEn: This single was a key release in Kumi Koda's early career, during her rise to fame. The cover art and music video emphasized her sexy image, which became a hallmark of that era. The single also served as a promotional track for her album Koda Kumi Driving Hit's released the same year.
items.artistIntroZh: 倖田來未是日本流行女歌手，出生于京都府。她以大胆的时尚风格和性感形象著称，音乐风格涵盖流行、R&B和舞曲。代表作包括《Real Emotion/千言万语》、《Butterfly》和《愛のうた》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kumi Koda is a Japanese pop singer from Kyoto Prefecture. Known for her bold fashion and sexy image, her music spans pop, R&B, and dance. Notable works include Real Emotion/1000 no Kotoba, Butterfly, and Ai no Uta.

items.name: Push the Sky Away
items.artist: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
items.descriptionZh: 《Push the Sky Away》是Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds于2013���发行的第十五张录音室专辑，风格为摇滚，融合了后朋克、民谣和室内流行元素。专辑特色在于其黑暗、内省的歌词，以及极简的编曲，营造出一种忧郁而富有诗意的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Push the Sky Away is the fifteenth studio album by Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds, released in 2013. Stylistically rock, it blends post-punk, folk, and chamber pop. Its distinctive features are dark, introspective lyrics and minimalist arrangements, creating a melancholic and poetic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队在长期成员Mick Harvey离队后的首张作品，也是吉他手Warren Ellis参与度更高的一张。录制地点选在法国南部的La Fabrique工作室，环境宁静。Nick Cave曾透露，专辑歌词受到他阅读的关于宇宙和宗教书籍的启发。
items.storiesEn: This album is the first since the departure of long-time member Mick Harvey, and features a greater involvement from guitarist Warren Ellis. It was recorded at La Fabrique studio in the south of France, a peaceful setting. Nick Cave revealed that the lyrics were inspired by his readings on cosmology and religion.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds是一支澳大利亚另类摇滚乐队，成立于1983年。他们以黑暗、戏剧化的音乐风格和诗意的歌词闻名，代表作包括《Murder Ballads》、《The Boatman's Call》和《Skeleton Tree》。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds is an Australian alternative rock band formed in 1983. They are known for their dark, theatrical music and poetic lyrics, with notable works including Murder Ballads, The Boatman's Call, and Skeleton Tree.

02-18.birthdayZh: 2月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《The King of Limbs》与《Push the Sky Away》。前者在电子与爵士的缝隙里种下根须，教人从静谧中长出新枝；后者用极简钢琴推开云层，如你一般，总在沉默里积蓄推走天空的力量。愿你在属于自己的节拍中，始终柔软而笃定。
02-18.birthdayEn: February 18 is your birthday. On this date, Radiohead released The King of Limbs, an album woven from gentle loops and quiet growth—much like the steady, surprising beauty of who you are. And Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds gifted the world Push the Sky Away, a whisper to keep reaching beyond what we know. So on your day, may you feel both the rooted calm of the forest and the courage to push the sky away. Your light is a rare, unfolding melody.

items.name: Große Freiheit
items.descriptionZh: 《Große Freiheit》是德国乐队Unheilig于2010年发行的专辑，风格为摇滚，融合了流行摇滚和新德意志硬派元素。核心特色在于其宏大的旋律、深情的歌词，以及主唱Der Graf低沉而富有感染力的嗓音，营造出一种庄严而感人的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Große Freiheit is an album by German band Unheilig, released in 2010. Stylistically rock, it blends pop rock and Neue Deutsche Härte. Its core features include grand melodies, heartfelt lyrics, and lead singer Der Graf's deep, emotive voice, creating a solemn and moving atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Unheilig商业上最成功的作品，在德国专辑榜上停留了超过100周。专辑同名曲《Große Freiheit》灵感来自汉堡的著名娱乐街区，歌词反映了对自由和梦想的追求。专辑的成功让乐队从地下走向主流，成为德国摇滚界的标志性人物。
items.storiesEn: This album is Unheilig's most commercially successful work, spending over 100 weeks on the German album chart. The title track Große Freiheit was inspired by Hamburg's famous entertainment district, with lyrics reflecting a pursuit of freedom and dreams. Its success propelled the band from underground to mainstream, making them icons in German rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Unheilig是一支德国摇滚乐队，成立于1999年，由主唱Der Graf领衔。他们的音乐风格融合了流行摇滚和新德意志硬派，以其深情、庄重的旋律著称。代表作包括《Große Freiheit》、《Puppenspiel》和《Lichter der Stadt》。
items.artistIntroEn: Unheilig is a German rock band formed in 1999, led by vocalist Der Graf. Their music blends pop rock and Neue Deutsche Härte, known for its emotional and solemn melodies. Notable works include Große Freiheit, Puppenspiel, and Lichter der Stadt.

items.name: Give Up
items.descriptionZh: 《Give Up》是The Postal Service于2003年发行的首张也是唯一一张录音室专辑，风格为流行乐，融合了独立流行、电子和合成器流行元素。核心特色在于其温暖、怀旧的电子音色，以及Ben Gibbard清澈的嗓音和Jenny Lewis的和声，营造出一种甜蜜而忧伤的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Give Up is the debut and only studio album by The Postal Service, released in 2003. Stylistically pop, it blends indie pop, electronic, and synth-pop. Its core features include warm, nostalgic electronic textures, Ben Gibbard's clear vocals, and Jenny Lewis's harmonies, creating a sweet yet melancholic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称源于乐队成员通过邮寄方式交换音乐文件的创作过程。制作人Jimmy Tamborello最初只是寄给Ben Gibbard一些音乐片段，Gibbard随后加入人声和歌词，这种远程合作模式在2000年代初非常创新。专辑封面也采用了复古的邮政主题设计。
items.storiesEn: The album title stems from the band's creation process, where members exchanged music files via postal mail. Producer Jimmy Tamborello initially sent instrumental snippets to Ben Gibbard, who then added vocals and lyrics. This remote collaboration was innovative in the early 2000s. The album cover also features a retro postal theme.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Give Up》被广泛认为是2000年代独立电子流行音乐的经典之作，对后来的独立音乐和电子音乐产生了深远影响。它也是Sub Pop唱片公司历史上最畅销的专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Give Up is widely regarded as a classic of 2000s indie electronic pop, profoundly influencing subsequent indie and electronic music. It is also one of the best-selling albums in Sub Pop Records history.
items.artistIntroZh: The Postal Service是美国独立电子流行乐队，由Ben Gibbard（Death Cab for Cutie主唱）和Jimmy Tamborello（Dntel）组成。他们以远程合作和温暖电子音色闻名，代表作仅此一张专辑《Give Up》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Postal Service is an American indie electronic pop band, consisting of Ben Gibbard (lead singer of Death Cab for Cutie) and Jimmy Tamborello (Dntel). Known for their remote collaboration and warm electronic sound, they have only one album, Give Up.

02-19.birthdayZh: 2月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Große Freiheit》，用自由与爱包裹一颗心的诞生。而《Give Up》里温柔的合成器声，像在说：不必急于交出全部，生命自有其节拍。你带着这一天独有的旋律而来——既有远行的勇气，也不失停下拥抱自己的理由。
02-19.birthdayEn: February 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Große Freiheit," a spirit of vast freedom and bold new beginnings, and "Give Up" by The Postal Service, a tender invitation to trust in love’s quiet, persistent hope. May your year ahead carry that same courage to release old weights and embrace wide horizons. You are a beautiful constellation of songs yet to be sung—so sing them loudly, and let the melody be joy.

items.name: Phaedra
items.descriptionZh: 《Phaedra》是Tangerine Dream在1974年发行的里程碑式电子音乐专辑。作品以绵延的模拟合成器音色、缓慢铺陈的太空氛围和即兴结构为核心特色，开创了柏林学派电子音乐的先河。专辑中标志性的长篇幅曲目如《Phaedra》和《Mysterious Semblance at the Strand of Nightmares》，通过穆格合成器与音序器的交织，营造出深邃、迷幻的听觉宇宙。
items.descriptionEn: Phaedra is a landmark electronic music album released by Tangerine Dream in 1974. Its core features are extended analog synthesizer textures, slow-building space ambience, and improvisational structures, pioneering the Berlin School of electronic music. Iconic long-form tracks like 'Phaedra' and 'Mysterious Semblance at the Strand of Nightmares' weave Moog synthesizers and sequencers into a deep, psychedelic sonic universe.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Phaedra》时，乐队因预算限制只能在凌晨租用录音室。某夜，成员Edgar Froese在调试穆格合成器时无意触发了一个未被记录的滤波模式，产生了专辑中那段著名的低沉脉冲音效。这个意外发现被保留下来，成为全曲的节奏骨架。此外，由于当时音序器技术尚不成熟，乐队经常需要手动调整旋钮来维持节奏同步，录音带中甚至能听到偶尔的机械噪声。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Phaedra, the band could only afford to rent the studio in the early morning hours due to budget constraints. One night, member Edgar Froese accidentally triggered an undocumented filter mode on his Moog synthesizer, producing the famous low pulsing sound effect on the album. This serendipitous discovery was kept and became the rhythmic backbone of the track. Additionally, because sequencer technology was still primitive at the time, the band often had to manually adjust knobs to maintain tempo synchronization, and occasional mechanical noises can be heard on the tape.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Phaedra》是电子音乐史上首张打入英国专辑榜前20的纯电子专辑，直接影响了后续氛围音乐、新浪潮和合成器流行乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Phaedra became the first purely electronic album to enter the UK Top 20, directly influencing the development of ambient music, new wave, and synth-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream是一支成立于1967年的德国电子音乐乐队，被视为柏林学派的奠基人。其核心成员包括Edgar Froese、Christopher Franke和Peter Baumann。他们以模拟合成器、音序器和即兴演奏著称，代表作包括《Phaedra》《Rubycon》和《Ricochet》。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream is a German electronic music band founded in 1967, regarded as the founder of the Berlin School. Core members include Edgar Froese, Christopher Franke, and Peter Baumann. They are known for analog synthesizers, sequencers, and improvisation, with代表作 including Phaedra, Rubycon, and Ricochet.

items.name: The Essential Toni Braxton
items.descriptionZh: 《The Essential Toni Braxton》是Toni Braxton于2007年发行的精选集，虽然被归类为Folk/Country风格，但实际内容以R&B和流行情歌为主。专辑收录了她90年代至2000年代初的多首冠军单曲，如《Un-Break My Heart》和《Breathe Again》，展现了其醇厚低沉的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎。核心特色在于通过精选曲目串联起她作为都市情歌天后的音乐轨迹。
items.descriptionEn: The Essential Toni Braxton is a 2007 compilation album by Toni Braxton. Although labeled Folk/Country, its content is primarily R&B and pop ballads. The collection features multiple chart-topping singles from the 1990s to early 2000s, such as 'Un-Break My Heart' and 'Breathe Again,' showcasing her rich, low-register vocals and emotionally charged delivery. Its core feature is tracing her musical journey as the queen of urban love songs through carefully selected tracks.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的��行恰逢Toni Braxton与唱片公司Blackground Records的法律纠纷期间。她曾公开表示公司未经过她同意就推出了这张合辑，并批评其曲目选择未能反映她完整的艺术视野。尽管如此，专辑仍因收录了《Un-Break My Heart》等经典而获得商业成功。有趣的是，专辑封面使用了她在1996年专辑《Secrets》时期的照片，而非近照。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released during Toni Braxton's legal dispute with her label Blackground Records. She publicly stated that the label issued the album without her consent and criticized its track selection for not reflecting her full artistic vision. Nevertheless, the album achieved commercial success thanks to classics like 'Un-Break My Heart.' Interestingly, the cover art used a photo from her 1996 album Secrets era rather than a recent image.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton是美国R&B女歌手，出生于1967年，以低沉性感的嗓音和情感浓烈的情歌著称。她曾获得6项格莱美奖，代表作包括《Un-Break My Heart》《Breathe Again》和《He Wasn't Man Enough》。她的音乐融合了R&B、灵魂乐和流行元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton is an American R&B singer, born in 1967, known for her deep, sultry voice and emotionally intense ballads. She has won six Grammy Awards, with代表作 including 'Un-Break My Heart,' 'Breathe Again,' and 'He Wasn't Man Enough.' Her music blends R&B, soul, and pop elements.

items.name: Roots
items.descriptionZh: 《Roots》是巴西金属乐队Sepultura于1996年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格融合了死亡金属、鞭挞金属与巴西本土音乐元素。核心特色在于大量使用原住民乐器、葡萄牙语歌词以及慢速、沉重、部落般的节奏。专辑同名曲《Roots Bloody Roots》以极具冲击力的吉他Riff和民族打击乐交织，成为乐队的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: Roots is the eighth studio album by Brazilian metal band Sepultura, released in 1996. It blends death metal, thrash metal, and Brazilian indigenous music. Its core features are the extensive use of native instruments, Portuguese lyrics, and slow, heavy, tribal rhythms. The title track 'Roots Bloody Roots' intertwines crushing guitar riffs with ethnic percussion, becoming a signature song for the band.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Roots》期间，乐队曾深入巴西亚马逊雨林，与当地克雷纳克族（Xavante）原住民共同录制了歌曲《Itsári》中的吟唱和鼓声。主唱Max Cavalera回忆说���原住民起初对金属乐感到困惑，但后来主动加入即兴演奏。此外，专辑中《Ratamahatta》的采样来自巴西著名足球解说员的实况录音，这一创意源于乐队成员在旅馆观看足球赛时的突发灵感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Roots, the band traveled deep into the Amazon rainforest and recorded chants and drumming with the Xavante indigenous people for the track 'Itsári.' Vocalist Max Cavalera recalled that the natives were initially puzzled by metal music but later joined in improvised performances. Additionally, the samples on 'Ratamahatta' came from a live recording of a famous Brazilian football commentator, an idea sparked when band members were watching a football match in a hotel room.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Roots》被视为巴西民族金属的开创性作品，影响了全球范围内将本土音乐与极端金属融合的浪潮，如Korn和Slipknot等乐队也从中汲取灵感。
items.historicalImpactEn: Roots is considered a pioneering work of Brazilian folk metal, influencing a global wave of blending indigenous music with extreme metal. Bands like Korn and Slipknot also drew inspiration from it.
items.artistIntroZh: Sepultura是一支成立于1984年的巴西重金属乐队，最初以死亡金属和鞭挞金属闻名。核心成员包括Max Cavalera（主唱/吉他）和Igor Cavalera（鼓手）。代表作包括《Beneath the Remains》《Arise》和《Roots》。他们的音乐以政治批判、部落节奏和极端金属元素著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Sepultura is a Brazilian heavy metal band formed in 1984, initially known for death metal and thrash metal. Core members include Max Cavalera (vocals/guitar) and Igor Cavalera (drums). Their代表作 include Beneath the Remains, Arise, and Roots. Their music is known for political critique, tribal rhythms, and extreme metal elements.

02-20.birthdayZh: 2月20日，是你的生日。这一天，Tangerine Dream的《Phaedra》在合成器的星云中流淌，像宇宙为你铺开一片深邃的蓝。还有Sepultura的《Roots》，在泥土与金属的轰鸣里扎根，告诉你力量可以来自大地。你出生在这天，便注定兼具星辰的温柔与地核的坚韧——愿你每一步都踏出根，每一声都唱出光。
02-20.birthdayEn: February 20 is your birthday. Like Tangerine Dream’s Phaedra, may your year unfold with deep, cosmic rhythms and unexpected beauty. And just as Roots fuses raw power with soulful earth, may you draw strength from your own roots while reaching for new horizons. On this day, you are both the music and the melody—a living album of courage, growth, and grace. Here’s to another revolution around the sun, filled with harmony and light.

items.name: Tarot
items.descriptionZh: 《Tarot》是西班牙力量金属乐队Dark Moor于2007年发行的第七张录音室专辑。风格延续了交响力量金属的宏大叙事，以塔罗牌主题为线索，融合了古典管弦乐、双吉他旋律和高速鼓点。核心特色在于主唱Alfred Romero高亢有力的嗓音与史诗般的编曲，歌曲如《The Moon》和《The Devil》通过塔罗牌意象讲述神秘故事。
items.descriptionEn: Tarot is the seventh studio album by Spanish power metal band Dark Moor, released in 2007. It continues the grand narrative style of symphonic power metal, using tarot card themes as a thread, blending classical orchestration, twin guitar melodies, and fast drumming. Its core features are vocalist Alfred Romero's soaring, powerful voice and epic arrangements. Tracks like 'The Moon' and 'The Devil' tell mystical stories through tarot imagery.
items.storiesZh: 《Tarot》的创作灵感源于吉他手Enrik Garcia对塔罗牌占卜的浓厚兴趣。他曾在采访中透露，专辑中每首歌曲对应一张大阿卡纳牌，而歌词内容则基于他本人和朋友的真实占卜经历。录制过程中，乐队特意邀请了一位马德里当地的古典小提琴手参与管弦乐部分的演奏，但由于录音室空调故障，小提琴手不得不在30度高温下穿着西装完成录制，事后他笑称这是“最热门的古典录音”。
items.storiesEn: The inspiration for Tarot came from guitarist Enrik Garcia's keen interest in tarot card divination. He revealed in an interview that each song on the album corresponds to a Major Arcana card, with lyrics based on his and his friends' real fortune-telling experiences. During recording, the band specially invited a local classical violinist from Madrid to perform the orchestral parts. However, due to a broken air conditioner in the studio, the violinist had to complete the session in a suit under 30°C heat, later jokingly calling it the 'hottest classical recording.'
items.artistIntroZh: Dark Moor是一支成立于1994年的西班牙力量金属乐队，以交响力量金属和古典元素著称。核心成员包括吉他手Enrik Garcia和主唱Alfred Romero。代表作包括《The Gates of Oblivion》《Tarot》和《Autumnal》。他们的音乐以史诗般的旋律、双吉他编曲和高亢人声为特色。
items.artistIntroEn: Dark Moor is a Spanish power metal band formed in 1994, known for symphonic power metal and classical elements. Core members include guitarist Enrik Garcia and vocalist Alfred Romero. Their代表作 include The Gates of Oblivion, Tarot, and Autumnal. Their music is characterized by epic melodies, twin guitar arrangements, and soaring vocals.

02-21.birthdayZh: 2月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在音符里翻开过《Tarot》的序章——命运不是被算定的牌面，而是你握住的光。那些疾速的吉他如同你的心跳，把每一次选择都奏成勇气的和弦。愿你在交响般的人生里，始终相信自己是那个洗牌的人。
02-21.birthdayEn: February 21 is your birthday. On this date in history, the world was gifted with “Tarot” by Dark Moor, an album that spins mystery and strength into soaring melodies—much like the spirit you carry. Your day arrives in late winter’s quiet pulse, a turning point where fate and courage meet. May this new year unfold like a powerful, hopeful song, with each note leading you deeper into your own legend. You are the card of wonder and resilience. Happy birthday, bright soul.

items.name: FanMail
items.descriptionZh: 《FanMail》是美国女子组合TLC于1999年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为核心，融合了放克、流行和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于未来主义主题——专辑以“电子情书”和虚拟偶像为概念，大量使用合成器音效和机器人声采样。歌曲如《No Scrubs》和《Unpretty》以犀利的女性视角探讨爱情与自我认同，成为90年代末R&B的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: FanMail is the third studio album by American girl group TLC, released in 1999. Its style is rooted in R&B and soul, blended with funk, pop, and hip-hop. The core feature is its futuristic theme—the album revolves around 'electronic love letters' and virtual idols, heavily utilizing synthesizer effects and robotic vocal samples. Songs like 'No Scrubs' and 'Unpretty' tackle love and self-identity from a sharp female perspective, becoming classic R&B hits of the late 90s.
items.storiesZh: 录制《FanMail》时，成员Left Eye（Lisa Lopes）正因纵火被捕后处于缓刑期，她将个人经历中的愤怒与反思注入歌词。专辑名称源于乐队收到的海量粉丝邮件——她们曾将数千封真实信件堆满录音室，从中提取灵感。此外，专辑中《No Scrubs》的创作过程颇具戏剧性：制作人Kevin She'kspere Briggs最初写的是男性视角版本，但TLC坚持改为女性视角，从而诞生了这首女性 empowerment 国歌。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of FanMail, member Left Eye (Lisa Lopes) was on probation after being arrested for arson, channeling her anger and reflections into the lyrics. The album title came from the massive amount of fan mail the group received—they once piled thousands of real letters in the studio for inspiration. Additionally, the creation of 'No Scrubs' was dramatic: producer Kevin 'She'kspere' Briggs initially wrote it from a male perspective, but TLC insisted on changing it to a female viewpoint, thus birthing this female empowerment anthem.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《FanMail》在1999年格莱美奖上获得四项提名并赢得最佳R&B专辑，其未来主义美学和女性议题表达深刻影响了2000年代初的R&B与流行音乐。
items.historicalImpactEn: FanMail received four Grammy nominations in 1999 and won Best R&B Album. Its futuristic aesthetic and expression of female issues profoundly influenced R&B and pop music in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: TLC是美国女子R&B组合，成立于1990年，成员包括Tionne 'T-Boz' Watkins、Lisa 'Left Eye' Lopes和Rozonda 'Chilli' Thomas。她们以融合R&B、嘻哈和放克著称，代表作包括《Waterfalls》《No Scrubs》和《Unpretty》。TLC以其前卫风格、女性意识歌词和突破性销量成为史上最成功的女子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: TLC is an American R&B girl group formed in 1990, consisting of Tionne 'T-Boz' Watkins, Lisa 'Left Eye' Lopes, and Rozonda 'Chilli' Thomas. They are known for blending R&B, hip-hop, and funk, with代表作 including 'Waterfalls,' 'No Scrubs,' and 'Unpretty.' TLC is one of the best-selling girl groups of all time, celebrated for their avant-garde style and female-empowering lyrics.

items.name: Rituals
items.descriptionZh: 《Rituals》是John Zorn于2005年发行的一部实验性古典作品，融合了现代古典、犹太音乐与仪式感强烈的结构。作品以打击乐、人声和管弦乐交织出神秘而庄严的氛围，体现了Zorn对传统古典形式的解构与重塑，强调即兴与作曲的边界模糊。
items.descriptionEn: Rituals is an experimental classical work by John Zorn, released in 2005, blending modern classical, Jewish music, and ritualistic structures. The piece interweaves percussion, vocals, and orchestral elements to create a mysterious and solemn atmosphere, showcasing Zorn's deconstruction of traditional classical forms and the blurring of improvisation and composition.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感来源于Zorn对犹太神秘主义卡巴拉的研究，他曾在访谈中表示，作品中的仪式感并非虚构，而是基于真实的宗教仪式结构。录制时，Zorn邀请了多位长期合作的实验音乐家，包括打击乐手Cyro Baptista和声乐家Mike Patton，整个录制过程在纽约一间改造的教堂内完成，以捕捉独特的声学效果。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration came from Zorn's study of Jewish mysticism (Kabbalah). He stated in interviews that the ritualistic feel was based on real religious ceremonial structures. The recording took place in a converted church in New York, featuring longtime collaborators like percussionist Cyro Baptista and vocalist Mike Patton, to capture the unique acoustics.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该作品进一步巩固了Zorn在当代古典与实验音乐界的跨界地位，被视为21世纪仪式音乐的重要代表作之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This work further solidified Zorn's cross-genre status in contemporary classical and experimental music, and is regarded as a key representative of 21st-century ritual music.
items.artistIntroZh: John Zorn，美国作曲家、萨克斯手，生于1953年。他是实验音乐、现代古典与爵士的跨界先锋，以大量作品和多元项目闻名，代表作包括《Naked City》《The Dreamers》等，常融合犹太音乐、即兴与噪音元素。
items.artistIntroEn: John Zorn is an American composer and saxophonist, born in 1953. A pioneering figure in experimental music, modern classical, and jazz, he is known for numerous projects blending Jewish music, improvisation, and noise. Key works include Naked City and The Dreamers.

items.name: From Me to You
items.descriptionZh: 《From Me to You》是日本创作歌手Yui于2006年发行的首张专辑，风格为流行摇滚与青春活���。专辑以原声吉他驱动，旋律清新流畅，歌词直击青少年内心情感，展现了Yui独特的嗓音与创作才华，核心特色是真诚的自我表达与温暖的治愈感。
items.descriptionEn: From Me to You is the debut album by Japanese singer-songwriter Yui, released in 2006, featuring pop rock with youthful energy. Driven by acoustic guitar, the melodies are fresh and flowing, with lyrics that capture teenage emotions, showcasing Yui's distinctive voice and songwriting talent, characterized by sincere self-expression and a warm, healing quality.
items.storiesZh: Yui在高中时期因对音乐的热爱而自学吉他和作曲，这张专辑的多数歌曲是她16-17岁时的创作。主打歌《Feel My Soul》原本是她为参加选秀而写，后被选为日剧《不忠的时刻》主题曲。录制时，Yui坚持使用原声吉他而非电吉他，以保持作品的原始情感。
items.storiesEn: Yui taught herself guitar and songwriting in high school out of passion. Most songs on this album were written when she was 16-17. The lead track 'Feel My Soul' was originally written for a talent show and later became the theme song for the drama 'The Moment of Betrayal.' She insisted on using acoustic rather than electric guitar to preserve the raw emotion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑使Yui一跃成为日本流行乐坛的新星，并带动了日本女歌手自弹自唱的潮流，影响了一代青少年音乐爱好者。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album catapulted Yui to stardom in Japanese pop music and sparked a trend of female singer-songwriters playing guitar, influencing a generation of young music fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Yui（吉岡唯），日本创作女歌手，生于1984年。以清新吉他流行摇滚风格著称，代表作包括《Feel My Soul》《Good-bye Days》《Rolling Star》等。她曾为多部动漫和日剧献声，是2000年代后期日本最具代表性的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Yui (Yui Yoshioka) is a Japanese singer-songwriter, born in 1984. Known for her fresh guitar-driven pop rock, her hits include 'Feel My Soul,' 'Good-bye Days,' and 'Rolling Star.' She contributed to many anime and drama soundtracks, becoming one of the most iconic female artists of the late 2000s in Japan.

02-22.birthdayZh: 2月22日，是你的生日。这一天，TLC在《FanMail》里唱出对世界的告白，用未来感的节拍告诉你，爱是穿越时间的勇气。而Yui的《From Me to You》把青春的困惑揉成光，从心到心，递到你手中。你来到世上这一天，便注定要成为自己的光——不慌不忙，清澈而亮。
02-22.birthdayEn: February 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like TLC’s “FanMail,” a bold anthem of connection and self-love, and Yui’s tender “From Me to You,” a whisper of hope and new beginnings. Like those songs, you bring your own melody to life—brave, heartfelt, and radiant. May your year hum with the rhythm of your dreams, wrapped in the warmth of all who cherish you. Happy birthday, with every note of joy.

items.name: The Slim Shady LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Slim Shady LP》是美国说唱歌手Eminem于1999年发行的首张主流专辑，风格为硬核嘻哈与恐怖核。专辑以黑暗幽默、暴力幻想和社会讽刺为核心特色，通过Slim Shady这一虚构人格展现了Eminem的叙事技巧与激进的押韵风格，奠定了其白人说唱颠覆者的地位。
items.descriptionEn: The Slim Shady LP is the major-label debut by American rapper Eminem, released in 1999, featuring hardcore hip-hop and horrorcore. Centered on dark humor, violent fantasies, and social satire, the album showcases Eminem's narrative skill and aggressive rhyme schemes through the fictional Slim Shady persona, establishing him as a white rap iconoclast.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Eminem与母亲Debbie的紧张关系期，歌曲《My Name Is》和《'97 Bonnie & Clyde》直接取材于他的家庭矛盾。制作人Dr. Dre最初对Eminem的白色皮肤有所顾虑，但听完试听带后立即签约。专辑中许多歌词是在录音室即兴写成的，Eminem曾称这是“愤怒的产物”。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded amid Eminem's tense relationship with his mother Debbie, with songs like 'My Name Is' and ''97 Bonnie & Clyde' directly drawing from family conflicts. Producer Dr. Dre initially hesitated due to Eminem's race but signed him immediately after hearing the demo. Many lyrics were improvised in the studio, which Eminem called 'the product of anger.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑荣获格莱美最佳说唱专辑，将嘻哈音乐带入主流白人听众视野，并引发了关于歌词自由与社会责任的广泛讨论，成为1990年代末嘻哈文化的转折点。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won a Grammy for Best Rap Album, brought hip-hop to mainstream white audiences, and sparked widespread debate on lyrical freedom and social responsibility, marking a turning point in late-1990s hip-hop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers），美国说唱歌手、制作人，生于1972年。以技术性极强的押韵、情感直白和社会批判著称，代表作包括《The Slim Shady LP》《The Marshall Mathers LP》《The Eminem Show》等，是史上最畅销的嘻哈艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper and producer, born in 1972. Known for technically complex rhymes, raw emotion, and social critique, his key works include The Slim Shady LP, The Marshall Mathers LP, and The Eminem Show. He is one of the best-selling hip-hop artists of all time.

items.name: American VI: Ain't No Grave
items.descriptionZh: 《American VI: Ain't No Grave》是美国传奇歌手Johnny Cash于2010年发行的遗作专辑，风格为民谣/乡村与福音。核心特色是Cash晚期低沉而充满沧桑的嗓音，配以简约的吉他、钢琴和福音合唱，主题围��死亡、救赎与信仰，是这位“黑衣人”最后的音乐告白。
items.descriptionEn: American VI: Ain't No Grave is a posthumous album by American legend Johnny Cash, released in 2010, blending folk/country with gospel. It features Cash's deep, weathered voice over sparse guitar, piano, and gospel choirs, with themes of death, redemption, and faith, serving as the final musical testament of the Man in Black.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制时间与《American V: A Hundred Highways》同期，均在Cash去世前最后几个月完成。他当时身体极度虚弱，但坚持在卧室里用便携设备录制人声，制作人Rick Rubin后来将这些录音与乐手伴奏合成。专辑封面由Cash的女儿Rosanne设计，以象征其灵魂的延续。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded concurrently with American V: A Hundred Highways, during Cash's final months. Extremely frail, he insisted on recording vocals in his bedroom using portable equipment, later assembled with instrumental tracks by producer Rick Rubin. The cover was designed by Cash's daughter Rosanne, symbolizing the continuation of his spirit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为American系列的最后篇章，该专辑为Cash长达近50年的音乐生涯画上了句号，被乐评视为晚期乡村福音音乐的里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the final chapter of the American series, this album closed Cash's nearly five-decade career and is considered a milestone in late-period country gospel music.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash，美国乡村音乐传奇，生于1932年，逝于2003年。以低沉嗓音和“黑衣人”形象闻名，风格横跨乡村、民谣、福音与摇滚，代表作包括《I Walk the Line》《Folsom Prison Blues》《Ring of Fire》等，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music legend (1932–2003), known for his deep voice and 'Man in Black' persona. His style spanned country, folk, gospel, and rock. Key works include 'I Walk the Line,' 'Folsom Prison Blues,' and 'Ring of Fire.' He is one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Klatter
items.descriptionZh: 《Klatter》是日本噪音音乐家Merzbow（秋田昌美）于2011年发行的专辑，虽被归类为Rock，实则核心是极端的噪音摇滚与电子噪音。专辑以密集的失真音墙、反馈声和数字剪辑为特色，摒弃传统旋律与节奏，呈现纯粹的声学暴力与实验性，是Merzbow标志性噪音美学的延续。
items.descriptionEn: Klatter is an album by Japanese noise musician Merzbow (Masami Akita), released in 2011. While labeled Rock, its core is extreme noise rock and electronic noise. Featuring dense walls of distortion, feedback, and digital editing, it abandons conventional melody and rhythm, presenting pure sonic violence and experimentation, continuing Merzbow's signature noise aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: Merzbow在创作《Klatter》时使用了大量数字处理软件和自制的电路弯曲设备，专辑名称在瑞典语中意为“噪音”或“碰撞声”，暗示其混乱的声效。录制过程中，他故意将音量推到极限以产生失真，并在混音时加入环境录音片段，如城市交通和机械运转声，以营造“工业荒原”感。
items.storiesEn: Merzbow used extensive digital processing software and homemade circuit-bent devices for Klatter. The title means 'noise' or 'clatter' in Swedish, hinting at its chaotic sound. He deliberately pushed volume to the limit for distortion and added field recordings of urban traffic and machinery during mixing to create an 'industrial wasteland' atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Merzbow（秋田昌美），日本噪音音乐先驱，生于1956年。自1979年起活跃，以极端噪音、电子实验和大量专辑闻名，代表作包括《Pulse Demon》《Venereology》等。他是全球噪音音乐领域最具影响力的艺术家之一，作品常探讨反消费主义与生态主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Merzbow (Masami Akita) is a Japanese noise music pioneer, born in 1956. Active since 1979, he is known for extreme noise, electronic experimentation, and a vast discography. Key works include Pulse Demon and Venereology. He is one of the most influential figures in global noise music, often exploring anti-consumerism and ecological themes.

02-23.birthdayZh: 2月23日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Slim Shady LP》曾用尖锐的幽默撕开世界的虚伪，教会我们在荒诞中站稳脚跟；而《American VI: Ain't No Grave》则像Johnny Cash低沉的告别，让死亡也成了一种安静的勇气。你的生命里既有反叛的锋芒，也有不息的温柔。愿你在自己的节奏里，既是战士，也是归人。
02-23.birthdayEn: February 23 is your birthday—a day that dawned with the restless, sharp-edged humor of Eminem’s *The Slim Shady LP*, and the quiet, unyielding spirit of Johnny Cash’s *Ain’t No Grave*. Like these albums, your life weaves audacity and grace, laughter and resilience. May the year ahead carry you through wild riffs and gentle solos, each note a step toward your own fierce, beautiful truth. You are a melody that refuses to be silenced—happy birthday, with all the warmth of a new verse waiting to be written.

items.name: God Speed
items.descriptionZh: 《God Speed》是奥井雅美于2006年发行的流行专辑，融合了J-Pop与电子元素，节奏明快，旋律充满力量感。专辑整体风格积极向上，展现了歌手标志性的高亢嗓音和动感编曲，适合动漫及流行音乐爱好者。
items.descriptionEn: God Speed is a pop album released by Masami Okui in 2006, blending J-Pop with electronic elements. The tracks are upbeat and powerful, showcasing her signature soaring vocals and energetic arrangements, appealing to anime and pop music fans.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值奥井雅美出道十周年，她亲自参与了多首歌曲的作词与作曲。专辑标题“God Speed”寓意“神速”，反映了她在音乐道路上不断追求进步的心态。录制过程中，她曾因过度用嗓而短暂失声，但最终坚持完成。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during the 10th anniversary of Masami Okui's debut. She personally wrote lyrics and composed several tracks. The title 'God Speed' symbolizes her relentless pursuit of progress. During recording, she briefly lost her voice due to overuse but persevered to complete the album.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美，日本女性歌手、作词家、作曲家，以演唱《秀逗魔导士》《少女革命》等动漫主题曲闻名。她的音乐风格以J-Pop为主，嗓音高亢有力，代表作包括《轮舞-revolution》《Give a reason》。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a Japanese female singer, lyricist, and composer, best known for performing anime theme songs for 'Slayers' and 'Revolutionary Girl Utena'. Her style is primarily J-Pop with powerful vocals. Notable works include 'Rondo-revolution' and 'Give a reason'.

items.name: A Tribute to Jack Johnson
items.descriptionZh: 《A Tribute to Jack Johnson》是迈尔斯·戴维斯于1971年发行的摇滚风格电影原声专辑，融合爵士、放克和摇滚元素，充满即兴和实验性。专辑分为两首长曲，展现了小号手在电声时期的先锋探索。
items.descriptionEn: A Tribute to Jack Johnson is a rock-oriented film soundtrack album by Miles Davis, released in 1971. It blends jazz, funk, and rock with improvisation and experimentation. The album consists of two long tracks, showcasing Davis's avant-garde electric period.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是为纪录片《杰克·约翰逊》配乐，迈尔斯·戴维斯在录制时采用了非传统的录音方式，经常在深夜即兴演奏。吉他手约翰·麦克劳林和鼓手比利·科巴姆等乐手的加入，使音乐��满爆炸性的能量。戴维斯曾表示这是他最满意的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: This album was the soundtrack for the documentary 'Jack Johnson'. Miles Davis recorded it using unconventional methods, often improvising late at night. The inclusion of guitarist John McLaughlin and drummer Billy Cobham gave the music explosive energy. Davis once called it one of his most satisfying works.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是迈尔斯·戴维斯电声时期的重要里程碑，为爵士摇滚融合风格树立了典范，影响了后来的放克和摇滚音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a landmark of Miles Davis's electric period, setting a benchmark for jazz-rock fusion and influencing later funk and rock musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯，美国爵士小号手、作曲家、乐队领队，是现代爵士乐的先驱之一。他开创了冷爵士、硬波普、调式爵士和爵士融合等风格，代表作包括《Kind of Blue》《Bitches Brew》。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader, a pioneer of modern jazz. He pioneered cool jazz, hard bop, modal jazz, and jazz fusion. Notable works include 'Kind of Blue' and 'Bitches Brew'.

items.name: 26½
items.descriptionZh: 《26½》是德国乐队Fehlfarben于2006年发行的流行专辑，延续了乐队后朋克和新浪潮的根源，但融入了更多流行旋律。歌词充满社会观察和讽刺，音乐简洁有力，带有典型的德式冷峻。
items.descriptionEn: 26½ is a pop album by German band Fehlfarben, released in 2006. It retains their post-punk and new wave roots while incorporating more pop melodies. The lyrics are socially observant and ironic, with a concise, powerful sound typical of German coolness.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题“26½”源于乐队成员的一次玩笑，意指他们出道26年半后的作品。录制过程中，主唱彼得·海因在柏林的一个旧录音棚里即兴创作了部分歌词，灵感来自东德时期的街头见闻。
items.storiesEn: The title '26½' came from a band joke, referring to their album released 26 and a half years after their debut. During recording, lead singer Peter Hein improvised some lyrics in an old Berlin studio, inspired by street scenes from the East German era.
items.artistIntroZh: Fehlfarben，德国后朋克/新浪潮乐队，1979年成立，以冷峻的歌词和简洁的吉他编曲著称。代表作包括专辑《Monarchie und Alltag》和歌曲《Ein Jahr (Es geht voran)》，对德国独立音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Fehlfarben is a German post-punk/new wave band formed in 1979, known for their cool lyrics and minimalist guitar arrangements. Notable works include the album 'Monarchie und Alltag' and the song 'Ein Jahr (Es geht voran)', deeply influencing German indie music.

02-24.birthdayZh: 2月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以《God Speed》为你祈愿，愿你的每一步都如奥井雅美歌声中那般高亢而自由，带着冲破风浪的勇气。也愿你如《A Tribute to Jack Johnson》里的爵士灵魂，在粗粝与即兴中，活出最真实的节奏。生日不是年岁的增长，而是你与生俱来的力量，在时光里愈发闪亮。
02-24.birthdayEn: February 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the unstoppable drive of Miles Davis’s A Tribute to Jack Johnson, an album that channels raw determination and the fight to rise. May your new year carry that same fearless, forward spirit—bold as a jazz coda. You are not just marking another trip around the sun; you are stepping into a rhythm all your own, full of motion and light. Here’s to you, to every note yet to play, and to a year as brilliantly alive as the music that celebrates this date.

items.name: Q777551
items.descriptionZh: 《Q777551》是PVP于2005年发行的嘻哈专辑，融合了东海岸说唱和电子节拍，歌词充满街头智慧和幽默感。专辑制作精良，节奏紧凑，展现了韩国嘻哈的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Q777551 is a hip-hop album by PVP, released in 2005. It blends East Coast rap with electronic beats, featuring street-smart and humorous lyrics. The production is polished and tight, showcasing the unique charm of Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“Q777551”是制作人随意输入的一串数字，后来成为乐队的内部代号。录制时，成员们在一间狭小的地下室里完成大部分录音，因预算有限，他们用自制的设备制作了部分节拍。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Q777551' was a random string of numbers input by the producer, later becoming an internal code. During recording, members completed most of the tracks in a small basement studio, using homemade equipment for some beats due to budget constraints.
items.artistIntroZh: PVP，韩国嘻哈组合，以幽默的歌词和实验性的制作风格著称。他们的音乐融合了多种流派，代表作包括专辑《Q777551》和单曲《Hip Hop》。PVP对韩国地下嘻哈场景有一定影响。
items.artistIntroEn: PVP is a Korean hip-hop group known for their humorous lyrics and experimental production. Their music blends multiple genres. Notable works include the album 'Q777551' and the single 'Hip Hop'. PVP has influenced the Korean underground hip-hop scene.

items.name: Peter Gabriel
items.descriptionZh: 《Peter Gabriel》是彼得·盖布瑞尔于1977年发行的首张同名个人专辑，风格为前卫流行，融合艺术摇滚和世界音乐元素。专辑充满实验性，歌词富有诗意，展现了他在离开创世纪乐队后的全新探索。
items.descriptionEn: Peter Gabriel is the self-titled debut solo album by Peter Gabriel, released in 1977. It blends art rock and world music elements with progressive pop. The album is experimental, with poetic lyrics, showcasing his new direction after leaving Genesis.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的封面由希普诺西斯设计，采用了一张盖布瑞尔被水浸泡的照片，但实际他并未湿身——摄影师通过玻璃和水箱制造了效果。录制时，盖布瑞尔尝试了多种非传统乐器，包括非洲鼓和合成器，部分歌曲在英格兰乡村的谷仓中录制。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was designed by Hipgnosis, using a photo of Gabriel seemingly submerged in water, but he was actually dry—the effect was created with glass and a water tank. During recording, Gabriel experimented with unconventional instruments like African drums and synthesizers, with some songs recorded in a barn in rural England.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了彼得·盖布瑞尔个人音乐生涯的基础，其艺术摇滚与实验精神的结合影响了后来的前卫流行和世界音乐融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album laid the foundation for Peter Gabriel's solo career, and its blend of art rock and experimentalism influenced later progressive pop and world music fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: 彼得·盖布瑞尔，英国歌手、音乐家，前创世纪乐队主唱。他以独特的嗓音、戏剧化表演和对世界音乐的探索闻名，代表作包括《Solsbury Hill》《Sledgehammer》和专辑《So》。
items.artistIntroEn: Peter Gabriel is a British singer and musician, former lead vocalist of Genesis. He is known for his distinctive voice, theatrical performances, and exploration of world music. Notable works include 'Solsbury Hill', 'Sledgehammer', and the album 'So'.

items.name: Pink Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Moon》是Nick Drake在1972年发行的第三张也是最后一张录音室专辑，风格属于英国民谣，但比前作更加简约、内省。整张专辑仅由Drake的吉他和人声构成，几乎没有其他乐器，呈现出一种极致的孤独与脆弱感。核心特色在于其短小精悍的歌曲结构、细腻的指弹吉他技巧，以及歌词中充满隐喻与忧郁的诗意。
items.descriptionEn: Pink Moon is Nick Drake's third and final studio album, released in 1972. Stylistically rooted in British folk, it is notably more minimalistic and introspective than his earlier work. The album features only Drake's guitar and vocals, creating a profound sense of solitude and fragility. Its core characteristics include concise song structures, intricate fingerpicking, and lyrics rich in metaphor and melancholy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常低调。Nick Drake当时深陷抑郁症，他独自带着一把吉他走进伦敦的Sound Techniques录音室，仅用了两个晚上就完成了所有录制，几乎没有进行第二次录音。制作人John Wood回忆说，Drake当时非常沉默，录完后就默默离开。专辑封面也充满故事：那是Drake自己拍摄的一颗粉色月亮，据说是在黎明前用傻瓜相机拍下的，象征着他内心的孤独与消逝。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was remarkably low-key. Suffering from severe depression, Nick Drake walked into London's Sound Techniques studio alone with just his guitar, completing all recordings in just two nights with almost no second takes. Producer John Wood recalled that Drake was extremely quiet and would leave silently after recording. The album cover also has a story: it features a pink moon photographed by Drake himself with a disposable camera before dawn, symbolizing his inner loneliness and fading presence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Pink Moon》在发行时销量惨淡，但在Drake去世后逐渐成为民谣经典。2000年，该专辑被用于大众汽车广告后销量激增，使Nick Drake的音乐被新一代听众发现，对当代独立民谣和唱作人风格产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Pink Moon sold poorly upon release but gradually became a folk classic after Drake's death. In 2000, the album saw a massive sales surge after being used in a Volkswagen commercial, introducing Nick Drake's music to a new generation and deeply influencing contemporary indie folk and singer-songwriter styles.
items.artistIntroZh: Nick Drake（1948-1974），英国唱作人，英伦民谣的代表��物。他的音乐以忧郁的���词、复杂的吉他指法和温柔的嗓音著称。代表作包括《Five Leaves Left》《Bryter Layter》和《Pink Moon》。尽管生前未被广泛认可，他去世后被视为20世纪最具影响力的民谣音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nick Drake (1948-1974) was a British singer-songwriter and a key figure in British folk music. Known for his melancholic lyrics, complex guitar fingerpicking, and gentle vocals, his major works include Five Leaves Left, Bryter Layter, and Pink Moon. Although largely unrecognized during his lifetime, he is posthumously regarded as one of the most influential folk musicians of the 20th century.

02-25.birthdayZh: 2月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Pink Moon》的孤寂月色沉默，也在《Q777551》的电子星辰中寻找秩序。你像一颗被命运校准的星，在最冷的夜色里发光——不必像彼得·盖布瑞尔那样急于歌唱。你只需知道，这日子的歌都藏着一缕温柔的轰鸣，是你的序曲，也是你必将穿越的旷野。
02-25.birthdayEn: February 25 is your birthday. On this day, Nick Drake gifted the world Pink Moon, a quiet, brave album that glows in its solitude—reminding us that even the softest voices can leave a lasting imprint. And Peter Gabriel’s debut burst forth with art rock’s bold, hopeful experimentation. May your year ahead carry that same gentle courage and daring spirit: a melody of quiet strength and joyful new beginnings. You are a beautiful chapter in this world’s song.

items.name: The Magic Position
items.descriptionZh: 《The Magic Position》是Patrick Wolf于2007年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格融合了民谣、流行、巴洛克和电子元素，属于艺术民谣/独立流行。核心特色在于其戏剧化的编排、华丽的弦乐与电子节拍的碰撞，以及Wolf标志性的假声演唱。专辑主题围绕爱情、欢乐与自我解放，比前作更加明亮乐观。
items.descriptionEn: The Magic Position is Patrick Wolf's third studio album, released in 2007. Blending folk, pop, baroque, and electronic elements, it falls under art folk/indie pop. Its core features include theatrical arrangements, a collision of lush strings and electronic beats, and Wolf's signature falsetto vocals. The album's themes revolve around love, joy, and self-liberation, making it notably brighter and more optimistic than his earlier work.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制跨越了多个地点，包括伦敦、柏林和都柏林。Patrick Wolf在创作过程中经历了一段感情破裂，但反而激发了他创作出这张充满庆祝感的专辑。主打歌《The Magic Position》的灵感来自他的一次梦境，梦中他站在一个魔法位置上看世界。为了捕捉真实的声音，他甚至在柏林街头录制了环境音，并邀请了一支小型管弦乐队参与演奏。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded across multiple locations, including London, Berlin, and Dublin. Patrick Wolf experienced a relationship breakup during the creative process, which paradoxically inspired him to create this celebratory album. The title track 'The Magic Position' was inspired by a dream in which he stood in a magical position overlooking the world. To capture authentic sounds, he recorded ambient noise on the streets of Berlin and invited a small chamber orchestra to perform.
items.artistIntroZh: Patrick Wolf（1983年出生），英国独立音乐人，以融合民谣、电子与古典元素的独特风格著称。他擅长多种乐器，包括小提琴、尤克里里和钢琴，嗓音多变且富有戏剧性。代表作有《Lycanthropy》《The Magic Position》和《Lupercalia》。
items.artistIntroEn: Patrick Wolf (born 1983) is a British independent musician known for his unique blend of folk, electronic, and classical elements. He is proficient in multiple instruments including violin, ukulele, and piano, and possesses a versatile, theatrical voice. His major works include Lycanthropy, The Magic Position, and Lupercalia.

items.name: We Lost the Skyline
items.descriptionZh: 《We Lost the Skyline》是Porcupine Tree于2008年发行的现场专辑，收录了乐队在荷兰蒂尔堡013音乐厅的演出录音。风格属于前卫摇滚/艺术摇滚，核心特色在于其精密的器乐编排、动态十足的音场切换，以及主唱Steven Wilson细腻的嗓音。专辑以较短的曲目为主，展现了乐队在旋律与氛围之间的平衡能力。
items.descriptionEn: We Lost the Skyline is a live album by Porcupine Tree, released in 2008, recorded at the 013 venue in Tilburg, Netherlands. Stylistically progressive rock/art rock, its core features include intricate instrumental arrangements, dynamic soundscape shifts, and lead vocalist Steven Wilson's delicate voice. The album focuses on shorter tracks, showcasing the band's ability to balance melody and atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制源于一次意外的广播节目需求。2007年，Porcupine Tree在荷兰巡演时，当地电台要求录制一场特别的现场演出。乐队选择了他们较少演奏的早期作品和偏安静的曲目，以区别于他们通常的重型现场。演出结束后，Steven Wilson对录音质量非常满意，决定将其单独发行。专辑名《We Lost the Skyline》取自其中一首歌词，也隐喻了乐队对早期风格的回顾。
items.storiesEn: This album originated from an unexpected radio program request. During their 2007 tour in the Netherlands, a local radio station asked Porcupine Tree to record a special live performance. The band chose to play earlier, less frequently performed works and quieter tracks, distinguishing it from their typical heavier live sets. After the show, Steven Wilson was so pleased with the recording quality that he decided to release it separately. The title We Lost the Skyline is taken from one of the song lyrics, also metaphorically reflecting the band's retrospective look at their early style.
items.artistIntroZh: Porcupine Tree，英国前卫摇滚乐队，由Steven Wilson于1987年创立。乐队以复杂的编曲、概念性专辑和氛围摇滚风格著称，是21世纪前卫摇滚复兴的代表之一。代表作包括《In Absentia》《Deadwing》和《Fear of a Blank Planet》。
items.artistIntroEn: Porcupine Tree is a British progressive rock band formed by Steven Wilson in 1987. Known for their complex arrangements, concept albums, and atmospheric rock style, they are a leading force in the 21st-century progressive rock revival. Major works include In Absentia, Deadwing, and Fear of a Blank Planet.

02-26.birthdayZh: 2月26日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张叫《The Magic Position》的专辑诞生，它像一场斑斓的梦，告诉你世界有无数奇妙的可能。还有《We Lost the Skyline》——即使地平线消失，心底的旋律依然清澈如初。生日从来不只是年岁的叠加，而是你站在时光里，成为一首独一无二的歌。
02-26.birthdayEn: February 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed not only you but also two albums that capture the spirit of your light: Patrick Wolf’s The Magic Position and Porcupine Tree’s We Lost the Skyline. Like Wolf’s joyful anthem, may your year dance with bold, radiant magic, and like the quiet strength of that acoustic skyline, may you find peace in every horizon. You are a constellation of possibility—step into your next orbit with wonder, knowing the sky has always been yours to hold.

items.name: The Face
items.descriptionZh: 《The Face》是BoA于2008年在日本发行的第九张录音室专辑，风格属于流行舞曲/R&B。核心特色在于强劲的电子节拍、流畅的R&B旋律，以及BoA兼具力量与细腻的嗓音表现。专辑收录了多首热门单曲，如《Sweet Impact》《Love Letter》和《My Way, Your Way》，展现了她在日韩流行音乐市场的成熟驾驭力。
items.descriptionEn: The Face is BoA's ninth studio album released in Japan in 2008, stylistically pop dance/R&B. Its core features include powerful electronic beats, smooth R&B melodies, and BoA's vocals that combine strength with delicacy. The album includes several hit singles such as 'Sweet Impact,' 'Love Letter,' and 'My Way, Your Way,' showcasing her mature command of the Japanese and Korean pop music markets.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值BoA在日本事业的巅峰期，她同时兼顾韩国和日本的宣传活动。为了专辑中的歌曲《My Way, Your Way》，BoA亲自参与了歌词创作，讲述了她作为跨国艺人在两地奔波的真实感受。专辑封面由知名摄影师掌镜，BoA尝试了更具时尚感的造型，一改以往清纯形象，展现了成熟女性的魅力。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during the peak of BoA's career in Japan, as she simultaneously managed promotional activities in both Korea and Japan. For the song 'My Way, Your Way,' BoA personally participated in lyric writing, expressing her real feelings as a跨国 artist constantly traveling between two countries. The album cover was shot by a renowned photographer, with BoA adopting a more fashionable look, departing from her previous innocent image to showcase mature feminine charm.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝雅，1986年出生），韩国流行歌手，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她13岁出道，是首位成功打入日本市场的韩国歌手，擅长Pop、R&B和舞曲。代表作有《No.1》《Valenti》《Only One》等，对韩流文化的全球传播起到了先驱作用。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah, born 1986) is a South Korean pop singer known as the 'Star of Asia.' Debuting at age 13, she was the first Korean singer to successfully enter the Japanese market, excelling in pop, R&B, and dance music. Her major works include No.1, Valenti, and Only One, and she is a pioneer in the global spread of Hallyu (Korean Wave) culture.

items.name: Blackwater Park
items.descriptionZh: 《Blackwater Park》是Opeth于2001年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格属于前卫死亡金属/前卫摇滚。核心特色在于极端金属的暴烈段落与70年代前卫摇滚的优美原声段落之间的剧烈反差，以及主唱Mikael Åkerfeldt在死嗓与清嗓之间的自如转换。专辑制作精良，由Steven Wilson担任混音，音场宏大且层次丰富。
items.descriptionEn: Blackwater Park is Opeth's fifth studio album, released in 2001, stylistically progressive death metal/progressive rock. Its core features lie in the dramatic contrast between brutal extreme metal passages and beautiful acoustic sections reminiscent of 1970s progressive rock, along with vocalist Mikael Åkerfeldt's seamless switching between death growls and clean vocals. The album is meticulously produced, mixed by Steven Wilson, with a grand, layered soundscape.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Opeth与Porcupine Tree的Steven Wilson首次合作的成果，Wilson担任了混音和制作顾问。录制在瑞典的Studio Fredman进行，但Wilson通过邮件从英国发送混音意见，这在当时属于远程协作的先锋案例。专辑同名曲《Blackwater Park》的歌词灵感来自Mikael Åkerfeldt在英格兰乡村散步时看到的古老庄园和迷雾中的湖泊，营造出一种哥特式的黑暗浪漫氛围。
items.storiesEn: This album marks the first collaboration between Opeth and Porcupine Tree's Steven Wilson, who served as mixer and production consultant. Recording took place at Studio Fredman in Sweden, but Wilson sent mixing notes from the UK via email, a pioneering case of remote collaboration at the time. The lyrics for the title track 'Blackwater Park' were inspired by Mikael Åkerfeldt's walks in the English countryside, where he saw ancient manors and mist-covered lakes, creating a gothic, darkly romantic atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Blackwater Park》被广泛认为是Opeth的巅峰之作，也是前卫死亡金属的里程碑专辑。它确立了Opeth将极端金属与前卫摇滚融合的独特风格，影响了随后一大批前卫金属乐队，并帮助Steven Wilson开启了作为金属制作人的职业生涯。
items.historicalImpactEn: Blackwater Park is widely regarded as Opeth's magnum opus and a landmark album in progressive death metal. It established Opeth's unique fusion of extreme metal and progressive rock, influencing a generation of progressive metal bands, and also launched Steven Wilson's career as a metal producer.
items.artistIntroZh: Opeth，瑞典前卫死亡金属乐队，成立于1990年。乐队以融合死亡金属的暴烈与前卫摇滚的优美著称，主唱Mikael Åkerfeldt的嗓音在死嗓与清嗓之间自如切换。代表作包括《Blackwater Park》《Ghost Reveries》和《Watershed》。
items.artistIntroEn: Opeth is a Swedish progressive death metal band formed in 1990. Known for fusing the brutality of death metal with the beauty of progressive rock, vocalist Mikael Åkerfeldt seamlessly switches between death growls and clean vocals. Major works include Blackwater Park, Ghost Reveries, and Watershed.

02-27.birthdayZh: 2月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种声音：BoA的《The Face》教会你如何勇敢地面对自己，哪怕不完美也要站成光的模样；Opeth的《Blackwater Park》则提醒你，黑暗深处也藏着诗意的力量。你像一张从岁月深处传来的专辑——旋律里有风霜，却始终温暖回响。生日快乐，愿你永远这样，既温柔又倔强。
02-27.birthdayEn: February 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world received gifts like BoA’s The Face, a luminous pop journey of reinvention, and Opeth’s Blackwater Park, a masterwork of dark grace and transformation. May your year ahead carry that same spirit: the courage to show your true face, and the strength to find beauty in life’s depths. You are a living album of precious moments, each day a new track waiting to be sung. Happy birthday, bright soul.

items.name: I Had a Name
items.descriptionZh: 《I Had a Name》是Eric Bass于2025年发行的摇滚专辑，融合了硬摇滚与另类摇滚元素，以沉重的吉他Riff和情感充沛的旋律为核心。专辑主题围绕个人身份与记忆的探索，展现了Bass作为多乐器演奏家的深厚功底。
items.descriptionEn: "I Had a Name" is a 2025 rock album by Eric Bass, blending hard rock and alternative rock with heavy guitar riffs and emotionally charged melodies. The album explores themes of personal identity and memory, showcasing Bass's prowess as a multi-instrumentalist.
items.storiesZh: Eric Bass作为Shinedown的贝斯手，在巡演间隙录制了这张个人专辑。他透露专辑名称源于一次与父亲的对话，父亲曾告诉他“你有一个名字，但你必须让它有意义”。录音过程中，他独自演奏了大部分乐器，仅邀请少数好友客串。
items.storiesEn: As the bassist of Shinedown, Eric Bass recorded this solo album during tour breaks. He revealed that the album title came from a conversation with his father, who told him, "You have a name, but you must make it meaningful." He played most instruments himself, with only a few guest appearances.
items.artistIntroZh: Eric Bass是美国摇滚乐队Shinedown的贝斯手和和声歌手，出生于1974年。他以其精湛的贝斯技巧和创作能力著称，参与制作了Shinedown多张白金销量专辑。代表作包括《Sound of Madness》和《Attention Attention》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eric Bass is the bassist and backing vocalist for the American rock band Shinedown, born in 1974. Known for his technical bass skills and songwriting, he has contributed to multiple platinum albums. Representative works include "Sound of Madness" and "Attention Attention."

items.name: Year of the Dragon
items.descriptionZh: 《Year of the Dragon》是Modern Talking于2000年发行的流行专辑，延续了其标志性的欧陆迪斯科风格，融合合成器旋律与动感节拍。专辑以中国龙年为主题，充满欢快的舞曲氛围，是乐队后期复出时期的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Year of the Dragon" is a 2000 pop album by Modern Talking, continuing their signature Eurodisco style with synthesizer melodies and danceable beats. Themed around the Chinese Year of the Dragon, it features upbeat dance tracks and is a highlight of the band's later comeback period.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking在1998年重组后发行的第三张��音室专辑。主唱Thomas Anders曾透露，专辑同名曲的灵感来自一次亚洲巡演，他们在北京看到龙年庆祝活动后决定创作。Dieter Bohlen用一周时间完成了大部分编曲。
