items.storiesEn: This album is the third studio release after Modern Talking's 1998 reunion. Lead singer Thomas Anders revealed that the title track was inspired by an Asian tour, where they saw Chinese New Year celebrations in Beijing. Dieter Bohlen completed most arrangements within a week.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了Modern Talking在欧陆舞曲领域的地位，在德国、奥地利等欧洲国家取得商业成功。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Modern Talking's status in Eurodance, achieving commercial success in Germany, Austria, and other European countries.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国流行二人组，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders于1984年成立。他们以其欧陆迪斯科风格风靡全球，代表作包括《Brother Louie》和《Cheri Cheri Lady》。乐队在80年代和90年代多次重组，全球销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders. Known for their Eurodisco sound, they achieved global fame with hits like "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady." The band reunited multiple times, selling over 120 million records worldwide.

02-28.birthdayZh: 2月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《I Had a Name》的叙事勇气，也回响着《Year of the Dragon》的飞腾旋律。你带着自己的名字而来，像一首尚未写完的歌，每一个音符都朝着光亮生长。愿你在属于自己的龙年里，始终记得：你的名字，就是世界为你留下的最温柔坐标。
02-28.birthdayEn: February 28 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us two soundtracks for a life well-lived: Eric Bass’s “I Had a Name,” a bold anthem of claiming your own story, and Modern Talking’s “Year of the Dragon,” a spirited call to dance through every season. Like these albums, may your year be a blend of quiet strength and joyful rhythm. You are a melody only you can write, and today, the whole world hums along. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Idlewild
items.descriptionZh: 《Idlewild》是Everything but the Girl于1988年发行的摇滚风格专辑，融合了爵士流行与另类摇滚元素，以细腻的吉他演奏和Tracey Thorn的温暖嗓音为特色。专辑氛围忧郁而浪漫，展现了乐队从早期爵士流行向更成熟风格的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: "Idlewild" is a 1988 rock-influenced album by Everything but the Girl, blending jazz-pop with alternative rock, featuring delicate guitar work and Tracey Thorn's warm vocals. The mood is melancholic yet romantic, marking the band's transition from early jazz-pop to a more mature sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队主唱Tracey Thorn和吉他手Ben Watt的关系从音乐搭档发展为恋人，最终结婚。专辑名称“Idlewild”取自纽约肯尼迪机场的旧名，Ben Watt表示这象征着“一个介于两个世界之间的地方”，反映专辑的过渡性质。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, lead singer Tracey Thorn and guitarist Ben Watt evolved from musical partners to lovers, eventually marrying. The title "Idlewild" was taken from the former name of New York's JFK Airport, symbolizing "a place between two worlds," reflecting the album's transitional nature.
items.artistIntroZh: Everything but the Girl是英国二人组，由Tracey Thorn（主唱）和Ben Watt（吉他手）于1982年成立。他们最初以爵士流行风格闻名，后转向电子舞曲。代表作包括《Missing》和《Walking Wounded》。Thorn的独特嗓音和Watt的创作是乐队的标志。
items.artistIntroEn: Everything but the Girl is a British duo formed in 1982 by Tracey Thorn (vocals) and Ben Watt (guitar). Initially known for jazz-pop, they later shifted to electronic dance music. Hits include "Missing" and "Walking Wounded." Thorn's distinctive voice and Watt's songwriting define their sound.

02-29.birthdayZh: 2月29日，是你的生日。这一天如此稀有，像《Idlewild》里藏着荒野的自由——不必年年被看见，却每次到来都带着爵士般的从容。四年一次的清晨，你站在时间缝隙里，把等待酿成独一无二的旋律。世界或许匆忙，但你的节奏像灵魂乐般深沉，像民谣般坚定：不必追逐每一个日子，你本身就是值得珍藏的周期。
02-29.birthdayEn: February 29 is your birthday. A rare and magical day, like the album Idlewild, a quiet masterpiece that dares to bloom between seasons. Your presence is a leap of faith in the calendar of life—a gift that arrives only when the stars align just so. May your year ahead carry the same wild, patient grace: a melody that waits for no one but you, then fills the world with song. Happy birthday, beloved time-traveler.

items.name: Explorations
items.descriptionZh: 《Explorations》是Bill Evans Trio于1961年发行的爵士专辑，属于硬波普与模态爵士风格。钢琴、贝斯与鼓的互动精妙而富有诗意，以即兴旋律和复杂和声著称。专辑展现了Evans对节奏与空间的独特掌控，是经典三重奏的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Explorations" is a 1961 jazz album by the Bill Evans Trio, in the hard bop and modal jazz style. The interplay between piano, bass, and drums is poetic and intricate, known for improvisational melodies and complex harmonies. It showcases Evans's unique control of rhythm and space, a classic trio work.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Bill Evans与贝斯手Scott LaFaro、鼓手Paul Motian合作的第二张录音室专辑。录制于1961年2月，仅用两天完成。LaFaro在此专辑中展现了革命性的贝斯演奏风格，但不幸的是，他于同年7月因车祸去世，使这张专辑成为其绝唱之一。
items.storiesEn: This is the second studio album by Bill Evans with bassist Scott LaFaro and drummer Paul Motian. Recorded in February 1961, it was completed in just two days. LaFaro's revolutionary bass playing is prominent, but tragically, he died in a car accident that July, making this one of his final recordings.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Explorations》是Bill Evans Trio的里程碑之作，影响了后世无数爵士钢琴家。LaFaro的贝斯演奏革新了爵士三重奏的互动模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Explorations" is a milestone for the Bill Evans Trio, influencing countless jazz pianists. LaFaro's bass playing revolutionized the interaction dynamics in jazz trios.
items.artistIntroZh: Bill Evans是美国爵士钢琴家与作曲家，生于1929年，以其���情而复杂的和声风格著称。他是爵士乐史上最具影响力的钢琴家之一，代表作包括《Waltz for Debby》和《Sunday at the Village Vanguard》。Evans对模态爵士的发展贡献巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Bill Evans was an American jazz pianist and composer, born in 1929, known for his lyrical and complex harmonic style. He is one of the most influential jazz pianists, with masterpieces like "Waltz for Debby" and "Sunday at the Village Vanguard." He greatly contributed to modal jazz.

items.name: Sweet James Jones Stories
items.descriptionZh: 《Sweet James Jones Stories》是Pimp C于2005年发行的嘻哈专辑，属于南方说唱（Southern Hip-Hop）风格，以厚重的贝斯线、放克采样和粗粝的街头叙事为特色。专辑讲述了Pimp C在监狱服刑前后的经历，充满真实而直白的自传性内容。
items.descriptionEn: "Sweet James Jones Stories" is a 2005 hip-hop album by Pimp C, in the Southern Hip-Hop style, featuring heavy basslines, funk samples, and gritty street narratives. The album recounts Pimp C's experiences before and after his prison sentence, with raw, autobiographical content.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Pimp C在服刑期间构思、出狱后录制的作品。专辑名“Sweet James Jones Stories”源自他在监狱中的绰号。录制过程中，他邀请了UGK成员Bun B及多位南方说唱歌手客串。Pimp C曾表示，这张专辑是他对自由和生活的重新思考。
items.storiesEn: This album was conceived during Pimp C's prison term and recorded after his release. The title "Sweet James Jones Stories" comes from his prison nickname. He invited UGK member Bun B and several Southern rappers as guests. Pimp C said the album reflected his rethinking of freedom and life.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑强化了Pimp C作为南方说唱传奇的地位，对后续德州说唱歌手产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Pimp C's legacy as a Southern hip-hop legend, significantly influencing later Texas rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Pimp C（原名Chad Butler）是美国南方说唱歌手与制作人，生于1973年，是UGK（Underground Kingz）成员之一。他以粗犷的嗓音、放克采样和街头叙事著称，代表作包括《International Players Anthem》和《Trill》。他于2007年去世。
items.artistIntroEn: Pimp C (born Chad Butler) was an American Southern rapper and producer, born in 1973, a member of UGK (Underground Kingz). Known for his gruff voice, funk samples, and street narratives, his hits include "International Players Anthem" and "Trill." He passed away in 2007.

03-01.birthdayZh: 3月1日，是你的生日。就像那一年Bill Evans三重奏的《Explorations》，你的人生也是一场精致而灵动的即兴，每个音符都承载着深远的和声。愿你在自己的旋律里，既有布鲁斯的真挚低回，也有如《Sweet James Jones Stories》般不羁的灵魂采样。这一天，世界把最好的节奏，都悄悄调成了你的频率。
03-01.birthdayEn: March 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music as deep and moving as you are. Like Bill Evans Trio’s "Explorations," may your year be a quiet, beautiful journey into new depths. And like Eric Clapton’s "There's One in Every Crowd," may you always remember you are wonderfully unique, surrounded by people who cherish your light. You are a melody all your own. Wishing you a year filled with harmony, discovery, and the sweetest of celebrations. Happy birthday.

03-02.birthdayZh: 3月2日，是你的生日。就像《Until the End of Time》里图帕克留下的坚韧与温柔，你的生命也有穿透黑夜的力量。愿你如《A Best》中的那些旋律，把路上最好的时光都收集成属于自己的光芒。风会记得这一天，光也会偏爱这样的你。
03-02.birthdayEn: March 2 is your birthday. Like Tupac’s “Until the End of Time,” your spirit carries timeless strength and soul, blending grit with grace. And like Ayumi Hamasaki’s “A Best,” you are a collection of your finest moments—each year a new hit, a deeper harmony. May your path be lined with rhythm and light, woven with love that never fades. You are a masterpiece still unfolding; may this year add your most beautiful verse yet. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: K-pop Selection
items.descriptionZh: 《K-pop Selection》是BoA于2004年发行的精选专辑，融合了流行、舞曲与R&B元素，展现了其作为K-pop领军人物的多面魅力。专辑收录了多首热门单曲，旋律抓耳、编曲精致，核心特色在于BoA兼具力量与柔美的声线，以及跨越日韩市场的国际化流行风格。
items.descriptionEn: "K-pop Selection" is a 2004 compilation album by BoA, blending pop, dance, and R&B elements, showcasing her multifaceted charm as a K-pop pioneer. The album features hit singles with catchy melodies and refined arrangements, highlighted by BoA's powerful yet delicate vocals and a cross-market international pop style.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，BoA已在日本和韩国取得了巨大成功。有趣的是，专辑曲目不仅包括韩语版，还特别收录了日语版歌曲，以回馈两地粉丝。录制期间，BoA经常往返于首尔和东京，甚至因行程紧张在录音室小憩，被工作人员笑称为“睡梦中的歌手”。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, BoA had already achieved great success in both Japan and South Korea. Interestingly, the album included not only Korean versions but also Japanese versions of songs to cater to fans in both countries. During recording, BoA frequently traveled between Seoul and Tokyo, and was jokingly called a "sleeping singer" by staff for napping in the studio due to her tight schedule.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为早期K-pop精选专辑之一，它巩固了BoA在亚洲流行市场的地位，并为后来K-pop艺人跨国发行模式提供了范例。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the early K-pop compilation albums, it solidified BoA's status in the Asian pop market and set a precedent for cross-border release strategies for later K-pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿），韩国女歌手，被誉为“K-pop皇后”。她以出色的唱跳能力和多语言演唱闻名，代表作包括《No.1》《Only One》等，是推动K-pop国际化的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean female singer, often called the "Queen of K-pop." Known for her exceptional singing and dancing skills and multilingual performances, her hits include "No.1" and "Only One," making her a key figure in globalizing K-pop.

items.name: Thick as a Brick
items.descriptionZh: 《Thick as a Brick》是Jethro Tull于1972年发行的概念专辑，属于前卫摇滚流派。整张专辑仅由一首长达45分钟的���诗级歌曲构成，融合了民谣、古典与硬摇滚元素。核心特色在于其复杂的编曲、讽刺性的歌词，以及看似连贯实则戏仿概念专辑的形式，被誉为前卫摇滚的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Thick as a Brick" is a 1972 concept album by Jethro Tull, belonging to the progressive rock genre. The entire album consists of a single 45-minute epic song, blending folk, classical, and hard rock elements. Its core features are complex arrangements, satirical lyrics, and a format that parodies concept albums while appearing cohesive, making it a pinnacle of progressive rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的灵感源于乐队主唱Ian Anderson对评论家批评其前作《Aqualung》为“概念专辑”的嘲讽。他故意创作了一首冗长、夸张的“概念”歌曲，并虚构了一个12岁天才诗人Gerald Bostock创作歌词的故事。录制时，乐队在伦敦的录音室即兴发挥，甚至加入了管弦乐和合唱团，成本远超预算。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by frontman Ian Anderson's mockery of critics who called the previous album "Aqualung" a concept album. He deliberately created a long, exaggerated "concept" song and fabricated a story about a 12-year-old prodigy poet Gerald Bostock writing the lyrics. During recording, the band improvised in a London studio, adding orchestral and choir elements, far exceeding the budget.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是前卫摇滚的里程碑，其单一长曲结构影响了无数后辈乐队，如Dream Theater等。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone in progressive rock, its single long-track structure influenced countless later bands such as Dream Theater.
items.artistIntroZh: Jethro Tull，英国摇滚乐队，成立于1967年，以主唱Ian Anderson的独特长笛演奏和融合民谣、前卫摇滚的风格著称。代表作包括《Aqualung》和《Thick as a Brick》。
items.artistIntroEn: Jethro Tull is a British rock band formed in 1967, known for frontman Ian Anderson's distinctive flute playing and a style blending folk and progressive rock. Their iconic works include "Aqualung" and "Thick as a Brick."

03-03.birthdayZh: 3月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好礼物：《Thick as a Brick》用一首45分钟的史诗告诉你，生命不必匆忙，可以慢慢铺展成壮阔的叙事；《The Remix》则提醒你，过往的每段旋律都值得被重新编曲，成为更闪亮的自己。你像初春的枝桠，在所有美好诞生之日，站成了独一无二的风景。
03-03.birthdayEn: March 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Thick as a Brick*, a reminder that life is a winding, beautiful concept we get to build. And *The Remix* of Lady Gaga celebrates the art of reinvention. May your new year feel like a rich, unfolding album—each day a bold new track, every challenge a chance to remix your strength into something even more brilliant. Here’s to your unique, uplifting melody. Happy birthday, with warmth and wonder.

items.name: 'Round About Midnight
items.descriptionZh: 《'Round About Midnight》是Miles Davis于1957年发行的专辑，属于流行爵士风格，但更准确地应归为硬波普与冷爵士。核心特色在于Davis标志性的弱音小号音色，以及他与John Coltrane等乐手的默契合作。专辑以同名曲《'Round About Midnight》为核心，展现了忧郁而深邃的夜间氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "'Round About Midnight" is a 1957 album by Miles Davis, classified as pop jazz but more accurately as hard bop and cool jazz. Its core features are Davis's signature muted trumpet sound and seamless collaboration with musicians like John Coltrane. The title track "'Round About Midnight" creates a melancholic, deep nocturnal atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Davis在签约哥伦比亚唱片公司后的首张作品，录制于1955至1956年间。有趣的是，专辑封面由设计师S. Neil Fujita创作，其抽象画风格后来也被用于其他爵士专辑。录制时，Davis因药物问题一度状态不佳，但Coltrane的即兴独奏为专辑注入了活力，二人从此开启了经典合作。
items.storiesEn: This was Davis's first album after signing with Columbia Records, recorded between 1955 and 1956. Interestingly, the cover art by designer S. Neil Fujita, with its abstract style, was later used for other jazz albums. During recording, Davis struggled with drug issues, but Coltrane's improvisational solos injected vitality into the album, beginning their iconic collaboration.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis，美国爵士小号手、作曲家，被誉为爵士乐史上最具影响力的人物之一。他开创了冷爵士、硬波普和融合爵士等风格，代表作包括《Kind of Blue》和《Bitches Brew》。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis was an American jazz trumpeter and composer, regarded as one of the most influential figures in jazz history. He pioneered cool jazz, hard bop, and fusion jazz, with landmark albums like "Kind of Blue" and "Bitches Brew."

03-04.birthdayZh: 3月4日，是你的生日。这一天，Miles Davis的《'Round About Midnight》如约响起——它用深邃的蓝调包裹着午夜，仿佛在说：无需惧怕黑暗，因为你的诞生本身就是一种柔和的光。愿你在自己的时间里，像这张专辑一样，从容地绕过每一个深夜，走向属于你的黎明。
03-04.birthdayEn: March 4 is your birthday. On this very day, the world was graced by the timeless, midnight soul of Miles Davis's 'Round About Midnight, a hard bop classic that spins darkness into silvered beauty. Like that album's spirit, may your year be a masterful blend of depth and grace, a bold melody that finds light in every shadow. You are a rare and beautiful composition, and the world is richer for your song. Here's to your next breathtaking verse.

items.name: A Love Trilogy
items.descriptionZh: 《A Love Trilogy》是Donna Summer于1976年发行的专辑，属于R&B/Soul流派，同时融合了迪斯科元素。核心特色在于其连续混音的长篇舞曲结构，以及Summer充满情感张力的嗓音。专辑以爱情为主题，分为三部分，通过层层递进的节奏和旋律，营造出从渴望到狂欢的情感旅程。
items.descriptionEn: "A Love Trilogy" is a 1976 album by Donna Summer, belonging to the R&B/Soul genre with disco elements. Its core features are continuous mixed long dance tracks and Summer's emotionally charged vocals. The album explores love in three parts, building from longing to ecstasy through escalating rhythms and melodies.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Summer与制作人Giorgio Moroder的第二次合作，他们延续了《Love to Love You Baby》的成功模式。录制时，Moroder采用了创新的多轨录音和电子合成器，为迪斯科音乐注入灵魂乐质感。有趣的是，专辑的连续混音概念最初是为了适应夜店播放需求，却意外推动了“专辑导向”的迪斯科潮流。
items.storiesEn: This album was Summer's second collaboration with producer Giorgio Moroder, continuing the successful formula of "Love to Love You Baby." During recording, Moroder used innovative multi-track recording and synthesizers, infusing disco with soul. Interestingly, the continuous mix concept was initially for nightclub play but unexpectedly boosted the album-oriented disco trend.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Donna Summer“迪斯科女王”的地位，其连续混音结构影响了后来的舞曲专辑制作模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Donna Summer's status as the "Queen of Disco," and its continuous mix structure influenced later dance album production formats.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer，美国歌手，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她以强劲的嗓音和跨流派风格闻名，融合了R&B、灵魂乐和迪斯科，代表作包括《Hot Stuff》和《I Feel Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer was an American singer, known as the "Queen of Disco." Renowned for her powerful voice and cross-genre style blending R&B, soul, and disco, her hits include "Hot Stuff" and "I Feel Love."

items.name: The Bird of Music
items.descriptionZh: 《The Bird of Music》是Au Revoir Simone于2007年发行的专辑，属于独立流行/梦幻流行风格。核心特色在于其柔和的电子合成器音色、轻盈的节拍，以及三位女成员交织的梦幻和声。专辑旋律悠扬、氛围空灵，如同音乐盒中的鸟鸣，营造出宁静而略带忧伤的童话感。
items.descriptionEn: "The Bird of Music" is a 2007 album by Au Revoir Simone, belonging to indie pop/dream pop. Its core features are soft synthesizer tones, light beats, and the interwoven dreamy harmonies of the three female members. The melodies are ethereal and gentle, like a music box's bird song, creating a serene, slightly melancholic fairy-tale atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称灵感来自乐队成员对自然和音乐的热爱，她们在纽约布鲁克林的公寓里用廉价合成器录制了大部分素材。有趣的是，主打歌《The Lucky One》的旋律源于键盘手Erika Forster的一次即兴弹奏，当时她正试图模仿雨滴的声音。专辑发行后，乐队因独特的梦幻音色被导演David Lynch邀请为其电影配乐。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by the band members' love for nature and music. They recorded most of the material with cheap synthesizers in a Brooklyn apartment. Interestingly, the melody of the lead track "The Lucky One" came from keyboardist Erika Forster's improvisation while trying to mimic raindrops. After release, director David Lynch invited them to score his film due to their unique dreamy sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Au Revoir Simone，美国独立流行乐队，成立于2003年，由三位女成员组成。她们以梦幻的合成器流行和轻柔和声著称，代表作包括《The Bird of Music》和《Still Night, Still Light》。
items.artistIntroEn: Au Revoir Simone is an American indie pop band formed in 2003, consisting of three female members. Known for their dreamy synth-pop and soft harmonies, their notable works include "The Bird of Music" and "Still Night, Still Light."

items.name: Tuskegee
items.descriptionZh: 《Tuskegee》是美国传奇歌手Lionel Richie在2012年发行的乡村风格专辑。这张作品将他的经典情歌重新编排，邀请了多位乡村音乐巨星合作演唱，融合了乡村、民谣与流行元素，呈现出温暖、质朴的听觉体验。核心特色在于经典旋律与乡村乐器的结合，如班卓琴和小提琴的运用。
items.descriptionEn: "Tuskegee" is a 2012 country-style album by American legend Lionel Richie, featuring reimagined versions of his classic ballads with collaborations from country music stars. It blends folk, country, and pop elements with warm, rustic instrumentation like banjo and fiddle.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑以Lionel Richie的家乡阿拉巴马州塔斯基吉命名。录制过程中，他与多位乡村巨星如Willie Nelson、Kenny Chesney合作，其中与Willie Nelson合唱的《Easy》被Richie称为“梦想成真”，因为Nelson是他长期以来的偶像。
items.storiesEn: The album is named after Lionel Richie's hometown of Tuskegee, Alabama. During recording, he collaborated with country stars like Willie Nelson and Kenny Chesney; the duet "Easy" with Nelson was described by Richie as a "dream come true" since Nelson had long been his idol.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在Billboard乡村专辑榜登顶，并成为Richie职业生涯中又一张多白金唱片，推动了流行与乡村跨界融合的潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album topped the Billboard Country Albums chart and became another multi-platinum success in Richie's career, furthering the trend of pop-country crossover.
items.artistIntroZh: Lionel Richie，美国歌手、词曲作者，生于1949年。早年作为Commodores乐队主唱成名，后单飞创作多首经典情歌。主要风格为流行、灵魂乐与乡村。代表作包括《Hello》《All Night Long》和《Say You, Say Me》。
items.artistIntroEn: Lionel Richie is an American singer and songwriter born in 1949. He rose to fame as lead vocalist of the Commodores and later had a solo career with iconic ballads. His styles include pop, soul, and country. Hits include "Hello," "All Night Long," and "Say You, Say Me."

03-05.birthdayZh: 3月5日，是你的生日。这一天，有《A Love Trilogy》的旋律流转，像迪斯科的节拍把爱情的三个章节都化作了你生命里的温度。也有《Tuskegee》的温暖回响，把旧时光重新编曲成拥抱。你降生的日子，连音符都带着温柔与力量——愿你去爱、被爱，像一首经典的歌，在每个季节都有新的共鸣。
03-05.birthdayEn: March 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Donna Summer’s “A Love Trilogy,” pulsing with the ecstatic rhythm of love in three movements—a reminder that your life, too, is a beautiful, unfolding symphony. Like Lionel Richie’s “Tuskegee,” you take what’s classic and make it new, blending old warmth with fresh hope. May your year ahead be a melody of joy, harmony, and gentle surprises, with every note played just for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mainstream Overtures
items.descriptionZh: 《Mainstream Overtures》是意大利作曲家Giacomo Bucci于2026年发行的古典音乐专辑。作品以现代古典语汇为基底，融合了极简主义与交响乐结构，核心特色在于将传统序曲形式与当代和声实验相结合，营造出既庄重又富有张力的听觉空间。
items.descriptionEn: "Mainstream Overtures" is a 2026 classical album by Italian composer Giacomo Bucci. It blends minimalist and symphonic structures with contemporary harmonic experiments, reimagining traditional overture forms with a modern, dramatic edge.
items.storiesZh: Bucci在创作本专辑时受到意大利文艺复兴建筑启发，尤其以佛罗伦萨圣母百花大教堂的穹顶线条作为音乐结构的隐喻。录制于米兰的斯福尔扎城堡录音室，使用了18世纪古董管风琴，录音师曾透露Bucci要求每个乐章必须一次完成，不允许多轨拼接。
items.storiesEn: Bucci drew inspiration from Italian Renaissance architecture, particularly the dome of Florence's Santa Maria del Fiore, as a structural metaphor. Recorded at the Sforza Castle studio in Milan using an 18th-century organ, the engineer revealed Bucci insisted each movement be recorded in a single take without multitrack editing.
items.artistIntroZh: Giacomo Bucci，意大利当代古典作曲家，生于1980年代。他擅长将巴洛克复调技法与极简主义结合，作品常探讨建筑与音乐的空间关系。代表作包括《大理石回响》与《数字巴洛克》。
items.artistIntroEn: Giacomo Bucci is an Italian contemporary classical composer born in the 1980s. He blends Baroque polyphony with minimalism, often exploring the spatial relationship between architecture and music. Notable works include "Marble Echoes" and "Digital Baroque."

items.name: Medusa
items.descriptionZh: 《Medusa》是Annie Lennox于1995年发行的翻唱专辑，风格以流行和灵魂乐为主。核心特色在于她极具辨识度的嗓音对经典歌曲的颠覆性诠释，如《No More "I Love You's"》和《A Whiter Shade of Pale》。制作上采用简约编配，凸显人声的情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Medusa" is a 1995 covers album by Annie Lennox, rooted in pop and soul. Its core feature is her distinctive voice reinterpreting classics like "No More 'I Love You's'" and "A Whiter Shade of Pale," with minimalist arrangements that highlight emotional vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“美杜莎”源自Lennox对女性力量与脆弱并存的主题思考。录制期间，她因过度追求完美而重新录制了《Waiting in Vain》多达17个版本，最终选用了第一个版本。制作人Stephen Lipson回忆说，Lennox在录音棚里经常赤脚唱歌以寻找最自然的共鸣。
items.storiesEn: The title "Medusa" reflects Lennox's theme of female power and vulnerability. During recording, she re-recorded "Waiting in Vain" 17 times in pursuit of perfection before settling on the first take. Producer Stephen Lipson recalled that Lennox often sang barefoot in the studio to find natural resonance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑获得格莱美最佳流行演唱专辑提名，并帮助Annie Lennox巩固了其作为90年代最具影响力的女性歌手之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned a Grammy nomination for Best Pop Vocal Album and solidified Annie Lennox as one of the most influential female vocalists of the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Annie Lennox，苏格兰歌手、词曲作者，生于1954年。作为Eurythmics主唱成名，单飞后继续探索流行、灵魂与电子音乐。代表作有《Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)》《Why》和《Into the West》。
items.artistIntroEn: Annie Lennox is a Scottish singer and songwriter born in 1954. She rose to fame as the lead vocalist of Eurythmics and later pursued a solo career in pop, soul, and electronic music. Hits include "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)," "Why," and "Into the West."

items.name: Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time
items.descriptionZh: 《Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time》是Mark Knopfler于1990年发行的民谣/乡村风格专辑。作品以原声吉他为主导，融合了凯尔特民谣、乡村摇滚和叙��性歌词，核心特色在于Knopfler标志性的指弹技法和温润的嗓音，营造出闲适而略带忧伤的旅途氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Missing...Presumed Having a Good Time" is a 1990 folk/country album by Mark Knopfler. Centered on acoustic guitar, it blends Celtic folk, country rock, and storytelling lyrics, featuring Knopfler's signature fingerpicking style and warm vocals for a wistful, travelogue feel.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Knopfler在Dire Straits暂停活动期间的个人项目。录制于伦敦的AIR录音室，期间他经常在午休时溜到附近酒吧与爱尔兰民谣乐手即兴合奏，这些即兴片段后来被收录为专辑的隐藏曲目。专辑封面由Knopfler本人手绘，灵感来自他童年时丢失的一只玩具熊。
items.storiesEn: This album was Knopfler's solo project during Dire Straits' hiatus. Recorded at AIR Studios in London, he often slipped into a nearby pub during breaks to jam with Irish folk musicians—those improvisations became hidden tracks. The cover art was hand-drawn by Knopfler, inspired by a lost teddy bear from his childhood.
items.artistIntroZh: Mark Knopfler，英国吉他手、歌手、词曲作者，生于1949年。作为Dire Straits的创始人和主唱闻名，以其独特的指弹吉他和叙事性歌词著称。主要风格为摇滚、民谣和乡村。代表作包括《Sultans of Swing》《Brothers in Arms》和《Money for Nothing》。
items.artistIntroEn: Mark Knopfler is a British guitarist, singer, and songwriter born in 1949. He is best known as the frontman of Dire Straits, celebrated for his fingerpicking guitar style and narrative lyrics. His styles include rock, folk, and country. Hits include "Sultans of Swing," "Brothers in Arms," and "Money for Nothing."

03-06.birthdayZh: 3月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Medusa》般深沉而重生的灵魂，也流淌过《Mainstream Overtures》里古典与未来碰撞的勇气。你像这些音符一样，既有柔软的深情，也有破格的力量。愿新的一岁，你始终是自己的主角，在生命的乐章里，从容地奏出独一无二的高潮。
03-06.birthdayEn: March 6 is your birthday. Like Giacomo Bucci's Mainstream Overtures, your life is a beautifully unfolding concept album, full of unexpected harmonies. And just as Annie Lennox reimagined classics in Medusa, you transform each year into something soulful and new. May your coming year be a warm overture of joy, a daring remix of all you love. Happy birthday—may your song grow richer with every note.

items.name: The Vintage Virgin
items.descriptionZh: 《The Vintage Virgin》是瑞典歌手Sebastian Karlsson于2007年发行的流行专辑。作品融合了合成器流行与舞曲元素，核心特色在于其复古未来主义的音色——大量使用1980年代的模拟合成器，搭配现代电子节拍，营造出既怀旧又前卫的听感。
items.descriptionEn: "The Vintage Virgin" is a 2007 pop album by Swedish singer Sebastian Karlsson. It blends synth-pop and dance music, featuring a retro-futuristic sound with extensive use of 1980s analog synthesizers paired with modern electronic beats, creating a nostalgic yet forward-looking vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于斯德哥尔摩一家由旧电影院改造的录音室，Karlsson坚持使用故障的复古合成器，因为其偶尔发出的“错误”声响被他视为灵感来源。主打歌《Vintage Virgin》的MV拍摄于一座废弃的苏联风格剧院，拍摄期间因屋顶漏水导致设备受损，但Karlsson决定保留这些“瑕疵”作为专辑的独特记忆。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Stockholm in a studio converted from an old cinema. Karlsson insisted on using malfunctioning vintage synthesizers, as their glitchy sounds inspired him. The music video for the title track was shot in an abandoned Soviet-style theater; a leaking roof damaged equipment, but Karlsson kept the "flaws" as part of the album's unique story.
items.artistIntroZh: Sebastian Karlsson，瑞典流行歌手、词曲作者，生于1985年。2005年通过瑞典偶像比赛出道，以复古合成器流行风格著称。代表作包括《The Vintage Virgin》《Do What You're Told》和《Words and Violence》。
items.artistIntroEn: Sebastian Karlsson is a Swedish pop singer and songwriter born in 1985. He debuted through the Swedish Idol competition in 2005 and is known for his retro synth-pop style. Hits include "The Vintage Virgin," "Do What You're Told," and "Words and Violence."

items.name: Elena Yerevan - My Guitar
items.descriptionZh: 《My Guitar》是Elena Yerevan于2017年发行的流行专辑，以轻柔的吉他旋律和温暖的人声为核心特色。整张作品融合了流行与民谣元素，营造出亲切、抒情的氛围，展现了Elena细腻的情感表达和流畅的旋律创作能力。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2017, 'My Guitar' by Elena Yerevan is a pop album centered around gentle guitar melodies and warm vocals. Blending pop with folk elements, it creates an intimate, lyrical atmosphere that showcases Elena's delicate emotional expression and smooth melodic craftsmanship.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Elena Yerevan以Elena Nikoghosyan为名发行的个人作品，她亲自参与了大部分歌曲的吉他演奏和编曲。专辑录制过程中，她选择在小型家庭录音室完成，以保留声音的自然质感，许多乐句都是一次性录制的即兴发挥。
items.storiesEn: This album was released under Elena Nikoghosyan's name, with Elena Yerevan personally handling most of the guitar work and arrangements. She chose to record in a small home studio to preserve the natural feel of the sound, with many phrases being improvised and recorded in one take.
items.artistIntroZh: Elena Yerevan（Elena Nikoghosyan）是一位亚美尼亚裔流行歌手兼吉他手，以其温暖的嗓音和吉他弹唱风格著称。代表作品包括《My Guitar》等，作品常融合流行与民谣元素，情感真挚。
items.artistIntroEn: Elena Yerevan (Elena Nikoghosyan) is an Armenian pop singer and guitarist known for her warm vocals and guitar-driven style. Her representative work includes 'My Guitar,' which often blends pop with folk elements with sincere emotion.

03-07.birthdayZh: 3月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾在《The Vintage Virgin》里种下青春的勇气与节奏，又在《Elena Yerevan - My Guitar》的弦音中流淌出古老的温柔。你看，那些明快或如泣如诉的歌，都像在等一个答案——而你，就是它们终于等到的光。愿这一年，你心里永远住着明亮的节拍，和一双能拨动自己命运的手。
03-07.birthdayEn: March 7 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with creative energy. On this day, Sebastian Karlsson’s “The Vintage Virgin” was born, a pop album that dances with fresh starts and bold spirit. And Elena Nikoghosyan’s “My Guitar” followed, its classical strings whispering the soul of Armenia—pure, instrumental, and endlessly soothing. May your new year be a melody of vintage joy and quiet reflection, each note a gift of light and possibility. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Kansas
items.descriptionZh: 《Kansas》是美国摇滚乐队Kansas于1974年发行的同名首张专辑，融合了前卫摇滚、硬摇滚和民谣元素。专辑以复杂的器乐编排、键盘与吉他的交织以及史诗般的歌曲结构为特色，奠定了乐队独特的交响摇滚风格。
items.descriptionEn: Self-titled debut album by Kansas, released in 1974, blending progressive rock, hard rock, and folk elements. It features intricate instrumental arrangements, interplay between keyboards and guitars, and epic song structures that established the band's signature symphonic rock sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战，乐队在纽约的录音室花费了数月时间打磨编曲。由于预算有限，他们不得不利用深夜时段以降低费用。主唱Steve Walsh曾回忆，专辑中《Journey from Mariabronn》的复杂段落是在一次通宵排练中即兴完成。
items.storiesEn: The recording process was challenging, with the band spending months in a New York studio refining arrangements. Due to limited budget, they worked late-night shifts to cut costs. Lead singer Steve Walsh recalled that the complex sections of 'Journey from Mariabronn' were improvised during an all-night rehearsal.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是美国前卫摇滚的奠基之作之一，为Kansas后续的经典作品铺平了道路，影响了后来众多前卫摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of the foundational works of American progressive rock, this album paved the way for Kansas' later classics and influenced many subsequent progressive rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Kansas是一支美国摇滚乐队，成立于1970年，以融合前卫摇滚、硬摇滚和民谣元素的交响摇滚风格闻名。代表作品包括《Carry On Wayward Son》和《Dust in the Wind》，在全球拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Kansas is an American rock band formed in 1970, known for their symphonic rock style blending progressive rock, hard rock, and folk. Their iconic hits include 'Carry On Wayward Son' and 'Dust in the Wind,' with global influence.

items.name: The Beach Boys Today!
items.descriptionZh: 《The Beach Boys Today!》是美国流行乐队The Beach Boys于1965年发行的专辑，展现了从冲浪摇滚向更成熟艺术流行风格的转变。专辑以丰富的和声、精致的编曲和Brian Wilson日益复杂的制作手法为核心特色，情感层次丰富。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1965, 'The Beach Boys Today!' marks the band's shift from surf rock to a more mature art pop style. The album features lush harmonies, sophisticated arrangements, and Brian Wilson's increasingly complex production techniques, offering rich emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Brian Wilson首次在制作中大量使用多轨录音和分层和声技术的成果。他当时因焦虑症而减少巡演，将精力集中在录音室创作中。专辑B面的慢歌部分是他刻意安排的“情感套曲”，反映了个人内心的挣扎。
items.storiesEn: This album was Brian Wilson's first extensive use of multi-track recording and layered harmonies. Due to anxiety, he reduced touring and focused on studio work. The slow songs on Side B were intentionally arranged as an 'emotional suite,' reflecting his personal struggles.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Beach Boys Today!》被���为是The Beach Boys艺术转型的关键作品，预示了次年《Pet Sounds》的革命性突破，对流行音乐制作产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a key transitional work for The Beach Boys, this album foreshadowed the revolutionary breakthrough of 'Pet Sounds' the following year, deeply influencing pop music production.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beach Boys是一支美国流行摇滚乐队，成立于1961年，以精妙的和声和冲浪音乐闻名。Brian Wilson的创作和制作才华使其成为流行音乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一，代表作包括《Good Vibrations》和《God Only Knows》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beach Boys are an American pop rock band formed in 1961, famous for their intricate harmonies and surf music. Brian Wilson's songwriting and production genius made them one of the most influential bands in pop history, with hits like 'Good Vibrations' and 'God Only Knows.'

03-08.birthdayZh: 3月8日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《Kansas》，如同那片辽阔而神秘的平原，你的生命也藏着层层叠叠的旋律与诗。还有《The Beach Boys Today!》，从简单的冲浪转向深邃的和声——正如你，从青春走向温柔的成熟。愿你像这些专辑，在时光中愈发丰盈、坚定，带着自己的节奏，继续灿烂地生长。
03-08.birthdayEn: March 8 is your birthday. On this very day, the music world was gifted two landmarks of spirit and transformation: Kansas’s self-titled debut, a bold and soaring declaration of arrival, and The Beach Boys Today!, a tender, thoughtful turn toward deeper shores. Your birthday shares that same energy—a beautiful blend of brave beginnings and graceful growth. May your year ahead be a melody of fresh horizons and quiet moments of joy, written in the key of your own unique light.

items.name: Are You Gonna Go My Way
items.descriptionZh: 《Are You Gonna Go My Way》是美国音乐人Lenny Kravitz于1993年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐、摇滚和放克元素。专辑以粗粝的吉他音色、强劲的节奏和Kravitz标志性的复古嗓音为核心特色，充满70年代复古气息。
items.descriptionEn: The third studio album by Lenny Kravitz, released in 1993, blending R&B, soul, rock, and funk. It features gritty guitar tones, driving rhythms, and Kravitz's signature vintage vocals, evoking a strong 1970s retro vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌的吉他即兴段落是Kravitz在录音室中无意间弹奏出来的，他立刻让鼓手和贝斯手跟上，整首歌在15分钟内完成。专辑录制时，Kravitz坚持使用老式模拟设备，拒绝数字录音，以追求温暖的复古音色。
items.storiesEn: The guitar riff for the title track was accidentally played by Kravitz in the studio; he immediately had the drummer and bassist join in, and the song was completed in 15 minutes. Kravitz insisted on using vintage analog equipment, rejecting digital recording to achieve a warm retro sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Lenny Kravitz作为复古摇滚复兴代表人物的地位，同名曲成为其职业生涯标志性作品，影响了90年代许多融合摇滚与灵魂乐的艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Lenny Kravitz as a leading figure in the retro rock revival, with the title track becoming a career-defining hit, influencing many 90s artists blending rock and soul.
items.artistIntroZh: Lenny Kravitz是一位美国歌手、词曲作者和多乐器演奏家，风格融合摇滚、灵魂乐、放克和R&B。以其复古美学和强劲现场表演著称，代表作包括《Are You Gonna Go My Way》和《Fly Away》，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Lenny Kravitz is an American singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist known for blending rock, soul, funk, and R&B. Famous for his retro aesthetic and powerful live shows, his hits include 'Are You Gonna Go My Way' and 'Fly Away,' with multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Epilogue
items.descriptionZh: 《Epilogue》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High于2010年发行的EP，融合了嘻哈、电子和流行元素。这张作品以深刻的歌词、细腻的叙事和丰富的音乐层次为核心特色，探讨了爱情、离别与人生的主题，情感真挚而内省。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2010, 'Epilogue' is an EP by Korean hip-hop group Epik High, blending hip-hop, electronic, and pop elements. It features profound lyrics,细腻 storytelling, and rich musical layers, exploring themes of love, farewell, and life with sincere introspection.
items.storiesZh: 这张EP原本计划作为Epik High的告别作品，因成员Tablo当时面临个人争议，团队一度考虑解散。录制过程中，Tablo将个人经历融入歌词，使作品充满沉重但真实的情感。最终专辑发行后获得好评，也标志着团队继续前行的决心。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as a farewell EP due to member Tablo's personal controversies at the time, the group considered disbanding. Tablo infused his personal experiences into the lyrics, giving the work a heavy but authentic emotional weight. The EP was well-received and marked the group's resolve to continue.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是一支韩国嘻哈组合，成立于2003年，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成。以诗意的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称，代表作包括《Fly》和《Love, Love, Love》，在韩国嘻哈界具有开创性地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics and experimental sound, their hits include 'Fly' and 'Love, Love, Love,' and they are pioneers in Korean hip-hop.

items.name: One
items.descriptionZh: 《One》是Angela Aki于2005年发行的首张专辑，融合了流行与钢琴摇滚元素，以深情的旋律和真挚的歌词为核心特色。她的嗓音充满力量，专辑中的歌曲如《Home》展现了个人情感与生活的细腻刻画，奠定了她在日本流行乐坛的独特地位。
items.descriptionEn: One is Angela Aki's debut album released in 2005, blending pop with piano rock elements, characterized by heartfelt melodies and sincere lyrics. Her powerful voice and songs like 'Home' delicately portray personal emotions and life, establishing her unique position in Japanese pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，Angela Aki曾在美国和日本两地奔波，为了追求完美的声音效果，她坚持使用钢琴现场录音而非电子合成。专辑同名曲《One》的歌词灵感来自她移居日本后的孤独感，她在一次采访中透露，这首歌是在一个雨夜一气呵成写成的。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Angela Aki traveled between the US and Japan, insisting on live piano recording instead of electronic synthesis for perfect sound. The title track 'One' was inspired by her loneliness after moving to Japan; she revealed in an interview that she wrote it in one go on a rainy night.
items.artistIntroZh: Angela Aki（安吉拉·亚纪）是日裔美国歌手兼词曲作者，出生于德岛县，以流行钢琴摇滚风格闻名。她的代表作包括《Home》和《Kiss Me Good-Bye》，凭借深情的嗓音和自传式歌词在日本乐坛获得广泛认可。
items.artistIntroEn: Angela Aki is a Japanese-American singer-songwriter born in Tokushima Prefecture, known for her pop piano rock style. Her representative works include 'Home' and 'Kiss Me Good-Bye,' earning widespread recognition in Japanese music for her soulful voice and autobiographical lyrics.

03-09.birthdayZh: 3月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐为你铺路——Lenny Kravitz在《Are You Gonna Go My Way》里嘶吼出破茧的勇气，像一道永不熄灭的烈焰；而Angela Aki的《One》则用钢琴与自省告诉你，孤身一人也能成为自己的光。愿你在音符间找到温柔的力量，正如这日诞生的你，注定要带着史诗般的尾声，走向属于自己的曙光。
03-09.birthdayEn: March 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Lenny Kravitz’s *Are You Gonna Go My Way*, a bold, soulful anthem of freedom and self-discovery—much like the path you carve with your own spirit. And Angela Aki’s *One* reminds us that even a single note can bloom into a symphony. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of courage, light, and quiet triumphs. Happy birthday to you—a melody all your own.

items.name: Contact from the Underworld of Redboy
items.descriptionZh: 《Contact from the Underworld of Redboy》是Robbie Robertson于1998年发行的专辑，融合了电子音乐与原住民音乐元素，以实验性的电子节拍和神秘的氛围为核心特色。专辑探索了科技与传统的碰撞，展现了Robertson在电子领域的创新尝试。
items.descriptionEn: Contact from the Underworld of Redboy is Robbie Robertson's 1998 album, blending electronic music with Indigenous musical elements, characterized by experimental electronic beats and mystical atmospheres. It explores the collision of technology and tradition, showcasing Robertson's innovative foray into electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感源自Robertson对莫霍克族文化遗产的探索，他邀请了多位原住民音乐人合作，包括Ulali合唱团。录制过程中，Robertson在洛杉矶的录音室使用了大量模拟合成器，试图营造出一种“地下世界”的声景。专辑名称中的“Redboy”是他童年时的绰号。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Robertson's exploration of Mohawk cultural heritage, featuring collaborations with Indigenous musicians including the Ulali group. During recording, he used extensive analog synthesizers in a Los Angeles studio to create an 'underworld' soundscape. The title 'Redboy' refers to his childhood nickname.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是电子音乐与原住民音乐融合的先驱之作，影响了后来跨文化音乐实验的潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a pioneering work in blending electronic music with Indigenous music, influencing later trends in cross-cultural musical experimentation.
items.artistIntroZh: Robbie Robertson是加拿大裔美国音乐人、词曲作者和制作人，原为摇滚��队The Band的吉他手和主唱。他的音乐风格跨越摇滚、民谣和电子，代表作包括《The Weight》和《Somewhere Down the Crazy River》，以其叙事性歌词和原住民文化主题著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Robbie Robertson is a Canadian-American musician, songwriter, and producer, formerly guitarist and vocalist for the rock band The Band. His music spans rock, folk, and electronic, with representative works including 'The Weight' and 'Somewhere Down the Crazy River,' known for narrative lyrics and Indigenous cultural themes.

items.name: First Love
items.descriptionZh: 《First Love》是宇多田光于1999年发行的首张专辑，以流行和R&B风格为核心，融合了灵魂乐和舞曲元素。专辑以流畅的旋律和情感丰富的歌词著称，同名主打歌《First Love》成为日本流行音乐史上的经典，展现了宇多田光独特的嗓音和创作才华。
items.descriptionEn: First Love is Hikaru Utada's debut album released in 1999, centered on pop and R&B styles, blending soul and dance elements. Known for smooth melodies and emotionally rich lyrics, the title track 'First Love' became a classic in Japanese pop history, showcasing Utada's unique voice and songwriting talent.
items.storiesZh: 录制《First Love》时，宇多田光年仅16岁，但她已展现出惊人的成熟度。专辑在纽约和东京两地录制，由知名制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis参与。宇多田光曾回忆，主打歌的歌词灵感来自她初中时的初恋经历，她在录音棚里只用了两小时就完成了演唱。
items.storiesEn: When recording First Love, Hikaru Utada was only 16 but showed remarkable maturity. The album was recorded in New York and Tokyo, with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis involved. Utada recalled that the title track's lyrics were inspired by her middle school first love, and she completed the vocal recording in just two hours.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《First Love》是日本历史上销量最高的专辑之一，销量超过765万张，奠定了宇多田光作为亚洲流行天后的地位，并推动了日本R&B音乐的普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: First Love is one of the best-selling albums in Japanese history, with over 7.65 million copies sold, cementing Utada's status as an Asian pop diva and popularizing R&B music in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: 宇多田光是日裔美国歌手、词曲作者和制作人，出生于纽约，以流行和R&B风格闻名。她的代表作包括《First Love》、《Automatic》和《Flavor of Life》，凭借多语言能力和创新音乐风格成为亚洲最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Hikaru Utada is a Japanese-American singer, songwriter, and producer born in New York, known for pop and R&B styles. Her representative works include 'First Love,' 'Automatic,' and 'Flavor of Life,' making her one of Asia's most influential artists through multilingual ability and innovative music.

03-10.birthdayZh: 3月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过一些勇敢的声音——《Contact from the Underworld of Redboy》带来古老灵魂与电子脉搏的碰撞，宣告跨越边界的生命力；《First Love》则以初雪的纯真和燃烧的勇气，在心上写下第一行诗。愿你的新一岁，既有破土的力量，也有温柔如初的心跳。
03-10.birthdayEn: March 10 is your birthday, a date that carries the spirit of bold new beginnings. Like Robbie Robertson’s “Contact from the Underworld of Redboy,” may your year be a fearless fusion of worlds within you—daring and alive. And like Hikaru Utada’s “First Love,” may it echo with tender, soulful firsts and the purest warmth of the heart. You are a beautiful collision of strength and softness. May this orbit around the sun be your most luminous yet, filled with discovery, music, and the quiet glow of being deeply loved.

03-11.birthdayZh: 3月11日，是你的生日。就像《The Dark Side of the Moon》在阴晴圆缺中找到完整，你也在岁月里学会拥抱自己的阴影与光芒。愿《Born in the U.S.A.》里那份不屈的骄傲，化作你心底的暖流——世界或许匆忙，但你出生的这一天，连星光都曾为旋律停留。
03-11.birthdayEn: March 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, hopeful pulse of The Clash’s London Calling, an album that dared to break all the rules with courage and fire. Like that record, may your year be a fierce, beautiful rebellion against the ordinary. And let the tender, searching melodies of Depeche Mode’s Violator remind you that even in the quiet moments, there is deep, abiding love. You are a living note in this symphony—may it play on, bright and full.

items.name: Warmi
items.descriptionZh: 《Warmi》是Magaly Solier于2009年发行的专辑，融合了安第斯民谣和乡村音乐元素，以克丘亚语演唱为核心特色。专辑以原声吉他和传统乐器如排箫和恰兰戈为基调，歌词聚焦女性经历和自然主题，展现了秘鲁乡村文化的质朴与力量。
items.descriptionEn: Warmi is Magaly Solier's 2009 album, blending Andean folk and country music, characterized by Quechua-language vocals. Featuring acoustic guitar and traditional instruments like panpipes and charango, the lyrics focus on women's experiences and nature, showcasing the simplicity and strength of Peruvian rural culture.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制在秘鲁安第斯山区的一个小村庄进行，Magaly Solier邀请了当地民间音乐人参与，以保持音乐的真实性。专辑名“Warmi”在克丘亚语中意为“女人”，灵感来自Solier对祖母和母亲的致敬。她在一次采访中表示，录制过程中常因怀念家乡而落���。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small village in the Peruvian Andes, with Magaly Solier inviting local folk musicians to maintain authenticity. The title 'Warmi' means 'woman' in Quechua, inspired by Solier's tribute to her grandmother and mother. She said in an interview that she often cried during recording due to homesickness.
items.artistIntroZh: Magaly Solier是秘鲁歌手和演员，出生于安第斯山区，以民谣和乡村风格闻名，常使用克丘亚语演唱。她的代表作包括专辑《Warmi》和电影《The Milk of Sorrow》的原声，致力于通过音乐弘扬原住民文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Magaly Solier is a Peruvian singer and actress born in the Andean highlands, known for folk and country styles, often singing in Quechua. Her representative works include the album Warmi and the soundtrack for the film 'The Milk of Sorrow,' dedicated to promoting Indigenous culture through music.

items.name: Fugazi
items.descriptionZh: 《Fugazi》是Marillion于1984年发行的第三张专辑，以前卫流行摇滚风格为核心，融合了合成器音效和戏剧化的歌词。专辑以复杂的编曲和情感深度著称，歌曲如《Assassing》展现了乐队在流行与艺术摇滚之间的平衡，是80年代英国流行摇滚的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: Fugazi is Marillion's third album released in 1984, centered on progressive pop rock, blending synthesizer sounds and dramatic lyrics. Known for complex arrangements and emotional depth, songs like 'Assassing' showcase the band's balance between pop and art rock, making it a representative work of 1980s British pop rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战，主唱Fish因与唱片公司发生争执而一度暂停工作。专辑名“Fugazi”是军事俚语，意为“搞砸了的事情”，暗示了乐队当时的混乱状态。录制期间，吉他手Steve Rothery曾因设备故障而被迫用一把破旧的吉他完成独奏，却意外成为专辑的亮点。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was challenging, with lead singer Fish halting work due to disputes with the record label. The title 'Fugazi' is military slang for 'fucked up situation,' hinting at the band's chaotic state. During recording, guitarist Steve Rothery had to use a broken guitar for a solo due to equipment failure, which unexpectedly became an album highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Marillion是英国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1979年，以流行摇滚和前卫音乐风格闻名。他们的代表作包括专辑《Misplaced Childhood》和歌曲《Kayleigh》，以其叙事性歌词和复杂的音乐结构在80年代英国乐坛占据重要地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Marillion is a British progressive rock band formed in 1979, known for pop rock and progressive music. Their representative works include the album 'Misplaced Childhood' and the song 'Kayleigh,' occupying an important place in 1980s British music for narrative lyrics and complex musical structures.

03-12.birthdayZh: 3月12日，是你的生日。这一天，秘鲁高原的《Warmi》随风唱起，土地和女性的力量在你生命里扎根，质朴而深情。前卫的《Fugazi》在复杂旋律中寻找出路，像你一样，在诗意与晦涩里倔强生长。你本身就是一张专辑——温暖、有力，且独一无二。
03-12.birthdayEn: March 12 is your birthday. Like the soulful Quechua harmonies of Magaly Solier’s “Warmi,” may your year be rooted in tradition yet boldly original, sung in your own unique voice. And like Marillion’s “Fugazi,” let this chapter be a beautiful, daring turning point—a graceful farewell to the old and a brave hello to your truest self. You’re crafted of resilience and poetry. Here’s to a year as rich and radiant as the music that honors this day.

items.name: Amor prohibido
items.descriptionZh: 《Amor Prohibido》是Selena于1994年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了Tejano、流行和拉丁节奏，展现了Selena极具感染力的嗓音和跨界魅力。专辑以同名主打歌《Amor Prohibido》为核心，讲述禁忌之恋的动人故事，旋律朗朗上口，节奏明快，成为拉丁流行音乐的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Amor Prohibido is Selena's fourth studio album, released in 1994, blending Tejano, pop, and Latin rhythms. It showcases Selena's captivating vocals and crossover appeal, with the title track telling a poignant story of forbidden love through catchy melodies and upbeat tempos, making it a classic in Latin pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Selena的哥哥A.B. Quintanilla担任主要制作人，并亲自创作了多首歌曲。Selena在录制《Bidi Bidi Bom Bom》时即兴发挥，灵感来自一次排练中的玩笑，最终成为专辑中最受欢迎的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Selena's brother A.B. Quintanilla served as the main producer and wrote several songs. Selena improvised 'Bidi Bidi Bom Bom' during a rehearsal as a joke, which later became one of the album's most beloved tracks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了Tejano音乐进入主流市场，并巩固了Selena作为拉丁流行天后的地位，对后续拉丁跨界艺人产生深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album propelled Tejano music into the mainstream and solidified Selena's status as a Latin pop icon, profoundly influencing subsequent Latin crossover artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Selena（1971-1995），美国籍墨西哥裔歌手，被誉为Tejano音乐女王。她的风格融合了流行、拉丁和节奏蓝调，代表作包括《Amor Prohibido》《Dreaming of You》。她在1995年不幸遇害，但音乐遗产至今影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Selena (1971-1995) was an American singer of Mexican descent, known as the Queen of Tejano music. Her style blended pop, Latin, and R&B, with hits including 'Amor Prohibido' and 'Dreaming of You.' She was tragically killed in 1995, but her musical legacy endures.

03-13.birthdayZh: 3月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Amor prohibido》——爱是无所畏惧的勇气，是跨越界限的温柔。愿你的生命如这张专辑的精神，在每一次心跳里拥抱不被约束的美好。所有困住你的墙，都会被歌声融化；所有不敢说的梦，都会在岁月里找到回音。生日快乐，愿星光常伴你左右。
03-13.birthdayEn: March 13 is your birthday. On this day, Selena’s “Amor Prohibido” first sang of a love that breaks all chains—bold, tender, and unstoppable. May your year carry that same fire: a spirit that dares to dream beyond limits, wrapped in warmth and grace. Like that album’s heartbeat, may your path echo with joy, connection, and the courage to hold what matters close. You were born on a day of timeless melodies and quiet rebellion. Shine on.

items.name: Me Against the World
items.descriptionZh: 《Me Against the World》是Tupac Shakur于1995年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了西海岸嘻哈、G-funk和硬核说唱，歌词深刻探讨了种族、贫困、暴力和个人挣扎。专辑以内省和叙事性著称，展现了Tupac作为诗人的一面，是嘻哈史上最具影响力的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Me Against the World is Tupac Shakur's third studio album, released in 1995, blending West Coast hip-hop, G-funk, and hardcore rap. The lyrics deeply explore race, poverty, violence, and personal struggle, known for its introspection and storytelling, making it one of the most influential albums in hip-hop history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时，Tupac因性侵指控入狱，但他通过电话与制作人合作完成了大部分录制。专辑名称《Me Against the World》反映了他当时的孤立心境，而歌曲《Dear Mama》则是献给母亲Afeni Shakur的感人致敬，录制时Tupac情绪激动。
items.storiesEn: At the time of the album's release, Tupac was incarcerated on sexual assault charges, but he completed most of the recording via phone with producers. The title 'Me Against the World' reflected his isolation, and the track 'Dear Mama' was a heartfelt tribute to his mother Afeni Shakur, recorded with emotional intensity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是Tupac的巅峰之作，在嘻哈文化中树立了内省与政治意识的标杆，影响了无数后来的说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as Tupac's masterpiece, the album set a benchmark for introspection and political consciousness in hip-hop, influencing countless later rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur（1971-1996），美国籍说唱歌手、诗人和社会活动家，东海岸嘻哈代表人物。他的风格融合硬核说唱和情感叙事，代表作包括《California Love》《Dear Mama》。1996年遭枪击身亡，成为嘻哈文化的不朽符号。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur (1971-1996) was an American rapper, poet, and social activist, a leading figure in East Coast hip-hop. His style blended hardcore rap with emotional storytelling, with hits like 'California Love' and 'Dear Mama.' He was fatally shot in 1996, becoming an enduring icon of hip-hop culture.

items.name: Dante XXI
items.descriptionZh: 《Dante XXI》是Sepultura于2006年发行的第十张录音室专辑，融合了死亡金属、鞭挞金属和巴西传统音乐，灵感来源于但丁的《神曲·地狱篇》。专辑以沉重狂暴的吉他、复杂的鼓点和史诗般的氛围著称，展现了Sepultura在金属领域的创新与实验精神。
items.descriptionEn: Dante XXI is Sepultura's tenth studio album, released in 2006, blending death metal, thrash metal, and Brazilian traditional music, inspired by Dante's 'Inferno' from The Divine Comedy. Known for its heavy, aggressive guitar work, complex drumming, and epic atmosphere, it showcases Sepultura's innovation and experimentation in metal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的创作过程始于2004年，乐队与巴西导演合作，计划为但丁的《神曲》制作多媒体项目。录制在巴西圣保罗进行，部分曲目使用了打击乐器和土著吟唱，以体现巴西文化根源。专辑封面由艺术家Marcelo D3sign设计，融合了地狱意象。
items.storiesEn: The album's creation began in 2004 when the band collaborated with a Brazilian director to produce a multimedia project based on Dante's 'The Divine Comedy.' Recorded in São Paulo, Brazil, some tracks featured percussion instruments and indigenous chants to reflect Brazilian cultural roots. The cover art, designed by artist Marcelo D3sign, incorporated infernal imagery.
items.artistIntroZh: Sepultura，1984年成立于巴西贝洛奥里藏特的重金属乐队，以死亡金属和鞭挞金属闻名。风格融合巴西本土元素与极端金属，代表作包括《Roots》《Arise》。乐队成员几经变动，但始终是金属界最具影响力的巴西乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Sepultura is a heavy metal band formed in Belo Horizonte, Brazil, in 1984, known for death metal and thrash metal. Their style blends Brazilian indigenous elements with extreme metal, with iconic albums like 'Roots' and 'Arise.' Despite lineup changes, they remain one of the most influential Brazilian metal bands.

03-14.birthdayZh: 3月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱出《Me Against the World》的孤勇，在街头与深渊里挺起胸膛。也有《Dante XXI》的烈火与狂响，穿越地狱仍向阳而生。你如这日子，扛得住暗夜，也等得来春光。愿新一岁的你，越走越亮，每一步都踩着自己的节奏，像一首永不完结的诗，自由而滚烫。
03-14.birthdayEn: March 14 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of albums as bold and soulful as you. Like Tupac's "Me Against the World," may your spirit rise resilient against any storm, and like Sepultura's "Dante XXI," may your journey be a powerful, transformative odyssey. On this day of your birth, the world celebrates the unique rhythm only you bring—a melody of strength and grace. Here’s to another year of writing your own legendary song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal
items.descriptionZh: 《Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal》是Younha于2007年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了流行、摇滚和R&B元素，以清新细腻的嗓音和情感丰富的旋律著称。专辑主题围绕爱情与告白，展现了Younha作为创作型歌手的成熟与多样性，是韩国流行音乐中抒情摇滚的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal is Younha's second studio album, released in 2007, blending pop, rock, and R&B elements. Known for her fresh, delicate vocals and emotionally rich melodies, the album explores themes of love and confession, showcasing Younha's maturity and versatility as a singer-songwriter, a standout in Korean pop-rock.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal》由Younha亲自参与创作，灵感来自她个人的爱情经历。录制期间，她因过度投入而数次落泪，制作人不得不暂停录音。专辑发行后，Younha凭借此曲在韩国音乐节目中获得了多个一位。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal' was co-written by Younha, inspired by her personal love experiences. During recording, she became so emotionally invested that she broke down in tears multiple times, forcing the producer to pause. After release, the song earned her several first-place wins on Korean music shows.
items.artistIntroZh: Younha，1988年出生于韩国首尔，韩国籍女歌手兼词曲创作人，以抒情摇滚和流行风格著称。代表作包括《Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal》《Comet》。她因在日本的成功出道和独特的嗓音被称为“韩国摇滚精灵”。
items.artistIntroEn: Younha, born in 1988 in Seoul, South Korea, is a South Korean singer-songwriter known for her pop-rock and ballad style. Her hits include 'Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal' and 'Comet.' She is nicknamed the 'Korean Rock Fairy' for her successful debut in Japan and distinctive voice.

items.name: And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004
items.descriptionZh: 《And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004》是芬兰乐队HIM于2004年发行的精选集，融合了另类摇滚、哥特摇滚和爱情金属（Love Metal）风格，以忧郁的旋律、深情的歌词和主唱Ville Valo的低沉嗓音著称。专辑收录了乐队早期经典曲目，展现了HIM独特的浪漫黑暗美学。
items.descriptionEn: And Love Said No – The Greatest Hits 1997–2004 is a compilation album by Finnish band HIM, released in 2004, blending alternative rock, gothic rock, and love metal. Known for melancholic melodies, heartfelt lyrics, and lead singer Ville Valo's deep vocals, the album features early classics, showcasing HIM's unique romantic dark aesthetic.
items.storiesZh: 精选集发行时，HIM已在欧洲取得巨大成功���但尚未在美国突破。专辑名称《And Love Said No》源自乐队未收录的一首歌曲。Ville Valo在采访中透露，这张精选集的曲目选择过程充满争议，成员们对哪些歌曲应入选意见不一，最终由粉丝投票决定。
items.storiesEn: At the time of the compilation's release, HIM had achieved massive success in Europe but had yet to break through in the US. The title 'And Love Said No' came from a previously unreleased song. Ville Valo revealed in interviews that the tracklist selection was contentious, with members disagreeing on inclusions; ultimately, fan votes decided the final list.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集帮助HIM巩固了在欧洲的巨星地位，并为他们在2000年代中期进军美国市场奠定了基础，推动了爱情金属风格的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: The compilation helped solidify HIM's superstar status in Europe and laid the groundwork for their US breakthrough in the mid-2000s, promoting the love metal genre.
items.artistIntroZh: HIM，1991年成立于芬兰赫尔辛基的摇滚乐队，以哥特摇滚和另类摇滚闻名，自创风格“爱情金属”（Love Metal）。主唱Ville Valo的独特嗓音和浪漫黑暗主题是其标志，代表作包括《Join Me in Death》《Razorblade Kiss》。
items.artistIntroEn: HIM is a rock band formed in Helsinki, Finland, in 1991, known for gothic rock and alternative rock, coining the genre 'love metal.' Lead singer Ville Valo's distinctive voice and romantic dark themes are iconic, with hits including 'Join Me in Death' and 'Razorblade Kiss.'

03-15.birthdayZh: 3月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐悄悄祝福过你——Younha的《适合告白的日子》里藏着勇气，提醒你爱意不必深埋心底；而HIM那句“爱说不”，却在告别中教会你，转身也是另一种力量。愿你如这天的旋律，既有温柔的勇气，也有坚定的自由。
03-15.birthdayEn: March 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Younha’s "Gobaek Ha Gi Joheun Nal," a soulful confession wrapped in gentle melodies, and HIM’s "And Love Said No," a bold embrace of passion and resilience. Your spirit carries that same warmth and courage—a day made for new beginnings and heartfelt truths. May your year unfold like a cherished song, each note lifting you higher, each verse reminding you how beautifully you belong. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Bertemu
items.descriptionZh: 《Bertemu》是林原惠美于2005年发行的流行专辑，融合了J-Pop与轻快的电子元素，展现了她作为声优歌手的独特嗓音魅力。专辑以多元化的旋律和情感丰富的歌词为核心特色，既有活力四射的节奏，也有细腻抒情的慢板，充分体现了她在流行音乐领域的跨界实力。
items.descriptionEn: Bertemu is a pop album released by Megumi Hayashibara in 2005, blending J-Pop with light electronic elements, showcasing her unique vocal charm as a voice actress and singer. The album features diverse melodies and emotionally rich lyrics, ranging from upbeat rhythms to delicate ballads, highlighting her crossover prowess in pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，林原惠美曾表示《Bertemu》是她与粉丝“相遇”的象征，因此专辑名取自印尼语“相遇”。她亲自参与了选曲和歌词的调整，力求每首歌都能传递真实情感。专辑发行时正值她声优事业巅峰，录音日程极为紧凑，但她仍坚持在深夜完成 vocals 录制，以确保最佳效果。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Megumi Hayashibara stated that Bertemu symbolizes her 'encounter' with fans, hence the title derived from the Indonesian word for 'meeting.' She personally participated in song selection and lyric adjustments to ensure each track conveyed genuine emotion. Released at the peak of her voice acting career, her schedule was extremely tight, yet she insisted on recording vocals late at night to achieve the best results.
items.artistIntroZh: 林原惠美是日本知名声优兼歌手，出生于东京，以《新世纪福音战士》的绫波丽等角色闻名。她以清澈多变的嗓音活跃于J-Pop与动画歌曲领域，代表作包括《Give a reason》和《Bertemu》等，是跨界音乐与声优行业的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Megumi Hayashibara is a renowned Japanese voice actress and singer from Tokyo, famous for roles like Rei Ayanami in Neon Genesis Evangelion. Known for her clear and versatile voice, she excels in J-Pop and anime songs, with representative works including Give a reason and Bertemu, making her an iconic figure in cross-industry music and voice acting.

03-16.birthdayZh: 3月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以音乐为你种下祝福。那年发行的《Bertemu》，像一次温柔的相遇——旋律裹着异域的风，轻轻撞进心底，提醒你每一次相逢都有意义。你也是这宇宙精心安排的一首专辑，翻到每一页，都藏着光。愿你在属于自己的季节里，脚步坚定，内心柔软。
03-16.birthdayEn: March 16 is your birthday, a day that brought you into this world, and a day when music itself has bloomed. On this date, Megumi Hayashibara released "Bertemu," a concept album whose title means "to meet"—a reminder that your life is a beautiful meeting of moments and light. May your year ahead unfold like that spirit of connection and discovery, each day a new verse of joy. Happy birthday, may your soul always be in harmony.

items.name: Ingénue
items.descriptionZh: 《Ingénue》是k.d. lang于1992年发行的爵士风格专辑，融合了流行、乡村和成人当代元素，以其细腻的情感表达和lang那充满灵魂感的低音演唱为核心特色。专辑中钢琴与弦乐的优雅��排营造出亲密氛围，被誉为90年代爵士跨界经典。
items.descriptionEn: Ingénue is a jazz-infused album released by k.d. lang in 1992, blending pop, country, and adult contemporary elements, characterized by its delicate emotional expression and lang's soulful low-pitched vocals. The elegant piano and string arrangements create an intimate atmosphere, making it a classic 90s jazz crossover album.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，k.d. lang与制作人Greg Penny在洛杉矶的录音室中反复打磨编曲，尤其是热门单曲《Constant Craving》的弦乐部分经过多次重录才达到她满意的效果。lang曾透露，专辑名“Ingénue”源自法语“天真的少女”，反映了她当时对爱情与自我探索的坦诚态度，而封面造型也刻意营造了复古而纯净的视觉风格。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, k.d. lang and producer Greg Penny meticulously refined arrangements in a Los Angeles studio, particularly the string section for the hit single Constant Craving, which was re-recorded multiple times to meet her standards. lang revealed that the album title Ingénue, derived from French for 'naive girl,' reflected her candid exploration of love and self-identity at the time, and the cover art deliberately evoked a retro and pure visual style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑让k.d. lang获得格莱美最佳流行女歌手奖，并推动了爵士与流行跨界音乐在90年代的主流认可，成为LGBTQ+文化中表达自我认同的重要音乐作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won k.d. lang the Grammy Award for Best Female Pop Vocal Performance and helped popularize jazz-pop crossover in the 1990s, becoming a significant musical work for LGBTQ+ self-identity expression.
items.artistIntroZh: k.d. lang是加拿大歌手兼词曲作者，出生于阿尔伯塔省，以融合爵士、流行和乡村的独特风格闻名。她以深沉而富有感染力的嗓音著称，代表作包括《Ingénue》和《Constant Craving》，是90年代最具影响力的女歌手之一，也是公开的LGBTQ+倡导者。
items.artistIntroEn: k.d. lang is a Canadian singer and songwriter from Alberta, known for blending jazz, pop, and country. Renowned for her deep, emotive voice, her representative works include Ingénue and Constant Craving, making her one of the most influential female singers of the 1990s and an open LGBTQ+ advocate.

items.name: Music of the Spheres
items.descriptionZh: 《Music of the Spheres》是Mike Oldfield于2008年发行的古典风格专辑，以管弦乐和电子合成器为核心，融合了新世纪与氛围音乐元素。专辑通过宏大的交响编排和太空主题旋律，营造出宇宙般的空灵与壮阔感，展现了Oldfield在古典跨界领域的深厚功力。
items.descriptionEn: Music of the Spheres is a classical album released by Mike Oldfield in 2008, centered on orchestral and synthesizer elements, blending new-age and ambient music. Through grand symphonic arrangements and space-themed melodies, the album creates an ethereal and majestic cosmic atmosphere, showcasing Oldfield's mastery in classical crossover.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Mike Oldfield首次完全采用管弦乐创作的作品，他与皇家爱乐乐团合作录制。Oldfield曾透露，专辑灵感源于古希腊“天体音乐”概念，录制过程中他坚持使用传统乐谱而非电子设备，以确保古典的纯粹性。由于预算限制，部分弦乐段落在伦敦的较小录音室完成，但最终混音却意外增强了音乐的亲密感。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Mike Oldfield's first fully orchestral work, recorded with the Royal Philharmonic Orchestra. Oldfield revealed that the inspiration came from the ancient Greek concept of 'music of the spheres,' and he insisted on using traditional sheet music rather than electronic devices to maintain classical purity. Due to budget constraints, some string sections were recorded in smaller London studios, but the final mix unexpectedly enhanced the music's intimacy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑延续了Mike Oldfield在古典与电子融合方面的探索，进一步巩固了他作为跨界音乐先驱的地位，但未在主流榜单上产生突破性影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album continued Mike Oldfield's exploration of blending classical and electronic music, further solidifying his status as a crossover pioneer, though it did not achieve breakthrough mainstream chart success.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield是英国多乐器演奏家、作曲家和制作人，出生于雷丁，以专辑《Tubular Bells》闻名。他擅长融合古典、摇滚和世界音乐，代表作包括《Moonlight Shadow》和《Music of the Spheres》，是音乐界公认的跨界创新者。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield is a British multi-instrumentalist, composer, and producer from Reading, famous for the album Tubular Bells. He excels in blending classical, rock, and world music, with representative works including Moonlight Shadow and Music of the Spheres, recognized as a cross-genre innovator in the music industry.

items.name: BoA
items.descriptionZh: 《BoA》是BoA于2009年在美国发行的同名流行专辑，融合了R&B、舞曲和电子流行元素，展现了她作为韩流天后的国际化转型。专辑以强劲的节拍、流畅的旋律和BoA出色的双语演唱为核心特色，旨在打入欧美主流市场。
items.descriptionEn: BoA is the self-titled pop album released by BoA in the United States in 2009, blending R&B, dance, and electronic pop, showcasing her international transformation as a K-pop queen. The album features strong beats, smooth melodies, and BoA's excellent bilingual vocals, aiming to break into the mainstream Western market.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制历时两年，BoA在洛杉矶和首尔之间奔波，与美国制作人Bloodshy & Avant合作。她曾透露，为了适应英文发音，她每天花数小时练习歌词，甚至录制了超过30首候选曲目才最终选定12首。专辑发行前，她在美国进行了密集的宣传巡演，包括在著名的《大卫深夜秀》上表演，但市场反响未达预期。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording took two years, with BoA shuttling between Los Angeles and Seoul, collaborating with American producers Bloodshy & Avant. She revealed that to adapt to English pronunciation, she practiced lyrics for hours daily and recorded over 30 candidate tracks before selecting the final 12. Prior to release, she conducted an intensive promotional tour in the US, including a performance on The Late Show with David Letterman, but the market response fell short of expectations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是韩国歌手首次以英文专辑正式进军美国主流市场的标志性尝试，为后续K-pop艺人的国际化铺平了道路，尽管商业上未大获成功。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the first official attempt by a Korean singer to enter the US mainstream market with an English-language album, paving the way for subsequent K-pop artists' internationalization, despite limited commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国流行歌手，出生于首尔，被誉为“韩流天后”。她以精湛的舞蹈和歌唱实力闻名，代表作包括《No.1》和《Only One》，是K-pop国际化的重要先驱，在亚洲和欧美均有影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean pop singer from Seoul, known as the 'Queen of K-pop.' Renowned for her exceptional dance and vocal skills, her representative works include No.1 and Only One, making her a key pioneer in K-pop's internationalization, with influence across Asia and the West.

03-17.birthdayZh: 3月17日，是你的生日。就像《Ingénue》里那份细腻的温柔，你让靠近你的人感受到世界本就是柔软的。而《Music of the Spheres》说宇宙自有其和谐与壮阔——你的存在，也像一颗小小的星球，旋转出属于自己的旋律。愿你被万物善待，也永远保有此刻的晴朗。
03-17.birthdayEn: March 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like k.d. lang's *Ingénue*, a tender masterpiece of vulnerability and grace, and Mike Oldfield's *Music of the Spheres*, a cosmic symphony of wonder. Just as these works capture the soul and the infinite, your life weaves poetry and light into every season. May your new year be a melody of joy, a dance between heart and sky, with each note played in full, radiant color. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: Victory
items.descriptionZh: 《Victory》是Modern Talking于2002年发行的R&B/Soul风格专辑，融合了迪斯科、流行和灵魂乐元素，以流畅的节奏和深情的旋律为核心特色。专辑展现了乐队标志性的和声与电子编曲，同时加入了更多当代R&B的律动感，是他们在21世纪初的转型之作。
items.descriptionEn: Victory is an R&B/Soul album released by Modern Talking in 2002, blending disco, pop, and soul elements, characterized by smooth rhythms and heartfelt melodies. The album showcases the band's signature harmonies and electronic arrangements, while incorporating more contemporary R&B grooves, marking their transformation in the early 2000s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking重组后的第二张作品，录制过程中成员Thomas Anders和Dieter Bohlen因音乐方向产生分歧——Bohlen希望延续迪斯科风格，而Anders则倾向更现代的R&B。最终两人妥协，在专辑中平衡了两种元素。有趣的是，主打歌《Win the Race》原本是为2002年世界杯创作的，但最终被用作专辑开场曲。
items.storiesEn: This album was the second release after Modern Talking's reunion. During recording, members Thomas Anders and Dieter Bohlen clashed over musical direction—Bohlen wanted to continue the disco style, while Anders preferred more modern R&B. They eventually compromised, balancing both elements in the album. Interestingly, the lead single Win the Race was originally written for the 2002 FIFA World Cup but was ultimately used as the album's opener.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking是德国流行二人组，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders于1984年成立，以迪斯科流行风格闻名。他们凭借《Brother Louie》和《Cheri Cheri Lady》等金曲成为80年代欧洲最成功的乐队之一，代表作还包括《Victory》，全球销量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1984 by Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders, known for their disco-pop style. With hits like Brother Louie and Cheri Cheri Lady, they became one of Europe's most successful bands of the 1980s, with representative works including Victory, selling over 120 million records worldwide.

items.name: J to tha L–O! The Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 《J to tha L–O! The Remixes》是珍妮弗·洛佩兹于2002年发行的混音专辑，风格属于流行舞曲与R&B的融合。核心特色在于邀请多位知名制作人如P. Diddy和Rodney Jerkins，对她早期热门单曲进行重新编曲，赋予原曲更强劲的节拍和俱乐部氛围，展现了洛佩兹在舞曲领域的跨界魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "J to tha L–O! The Remixes" is a remix album by Jennifer Lopez released in 2002, blending pop dance and R&B. Its core feature lies in inviting renowned producers like P. Diddy and Rodney Jerkins to remix her early hits, giving them stronger beats and club vibes, showcasing Lopez's crossover appeal in dance music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作契机源于洛佩兹对混音文化的热爱，她曾表示希望让粉丝在舞池中听到不同版本的歌曲。录制期间，她与制作人紧密合作，其中《I'm Real》的混音版因融合了嘻哈元素而引发争议，但也帮助她巩固了流行天后的地位。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Lopez's love for remix culture; she wanted fans to hear different versions of her songs on the dance floor. During recording, she worked closely with producers, and the remix of "I'm Real" sparked controversy for blending hip-hop elements, yet it helped solidify her status as a pop diva.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是2000年代初流行歌手发行完整混音专辑的早期案例之一，影响了后续艺人如布兰妮·斯皮尔斯和蕾哈娜的混音项目。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was one of the early examples of a pop star releasing a full remix album in the early 2000s, influencing later remix projects by artists like Britney Spears and Rihanna.
items.artistIntroZh: 珍妮弗·洛佩兹（Jennifer Lopez），美国歌手、演员和舞者，出生于1969年。主要风格为流行、R&B和拉丁音乐。代表作包括《If You Had My Love》《Jenny from the Block》和专辑《On the 6》。
items.artistIntroEn: Jennifer Lopez is an American singer, actress, and dancer born in 1969. Her main styles are pop, R&B, and Latin music. Notable works include "If You Had My Love," "Jenny from the Block," and the album "On the 6."

items.name: Bump 'n' Grind
items.descriptionZh: 《Bump 'n' Grind》是芬兰摇滚乐队The 69 Eyes于1992年发行的首张专辑，风格属于硬摇滚与朋克摇滚的结合。核心特色在于粗粝的吉他声、快速鼓点和主唱Jyrki 69低沉而富有侵略性的嗓音，呈现出一种原始、狂野的街头摇滚气质。
items.descriptionEn: "Bump 'n' Grind" is the debut album by Finnish rock band The 69 Eyes, released in 1992, blending hard rock and punk rock. Its core features are gritty guitar riffs, fast drumming, and lead singer Jyrki 69's deep, aggressive vocals, delivering a raw, wild street rock vibe.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于赫尔辛基的一家小型录音室，乐队当时预算有限，几乎全部使用二手设备完成录音。主唱Jyrki 69回忆说，专辑封面上的复古纹身图案灵感来源于他祖父的老照片，但制作人认为太粗糙，差点被否决。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small studio in Helsinki with a limited budget, using mostly second-hand equipment. Lead singer Jyrki 69 recalled that the retro tattoo design on the cover was inspired by his grandfather's old photos, but the producer almost rejected it for being too rough.
items.artistIntroZh: The 69 Eyes是芬兰的摇滚乐队，成立于1989年，成员包括主唱Jyrki 69等。主要风格从早期硬摇滚、朋克逐渐转向哥特摇滚。代表作包括专辑《Bump 'n' Grind》���《Wasting the Dawn》。
items.artistIntroEn: The 69 Eyes is a Finnish rock band formed in 1989, featuring lead singer Jyrki 69. Their style evolved from early hard rock and punk to gothic rock. Notable works include the albums "Bump 'n' Grind" and "Wasting the Dawn."

03-18.birthdayZh: 3月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Victory》的旋律——像在告诉你：每一次出发都值得庆祝。你身上有《Bump 'n' Grind》的原始能量，在岁月里摔打出属于自己的光芒。愿新的一岁，像合成器音色一样明快，像摇滚鼓点一样坚定。勇敢生长，你配得上所有美好。
03-18.birthdayEn: March 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "Victory" by Modern Talking—a reminder that every new year is a triumph waiting to unfold. And like the raw, unapologetic spirit of "Bump 'n' Grind" by The 69 Eyes, may you embrace your own bold rhythm, untamed and true. You are a melody of resilience and joy, a song that grows richer with each passing year. So step into this next chapter with the swagger of a rockstar and the heart of a champion. Happy birthday—may your life always be a chart-topping hit.

items.name: Grow into One
items.descriptionZh: 《Grow into One》是日本流行歌手幸田来未于2003年发行的首张原创专辑，风格以流行和R&B为主。核心特色在于融合了青春活力的电子节拍与抒情旋律，展现了幸田来未早期甜美而富有张力的嗓音，专辑曲风多元，包含舞曲和慢板情歌。
items.descriptionEn: "Grow into One" is the debut original album by Japanese pop singer Kumi Koda, released in 2003, primarily pop and R&B. Its core features blend youthful electronic beats with lyrical melodies, showcasing Koda's early sweet yet dynamic vocals, with diverse tracks including dance songs and ballads.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制期间，幸田来未刚满20岁，她曾表示希望通过音乐记录自己的成长。主打歌《Real Emotion》作为游戏《最终幻想X-2》的主题曲，在日本大获成功，但录制时她因紧张多次重录，制作人不得不鼓励她放松。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Kumi Koda had just turned 20, and she expressed a desire to document her growth through music. The lead single "Real Emotion" became a huge hit as the theme song for the game "Final Fantasy X-2," but she was so nervous during recording that she had to redo it multiple times, with producers encouraging her to relax.
items.artistIntroZh: 幸田来未（Kumi Koda），日本流行歌手，出生于1982年。主要风格为流行、R&B和舞曲。代表作包括单曲《Real Emotion》和专辑《Grow into One》《Secret》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kumi Koda is a Japanese pop singer born in 1982. Her main styles are pop, R&B, and dance music. Notable works include the single "Real Emotion" and albums "Grow into One" and "Secret."

items.name: Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 《Bob Dylan》是美国民谣歌手鲍勃·迪伦的1962年同名首张专辑，风格属于民谣与乡村的融合。核心特色在于迪伦质朴的吉他伴奏和口琴演奏，翻唱了多首传统民谣和布鲁斯歌曲，展现了他早期对民间音乐的深厚功底和独特的叙事嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "Bob Dylan" is the self-titled debut album by American folk singer Bob Dylan, released in 1962, blending folk and country. Its core features are Dylan's simple guitar accompaniment and harmonica playing, covering traditional folk and blues songs, showcasing his early mastery of folk music and unique narrative voice.
items.storiesZh: 这张���辑录制仅花费两个下午，总费用不到400美元。迪伦当时年仅20岁，刚从明尼苏达来到纽约。录音时他紧张到手抖，制作人约翰·哈蒙德却坚持保留这些瑕疵，认为它们增添了真实感。专辑最初仅售出5000张，但逐渐成为经典。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just two afternoons, costing less than $400. Dylan was only 20 years old, having just arrived in New York from Minnesota. He was so nervous his hands shook during recording, but producer John Hammond insisted on keeping the imperfections, believing they added authenticity. The album initially sold only 5,000 copies but later became a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了迪伦的民谣根基，尽管商业上未立即成功，但为后续《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》等经典作品铺平了道路，被视为美国民谣复兴的重要起点之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album laid the foundation for Dylan's folk career. Though not an immediate commercial success, it paved the way for later classics like "The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan" and is considered a key starting point of the American folk revival.
items.artistIntroZh: 鲍勃·迪伦（Bob Dylan），美国歌手、词曲作家，出生于1941年。主要风格为民谣、摇滚和乡村音乐，2016年获诺贝尔文学奖。代表作包括专辑《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》和歌曲《Blowin' in the Wind》。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer and songwriter born in 1941. His main styles are folk, rock, and country music, and he won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016. Notable works include the album "The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan" and the song "Blowin' in the Wind."

items.name: No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls
items.descriptionZh: 《No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls》是加拿大摇滚乐队Simple Plan于2002年发行的首张专辑，风格属于流行朋克和另类摇滚。核心特色在于快节奏的吉他扫弦、朗朗上口的副歌旋律以及充满青春叛逆情绪的歌词，主题围绕青少年生活、爱情和挫折。
items.descriptionEn: "No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls" is the debut album by Canadian rock band Simple Plan, released in 2002, blending pop punk and alternative rock. Its core features are fast-paced guitar strumming, catchy chorus melodies, and lyrics full of youthful rebellion, focusing on teenage life, love, and frustration.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称源自乐队成员的一次玩笑，他们觉得玩摇滚不需要保护装备，只需要勇气。录制期间，主唱Pierre Bouvier因过度排练导致声带受伤，医生建议他休息三个月，但他坚持完成录音。专辑中的《I'm Just a Kid》灵感来自他高中时的孤独感。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from a joke among band members, who thought playing rock didn't require protective gear, just guts. During recording, lead singer Pierre Bouvier strained his vocal cords from over-rehearsing; doctors advised three months of rest, but he insisted on finishing. The song "I'm Just a Kid" was inspired by his loneliness in high school.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑推动了2000年代流行朋克的全球热潮，与Blink-182等乐队一同定义了该年代青春摇滚的声音，并帮助Simple Plan成为国际知名乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped drive the global pop punk wave of the 2000s, defining the sound of youth rock alongside bands like Blink-182, and making Simple Plan an internationally renowned band.
items.artistIntroZh: Simple Plan是加拿大摇滚乐队，成立于1999年，成员包括主唱Pierre Bouvier等。主要风格为流行朋克和另类摇滚。代表作包括专辑《No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls》和单曲《Welcome to My Life》。
items.artistIntroEn: Simple Plan is a Canadian rock band formed in 1999, featuring lead singer Pierre Bouvier. Their main styles are pop punk and alternative rock. Notable works include the album "No Pads, No Helmets...Just Balls" and the single "Welcome to My Life."

03-19.birthdayZh: 3月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Grow into One》——像倖田來未那样，把青春与勇气长成属于自己的力量。也别忘了《Bob Dylan》里的质朴与真诚，像一把木吉他，在风中轻轻告诉你：每个开始都值得被记住。你也是慢慢长成的歌，旋律也许曲折，却独一无二地动听。
03-19.birthdayEn: March 19 is your birthday—a day when music history bloomed with fresh beginnings. Like Bob Dylan’s self-titled debut, may your year echo with raw, honest truth and the quiet power of finding your own voice. And like Simple Plan’s No Pads, No Helmets…Just Balls, may you leap boldly, unguarded, into joy and mischief. On this day of new chapters, may your heart feel as wide and hopeful as a first note, and your path be lit by the same fearless light that turns a debut into a classic.

items.descriptionZh: 《3121》是Prince在2006年发行的R&B/Soul专辑，融合了放克、流行和灵魂乐元素。专辑以同名主打歌《3121》为核心，展现了Prince标志性的假声演唱和精湛的乐器演奏，节奏明快，旋律抓耳，整体风格华丽而充满活力。
items.descriptionEn: "3121" is an R&B/Soul album released by Prince in 2006, blending funk, pop, and soul elements. Centered on the title track "3121," it showcases Prince's signature falsetto vocals and masterful instrumentation, with upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies, delivering a glamorous and energetic vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《3121》源自Prince在洛杉矶的私人住所地址，他曾在那里举办过多次著名的私人派对。这张专辑原本计划通过他的独立厂牌NPG发行，但后来与环球唱片达成合作，成为他重返主流市场的关键作品之一。
items.storiesEn: The album title "3121" references Prince's private residence address in Los Angeles, where he hosted numerous famous private parties. Initially planned for release on his independent label NPG, it later became a key work in his return to the mainstream market through a partnership with Universal Records.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在商业上取得一定成功，首周登顶Billboard 200专辑榜，是Prince在2000年代少数进入榜单前十的作品之一，巩固了他在R&B/Soul领域的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved commercial success, debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 chart, making it one of Prince's few top-ten entries in the 2000s, solidifying his standing in R&B/Soul.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince（美国，1958-2016）是标志性的歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，以融合放克、R&B、摇滚和流行乐著称。代表作包括《Purple Rain》《1999》和《Kiss》，被誉为“明尼阿波利斯之声”的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (American, 1958-2016) was an iconic singer, songwriter, and music producer known for blending funk, R&B, rock, and pop. His代表作 include "Purple Rain," "1999," and "Kiss," and he is hailed as a representative of the "Minneapolis sound."

03-20.birthdayZh: 3月20日，是你的生日。这一天，王子用《3121》打开了一扇神秘的门，里面藏着放克、灵魂与自由的节奏——那是属于你的音轨。像门牌号后藏着的秘密，你的生命也自带不可复制的韵律。愿你始终踏着这节奏起舞，在迷幻又明亮的世界里，做自己最耀眼的节拍。生日快乐，愿你永远有力量。
03-20.birthdayEn: March 20 is your birthday. On this day in history, Prince unleashed "3121," a vibrant fusion of funk and soul that pulses with creative fearlessness. Like that album, may your year be a bold, joyful remix of rhythm and light—every note an invitation to dance through life’s mysteries. Let this day be your own personal anthem, warm with the sweet promise of new beginnings and the steady beat of your own beautiful truth. Happy birthday.

items.name: Lisa Stansfield
items.descriptionZh: 《Lisa Stansfield》是英国R&B/Soul歌手Lisa Stansfield在1997年发行的同名专辑，延续了她标志性的灵魂乐与R&B风格，融合了放克和流行元素。专辑以流畅的旋律和深情的演唱著称，展现了她在节奏蓝调领域的成熟魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Lisa Stansfield" is the self-titled 1997 R&B/Soul album by British singer Lisa Stansfield, continuing her signature blend of soul and R&B with funk and pop elements. Known for its smooth melodies and heartfelt vocals, the album showcases her mature charm in the rhythm and blues genre.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Lisa Stansfield离开Arista唱片公司后，通过自己的厂牌发行的一张作品。她与长期合作伙伴Ian Devaney共同制作，录制过程在英格兰和爱尔兰多地完成，专辑中多首歌曲反映了她对个人生活和情感的真实思考。
items.storiesEn: This album was released through Lisa Stansfield's own label after she left Arista Records. Co-produced with longtime collaborator Ian Devaney, the recording took place across multiple locations in England and Ireland, with many songs reflecting her genuine thoughts on personal life and emotions.
items.artistIntroZh: Lisa Stansfield（英国，1966年生）是著名的R&B和灵魂乐歌手，以醇厚的嗓音和经典歌曲《All Around the World》闻名。她的音乐融合了放克、流行和灵魂乐，代表作还包括《Change》和《This Is the Right Time》。
items.artistIntroEn: Lisa Stansfield (British, born 1966) is a renowned R&B and soul singer, famous for her rich voice and classic hit "All Around the World." Her music blends funk, pop, and soul, with other代表作 including "Change" and "This Is the Right Time."

items.name: Am Wasser gebaut
items.descriptionZh: 《Am Wasser gebaut》是德国Hip-Hop组合Fettes Brot在2005年发行的专辑，融合了德式说唱、流行和喜剧元素。专辑以轻松幽默的歌词和朗朗上口的副歌为特色，节奏明快，展现了他们在德语说唱领域的独特风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Am Wasser gebaut" is a 2005 Hip-Hop album by German group Fettes Brot, blending German rap with pop and comedic elements. Characterized by lighthearted, humorous lyrics and catchy choruses with upbeat rhythms, it showcases their unique style in German-language hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Am Wasser gebaut》在德语中意为“建在水边”，灵感来源于汉堡的港口文化，因为组合成员均来自汉堡。录制过程中，他们邀请了多位客座艺人合作，专辑发行后因融合幽默与社会评论而受到乐迷喜爱。
