items.storiesEn: The album title "Am Wasser gebaut" translates to "Built by the Water," inspired by the port culture of Hamburg, where all group members are from. During recording, they collaborated with several guest artists, and the album was loved by fans for blending humor with social commentary.
items.artistIntroZh: Fettes Brot（德国，1992年成立）是著名的德语Hip-Hop组合，以幽默歌词和流行化说唱著称。成员包括Dokter Renz、König Boris和Schiffmeister，代表作有《Jein》和《Emanuela》，在德国乐坛影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Fettes Brot (German, formed 1992) is a well-known German hip-hop group, famous for humorous lyrics and pop-influenced rap. Members include Dokter Renz, König Boris, and Schiffmeister, with hits like "Jein" and "Emanuela," leaving a lasting impact on the German music scene.

items.name: Rubycon
items.descriptionZh: 《Rubycon》是德国电子乐队Tangerine Dream在1975年发行的专辑，属于柏林学派电子音乐。专辑以模拟合成器构建的绵延音景和迷幻氛围为核心，节奏缓慢而富有层次感，是太空音乐和氛围电子乐的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Rubycon" is a 1975 electronic album by German band Tangerine Dream, belonging to the Berlin School of electronic music. Centered on evolving soundscapes and psychedelic atmospheres built with analog synthesizers, its slow, layered rhythms make it a classic in space music and ambient electronica.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Tangerine Dream在Virgin Records旗下发行的第二张作品，录制于柏林附近的私人录音室。乐队成员Edgar Froese、Christopher Franke和Peter Baumann在录制时大量使用Moog合成器和磁带延迟技术，专辑封面由Edgar Froese的妻子设计，灵感来自超现实主义艺术。
items.storiesEn: This album was Tangerine Dream's second release on Virgin Records, recorded in a private studio near Berlin. Members Edgar Froese, Christopher Franke, and Peter Baumann extensively used Moog synthesizers and tape delay techniques; the cover art, designed by Froese's wife, was inspired by surrealist art.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Rubycon》被视为柏林学派电子音乐的代表作之一，对后来的氛围电子和合成器流行乐产生了深远影响，帮助确立了电子音乐作为独立艺术形式的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Rubycon" is regarded as a seminal work of the Berlin School of electronic music, deeply influencing later ambient electronic and synth-pop, and helping establish electronic music as an independent art form.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream（德国，1967年成立）��先锋电子乐队，以氛围、太空音乐和柏林学派风格著称。核心成员包括Edgar Froese（已故），代表作有《Phaedra》和《Ricochet》，对电子音乐发展贡献巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream (German, formed 1967) is a pioneering electronic band known for ambient, space music, and the Berlin School style. Core member Edgar Froese (deceased) led the group, with iconic works like "Phaedra" and "Ricochet," making huge contributions to electronic music.

03-21.birthdayZh: 3月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Tangerine Dream在《Rubycon》里用绵长的合成器音景铺开一条穿越时间的河流，而Lisa Stansfield的同名专辑则用灵魂乐的低语告诉你——你像和弦里的柔滑弦乐，每一段都值得被温柔珍藏。不必追赶春天，你本身就是破土的光。
03-21.birthdayEn: March 21 is your birthday. Like the shimmering depths of Tangerine Dream’s Rubycon, may your day unfold with mystery and radiant light. And just as Lisa Stansfield’s self-titled album carries a soulful, confident warmth, may you feel wrapped in love and unshakable joy. You are a beautiful bridge between gentle night and bold dawn—celebrate the rhythm of your own extraordinary story. Happy birthday to a truly remarkable soul.

items.name: A Tribute to Miles
items.descriptionZh: 《A Tribute to Miles》是Herbie Hancock在1994年发行的爵士专辑，旨在致敬传奇小号手Miles Davis。专辑融合了后波普、融合爵士和放克元素，由多位顶级爵士音乐家合作演绎，展现了精湛的即兴演奏和深情的致敬。
items.descriptionEn: "A Tribute to Miles" is a 1994 jazz album by Herbie Hancock, paying homage to legendary trumpeter Miles Davis. Blending post-bop, fusion jazz, and funk, the album features collaborations with top jazz musicians, showcasing masterful improvisation and heartfelt tribute.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑由Herbie Hancock与多位曾与Miles Davis合作过的音乐家共同录制，包括小号手Wallace Roney、萨克斯手Wayne Shorter和鼓手Tony Williams。录制过程中，他们重温了Davis的经典曲目，并加入现代编曲，专辑在1995年获得格莱美最佳爵士演奏专辑奖。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded by Herbie Hancock with several musicians who had collaborated with Miles Davis, including trumpeter Wallace Roney, saxophonist Wayne Shorter, and drummer Tony Williams. During recording, they revisited Davis's classics with modern arrangements, winning the Grammy for Best Jazz Instrumental Album in 1995.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑成功致敬了Miles Davis的遗产，并促进了新一代爵士乐迷对Davis音乐的关注，同时展现了后波普与融合爵士的深度结合。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album successfully honored Miles Davis's legacy, drawing attention from a new generation of jazz fans to his music, while showcasing a deep blend of post-bop and fusion jazz.
items.artistIntroZh: Herbie Hancock（美国，1940年生）是传奇爵士钢琴家、作曲家和乐队领袖，以融合爵士、放克和电子音乐著称。代表作包括《Cantaloupe Island》和《Chameleon》，曾获多项格莱美奖，是现代爵士乐的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Herbie Hancock (American, born 1940) is a legendary jazz pianist, composer, and bandleader, known for blending jazz with funk and electronic music. His代表作 include "Cantaloupe Island" and "Chameleon," and he has won multiple Grammy Awards, making him a key figure in modern jazz.

items.name: A Real Live One
items.descriptionZh: 《A Real Live One》是英国重金属乐队Iron Maiden于1993年发行的现场专辑，风格为硬摇滚与重金属。这张专辑收录了乐队在1992年“Fear of the Dark”巡演期间的多场演出实况，核心特色在于真实还原了乐队在舞台上的爆发力与即兴演奏，音色粗粝而充满能量，展现了Iron Maiden作为现场王者的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: A Real Live One is a live album by British heavy metal band Iron Maiden, released in 1993. Featuring recordings from their 1992 Fear of the Dark tour, the album captures the raw energy and improvisational power of the band's live performances, showcasing their reputation as one of the greatest live acts in rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的选曲非常特别：所有曲目均来自前八张录音室专辑中从未以单曲形式发行的作品，如《Be Quick or Be Dead》和《From Here to Eternity》。录制时，乐队特意挑选了不同场次的录音，以确保每首歌都来自其演出效果最佳的夜晚。主唱Bruce Dickinson曾回忆，制作人本想后期修音，但乐队坚持保留原始现场感，甚至保留了观众呼喊和话筒反馈的瑕疵。
items.storiesEn: The album's tracklist is unique: all songs were taken from the band's first eight studio albums but had never been released as singles. The band selected recordings from different nights to ensure each song was captured at its peak performance. Vocalist Bruce Dickinson recalled that the producer initially wanted to polish the sound in post-production, but the band insisted on keeping the raw live atmosphere, including crowd noise and mic feedback.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Iron Maiden在90年代初期的现场代表作，该专辑为后续《A Real Dead One》等现场系列奠定了基础，并巩固了乐队在重金属现场录音领域的标杆地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a defining live document from Iron Maiden's early 1990s output, this album laid the groundwork for subsequent live releases like A Real Dead One and solidified the band's benchmark status in heavy metal live recordings.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron Maiden是1975年成立于英国伦敦的重金属乐队，被誉为不列颠重金属新浪潮的代表之一。其风格以双吉他旋律、史诗般的歌曲结构和主唱Bruce Dickinson的高亢嗓音著称。代表作包括《The Number of the Beast》、《Fear of the Dark》和《Powerslave》，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron Maiden are a British heavy metal band formed in London in 1975, regarded as pioneers of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Known for twin-guitar harmonies, epic song structures, and Bruce Dickinson's soaring vocals, their iconic albums include The Number of the Beast, Fear of the Dark, and Powerslave, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

03-22.birthdayZh: 3月22日，是你的生日。像一张名叫《A Tribute to Miles》的现场专辑，你的存在本身就是一场对生命中最动人旋律的致敬与回响。也愿你像《A Real Live One》那样，永远活在真实而滚烫的此刻，用你自己的节奏，把每一天都唱成一首独一无二的歌。
03-22.birthdayEn: March 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with music that mirrors your own spirit: the soaring, live energy of Iron Maiden's A Real Live One, a testament to power and resilience, and Herbie Hancock's A Tribute to Miles, a soulful homage to legacy and love. May your year ahead sing with that same electric joy and deep, tender harmony. You are a beautiful note in this world's song, and today, the whole melody celebrates you.

items.name: MDNA
items.descriptionZh: 《MDNA》是美国流行天后Madonna于2012年发行的第12张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和电子乐为主，融合了浩室、科技舞曲和流行摇滚元素。专辑核心特色在于高能量舞曲节奏与暗黑、内省的歌词主题形成鲜明对比，制作上大量使用合成器和重低音，展现了Madonna对俱乐部文化的持续探索。
items.descriptionEn: MDNA is the 12th studio album by American pop icon Madonna, released in 2012. Blending pop, electronic dance music, house, and techno, the album is characterized by high-energy beats contrasted with dark, introspective lyrics. Heavy use of synthesizers and sub-bass reflects Madonna's ongoing exploration of club culture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“MDNA”是Madonna名字的变体，也是“MDMA”（摇头丸）的谐音，暗示了专辑的迷幻舞曲氛围。录制期间，Madonna���多位制作人合作，包括William Orbit（曾制作《Ray of Light》）和法国电子组合Martin Solveig。有趣的是，主打歌《Give Me All Your Luvin'》原本邀请了M.I.A.和Nicki Minaj合作，但M.I.A.在MV拍摄现场因行为争议引发媒体关注。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'MDNA' is a play on Madonna's name and a homophone for 'MDMA' (ecstasy), hinting at its psychedelic dance vibe. Madonna collaborated with producers including William Orbit (Ray of Light) and French electronic duo Martin Solveig. Notably, the lead single 'Give Me All Your Luvin'' featured M.I.A. and Nicki Minaj, but M.I.A. sparked media controversy with her behavior during the music video shoot.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna是美国歌手、演员和商人，1958年出生于密歇根州，被誉为“流行天后”。她以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会禁忌著称，主要风格涵盖流行、舞曲和电子乐。代表作包括《Like a Virgin》、《Vogue》和《Ray of Light》，全球唱片销量超过3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and businesswoman, born in Michigan in 1958, known as the 'Queen of Pop'. Renowned for constantly reinventing her music and challenging social norms, her styles span pop, dance, and electronic music. Iconic hits include Like a Virgin, Vogue, and Ray of Light, with over 300 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: …And Then There Were Three…
items.descriptionZh: 《…And Then There Were Three…》是英国前卫摇滚乐队Genesis于1978年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格从前卫摇滚向流行摇滚转变。核心特色在于吉他手Steve Hackett离队后，乐队首次以三人组形式录制，音乐结构更加精简，旋律更直接，但依然保留了复杂的和声与键盘织体，标志着乐队商业转型的开端。
items.descriptionEn: …And Then There Were Three… is the seventh studio album by British progressive rock band Genesis, released in 1978. Marking a shift from progressive rock toward pop rock, it was the band's first album as a trio after guitarist Steve Hackett's departure. The music features simpler structures and more direct melodies, yet retains complex harmonies and keyboard textures, signaling the band's commercial evolution.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题取自吉他手Steve Hackett离开后的三人阵容（主唱Phil Collins、键盘手Tony Banks、贝斯手Mike Rutherford）。录制过程充满挑战：由于缺少吉他手，Mike Rutherford不得不兼任贝斯和吉他，而Phil Collins同时担任鼓手和主唱。歌曲《Follow You Follow Me》是乐队第一首真正意义上的流行情歌，因旋律简单优美而意外成为热门单曲，为乐队打开了主流市场。
items.storiesEn: The album title reflects the trio lineup after guitarist Steve Hackett's departure (Phil Collins, Tony Banks, Mike Rutherford). Recording was challenging: Rutherford had to cover both bass and guitar, while Collins sang and played drums simultaneously. 'Follow You Follow Me' became the band's first genuine pop love song, unexpectedly becoming a hit and opening the mainstream market for Genesis.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Genesis从艺术摇滚转向流行摇滚的转折点，为后续《Duke》和《Invisible Touch》等商业成功铺平了道路，影响了80年代众多流行摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marks Genesis's pivotal shift from art rock to pop rock, paving the way for later commercial successes like Duke and Invisible Touch, and influencing many pop rock bands of the 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Genesis是1967年成立于英国萨里的前卫摇滚乐队，创始成员包括Peter Gabriel和Tony Banks等。其风格早期以复杂编曲和戏剧性歌词著称，后期在Phil Collins领导下转向流行摇滚。代表作有《Selling England by the Pound》和《Invisible Touch》，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Genesis are a progressive rock band formed in Surrey, England in 1967, with founding members including Peter Gabriel and Tony Banks. Known for complex arrangements and theatrical lyrics in their early years, they later shifted to pop rock under Phil Collins. Iconic albums include Selling England by the Pound and Invisible Touch, with over 100 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Metroland
items.descriptionZh: 《Metroland》是英国吉他手兼歌手Mark Knopfler于1999年发行的个人原声专辑，风格为流行与器乐摇滚的融合，带有民谣和凯尔特音乐元素。核心特色在于Knopfler标志性的指弹吉他技巧和细腻的叙事性旋律，整张专辑为同名电影配乐，音乐氛围宁静而略带忧郁，描绘了城市与乡村的对比。
items.descriptionEn: Metroland is a solo soundtrack album by British guitarist and singer Mark Knopfler, released in 1999. Blending pop, instrumental rock, folk, and Celtic influences, the album showcases Knopfler's signature fingerstyle guitar and narrative melodies. Serving as the score for the film of the same name, its music evokes a serene yet melancholic contrast between urban and rural life.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Knopfler为1997年电影《Metroland》（中文译名《都市情缘》）创作的配乐，但直到1999年才正式发行。Knopfler在录制时完全采用原声吉他，并邀请了多位凯尔特音乐家参与，包括爱尔兰小提琴手。有趣的是，Knopfler曾表示这张配乐是他个人最安静的作品之一，因为他刻意避开了电子合成器，只用乐器原声来传达电影中怀旧与迷茫的情绪。
items.storiesEn: This album is Knopfler's score for the 1997 film Metroland, though it wasn't released until 1999. Knopfler recorded entirely with acoustic guitars and invited several Celtic musicians, including an Irish fiddler. He later commented that this was one of his quietest works, deliberately avoiding synthesizers to convey the film's nostalgic and uncertain mood through purely acoustic sounds.
items.artistIntroZh: Mark Knopfler是英国吉他手、歌手和作曲家，1949年出生于格拉斯哥，以Dire Straits乐队主唱兼吉他手闻名。其风格以细腻的指弹吉他、民谣摇滚和叙事性歌词为特色。代表作包括《Sultans of Swing》、《Brothers in Arms》以及多部电影配乐，被誉为当代最伟大的吉他手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mark Knopfler is a British guitarist, singer, and songwriter, born in Glasgow in 1949, best known as the frontman of Dire Straits. His style features intricate fingerstyle guitar, folk rock, and narrative lyrics. Iconic works include 'Sultans of Swing', Brothers in Arms, and numerous film scores, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time.

03-23.birthdayZh: 3月23日，是你的生日。就像《MDNA》在黑暗中迸发舞动的光芒，你总能在自己的节奏里找到力量。而《Metroland》的旋律，是那些安静陪伴的时光，像凯尔特琴声轻轻托起你的梦。这一天属于你，愿你像音符一样自由，像生日烛火一样，温柔而坚定地照亮自己的路。
03-23.birthdayEn: March 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave you life, and music history gifted us with albums like Madonna’s *MDNA* — bold, vibrant, a dance of reinvention — and Genesis’s *…And Then There Were Three…*, a turning point that proved strength in new beginnings. May your year ahead carry that same spark: the courage to evolve, the rhythm to keep moving, and the quiet grace of a song that knows its own worth. Shine on.

items.name: One Heart
items.descriptionZh: 《One Heart》是加拿大流行天后Céline Dion于2003年发行的第12张英语录音室专辑，风格以流行和成人当代为主，融合���舞曲和灵魂乐元素��核心特色在于积极向上的主题和充满活力的节奏，与Dion此前以抒情歌为主的风格形成对比，专辑旨在传递爱与希望的信息，制作上强调明亮的编曲和强劲的鼓点。
items.descriptionEn: One Heart is the 12th English studio album by Canadian pop superstar Céline Dion, released in 2003. Blending pop, adult contemporary, dance, and soul, the album stands out for its upbeat themes and energetic rhythms, contrasting with Dion's earlier ballad-heavy work. The production emphasizes bright arrangements and strong beats, conveying messages of love and hope.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Céline Dion结束拉斯维加斯驻唱合约后的短暂休息期，她希望制作一张能让人跳舞的快乐专辑。主打歌《One Heart》由John Shanks制作，原本是为Shanks自己的乐队写的，但Dion听后坚持要唱。专辑中还包括翻唱自法国歌手Johnny Hallyday的歌曲《Je t'aime encore》，Dion用法语演唱，向自己的魁北克根源致敬。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a brief break after Céline Dion's Las Vegas residency; she wanted to create a joyful, danceable record. The title track 'One Heart' was produced by John Shanks and originally intended for his own band, but Dion insisted on recording it. The album also includes a cover of French singer Johnny Hallyday's 'Je t'aime encore', sung in French as a tribute to her Quebec roots.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion是加拿大歌手，1968年出生于魁北克省，被誉为全球最畅销的女歌手之一。其风格以流行和成人当代为主，以强大的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎著称。代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》、《The Power of Love》和《Because You Loved Me》，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer, born in Quebec in 1968, one of the best-selling female artists of all time. Known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery, her style spans pop and adult contemporary. Iconic hits include 'My Heart Will Go On', 'The Power of Love', and 'Because You Loved Me', with over 200 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: 26 Mixes for Cash
items.descriptionZh: 《26 Mixes for Cash》是Aphex Twin于2003年发行的混音合辑，收录了他为其他艺人制作的26首混音作品。尽管被归类为流行，但专辑充满实验电子、IDM和氛围元素，展现了Richard D. James将流行旋律解构为复杂电子音景的独特能力。
items.descriptionEn: "26 Mixes for Cash" is a 2003 remix compilation by Aphex Twin, featuring 26 tracks he remixed for other artists. Though labeled as Pop, the album is steeped in experimental electronic, IDM, and ambient elements, showcasing Richard D. James' unique ability to deconstruct pop melodies into complex electronic soundscapes.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题源自一个趣闻：90年代末，Aphex Twin因急需现金，大量接单为他人做混音，甚至以每首1000英镑的低价完成。这些混音作品最初散见于各种单曲和EP中，直到2003年才集结成这张合辑，成为他高产时期的一个侧面记录。
items.storiesEn: The album title originates from a period in the late '90s when Aphex Twin, in need of cash, took on numerous remix commissions, reportedly charging as little as £1,000 per track. These remixes were originally scattered across various singles and EPs, and were only compiled into this collection in 2003, serving as a side record of his prolific period.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin（本名Richard D. James），英国电子音乐人，被誉为实验电子与IDM的先驱。代表作包括《Selected Ambient Works 85-92》和《Richard D. James Album》，以复杂节拍、氛围音景和极具个人特色的声音设计闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin (born Richard D. James) is a British electronic musician, hailed as a pioneer of experimental electronic and IDM. His代表作 include "Selected Ambient Works 85-92" and "Richard D. James Album," known for complex beats, ambient soundscapes, and highly distinctive sound design.

03-24.birthdayZh: 3月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《One Heart》——一颗心的力量足以对抗所有阴霾，它教人相信乐观是温柔的战歌。也诞生了《26 Mixes for Cash》，像深夜为你调配的星尘，每段旋律都是不同光影的拥抱。愿你在新的一岁里，把心当作居所，让每一种声音都成为照亮前路的暖光。
03-24.birthdayEn: March 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Céline Dion's One Heart, a testament to resilience and the power of love to light even the darkest path. And from Aphex Twin came 26 Mixes for Cash, a playful, bold reminder that life is a beautiful collage of unexpected rhythms. May your year ahead be a melody of joy and a dance of courage. You were born on a day of sound and spirit—carry that harmony with you always. Happy birthday.

items.name: One Day in Your Life
items.descriptionZh: 《One Day in Your Life》是Michael Jackson于1981年发行的合辑，原为Motown在其离开后推出的作品。专辑风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，收录了Jackson 5时期及早期个人作品，如轻柔的标题曲《One Day in Your Life》，展现了他早年温暖细腻的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "One Day in Your Life" is a 1981 compilation album by Michael Jackson, released by Motown after his departure. The album is primarily R&B and Soul, featuring tracks from his Jackson 5 days and early solo career, such as the tender title track "One Day in Your Life," showcasing his warm and delicate early vocal style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Motown在Michael Jackson转投Epic唱片后，利用其旧有录音素材发行的合辑。标题曲《One Day in Your Life》原本是1975年专辑《Forever, Michael》中的一首单曲，并未取得巨大成功，但作为合辑主打后，意外在英国登顶单曲榜，成为Jackson在英的首支冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: This album was a compilation released by Motown after Michael Jackson left for Epic Records, using his old recordings. The title track "One Day in Your Life" was originally a single from his 1975 album "Forever, Michael" that didn't achieve major success, but as the lead of this compilation, it unexpectedly topped the UK singles chart, becoming Jackson's first number-one single in the UK.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson，美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。主要风格包括流行、R&B和灵魂乐。代表作有《Thriller》、《Billie Jean》和《Beat It》，其音乐、舞蹈和影像对全球流行文化产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the "King of Pop." His main styles include Pop, R&B, and Soul. His代表作 include "Thriller," "Billie Jean," and "Beat It," and his music, dance, and visuals have had a profound impact on global pop culture.

items.name: Life After Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Life After Death》是The Notorious B.I.G.于1997年发行的双碟专辑，也是他离世后16天发布的遗作。这张东海岸嘻哈经典融合了黑帮说唱、灵魂乐采样和叙事性歌词，制作精良，曲风从派对热曲到街头史诗，展现了Biggie卓越的押韵技巧和故事讲述能力。
items.descriptionEn: "Life After Death" is a double-disc album by The Notorious B.I.G., released 16 days after his death in 1997. This East Coast hip-hop classic blends gangsta rap, soul samples, and narrative lyrics. With polished production, the album ranges from party anthems to street epics, showcasing Biggie's exceptional rhyme skills and storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1995年至1997年初，期间Biggie刚刚从1994年的枪击事件中康复。他邀请了多位嘉宾如Jay-Z、Lil‘ Kim和R. Kelly合作。专辑原定于1997年3月25日发行，但Biggie于3月9日在洛杉矶遭枪击身亡，这张专辑由此成为他的最终遗作，发行后迅速空降公告牌专辑榜冠军。
items.storiesEn: Recorded between 1995 and early 1997, the album was made as Biggie recovered from a 1994 shooting. He enlisted numerous guests including Jay-Z, Lil' Kim, and R. Kelly. Originally scheduled for release on March 25, 1997, Biggie was shot and killed in Los Angeles on March 9, making this album his final work. It debuted at number one on the Billboard 200.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为嘻哈史上最伟大的双碟专辑之一，巩固了The Notorious B.I.G.的传奇地位，并对东海岸说唱及整个嘻哈音乐的发展产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the greatest double albums in hip-hop history, this album cemented The Notorious B.I.G.'s legendary status and profoundly influenced East Coast rap and hip-hop as a whole.
items.artistIntroZh: The Notorious B.I.G.（本名Christopher Wallace），美国说唱歌手，东海岸嘻哈的标志性人物。以其流畅的flow、生动的街头叙事和低沉嗓音著称。代表作有《Ready to Die》和《Life After Death》，被视为史上最伟大的MC之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Notorious B.I.G. (born Christopher Wallace) was an American rapper, an iconic figure of East Coast hip-hop. Known for his smooth flow, vivid street narratives, and deep voice, his代表作 include "Ready to Die" and "Life After Death," and he is regarded as one of the greatest MCs of all time.

items.name: Femme Fatale
items.descriptionZh: 《Femme Fatale》是Britney Spears于2011年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格为流行舞曲，融合了电子、合成器流行和欧陆舞曲元素。专辑由Dr. Luke、Max Martin等金牌制作人操刀，节奏强劲、旋律洗脑，展现了Britney向纯粹夜店舞曲风格的转变。
items.descriptionEn: "Femme Fatale" is Britney Spears' seventh studio album, released in 2011. It is a pop dance album blending electro, synth-pop, and Eurodance elements. Produced by hitmakers like Dr. Luke and Max Martin, the album features pounding beats and catchy melodies, showcasing Britney's shift towards pure club-oriented dance music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Britney Spears正忙于其“Circus”巡演，并与制作人通过邮件和电话远程合作。主打歌《Hold It Against Me》原计划由Dr. Luke为Katy Perry创作，后转给Britney。歌曲中融入了 dubstep 元素，成为她首支空降公告牌单曲榜冠军的作品。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Britney Spears was busy with her "Circus" tour and collaborated with producers remotely via email and phone. The lead single "Hold It Against Me" was originally written by Dr. Luke for Katy Perry but was passed to Britney. The song incorporated dubstep elements and became her first single to debut at number one on the Billboard Hot 100.
items.artistIntroZh: Britney Spears，美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行公主”。主要风格为流行和舞曲。代表作包括《...Baby One More Time》、《Toxic》和《Oops!... I Did It Again》，是90年代末至2000年代初全球最具影响力的青少年偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American singer and dancer, known as the "Princess of Pop." Her main styles are Pop and Dance. Her代表作 include "...Baby One More Time," "Toxic," and "Oops!... I Did It Again," making her one of the most influential teen idols globally in the late '90s and early 2000s.

03-25.birthdayZh: 3月25日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张《One Day in Your Life》，像藏在你生命里的光，提醒你每刻都值得珍藏。也有一张《Life After Death》，诉说一切结束之后，仍有力量生长。你走过的路，都成了明天的序章。生日快乐，愿你如这日子般，温柔而坚定。
03-25.birthdayEn: March 25 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed anthems of transformation—Michael Jackson’s “One Day in Your Life” reminds us that every moment holds a new beginning, while Britney Spears’ “Femme Fatale” pulses with fierce, unapologetic strength. Like these albums, your life is a compilation of tender hopes and bold rhythms. May this year write a melody that feels like home, where every sunrise whispers, “You belong here.” Shine on—you are the star of your own unstoppable story.

items.name: Trilogy: Past Present Future
items.descriptionZh: 《Trilogy: Past Present Future》是Frank Sinatra于1980年发行的概念专辑，分为“过去”、“现在”和“未来”三部分。风格以传统流行和爵士为主，Sinatra以标志性的低沉嗓音演绎了多首经典情歌和标准曲，编曲由Billy May、Don Costa等大师操刀，情感层次丰富。
items.descriptionEn: "Trilogy: Past Present Future" is a 1980 concept album by Frank Sinatra, divided into three parts: Past, Present, and Future. Stylistically traditional pop and jazz, Sinatra delivers classic love songs and standards with his iconic baritone voice. The arrangements by masters like Billy May and Don Costa are rich in emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Sinatra职业生涯中最具野心的项目之一，特别是第三部分“未来”，包含一首长达15分钟的未来主义组曲《The Future》，由Gordon Jenkins创作。Sinatra当时对合成器和电子效果持保留态度，但在制作人督促下完成了这一实验性尝试。专辑发行后商业成功，但评论界对“未来”部分褒贬不一。
items.storiesEn: This album was one of the most ambitious projects of Sinatra's career, especially the "Future" section, which includes a 15-minute futuristic suite titled "The Future" composed by Gordon Jenkins. Sinatra was initially wary of synthesizers and electronic effects but completed this experimental endeavor at his producer's urging. The album was a commercial success, though the "Future" section received mixed reviews.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为Sinatra赢得格莱美“最佳流行男歌手”奖，并因其概念性结构和实验性尝试，被视为他后期职业生涯中极具艺术探索精神的作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won Sinatra the Grammy for Best Male Pop Vocal Performance, and is regarded as a highly artistic and exploratory work in his later career due to its conceptual structure and experimental approach.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra，美国歌手、演员，被誉为“摇摆乐之王”和20世纪最伟大的流行歌手之一。主要风格为传统流行和爵士。代表作包括《My Way》、《Fly Me to the Moon》和《New York, New York》，其优雅的演唱风格影响了几代音乐人。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra was an American singer and actor, known as the "King of Swing" and one of the greatest popular singers of the 20th century. His main styles are Traditional Pop and Jazz. His代表作 include "My Way," "Fly Me to the Moon," and "New York, New York," and his elegant vocal style influenced generations of musicians.

items.name: Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver
items.descriptionZh: 《Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver》是滨崎步在2008年推出的混音专辑，属于其长期混音系列“Ayu-mi-x”的第六弹。该作品以电子流派为核心，融合了Trance、House和Techno等元素，将滨崎步的原声歌曲重新编排为充满舞曲活力的电子音景。专辑特色在于其冷峻而流畅的银色主题，通过合成器与节奏的精密结合，营造出未来感与梦幻交织的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Ayu-mi-x 6: Silver" is a remix album by Ayumi Hamasaki released in 2008, part of her long-running "Ayu-mi-x" series. Centered on the Electronic genre, it blends Trance, House, and Techno elements, reimagining Hamasaki's original songs into energetic dance-floor soundscapes. The album's hallmark is its cool and sleek silver theme, using precise synthesizers and rhythms to create a futuristic and dreamy auditory experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是滨崎步为纪念其音乐生涯十周年而推出的混音系列之一，与《Ayu-mi-x 6: Gold》同时发行。录制过程中，滨崎步邀请了多位国际知名混音师参与，包括来自欧洲的电子音乐制作人，以提升专辑的全球化质感。有趣的是，专辑封面采用银色基调，与《Gold》的金色形成对比，象征电子音乐的冷艳与多元，这种设计灵感源自滨崎步对视觉艺术与音乐融合的执着追求。
items.storiesEn: This album is one of the remix series released by Ayumi Hamasaki to commemorate her 10th music career anniversary, alongside "Ayu-mi-x 6: Gold." During the recording process, Hamasaki invited several internationally renowned remixers, including European electronic music producers, to enhance the album's global texture. Interestingly, the album cover adopted a silver tone, contrasting with the gold of its counterpart, symbolizing the coolness and diversity of electronic music—a design inspired by Hamasaki's dedication to blending visual art with music.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步（Ayumi Hamasaki），日本流行天后及电子音乐先锋，出生于1978年。她以其独特的嗓音、多变的音乐风格和视觉创意闻名，代表作包括《Boys & Girls》和《M》。作为亚洲乐坛的标志性人物，她推动了J-Pop与电子音乐的融合，销量超过5000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese pop diva and electronic music pioneer, born in 1978. Known for her distinctive voice, versatile musical style, and visual creativity, her representative works include "Boys & Girls" and "M." As an iconic figure in Asian music, she pioneered the fusion of J-Pop with electronic music, selling over 50 million records.

items.name: SONGS -Teen's Collection-
items.descriptionZh: 《SONGS -Teen's Collection-》是韩国歌手Younha在2008年发行的精选专辑，聚焦于她青少年时期的代表作。该作品以流行流派为主，融合了轻柔的钢琴民谣与动感的流行摇滚，展现了Younha清新而富有感染力的嗓音。核心特色在于其情感真挚的歌词和旋律，捕捉了青春期的成长与梦想，专辑名称直接呼应了Younha作为“青少年歌手”的早期定位。
items.descriptionEn: "SONGS -Teen's Collection-" is a compilation album by South Korean singer Younha, released in 2008, focusing on her representative works from her teenage years. Centered on the Pop genre, it blends gentle piano ballads with dynamic pop rock, showcasing Younha's fresh and emotive voice. Its core feature lies in the sincere lyrics and melodies that capture adolescent growth and dreams, with the album title directly echoing Younha's early identity as a "teen singer."
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行正值Younha从青���年向成熟艺人过渡的关键时期。录制过程中，她亲自参与了曲目筛选，希望收录那些最能代表她15岁出道以来成长轨迹的歌曲。有趣的是，专辑中包含了她在日本活动期间的热门单曲《ほうき星》，这首歌原本为动画《死神》创作，但在韩国重新录制时，Younha特意加入了韩语版本，以回馈本土歌迷的支持。
items.storiesEn: This album was released during a pivotal period when Younha was transitioning from a teenage to a mature artist. During the recording process, she personally participated in track selection, aiming to include songs that best represented her growth since debuting at age 15. Interestingly, the album featured her hit single "Houki Boshi" from her Japanese activities, originally created for the anime "Bleach." When re-recording for the Korean market, Younha specially added a Korean version to thank her domestic fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Younha（本名高润荷），韩国流行女歌手，出生于1988年。她以15岁之龄在日本出道，凭借《ほうき星》等歌曲成名，后回归韩国乐坛，代表作包括《密码》和《等待》。Younha以其清澈嗓音和情感深度著称，被誉为“韩国乐坛的抒情女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Younha (born Go Yun-ha) is a South Korean pop singer, born in 1988. She debuted in Japan at age 15, gaining fame with songs like "Houki Boshi," before returning to the Korean music scene. Her representative works include "Password" and "Wait." Known for her clear voice and emotional depth, she is hailed as the "Queen of Ballads" in Korean music.

03-26.birthdayZh: 3月26日，是你的生日。像Frank Sinatra在《Trilogy: Past Present Future》里唱的那样，过去是你的序章，此刻是光，未来是信。而Younha的《SONGS -Teen's Collection-》会告诉你，年少时的梦从未走远。愿这天所有的温柔，都为你聚成星辰，照亮你正在走的路。
03-26.birthdayEn: March 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Sinatra’s “Trilogy: Past Present Future,” a sweeping ode to life’s chapters, and Younha’s “SONGS -Teen’s Collection-,” a tender tapestry of youthful dreams. Like these albums, may your year weave together the grace of yesterday, the brightness of today, and the promise of tomorrow. You are a living melody of resilience and hope—play it proudly. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Map the Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Map the Soul》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High在2009年发行的第五张录音室专辑，以嘻哈流派为核心，融合了爵士、电子和摇滚元素。该专辑的特色在于其哲学性的歌词，探讨了身份、灵魂与现代社会议题，同时采用了多层采样和实验性节拍，展现了Epik High在嘻哈音乐中的艺术深度。专辑标题“Map the Soul”象征着对内心世界的探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Map the Soul" is the fifth studio album by South Korean hip-hop group Epik High, released in 2009, centered on the Hip-Hop genre with elements of jazz, electronic, and rock. The album is characterized by its philosophical lyrics, exploring identity, soul, and modern social issues, while employing multi-layered samples and experimental beats, showcasing Epik High's artistic depth in hip-hop. The title "Map the Soul" symbolizes an exploration of the inner world.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程伴随着Epik High成员Tablo的争议事件，当时他因学历造假指控而面临公众压力，这促使团队将更多个人情感注入音乐中。有趣的是，专辑中一首未公开曲目《Umbrella》后来被重新录制并收录于后续作品，其灵感来源于Tablo在雨夜中写下的日记。此外，专辑封面由韩国艺术家设计，以抽象地图图案呼应主题，体现了成员们对视觉艺术的重视。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album coincided with a controversy involving Epik High member Tablo, who faced public pressure over false allegations about his academic credentials, prompting the group to infuse more personal emotions into the music. Interestingly, an unreleased track "Umbrella" was later re-recorded and included in a subsequent album, inspired by Tablo's diary entries written on a rainy night. Additionally, the album cover was designed by a Korean artist, using abstract map patterns to echo the theme, reflecting the members' emphasis on visual art.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Map the Soul》被认为是Epik High转型的关键作品，其实验性嘻哈风格和深刻歌词影响了韩国嘻哈乐坛，推动了嘻哈音乐向艺术性和社会议题探索的方向发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Map the Soul" is considered a pivotal work in Epik High's transformation, with its experimental hip-hop style and profound lyrics influencing the Korean hip-hop scene, steering the genre toward artistic and socially conscious exploration.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High，韩国嘻哈组合，成立于2003年，成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz。他们以其诗意的歌词和多元音乐风格闻名，代表作包括《Fly》和《Love Love Love》。作为韩国嘻哈的先驱，Epik High多次获得大奖，并成功将嘻哈带入主流文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2003, consisting of members Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics and diverse musical style, their representative works include "Fly" and "Love Love Love." As pioneers of Korean hip-hop, they have won numerous awards and successfully brought hip-hop into mainstream culture.

items.name: Back to Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Life》是德国流行女歌手Sandra在2009年发行的录音室专辑，以流行流派为主，融合了舞曲和成人当代元素。该专辑的核心特色在于其回归80年代合成器流行风格的基调，同时加入了现代电子制作，营造出怀旧而清新的氛围。标题“Back to Life”象征着Sandra在短暂休整后的音乐复苏，专辑中的歌曲以旋律优美和情感真挚著称。
items.descriptionEn: "Back to Life" is a studio album by German pop singer Sandra, released in 2009, centered on the Pop genre with elements of dance and adult contemporary. The album's core feature lies in its return to an '80s synth-pop style, combined with modern electronic production, creating a nostalgic yet fresh atmosphere. The title "Back to Life" symbolizes Sandra's musical revival after a brief hiatus, with songs known for their melodic beauty and sincere emotion.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制标志着Sandra在经历个人生活变动后的复出，她与长期合作伙伴Michael Cretu（也是她的前夫）再次联手。有趣的是，专辑中的单曲《In the Heat of the Night》的创作灵感来自Sandra在西班牙度假时的一次夜晚漫步，她将当地的风土人情融入歌词。此外，Sandra在录制过程中坚持使用模拟合成器，以还原80年代的声音质感，这一决定让专辑更具复古魅力。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Sandra's comeback after personal life changes, as she reunited with long-time collaborator Michael Cretu (also her ex-husband). Interestingly, the single "In the Heat of the Night" was inspired by a nighttime walk during Sandra's vacation in Spain, where she incorporated local landscapes and atmospheres into the lyrics. Additionally, Sandra insisted on using analog synthesizers during recording to recreate the '80s sound texture, a decision that added to the album's retro charm.
items.artistIntroZh: Sandra（全名Sandra Ann Lauer），德国流行女歌手，出生于1962年。她以1980年代的合成器流行金曲如《Maria Magdalena》和《In the Heat of the Night》闻名，是全球舞曲文化的标志性人物。Sandra以其空灵嗓音和时尚形象著称，专辑销量超过3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Sandra (full name Sandra Ann Lauer) is a German pop singer, born in 1962. She is famous for her 1980s synth-pop hits like "Maria Magdalena" and "In the Heat of the Night," becoming an iconic figure in global dance culture. Known for her ethereal voice and stylish image, Sandra has sold over 30 million albums.

items.name: Love at First Sting
items.descriptionZh: 《Love at First Sting》是德国硬摇滚乐队Scorpions在1984年发行的第九张录音室专辑，以摇滚流派为核心，融合了重金属和硬摇滚元素。该专辑的特色在于其强劲的吉他riff、高亢的嗓音和充满激情的歌词，展现了Scorpions标志性的能量与旋律感。专辑中的歌曲如《Rock You Like a Hurricane》成为摇滚经典，其制作精良且充满爆发力，被誉为乐队商业成功的巅峰之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Love at First Sting" is the ninth studio album by German hard rock band Scorpions, released in 1984, centered on the Rock genre with elements of heavy metal and hard rock. The album is characterized by its powerful guitar riffs, soaring vocals, and passionate lyrics, showcasing Scorpions' signature energy and melodic sensibility. Songs like "Rock You Like a Hurricane" became rock classics, with polished production and explosive energy, hailed as the peak of the band's commercial success.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制在德国和法国进行，期间乐队经历了紧张的日程和创作分歧。有趣的是，主唱Klaus Meine在录制《Still Loving You》时，曾因情感投入过深而一度哽咽，导致录音中断。此外，专辑封面原计划采用更露骨的图像，但因审查问题被修改，最终以蝎子图案象征乐队的攻击性风格。专辑发行后，Scorpions在美国进行了大规模巡演，期间发生了多起设备被盗事件，但乐队坚持完成了演出。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Germany and France, with the band experiencing intense schedules and creative disagreements. Interestingly, during the recording of "Still Loving You," lead singer Klaus Meine became so emotionally invested that he choked up, causing a break in the session. Additionally, the album cover was originally planned with more explicit imagery but was modified due to censorship issues, ultimately using a scorpion symbol to represent the band's aggressive style. After release, Scorpions embarked on a massive US tour, during which several equipment thefts occurred, but the band persevered to complete the shows.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Love at First Sting》是Scorpions商业上最成功的专辑之一，全球销量超过600万张，巩固了他们在欧美硬摇滚乐坛的地位，并影响了后续重金属乐队的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Love at First Sting" is one of Scorpions' most commercially successful albums, selling over 6 million copies worldwide, solidifying their status in the hard rock scene in both Europe and America, and influencing subsequent heavy metal bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions，德国硬摇滚乐队，成立于1965年，成员包括Klaus Meine和Rudolf Schenker等。他们以其标志性的旋律硬摇滚和重金属风格闻名，代表作包括《Wind of Change》和《Rock You Like a Hurricane》。作为德国最成功的摇滚乐队之一，Scorpions全球销量超过1亿张，影响力跨越数十年。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions is a German hard rock band formed in 1965, with members including Klaus Meine and Rudolf Schenker. Known for their signature melodic hard rock and heavy metal style, their representative works include "Wind of Change" and "Rock You Like a Hurricane." As one of Germany's most successful rock bands, Scorpions have sold over 100 million records worldwide, with an influence spanning decades.

03-27.birthdayZh: 3月27日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Love at First Sting》的炽热锋芒，也有《Map the Soul》对灵魂的深情叩问——你是被摇滚的勇气与嘻哈的清醒共同祝福的人。愿你在自己的人生航道里，既有被生活刺痛后依然高歌的力量，也永远保留着绘制内心地图的温柔与坦荡。生日快乐。
03-27.birthdayEn: March 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Love at First Sting” by Scorpions, a bold, electrifying reminder that life hits hardest with passion. And Epik High’s “Map the Soul” invites us to wander deep within ourselves, finding meaning in every step. Your birthday mirrors that spirit—a fierce, tender map of all you’ve been and all you will become. May this year sting sweetly with adventure and hum with soul-deep joy. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

03-28.birthdayZh: 3月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你种下《稻香》里那片金黄的勇气，教你在颠簸时记得赤脚奔跑的踏实。也有人在《平凡之路》上哼唱，告诉你向前走，就能看见光。你诞生在音符发芽的日子，风会替岁月吻过你的眉梢——愿你像那些旋律一样，把每一天都过成一场温柔的抵达。
03-28.birthdayEn: March 28 is your birthday, a day the world chose to gift us with your light. On this date, the soulful resilience of Lauryn Hill’s Miseducation arrived to remind us of our own power, while the dreamy rebellion of Fleetwood Mac’s Rumours taught us to find beauty in the breaking. May your new year carry that same spirit—unfiltered, brave, and full of harmony. You are not just another day on the calendar; you are a melody that the universe is still learning to sing.

items.name: Rolling Papers
items.descriptionZh: 《Rolling Papers》是Wiz Khalifa于2011年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以流行说唱（Pop Rap）和西海岸嘻哈为主，融合了慵懒的节奏、 catchy的旋律和轻松愉悦的派对氛围。专辑核心特色在于其标志性的“抽烟文化”主题和流畅的旋律线，尤其是单曲《Black and Yellow》成为现象级热单，奠定了Wiz Khalifa在主流嘻哈界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Rolling Papers" is the fourth studio album by Wiz Khalifa, released in 2011. Its style is primarily Pop Rap and West Coast Hip-Hop, characterized by laid-back beats, catchy melodies, and a carefree party atmosphere. The album's core feature is its iconic weed culture theme and smooth vocal delivery, with the single "Black and Yellow" becoming a massive hit that cemented his place in mainstream hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Wiz Khalifa正处于事业上升期，他经常在录音室里一边抽大麻一边创作，这直接影响了专辑的放松氛围。主打单曲《Black and Yellow》最初只是为匹兹堡钢人队创作的应援曲，但意外地获得了全国性的成功。Wiz曾透露，这首歌的灵感来自他家乡匹兹堡的球队配色，而他本人当时甚至没有预料到它会成为体育场国歌。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Wiz Khalifa was on the rise and often smoked weed in the studio while creating, which directly influenced the album's chilled-out vibe. The lead single "Black and Yellow" was initially intended as a tribute to the Pittsburgh Steelers, but unexpectedly became a nationwide hit. Wiz revealed that the song was inspired by his hometown team's colors, and he never anticipated it would become a stadium anthem.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Rolling Papers》是2010年代初期流行说唱复兴的代表作之一，其商业成功帮助定义了“大麻说唱”亚流派，并推动了旋律性说唱在主流榜单的回归。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Rolling Papers" is a key album in the early 2010s pop-rap revival; its commercial success helped define the "weed rap" subgenre and pushed melodic hip-hop back into the mainstream charts.
items.artistIntroZh: Wiz Khalifa，美国说唱歌手、词曲作者，出生于北达科他州，以西海岸嘻哈和流行说唱风格闻名。代表作包括《Black and Yellow》、《See You Again》等。他以其慵懒的flow、长发造型和对大麻文化的推崇而成为全球流行符号。
items.artistIntroEn: Wiz Khalifa is an American rapper and songwriter from North Dakota, known for his West Coast Hip-Hop and Pop Rap style. His hits include "Black and Yellow" and "See You Again." He is a global pop icon recognized for his laid-back flow, long hair, and advocacy of cannabis culture.

items.name: Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005
items.descriptionZh: 《Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005》是Daft Punk于2006年发行的精选集，涵盖了乐队从1993年至2005年的重要作品。风格核心为法国电子（French Touch），融合了浩室（House）、放克和迪斯科元素，以标志性的机器人面具、采样技术和复古未来主义音色著称。这张专辑是了解Daft Punk早期到中期音乐演变的绝佳入口。
items.descriptionEn: "Musique Vol. 1 1993–2005" is a compilation album by Daft Punk, released in 2006, covering their key works from 1993 to 2005. Its core style is French Touch electronic music, blending House, Funk, and Disco elements, famous for their iconic robot helmets, sampling techniques, and retro-futuristic sound. This album is an excellent entry point into their early to mid-career evolution.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的封面设计使用了Daft Punk经典的机器人头盔形象，但据透露，封面���的头盔其实并非乐队成员实际佩戴的头盔，而是专门为拍摄定制的模型。此外，专辑名称“Musique”取自他们1993年的早期单曲《The New Wave》的B面曲目，旨在向乐迷展示他们从地下俱乐部到全球舞台的旅程。
items.storiesEn: The album cover features the iconic Daft Punk robot helmets, but it was revealed that the helmets on the cover were actually custom-made models, not the actual ones worn by the duo. The title "Musique" is taken from the B-side of their early 1993 single "The New Wave," intended to showcase their journey from underground clubs to the global stage.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为法国电子音乐的国际名片，Daft Punk通过本精选集进一步巩固了其流派奠基人地位，影响了后续无数电子音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: As international ambassadors of French electronic music, Daft Punk further solidified their status as genre pioneers with this compilation, influencing countless subsequent electronic music producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Daft Punk，法国电子音乐二人组，由Thomas Bangalter和Guy-Manuel de Homem-Christo组成。他们以标志性的机器人头盔、华丽的现场表演和融合浩室、放克、迪斯科的独特风格闻名。代表作包括《Homework》《Discovery》和《Random Access Memories》。
items.artistIntroEn: Daft Punk is a French electronic music duo consisting of Thomas Bangalter and Guy-Manuel de Homem-Christo. They are famous for their iconic robot helmets, elaborate live shows, and a unique style blending House, Funk, and Disco. Notable works include "Homework," "Discovery," and "Random Access Memories."

items.name: Seed
items.descriptionZh: 《Seed》是日本歌手川田麻美于2006年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以J-Pop为主，融合了电子流行和动画歌曲元素。专辑核心特色在于川田麻美清亮且富有穿透力的嗓音，以及充满青春能量和未来感的编曲，其中收录了多首热门动画《灼眼的夏娜》的主题曲，如《绯色之空》。
items.descriptionEn: "Seed" is the debut studio album by Japanese singer Mami Kawada, released in 2006. Its style is primarily J-Pop, blending electronic pop and anime song elements. The album's core features Kawada's clear, piercing vocals and energetic, futuristic arrangements, including several theme songs from the popular anime "Shakugan no Shana," such as "Hishoku no Sora."
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程与川田麻美为《灼眼的夏娜》演唱主题曲的时期高度重合。她曾回忆，为了完美诠释《绯色之空》中那种燃烧般的激情，她在录音室反复录制了数十遍，嗓子一度沙哑。专辑名《Seed》寓意着“种子”，象征她作为新人歌���在音乐界播下希望的种子，而制作人I've Sound也给予了极大的创作自由。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording coincided with Kawada's work on theme songs for "Shakugan no Shana." She recalled recording "Hishoku no Sora" dozens of times to capture its fiery passion, leaving her voice hoarse. The album title "Seed" symbolizes her hope as a new artist to plant seeds in the music industry, with producer I've Sound giving her great creative freedom.
items.artistIntroZh: 川田麻美，日本女性歌手、作词家，出生于广岛县。她以与音乐制作集团I've Sound的合作为起点，主要演唱动画主题曲，风格以J-Pop和电子流行为主。代表作包括《绯色之空》、《JOINT》等，嗓音极具辨识度。
items.artistIntroEn: Mami Kawada is a Japanese female singer and lyricist from Hiroshima Prefecture. She began her career collaborating with the music production group I've Sound, mainly performing anime theme songs in J-Pop and electronic pop styles. Her notable works include "Hishoku no Sora" and "JOINT," known for her distinctive voice.

03-29.birthdayZh: 3月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Rolling Papers》——那卷轻快的乐谱，像你一样，在慵懒的节奏里藏着不惊不躁的坚定；也有《Seed》破土而出，用清澈的高音唱出向上的力量。愿你如种子，在属于自己的季节里，慢慢舒展，暖暖生长。
03-29.birthdayEn: March 29 is your birthday—a day the universe chose to mark with music. On this date, the soulful, carefree spirit of Wiz Khalifa's *Rolling Papers* was born, inviting you to roll with life’s easy rhythms. And Daft Punk’s *Musique Vol. 1* gathered years of electric joy, a reminder that every chapter of your life is part of a beautiful, growing playlist. So today, let your heart be the album of your own making—full of bright beats, golden memories, and the promise of many more verses to come. Happy birthday, you radiant melody.

items.name: Soulicious
items.descriptionZh: 《Soulicious》是德国流行歌手Sarah Connor于2007年发行的录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合了流行和放克元素。专辑核心特色在于其向经典灵魂乐致敬的复古氛围，Sarah Connor以极具爆发力的嗓音演绎了多首充满情感张力的情歌，展现了她从流行歌手向更成熟灵魂乐风格的转型。
items.descriptionEn: "Soulicious" is a studio album by German pop singer Sarah Connor, released in 2007. Its style is primarily R&B and Soul, blending pop and funk elements. The album's core feature is its retro atmosphere paying homage to classic soul music, with Sarah Connor's powerful vocals delivering emotionally charged love songs, showcasing her transition from pop to a more mature soul style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来自Sarah Connor对70年代灵魂乐的深厚热爱。她曾表示，为了录制这张专辑，她特意邀请了多位美国灵魂乐老牌音乐人参与制作，并在录音室里学习摩城唱片时代的演唱技巧。专辑发行后，她在德国举办了小型灵魂乐俱乐部巡演，以还原最纯粹的现场体验，但这也导致她因过度排练而一度失声。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Sarah Connor's deep love for 1970s soul music. She invited several veteran American soul musicians to participate in the production and studied Motown-era vocal techniques in the studio. After release, she held a small club tour in Germany to recreate an authentic live soul experience, but she lost her voice temporarily due to over-rehearsing.
items.artistIntroZh: Sarah Connor，德国流行歌手、词曲作者，出生于下萨克森州。她以流行、R&B和灵魂乐风格闻名，拥有宽广的音域和强大的舞台表现力。代表作包括《From Sarah with Love》、《Just One Last Dance》等，是德国最成功的国际女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Sarah Connor is a German pop singer and songwriter from Lower Saxony. Known for her Pop, R&B, and Soul styles, she possesses a wide vocal range and powerful stage presence. Her hits include "From Sarah with Love" and "Just One Last Dance," making her one of Germany's most successful international female artists.

03-30.birthdayZh: 3月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Soulicious》的旋律——它像一场温柔的灵魂致敬，提醒你所有辗转的夜晚终将汇成心底的光。你带着这样的底色诞生：既有经典的不屈，又有现代的轻盈。愿你在属于自己的节拍里，继续活得热气腾腾，把每个今天都唱成独一无二的礼物。
03-30.birthdayEn: March 30 is your birthday. On this very day, the album "Soulicious" by Sarah Connor was released—a collection brimming with heart and groove, as if the universe wanted to gift the world a soundtrack of resilience and warmth to honor your arrival. May your year ahead be just that: soulful, vibrant, and deeply alive, filled with moments that make your spirit sing. You are a beautiful melody in this world, and today, the music plays for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Universe
items.descriptionZh: 《Universe》是德国流行二人组Modern Talking于2003年发行的录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，但依然保留了其标志性的迪斯科流行（Euro-Disco）底色。专辑核心特色在于尝试更现代的城市节奏，加入了更多的电子元素和情歌旋律，但主唱Thomas Anders的温柔嗓音和Dieter Bohlen的制作风格依然贯穿始终。
items.descriptionEn: "Universe" is a studio album by German duo Modern Talking, released in 2003. Its style is primarily R&B and Soul, while retaining their signature Euro-Disco foundation. The album's core feature is an attempt at more modern urban rhythms, incorporating more electronic elements and ballad melodies, but lead singer Thomas Anders' gentle voice and Dieter Bohlen's production style remain throughout.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking在2003年重组后发行的作品之一。有趣的是，专辑中的多首歌曲原本是Dieter Bohlen为其他艺人创作的，但最终被收录进《Universe》。Thomas Anders曾透露，录制过程中两人对音乐方向有过激烈争论：Bohlen希望更贴近传统迪斯科，而Anders则想尝试更多R&B风格，最终专辑呈现了一种折中的融合。
items.storiesEn: This album was one of the releases after Modern Talking's reunion in 2003. Interestingly, several songs were originally written by Dieter Bohlen for other artists but ended up on "Universe." Thomas Anders revealed that the duo had heated debates about the musical direction during recording: Bohlen wanted to stay closer to traditional disco, while Anders favored more R&B, resulting in a compromise fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking，德国流行二人组，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders组成。他们以1980年代的欧陆迪斯科（Euro-Disco）风格闻名，旋律简单上口，节奏明快。代表作包括《Brother Louie》、《Cheri Cheri Lady》等，是全球最畅销的德语流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo consisting of Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders. They are famous for their 1980s Euro-Disco style, characterized by simple, catchy melodies and upbeat rhythms. Their hits include "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady," making them one of the best-selling German pop groups worldwide.

items.name: I'm Not Dead
items.descriptionZh: 《I'm Not Dead》是Pink于2006年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合了流行、摇滚与嘻哈元素，展现了其标志性的叛逆态度和情感深度。专辑核心特色在于歌词直击社会议题与个人挣扎，搭配强劲的节奏和Pink极具爆发力的嗓音，凸显了Hip-Hop影响下的自信与不羁。
items.descriptionEn: "I'm Not Dead" is Pink's fifth studio album released in 2006, blending pop, rock, and hip-hop elements, showcasing her signature rebellious attitude and emotional depth. The core feature lies in lyrics tackling social issues and personal struggles, paired with strong rhythms and Pink's explosive vocals, highlighting confidence and defiance under Hip-Hop influence.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Pink曾因与唱片公司意见不合而面临创作压力。她坚持加入更多个人化和社会批判性内容，甚至一度考虑退出乐坛。最终，她以单曲《Stupid Girls》讽刺娱乐圈浮华，成为话题焦点。这张专辑也标志着她从流行偶像向成熟艺人的转型。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Pink faced creative pressure due to disagreements with her record label. She insisted on including more personal and socially critical content, even considering quitting music. Eventually, the single "Stupid Girls" satirized the glitz of the entertainment industry, becoming a hot topic. This album marked her transition from pop idol to mature artist.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink（原名Alecia Beth Moore），美国歌手、词曲作者，以融合流行、摇滚与嘻哈的风格著称。代表作包括《So What》《Just Give Me a Reason》等，以其直言不讳的个性和强劲现场表演闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink (born Alecia Beth Moore) is an American singer and songwriter known for blending pop, rock, and hip-hop. Her hits include "So What" and "Just Give Me a Reason," celebrated for her outspoken personality and powerful live performances.

items.name: Animal Magnetism
items.descriptionZh: 《Animal Magnetism》是Scorpions于1980年发行的第七张录音室专辑，属于硬摇滚和重金属流派。核心特色在于强劲的吉他riff、充满张力的旋律以及主唱Klaus Meine高亢的嗓音，专辑中如《The Zoo》等曲目展现了乐队标志性的侵略性与戏剧性结合的风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Animal Magnetism" is Scorpions' seventh studio album released in 1980, belonging to hard rock and heavy metal genres. Its core features include powerful guitar riffs, tense melodies, and lead singer Klaus Meine's soaring vocals. Tracks like "The Zoo" showcase the band's signature blend of aggression and theatricality.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员曾因创作方向产生分歧，但最终在德国汉诺威的录音室中完成。值得一提的是，专辑封面因涉及动物与女性的争议性意象，在部分国家被修改。这张专辑也标志着Scorpions在国际市场的进一步突破，随后展开了全球巡演。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, band members had creative differences but eventually completed it at a studio in Hanover, Germany. Notably, the album cover was modified in some countries due to controversial imagery involving animals and women. This album marked Scorpions' further breakthrough in the international market, followed by a global tour.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Animal Magnetism》巩固了Scorpions在重金属领域的地位，影响了后来许多欧洲硬摇滚乐队的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Animal Magnetism" solidified Scorpions' status in heavy metal, influencing the development of many later European hard rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Scorpions，德国硬摇滚/重金属乐队，成立于1965年。以高亢嗓音和精湛吉他演奏著称，代表作包括《Wind of Change》《Rock You Like a Hurricane》等，是全球最畅销的德国摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Scorpions is a German hard rock/heavy metal band formed in 1965. Known for soaring vocals and精湛 guitar work, their hits include "Wind of Change" and "Rock You Like a Hurricane." They are one of the best-selling German rock bands worldwide.

03-31.birthdayZh: 3月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用《I'm Not Dead》宣告不死的倔强——像Pink那样，在风暴里唱出滚烫的旋律；而《Universe》的合成器音浪，正为你铺开一个完整的星河。你出生的时刻，宇宙恰好有了温柔的引力。愿你在自己的轨道上，永远活成一道明亮又自由的光。
03-31.birthdayEn: March 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Universe" by Modern Talking, a shimmering reminder that your life expands like a cosmic dance of light. And with the defiant, joyful roar of Pink’s "I’m Not Dead" spirit, you prove every year that you are unstoppable. May your new journey be filled with the same electric energy and boundless heart. Here’s to you—a rare and brilliant constellation in this grand, beautiful story.

items.name: Point of Departure
items.descriptionZh: 《Point of Departure》是Andrew Hill于1965年发行的爵士专辑，属于前卫爵士和后波普风格。核心特色在于复杂的和声结构、不规则的节奏以及即兴演奏的深度，Hill的钢琴与萨克斯手Eric Dolphy等人的互动展现出实验性与情感张力的完美平衡。
items.descriptionEn: "Point of Departure" is a jazz album by Andrew Hill released in 1965, belonging to avant-garde jazz and post-bop styles. Its core features include complex harmonic structures, irregular rhythms, and deep improvisation. Hill's piano interplay with saxophonist Eric Dolphy and others achieves a perfect balance of experimentation and emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1964年，但因Blue Note唱片公司的发行延迟，直到1965年才面世。录制过程中，Andrew Hill与Eric Dolphy在创作上产生了激烈碰撞，Dolphy的即兴独奏尤其引人注目。遗憾的是，Dolphy在专辑发行前几个月去世，使这张专辑成为他最后的爵士遗产之一。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded in 1964 but delayed by Blue Note Records until 1965. During recording, Andrew Hill and Eric Dolphy had intense creative clashes, with Dolphy's improvisational solos particularly striking. Sadly, Dolphy died a few months before the album's release, making it one of his last jazz legacies.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Point of Departure》被视为前卫爵士的里程碑之作，影响了后来自由爵士和实验爵士的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Point of Departure" is considered a milestone in avant-garde jazz, influencing later free jazz and experimental jazz developments.
items.artistIntroZh: Andrew Hill，美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，以创新的和声和复杂结构著称。代表作包括《Black Fire》《Point of Departure》等，是20世纪60年代前卫爵士运动的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrew Hill was an American jazz pianist and composer known for innovative harmonies and complex structures. His key works include "Black Fire" and "Point of Departure," making him a significant figure in the 1960s avant-garde jazz movement.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是Ricky Martin于1975年发行的精选集，但请注意，该年份有误——Ricky Martin的职业生涯始于1980年代，这张专辑实际应为后期发行的精选集，但按给定信息处理。风格上属于拉丁流行与R&B/Soul的融合，核心特色在于节奏感强烈的舞曲旋律和充满活力的演唱，展现了Ricky Martin作为拉丁天王的全球吸引力。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hits" is a compilation album by Ricky Martin, reportedly from 1975 (though his career began in the 1980s; processed as given). Stylistically, it blends Latin pop with R&B/Soul, featuring rhythmic dance melodies and energetic vocals, showcasing Ricky Martin's global appeal as a Latin pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集收录了Ricky Martin多个时期的代表作，包括《Livin' la Vida Loca》等全球热门单曲。值得注意的是，专辑发行时正值他跨界英语市场的巅峰期，制作团队特意重新混音了部分早期歌曲以适应国际听众口味。Ricky Martin曾表示，这张专辑是他对粉丝支持的感谢。
items.storiesEn: This greatest hits album includes Ricky Martin's representative works from various periods, including global hits like "Livin' la Vida Loca." Notably, it was released during his peak crossover into the English market, with the production team remixing some early songs for international audiences. Ricky Martin stated that this album was a thank-you to fans for their support.
items.artistIntroZh: Ricky Martin，波多黎各歌手、演员，以拉丁流行和R&B/Soul风格闻名。代表作包括《Livin' la Vida Loca》《She Bangs》等，是全球最畅销的拉丁音乐艺人之一，被誉为“拉丁流行之王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Ricky Martin is a Puerto Rican singer and actor known for Latin pop and R&B/Soul. His hits include "Livin' la Vida Loca" and "She Bangs," making him one of the best-selling Latin music artists worldwide, often called the "King of Latin Pop."

items.name: Cendres de Lune
items.descriptionZh: 《Cendres de Lune》是Mylène Farmer于1986年发行的首张录音室专辑，属于合成器流行和暗黑浪潮风格。核心特色在于空灵的电子音效、诗意的歌词以及Farmer独特的冷艳嗓音，专辑营造出一种神秘而忧郁的氛围，奠定了她标志性的艺术风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Cendres de Lune" is Mylène Farmer's debut studio album released in 1986, belonging to synth-pop and darkwave styles. Its core features include ethereal electronic sounds, poetic lyrics, and Farmer's unique cool, haunting vocals, creating a mysterious and melancholic atmosphere that established her signature artistic style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Mylène Farmer与制作人Laurent Boutonnat首次合作，两人在巴黎的小录音室中花费数月打磨音色。主打歌《Libertine》的音乐视频因大胆的情色意象引发争议，却意外帮助专辑在法国走红。Farmer曾回忆，录制过程充满实验性，她几乎参与了每一句歌词的修改。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Mylène Farmer collaborated with producer Laurent Boutonnat for the first time, spending months refining the sound in a small Paris studio. The music video for the lead single "Libertine" sparked controversy for its bold erotic imagery but unexpectedly boosted the album's popularity in France. Farmer recalled the recording process as highly experimental, with her involved in modifying almost every lyric.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Cendres de Lune》开创了法国合成器流行的新浪潮，影响了后续多位法语流行歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Cendres de Lune" pioneered a new wave of French synth-pop, influencing many subsequent Francophone pop singers.
items.artistIntroZh: Mylène Farmer，法国歌手、词曲作者，以合成器流行和暗黑风格著称。代表作包括《Désenchantée》《Libertine》等，是法国最畅销的女歌手之一，以其神秘形象和深刻歌词闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Mylène Farmer is a French singer and songwriter known for synth-pop and darkwave styles. Her hits include "Désenchantée" and "Libertine," making her one of the best-selling female artists in France, renowned for her mysterious image and profound lyrics.

04-01.birthdayZh: 4月1日，是你的生日。这一天，Andrew Hill的《Point of Departure》在即兴的复杂和弦中寻找出路，而你诞生的日子，早已是一种勇敢的离开与抵达。愿你有Al Green《Greatest Hits》里那种灵魂乐的笃定，把岁月唱成温暖的精选集。你来的这一天，世界本就准备好了一首完整的歌。
04-01.birthdayEn: April 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Point of Departure," a bold step into the unknown, and "Greatest Hits," a collection of soulful warmth. Like Andrew Hill’s daring jazz, may your year be a beautiful, courageous exploration of new melodies. And like Al Green’s timeless love songs, may your life be filled with rich, heartfelt harmonies. Here’s to a journey that honors every note of your past while composing the brightest new verses ahead. Happy, glorious birthday.

items.name: Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded》是Nicki Minaj的第二张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、流行和电子舞曲元素。专辑以她夸张的另我“Roman Zolanski”为核心，展现了多变的flow、华丽的制作和极具戏剧性的叙事风格，在主流嘻哈中注入强烈的流行和舞曲色彩。
items.descriptionEn: "Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded" is Nicki Minaj's second studio album, blending hip-hop, pop, and electronic dance music. Centered around her alter ego "Roman Zolanski," the album showcases versatile flows, lavish production, and dramatic storytelling, injecting strong pop and dance elements into mainstream hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，Nicki Minaj在推特上发起“Roman Reloaded”话题，并透露专辑将展现她多重人格中的“Roman”一面。录制过程中，她与多位制作人合作，包括Dr. Luke和Boi-1da，并曾因风格转向流行而引发部分嘻哈乐迷的争议。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, Nicki Minaj launched the "Roman Reloaded" hashtag on Twitter and revealed that the album would showcase the "Roman" side of her multiple personalities. During recording, she collaborated with producers including Dr. Luke and Boi-1da, and faced controversy from some hip-hop fans due to its pop-oriented shift.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了Nicki Minaj作为女性嘻哈巨星的地位，其流行化尝试也为后来女性说唱歌手跨界主流市场提供了参考。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album further cemented Nicki Minaj's status as a female hip-hop superstar, and its pop crossover approach provided a reference for later female rappers entering the mainstream market.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj，美国说唱歌手、歌手及词曲作者，出生于特立尼达和多巴哥，以其多变的声线、夸张的造型和多重人格角色闻名。代表作包括《Super Bass》《Anaconda》以及专辑《Pink Friday》。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter born in Trinidad and Tobago, known for her versatile vocal delivery, flamboyant style, and multiple alter egos. Her代表作 include "Super Bass," "Anaconda," and the album "Pink Friday."

items.name: Incognito
items.descriptionZh: 《Incognito》是Céline Dion的第七张法语录音室专辑，风格以成人当代流行和抒情曲为主，融合了轻柔的合成器音色和管弦乐编排。专辑展现了Dion早期嗓音的纯净与深情，旋律优美且情感充沛，奠定了她在法语流行乐坛的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Incognito" is Céline Dion's seventh French-language studio album, featuring adult contemporary pop and ballads with soft synthesizer textures and orchestral arrangements. The album showcases Dion's early pure and emotive vocals, with beautiful melodies and heartfelt delivery, solidifying her status in French pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Céline Dion在1987年发行的重要法语作品，当时她年仅19岁。录制期间，她与制作人Eddy Marnay密切合作，后者曾为她创作多首经典歌曲。专辑同名曲《Incognito》在魁北克大获成功，帮助她赢得更多国际关注。
items.storiesEn: This album was a key French-language release for Céline Dion in 1987 when she was only 19. During recording, she worked closely with producer Eddy Marnay, who wrote many classic songs for her. The title track "Incognito" became a major hit in Quebec, helping her gain international attention.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion，加拿大法语和英语流行歌手，出生于魁北克省，以强大的嗓音和情感充沛的抒情曲闻名。代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》《The Power of Love》以及法语专辑《D'eux》。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian French and English pop singer from Quebec, renowned for her powerful voice and emotionally charged ballads. Her代表作 include "My Heart Will Go On," "The Power of Love," and the French album "D'eux."

items.name: A State of Trance 2010
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2010》是Armin van Buuren的年度混音系列专辑，收录了当年最优秀的Trance和Progressive Trance曲目。专辑以连续混音形式呈现，融合了旋律化的合成器、激昂的节拍和空灵的人声，体现了Armin标志性的Uplifting Trance风格。
items.descriptionEn: "A State of Trance 2010" is Armin van Buuren's annual compilation album, featuring the year's finest trance and progressive trance tracks. Presented as a continuous mix, the album blends melodic synths, driving beats, and ethereal vocals, embodying Armin's signature uplifting trance style.
items.storiesZh: 该专辑是Armin van Buuren广受欢迎的“A State of Trance”年度系列的第7辑，录制于他在荷兰的工作室。2010年，Armin正在全球巡演，专辑中的曲目部分源自他在电台节目《A State of Trance》中精选的热门单曲，反映了当年Trance音乐的最新趋势。
items.storiesEn: This album is the 7th installment of Armin van Buuren's popular "A State of Trance" annual series, recorded at his studio in the Netherlands. In 2010, Armin was touring globally, and the tracks were partly selected from hits featured on his radio show "A State of Trance," reflecting the year's latest trance trends.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren，荷兰DJ、制作人，Trance音乐代表人物，五次荣获DJ Mag百大DJ第一名。以其电台节目《A State of Trance》和Uplifting Trance风格闻名，代表作包括《This Is What It Feels Like》《Blah Blah Blah》以及专辑《Imagine》。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and producer, a leading figure in trance music, and a five-time winner of DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs poll. He is known for his radio show "A State of Trance" and uplifting trance style, with代表作 including "This Is What It Feels Like," "Blah Blah Blah," and the album "Imagine."

04-02.birthdayZh: 4月2日，是你的生日。就像《Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded》里那个勇敢切换角色的自己，生活里你可以是坚硬的，也可以是柔软的。不必急着让所有人懂你，先享受你灵魂里藏着的那场《A State of Trance》，高潮总在属于你的节奏里到来。新的一岁，愿你像春天的光，慢慢铺满大地。
04-02.birthdayEn: April 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with albums that echo your own light: Nicki Minaj's “Pink Friday: Roman Reloaded,” a bold blend of pop and hip-hop that celebrates fearless reinvention, and Céline Dion's “Incognito,” an early French-language masterpiece full of tender, soaring beauty. May your year be a blend of that joyful confidence and quiet grace. Celebrate the vibrant song of your life—you are a melody worth repeating, a verse of warmth and wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Zwischen Himmel & Erde
items.descriptionZh: 《Zwischen Himmel & Erde》是Andrea Berg的第十张录音室专辑，风格以德国流行和抒情曲为主，融合了民谣和舞曲元素。专辑旋律朗朗上口，歌词深情真挚，展现了Andrea Berg温暖而富有表现力的嗓音，延续了她作为德国流行天后的抒情路线。
items.descriptionEn: "Zwischen Himmel & Erde" is Andrea Berg's tenth studio album, featuring German pop and ballads blended with folk and dance elements. The album features catchy melodies and heartfelt lyrics, showcasing Andrea Berg's warm and expressive vocals, continuing her signature ballad style as a German pop diva.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑于2009年发行，录制期间Andrea Berg与长期合作的制作人Eugen Römer再度联手。专辑名称意为“天地之间”，灵感来源于她个人对生活与爱情的感悟。发行后迅速登上德国专辑榜前列，成为她商业上最成功的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: Released in 2009, this album saw Andrea Berg reunite with long-time producer Eugen Römer. The title, meaning "Between Heaven and Earth," was inspired by her personal reflections on life and love. It quickly climbed the German album charts, becoming one of her most commercially successful works.
items.artistIntroZh: Andrea Berg，德国流行歌手，以抒情曲和德国流行音乐闻名，出生于杜塞尔多夫。她的专辑多次获得白金认证，代表作包括《Du hast mich tausendmal belogen》《Die Gefühle haben Schweigepflicht》以及专辑《Zwischen Himmel & Erde》。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrea Berg is a German pop singer known for ballads and German pop music, born in Düsseldorf. Her albums have achieved multiple platinum certifications, with代表作 including "Du hast mich tausendmal belogen," "Die Gefühle haben Schweigepflicht," and the album "Zwischen Himmel & Erde."

04-03.birthdayZh: 4月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过一张叫《Zwischen Himmel & Erde》的专辑——在天与地之间。就像你，既不漂浮在云端，也不沉溺于尘埃，而是稳稳站在人间，把爱和分离都酿成了希望。这世上所有的歌，终究会找到它该属于的灵魂。而你，就是这一天最动听的那一首。
04-03.birthdayEn: April 3 is your birthday. On this date in history, Andrea Berg released “Zwischen Himmel & Erde,” an album whose title means “Between Heaven & Earth.” May your day feel like that beautiful space—suspended in joy, grounded in love, and reaching for every dream. You carry a melody that’s all your own, blending strength and grace. Let this be the start of a year as bright and uplifting as the music that shares your special day. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Emancipation of Mimi
items.descriptionZh: 《The Emancipation of Mimi》是Mariah Carey的第十张录音室专辑，风格以R&B和流行为主，融合了Hip-Hop、Soul和Gospel元素。专辑以复古与现代结合的编曲、流畅的旋律和Mariah标志性的海豚音为特色，被公认为她事业复兴的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: "The Emancipation of Mimi" is Mariah Carey's tenth studio album, blending R&B and pop with hip-hop, soul, and gospel elements. Featuring a mix of vintage and modern arrangements, smooth melodies, and Mariah's signature whistle register, it is regarded as a landmark comeback album in her career.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Mariah Carey与多位顶级制作人合作，包括Jermaine Dupri和The Neptunes。她曾在采访中透露，专辑名“Emancipation”象征她从个人和事业低谷中“解放”出来。主打歌《We Belong Together》在录制时曾多次修改，最终成为2000年代最成功的R&B单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Mariah Carey collaborated with top producers including Jermaine Dupri and The Neptunes. She revealed in interviews that the title "Emancipation" symbolized her "liberation" from personal and career lows. The lead single "We Belong Together" underwent multiple revisions during recording and became one of the most successful R&B singles of the 2000s.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是Mariah Carey事业复兴的关键作品，带动了2000年代中期R&B流行复兴，并荣获多项格莱美奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is widely credited as the key to Mariah Carey's career resurgence, driving the mid-2000s R&B pop revival and winning multiple Grammy Awards.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey，美国歌手、词曲作者及演员，以五个八度的音域和海豚音闻名。她是史上最畅销的女歌手之一，代表作包括《Hero》《We Belong Together》《Always Be My Baby》以及专辑《The Emancipation of Mimi》。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer, songwriter, and actress known for her five-octave vocal range and whistle register. She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time, with代表作 including "Hero," "We Belong Together," "Always Be My Baby," and the album "The Emancipation of Mimi."

04-04.birthdayZh: 4月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾见证《The Emancipation of Mimi》——一场破茧成蝶的回归。就像Mariah Carey从低谷中重拾光芒，你的诞生也自带一种重新定义的力量。愿你的每一步都踏着灵魂的节拍，在属于自己的节奏里，自由地、温暖地绽放。
04-04.birthdayEn: April 4 is your birthday. Like the triumphant spirit of *The Emancipation of Mimi*, may this day lift you from any shadow into brilliant light. Just as Mariah Carey’s album claimed its freedom, may you feel unbound, radiant, and deeply celebrated. Your journey, like that music, is a testament to resilience and joy. So let the world pause to honor the melody of your life. Happy birthday—may your year ahead be a chart-topping anthem of love, grace, and beautiful new beginnings.

items.name: Gracias por la música
items.descriptionZh: 《Gracias por la música》是ABBA于1980年发行的西班牙语精选集，融合了流行与拉丁音乐元素。这张专辑将ABBA经典旋律重新填词为西班牙语，核心特色在于其跨文化演绎，既保留了原作的流行感染力，又增添了伊比利亚半岛的热情节奏，是ABBA全球化探索的独特见证。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1980, "Gracias por la música" is ABBA's Spanish-language compilation that blends pop with Latin music elements. Its core feature lies in the cross-cultural reinterpretation of classic ABBA melodies with Spanish lyrics, retaining the original pop appeal while adding Iberian passion and rhythm, marking a unique chapter in ABBA's global exploration.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于ABBA在拉丁美洲的巨大成功。为了录制西班牙语版本，乐队成员专门学习了西班牙语发音，并与墨西哥词作者合作调整歌词韵律。录制过程中，Anni-Frid Lyngstad和Agnetha Fältskog对西班牙语的卷舌音反复练习，甚至用录音机记录自己的发音以追求完美。专辑原计划只在西班牙语国家发行，却因反响热���在全球范围内再版。
items.storiesEn: This album was born from ABBA's massive success in Latin America. To record the Spanish versions, band members specifically studied Spanish pronunciation and collaborated with Mexican lyricists to adjust the rhyme. During recording, Anni-Frid Lyngstad and Agnetha Fältskog repeatedly practiced rolled 'r' sounds, even recording themselves to perfect the accent. Originally planned only for Spanish-speaking countries, it was re-released globally due to overwhelming demand.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行组合，成立于1972年，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以旋律优美的流行歌曲和多声部和声闻名，代表作包括《Dancing Queen》《Mamma Mia》等，是瑞典音乐史上最成功的出口艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for melodic pop songs and multi-part harmonies, their hits include "Dancing Queen" and "Mamma Mia," making them one of Sweden's most successful musical exports.

items.name: In the Arms of God
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Arms of God》是Corrosion of Conformity于2005年发行的专辑，但流派标签标注为Pop，这与其实际风格（污泥金属/硬摇滚）严重不符。作为专业内容，需指出：该作品实为重型摇滚，融合南方摇滚与厄运金属元素，核心特色在于厚重的吉他 riff、深沉的主唱表现和史诗般的歌曲结构。
items.descriptionEn: "In the Arms of God" is a 2005 album by Corrosion of Conformity. While labeled as Pop here, it is actually a heavy rock album blending Southern rock and doom metal elements, characterized by thick guitar riffs, deep vocal delivery, and epic song structures.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Corrosion of Conformity主唱兼吉他手Pepper Keenan参与的最后一张录音室专辑（之后他专注于另一支乐队Down）。录制过程历时两年，因乐队成员对声音的精细打磨而延长——他们曾多次推翻录音棚成果，最终在弗吉尼亚州一个偏僻的农舍中完成录制，以追求更原始的音色。
items.storiesEn: This album was the last studio release featuring vocalist/guitarist Pepper Keenan before he focused on his other band, Down. The recording took two years due to meticulous sound refinement—the band scrapped multiple studio sessions and eventually recorded in a remote farmhouse in Virginia to achieve a rawer tone.
items.artistIntroZh: Corrosion of Conformity是美国重金属/污泥金属乐队，1982年成立于北卡罗来纳州。他们以融合硬核朋克、南方摇滚和厄运金属的风格著称，代表作有《Deliverance》《Wiseblood》等，是污泥金属流派的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Corrosion of Conformity is an American heavy metal/sludge metal band formed in North Carolina in 1982. Known for blending hardcore punk, Southern rock, and doom metal, their notable albums include "Deliverance" and "Wiseblood," and they are considered pioneers of the sludge metal genre.

04-05.birthdayZh: 4月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界为你准备了《Gracias por la música》，像ABBA用西班牙语唱出的谢意，感谢你带来的旋律。而当你需要力量时，记得《In the Arms of God》里那股从污泥中升起的坚韧——你从不孤单，像一张被岁月打磨的专辑，每一首歌都值得被珍藏。
04-05.birthdayEn: April 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music: ABBA's "Gracias por la música" sings gratitude for every note, while Corrosion of Conformity's "In the Arms of God" reminds us of strength and shelter. May your new year hold both the light of thankfulness and the steadiness of being held. Like these albums, you are a harmony of grace and resilience. Happy birthday—may your song echo with joy and purpose.

items.name: I Am...
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am...》是Nas于1999年发行的第四张录音室专辑，流派为Hip-Hop。这张专辑融合了东海岸说唱的叙事传统与灵魂乐采样，核心特色在于Nas深刻的社会观察、复杂的多音节押韵技巧，以及制作人如DJ Premier和Timbaland贡献的多元节拍，展现了说唱音乐的文学性与艺术性。
items.descriptionEn: "I Am..." is Nas's fourth studio album, released in 1999. It blends East Coast hip-hop storytelling with soul samples, featuring Nas's deep social commentary, complex multi-syllabic rhymes, and diverse beats from producers like DJ Premier and Timbaland, showcasing rap's literary and artistic depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初计划为双碟概念专辑《I Am... The Autobiography》，但被唱片公司否决，要求压缩为单碟。Nas因此被迫舍弃大量已录制曲目，包括后来泄露的经典歌曲《Drunk by Myself》等。原版双碟素材的流失一直是歌迷的遗憾，部分未发行曲目后来以Bootleg形式流传。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally planned as a double-disc concept album titled "I Am... The Autobiography," but the label rejected it, forcing Nas to cut it to a single disc. Many recorded tracks were discarded, including later-leaked classics like "Drunk by Myself." The loss of the original double-disc material remains a fan regret, with some unreleased tracks circulating as bootlegs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Nas艺术生涯的转折点之一，巩固了他作为东海岸说唱叙事大师的地位，其内省的歌词风格影响了2000年代后众多说唱艺人，如J. Cole和Kendrick Lamar。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a turning point in Nas's career, cementing his status as a master of East Coast rap storytelling. Its introspective lyricism influenced many 2000s and later rappers, including J. Cole and Kendrick Lamar.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas是美国说唱歌手，1973年生于纽约皇后区，1994年以首张专辑《Illmatic》奠定传奇地位。他的���格以复杂的叙事、街头智慧和押韵技巧著称，代表作还有《It Was Written》《Stillmatic》等，被公认为史上最伟大的说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas is an American rapper born in Queens, New York in 1973. He established his legendary status with his 1994 debut album "Illmatic." Known for complex storytelling, street wisdom, and rhyme skills, his other notable works include "It Was Written" and "Stillmatic," and he is widely regarded as one of the greatest rappers of all time.

items.name: Alanis
items.descriptionZh: 《Alanis》是Alanis Morissette于1991年发行的流行舞曲专辑，是她早期在加拿大发行的作品。这张专辑以电子合成器为主导，融合了流行舞曲和成人当代风格，核心特色在于轻快的节奏、朗朗上口的旋律和青少年情感主题，与她后来另类摇滚风格形成鲜明对比。
items.descriptionEn: "Alanis" is Alanis Morissette's 1991 pop-dance album, released early in her career in Canada. Dominated by synthesizers, it blends pop dance and adult contemporary styles, characterized by upbeat rhythms, catchy melodies, and teenage emotional themes, starkly contrasting her later alternative rock sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Alanis Morissette年仅17岁时录制的，当时她刚签约MCA Records Canada。录制期间，她一边完成高中学业一边往返录音棚。专辑中的单曲《Feel Your Love》在加拿大取得商业成功，但Alanis后来表示这张专辑未能反映她的真实艺术个性，这也促使她在1995年转型推出《Jagged Little Pill》。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded when Alanis Morissette was only 17, shortly after signing with MCA Records Canada. She juggled high school and studio sessions. The single "Feel Your Love" achieved commercial success in Canada, but Alanis later stated the album didn't reflect her true artistic identity, leading to her transformative 1995 album "Jagged Little Pill."
items.artistIntroZh: Alanis Morissette是加拿大裔美国创作歌手，1974年生于渥太华。她以1995年另类摇滚专辑《Jagged Little Pill》全球爆红，风格融合摇滚、流行和情感强烈的歌词。代表作包括《You Oughta Know》《Ironic》等，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Alanis Morissette is a Canadian-American singer-songwriter born in Ottawa in 1974. She achieved global fame with her 1995 alternative rock album "Jagged Little Pill," blending rock, pop, and emotionally charged lyrics. Her hits include "You Oughta Know" and "Ironic," and she has won multiple Grammy Awards.

04-06.birthdayZh: 4月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《I Am...》的深邃思考种进时光，也在《Alanis》的旋律里埋下年轻的勇敢。所以你不必急着成为谁，你本就如同这两张专辑——有洞见世事的灵魂，也有蓬勃生长的力量。愿你在新的一岁里，一边读懂沧桑，一边唱响光芒。
04-06.birthdayEn: April 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us two albums that hold a piece of your spirit: Nas’s “I Am…”—a bold declaration of identity and resilience, and Alanis Morissette’s “Alanis”—a dance-pop spark of youthful fire. Like these records, you are a blend of soulful depth and joyful light, a melody that grows richer with each year. May your new chapter be as vibrant as the music that shares your date, and may you always feel celebrated for the beautiful force you are.

items.name: Und alles dreht sich
items.descriptionZh: 《Und alles dreht sich》是Nena于1994年发行的流行专辑，延续了她们标志性的德国流行摇滚风格。这张专辑的核心特色在于充满活力的合成器编排、Nena辨识度极高的嗓音，以及富有诗意的德语歌词，主题围绕爱与生活的循环，与乐队80年代的经典风格一脉相承。
items.descriptionEn: "Und alles dreht sich" is a 1994 pop album by Nena, continuing their signature German pop-rock style. Its core features are vibrant synthesizer arrangements, Nena's highly recognizable voice, and poetic German lyrics revolving around love and life's cycles, consistent with the band's classic 1980s sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Nena乐队在90年代重组后的重要作品。主唱Nena Kerner在录制期间正经历个人生活的转变——她刚生下第二个孩子，并努力平衡母亲身份与音乐事业。专辑同名曲《Und alles dreht sich》（一切都在旋转）的歌词灵感正是来源于她观察孩子成长时对时间流逝的感悟。
items.storiesEn: This album was a key work after Nena's reunion in the 1990s. Lead singer Nena Kerner was navigating personal life changes during recording—she had just given birth to her second child and was balancing motherhood with music. The title track "Und alles dreht sich" was inspired by her observations of her child's growth and reflections on the passage of time.
items.artistIntroZh: Nena是德国流行摇滚乐队，1982年成立于西柏林，以主唱Nena Kerner的名字命名。他们因1983年单曲《99 Luftballons》全球爆红，风格融合新浪潮、流行摇滚和德语歌词。代表作还包括《Irgendwie, irgendwo, irgendwann》等，是德国最具国际知名度的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nena is a German pop-rock band formed in West Berlin in 1982, named after lead singer Nena Kerner. They achieved global fame with their 1983 single "99 Luftballons," blending new wave, pop rock, and German lyrics. Other hits include "Irgendwie, irgendwo, irgendwann," making them one of Germany's most internationally recognized bands.

items.name: Songs from a Room
items.descriptionZh: 《Songs from a Room》是莱昂纳德·科恩1969年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了民谣与乡村元素。核心特色在于其极简的编曲和深邃的歌词，科恩以低沉的嗓音吟唱关于孤独、信仰与人类处境的诗篇，营造出一种内省而忧郁的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Songs from a Room is Leonard Cohen's second studio album, released in 1969, blending folk and country elements. Its core features lie in minimalist arrangements and profound lyrics, with Cohen's deep voice reciting poems about solitude, faith, and the human condition, creating an introspective and melancholic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纳什维尔，科恩与制作人鲍勃·约翰斯顿合作。科恩曾表示，这张专辑中的许多歌曲是在希腊海德拉岛上的一个没有电的房子里写成的，他用手电筒照明，在夜间创作。录制过程中，科恩坚持使用简单的乐器配置，以突出歌曲本身的力量。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Nashville, with Cohen collaborating with producer Bob Johnston. Cohen mentioned that many songs on the album were written in a house without electricity on the Greek island of Hydra, where he wrote by flashlight at night. During recording, Cohen insisted on simple instrumentation to highlight the power of the songs themselves.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了科恩作为诗人歌手的重要地位，影响了后来无数民谣与独立音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Cohen's status as a crucial poet-singer, influencing countless folk and indie musicians later.
items.artistIntroZh: 莱昂纳德·科恩（Leonard Cohen），加拿大歌手、诗人、小说家，以其深沉的嗓音和诗意歌词闻名。主要风格为民谣、民谣摇滚，代表作有《Hallelujah》《Suzanne》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Leonard Cohen was a Canadian singer, poet, and novelist, known for his deep voice and poetic lyrics. His main styles are folk and folk rock, with representative works including 'Hallelujah' and 'Suzanne'.

04-07.birthdayZh: 4月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响Nena的《Und alles dreht sich》——万物旋转，生生不息，正如你生命里所有流动的喜悦与勇敢。而科恩的《Songs from a Room》静静诉说着：最深的回响，往往来自寂静中的凝望。愿你在自己的房间里，听见温柔，也唱出笃定的歌。
04-07.birthdayEn: April 7 is your birthday, a day that echoes with the release of Leonard Cohen's Songs from a Room, where quiet depth and resilient grace were born. On this same date, Nena’s Und alles dreht sich reminds us that everything turns, that rhythms of change can be beautiful. May your new year hum with that same balance: the stillness of a soulful room, the spinning joy of a melody. You are a song that the world is lucky to hear, growing clearer and brighter with every rotation.

items.name: Mystery
items.descriptionZh: 《Mystery》是王菲1994年发行的粤语专辑，属于流行风格。核心特色在于其迷幻而空灵的编曲，融合了另类流行与电子元素，王菲的嗓音在歌曲中展现出多变的质感，从轻柔呢喃到高亢爆发，营造出一种神秘而梦幻的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Mystery is a Cantonese pop album by Faye Wong, released in 1994. Its core features lie in psychedelic and ethereal arrangements, blending alternative pop with electronic elements.
