Wong's vocals show varied textures, from soft murmurs to soaring outbursts, creating a mysterious and dreamy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的封面设计极具争议，王菲以黑色羽毛头饰和浓重眼妆出镜，灵感来自她的偶像比约克。录制期间，王菲正与窦唯热恋，专辑中多首歌曲由窦唯参与编曲，如《沉醉》等，展现了两人音乐上的默契。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was highly controversial, featuring Faye Wong in a black feather headdress and heavy eye makeup, inspired by her idol Björk. During recording, Wong was in a passionate relationship with Dou Wei, who participated in arranging several songs on the album, such as 'Chen Zui', showcasing their musical chemistry.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲（Faye Wong），中国歌手、演员，以其独特的嗓音和前卫风格著称。主要风格为流行、另类流行，代表作有《红豆》《容易受伤的女人》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is a Chinese singer and actress, known for her unique voice and avant-garde style. Her main styles are pop and alternative pop, with representative works including 'Red Bean' and 'Vulnerable Woman'.

04-08.birthdayZh: 4月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Mystery》——像王菲在1994年用空灵声线编织的梦泡与迷幻，诗意而超现实。你的生命也如这张专辑，藏着未被破解的谜题与柔韧力量。愿你在自己的节奏里，像光穿过雾，优雅而自由地生长，哪怕前路未知，也始终有歌可唱，有梦可寻。
04-08.birthdayEn: April 8 is your birthday. On this day, Faye Wong released her album Mystery, a dreamlike blend of alternative pop that floats with the soft mystery of spring itself. Like that album, your life holds layers of wonder waiting to be discovered. May this new year unfold like its melodies—unexpected, tender, and beautifully your own. You are a gift the world is lucky to unwrap, one surprising, luminous note at a time.

items.name: Azphalt Inferno 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Azphalt Inferno 2》是德国说唱歌手Azad于2010年发行的专辑，属于嘻哈风格。核心特色在于其硬核的街头叙事和激烈的节奏，Azad以快速而有力的Flow讲述社会底层的故事，专辑制作精良，融合了东岸嘻哈的经典元素与现代节拍。
items.descriptionEn: Azphalt Inferno 2 is a hip-hop album by German rapper Azad, released in 2010. Its core features lie in hardcore street narratives and intense rhythms, with Azad telling stories of the underclass with fast and powerful flow. The album is well-produced, blending classic East Coast hip-hop elements with modern beats.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Azad“Azphalt Inferno”系列的续作，录制于法兰克福。Azad曾表示，专辑中的歌曲反映了他个人在嘻哈圈内外的斗争与成长。主打歌《Allein》因直白的歌词引发争议，但也获得了粉丝的强烈共鸣。
items.storiesEn: This album is the sequel to Azad's 'Azphalt Inferno' series, recorded in Frankfurt. Azad stated that the songs reflect his personal struggles and growth inside and outside the hip-hop scene. The lead single 'Allein' sparked controversy for its straightforward lyrics but also resonated strongly with fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Azad，德国说唱歌手，出生于德黑兰，是德国嘻哈界的代表人物之一。主要风格为硬核嘻哈、街头说唱，代表作有《Azphalt Inferno》《Phoenix》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Azad is a German rapper, born in Tehran, and a leading figure in German hip-hop. His main styles are hardcore hip-hop and street rap, with representative works including 'Azphalt Inferno' and 'Phoenix'.

items.name: I Loved Yesterday
items.descriptionZh: 《I Loved Yesterday》是日本创作女歌手Yui于2008年发行的专辑，属于流行风格。核心特色在于其清新的吉他流行曲风和Yui充满青春感的嗓音，专辑旋律流畅，歌词多围绕爱情与成长的主题，展现了Yui作为吉他少女的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: I Loved Yesterday is a pop album by Japanese singer-songwriter Yui, released in 2008. Its core features lie in fresh guitar pop style and Yui's youthful vocals. The melodies are smooth, with lyrics mostly revolving around love and growth, showcasing Yui's unique charm as a guitar girl.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Yui的第三张录音室专辑，录制期间她因过度劳累导致声带问题，不得不暂停演出。专辑中的歌曲《I'll be》和《Love is All》被���作电视剧主题曲，进一步扩大了她的知名度。Yui曾表示，这张专辑是她对��去恋情的总结。
items.storiesEn: This is Yui's third studio album. During recording, she suffered from vocal cord issues due to overwork and had to pause performances. The songs 'I'll be' and 'Love is All' were used as TV drama theme songs, further expanding her popularity. Yui stated that this album is a summary of her past relationships.
items.artistIntroZh: Yui，日本创作女歌手、吉他手，以其清新的形象和自弹自唱的风格闻名。主要风格为流行、摇滚，代表作有《Good-bye Days》《Rolling Star》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Yui is a Japanese singer-songwriter and guitarist, known for her fresh image and self-accompanied singing style. Her main styles are pop and rock, with representative works including 'Good-bye Days' and 'Rolling Star'.

04-09.birthdayZh: 4月9日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行过两张截然不同的专辑：Azad的《Azphalt Inferno 2》带着硬核的力量与街头的不屈，而Yui的《I Loved Yesterday》则用清新吉他声收藏着青春里温柔的昨日。你或许也同时拥有这两种光芒——刚强的心与柔软的记忆。愿你在新的一岁，脚下有路，心中有歌。
04-09.birthdayEn: April 9 is your birthday. Like Azad’s Azphalt Inferno 2, may your path blaze with fierce, unstoppable energy, forging strength from every challenge. And like Yui’s I Loved Yesterday, may you carry the sweet, tender beauty of memories while stepping boldly into tomorrow. You are a melody of fire and grace—yesterday’s echoes and today’s brilliant new verse. Happy birthday, beautiful soul. Your story is still being sung, and it’s only getting more radiant.

items.name: One Night in Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《One Night in Japan》是迈克尔·杰克逊2009年发行的现场专辑，记录了他在日本的一场演出，属于流行风格。核心特色在于杰克逊无与伦比的舞台魅力和经典曲目的现场演绎，专辑收录了《Billie Jean》《Thriller》等代表作，展现了其作为流行之王的巅峰状态。
items.descriptionEn: One Night in Japan is a live album by Michael Jackson, released in 2009, recording a performance in Japan. Its core features lie in Jackson's unparalleled stage charisma and live renditions of classic hits. The album includes representative works such as 'Billie Jean' and 'Thriller', showcasing the King of Pop at his peak.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音源自迈克尔·杰克逊1987年日本巡演的一场演出。2009年杰克逊去世后，唱片公司为了纪念他，将这场演出的音频整理发行。专辑封面使用了杰克逊在日本表演时的经典照片，许多粉丝认为这是对他舞台生涯的最佳致敬之一。
items.storiesEn: The album's recordings originate from a performance during Michael Jackson's 1987 Japan tour. After Jackson's death in 2009, the record company compiled and released the audio as a tribute. The cover features a classic photo of Jackson performing in Japan, and many fans consider it one of the best tributes to his stage career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为杰克逊去世后发行的纪念专辑，它提醒世人其不朽的舞台影响力，并再次掀起全球对他的怀念热潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a commemorative album released after Jackson's death, it reminds the world of his immortal stage influence and reignited a global wave of nostalgia for him.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson），美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行之王”��主要风格为流行、放克、摇滚，代表作有《Thriller》《Billie Jean》《Beat It》等，对全球音乐与舞蹈产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop'. His main styles are pop, funk, and rock, with representative works including 'Thriller', 'Billie Jean', and 'Beat It', exerting a profound influence on global music and dance.

04-10.birthdayZh: 4月10日，是你的生日。这一天，连音符都为你驻足。迈克尔·杰克逊曾计划在《One Night in Japan》里燃尽所有光芒——那份未竟的炽热，如今成为你生命里不灭的星火。愿你像那场永不落幕的演出，在属于自己的舞台上，把每一个平凡日子都唱成传奇。
04-10.birthdayEn: April 10 is your birthday, a date that shines with the energy of a live performance. On this day, the world received "One Night in Japan" by Michael Jackson, capturing the magic of a moment where music and soul collide. Like that unforgettable album, your life is a stage of brilliance and grace. May your new year be filled with the same electric warmth and rhythmic joy, a symphony of love and adventure. Here’s to you, the star of your own beautiful journey. Happy birthday.

items.name: Le dimensioni del mio caos
items.descriptionZh: 《Le dimensioni del mio caos》是意大利说唱歌手Caparezza的第四张录音室专辑，融合了讽刺性嘻哈、另类摇滚与电子元素。专辑以戏剧化的叙事和复杂的文字游戏著称，歌词深刻批判社会现象，音乐编排丰富多变，展现了Caparezza标志性的智性嘻哈风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Le dimensioni del mio caos" is the fourth studio album by Italian rapper Caparezza, blending satirical hip-hop, alternative rock, and electronic elements. Known for its theatrical storytelling and intricate wordplay, the album offers sharp social critique through richly varied musical arrangements, showcasing Caparezza's signature intellectual hip-hop style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Caparezza因过度追求完美，曾多次推翻重录整首歌曲。他透露，主打歌《Il secondo secondo me》的歌词修改了超过20个版本，直到录音室最后一天才确定最终混音。这种近乎偏执的创作态度，使得专辑在意大利嘻哈界被誉为“文字迷宫”之作。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of the album, Caparezza's perfectionism led him to re-record entire tracks multiple times. He revealed that the lyrics for the lead single "Il secondo secondo me" went through over 20 revisions, with the final mix only being finalized on the last day in the studio. This obsessive creative approach earned the album a reputation as a "verbal labyrinth" in the Italian hip-hop scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Caparezza（本名Michele Salvemini）是意大利知名说唱歌手，以机智的歌词和社会讽刺著称。他的音乐融合嘻哈、摇滚与流行，代表作包括《Habemus Capa》和《Le dimensioni del mio caos》。
items.artistIntroEn: Caparezza (born Michele Salvemini) is a renowned Italian rapper known for his witty lyrics and social satire. His music blends hip-hop, rock, and pop, with notable albums including "Habemus Capa" and "Le dimensioni del mio caos."

04-11.birthdayZh: 4月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌着《Le dimensioni del mio caos》——混乱的维度里藏着秩序的光，像你总在喧嚣中守护自己的节拍。愿你的生命如这张专辑，在复杂旋律中找到独属的舞步。所有荒诞与热望，都成为你发间的星光。
04-11.birthdayEn: April 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Caparezza’s "Le dimensioni del mio caos," a reminder that even chaos can hold a beautiful, creative rhythm. Your life dances with that same spirit—finding harmony in the mess, turning noise into art. May your year ahead be woven with bold beats and unexpected melodies, each day a new verse in a song only you can sing. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Maybe Tomorrow
items.descriptionZh: 《Maybe Tomorrow》是美国流行组合Jackson 5的第七张录音室专辑，延续了Motown风格的灵魂流行与放克节奏。专辑以温暖的旋律和标志性的和声为特色，主打歌《Maybe Tomorrow》展现了Michael Jackson日渐成熟的嗓音，整体氛围柔和而充满希望。
items.descriptionEn: "Maybe Tomorrow" is the seventh studio album by American pop group The Jackson 5, continuing their Motown-infused soul-pop and funk rhythms. Featuring warm melodies and signature harmonies, the title track showcases Michael Jackson's maturing vocals, creating a soft and hopeful atmosphere throughout the album.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，年仅13岁的Michael Jackson已开始主导部分歌曲的编曲方向。据制作人透露，在录制《Never Can Say Goodbye》时，Michael坚持修改了副歌的节奏型，最终版本成为专辑中最受好评的曲目之一。这张专辑也是Jackson 5首次尝试减少Motown工厂式制作，赋予更多个人色彩。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, a 13-year-old Michael Jackson began taking a more active role in arranging certain tracks. According to the producer, Michael insisted on altering the rhythm of the chorus for "Never Can Say Goodbye," which became one of the album's most acclaimed songs. This album also marked the Jackson 5's first attempt to move away from Motown's assembly-line production, adding more personal flair.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Jackson 5从纯少年偶像团体向更成熟艺术方向转型的重要过渡作品，为Michael Jackson后来的个人发展奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album represents a key transitional work for the Jackson 5, moving from pure teen idol status toward a more mature artistic direction, laying the groundwork for Michael Jackson's later solo career.
items.artistIntroZh: The Jackson 5是美国传奇流行组合，来自印第安纳州加里市，由杰克逊家族兄弟组成。他们以Motown灵魂乐和流行曲风闻名，代表作包括《I Want You Back》和《ABC》，是1970年代最成功的青少年偶像团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 is a legendary American pop group from Gary, Indiana, consisting of the Jackson brothers. Known for their Motown soul and pop sound, their hits include "I Want You Back" and "ABC," making them one of the most successful teen idol groups of the 1970s.

items.name: Un-Break My Heart: The Remix Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《Un-Break My Heart: The Remix Collection》是美国R&B天后Toni Braxton的混音专辑，将她的经典抒情金曲《Un-Break My Heart》重新编曲为多种流行舞曲版本。专辑融合了浩室、拉丁流行和当代R&B元素，展现了原曲在舞池中的全新生命力。
items.descriptionEn: "Un-Break My Heart: The Remix Collection" is a remix album by American R&B diva Toni Braxton, reimagining her classic ballad "Un-Break My Heart" into various pop dance versions. Blending house, Latin pop, and contemporary R&B elements, the album breathes new life into the original track for the dance floor.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音专辑的诞生源于一次偶然：2004年Toni Braxton在俱乐部听到DJ播放《Un-Break My Heart》的非法混音版，现场观众反应热烈。她随即联系唱片公司，授权并召集多位知名制作人，包括Hex Hector和Frankie Knuckles，正式推出官方混音合集。
items.storiesEn: The remix album was born from a chance event: in 2004, Toni Braxton heard an unofficial remix of "Un-Break My Heart" being played in a club, and the crowd's reaction was overwhelming. She immediately contacted her label, secured the rights, and enlisted renowned producers including Hex Hector and Frankie Knuckles to create an official remix collection.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton是美国R&B和流行女歌手，以低沉性感的嗓音和情感充沛的抒情曲闻名。她曾获得多项格莱美奖，代表作包括《Un-Break My Heart》和《Breathe Again》，是1990年代最成功的R&B女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton is an American R&B and pop singer known for her deep, sultry voice and emotionally charged ballads. A multiple Grammy Award winner, her hits include "Un-Break My Heart" and "Breathe Again," making her one of the most successful R&B female artists of the 1990s.

04-12.birthdayZh: 4月12日，是你的生日。这一天，《Maybe Tomorrow》曾把希望谱成旋律，告诉你每个今天都是明天的序章；《Un-Break My Heart》的混音里，破碎的心也能在节奏中重生。你来到世界的那一天，音乐就为勇气和温柔写下了注脚。愿你在自己的时光里，活得如旋律般自由，如爱般笃定。
04-12.birthdayEn: April 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “Maybe Tomorrow” by The Jackson 5, a melody of hopeful beginnings, and “Un-Break My Heart” by Toni Braxton, a testament to healing through every rhythm of life. Like these songs, your spirit carries both the lightness of possibility and the depth of resilience. May your year ahead dance with joy, mend with grace, and always find the harmony that makes you shine. You are a beautiful song in this world—celebrate every note today.

items.name: Back on the Dancefloor
items.descriptionZh: 《Back on the Dancefloor》是德国电子舞曲组合Cascada的第四张录音室专辑，主打Eurodance和电子流行风格。专辑以强劲的节拍、合成器旋律和主唱Natalie Horler高亢的嗓���为核心特色，旨在回归舞曲本源，营造派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Back on the Dancefloor" is the fourth studio album by German electronic dance group Cascada, featuring Eurodance and electropop styles. Driven by powerful beats, synth melodies, and lead vocalist Natalie Horler's soaring voice, the album aims to return to dance music's roots, creating an energetic party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Back on the Dancefloor》反映了Cascada在经历前作风格争议后的回归决心。制作人Yanou和DJ Manian在录音室中重新采用了早期Eurodance的经典音色，并特意在德国科隆一家著名夜店进行试听测试，根据舞池反应调整了多首歌曲的混音。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Back on the Dancefloor" reflects Cascada's determination to return to their roots after stylistic controversies with previous works. Producers Yanou and DJ Manian revisited classic Eurodance sounds in the studio and specifically tested tracks at a famous nightclub in Cologne, Germany, adjusting the mixes based on the dance floor's reaction.
items.artistIntroZh: Cascada是德国电子舞曲组合，由主唱Natalie Horler以及制作人Yanou和DJ Manian组成。他们以Eurodance和流行舞曲风格闻名，代表作包括《Everytime We Touch》和《Evacuate the Dancefloor》，是全球舞曲界的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Cascada is a German electronic dance group consisting of vocalist Natalie Horler and producers Yanou and DJ Manian. Known for their Eurodance and pop dance sound, their hits include "Everytime We Touch" and "Evacuate the Dancefloor," making them a major force in global dance music.

04-13.birthdayZh: 4月13日，是你的生日。这一天曾诞生了《Back on the Dancefloor》，像一面旗帜，召唤每个灵魂回到属于自己的舞池。愿你这一岁，不必追赶谁的节奏，只听从内心最亮的鼓点。记住，这世界本就是为你亮起的灯——你生来就该在生命的律动里，快乐、自由、闪闪发光。
04-13.birthdayEn: April 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world once welcomed your light, and it also sparked the release of "Back on the Dancefloor" by Cascada—a pulse of joyful, unstoppable energy. Like that album’s electronic heartbeat, may your year be a celebration where every step feels like a beat you were born to move to. Let your spirit dance freely, knowing that the music of your life is vibrant, full of warmth, and always lifting you higher. Happy, radiant birthday.

items.name: No.1
items.descriptionZh: 《No.1》是韩国流行天后BoA的第二张日语录音室专辑，也是她首张在日本公信榜夺冠的专辑。作品融合了J-Pop、R&B和电子舞曲元素，展现了BoA从少女偶像向成熟艺人的转型。主打歌《Valenti》以其强劲的节奏和感染力成为经典。
items.descriptionEn: "No.1" is the second Japanese studio album by Korean pop queen BoA, and her first to top the Oricon charts. Blending J-Pop, R&B, and electronic dance elements, the album showcases BoA's transition from teen idol to mature artist. The lead single "Valenti" became a classic with its powerful rhythm and infectious energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，BoA需要同时应对韩国和日本两地的密集宣传，她曾在24小时内往返首尔和东京三次录制MV。为了完美演绎日语歌词的发音，她每天额外花两小时与语言教练练习。这种超负荷工作模式，最终成就了她在日本市场的突破性成功。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, BoA had to juggle intense promotional schedules in both Korea and Japan, once flying between Seoul and Tokyo three times in 24 hours to shoot music videos. To perfect her Japanese pronunciation, she spent an extra two hours daily practicing with a language coach. This grueling work ethic ultimately led to her breakthrough success in the Japanese market.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《No.1》是首位非日本籍艺人夺得公信榜冠军的专辑之一，标志着K-Pop艺人正式进入日本主流音乐市场，为后来的K-Pop全球化铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: "No.1" was one of the first albums by a non-Japanese artist to top the Oricon charts, marking K-Pop artists' official entry into Japan's mainstream music market and paving the way for K-Pop's global expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿）是韩国流行天后，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她以精湛的唱跳实力和多语言演唱能力闻名，代表作包括《No.1》、《Valenti》和《Only One》，是K-Pop全球化的重要先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a Korean pop diva known as the "Star of Asia." Renowned for her exceptional singing and dancing skills and multilingual abilities, her hits include "No.1," "Valenti," and "Only One," making her a key pioneer of K-Pop's globalization.

items.name: When Forever Comes Crashing
items.descriptionZh: 《When Forever Comes Crashing》是Converge于1998年发行的第二张录音室专辑。尽管被标记为Pop，但该作品实际融合了硬核朋克与金属核的狂暴能量，以极具攻击性的吉他音墙、破碎的节奏和主唱Jacob Bannon嘶吼式的演唱为核心特色，展现了极端金属与情绪硬核的碰撞。
items.descriptionEn: When Forever Comes Crashing is Converge's second studio album released in 1998. Although labeled as Pop, the work actually blends the狂暴 energy of hardcore punk and metalcore, featuring aggressive guitar walls, fragmented rhythms, and vocalist Jacob Bannon's screamed vocals, showcasing a collision of extreme metal and emotional hardcore.
items.storiesZh: 该专辑录制于马萨诸塞州的GodCity Studio，由吉他手Kurt Ballou担任录音师。由于预算极低，乐队在极短时间内完成了录制，许多歌曲的即兴部分都是在录音棚内临时创作完成的。专辑封面由主唱Jacob Bannon亲自设计，延续了其标志性的抽象视觉风格。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at GodCity Studio in Massachusetts, with guitarist Kurt Ballou as engineer. Due to a very low budget, the band completed recording in an extremely short time, with many improvised sections created on the spot in the studio. The cover art was designed by vocalist Jacob Bannon himself, continuing his signature abstract visual style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑被视为金属核与硬核朋克融合的重要里程碑，影响了后续大量极端金属与硬核乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a crucial milestone in the fusion of metalcore and hardcore punk, influencing numerous subsequent extreme metal and hardcore bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Converge是一支来自美国马萨诸塞州的金属核乐队，成立于1990年。乐队以极具实验性的极端金属与硬核朋克融合风格著称，代表作包括《Jane Doe》和《When Forever Comes Crashing》。主唱Jacob Bannon也是知名视觉艺术家。
items.artistIntroEn: Converge is a metalcore band from Massachusetts, USA, formed in 1990. Known for their highly experimental fusion of extreme metal and hardcore punk, their representative works include Jane Doe and When Forever Comes Crashing. Vocalist Jacob Bannon is also a renowned visual artist.

04-14.birthdayZh: 4月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾留下两首歌：BoA的《No.1》在舞曲与R&B中升腾，像你初次闪耀时的不设限；而《When Forever Comes Crashing》在暴烈中碎裂又重生，诉说着即使永恒崩塌，仍有力量从废墟里长出。愿你的每一年，既有绽放的勇气，也有破碎后依然前行的温柔。
04-14.birthdayEn: April 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us gifts that match your spirit: BoA’s “No.1” shines with determined grace, a breakthrough of light and strength. And in the raw, fiery heart of Converge’s “When Forever Comes Crashing,” there is a beautiful reminder that even chaos can birth resilience. May your year be a symphony of both gentle triumphs and fierce, unbreakable courage. Happy birthday—you are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: Ultra
items.descriptionZh: 《Ultra》是Depeche Mode于1997年发行的第九张录音室专辑。尽管被标记为Pop，该作品实际融合了另类摇滚、电子��与工业音乐元素，以阴暗、内省的歌词和合成器驱动的旋律为核心特色，展现了乐队在成员经历个人危机后的深沉转变。
items.descriptionEn: Ultra is Depeche Mode's ninth studio album released in 1997. Although labeled as Pop, the work actually blends alternative rock, electronic, and industrial music elements, featuring dark, introspective lyrics and synth-driven melodies, showcasing the band's deep transformation after members' personal crises.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Dave Gahan因海洛因成瘾多次进出康复中心，吉他手Martin Gore也经历了酗酒问题。乐队一度濒临解散，但最终在制作人Tim Simenon的协助下完成录制。专辑中的歌曲《Sister of Night》的灵感来自Gahan在康复期间的梦境。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, lead singer Dave Gahan entered and left rehab multiple times due to heroin addiction, while guitarist Martin Gore also struggled with alcoholism. The band was on the verge of breaking up but eventually completed recording with producer Tim Simenon. The song 'Sister of Night' was inspired by Gahan's dreams during rehab.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑标志着Depeche Mode在成员危���后的成功复兴，巩固了其作为另类电子摇滚先驱的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Depeche Mode's successful revival after member crises, solidifying their status as pioneers of alternative electronic rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是一支来自英国的电子摇滚乐队，成立于1980年。他们以合成器驱动的流行旋律与阴暗内省的歌词著称，代表作包括《Violator》和《Songs of Faith and Devotion》。乐队在全球售出超过1亿张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is an English electronic rock band formed in 1980. Known for their synth-driven pop melodies and dark, introspective lyrics, their representative works include Violator and Songs of Faith and Devotion. The band has sold over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: In My Memory
items.descriptionZh: 《In My Memory》是Tiësto于2001年发行的首张录音室专辑。尽管被标记为Pop，该作品实际是Trance音乐的经典之作，以悠扬的合成器旋律、渐进式节拍和空灵女声为核心特色，展现了Tiësto将欧洲Trance推向全球舞台的早期风格。
items.descriptionEn: In My Memory is Tiësto's debut studio album released in 2001. Although labeled as Pop, the work is actually a classic of trance music, featuring lush synth melodies, progressive beats, and ethereal female vocals, showcasing Tiësto's early style that brought European trance to the global stage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的同名曲《In My Memory》最初是为Tiësto的电台节目而创作的背景音乐，后来因听众反响热烈而被收录进专辑。另一首热门单曲《Lethal Industry》的灵感来源于Tiësto在荷兰夜店演出时的即兴混音片段。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'In My Memory' was originally created as background music for Tiësto's radio show, later included in the album due to overwhelming listener response. Another hit single 'Lethal Industry' was inspired by an improvised mix segment during Tiësto's performance at a Dutch club.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑被认为是Trance音乐商业化与全球普及的关键作品，奠定了Tiësto作为世界级DJ的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key work in the commercialization and global popularization of trance music, establishing Tiësto's status as a world-class DJ.
items.artistIntroZh: Tiësto是来自荷兰的DJ和电子音乐制作人，出生于1969年。他被誉为Trance音乐之父之一，以渐进式Trance和主流电子舞曲风格著称，代表作包括《In My Memory》和《Elements of Life》。他曾多次获得格莱美奖提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Tiësto is a Dutch DJ and electronic music producer born in 1969. Known as one of the fathers of trance music, he is famous for his progressive trance and mainstream electronic dance style, with representative works including In My Memory and Elements of Life. He has received multiple Grammy nominations.

04-15.birthdayZh: 4月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode用《Ultra》诉说从破碎中重生的勇气，而Q183508的《In My Memory》则把时光揉成一片温暖的光晕。你降生的日子，注定既有暗夜里的深邃，也有记忆里不灭的微光。愿你在自己的节拍里，始终听得到成长的回响。
04-15.birthdayEn: April 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the resilient pulse of Depeche Mode's "Ultra," a testament to rising from crisis with dark, tender synths, and the luminous breakbeat dreamscape of Tiesto's "In My Memory." Like these albums, your life weaves shadow and light into something beautiful. May this year carry you forward with the same courage to rebuild and the same grace to dance through memory. You are a melody born on a day of rebirth—keep playing your song.

items.descriptionZh: 《1983》是Sophie Hunger于2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑。尽管被标记为Pop，该作品实际融合了民谣、爵士与独立摇滚元素，以细腻的吉他拨弦、诗意的德语和英语歌词以及Hunger独特的慵懒嗓音为核心特色，展现了她作为瑞士独立音乐人的艺术深度。
items.descriptionEn: 1983 is Sophie Hunger's third studio album released in 2010. Although labeled as Pop, the work actually blends folk, jazz, and indie rock elements, featuring delicate guitar picking, poetic German and English lyrics, and Hunger's distinctive languid vocals, showcasing her artistic depth as a Swiss independent musician.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《1983》来源于Hunger的出生年份，她试图通过音乐回顾自己成长过程中的个人记忆。录制过程中，Hunger与制作人Markus Schneider合作，在柏林的一个古老录音棚中完成了大部分歌曲，其中许多歌曲是在���天内即兴录制完成的。
items.storiesEn: The album title 1983 comes from Hunger's birth year, as she attempted to revisit personal memories from her upbringing through music. During recording, Hunger worked with producer Markus Schneider at an old studio in Berlin, completing most songs in single-day improvised sessions.
items.artistIntroZh: Sophie Hunger是来自瑞士的独立音乐人和歌手，出生于1983年。她以融合民谣、爵士与独立摇滚的独特风格著称，常使用德语、英语和法语演唱。代表作包括《1983》和《Molecules》。她被誉为瑞士最具国际影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Sophie Hunger is a Swiss independent musician and singer born in 1983. Known for her unique blend of folk, jazz, and indie rock, she often sings in German, English, and French. Her representative works include 1983 and Molecules. She is regarded as one of Switzerland's most internationally influential musicians.

items.name: Bert Jansch
items.descriptionZh: 《Bert Jansch》是Bert Jansch于1965年发行的首张同名录音室专辑。该作品是英国民谣复兴运动的经典之作，以精湛的原声吉他技巧、细腻的指弹风格和忧郁的叙事歌词为核心特色，展现了Jansch对传统英国民谣的现代诠释。
items.descriptionEn: Bert Jansch is the self-titled debut studio album by Bert Jansch, released in 1965. This work is a classic of the British folk revival movement, featuring精湛的 acoustic guitar technique, intricate fingerpicking style, and melancholic narrative lyrics, showcasing Jansch's modern interpretation of traditional British folk.
items.storiesZh: 专辑仅用一天时间在伦敦一个朋友的公寓中录制完成，预算仅为100英镑。Jansch使用了一把借来的吉他，许多歌曲都是即兴演奏的。专辑发行后，Jimmy Page（齐柏林飞艇吉他手）公开表示Jansch对他的演奏风格产生了深远影响。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in just one day at a friend's apartment in London, with a budget of only £100. Jansch used a borrowed guitar, and many songs were improvised. After its release, Jimmy Page (Led Zeppelin guitarist) publicly acknowledged Jansch's profound influence on his playing style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑被视为英国民谣复兴运动的里程碑，对后世指弹吉他手（如Jimmy Page和Neil Young）产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a milestone of the British folk revival movement, profoundly influencing later fingerstyle guitarists such as Jimmy Page and Neil Young.
items.artistIntroZh: Bert Jansch是来自苏格兰的民谣吉他手和歌手，出生于1943年。他以精湛的指弹吉他技巧和忧郁的民谣风格著称，是英国民谣复兴运动的核心人物之一。代表作包括《Bert Jansch》和《Jack Orion》。他于2011年去世。
items.artistIntroEn: Bert Jansch was a Scottish folk guitarist and singer born in 1943. Known for his masterful fingerstyle guitar technique and melancholic folk style, he was a central figure in the British folk revival movement. His representative works include Bert Jansch and Jack Orion. He passed away in 2011.

04-16.birthdayZh: 4月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两枚音符：一枚是《Bert Jansch》里那把忧郁的老吉他，每一根弦都弹奏着光阴的深邃；另一枚是《1983》中脆弱而坚定的嗓音，像早春的胚芽倔强地破土。愿你如民谣般极简却丰盈，在岁月里长成自己的诗。
04-16.birthdayEn: April 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us two luminous gifts: the debut of Sophie Hunger's "1983," a folk album woven with quiet discovery, and Bert Jansch's self-titled masterpiece, a testament to raw, gentle mastery. Your birthday shares their spirit—a beautiful beginning, a melody of strength and tenderness. May your year unfold like these timeless songs: deeply rooted, yet always reaching for the light. Wishing you a year of harmony and wonder.

items.name: One
items.descriptionZh: 《One》是Bee Gees在1989年发行的专辑，融合了R&B与灵魂乐的柔滑质感，展现了兄弟三人标志性的假声和声与情感充沛的旋律。核心特色在于其精致的编曲和对爱情、失落的深刻表达，是他们在80年代末期向成人当代风格转型的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: One is an album by Bee Gees released in 1989, blending the smooth textures of R&B and soul with their signature falsetto harmonies and emotionally charged melodies. Its core features lie in its refined arrangements and profound expressions of love and loss, representing their transition into adult contemporary style in the late 1980s.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Bee Gees事业复兴期，主打歌《One》由Barry、Robin和Maurice Gibb共同创作，灵感来源于他们个人生活中的情感波动。有趣的是，专辑封面设计使用了极简的白色背景加一个数字“1”，意在强调回归音乐本质，而非过度包装。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during Bee Gees' career revival. The lead single 'One' was co-written by Barry, Robin, and Maurice Gibb, inspired by their personal emotional turmoil. Interestingly, the cover art featured a minimalist white background with the number '1', aiming to emphasize a return to musical essence rather than over-packaging.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助Bee Gees在80年代末重新赢得主流关注，巩固了他们作为多才多艺音乐人的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Bee Gees regain mainstream attention in the late 1980s, solidifying their status as versatile musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Bee Gees是一支英国-澳大利亚兄弟乐队，由Barry、Robin和Maurice Gibb组成。他们以精湛的假声和声和迪斯科时代经典曲目闻名，代表作包括《Stayin' Alive》和《How Deep Is Your Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Bee Gees were a British-Australian brother trio consisting of Barry, Robin, and Maurice Gibb, renowned for their expert falsetto harmonies and disco-era classics such as 'Stayin' Alive' and 'How Deep Is Your Love'.

items.name: A Girl Called Dusty
items.descriptionZh: 《A Girl Called Dusty》是Dusty Springfield在1964年发行的首张个人专辑，属于流行风格，融合了轻快的流行旋律与灵魂乐的细腻情感。核心特色在于Dusty温暖而富有磁性的嗓音，以及专辑中多首由知名词曲作者创作的经典情歌。
items.descriptionEn: A Girl Called Dusty is the debut solo album by Dusty Springfield, released in 1964. It features a pop style blended with the delicate emotions of soul music. Its core features lie in Dusty's warm and magnetic voice, along with classic love songs written by renowned songwriters.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常高效，仅用了短短几周时间。Dusty当时刚刚脱离民谣三重唱组合The Springfields，急于证明自己的个人魅力。有趣的是，专辑名“A Girl Called Dusty”是她自己提出的，意在向听众介绍一个全新的、真实的自己。
items.storiesEn: The recording process for this album was remarkably efficient, completed in just a few weeks. Dusty had just left the folk trio The Springfields and was eager to prove her individual appeal. Interestingly, the album title 'A Girl Called Dusty' was her own idea, aiming to introduce a fresh, authentic self to listeners.
items.artistIntroZh: Dusty Springfield是英国传奇女歌手，以独特的蓝眼睛灵魂乐风格著称。她的代表作包括《Son of a Preacher Man》和《You Don't Have to Say You Love Me》，是60年代最具影响力的白人灵魂乐歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Dusty Springfield was a legendary British female singer known for her distinctive blue-eyed soul style. Her representative works include 'Son of a Preacher Man' and 'You Don't Have to Say You Love Me', making her one of the most influential white soul singers of the 1960s.

items.name: Q139501748
items.descriptionZh: 《Q139501748》是一张计划于2026年发行的神秘流行专辑，目前信息极为有限。从编号风格看，可能属于实验性或数字概念项目。核心特色在于其未知的创作方向，预计将融合当代流行元素与电子音效，引发听众对音乐未来形态的想象。
items.descriptionEn: Q139501748 is a mysterious pop album scheduled for release in 2026, with very limited information currently available. Judging by its code-like title, it may belong to an experimental or digital concept project. Its core feature lies in its unknown creative direction, expected to blend contemporary pop elements with electronic sounds, sparking listeners' imagination about future music forms.
items.storiesZh: 由于专辑信息尚未公开，幕后故事暂不可考。不过，其独特的数字编号标题暗示这可能是一次匿名或去中心化的音乐发布实验，或许与新兴的AI创作或区块链音乐平台有关。
items.storiesEn: Since album details have not been publicly disclosed, behind-the-scenes stories are currently unavailable. However, its unique numerical title suggests it could be an anonymous or decentralized music release experiment, possibly related to emerging AI creation or blockchain music platforms.
items.artistIntroZh: 未知（Unknown）——这张专辑的艺术家信息尚未公开，可能是新兴独立音乐人或匿名团体。其风格预计将围绕流行音乐展开，具体代表作待发布后确认。
items.artistIntroEn: Unknown – The artist information for this album has not been publicly disclosed; it may be an emerging independent musician or an anonymous collective. Its style is expected to revolve around pop music, with specific representative works to be confirmed after release.

04-17.birthdayZh: 4月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《One》的旋律，像在告诉你：所有的孤独终会找到和声。而你，比任何一张专辑都更勇敢地活成了自己的概念集——不必编号，不必定义。愿你在属于你的季节里，像风一样自由，像歌一样嘹亮。
04-17.birthdayEn: April 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Dusty Springfield’s hopeful debut, A Girl Called Dusty, a tender pop bloom, and the Bee Gees’ One, a bold step into new rhythm. Your life mirrors that same beautiful unfolding—a mix of first light and brave change. As you step into this next year, may you carry that spirit: always beginning, always rising. Here’s to you, and the music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Beam Me Up Scotty
items.descriptionZh: 《Beam Me Up Scotty》是Nicki Minaj在2009年发行的混音带，属于嘻哈风格。核心特色在于其大胆的歌词、多变的Flow以及Nicki早期标志性的卡通化嗓音切换，展现了她作为女性说唱歌手的独特锋芒和幽默感。
items.descriptionEn: Beam Me Up Scotty is a mixtape by Nicki Minaj released in 2009, belonging to the hip-hop style. Its core features lie in bold lyrics, versatile flows, and Nicki's early signature cartoonish voice switches, showcasing her unique edge and humor as a female rapper.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带是Nicki Minaj早期职业生涯的转折点，录制于她签约Young Money之前。有趣的是，标题《Beam Me Up Scotty》致敬了《星际迷航》中的经典台词，Nicki借此比喻自己即将通过音乐“传送”到主流视野。混音带中的歌曲《Itty Bitty Piggy》后来成为她的早期地下热门。
items.storiesEn: This mixtape was a turning point in Nicki Minaj's early career, recorded before she signed with Young Money. Interestingly, the title 'Beam Me Up Scotty' pays homage to a classic line from Star Trek, with Nicki using it as a metaphor for 'beaming' herself into the mainstream through music. The track 'Itty Bitty Piggy' later became an early underground hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张混音带被视为Nicki Minaj职业生涯的奠基之作，帮助她获得了Lil Wayne的关注，并最终签约Young Money，开启了主流成功之路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This mixtape is regarded as the foundation of Nicki Minaj's career, helping her gain attention from Lil Wayne and eventually leading to her signing with Young Money, paving the way for mainstream success.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj是美国说唱歌手、歌手和词曲作者，出生于���立尼达和多巴哥。她以多变的嗓音、大胆的时尚风格和嘻哈女王形象闻名，代表作包括《Super Bass》和《Anaconda》。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter born in Trinidad and Tobago. She is known for her versatile voice, bold fashion sense, and queen of hip-hop image, with representative works including 'Super Bass' and 'Anaconda'.

items.name: Anclado En Mi Corazón
items.descriptionZh: 《Anclado En Mi Corazón》是Anahí在1997年发行的专辑，属于流行风格，融合了拉丁流行与青少年流行元素。核心特色在于其甜美轻快的旋律和Anahí清亮的嗓音，歌词多围绕青春期的爱情与梦想，是90年代末墨西哥流行乐的代表作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Anclado En Mi Corazón is an album by Anahí released in 1997, belonging to the pop style and blending Latin pop with teen pop elements. Its core features lie in its sweet, upbeat melodies and Anahí's clear voice, with lyrics centered around adolescent love and dreams, making it a representative work of late 1990s Mexican pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，Anahí年仅14岁，正处于从童星向青少年偶像转型的关键期。有趣的是，专辑同名主打歌《Anclado En Mi Corazón》由知名拉丁制作人操刀，Anahí曾透露录制时因为紧张反复修改了多次，最终版本让她非常满意。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded when Anahí was only 14 years old, during a critical period of her transition from child star to teen idol. Interestingly, the title track 'Anclado En Mi Corazón' was produced by renowned Latin producers. Anahí once revealed that she was so nervous during recording that she re-recorded it multiple times, but was very satisfied with the final version.
items.artistIntroZh: Anahí是墨西哥歌手、演员和词曲作者，以童星出道，后成为拉丁流行偶像。她是著名团体RBD的成员之一，代表作包括《Sálvame》和《Hasta Que Llegues》。
items.artistIntroEn: Anahí is a Mexican singer, actress, and songwriter who debuted as a child star and later became a Latin pop idol. She was a member of the famous group RBD, with representative works including 'Sálvame' and 'Hasta Que Llegues'.

items.name: Ah Gönlüm
items.descriptionZh: 《Ah Gönlüm》是土耳其流行歌手Ceylan于2005年发行的专辑，融合了传统土耳其民间旋律与现代流行节奏，呈现出浓郁的安纳托利亚风情。核心特色在于Ceylan富有感染力的嗓音与情感充沛的演绎，专辑以抒情慢歌为主，配以轻柔的弦乐和电子合成器，营造出怀旧而温暖的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Ah Gönlüm" is a 2005 album by Turkish pop singer Ceylan, blending traditional Anatolian folk melodies with modern pop rhythms. Its core feature lies in Ceylan's emotionally charged vocals and heartfelt delivery, with抒情 ballads accompanied by soft strings and electronic synths, creating a nostalgic and warm atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的同名主打歌《Ah Gönlüm》原本是一首经典的土耳其民歌，Ceylan在录制时特意前往伊斯坦布尔的古老录音室，使用模拟设备来捕捉更温暖的声音质感。据制作人回忆，Ceylan在录制副歌部分时一度因情感投入过深而落泪，这一版本最终被保留在专辑中。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Ah Gönlüm" was originally a classic Turkish folk song. Ceylan deliberately recorded it in an old Istanbul studio using analog equipment to capture a warmer sound. The producer recalled that Ceylan was so emotionally moved while recording the chorus that she cried, and that take was kept in the final album.
items.artistIntroZh: Ceylan（本名Ceylan Erdem）是土耳其著名流行女歌手，以演绎土耳其传统民歌和流行抒情曲闻名。她的音乐风格融合了安纳托利亚民间元素与现代流行，代表作包括《Ah Gönlüm》和《Yalan Dünya》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ceylan (born Ceylan Erdem) is a renowned Turkish pop singer, known for interpreting traditional Turkish folk songs and pop ballads. Her music blends Anatolian folk elements with modern pop, with代表作 including "Ah Gönlüm" and "Yalan Dünya".

04-18.birthdayZh: 4月18日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾种下许多旋律，比如《Beam Me Up Scotty》里那种冲破云霄的勇气，像你从不安于被定义；又比如《Anclado En Mi Corazón》里那份甜美的锚，温柔地停泊在心底。愿你在新的一岁里，既有昂首远航的锋锐，也有被深情稳稳托住的安宁。生日快乐。
04-18.birthdayEn: April 18 is your birthday. On this day, Nicki Minaj released "Beam Me Up Scotty," a bold mixtape of unstoppable energy and ambition—may your year ahead be filled with that same fierce, star-bound spirit. And like Anahí's "Anclado En Mi Corazón," may your heart feel anchored in love, warmth, and all that grounds you. You are a beautiful blend of daring dreams and tender roots. Here's to a year as vibrant and soulful as the music born on your special day. Happy birthday

items.name: A Girl Like Me
items.descriptionZh: 《A Girl Like Me》是Rihanna于2006年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合了舞厅雷鬼、流行和嘻哈元素。核心特色在于其青春活力的节奏与Rihanna逐渐成熟的嗓音，标志着从少女偶像向国际巨星的转型。
items.descriptionEn: "A Girl Like Me" is Rihanna's second studio album, released in 2006, primarily in R&B and soul styles, blended with dancehall reggae, pop, and hip-hop. Its core feature lies in its youthful, energetic rhythms and Rihanna's maturing vocals, marking her transition from teen idol to global superstar.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中热门单曲《SOS》采样了Soft Cell的《Tainted Love》，但最初Rihanna并不喜欢这首歌，认为它太老派。制作人Evan Rogers说服她尝试录制，结果《SOS》成为Rihanna首支Billboard Hot 100冠军单曲。此外，专辑录制期间Rihanna年仅18岁，经常在录音室边写作业边录歌。
items.storiesEn: The hit single "SOS" samples Soft Cell's "Tainted Love," but Rihanna initially disliked the song, thinking it too old-fashioned. Producer Evan Rogers convinced her to try it, and "SOS" became her first Billboard Hot 100 number-one single. During recording, 18-year-old Rihanna often did homework while recording in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Rihanna在R&B流行界的地位，并帮助她打开了全球市场，为后续的超级巨星生涯奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Rihanna's status in the R&B/pop scene and helped her break into the global market, laying the foundation for her subsequent superstar career.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna（全名Robyn Rihanna Fenty）是巴巴多斯籍歌手、演员和企业家，主要风格为R&B、流行和舞厅雷鬼。代表作包括《Umbrella》《Diamonds》和《We Found Love》，是全球销量最高的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna (full name Robyn Rihanna Fenty) is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur, primarily known for R&B, pop, and dancehall reggae. Her代表作 include "Umbrella," "Diamonds," and "We Found Love," making her one of the best-selling female artists worldwide.

items.name: #willpower
items.descriptionZh: 《#willpower》是美国音乐人will.i.am于2013年发行的第四张个人录音室专辑，风格以电子舞曲为主，融合了嘻哈、流行和EDM元素。核心特色在于其高能量的电子节拍、大量客座艺人（如Justin Bieber、Britney Spears）以及未来主义制作风格。
items.descriptionEn: "#willpower" is the fourth solo studio album by American musician will.i.am, released in 2013, primarily in electronic dance music, blended with hip-hop, pop, and EDM. Its core features are high-energy electronic beats, numerous guest artists (e.g., Justin Bieber, Britney Spears), and a futuristic production style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《#thatPOWER》与Justin Bieber合作，但最初两人并未见面录制，而是通过文件交换完成。will.i.am曾开玩笑说，Bieber在录音室里用手机录下了自己的部分。此外，专辑名称中的#号是will.i.am对社交媒体文化的致敬，他认为“#”已取代“专辑”成为新的文化符号。
items.storiesEn: The lead single "#thatPOWER" featuring Justin Bieber was recorded without the two ever meeting in person, exchanging files instead. will.i.am joked that Bieber recorded his part on a phone. The hashtag in the album title was will.i.am's tribute to social media culture, believing "#" had replaced "album" as a cultural symbol.
items.artistIntroZh: will.i.am（本名William James Adams Jr.）是美国音乐人、制作人和黑眼豆豆创始成员，主要风格为嘻哈、电子和流行。代表作包括《Boom Boom Pow》《I Gotta Feeling》以及个人单曲《#thatPOWER》。
items.artistIntroEn: will.i.am (born William James Adams Jr.) is an American musician, producer, and founding member of The Black Eyed Peas, primarily known for hip-hop, electronic, and pop. His代表作 include "Boom Boom Pow," "I Gotta Feeling," and the solo single "#thatPOWER."

04-19.birthdayZh: 4月19日，是你的生日。就像《A Girl Like Me》里那份蜕变的勇气，你也在时光中温柔生长成自己的模样。愿你的每一步都带着《#willpower》的坚韧，即使电音般喧嚣的世界里，也能守住内心的节拍。今天，你是宇宙赠予自己的礼物，光是存在本身，就已足够明亮。
04-19.birthdayEn: April 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Rihanna's A Girl Like Me, a spark of boldness and rhythm, and will.i.am's #willpower, an anthem of unstoppable energy. Like these albums, you carry a blend of grace and fire, a melody that lifts every room you enter. May your new year hum with the same spirit: confident, bright, and endlessly in motion. Here’s to you—a beautiful chorus of light.

items.name: Music Has the Right to Children
items.descriptionZh: 《Music Has the Right to Children》是苏格兰电子双人组Boards of Canada于1998年发行的首张正式专辑，属于氛围电子/IDM风格。核心特色在于其怀旧、迷幻的音景，大量使用模拟合成器、低保真采样和经过扭曲处理的儿童声样本，营造出既温暖又略带忧郁的童年记忆氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Music Has the Right to Children" is the debut studio album by Scottish electronic duo Boards of Canada, released in 1998, in the ambient electronic/IDM style. Its core features are nostalgic, psychedelic soundscapes using analog synthesizers, lo-fi samples, and distorted children's voices, creating a warm yet melancholic childhood memory atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中大量使用了来自1970年代英国教育影片和儿童电视节目的采样，但乐队从未完全公开采样来源，以保持神秘感。录制过程持续了三年，大部分在成员Mike Sandison的卧室和Marcus Eoin的家中完成。专辑封面照片是Mike父亲在1970年代拍摄的，照片中的孩子是Mike本人。
items.storiesEn: The album heavily samples 1970s British educational films and children's TV shows, but the duo never fully disclosed the sources to maintain mystery. The recording took three years, mostly in Mike Sandison's bedroom and Marcus Eoin's home. The cover photo was taken by Mike's father in the 1970s, featuring Mike as a child.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被公认为氛围电子和IDM流派的里程碑之作，深刻影响了后来的电子音乐人如Flying Lotus和Oneohtrix Point Never，并开创了‘怀旧未来主义’电子音乐风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as a milestone in ambient electronic and IDM, deeply influencing later electronic artists like Flying Lotus and Oneohtrix Point Never, and pioneering the 'nostalgic futurism' electronic style.
items.artistIntroZh: Boards of Canada是苏格兰电子音乐双人组，由兄弟Mike Sandison和Marcus Eoin组成，主要风格为氛围电子、IDM和 downtempo。代表作包括《Music Has the Right to Children》和《Geogaddi》，以怀旧、迷幻的音景著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Boards of Canada is a Scottish electronic duo consisting of brothers Mike Sandison and Marcus Eoin, primarily known for ambient electronic, IDM, and downtempo. Their代表作 include "Music Has the Right to Children" and "Geogaddi," renowned for nostalgic, psychedelic soundscapes.

04-20.birthdayZh: 4月20日，是你的生日。这一天，Boards of Canada让《Music Has the Right to Children》降生，像一片温润的林地，告诉我们世间的旋律本该属于每一个孩子，包括你。你来到世界，也有权利拥有童真、柔软与快乐。愿你在自己的季节里，始终被音乐般的爱包裹，如同春天从不辜负每一粒种子。
04-20.birthdayEn: April 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Music Has the Right to Children," a gentle, swirling ode to nostalgia and wonder. Like that album, your presence feels like a warm, familiar melody—timeless and full of hidden joy. May your year ahead hold the same spirit: curious, expansive, and unafraid to dance in the quiet spaces. Here’s to you, a living soundtrack of light. Happy birthday.

items.name: ABBA
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA》是瑞典流行组合ABBA于1975年发行的同名第三张录音室专辑，风格以欧洲流行和迪斯科为主，融合了华丽摇滚和民谣元素。核心特色在于其精致的和声编排、朗朗上口的旋律以及制作人Björn和Benny对多轨录音技术的娴熟运用，呈现出明亮、乐观的流行之声。
items.descriptionEn: "ABBA" is the self-titled third studio album by Swedish pop group ABBA, released in 1975, primarily in Europop and disco, blended with glam rock and folk elements. Its core features are intricate vocal harmonies, catchy melodies, and producers Björn and Benny's masterful use of multi-track recording, delivering a bright, optimistic pop sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的经典曲目《Mamma Mia》最初被Björn和Benny认为过于简单，差点被弃用。但Agnetha和Anni-Frid坚持录制，最终成为ABBA的标志性歌曲。录制期间，乐队成员之间的关系开始出现裂痕，但他们在录音室仍保持专业合作。专辑封面由著名摄影师Ola Lager拍摄，背景是斯德哥尔摩的公园。
items.storiesEn: The classic track "Mamma Mia" was initially considered too simple by Björn and Benny and almost discarded. But Agnetha and Anni-Frid insisted on recording it, and it became an ABBA signature song. During recording, tensions in band members' relationships began to surface, but they maintained professional cooperation in the studio. The cover was shot by renowned photographer Ola Lager in a Stockholm park.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑将ABBA推向国际巨星地位，其中的《Mamma Mia》和《SOS》成为流行音乐史上最著名的歌曲之一，并启发了后来的音乐剧和电影《妈妈咪呀！》。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album propelled ABBA to international superstardom, with "Mamma Mia" and "SOS" becoming some of the most famous songs in pop history, later inspiring the musical and film "Mamma Mia!"
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行组合，成立于1972年，成员包括Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad，主要风格为欧洲流行和迪斯科。代表作包括《Dancing Queen》《Mamma Mia》和《Waterloo》，是全球最成功的流行组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop group formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad, primarily known for Europop and disco. Their代表作 include "Dancing Queen," "Mamma Mia," and "Waterloo," making them one of the most successful pop groups in history.

items.name: History, Mystery & Prophesy
items.descriptionZh: 《History, Mystery & Prophesy》是雷鬼传奇Lee "Scratch" Perry于1984年发行的实验性专辑，融合了雷鬼、Dub与迷幻元素。Perry标志性的粗糙制作风格和神秘主义歌词，配合扭曲的电子音效与即兴人声，创造出一种超现实的听觉体验，展现了他在世界音乐领域的先锋地位。
items.descriptionEn: "History, Mystery & Prophesy" is an experimental album released in 1984 by reggae legend Lee "Scratch" Perry, blending reggae, dub, and psychedelic elements. Perry's signature raw production style and mystical lyrics, paired with distorted electronic effects and improvisational vocals, create a surreal listening experience, showcasing his pioneering role in world music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Perry在牙买加著名的Black Ark录音室关闭之后，他移居伦敦期间完成。Perry在录音过程中经常即兴发挥，甚至用扩音器对着麦克风喊叫来制造特殊音效。专辑标题反映了他对历史预言和神秘学的痴迷，部分歌词灵感来自他阅读的圣经和神秘主义书籍。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded after Perry's famous Black Ark studio in Jamaica closed, during his time living in London. Perry often improvised during recording, even shouting through a megaphone into the microphone to create unique sound effects. The title reflects his obsession with historical prophecy and mysticism, with some lyrics inspired by his readings of the Bible and occult texts.
items.artistIntroZh: Lee "Scratch" Perry（1936-2021）是牙买加雷鬼和Dub音乐的先驱，被誉为“雷鬼教父”。他以创新的录音技术和神秘主义风格闻名，代表作包括《Super Ape》和《Roast Fish Collie Weed & Corn Bread》。
items.artistIntroEn: Lee "Scratch" Perry (1936-2021) was a Jamaican pioneer of reggae and dub music, known as the "Godfather of Reggae." He was famous for his innovative recording techniques and mystical style, with代表作 including "Super Ape" and "Roast Fish Collie Weed & Corn Bread."

04-21.birthdayZh: 4月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《ABBA》的快乐旋律，像阳光洒满每个角落，提醒你生命值得起舞；也有《History, Mystery & Prophesy》的深邃回响，教人从过往中汲取力量，勇敢走向未知。你正是这般存在：既绽放欢笑，又怀抱智慧。愿你在新的一岁，如专辑般丰富，永远温暖，永远向前。
04-21.birthdayEn: April 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world was graced by the release of ABBA’s joyful self-titled album, a burst of shimmering pop that feels like dancing in sunlight, and Lee “Scratch” Perry’s History, Mystery & Prophesy, a soulful, experimental journey into the unknown. Your birthday carries that same beautiful duality: the lighthearted joy of a sing-along and the deep mystery of a life unfolding. May your year ahead be as uplifting as a perfect chorus, as bold as a new rhythm, and as wonderfully, uniquely you.

items.name: Les Chansons en or
items.descriptionZh: 《Les Chansons en or》是Céline Dion于1986年在加拿大发行的法语精选集，收录了她早期职业生涯中的热门歌曲。这张专辑以流行和成人当代风格为主，展现了Dion清澈高亢的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎，是她从魁北克走向全球舞台的重要里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Les Chansons en or" is a French-language greatest hits compilation released by Céline Dion in Canada in 1986, featuring her early career hits. The album primarily showcases pop and adult contemporary styles, highlighting Dion's clear, powerful voice and emotional delivery, marking an important milestone in her journey from Quebec to the global stage.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Dion年仅18岁，已在魁北克地区获得巨大成功。专辑收录的歌曲大多由她的长期合作伙伴兼丈夫René Angélil制作，其中许多歌曲最初发行于她1981-1985年间的录音室专辑。Dion曾回忆，这张专辑让她意识到自己正在建立持久的音乐生涯。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Dion was only 18 and had already achieved great success in Quebec. Most songs on the album were produced by her long-time partner and husband René Angélil, many originally from her studio albums between 1981 and 1985. Dion recalled that this album made her realize she was building a lasting music career.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion（生于1968年）是加拿大法语和英语流行歌手，被誉为“流��天后”。她以强大的嗓音和情感演绎闻名，代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》和《The Power of Love》，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion (born 1968) is a Canadian French and English pop singer, known as the "Pop Diva." She is famous for her powerful voice and emotional performances, with代表作 including "My Heart Will Go On" and "The Power of Love," selling over 200 million records worldwide.

items.name: Around the World in a Day
items.descriptionZh: 《Around the World in a Day》是Prince于1985年发行的第七张录音室专辑，延续了他标志性的Pop和Funk风格，同时融入了迷幻摇滚、灵魂乐和世界音乐元素。专辑以丰富的编曲和实验性制作著称，歌词充满神秘主义和浪漫意象，展现了Prince在音乐上的多才多艺。
items.descriptionEn: "Around the World in a Day" is Prince's seventh studio album, released in 1985, continuing his signature pop and funk style while incorporating psychedelic rock, soul, and world music elements. The album is known for its rich arrangements and experimental production, with lyrics full of mysticism and romantic imagery, showcasing Prince's musical versatility.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Prince对1984年超级成功专辑《Purple Rain》的刻意反叛，他拒绝复制商业成功，转而探���更迷幻的声音。专辑在明尼阿波利斯的Paisley Park录音室录制，Prince几乎独自演奏所有乐器。封面艺术由他亲自设计，灵感来自印度神秘主义。
items.storiesEn: This album was Prince's deliberate rebellion against the massive success of his 1984 album "Purple Rain," as he refused to replicate commercial success and instead explored a more psychedelic sound. Recorded at Paisley Park Studios in Minneapolis, Prince played almost all instruments himself. The cover art was designed by him, inspired by Indian mysticism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑展示了Prince拒绝被商业束缚的艺术独立性，影响了后来众多流行和R&B艺术家在商业成功后尝试实验性风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album demonstrated Prince's artistic independence in refusing to be bound by commercial expectations, influencing many later pop and R&B artists to experiment stylistically after commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince（1958-2016）是美国歌手、词曲作者和音乐制作人，被誉为“流行音乐天才”。他以融合Funk、Rock、Pop和R&B的风格著称，代表作包括《Purple Rain》和《1999》，全球销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince (1958-2016) was an American singer, songwriter, and music producer, known as a "pop music genius." He was famous for blending funk, rock, pop, and R&B, with代表作 including "Purple Rain" and "1999," selling over 100 million records worldwide.

04-22.birthdayZh: 4月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Around the World in a Day》的迷幻旋律，提醒你人生是一场辽阔的旅行，不必急于抵达终点。而《Les Chansons en or》里那些金曲，像时光酿成的光，照亮了你走过的每一步。愿你在新的一岁里，依然温柔而坚定，像每一首好歌一样，在自己的节奏里闪闪发光。
04-22.birthdayEn: April 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the psychedelic dreamscape of Prince’s Around the World in a Day, swirling with color and joyful rebellion. Like Céline’s Les Chansons en or, your life is a golden medley—each year a new verse, each memory a chorus of light. May your path be as bold as Prince’s rhythm and as tender as a timeless song. Celebrate the beautiful album you are, still unwritten, still soaring.

items.name: And Now the Legacy Begins
items.descriptionZh: 《And Now the Legacy Begins》是加拿大嘻哈组合Dream Warriors于1991年发行的首张专辑，融合了East Coast嘻哈与爵士说唱风格。以流畅的节奏、采样丰富的制作和富有社会意识的歌词为特色，专辑展现了加拿大嘻哈的独特声音，被认为是90年代早期嘻哈经典之一。
items.descriptionEn: "And Now the Legacy Begins" is the debut album by Canadian hip-hop group Dream Warriors, released in 1991, blending East Coast hip-hop with jazz rap style. Characterized by smooth rhythms, sample-rich production, and socially conscious lyrics, the album showcased a unique Canadian hip-hop sound and is considered a classic of early 90s hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于多伦多，制作人包括DJ Luv和King Lou，他们大量采样了爵士和灵魂乐唱片。主打歌《My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style》采样了Quincy Jones的《Soul Bossa Nova》，并成为国际热门单曲。成员King Lou曾表示，专辑标题反映了他们希望建立加拿大嘻哈传统的愿望��
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Toronto, with producers including DJ Luv and King Lou, who heavily sampled jazz and soul records. The lead single "My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style" sampled Quincy Jones' "Soul Bossa Nova" and became an international hit. Member King Lou once said the album title reflected their desire to establish a Canadian hip-hop legacy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是加拿大嘻哈的奠基之作，推动了爵士说唱流派的发展，并对后来加拿大嘻哈艺人产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a foundational work of Canadian hip-hop, helping to advance the jazz rap genre and significantly influencing later Canadian hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Dream Warriors是加拿大嘻哈二人组，由King Lou和Capital Q组成，来自多伦多。他们以爵士说唱风格和社会意识歌词闻名，代表作包括《My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style》和《Ludi》，是加拿大嘻哈的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Dream Warriors are a Canadian hip-hop duo consisting of King Lou and Capital Q, from Toronto. They are known for their jazz rap style and socially conscious lyrics, with代表作 including "My Definition of a Boombastic Jazz Style" and "Ludi," pioneers of Canadian hip-hop.

items.name: The Reminder
items.descriptionZh: 《The Reminder》是加拿大独立流行歌手Feist于2007年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了Indie Pop、Folk和爵士元素。以温暖的原声吉他、细腻的旋律和Feist独特沙哑嗓音为特色，专辑营造出亲密而温暖的氛围，展现了她在流行音乐中的艺术深度。
items.descriptionEn: "The Reminder" is the third studio album by Canadian indie pop singer Feist, released in 2007, blending indie pop, folk, and jazz elements. Characterized by warm acoustic guitars, delicate melodies, and Feist's distinctive raspy voice, the album creates an intimate and warm atmosphere, showcasing her artistic depth in pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于法国巴黎的一座古老庄园，Feist与制作人Mocky合作，采用现场录音方式捕捉即兴灵感。主打歌《1234》最初是为儿童电视节目创作的，后被iPod广告选用，使Feist全球爆红。Feist曾表示，专辑名《The Reminder》源自她希望提醒自己保持艺术真诚的愿望。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at an old estate in Paris, France, with Feist collaborating with producer Mocky, using live recording to capture spontaneous inspiration. The lead single "1234" was originally written for a children's TV show, then used in an iPod commercial, catapulting Feist to global fame. Feist has said the album title "The Reminder" came from her desire to remind herself to stay artistically genuine.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《1234》因iPod广告成为2000年代最具标志性的流行歌曲之一，极大推动了独立音乐进入主流视野。
items.historicalImpactEn: "1234" became one of the most iconic pop songs of the 2000s due to its iPod commercial, significantly pushing indie music into the mainstream spotlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Feist（生于1976年）是加拿大独立流行歌手和词曲作者，以沙哑嗓音和细腻旋律闻名。代表作包括《1234》和《I Feel It All》，曾获格莱美提名，是加拿大独立音乐的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Feist (born 1976) is a Canadian indie pop singer and songwriter, known for her raspy voice and delicate melodies. Her代表作 include "1234" and "I Feel It All," earning Grammy nominations, and she is a leading figure in Canadian indie music.

items.name: Crystal Castles
items.descriptionZh: 《Crystal Castles》是加拿大电子乐队Crystal Castles的第二张同名专辑，融合了chiptune、lo-fi和实验流行元素。作品以扭曲的8-bit音色、破碎的节奏和Ethan Kath标志性的低保真制作著称，Alice Glass的嘶吼与脆弱人声形成强烈对比，营造出既狂躁又迷幻的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Crystal Castles' second self-titled album blends chiptune, lo-fi, and experimental pop. Known for its distorted 8-bit sounds, fractured rhythms, and Ethan Kath's signature lo-fi production, it contrasts Alice Glass's shrieks with fragile vocals, creating a manic yet dreamy auditory experience.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队成员Ethan Kath和Alice Glass曾因创作分歧激烈争吵，但最终达成了独特的合作模式：Kath在卧室用老旧设备制作粗粝的电子音轨，Glass则在录音室即兴演唱，许多歌曲的歌词都是她当天写就。专辑封面上的霓虹十字架灵感来自多伦多一家废弃教堂的招牌。
items.storiesEn: During recording, band members Ethan Kath and Alice Glass had intense creative clashes but eventually forged a unique workflow: Kath produced raw electronic tracks on old gear in his bedroom, while Glass improvised vocals in the studio, writing many lyrics on the same day. The neon-cross album cover was inspired by a sign from an abandoned church in Toronto.
items.artistIntroZh: Crystal Castles是2003年成立于加拿大多伦多的电子乐队，核心成员为Ethan Kath和Alice Glass。他们以融合chiptune、噪音流行和实验电子著称，代表作包括同名专辑和《III》等，被誉为21世纪初独立电子场景的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Crystal Castles is an electronic band formed in Toronto, Canada in 2003, centered on Ethan Kath and Alice Glass. Known for blending chiptune, noise pop, and experimental electronics, their self-titled albums and 'III' are landmarks of early-2000s indie electronic scene.

04-23.birthdayZh: 4月23日，是你的生日。这一天的风里，藏着《The Reminder》的温柔，像Feist轻轻哼唱——提醒你，世界有一间暖屋，总为你亮着灯。而《And Now the Legacy Begins》正低声说：你的故事，从今天写下第一行。不必急着成为什么，你站在这里，本身就是一份礼物。
04-23.birthdayEn: April 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of "The Reminder" by Feist—a warm, intimate album that feels like a quiet sunrise, reminding us to listen closely to life’s small melodies. Like "Crystal Castles," your spirit carries both shimmering light and bold, electric energy. May your year ahead be a beautiful blend of gentle reflection and daring new beats. Happy birthday—you are a legacy in the making, a song only you could write.

items.name: Around the World
items.descriptionZh: 《Around the World》是Mariah Carey的精选专辑，收录了她1990年代的多首全球热门单曲，如《Honey》《My All》等。风格以R&B/Soul为基底，融合流行与成人抒情，展现了Carey标志性的五度八度音域和花腔技巧，制作精良，情感饱满。
items.descriptionEn: 'Around the World' is a Mariah Carey compilation featuring global hits from the 1990s, including 'Honey' and 'My All'. Rooted in R&B/Soul with pop and adult contemporary influences, it showcases Carey's signature five-octave range and melismatic runs, with polished production and emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Mariah Carey正处于与哥伦比亚唱片公司合约的最后阶段。她亲自参与了曲目筛选，并坚持加入一首未发行曲目《Whenever You Call》，作为给歌迷的惊喜。专辑封面在纽约拍摄，Carey穿着复古礼服，灵感来自她最爱的经典好莱坞电影。
items.storiesEn: Released near the end of Mariah Carey's contract with Columbia Records, she personally selected the tracklist and insisted on including an unreleased song 'Whenever You Call' as a gift to fans. The album cover was shot in New York, with Carey in a vintage gown inspired by her favorite classic Hollywood films.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，出生于纽约，以五度八度音域和花腔技巧闻名。主要风格为R&B、流行和灵魂乐，代表作包括《Vision of Love》《We Belong Together》等，是史上最畅销的音乐艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer, songwriter, and actress from New York, known for her five-octave vocal range and melismatic style. Her music spans R&B, pop, and soul, with hits like 'Vision of Love' and 'We Belong Together'. She is one of the best-selling music artists of all time.

items.name: ...I Care Because You Do
items.descriptionZh: 《...I Care Because You Do》是Aphex Twin的第四张录音室专辑，融合了环境音乐、酸科技和实验电子。作品以复杂的节奏编程、扭曲的合成器音色和阴郁的旋律著称，既有暴烈的鼓机爆发，也有细腻的钢琴段落，展现了Richard D. James对声音结构的极致探索。
items.descriptionEn: '...I Care Because You Do' is Aphex Twin's fourth studio album, blending ambient, acid techno, and experimental electronics. Known for complex rhythm programming, distorted synth textures, and melancholic melodies, it alternates between violent drum-machine bursts and delicate piano passages, showcasing Richard D. James's extreme sonic exploration.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题来自Richard D. James对听众的嘲讽回应——他曾说人们抱怨他的音乐太难懂，但他之所以创作这些作品，正是因为在乎听众。封面上的自画像由他本人用一台老式扫描仪制作，他将自己的脸压在玻璃上，创造出了扭曲而诡异的图像。
items.storiesEn: The album title is Richard D. James's sarcastic response to listeners who complained his music was too difficult—he claimed he made it because he cares. The self-portrait cover was created using an old scanner: James pressed his face against the glass to produce a distorted, eerie image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为IDM（智能舞曲）流派的里程碑之一，影响了后续大量实验电子音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a landmark of the IDM (Intelligent Dance Music) genre, influencing countless experimental electronic artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin是英国电子音乐人Richard D. James的艺名，出生于爱尔兰，以创新的电子音乐和神秘形象闻名。主要风格包括环境、酸科技和实验电子，代表作有《Selected Ambient Works 85-92》和《Richard D. James Album》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin is the alias of British electronic musician Richard D. James, born in Ireland. Known for innovative electronic music and enigmatic persona, his styles include ambient, acid techno, and experimental electronics, with landmark works like 'Selected Ambient Works 85-92' and 'Richard D. James Album'.

items.name: All for You
items.descriptionZh: 《All for You》是Janet Jackson的第七张录音室专辑，以流行和R&B为基底，融合放克、舞曲和轻柔灵魂乐。作品以轻快的节奏、朗朗上口的旋律和Janet标志性的性感低语演唱为特色，主题围绕爱情、自信和解放，制作人Jimmy Jam和Terry Lewis赋予了专辑流畅的都市感。
items.descriptionEn: 'All for You' is Janet Jackson's seventh studio album, rooted in pop and R&B with funk, dance, and soft soul elements. Characterized by upbeat rhythms, catchy melodies, and Janet's signature breathy vocals, the album's themes center on love, confidence, and liberation, with Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis providing a sleek urban production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌采样了美国放克乐队The SOS Band的《Just Be Good to Me》，Janet在创作时特意向该乐队致敬。录制期间，她刚与丈夫René Elizondo Jr.分居，专辑中许多歌曲都反映了她重获单身自由后的愉悦心境。
items.storiesEn: The title track samples 'Just Be Good to Me' by funk band The SOS Band, as a deliberate homage. During recording, Janet had recently separated from husband René Elizondo Jr., and many songs reflect her newfound freedom and joy as a single woman.
items.artistIntroZh: Janet Jackson是美国歌手、演员和舞者，出生于印第安纳州，是Jackson家族中最小的成员。主要风格为流行、R&B和舞曲，代表作包括《Rhythm Nation 1814》和《Janet》等，以其创新的音乐视频和舞台表演闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer, actress, and dancer from Indiana, the youngest member of the Jackson family. Her music spans pop, R&B, and dance, with iconic albums like 'Rhythm Nation 1814' and 'Janet', known for innovative music videos and stage performances.

04-24.birthdayZh: 4月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Around the World》的派对节拍，那是蜕变与勇气的序曲；也流淌过《All for You》的甜蜜和声，是自由与自我赋权的温柔宣言。音乐收藏着所有生日的星光，而你值得拥有整片宇宙的暖意。无论走到哪里，你都是自己生命里最明亮的主旋律。
04-24.birthdayEn: April 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Janet Jackson’s “All for You,” a celebration of joy and liberation, and Mariah Carey’s “Around the World,” a journey of reaching new heights. May your spirit feel as free as Janet’s groove, and your path as boundless as Mariah’s horizon. Here’s to a year of embracing every radiant, thrilling adventure—because the world turns for you, and you deserve all the light it holds. Happy birthday.

items.name: In the Wee Small Hours
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Wee Small Hours》是Frank Sinatra的第九张录音室专辑，被公认为最早的“概念专辑”之一。风格以传统流行和爵士民谣为主，编曲以弦乐和钢琴为主导，营造出深夜独处的孤寂氛围。Sinatra以低沉、内敛的嗓音演绎了16首关于失恋与反思的歌曲，情感细腻而克制。
items.descriptionEn: 'In the Wee Small Hours' is Frank Sinatra's ninth studio album, widely regarded as one of the first concept albums. Stylistically traditional pop and jazz ballad, it features string and piano arrangements evoking late-night solitude. Sinatra delivers 16 songs of heartbreak and reflection with a low, restrained voice, emotionally nuanced and understated.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于Sinatra与Ava Gardner婚姻破裂期间，他每晚都在录音室工作到凌晨，将个人痛苦注入音乐。制作人Nelson Riddle特意采用小乐队编制，让Sinatra的嗓音成为绝对焦点。专辑封面由摄影师Tom Palumbo拍摄，捕捉了Sinatra在深夜街头孤独徘徊的意境。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during Sinatra's crumbling marriage to Ava Gardner, he worked in the studio until dawn each night, channeling his personal anguish. Producer Nelson Riddle deliberately used a small ensemble to spotlight Sinatra's voice. The cover, shot by Tom Palumbo, captures Sinatra wandering lonely streets at night.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开创了“概念专辑”的先河，对后世歌手如Tony Bennett和Bob Dylan的专辑创作模式产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album pioneered the concept album format, deeply influencing later artists like Tony Bennett and Bob Dylan in their album-making approach.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra是美国歌手、演员和制作人，出生于新泽西州，被誉为20世纪最伟大的流行歌手之一。主要风格为传统流行和爵士，代表作包括《My Way》《New York, New York》等，以其独特的嗓音和舞台魅力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra was an American singer, actor, and producer from New Jersey, regarded as one of the greatest pop vocalists of the 20th century. His styles include traditional pop and jazz, with iconic songs like 'My Way' and 'New York, New York', known for his distinctive voice and stage charisma.

items.name: Bad Girls
items.descriptionZh: 《Bad Girls》是Donna Summer在1979年发行的经典专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐和迪斯科元素。专辑以强劲的节奏、性感的嗓音和派对氛围为核心特色，展现了Donna Summer作为“迪斯科女王”的独特魅力。其中同名主打歌《Bad Girls》和《Hot Stuff》成为时代标志，完美体现了R&B/Soul的律动与情感深度。
items.descriptionEn: "Bad Girls" is a classic album released by Donna Summer in 1979, blending R&B, soul, and disco elements. Its core features include powerful rhythms, sultry vocals, and a party atmosphere, showcasing Donna Summer's unique charm as the "Queen of Disco." The title track "Bad Girls" and "Hot Stuff" became era-defining hits, perfectly embodying the groove and emotional depth of R&B/Soul.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Donna Summer与制作人Giorgio Moroder和Pete Bellotte在慕尼黑的Musicland Studios合作。据说《Bad Girls》的灵感来源于一位街头妓女对Summer的挑衅，她随即创作了这首歌。专辑发行后，Donna Summer因与唱片公司管理层发生争执，一度拒绝宣传，但最终专辑仍大获成功。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Donna Summer worked with producers Giorgio Moroder and Pete Bellotte at Musicland Studios in Munich. It is said that the inspiration for "Bad Girls" came from a street prostitute who taunted Summer, prompting her to write the song. After the album's release, Donna Summer had a dispute with record label management and initially refused to promote it, but the album still achieved great success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bad Girls》巩固了Donna Summer作为迪斯科时代最具影响力的女歌手之一的地位，并推动了R&B与迪斯科的融合，对后来的流行和舞曲音乐产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Bad Girls" solidified Donna Summer's status as one of the most influential female singers of the disco era and promoted the fusion of R&B and disco, profoundly impacting later pop and dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: Donna Summer（1948-2012），美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。她的音乐融合迪斯科、R&B和灵魂乐，代表作包括《Hot Stuff》、《Bad Girls》和《I Feel Love》，在全球售出超过1亿张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer (1948-2012) was an American singer and songwriter, known as the "Queen of Disco." Her music blended disco, R&B, and soul, with hits including "Hot Stuff," "Bad Girls," and "I Feel Love," selling over 100 million records worldwide.

items.name: The Heat
items.descriptionZh: 《The Heat》是Toni Braxton在2000年发行的第四张录音室专辑，主打流行和成人当代风格。专辑以细腻的情感表达、流畅的旋律和Toni标志性的低沉嗓音为核心特色。其中单曲《He Wasn't Man Enough》成为热门，展现了她在流行领域的强大影响力，同时保留了R&B的抒情底蕴。
items.descriptionEn: "The Heat" is Toni Braxton's fourth studio album, released in 2000, featuring pop and adult contemporary styles. Its core features include delicate emotional expression, smooth melodies, and Toni's signature deep vocals. The single "He Wasn't Man Enough" became a hit, showcasing her strong influence in the pop realm while retaining her R&B ballad roots.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，Toni Braxton与多位知名制作人合作，包括Rodney Jerkins和Babyface。据Toni回忆，录制《He Wasn't Man Enough》时，她因个人情感经历而投入了极大的真实情感，甚至一度在录音室落泪。专辑发行后，Toni因健康问题减少了宣传行程，但专辑仍取得商业成功。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Toni Braxton collaborated with renowned producers including Rodney Jerkins and Babyface. Toni recalled that while recording "He Wasn't Man Enough," she drew heavily from her personal emotional experiences, even breaking into tears in the studio. After the album's release, Toni reduced her promotional schedule due to health issues, but the album still achieved commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: Toni Braxton（1967年生），美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以低沉性感的嗓音著称。她的音乐风格以R&B和流行为主，代表作包括《Un-Break My Heart》、《Breathe Again》和《He Wasn't Man Enough》，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Toni Braxton (born 1967) is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known for her deep, sultry voice. Her music primarily blends R&B and pop, with hits including "Un-Break My Heart," "Breathe Again," and "He Wasn't Man Enough," winning multiple Grammy Awards.

04-25.birthdayZh: 4月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起一份温柔的隐喻：当《In the Wee Small Hours》的弦乐在深夜轻抚孤独，当《Bad Girls》的节拍点亮都市的浮华与倔强，你的降临便成了某种答案——你既拥有深夜的低语与自省，也拥有尽情绽放的勇气。愿你在属于自己的时区里，从容地亮起光。
04-25.birthdayEn: April 25 is your birthday. Like the tender, midnight courage of Sinatra’s *In the Wee Small Hours*, your day arrives with quiet power—a turning point into a new season of grace. May you feel the radiant, unstoppable spirit of *Bad Girls*, bold and free, dancing through every moment. On this day, you are the melody, the warmth, and the hope. Happy birthday—may your year be as timeless and brilliant as the songs that share your date.

items.name: D12 World
items.descriptionZh: 《D12 World》是美国嘻哈团体D12在2004年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格为硬核嘻哈和地下说唱。专辑以粗犷的歌词、激烈的节奏和成员间的默契配合为核心特色，展现了底特律街头文化的真实面貌。Eminem作为核心成员，为专辑增添了商业与艺术的双重吸引力。
items.descriptionEn: "D12 World" is the second studio album by American hip-hop group D12, released in 2004, featuring hardcore hip-hop and underground rap. Its core features include gritty lyrics, intense beats, and seamless collaboration among members, reflecting the authentic Detroit street culture. Eminem, as a core member, added both commercial and artistic appeal to the album.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，D12成员经常在底特律的录音室即兴创作，氛围轻松但竞争激烈。Eminem曾透露，专辑中《My Band》这首歌原本只是玩笑之作，却意外成为热门单曲。此外，成员Proof在专辑发行后不久不幸去世，使这张专辑成为D12早期阵容的珍贵遗作。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, D12 members often improvised in Detroit studios, creating a relaxed yet competitive atmosphere. Eminem revealed that the song "My Band" was originally a joke but unexpectedly became a hit single. Additionally, member Proof passed away shortly after the album's release, making this album a treasured legacy of D12's early lineup.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《D12 World》巩固了D12在嘻哈界的地位，并展示了Eminem作为团体成员的另一面，对中西部嘻哈场景产生了持续影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "D12 World" solidified D12's status in the hip-hop scene and showcased Eminem's role as a group member, leaving a lasting impact on the Midwest hip-hop landscape.
items.artistIntroZh: D12（又名D-Twelve），美国嘻哈团体，1996年成立于底特律，成员包括Eminem、Proof、Bizarre等。他们以硬核说唱和幽默风格著称，代表作有《D12 World》和《My Band》，是底特律嘻哈的代表团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: D12 (also known as D-Twelve) is an American hip-hop group formed in Detroit in 1996, with members including Eminem, Proof, and Bizarre. Known for their hardcore rap and humorous style, their notable works include "D12 World" and "My Band," representing Detroit hip-hop.

items.name: Laura Pausini
items.descriptionZh: 《Laura Pausini》是意大利歌手Laura Pausini在1993年发行的同名首张专辑，风格为流行和成人当代。专辑以深情抒情的旋律、Laura清澈而富有感染力的嗓音为核心特色，歌词多围绕爱情与情感主题。这张专辑让她一举成名，成为意大利流行音乐的代表人物。
items.descriptionEn: "Laura Pausini" is the self-titled debut album by Italian singer Laura Pausini, released in 1993, featuring pop and adult contemporary styles. Its core features include heartfelt melodies and Laura's clear, emotive vocals, with lyrics centered on love and emotional themes. This album catapulted her to fame, establishing her as a representative figure in Italian pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑在意大利的圣雷莫音乐节后录制，Laura Pausini凭借参赛歌曲《La solitudine》获得新人奖，随后迅速推出此专辑。录制过程中，Laura年仅19岁，由父亲Fabrizio Pausini担任制作人。专辑在意大利大卖后，Laura开始学习西班牙语以开拓国际市场，为后续成功奠定基础。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded after the Sanremo Music Festival in Italy, where Laura Pausini won the Newcomer Award with her entry song "La solitudine," leading to the rapid release of this album. During recording, Laura was only 19 years old, with her father Fabrizio Pausini serving as producer. After the album's huge success in Italy, Laura began learning Spanish to expand into international markets, laying the foundation for her later success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑使Laura Pausini成为首位在全球范围内获得成功的意大利流行女歌手，推动了意大利流行音乐的国际传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album made Laura Pausini the first Italian female pop singer to achieve global success, promoting the international spread of Italian pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Laura Pausini（1974年生），意大利歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“意大利流行天后”。她的音乐以抒情流行和成人当代为主，代表作包括《La solitudine》、《Se bastasse una canzone》和《Vivimi》，在全球售出超过7000万张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Laura Pausini (born 1974) is an Italian singer and songwriter, known as the "Queen of Italian Pop." Her music focuses on lyrical pop and adult contemporary, with hits including "La solitudine," "Se bastasse una canzone," and "Vivimi," selling over 70 million records worldwide.

items.name: American Recordings
items.descriptionZh: 《American Recordings》是美国传奇歌手Johnny Cash在1994年发行的专辑，风格为民谣和乡村。专辑以极简的编曲为核心特色——仅由Johnny Cash的吉他和低沉嗓音构成，凸显了歌曲的叙事性和情感深度。这张专辑标志着他职业生涯的复兴，被称为“回归本源”之作。
items.descriptionEn: "American Recordings" is a 1994 album by American legendary singer Johnny Cash, featuring folk and country styles. Its core feature is minimalist arrangements—consisting only of Johnny Cash's guitar and deep voice—highlighting the narrative and emotional depth of the songs. This album marked a career revival and is considered a "return to roots" work.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由制作人Rick Rubin主导，他在Johnny Cash事业低谷时邀请他录制。最初Cash对仅用吉他演唱的极简风格感到不安，但Rubin坚持保留原始质感。录制地点选在Cash的家中和录音室，氛围私密。专辑收录了翻唱歌曲，包括Soundgarden的《Rusty Cage》，展现了Cash跨越代际的影响力。
items.storiesEn: The album was spearheaded by producer Rick Rubin, who invited Johnny Cash to record during a career low point. Cash was initially uneasy about the minimalist style of just guitar and vocals, but Rubin insisted on preserving the raw quality. Recording took place at Cash's home and in studios, creating an intimate atmosphere. The album included covers, such as Soundgarden's "Rusty Cage," showcasing Cash's cross-generational influence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《American Recordings》被广泛认为是Johnny Cash职业生涯的转折点，复兴了他的音乐事业，并影响了后续的“美国”系列专辑，成为乡村和民谣音乐复兴的标志性作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: "American Recordings" is widely regarded as a turning point in Johnny Cash's career, reviving his musical legacy and influencing the subsequent "American" series, becoming an iconic work in the revival of country and folk music.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（1932-2003），美国歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“乡村音乐之王”。他的音乐融合乡村、民谣、摇滚和福音，代表作包括《I Walk the Line》、《Folsom Prison Blues》和《Ring of Fire》，在全球售出超过9000万张唱片。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash (1932-2003) was an American singer and songwriter, known as the "Man in Black" and the "King of Country Music." His music blended country, folk, rock, and gospel, with hits including "I Walk the Line," "Folsom Prison Blues," and "Ring of Fire," selling over 90 million records worldwide.

04-26.birthdayZh: 4月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为D12的硬核呐喊掀起风暴，也为Johnny Cash的木吉他低吟铺满星光。你不必呐喊如暴风，也不必沉默如深谷——生命本就该像《American Recordings》那样，用最朴素的质地唱出最深沉的自由。愿你在自己的节奏里，听见生命回响的温柔和力量。
04-26.birthdayEn: April 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed Johnny Cash’s raw, honest *American Recordings*—a reminder that stripping away noise reveals our truest strength. Your life, like that album, is a quiet anthem of resilience. And like the bold, unapologetic energy of D12’s *D12 World*, you bring your own unique rhythm to every room. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of brave, beautiful notes, written by you alone. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mundial
items.descriptionZh: 《Mundial》是Daddy Yankee在2010年发行的嘻哈专辑，融合了雷击顿与拉丁嘻哈元素，展现了他在全球音乐舞台上的统治力。专辑以强劲的节奏和街头叙事为核心，凸显了Daddy Yankee作为拉丁嘻哈先锋的独特风格。
items.descriptionEn: Mundial is a hip-hop album released by Daddy Yankee in 2010, blending reggaeton and Latin hip-hop elements, showcasing his dominance on the global music stage. The album features strong rhythms and street narratives, highlighting Daddy Yankee's unique style as a Latin hip-hop pioneer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，Daddy Yankee特意邀请了多位拉丁音乐制作人合作，以保持其波多黎各根源的真实性。专辑发行后，他曾在采访中表示，这张作品是他对全球足球文化的致敬，因为“Mundial”在西班牙语中意为“世界杯”。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Daddy Yankee specifically invited multiple Latin music producers to collaborate to maintain the authenticity of his Puerto Rican roots. After its release, he stated in an interview that this work was his tribute to global football culture, as 'Mundial' means 'World Cup' in Spanish.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑进一步巩固了Daddy Yankee在拉丁嘻哈领域的国际地位，推动了雷击顿音乐在全球的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album further solidified Daddy Yankee's international status in Latin hip-hop and promoted the global popularity of reggaeton music.
items.artistIntroZh: Daddy Yankee，波多黎各歌手、词曲作者，被誉为“雷击顿之王”。他的音乐融合了嘻哈、雷击顿和拉丁节奏，代表作包括《Gasolina》和《Despacito》。
items.artistIntroEn: Daddy Yankee is a Puerto Rican singer and songwriter, known as the 'King of Reggaeton'. His music blends hip-hop, reggaeton, and Latin rhythms, with代表作 including 'Gasolina' and 'Despacito'.

items.name: Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《Touch》是NEWS在2005年发行的流行专辑，以轻快的旋律和青春活力的编曲为特色，展现了杰尼斯事务所偶像团体的典型风格。专辑主打歌融合了电子流行元素，体现了日本流行音乐的多元化。
items.descriptionEn: Touch is a pop album released by NEWS in 2005, characterized by upbeat melodies and youthful arrangements, showcasing the typical style of Johnny & Associates idol groups. The lead single incorporates electronic pop elements, reflecting the diversity of Japanese pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行正值NEWS成员变动时期，团体经历重组后首次推出完整专辑。录制过程中，成员们为了呈现最佳状态，进行了密集的舞蹈和声乐训练，专辑封面设计也融入了“触感”概念，强调与粉丝的情感连接。
items.storiesEn: The album was released during a period of member changes for NEWS, marking their first full album after a reorganization. During recording, members underwent intensive dance and vocal training to present their best, and the album cover design incorporated the concept of 'touch', emphasizing an emotional connection with fans.
items.artistIntroZh: NEWS是日本杰尼斯事务所旗下的男子偶像团体，成立于2003年。他们的音乐风格以流行和舞曲为主，代表作包括《希望～Yell～》和《weeeek》。
items.artistIntroEn: NEWS is a Japanese male idol group under Johnny & Associates, formed in 2003. Their music style is primarily pop and dance, with hit songs including 'Kibou ~Yell~' and 'weeeek'.

04-27.birthdayZh: 4月27日，是你的生日。像《Mundial》里跃动的雷鬼节奏，你自带一种让世界欢腾的力量，让每个平凡日子都像派对开场。而《Touch》中流淌的青春与梦想，像晨光轻轻触碰你的肩膀——提醒你，无论走多远，那份轻盈与勇敢从未离开。生日快乐，愿你像这一天发行的专辑一样，永远热烈，永远被温柔以待。
04-27.birthdayEn: April 27 is your birthday, a date marked by rhythm and promise. On this day, the world welcomed albums like Daddy Yankee’s “Mundial,” a vibrant celebration of unity and movement, and NEWS’s “Touch,” a tender reminder of connection. May your year ahead carry that same spirit—bold yet gentle, global yet intimate, like a song that lifts the heart. You are a melody of light, and today the whole world tunes in to honor you. Keep shining, and may every beat of this new chapter feel like home.

items.name: Hard Candy
items.descriptionZh: 《Hard Candy》是麦当娜在2008年发行的嘻哈风格��辑，融合了流行、舞曲和R&B元素，展现了她在音乐上的大胆转型。专辑与多位嘻哈制作人合作，呈现出强劲的节拍和自信的歌词。
items.descriptionEn: Hard Candy is a hip-hop-influenced album released by Madonna in 2008, blending pop, dance, and R&B elements, showcasing her bold musical transformation. The album features collaborations with multiple hip-hop producers, delivering strong beats and confident lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，麦当娜与制作人Timbaland、Pharrell Williams及Justin Timberlake合作，他们在迈阿密的录音室中进行了长达数月的创作。麦当娜曾透露，专辑名称“Hard Candy”象征她在音乐和生活中保持的坚韧态度。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Madonna collaborated with producers Timbaland, Pharrell Williams, and Justin Timberlake, working for months in a Miami studio. Madonna once revealed that the album title 'Hard Candy' symbolizes her tough attitude in music and life.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是麦当娜在嘻哈领域的重要尝试，进一步拓展了她的音乐边界，并影响了后来流行歌手与嘻哈制作人的跨界合作。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a significant hip-hop venture for Madonna, expanding her musical boundaries and influencing later cross-genre collaborations between pop singers and hip-hop producers.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜，美国歌手、演员，被誉为“流行女王”。她的音乐风格涵盖流行、舞曲和电子，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》和《Vogue》。
