items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer and actress, known as the 'Queen of Pop'. Her music spans pop, dance, and electronic genres, with iconic songs like 'Like a Virgin' and 'Vogue'.

items.name: Kara Special Premium Box for Japan
items.descriptionZh: 《Kara Special Premium Box for Japan》是韩国女子组合Kara在2010年为日本市场发行的精选集，融合了流行和舞曲风格，展现了她们甜美的嗓音和动感的编舞。这张专辑是Kara进军日本的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: Kara Special Premium Box for Japan is a compilation album released by South Korean girl group Kara in 2010 for the Japanese market, blending pop and dance styles, showcasing their sweet vocals and dynamic choreography. This album was a key release for Kara's Japanese debut.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集收录了Kara在韩国热门歌曲的日语版本，录制过程中成员们专门学习了日语发音，以更好地贴近日本听众。专辑发行后，她们在日本举办了多场粉丝见面会，进一步巩固了在海外的人气。
items.storiesEn: This compilation includes Japanese versions of Kara's hit Korean songs. During recording, members specifically studied Japanese pronunciation to better connect with Japanese listeners. After its release, they held multiple fan meetings in Japan, further solidifying their overseas popularity.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助Kara成功打开日本市场，为日后K-pop女团在日本的流行奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Kara successfully enter the Japanese market, laying the foundation for the later popularity of K-pop girl groups in Japan.
items.artistIntroZh: Kara是韩国DSP Media旗下的女子组合，2007年出道，以流行舞曲风格著称。代表作包括《Mr.》和《Step》，在韩国和日本都取得了巨大成功。
items.artistIntroEn: Kara is a South Korean girl group under DSP Media, debuting in 2007, known for their pop dance style. Their hit songs include 'Mr.' and 'Step', achieving great success in both South Korea and Japan.

04-28.birthdayZh: 4月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你写下特别的旋律。麦当娜在《Hard Candy》里裹着坚韧的甜，告诉你温柔与力量可以共存；Kara用《Special Premium Box》珍藏每一次闪耀，正如你一路收集的星光。愿新的一岁，你继续做自己的主角，把日子谱成独一无二的歌。
04-28.birthdayEn: April 28 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light, and in the years since, two albums joined the date's spirit: Madonna's "Hard Candy," a bold, sweetly defiant celebration of resilience and joy, and KARA's "Special Premium Box for Japan," a heartfelt collection of harmony and boundless energy. May your year ahead feel like a perfect playlist—blending strength with tenderness, solo verses with loving chorus. Here's to the melody only you can make.

items.descriptionZh: 《5》是Lenny Kravitz在1998年发行的R&B/Soul风格专辑，融合了放克、摇滚和灵魂乐，展现了他标志性的复古音色和深情演唱。专辑以丰富的乐器编排和情感充沛的歌词为特色。
items.descriptionEn: 5 is an R&B/Soul album released by Lenny Kravitz in 1998, blending funk, rock, and soul, showcasing his signature retro sound and heartfelt vocals. The album features rich instrumentation and emotionally charged lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制主要在Lenny Kravitz位于巴哈马的录音室完成，他独自包办了大部分乐器的演奏。专辑名称“5”源于这是他第五张录音室专辑，创作过程中他深受70年代灵魂乐的影响，刻意追求低保真音质。
items.storiesEn: The album was primarily recorded at Lenny Kravitz's studio in the Bahamas, where he played most of the instruments himself. The title '5' comes from it being his fifth studio album, and during creation, he was heavily influenced by 1970s soul music, deliberately pursuing a lo-fi sound quality.
items.artistIntroZh: Lenny Kravitz，美国歌手、音乐人，以融合摇滚、放克和灵魂乐的风格闻名。他的代表作包括《Are You Gonna Go My Way》和《Fly Away》，曾多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Lenny Kravitz is an American singer and musician, known for blending rock, funk, and soul. His hit songs include 'Are You Gonna Go My Way' and 'Fly Away', and he has won multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Virgin
items.descriptionZh: 《Virgin》是韩国女子组合After School于2011年发行的首张正规专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了电子和放克元素。专辑主打歌《Bang!》以其强烈的鼓点和标志性的军鼓编曲展现了成员们成熟、自信的形象，核心特色在于将流行旋律与舞台表演的戏剧性完美结合。
items.descriptionEn: "Virgin" is the debut studio album by South Korean girl group After School, released in 2011. Primarily pop dance music with electronic and funk elements, its lead single "Bang!" features powerful drum beats and signature snare arrangements, showcasing the members' mature and confident image. The album's core lies in its perfect blend of pop melodies and theatrical stage performance.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，After School的成员们接受了高强度的军事化编舞训练，尤其是《Bang!》中的鼓点舞蹈动作由著名编舞家金花英设计，要求成员们手持鼓棒精准击打。据透露，成员Nana因练习过度导致手腕受伤，但仍坚持完成了MV拍摄。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, After School members underwent intense military-style choreography training, especially for "Bang!" where they had to hit drums with sticks in perfect synchronization, choreographed by renowned dancer Kim Hwa-young. It was reported that member Nana injured her wrist from over-practice but still completed the music video shoot.
items.artistIntroZh: After School是韩国Pledis娱乐于2009年推出的女子组合，以毕业制概念闻名。她们以独特的军鼓表演和性感强势的舞台风格在K-pop界独树一帜，代表作包括《Bang!》和《Flashback》。
items.artistIntroEn: After School is a South Korean girl group formed by Pledis Entertainment in 2009, known for their graduation system concept. They carved a unique niche in K-pop with military drum performances and powerful sexy stage style, with hits including "Bang!" and "Flashback."

items.name: Be Yourself Tonight
items.descriptionZh: 《Be Yourself Tonight》是英国二人组Eurythmics于1985年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格为流行摇滚，融合了灵魂乐和R&B元素。核心特色在于Annie Lennox充满力量的嗓音与Dave Stewart精良的编曲，专辑展现了从合成器流行向更有机、更具情感共鸣的音乐转变。
items.descriptionEn: "Be Yourself Tonight" is the fifth studio album by British duo Eurythmics, released in 1985. Stylistically pop rock with soul and R&B elements, its core features Annie Lennox's powerful vocals and Dave Stewart's sophisticated arrangements, marking a shift from synth-pop toward more organic, emotionally resonant music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Eurythmics邀请了多位重量级嘉宾，包括灵魂乐传奇Aretha Franklin在歌曲《Sisters Are Doin' It for Themselves》中合作。据Dave Stewart回忆，Aretha在录音室即兴发挥了一段高音，让在场所有人惊叹不已。此外，专辑封面照片在伦敦一家废弃工厂拍摄，Annie Lennox的红色短发造型成为80年代经典形象。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Eurythmics invited several heavyweight guests, including soul legend Aretha Franklin for "Sisters Are Doin' It for Themselves." Dave Stewart recalled Aretha improvised a high note in the studio that left everyone in awe. The album cover was shot in an abandoned factory in London, and Annie Lennox's short red hair became an iconic 80s look.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Eurythmics作为80年代最具创新性流行组合之一的地位，其中《Sisters Are Doin' It for Themselves》成为女性赋权的经典 anthem，影响深��。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Eurythmics as one of the most innovative pop acts of the 80s. "Sisters Are Doin' It for Themselves" became a classic feminist anthem with lasting influence.
items.artistIntroZh: Eurythmics是英国流行摇滚二人组，由Annie Lennox和Dave Stewart于1980年组建。他们以合成器流行和蓝眼睛灵魂乐风格闻名，代表作包括《Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)》和《Here Comes the Rain Again》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eurythmics are a British pop rock duo formed in 1980 by Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart. Known for synth-pop and blue-eyed soul, their hits include "Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)" and "Here Comes the Rain Again."

04-29.birthdayZh: 4月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Be Yourself Tonight》的宣言——做你自己，今夜如此。而《5》的节奏里藏着五重灵魂的碰撞，像你身上温柔与坚韧的和弦。愿你在属于自己的音轨上，永远记得：你生来就是一首独一无二的乐章，每个音符都值得被倾听与珍藏。
04-29.birthdayEn: April 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with songs that mirror your spirit: Lenny Kravitz’s *5* pulses with soulful rock and fearless groove, while Eurythmics’ *Be Yourself Tonight* hums a timeless truth—to live boldly, authentically. May your year ahead be a symphony of these energies: wild rhythm and gentle wisdom, strength and softness. Like these albums, may you always be your own masterpiece, turning each moment into music. Happy birthday to a beautiful soul writing a melody only you can play.

items.name: A Walk Across the Rooftops
items.descriptionZh: 《A Walk Across the Rooftops》是苏格兰乐队The Blue Nile于1984年发行的首张专辑，风格为艺术流行，融合了氛围音乐和轻柔摇滚元素。核心特色在于Paul Buchanan细腻、忧郁的嗓音与简约而精致的器乐编排，专辑营造出一种空旷、内省的都市夜景氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "A Walk Across the Rooftops" is the debut album by Scottish band The Blue Nile, released in 1984. Stylistically art pop with ambient and soft rock elements, its core features Paul Buchanan's delicate, melancholic vocals and minimal yet exquisite instrumental arrangements, creating a spacious, introspective urban nightscape atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制历时三年，预算超支且过程艰难。乐队在格拉斯哥的一个小录音室中反复打磨，甚至一度因资金短缺而濒临解散。制作人Robert Bell回忆，他们曾为了一个吉他和弦的混响效果花费数周时间。最终专辑虽销量一般，却获得了乐评界极高赞誉。
items.storiesEn: The album took three years to record, went over budget, and nearly caused the band to disband due to financial strain. Producer Robert Bell recalled spending weeks perfecting the reverb on a single guitar chord. Though commercially modest, the album received immense critical acclaim.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为80年代独立流行和氛围流行的重要先驱，影响了后来的慢核和梦幻流行音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key precursor to 80s indie pop and ambient pop, influencing later slowcore and dream pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: The Blue Nile是苏格兰艺术流行乐队，1981年成立于格拉斯哥，成员包括Paul Buchanan（主唱/吉他）、Robert Bell（贝斯）和Paul Joseph Moore（键盘）。他们以精致、情感深沉的音乐风格著称，代表作有《Tinseltown in the Rain》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Blue Nile are a Scottish art pop band formed in Glasgow in 1981, consisting of Paul Buchanan (vocals/guitar), Robert Bell (bass), and Paul Joseph Moore (keyboards). Known for their refined, emotionally deep sound, their notable work includes "Tinseltown in the Rain."

04-30.birthdayZh: 4月30日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《A Walk Across the Rooftops》——像站在高处安静眺望整座城市，看灯火温柔地亮起。你生命里的每一步，也如这般，不喧哗却自有光芒。愿你在属于自己的屋顶上，迎着风，拥抱所有辽阔与希望。生日快乐，愿你永远轻盈、明亮。
04-30.birthdayEn: April 30 is your birthday, a date when the world first heard The Blue Nile’s A Walk Across the Rooftops—an album of quiet, luminous longing that taught us beauty lives in the in-between spaces. Like that first step onto a rooftop at dawn, may your year ahead feel both grounded and boundless, full of small wonders and wide-open skies. You carry that same elegant, hopeful spirit: rare, unforgettable, and perfectly timed. Happy birthday.

items.name: Strange Clouds
items.descriptionZh: 《Strange Clouds》是美国说唱歌手B.o.B于2012年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格为嘻哈/流行说唱，融合了电子、摇滚和R&B元素。核心特色在于B.o.B流畅的叙事性说唱与跨流派合作，专辑展现了从地下到主流的过渡，充满实验性的编曲和 catchy 的副歌。
items.descriptionEn: "Strange Clouds" is the second studio album by American rapper B.o.B, released in 2012. Stylistically hip-hop/pop rap with electronic, rock, and R&B elements, its core features B.o.B's smooth narrative rapping and cross-genre collaborations, showcasing a transition from underground to mainstream with experimental arrangements and catchy hooks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Strange Clouds》由B.o.B与英国歌手Lil Wayne合作，但最初Lil Wayne的 verse 是在录音室即兴创作的。据B.o.B透露，他在亚特兰大的录音室中完成了大部分录制，并邀请了Taylor Swift、T.I.等艺人助阵。专辑封面上的云朵图案灵感来自B.o.B对科幻和超自然现象的兴趣。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Strange Clouds" features Lil Wayne, whose verse was reportedly improvised in the studio. B.o.B recorded most of the album in Atlanta and enlisted guests including Taylor Swift and T.I. The cloud motif on the cover was inspired by B.o.B's interest in sci-fi and paranormal phenomena.
items.artistIntroZh: B.o.B（原名Bobby Ray Simmons Jr.）是美国说唱歌手、歌手和制作人，1988年出生于北卡罗来纳州。他以流行说唱和跨流派融合风格闻名，代表作包括《Nothin' on You》和《Airplanes》。
items.artistIntroEn: B.o.B (born Bobby Ray Simmons Jr.) is an American rapper, singer, and producer from North Carolina. Known for pop rap and cross-genre fusion, his hits include "Nothin' on You" and "Airplanes."

items.name: Die Mensch-Maschine
items.descriptionZh: 《Die Mensch-Maschine》是德国电子乐队Kraftwerk于1978年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格为电子音乐，融合了合成器流行和实验电子。核心特色在于精确、冰冷的机器人化人声与极简主义的节拍，专辑概念探讨了人类与机器之间的关系，是电子音乐史上的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: "Die Mensch-Maschine" is the seventh studio album by German electronic band Kraftwerk, released in 1978. Stylistically electronic with synth-pop and experimental elements, its core features precise, robotic vocals and minimalist beats. The concept explores the relationship between humans and machines, making it a milestone in electronic music history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Kraftwerk成员对声音的精确度要求极高，甚至使用了自制的电子设备和编程乐器。主唱Ralf Hütter曾表示，他们试图让音乐听起来像是由机器本身创作的。专辑封面由艺术家Karl Klefisch设计，采用了苏联构成主义风格的红黑配色，向俄罗斯艺术家埃尔·利西茨基致敬。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Kraftwerk members demanded extreme precision in sound, using self-built electronic devices and programmed instruments. Ralf Hütter said they aimed to make the music sound as if created by machines themselves. The cover, designed by Karl Klefisch in Soviet Constructivist red-and-black style, paid homage to Russian artist El Lissitzky.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Die Mensch-Maschine》被公认为电子音乐和合成器流行乐的奠基之作，深刻影响了Techno、House和工业音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Die Mensch-Maschine" is widely regarded as a foundational work for electronic and synth-pop music, profoundly influencing techno, house, and industrial music.
items.artistIntroZh: Kraftwerk是德国电子乐队，1970年成立于杜塞尔多夫，由Ralf Hütter和Florian Schneider创立。他们被誉为电子音乐的先驱，以极简主义、机器人美学和概念性专���闻名，代表作包括《Autobahn》和《Trans-Europe Express》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kraftwerk are a German electronic band formed in Düsseldorf in 1970 by Ralf Hütter and Florian Schneider. Pioneers of electronic music, they are known for minimalist, robotic aesthetics and conceptual albums, with iconic works including "Autobahn" and "Trans-Europe Express."

items.name: My Name Is Barbra
items.descriptionZh: 《My Name Is Barbra》是芭芭拉·史翠珊1965年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以传统流行和百老汇抒情为主。核心特色在于将经典标准曲与当时新兴的流行编曲融合，展现了史翠珊极具辨识度的戏剧化嗓音和细腻的情感表达，是60年代流行女声的标杆之作。
items.descriptionEn: "My Name Is Barbra" is Barbra Streisand's second studio album released in 1965, featuring a style of traditional pop and Broadway ballads. Its core characteristic lies in blending classic standards with emerging pop arrangements, showcasing Streisand's highly recognizable dramatic vocals and nuanced emotional expression, making it a benchmark for female pop vocals in the 1960s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，史翠珊坚持选用当时还在世的作曲家新作，而非仅翻唱老歌。她曾为了一首《My Man》的录音效果，与制作人反复调试了整整一夜，直到凌晨五点才满意。这张专辑的封面由著名摄影师理查德·阿维顿拍摄，史翠珊坚持不戴珠宝、不化浓妆，以自然面容示人。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Streisand insisted on using new works by living composers rather than just covering old songs. She once spent an entire night with the producer repeatedly adjusting the recording of "My Man" until she was satisfied at 5 a.m. The album cover was shot by renowned photographer Richard Avedon, and Streisand insisted on no jewelry and minimal makeup, presenting a natural face.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑确立了史翠珊作为全能艺人的地位，并推动流行专辑向更注重艺术完整性和个人表达的方向发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Streisand's status as a versatile artist and pushed pop albums toward greater artistic integrity and personal expression.
items.artistIntroZh: 芭芭拉·史翠珊（Barbra Streisand），美国歌手、演员、导演，生于1942年。主要风格为传统流行、百老汇和爵士。代表作包括《People》《The Way We Were》及电影《妙女郎》。她是唯一一位同时获得奥斯卡、托尼、艾美、格莱美等主要奖项的艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Barbra Streisand is an American singer, actress, and director, born in 1942. Her main styles include traditional pop, Broadway, and jazz. Representative works include "People," "The Way We Were," and the film "Funny Girl." She is the only artist to have won all major awards including Oscar, Tony, Emmy, and Grammy.

05-01.birthdayZh: 5月1日，是你的生日。如同《Strange Clouds》里那片神秘而璀璨的星云，你带着探索的勇气与温柔的叛逆来到世界。而《Die Mensch-Maschine》中那精准的节奏，是你在时光里锻造出的坚韧与秩序。生日是一道分界线，往后每一步，愿你像芭芭拉的歌声一样丝滑而饱满，把日子唱成诗。
05-01.birthdayEn: May 1 is your birthday, a day when the world itself feels like it’s blooming into something bold and beautiful. Like Barbra Streisand’s "My Name Is Barbra," may your year carry the confident spark of a star finding their voice. And like Kraftwerk’s "Die Mensch-Maschine," may you feel the poetry in your own pulse—a perfect blend of heart and purpose. Here’s to you: a living masterpiece, unwrapping another chapter of light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Best of Celine Dion
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of Celine Dion》是席琳·迪翁1988年发行的精选集，收录了她早期法语和英语代表作。风格以成人当代流行和抒情摇滚为主，核心特色在于迪翁极具穿透力的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎，尤其是法语歌曲《Pour que tu m'aimes encore》展现了其深厚的艺术功底。
items.descriptionEn: "Best of Celine Dion" is a compilation album released by Celine Dion in 1988, featuring her early French and English hits. The style is primarily adult contemporary pop and soft rock, with the core characteristic being Dion's powerful, penetrating vocals and emotionally charged delivery, especially the French song "Pour que tu m'aimes encore" showcasing her profound artistry.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的发行正值迪翁从法语市场向英语市场转型的关键期。录制过程中，她因过度用嗓导致声带小结，医生建议她休息半年，但她坚持完成录音后才接受治疗。专辑中的《Where Does My Heart Beat Now》是她首支打入美国公告牌前10的单曲，为她后来的全球成功奠定了基础。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released during Dion's critical transition from the French market to the English market. During recording, she developed vocal cord nodules from overuse; doctors advised six months of rest, but she insisted on completing the recordings before seeking treatment. The single "Where Does My Heart Beat Now" became her first top-10 hit on the Billboard Hot 100, laying the foundation for her global success.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁（Celine Dion），加拿大歌手，生于1968年。主要风格为成人当代流行、抒情摇滚。代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》《The Power of Love》。她以惊人的嗓音力量和情感表现力闻名，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Celine Dion is a Canadian singer, born in 1968. Her main styles are adult contemporary pop and soft rock. Representative works include "My Heart Will Go On" and "The Power of Love." Known for her extraordinary vocal power and emotional expressiveness, she is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

items.name: The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup
items.descriptionZh: 《The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup》是2002年韩日世界杯官方合辑，汇集了多位国际流行艺人。风格以流行、拉丁和世界音乐融合为主，核心特色在于收录了官方主题曲《Boom》以及各国歌手的应援歌曲，体现了足球与音乐的全球狂欢氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup" is the official compilation for the 2002 Korea/Japan World Cup, featuring multiple international pop artists. The style blends pop, Latin, and world music, with the core characteristic being the inclusion of the official theme song "Boom" and support songs by artists from various countries, reflecting the global celebration of football and music.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑的录制过程充满跨国合作趣闻。官方主题曲《Boom》由Anastacia演唱，录制时她特意将歌词中的足球术语与流行节奏结合，并在MV中与多位球星互动。由于世界杯由韩日联合主办，合辑还特别收录了韩国歌手朴振英和日本歌手MISIA的合作曲目，体现了文化交流。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this compilation was filled with cross-cultural collaborations. The official theme song "Boom" was performed by Anastacia, who deliberately incorporated football terminology into the pop rhythm and interacted with multiple football stars in the music video. Since the World Cup was co-hosted by South Korea and Japan, the album also featured a special collaboration track by Korean singer Park Jin-young and Japanese singer MISIA, showcasing cultural exchange.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是世界杯官方合辑中销量最高的之一，进一步巩固了体育赛事与流行音乐跨界营销的模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the best-selling official World Cup compilations, further solidifying the crossover marketing model between sports events and pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 多位艺人参与，包括美国歌手Anastacia（流行/摇滚）、韩国歌手朴振英（K-pop/R&B）和日本歌手MISIA（R&B/灵魂乐）。他们各自在母语市场拥有极高知名度，代表作如Anastacia的《I'm Outta Love》、朴振英的《Honey》和MISIA的《Everything》。
items.artistIntroEn: Multiple artists contributed, including American singer Anastacia (pop/rock), Korean singer Park Jin-young (K-pop/R&B), and Japanese singer MISIA (R&B/soul). Each enjoys high recognition in their home markets, with representative works such as Anastacia's "I'm Outta Love," Park Jin-young's "Honey," and MISIA's "Everything."

05-02.birthdayZh: 5月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Best of Celine Dion》的纯净嗓音藏在时光里，像你心底那份未被喧嚣淹没的温柔；也曾让《The Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup》的鼓点响彻绿茵，提醒生命本就该有一场酣畅的奔跑。愿你像精选集般珍视自己的来路，也像世界杯般拥抱每一次有力的出发。生日快乐，新的一岁里，既有深情可回首，亦有沸腾值得奔赴。
05-02.birthdayEn: May 2 is your birthday, a day that shares its magic with the release of two special albums. Like Céline Dion’s "Best of Celine Dion," your life is a stunning collection of beloved moments and powerful songs. And like the vibrant "Official Album of the 2002 FIFA World Cup," you bring people together in a spirit of joy and celebration. May your year ahead be filled with timeless harmonies and the thrilling energy of a world united in cheering for you. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: Oops!… I Did It Again
items.descriptionZh: 《Oops!… I Did It Again》是布兰妮·斯皮尔斯2000年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以青少年流行和舞曲为主。核心特色在于朗朗上口的副歌、制作人Max Martin标志性的泡泡糖流行编曲，以及布兰妮甜美又带点俏皮的嗓音，奠定了千禧年流行公主的形象。
items.descriptionEn: "Oops!… I Did It Again" is Britney Spears' second studio album released in 2000, featuring a style of teen pop and dance-pop. Its core characteristics include catchy choruses, producer Max Martin's signature bubblegum pop arrangements, and Britney's sweet yet playful vocals, solidifying her image as the turn-of-the-millennium pop princess.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌的MV拍摄于洛杉矶，布兰妮穿着红色紧身衣在火星背景中跳舞，成为流行文化经典画面。录制过程中，布兰妮曾因连续高强度工作而体力透支，在录音室睡着，被制作人Max Martin轻轻盖上毯子。专辑原定名称为《Oops!》，后因法律纠纷才添加了副标题。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the title track was shot in Los Angeles, with Britney dancing in a red catsuit against a Mars backdrop, becoming a classic pop culture image. During recording, Britney once collapsed from exhaustion due to consecutive high-intensity work and fell asleep in the studio; producer Max Martin gently covered her with a blanket. The album was originally titled simply "Oops!" but the subtitle was added due to legal disputes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑首周销量超过130万张，创下女歌手首周销量纪录，并推动了青少年流行音乐在全球的商业巅峰。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 1.3 million copies in its first week, setting a record for a female artist's first-week sales, and propelled teen pop to its global commercial peak.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯（Britney Spears），美国歌手、舞者，生于1981年。主要风格为青少年流行、舞曲。代表作包括《...Baby One More Time》《Toxic》。她是21世纪初最具影响力的流行偶像之一，被称为“流行公主”。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American singer and dancer, born in 1981. Her main styles are teen pop and dance-pop. Representative works include "...Baby One More Time" and "Toxic." She is one of the most influential pop icons of the early 21st century, often called the "Princess of Pop."

05-03.birthdayZh: 5月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Oops!… I Did It Again》而雀跃，布兰妮用少女的勇气点燃了舞曲的星空，像在说：跌倒可以重来，犯错也是成长的勋章。愿你的生命也如这张专辑般，既有轻快的旋律，也有蜕变的底气。生日快乐，愿你在自己的轨道上，永远闪耀如初。
05-03.birthdayEn: May 3 is your birthday, a date that once brought Britney Spears' “Oops!… I Did It Again” into the world—an album bursting with the bold, playful energy of a fresh start. Like that iconic pop spark, may your year be filled with joyful audacity and the sweet rhythm of your own heart’s beat. You are a melody worth celebrating, and today the world hums just a little brighter because you’re in it.

items.name: Orchestral Favorites
items.descriptionZh: 《Orchestral Favorites》是弗兰克·扎帕1979年发行的现场专辑，记录了他与管弦乐团合作的实验性演出。风格以现代古典、前卫摇滚和即兴融合为主，核心特色在于扎帕对古典乐器的非传统运用和复杂的节奏结构，展现了其作为作曲家的精湛技艺与幽默感。
items.descriptionEn: "Orchestral Favorites" is a live album by Frank Zappa released in 1979, documenting his experimental performances with an orchestra. The style blends modern classical, progressive rock, and improvisational fusion, with the core characteristic being Zappa's unconventional use of classical instruments and complex rhythmic structures, showcasing his virtuosity and humor as a composer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音过程充满戏剧性。1975年在洛杉矶的一场演出中，扎帕因被观众投掷物品击中而摔下舞台，导致严重受伤，不得不取消后续演出并住院数月。专辑中的录音实际上来自1975年早期的排练和演出片段，扎帕后来在1979年将这些材料重新混音并发行，以纪念那段混乱的时期。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was dramatic. During a 1975 performance in Los Angeles, Zappa was hit by an object thrown from the audience, fell off the stage, and suffered severe injuries, forcing him to cancel subsequent shows and be hospitalized for months. The album's recordings actually came from rehearsals and performance fragments from early 1975; Zappa later remixed and released them in 1979 to commemorate that chaotic period.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是扎帕将摇滚与古典音乐融合的代表作之一，影响了后来前卫摇滚和现代古典跨界音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of Zappa's representative works blending rock and classical music, influencing the later development of progressive rock and modern classical crossover.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·扎帕（Frank Zappa），美国作曲家、吉他手、乐队领队，生于1940年，卒于1993年。主要风格包括前卫摇滚、爵士融合、现代古典和讽刺摇滚。代表作有《Hot Rats》《Joe's Garage》。他以技术精湛的作曲、社会讽刺和反主流文化立场著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and bandleader, born in 1940 and died in 1993. His main styles include progressive rock, jazz fusion, modern classical, and satirical rock. Representative works include "Hot Rats" and "Joe's Garage." He is known for his technically proficient compositions, social satire, and countercultural stance.

05-04.birthdayZh: 5月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《Orchestral Favorites》，弗兰克·扎帕用爵士与管弦乐实验着自由的边界——你的人生也当如此，不必遵循谁谱好的曲，勇敢地混合自己的节奏。愿你像这张专辑的精神一样，在复杂的乐章里，找到属于自己的那一段明亮和弦。生日快乐，愿你的每一天都像今天，值得被隆重纪念。
05-04.birthdayEn: May 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Zappa’s “Orchestral Favorites,” a daring celebration of structured chaos and joyful precision. Its spirit captures the beautiful collision of discipline and wild creativity—much like the way you orchestrate your own life with daring grace. May your year unfold as a symphony of bright surprises, where every unexpected note feels meant to be. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the music of your existence only grows richer. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

05-05.birthdayZh: 5月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《A Hard Day's Promise》——像披头士用音乐告诉每个辛苦的人，再疲惫的日子也值得被温柔合上。而另一张《Lemonade》提醒你：生活酸涩，但你可以把它酿成阳光。愿你像这些旋律，把每一次呼吸都写成诗。
05-05.birthdayEn: May 5 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world welcomed new sounds, like the raw, soul-baring triumph of Beyoncé’s Lemonade, a testament to turning struggle into strength. And in 1977, the defiant, soaring hope of Rumours by Fleetwood Mac taught us how to hold on through the chaos. Like these albums, your spirit is a beautiful blend of fierce resilience and tender grace. May your year be a masterpiece of melody, where every note rings with joy and purpose, just as you do.

items.name: Cómplices
items.descriptionZh: 《Cómplices》是拉丁流行巨星Luis Miguel于2008年发行的录音室专辑，由著名制作人Manuel Alejandro操刀。作品延续了其标志性的浪漫抒情风格，融合拉丁流行与成人当代元素，以细腻的弦乐编排和深情演绎为核心特色，展现了成熟稳重的音乐质感。
items.descriptionEn: "Cómplices" is a 2008 studio album by Latin pop superstar Luis Miguel, produced by renowned Manuel Alejandro. It continues his signature romantic ballad style, blending Latin pop with adult contemporary elements, characterized by delicate string arrangements and heartfelt vocals, showcasing a mature musical texture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Luis Miguel与制作人Manuel Alejandro在迈阿密进行了长达数月的紧密合作。据透露，Luis Miguel对歌曲细节要求极为严苛，曾为一句歌词的发音反复录制数十遍，直到达到他心中“完美”的标准。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Luis Miguel worked closely with producer Manuel Alejandro in Miami for several months. It was revealed that Luis Miguel was extremely demanding about song details, once re-recording a single lyric phrase dozens of times until it met his standard of "perfection."
items.artistIntroZh: Luis Miguel，墨西哥籍拉丁流行天王，被誉为“拉丁音乐之王”。其音乐风格以浪漫抒情与流行融合见长，代表作包括《Romance》、《Amarte Es Un Placer》等，全球销量超1亿张，是拉丁音乐史上最具影响力的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Luis Miguel is a Mexican Latin pop icon, often called "El Sol de México." Known for his romantic ballads and pop fusion, his代表作 include "Romance" and "Amarte Es Un Placer." With over 100 million records sold worldwide, he is one of the most influential artists in Latin music history.

05-06.birthdayZh: 5月6日，是你的生日。如《Cómplices》中吟唱的那般，你是时光里温柔的共谋者，与世界默契相拥。这一天，音符从过去飘来，聚成你生命的一道和弦——不慌不忙，却自有动人的回响。愿你像被阳光吻过的旋律，既有深情，也有翅膀。
05-06.birthdayEn: May 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the romantic soul of Luis Miguel’s “Cómplices,” an album that whispers of love’s sweet partnership. Like that music, may your year be filled with warm harmonies and heartfelt connections—a melody of joy that only you can lead. You are a song worth celebrating, and today the world celebrates with you. Happy birthday, beautiful spirit.

items.name: Ma Fleur
items.descriptionZh: 《Ma Fleur》是英国电子爵士乐队The Cinematic Orchestra于2007年发行的第四张录音室专辑。作品融合了Nu-Jazz、氛围音乐与后摇滚元素，以电影般的叙事感、钢琴与电子音色的交织为特色，营造出深邃而忧伤的情感氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Ma Fleur" is the fourth studio album by British electronic jazz band The Cinematic Orchestra, released in 2007. Blending Nu-Jazz, ambient, and post-rock elements, it features cinematic storytelling, interwoven piano and electronic textures, creating a deep, melancholic emotional atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑灵感源于主创Jason Swinscoe在巴黎期间的一段情感经历。他与长期合作的主唱Patrick Watson在蒙特利尔录制了部分人声，录音过程中曾因当地暴风雪导致航班延误，反而意外催生了专辑中更为内敛的即兴创作。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by a personal emotional experience of bandleader Jason Swinscoe during his stay in Paris. He recorded some vocals with longtime collaborator Patrick Watson in Montreal; a blizzard delayed flights, which unexpectedly led to more introspective improvisations in the recording sessions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为21世纪初Nu-Jazz与氛围音乐融合的代表作之一，影响了后续众多电子与爵士跨界音乐人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is widely regarded as a landmark fusion of Nu-Jazz and ambient music in the early 2000s, influencing many subsequent electronic-jazz crossover artists.
items.artistIntroZh: The Cinematic Orchestra，英国电子爵士乐队，1999年成立于伦敦。核心成员Jason Swinscoe以电影化音乐叙事著称，风格融合爵士、电子与氛围音乐。代表作包括《Motion》、《Ma Fleur》及《To Believe》，是Nu-Jazz流派的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Cinematic Orchestra is a British electronic jazz band formed in London in 1999. Led by Jason Swinscoe, they are known for cinematic musical storytelling, blending jazz, electronic, and ambient. Key albums include "Motion," "Ma Fleur," and "To Believe." They are pioneers of the Nu-Jazz genre.

items.name: Memoirs
items.descriptionZh: 《Memoirs》是挪威实验乐队The 3rd and the Mortal于2002年发行的专辑。风格融合了氛围流行、梦幻流行与后摇滚元素，以空灵的女声、缓慢的节奏和朦胧的吉他音墙为核心特色，营造出迷离而怀旧的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Memoirs" is a 2002 album by Norwegian experimental band The 3rd and the Mortal. Blending ambient pop, dream pop, and post-rock, it features ethereal female vocals, slow tempos, and hazy guitar walls, creating a dreamy, nostalgic sonic experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队主唱Ann-Mari Edvardsen离队前的最后一张作品。录制过程中，乐队成员在挪威北部的一座海边老宅中闭关创作，受当地极夜环境的影响，专辑整体色调偏冷，歌词也多围绕记忆与消逝的主题展开。
items.storiesEn: This album was the last before lead singer Ann-Mari Edvardsen left the band. During recording, the band secluded themselves in an old seaside house in northern Norway. Influenced by the polar night, the album's overall tone is cold, with lyrics revolving around memory and loss.
items.artistIntroZh: The 3rd and the Mortal，挪威实验乐队，1992年成立。早期以厄运/死亡金属著称，后转型为氛围流行与后摇滚风格。代表作包括《Tears Laid in Earth》和《Memoirs》。乐队以空灵女声与实验性编曲闻名，是北欧前卫音乐的重要代表。
items.artistIntroEn: The 3rd and the Mortal is a Norwegian experimental band formed in 1992. Initially known for doom/death metal, they later shifted to ambient pop and post-rock. Key works include "Tears Laid in Earth" and "Memoirs." They are renowned for ethereal female vocals and experimental arrangements, a significant force in Nordic avant-garde music.

05-07.birthdayZh: 5月7日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾飘出《Ma Fleur》的旋律——像一朵花慢慢打开，温柔里藏着坚韧。也有人在《Memoirs》中把哀愁酿成记忆，让沉重变轻。你来到的日子，连音符都学会在时光里扎根。愿每个属于你的清晨，都比昨天更明亮。
05-07.birthdayEn: May 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed a soul worthy of the quiet beauty found in Ma Fleur, an album that blooms with tender resilience and hope. Like the reflective depths of Memoirs, may your year ahead hold both gentle memories and bold new chapters. You are a melody that grows richer with time—may your heart feel light, your path be bright, and this new orbit around the sun bring you the harmony you so freely give.

items.name: Let It Be
items.descriptionZh: 《Let It Be》是英国摇滚乐队The Beatles于1970年发行的最后一张录音室专辑。风格融合了民谣、乡村与根源摇滚，以朴实无华的编曲、合唱式的副歌和回归本真的音乐理念为核心特色，展现了乐队在解散前夕的温情与怀旧。
items.descriptionEn: "Let It Be" is the final studio album by British rock band The Beatles, released in 1970. Blending folk, country, and roots rock, it features stripped-down arrangements, sing-along choruses, and a back-to-basics musical philosophy, capturing the band's warmth and nostalgia on the eve of their breakup.
items.storiesZh: 专辑最初名为《Get Back》，旨在回归现场演奏的纯粹感。录制过程中，乐队成员间关系紧张，导致多次重录。著名的屋顶演唱会（1969年1月）正是为这张专辑拍摄的素材，后来成为其最具标志性的影像记忆。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally titled "Get Back," aiming for a raw, live-performance feel. During recording, tensions among band members led to multiple re-recordings. The famous rooftop concert (January 1969) was filmed as material for this album, later becoming its most iconic visual memory.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为The Beatles的告别专辑，《Let It Be》标志着一个时代的终结。其同名曲《Let It Be》成为全球传唱的经典，深刻影响了后世流行与摇滚音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Beatles' farewell album, "Let It Be" marked the end of an era. Its title track became a globally sung classic, profoundly influencing the development of later pop and rock music.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles，英国摇滚乐队，1960年成立于利物浦。成员包括John Lennon、Paul McCartney、George Harrison和Ringo Starr。他们革新了流行音乐���面貌，风格从早期摇滚、流行到迷幻、民谣广泛涉猎。代表作有《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》、《Abbey Road》等，是史上最伟大的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were an English rock band formed in Liverpool in 1960, comprising John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr. They revolutionized popular music, spanning styles from early rock and pop to psychedelia and folk. Landmark albums include "Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band" and "Abbey Road." They are one of the greatest bands in history.

items.name: Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers
items.descriptionZh: 《Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers》是牙买加雷鬼传奇Bob Marley & The Wailers于1984年发行的精选集。作品汇集了Marley最经典的雷鬼歌曲，融合牙买加节奏、灵魂乐与抗议歌词，以乐观的旋律与深刻的社会意识为核心特色，是全球最畅销的雷鬼专辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Legend – The Best of Bob Marley and The Wailers" is a 1984 compilation by Jamaican reggae legend Bob Marley & The Wailers. It gathers Marley's most iconic reggae songs, blending Jamaican rhythms, soul, and protest lyrics, characterized by optimistic melodies and profound social consciousness. It is one of the best-selling reggae albums worldwide.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集在Bob Marley去世三年后发行，由Island Records��心策划。选曲过程中，Marley的遗孀Rita Marley参与了大量意见，确保专辑能全面展现Marley的音乐遗产。专辑封面使用了Marley在1976年伦敦演唱会上的照片，成为其经典形象之一。
items.storiesEn: Released three years after Bob Marley's death, this compilation was carefully curated by Island Records. During the track selection, Marley's widow Rita Marley contributed significantly to ensure the album fully represented his musical legacy. The cover uses a photo from Marley's 1976 London concert, becoming one of his iconic images.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Legend》是雷鬼音乐在全球范围内获得主流认可的关键作品，累计销量超过2500万张，被《滚石》杂志评为史上最伟大的专辑之一，极大推动了雷鬼文化的国际传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Legend" was pivotal in bringing reggae music mainstream worldwide, with over 25 million copies sold. It was ranked by Rolling Stone as one of the greatest albums of all time, greatly advancing the international spread of reggae culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Marley & The Wailers，牙买加雷鬼乐队，核心人物Bob Marley是雷鬼音乐最具代表性的艺术家。乐队风格融合雷鬼、斯卡与摇滚，歌词关注社会正义与��平。代表作包括《No Woman, No Cry》、《Redemption Song》等，Bob Marley被尊为雷鬼之父。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley & The Wailers are a Jamaican reggae band, with Bob Marley as the most iconic figure in reggae music. Their style blends reggae, ska, and rock, with lyrics focusing on social justice and peace. Key songs include "No Woman, No Cry" and "Redemption Song." Bob Marley is revered as the father of reggae.

items.name: Shut Up and Dance The Dance Mixes
items.descriptionZh: 《Shut Up and Dance The Dance Mixes》是美国流行女歌手宝拉·阿巴杜于1990年发行的混音专辑。这张作品属于流行舞曲风格，核心特色是将她此前热门单曲重新编排为更具俱乐部律动感的舞池版本，节奏明快、电子合成器音色丰富，充分展现了90年代初舞曲文化的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Shut Up and Dance The Dance Mixes" is a remix album by American pop singer Paula Abdul, released in 1990. It belongs to the pop dance genre, featuring reworked versions of her hit singles with enhanced club grooves, upbeat tempos, and rich synthesizer textures, capturing the essence of early 90s dance culture.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于宝拉·阿巴杜对舞曲文化的热爱。在录制过程中，她邀请了多位知名混音师参与，其中包括曾为麦当娜工作的谢普·佩蒂伯恩。有趣的是，专辑标题“Shut Up and Dance”原本是她的一句口头禅，用来鼓励舞者专注节奏，最终被用作专辑名。
items.storiesEn: This album was born out of Paula Abdul's passion for dance culture. During production, she enlisted several renowned remixers, including Shep Pettibone, who had worked with Madonna. Interestingly, the title "Shut Up and Dance" was originally her catchphrase to encourage dancers to focus on the rhythm, and it was eventually adopted as the album name.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是90年代初流行舞曲混音潮流的代表之一，进一步巩固了宝拉·阿巴杜在舞曲领域的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a representative of the early 90s pop dance remix trend, further solidifying Paula Abdul's status in the dance music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: 宝拉·阿巴杜是美国歌手、舞者及编舞家，以流行舞曲风格著称。她的代表作包括《Straight Up》和《Opposites Attract》，曾获格莱美奖，是80年代末至90年代初最具影响力的流行女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Paula Abdul is an American singer, dancer, and choreographer known for her pop dance style. Her hits include "Straight Up" and "Opposites Attract." She has won Grammy Awards and was one of the most influential female pop singers of the late 80s and early 90s.

05-08.birthdayZh: 5月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Let It Be》的温柔和释然交到你手上——让一切顺其自然，像歌里唱的，总有光亮在转角。而《Legend》的传奇，告诉你生来就是一首歌，值得被铭记。你带着雷鬼的从容与摇滚的勇气，稳稳走向属于你的季节。生日快乐，愿你如这日子，有旋律，有回响，有最自在的绽放。
05-08.birthdayEn: May 8 is your birthday, a day marked by timeless music and joyful release. Like The Beatles’ Let It Be, may your year be filled with gentle wisdom and peace when you need it most. And like the vibrant energy of Bob Marley’s Legend, may your spirit dance with resilience and love. You are a melody of hope and a rhythm of grace. On this day, the world celebrates the beautiful song that is you. Happy birthday.

05-09.birthdayZh: 5月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Born to Run》的青春狂想，也听过《The Joshua Tree》的旷野低语。它们告诉你：生命本就为奔跑而来，而荒芜之地终会开出花。愿你在新的一岁里，像那些歌谣一样，既敢迎风高歌，也懂得深扎根须。光与勇气，都与你同频。
05-09.birthdayEn: May 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Rumours, an album that found grace in broken pieces, and The Joshua Tree, a soaring anthem of hope and desert light. Like those records, your spirit is woven from both tenderness and resilience—a harmony of heartbreak and uplift. That is your gift: to turn ordinary moments into something timeless. So today, may you feel the warmth of every song that lives inside you, and may your year ahead echo with the rare, beautiful sound of a life fully felt.

items.name: Zaz
items.descriptionZh: 《Zaz》是法国歌手Zaz于2010年发行的首张专辑，风格融合了爵士、香颂与民谣元素。核心特色在于Zaz沙哑而充满活力的嗓音，以及手风���、吉他与管乐营造的复古巴黎街头氛围，歌曲轻松俏皮，充满法式浪漫与生活气息���
items.descriptionEn: "Zaz" is the debut album by French singer Zaz, released in 2010. It blends jazz, chanson, and folk styles. Its core feature is Zaz's raspy, energetic voice, combined with accordion, guitar, and brass instruments to create a vintage Parisian street atmosphere, with playful and romantic lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的成名曲《Je veux》最初由词曲作者凯雷·詹姆斯为其他艺人创作，但被拒绝后转交给了Zaz。Zaz在录制时即兴加入了自己标志性的嘶哑嗓音和自由节奏，使这首歌焕然一新。专辑发行后迅速在法国走红，并让她成为国际乐坛新星。
items.storiesEn: The hit song "Je veux" was originally written by songwriter Kerredine Soltani for another artist but was rejected. It was then offered to Zaz, who added her signature raspy voice and free-flowing rhythm during recording, giving the song a fresh feel. The album quickly became a success in France and launched her international career.
items.artistIntroZh: Zaz（本名伊莎贝尔·热弗鲁瓦）是法国歌手，以融合爵士、香颂与民谣的风格闻名。她的代表作包括《Je veux》和《Éblouie par la nuit》，凭借独特的嗓音和复古巴黎风格，成为21世纪法国乐坛的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Zaz (born Isabelle Geffroy) is a French singer known for blending jazz, chanson, and folk. Her hits include "Je veux" and "Éblouie par la nuit." With her unique voice and vintage Parisian style, she has become an iconic figure in 21st-century French music.

items.name: Acoustic Live
items.descriptionZh: 《Acoustic Live》是英国合成器流行双人组合Erasure于2006年发行的现场不插电专辑。这张作品属于流行风格，核心特色是将他们经典的电子流行歌曲重新编排为纯原声版本，以木吉他、钢琴和轻柔打击乐为主，突出了主唱安迪·贝尔的温暖嗓音与歌曲的旋律本质。
items.descriptionEn: "Acoustic Live" is a live unplugged album by British synth-pop duo Erasure, released in 2006. It belongs to the pop genre, featuring acoustic reinterpretations of their classic electronic pop songs with acoustic guitar, piano, and light percussion, highlighting Andy Bell's warm vocals and the melodic core of the songs.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制源于乐队成员文斯·克拉克对不插电表演的浓厚兴趣。2005年，Erasure在巡演中尝试了全原声演出，反响热烈。专辑收录了在伦敦和都柏林的现场录音，其中翻唱自彼得·加布里埃尔的《Solsbury Hill》成为意外亮点，安迪·贝尔的演绎被乐迷誉为经典。
items.storiesEn: This album originated from Vince Clarke's interest in unplugged performances. In 2005, Erasure experimented with a fully acoustic tour, which received enthusiastic responses. The album captures live recordings from London and Dublin, with a cover of Peter Gabriel's "Solsbury Hill" becoming an unexpected highlight, praised by fans for Andy Bell's rendition.
items.artistIntroZh: Erasure是英国合成器流行二人组，由文斯·克拉克（键盘手）和安迪·贝尔（主唱）组成。他们以动听的旋律和电子流行风格著称，代表作包括《A Little Respect》和《Always》，是80年代末至90年代最具影响力的流行乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Erasure is a British synth-pop duo consisting of Vince Clarke (keyboards) and Andy Bell (vocals). Known for their catchy melodies and electronic pop style, their hits include "A Little Respect" and "Always." They are one of the most influential pop bands from the late 80s to the 90s.

05-10.birthdayZh: 5月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《Zaz》的歌声，像你一样，沙哑而自由，把风与晨光揉进旋律里。也许还有《Acoustic Live》的温柔，提醒我们，不必总是盛大登场——最真实的声音，往往在安静时最有力。愿你在新的一岁，如歌般坦荡，如不插电的现场，每一刻都清澈而滚烫。
05-10.birthdayEn: May 10 is your birthday—a day when the world first heard your unique song. Like Zaz’s self-titled debut, your spirit blends warmth and soul, a graceful melody of jazz and chanson that dances through every room. And like Erasure’s Acoustic Live, you carry both quiet strength and joyful harmony, turning life into an intimate, uplifting performance. May this new year unfold as your most beautiful album yet, filled with love, surprise, and the sweetest refrains. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix
items.descriptionZh: 《Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix》是迈克尔·杰克逊于1997年发行的混音专辑，属于流行舞曲风格。核心特色是结合了全新原创歌曲与《HIStory》专辑中热门单曲的混音版本，融合了放克、R&B和电子元素，节奏强劲，展现了杰克逊在舞曲领域的创新力。
items.descriptionEn: "Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix" is a remix album by Michael Jackson released in 1997, belonging to the pop dance genre. Its core feature combines new original tracks with remixes of hits from the "HIStory" album, blending funk, R&B, and electronic elements with powerful beats, showcasing Jackson's innovation in dance music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的新歌《Blood on the Dance Floor》灵感来源于杰克逊对社交场合中虚伪人际关系的观察。录制过程中，杰克逊亲自参与了混音工作，并与制作人泰迪·莱利密切合作。有趣的是，原计划中的另一首新歌《Ghosts》因时长问题被拆分为多个版本，最终以短片形式发行。
items.storiesEn: The new song "Blood on the Dance Floor" was inspired by Jackson's observations of hypocritical social interactions. During production, Jackson personally oversaw the remixing process and worked closely with producer Teddy Riley. Interestingly, another planned new track "Ghosts" was split into multiple versions due to length issues and eventually released as a short film.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是史上最畅销的混音专辑之一，进一步巩固了迈克尔·杰克逊作为流行音乐之王的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the best-selling remix albums of all time, further cementing Michael Jackson's status as the King of Pop.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊是美国歌手、舞者及词曲创作人，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以融合流行、放克、R&B和摇滚的多元风格著称，代表作包括《Thriller》和《Billie Jean》，是全球音乐史上最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and songwriter, known as the King of Pop. He blended pop, funk, R&B, and rock, with iconic hits like "Thriller" and "Billie Jean." He is one of the most influential artists in global music history.

05-11.birthdayZh: 5月11日，是你的生日。这一天，迈克尔·杰克逊让《Blood on the Dance Floor》在混音中诞生，那是他用节奏对抗世界的勇气。而你，也像他一样，在生活的舞池里踩过汗与光。愿你记得，每次旋转都是对自由的致敬——把过往的混音揉进此刻，让心跳成为自己的节拍。生日本就该这样，带着HIStory的力量，跳一支永不落幕的舞。
05-11.birthdayEn: May 11 is your birthday. On this day in history, Michael Jackson’s "Blood on the Dance Floor: HIStory in the Mix" was released, pulsing with the spirit of transformation and unyielding rhythm. Like the best remixes, your life layers grace and strength into a melody that is entirely your own. May this year dance with bold new songs, each step a celebration of the light you bring into the world. Happy birthday—may every beat ahead feel like a fresh, joyful chorus.

items.name: We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.
items.descriptionZh: 《We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.》是美国歌手杰森·玛耶兹于2008年发行的第三张录音室专辑，属于流行风格，融合了民谣、雷鬼和灵魂乐元素。核心特色是轻松愉悦的旋律、阳光般的正能量歌词以及玛耶兹标志性的即兴演唱技巧，营造出温暖而自由的音乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things." is the third studio album by American singer Jason Mraz, released in 2008. It belongs to the pop genre, blending folk, reggae, and soul elements. Its core features are upbeat melodies, positive lyrics, and Mraz's signature improvisational vocal style, creating a warm and free-spirited atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的全球热门单曲《I'm Yours》最初是玛耶兹在2005年的一场小型演出中即兴创作的。录制时，他坚持保留歌曲的原始自然感，甚至保留了录音中的一些即兴哼唱和笑声。专辑标题灵感来自玛耶兹对生活三大乐事的总结：歌唱、跳舞和“偷走”美好的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: The global hit "I'm Yours" was originally improvised by Mraz during a small show in 2005. During recording, he insisted on preserving the song's raw, natural feel, even keeping some spontaneous humming and laughter in the final track. The album title was inspired by Mraz's summary of life's three joys: singing, dancing, and "stealing" beautiful moments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑中的《I'm Yours》成为2000年代末最畅销的数字单曲之一，推动了流行音乐中民谣与雷鬼融合的趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single "I'm Yours" became one of the best-selling digital singles of the late 2000s, popularizing the fusion of folk and reggae in pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰森·玛耶兹是美国歌手及词曲创作人，以流行民谣风格著称，融合雷鬼和灵魂乐元素。他的代表作包括《I'm Yours》和《Lucky》，凭借阳光形象和即兴演唱技巧，成为21世纪初最具辨识度的男歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jason Mraz is an American singer-songwriter known for his pop folk style, blending reggae and soul. His hits include "I'm Yours" and "Lucky." With his sunny image and improvisational vocal style, he became one of the most recognizable male singers of the early 2000s.

05-12.birthdayZh: 5月12日，是你的生日。这一天，Jason Mraz唱响了《We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.》，仿佛在说：我们要歌唱，要起舞，还要悄悄偷走生命里那些碎金般的快乐。愿你的日子像这张专辑一样，带着民谣的温柔与雷鬼的洒脱，在平凡的节奏里找到属于自己的诗意——学会偷走一点阳光，把每一天都过得轻盈而明亮。
05-12.birthdayEn: May 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us Jason Mraz’s We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.—an album that bubbles with joy and sunlit soul, as if the universe wanted to match your spirit. Like that music, your life is a blend of warmth, rhythm, and stolen moments of pure happiness. May your year ahead be a melody of laughter, a dance of new beginnings, and a celebration of all the beautiful things you bring to this world. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Older
items.descriptionZh: 《Older》是乔治·迈克尔1996年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了爵士、灵魂与成人当代风格。专辑以细腻的钢琴、弦乐和舒缓的节奏为特色，展现了迈克尔从流行偶像向成熟音乐人的转型，核心在于情感深度与精致编曲。
items.descriptionEn: "Older" is George Michael's fourth studio album released in 1996, blending jazz, soul, and adult contemporary styles. Featuring delicate piano, strings, and laid-back rhythms, the album showcases Michael's transition from pop idol to a mature musician, with emotional depth and refined arrangements at its core.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值乔治·迈克尔与索尼音乐的法律纠纷期间，他因此刻意放慢创作节奏以摆脱商业压力。主打歌《Jesus to a Child》是为了纪念他因艾滋病去世的恋人安塞尔莫·费莱帕，整张专辑都笼罩在悲伤与自省的情绪中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during George Michael's legal dispute with Sony Music, prompting him to deliberately slow down his creative pace to escape commercial pressure. The lead single "Jesus to a Child" was written in memory of his lover Anselmo Feleppa, who died of AIDS, and the entire album is steeped in sorrow and introspection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在英国专辑榜上夺冠，并成为乔治·迈克尔个人最满意的作品之一，标志着他从流行巨星向艺术家的深刻转变。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album topped the UK Albums Chart and became one of George Michael's most personally satisfying works, marking his profound shift from pop superstar to artist.
items.artistIntroZh: 乔治·迈克尔（George Michael），英国歌手、词曲作者，1963年出生。早年以威猛乐队（Wham!）成名，后单飞成为全球巨星。主要风格为流行、灵魂与爵士，代表作包括《Careless Whisper》和《Faith》。
items.artistIntroEn: George Michael was a British singer and songwriter born in 1963. He first gained fame with Wham! and later became a global superstar as a solo artist. His main styles include pop, soul, and jazz, with hit songs like "Careless Whisper" and "Faith."

items.name: I Remember Yesterday
items.descriptionZh: 《I Remember Yesterday》是唐娜·萨默1977年发行的概念专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂与迪斯科。专辑通过歌曲回顾不同年代的音乐风格，从1940年代的爵士到未来的电子放克，核心特色在于其怀旧主题与舞曲能量的结合。
items.descriptionEn: "I Remember Yesterday" is a concept album by Donna Summer released in 1977, blending R&B, soul, and disco. The album reviews musical styles from different eras, from 1940s jazz to futuristic electro-funk, with its core feature being the combination of nostalgic themes and dance energy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的单曲《I Feel Love》由制作人乔吉奥·莫罗德尔创作，完全采用合成器编曲，开创了电子舞曲的先河。唐娜·萨默最初对这首没有传统乐器的歌曲感到不安，但莫罗德尔说服了她，结果这首歌成为迪斯科史上最具革命性的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: The single "I Feel Love" from the album was produced by Giorgio Moroder and composed entirely with synthesizers, pioneering electronic dance music. Donna Summer was initially uneasy about the song's lack of traditional instruments, but Moroder convinced her, and the track became one of the most revolutionary works in disco history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《I Feel Love》被公认为电子舞曲的奠基之作，深刻影响了后来的浩室音乐和流行舞曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: "I Feel Love" is widely recognized as a foundational work of electronic dance music, deeply influencing later house music and pop dance tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: 唐娜·萨默（Donna Summer），美国歌手，1948年出生，被誉为“迪斯科女王”。主要风格为迪斯科、R&B和灵魂乐，代表作包括《Hot Stuff》和《Last Dance》。她五次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Donna Summer was an American singer born in 1948, known as the "Queen of Disco." Her main styles include disco, R&B, and soul, with hit songs like "Hot Stuff" and "Last Dance." She won five Grammy Awards.

items.name: De La Soul Is Dead
items.descriptionZh: 《De La Soul Is Dead》是De La Soul 1991年发行的第二张录音室专辑，属于另类嘻哈风格。专辑以黑暗、讽刺的叙事为特色，抛弃了首张专辑的“嬉皮”形象，通过复杂的采样和幽默的歌词探讨社会议题，核心在于颠覆嘻哈的刻板印象。
items.descriptionEn: "De La Soul Is Dead" is the second studio album by De La Soul, released in 1991, in the alternative hip-hop style. The album features dark, satirical storytelling, shedding the "hippie" image of their debut, and uses complex sampling and humorous lyrics to address social issues, with its core being the subversion of hip-hop stereotypes.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面上的雏菊花盆被打破，象征De La Soul有意打破首张专辑《3 Feet High and Rising》建立的阳光形象。录制过程中，他们曾因采样版权问题与多位艺人产生纠纷，这促使他们后来更谨慎地处理采样使用。
items.storiesEn: The album cover features a broken daisy pot, symbolizing De La Soul's intentional break from the sunny image established by their debut "3 Feet High and Rising." During recording, they faced disputes with several artists over sample clearances, which later made them more cautious about sample usage.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被认为是另类嘻哈的经典之作，影响了90年代地下嘻哈的发展，但因其复杂的采样版权问题也成为音乐版权争议的典型案例。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a classic of alternative hip-hop, influencing the development of underground hip-hop in the 1990s, but its complex sample clearance issues also made it a notable case in music copyright disputes.
items.artistIntroZh: De La Soul是美国嘻哈团体，1987年成立于纽约长岛，由Posdnuos、Trugoy和Maseo组成。主要风格为另类嘻哈，以诙谐歌词和丰富采样著称，代表作包括《Me Myself and I》和《The Magic Number》。
items.artistIntroEn: De La Soul is an American hip-hop group formed in 1987 in Long Island, New York, consisting of Posdnuos, Trugoy, and Maseo. Their main style is alternative hip-hop, known for witty lyrics and rich sampling, with hits like "Me Myself and I" and "The Magic Number."

05-13.birthdayZh: 5月13日，是你的生日。这一天，乔治·迈克尔发行了《Older》，那些深沉内敛的旋律提醒你，成长不是失去，而是把过往酿成温柔。而唐娜·萨默的《I Remember Yesterday》则说，回忆不是枷锁，是你走过的路在发光。你看，这一天注定属于你——无论走多远，你始终带着自己的光。
05-13.birthdayEn: May 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "I Remember Yesterday," Donna Summer's invitation to dance through time with joy and nostalgia, and "Older," George Michael’s tender anthem of growth and grace. Like these songs, your life blends disco warmth with quiet wisdom—you move forward while honoring the past. May your year be a beautiful chorus of new memories and soft, steady light. You are a melody the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday.

items.descriptionZh: 《18》是Moby 2002年发行的第六张录音室专辑，属于电子音乐风格，融合了氛围、碎拍和福音元素。专辑以舒缓的旋律和深邃的氛围为特色，延续了前作《Play》的采样手法，但更注重内省与宁静的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "18" is the sixth studio album by Moby, released in 2002, in the electronic music style, blending ambient, breakbeat, and gospel elements. The album features soothing melodies and deep atmospheres, continuing the sampling approach of his previous work "Play" but with a greater focus on introspection and tranquil listening experiences.
items.storiesZh: Moby在录制《18》时从美国各地收集了大量老旧福音录音和蓝草音乐采样，并在自己的卧室工作室完成大部分制作。专辑名称“18”源于录制期间他反复梦见自己18岁时的生活，暗示对青春与纯真的怀念。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "18," Moby collected a large number of old gospel recordings and bluegrass samples from across the United States, completing most of the production in his bedroom studio. The album title "18" originated from his recurring dreams during recording about being 18 years old, hinting at nostalgia for youth and innocence.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《18》在全球销量超过500万张，进一步巩固了Moby作为电子音乐商业与艺术双成功的代表地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "18" sold over 5 million copies worldwide, further cementing Moby's status as a representative of both commercial and artistic success in electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Moby（原名理查德·梅尔维尔·霍尔），美国电子音乐人、制作人，1965年出生。主要风格为电子、氛围和舞曲，代表作包括《Porcelain》和《Natural Blues》。他以素食主义和人道主义 activism 闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Moby (born Richard Melville Hall) is an American electronic musician and producer born in 1965. His main styles include electronic, ambient, and dance music, with hits like "Porcelain" and "Natural Blues." He is also known for his veganism and humanitarian activism.

items.name: Mina Celentano
items.descriptionZh: 《Mina Celentano》是意大利歌手阿德里亚诺·切伦塔诺与米娜合作的同名专辑，1998年发行，属于流行风格。专辑融合了意大利流行乐、抒情摇滚和民谣元素，核心特色在于两位传奇歌手的声音碰撞与情感充沛的二重唱。
items.descriptionEn: "Mina Celentano" is a collaborative album by Italian singers Adriano Celentano and Mina, released in 1998, in the pop style. The album blends Italian pop,抒情 rock, and folk elements, with its core feature being the vocal collision between two legendary singers and emotionally charged duets.
items.storiesZh: 这是阿德里亚诺·切伦塔诺与米娜时隔多年后的首次合作，两人在录制前已有近三十年未同台。专辑中的歌曲《Acqua e sale》由切伦塔诺亲自创作，歌词探讨了爱情中的矛盾与妥协，录制时两人因对唱法有不同理解而几度争论，最终达成完美平衡。
items.storiesEn: This was the first collaboration between Adriano Celentano and Mina after many years, with the two having not performed together for nearly three decades. The song "Acqua e sale" was written by Celentano himself, exploring contradictions and compromises in love. During recording, they debated several times over vocal approaches but eventually achieved a perfect balance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在意大利销量超过200万张，成为该国历史上最成功的二重唱专辑之一，并重新点燃了公众对两位歌手合作的热情。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 2 million copies in Italy, becoming one of the most successful duet albums in the country's history and reigniting public enthusiasm for the two singers' collaboration.
items.artistIntroZh: 阿德里亚诺·切伦塔诺（Adriano Celentano），意大利歌手、演员，1938年出生。主要风格为流行和摇滚，被誉为“意大利流行音乐教父”，代表作包括《Azzurro》和《Prisencolinensinainciusol》。
items.artistIntroEn: Adriano Celentano is an Italian singer and actor born in 1938. His main styles include pop and rock, and he is known as the "Godfather of Italian pop music," with hits like "Azzurro" and "Prisencolinensinainciusol."

items.name: Sulk
items.descriptionZh: 《Sulk》是苏格兰乐队The Associates于1982年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格融合了华丽流行、新浪潮和后朋克元素。专辑以Billy Mackenzie戏剧性的假声演唱和Alan Rankine复杂的吉他编曲为特色，旋律华丽且充满戏剧张力，歌词晦涩而富有诗意，被认为是80年代最具创新性的流行专辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Sulk" is the second studio album by Scottish band The Associates, released in 1982. It blends glam pop, new wave, and post-punk elements, featuring Billy Mackenzie's dramatic falsetto vocals and Alan Rankine's intricate guitar arrangements. The melodies are grandiose and theatrical, with obscure, poetic lyrics, widely regarded as one of the most innovative pop albums of the 1980s.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Billy Mackenzie和吉他手Alan Rankine关系紧张，两人在录音室经常争吵。Mackenzie甚至一度将录音带扔出窗外，但第二天又捡回来继续工作。专辑封面由著名设计师Peter Saville设计，原计划使用一张复古照片，但因版权问题被否决，最终采用了极简的黑色背景配金色字体的设计。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, tensions ran high between vocalist Billy Mackenzie and guitarist Alan Rankine, who frequently argued in the studio. Mackenzie once threw the master tapes out the window, only to retrieve them the next day. The cover art, designed by renowned graphic designer Peter Saville, originally featured a vintage photograph but was scrapped due to copyright issues, resulting in a minimalist black background with gold lettering.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Sulk》被广泛认为是80年代英国流行音乐的里程碑之作，影响了后来的独立流行和另类摇滚乐队，如Suede和Pulp。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Sulk" is widely regarded as a milestone in 1980s British pop music, influencing later indie pop and alternative rock bands such as Suede and Pulp.
items.artistIntroZh: The Associates是苏格兰乐队，由主唱Billy Mackenzie和吉他手Alan Rankine于1979年组建。他们的音乐风格融合华丽流行、新浪潮和后朋克，以Mackenzie的独特假声和戏剧化表演著称。代表作包括《Sulk》和《Perhaps》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Associates were a Scottish band formed in 1979 by vocalist Billy Mackenzie and guitarist Alan Rankine. Their music blended glam pop, new wave, and post-punk, known for Mackenzie's distinctive falsetto and theatrical performances. Notable works include "Sulk" and "Perhaps."

05-14.birthdayZh: 5月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《18》的沉静与忧郁，那是电子节拍里涌动的生命信仰。你或许也像《Sulk》中的Billy Mackenzie，带着后朋克的光亮与华丽，在自己的人生舞台上纵情高歌。愿你的年岁像这些旋律，既有沉静的厚度，也有飞扬的力度，在时光里始终明亮如初。
05-14.birthdayEn: May 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Moby's "18," a soulful album of hope and resilience, and The Associates' "Sulk," a bold, artful storm of passion. Like these works, your life is a beautiful blend—strength wrapped in tenderness, creativity dancing with joy. May your new year unfold like a perfect melody: unexpected, radiant, and deeply yours. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Moving Violation
items.descriptionZh: 《Moving Violation》是美国家族组合The Jackson 5于1975年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格以R&B/Soul为主，融合了放克和迪斯科元素。专辑展现了乐队从青少年流行向更成熟声音的转型，Michael Jackson的嗓音更加自信，编曲更加精致，主打歌《Forever Came Today》成为经典。
items.descriptionEn: "Moving Violation" is the seventh studio album by American family group The Jackson 5, released in 1975. It is rooted in R&B/Soul with funk and disco influences, marking the group's transition from teen pop to a more mature sound. Michael Jackson's vocals grew more confident, and the arrangements more polished, with the lead single "Forever Came Today" becoming a classic.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是The Jackson 5在Motown唱片公司的最后一张作品。录制期间，乐队成员与Motown管理层关系紧张，因为他们希望获得更多创作自由。Michael Jackson当时已开始个人发展，录音时经常分心。专辑发行后，乐队随即转投Epic唱片公司，结束了与Motown的长期合作。
items.storiesEn: This album was The Jackson 5's final release on Motown Records. During recording, tensions with Motown management grew as the group sought more creative freedom. Michael Jackson, already pursuing a solo career, was often distracted in the studio. After its release, the group moved to Epic Records, ending their long partnership with Motown.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为The Jackson 5在Motown的告别之作，这张专辑标志着组合一个时代的结束，也为Michael Jackson未来的个人巨星之路奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: As The Jackson 5's farewell to Motown, this album marked the end of an era for the group and laid the groundwork for Michael Jackson's future solo superstardom.
items.artistIntroZh: The Jackson 5是美国流行/R&B家族组合，1964年由杰克逊家族兄弟在印第安纳州加里市组建。他们以动感的舞台表演和流畅的和声闻名，代表作包括《I Want You Back》和《ABC》。Michael Jackson后来成为全球流行巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 were an American pop/R&B family group formed in Gary, Indiana in 1964 by the Jackson brothers. Known for their energetic stage performances and smooth harmonies, their hits include "I Want You Back" and "ABC." Michael Jackson later became a global pop superstar.

items.name: Relapse
items.descriptionZh: 《Relapse》是美国说唱歌手Eminem于2009年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格为Hip-Hop，融合了恐怖核和喜剧说唱元素。专辑以阴暗、暴力的叙事和复杂的押韵技巧为特色，Eminem在戒毒复出后重新展现了他的文字游戏和多重角色扮演能力，制作主要由Dr. Dre负责。
items.descriptionEn: "Relapse" is the sixth studio album by American rapper Eminem, released in 2009. It is a Hip-Hop album with horrorcore and comedy rap elements, characterized by dark, violent narratives and complex rhyme schemes. After recovering from addiction, Eminem showcased his wordplay and multi-character storytelling, with production primarily handled by Dr. Dre.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Eminem因药物成瘾沉寂四年后的复出之作。录制期间，他每天在Dr. Dre的录音室工作超过12小时，以重建自己的说唱技巧。专辑中Eminem模仿了多位名人的口音和腔调，包括美国演员Christopher Walken。他还首次在歌曲《Beautiful》中坦诚自己的成瘾经历，这首歌原本是为已故歌手Michael Jackson创作的。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Eminem's comeback after a four-year hiatus due to drug addiction. During recording, he worked over 12 hours daily in Dr. Dre's studio to rebuild his rap skills. Eminem imitated several celebrity accents on the album, including actor Christopher Walken. The song "Beautiful" was originally written for the late Michael Jackson before Eminem kept it for himself.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Relapse》证明了Eminem在克服成瘾后仍能保持顶尖说唱水准，为他在2010年代的持续成功铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Relapse" proved that Eminem could still deliver top-tier rap after overcoming addiction, paving the way for his continued success in the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，1972年出生于密苏里州圣约瑟夫。他以技术性的押韵、争议性的歌词和多重人格叙事著称，被誉为史上最伟大的说唱歌手之一。代表作包括《The Marshall Mathers LP》和《The Eminem Show》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper and producer, born in St. Joseph, Missouri in 1972. Known for his technical rhymes, controversial lyrics, and multi-character storytelling, he is considered one of the greatest rappers of all time. Notable works include "The Marshall Mathers LP" and "The Eminem Show."

items.name: Burial
items.descriptionZh: 《Burial》是英国电子音乐人Burial于2006年发行的同名首张专���，风格虽然被标记为Pop，但实际上属于UK车库、2-step和氛围电子音乐。专辑以低保真制作、采样自老电影和游戏的声音碎片、以及深沉的情感氛围为特色，营造出伦敦夜晚孤独而忧郁的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Burial" is the self-titled debut album by British electronic musician Burial, released in 2006. Although tagged as Pop, it is rooted in UK garage, 2-step, and ambient electronic music. Known for its lo-fi production, samples from old films and video games, and deeply emotional atmosphere, it evokes a lonely, melancholic night-time experience in London.
items.storiesZh: Burial（本名William Bevan）在制作这张专辑时几乎完全保密，甚至他的家人和朋友都不知道他在做音乐。他用简陋的软件和游戏机采样器在家中的卧室录制完成。专辑发行后，乐评人惊讶于其独特的氛围，但Burial拒绝接受任何采访或公开露面，保持匿名多年，直到2017年才首次公开演出。
items.storiesEn: Burial (real name William Bevan) kept his music-making almost entirely secret while creating this album; even his family and friends were unaware. He recorded it in his bedroom using basic software and a game console sampler. After release, critics were stunned by its unique atmosphere, but Burial refused all interviews and public appearances, remaining anonymous for years until his first live show in 2017.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Burial》重新定义了21世纪初的电子音乐，开创了“未来车库”风格，对后来的电子、嘻哈和流行音乐制作人产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Burial" redefined electronic music in the early 2000s, pioneering the "future garage" style and deeply influencing later electronic, hip-hop, and pop producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Burial（本名William Bevan）是英国电子音乐制作人，1979年出生于伦敦。他以匿名身份著称，音乐风格融合UK车库、氛围和低保真电子，代表作包括同名专辑《Burial》和《Untrue》。他被视为21世纪最具影响力的电子音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Burial (real name William Bevan) is a British electronic music producer born in London in 1979. Known for his anonymity, his music blends UK garage, ambient, and lo-fi electronics. Notable works include the self-titled album "Burial" and "Untrue." He is regarded as one of the most influential electronic artists of the 21st century.

05-15.birthdayZh: 5月15日，是你的生日。这一天曾有《Moving Violation》诞生，杰克逊五兄弟用放克的节奏唱出自由与前行；也有《Relapse》落地，埃米纳姆从暗夜中站起，把破碎重塑成勇气。你也是这样——带着律动与坚韧，把每一个日子走成自己的旋律。生日快乐，愿你始终有力量，温柔而明亮。
05-15.birthdayEn: May 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the final beautiful harmony of The Jackson 5’s Moving Violation—a reminder that every ending holds a dance of grace. And in 2009, Eminem’s Relapse marked a fierce comeback, the spirit of rising again. So may your year be a tender final chord and a bold new beginning, wrapped in the rhythm of your own heart’s resilience. Happy birthday, shining soul.

items.name: The Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《The Greatest Hits》是美国歌手Whitney Houston于2000年发行的精选专辑，风格为Pop，融合了R&B和灵魂乐。专辑收录了她1985年至2000年间最畅销的单曲，包括《I Will Always Love You》和《Greatest Love of All》，以及四��新歌。这张专辑展现了Whitney无与伦比的嗓音和跨越时代的流行魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "The Greatest Hits" is a compilation album by American singer Whitney Houston, released in 2000. It is a Pop album with R&B and soul influences, featuring her biggest singles from 1985 to 2000, including "I Will Always Love You" and "Greatest Love of All," plus four new tracks. The album showcases Whitney's unparalleled voice and timeless pop appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Whitney Houston正经历个人生活的挑战，包括与歌手Bobby Brown的婚姻问题。专辑中的新歌《Could I Have This Kiss Forever》是与拉丁歌手Enrique Iglesias的合作曲目，录音时两人在不同城市通过卫星完成录制。专辑封面使用了Whitney 1990年代早期的照片，她本人对选图并不满意，但发行后销量依然惊人。
items.storiesEn: At the time of this compilation's release, Whitney Houston was facing personal challenges, including marital issues with singer Bobby Brown. The new track "Could I Have This Kiss Forever" was a collaboration with Latin singer Enrique Iglesias, recorded via satellite from different cities. Whitney was reportedly unhappy with the cover photo, which was from the early 1990s, but the album still sold massively.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集是Whitney Houston商业上最成功的专辑之一，全球销量超过2400万张，巩固了她作为流行音乐史上最伟大女歌手之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation is one of Whitney Houston's best-selling albums, with over 24 million copies sold worldwide, cementing her legacy as one of the greatest female vocalists in pop music history.
items.artistIntroZh: Whitney Houston是美国歌手、演员，1963年出生于新泽西州纽瓦克。她以强大的嗓音和宽广的音域著称，被誉为“嗓音”。她的音乐风格跨越流行、R&B和灵魂乐，代表作包括《I Will Always Love You》和《The Bodyguard》原声带。她是史上最畅销的音乐艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Whitney Houston was an American singer and actress, born in Newark, New Jersey in 1963. Known for her powerful voice and wide vocal range, she was called "The Voice." Her music spanned pop, R&B, and soul, with iconic works including "I Will Always Love You" and "The Bodyguard" soundtrack. She remains one of the best-selling music artists of all time.

05-16.birthdayZh: 5月16日，是你的生日。这一天，惠特妮·休斯顿的《The Greatest Hits》诞生，像一束光收藏了岁月里最勇敢的歌声。你来到世界的这一天，也自带这般光芒——不必成为谁的传奇，你活着的每一刻，已经是生命最珍贵的精选集。愿你在自己的旋律里，温柔而坚定地，唱下去。
05-16.birthdayEn: May 16 is your birthday, a date that shines with the release of Whitney Houston’s The Greatest Hits. Like that collection of soaring anthems, your life gathers all the best moments—each one a testament to love, courage, and joy. May your new year unfold as a masterpiece of your own making, filled with harmonies that lift your spirit and verses that speak only of hope. You are a song worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: Emergency on Planet Earth
items.descriptionZh: Jamiroquai 的首张录音室专辑《Emergency on Planet Earth》融合了酸性爵士、放克与灵魂乐元素，以充满律动的贝斯线和铜管编排为核心特色。主唱 Jay Kay 标志性的假声演唱与环保主题的歌词，奠定了乐队早期温暖而富有社会意识的音乐基调。
items.descriptionEn: Jamiroquai's debut studio album 'Emergency on Planet Earth' blends acid jazz, funk, and soul, characterized by groovy basslines and horn arrangements. Jay Kay's distinctive falsetto and eco-conscious lyrics establish the band's early warm, socially aware musical tone.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦的“The Wool Hall”录音室，由 Jay Kay 与制作人 Mike Nielsen 共同打造。Jay 曾透露，专辑中许多歌曲的灵感来源于他对环境破坏的愤怒，而《Too Young to Die》的歌词则是在观看一次石油泄漏新闻后即兴写成的。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at The Wool Hall in London, co-produced by Jay Kay and Mike Nielsen. Jay revealed that many songs were inspired by his anger over environmental destruction, and the lyrics for 'Too Young to Die' were improvised after watching news about an oil spill.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为酸性爵士运动的重要代表作之一，帮助 Jamiroquai 在 90 年代初期引领了英国爵士放克复兴潮流。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is widely regarded as a key work of the acid jazz movement, helping Jamiroquai lead the UK jazz-funk revival in the early 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamiroquai 是一支英国放克/酸性爵士乐队，由主唱 Jay Kay 于 1992 年创立。其音乐风格融合放克、迪斯科、爵士和电子元素，代表作包括《Virtual Insanity》和《Canned Heat》。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamiroquai is a British funk/acid jazz band founded by frontman Jay Kay in 1992. Their music blends funk, disco, jazz, and electronic elements, with hits including 'Virtual Insanity' and 'Canned Heat'.

items.name: Fiction and Fact
items.descriptionZh: Highlight 的迷你专辑《Fiction and Fact》是一张典型的 K-pop 流行舞曲作品，以强劲的电子节拍和洗脑的副歌旋律为核心特色。主打歌《Fiction》融合了戏剧化的弦乐与合成器音效，展现了成员们成熟的演唱技巧和情感表现力。
items.descriptionEn: Highlight's mini-album 'Fiction and Fact' is a representative K-pop dance pop work, characterized by strong electronic beats and addictive chorus melodies. The title track 'Fiction' blends dramatic strings with synth sounds, showcasing the members' mature vocal skills and emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是 Highlight（当时仍以 Beast 为名）从清纯少年形象转型为成熟风格的关键作品。主打歌《Fiction》的编舞由著名编舞家 Prepix 设计，其中“触摸心脏”的动作成为标志性舞步，被众多后辈团体模仿。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Highlight's (then known as Beast) crucial transition from a youthful image to a mature style. The choreography for 'Fiction' was created by renowned choreographer Prepix, and the 'touching heart' move became iconic, later imitated by many junior groups.
items.artistIntroZh: Highlight 是韩国男子流行演唱团体，原名为 Beast，2016 年更名。成员包括尹斗俊、龙俊亨、梁耀燮、李起光、孙东云。他们以扎实的唱功和强烈的舞台表现力著称，代表作有《Fiction》《Shock》《Good Luck》。
items.artistIntroEn: Highlight is a South Korean male pop vocal group, formerly known as Beast before renaming in 2016. Members include Yoon Doojoon, Yong Junhyung, Yang Yoseob, Lee Gikwang, and Son Dongwoon. They are known for strong vocals and powerful stage presence, with hits like 'Fiction', 'Shock', and 'Good Luck'.

05-17.birthdayZh: 5月17日，是你的生日。这天生来带着音乐的脉搏，正如《Emergency on Planet Earth》里那股觉醒的力量，提醒你世界虽大，你的存在就是一场温暖而勇敢的变革。愿你在《Fiction and Fact》之间，既不迷失于虚幻，也不辜负真实，活出自己最闪亮的光。生日快乐，愿这一天与未来的每一天，都像你一样值得庆祝。
05-17.birthdayEn: May 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and music made history. Like Jamiroquai’s "Emergency on Planet Earth," may your life be a vibrant blend of soul and groove, meeting every challenge with electric joy. And just as "Fiction and Fact" marks a bold new beginning, may this year be your own brave first chapter—truthful, resilient, and full of heart. You are a rare melody, and the world is luckier for your song. Shine on.

items.name: Janet.
items.descriptionZh: Janet Jackson 的第五张录音室专辑《Janet.》是一张里程碑式的 R&B/Soul 作品，以新杰克摇摆乐（New Jack Swing）为基底，融合了放克、流行和嘻哈元素。专辑探讨了性别、种族、自我认同等主题，音乐编排精致且富有实验性。
items.descriptionEn: Janet Jackson's fifth studio album 'Janet.' is a landmark R&B/Soul work rooted in New Jack Swing, blending funk, pop, and hip-hop. The album explores themes of gender, race, and self-identity, with sophisticated and experimental musical arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Janet 与制作人 Jimmy Jam 和 Terry Lewis 在明尼苏达州的 Flyte Tyme 录音室进行了大量即兴创作。主打歌《That's the Way Love Goes》原本是一首未完成的 Demo，Janet 在听到后坚持将其完成，最终成为她在 Billboard 百强单曲榜上的首支冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Janet, along with producers Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, did extensive improvisation at Flyte Tyme Studios in Minnesota. The lead single 'That's the Way Love Goes' was originally an unfinished demo; Janet insisted on completing it, and it became her first No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Janet.》是 90 年代 R&B 专辑的标杆之作，在全球售出超过 1400 万张，并确立了 Janet Jackson 作为流行文化偶像的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Janet.' is a benchmark R&B album of the 1990s, selling over 14 million copies worldwide and cementing Janet Jackson's status as a pop culture icon.
items.artistIntroZh: Janet Jackson 是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为流行音乐史上最具影响力的女艺人之一。她的音乐风格以 R&B、流行和放克为主，代表作包括《Rhythm Nation 1814》《Janet.》和《The Velvet Rope》。
items.artistIntroEn: Janet Jackson is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, widely regarded as one of the most influential female artists in pop music history. Her music primarily blends R&B, pop, and funk, with landmark albums including 'Rhythm Nation 1814', 'Janet.', and 'The Velvet Rope'.

items.name: A State of Trance 2007
items.descriptionZh: Armin van Buuren 的混音合辑《A State of Trance 2007》是一张以 uplifting trance 和 progressive trance 为主轴的流行向电子音乐作品。专辑精选了当年最热门的 trance 单曲，并以流畅的混音过渡和情感充沛的旋律线为核心特色，展现了 Armin 作为 DJ 的编排功力。
items.descriptionEn: Armin van Buuren's compilation 'A State of Trance 2007' is a pop-oriented electronic album centered on uplifting trance and progressive trance. It features the year's hottest trance singles, with smooth mixing transitions and emotionally charged melodic lines, showcasing Armin's DJ programming skills.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑是 Armin 的年度系列《A State of Trance》的第四部，录制于他位于荷兰的家中录音室。Armin 曾表示，2007 年是他个人职业生涯的转折点，这张专辑中的曲目如《Rush Hour》和《Shivers》直接反映了他当时对 trance 音乐未来方向的思考。
items.storiesEn: This compilation is the fourth installment in Armin's annual 'A State of Trance' series, recorded at his home studio in the Netherlands. Armin stated that 2007 was a turning point in his career, and tracks like 'Rush Hour' and 'Shivers' directly reflected his thoughts on the future direction of trance music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列合辑极大地推动了 trance 音乐在全球范围内的流行，成为电子舞曲领域最具影响力的年度混音系列之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation series significantly boosted the global popularity of trance music, becoming one of the most influential annual mix series in the electronic dance music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren 是荷兰 DJ、制作人和电台主持人，连续多年在《DJ Mag》百大 DJ 评选中位居前列。他是 trance 音乐领域的代表人物，以《A State of Trance》电台节目和系列专辑闻名，代表作包括《Intense》《Imagine》。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ, producer, and radio host, consistently ranked among the top DJs in DJ Mag's Top 100. He is a leading figure in trance music, known for his 'A State of Trance' radio show and compilation series, with notable albums including 'Intense' and 'Imagine'.

05-18.birthdayZh: 5月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Janet.》的旋律——那是勇敢拥抱自我与自由的宣言；夜幕低垂时，Armin van Buuren用《A State of Trance 2007》的声波织就了穿越星河的梦。像专辑里那些无畏的节拍一样，愿你的新岁既有温柔落脚，也有奔涌向前的力量。生日快乐，你是这个日子最动人的乐章。
05-18.birthdayEn: May 18 is your birthday. On this day, Janet’s soulful and defiant "Janet." arrived into the world, a testament to self-discovery and bold reinvention—much like the journey each year brings you. And from the same date, Armin van Buuren’s "A State of Trance 2007" reminds us that life, like a great mix, flows through peaks and valleys, always moving toward light. May your new year carry that same fearless rhythm, lifting you higher with every beat. Happy birthday.

items.name: Back on My B.S.
items.descriptionZh: Busta Rhymes 的第七张录音室专辑《Back on My B.S.》是一张典型的东海岸嘻哈作品，以硬核的节奏、复杂的押韵技巧和充满攻击性的 flow 为核心特色。专辑邀请了众多嘻哈巨星助阵，制作上融合了 boom bap 和当代合成器音色。
items.descriptionEn: Busta Rhymes' seventh studio album 'Back on My B.S.' is a classic East Coast hip-hop work, characterized by hardcore beats, complex rhyme schemes, and aggressive flow. The album features numerous hip-hop superstars, blending boom bap with contemporary synth sounds.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《Back on My Bullshit》，后因唱片公司要求而改为《Back on My B.S.》。录制过程���，Busta 与制作人 Focus... 和 Ron Browz 在纽约的录音室中进行了长达数月的密集创作。单曲《Arab Money》因其独特的节奏和争议性歌词引发了广泛讨论。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally titled 'Back on My Bullshit' but was changed to 'Back on My B.S.' at the label's request. During recording, Busta worked intensively for months with producers Focus... and Ron Browz at a New York studio. The single 'Arab Money' sparked widespread discussion due to its unique rhythm and controversial lyrics.
items.artistIntroZh: Busta Rhymes（本名 Trevor Smith Jr.）是美国嘻哈歌手、词曲作者和演员，以极具爆发力的表演和复杂的押韵技巧闻名。他是东海岸嘻哈的代表人物之一，代表作包括《Woo Hah!! Got You All in Check》《Break Ya Neck》和《Touch It》。
items.artistIntroEn: Busta Rhymes (born Trevor Smith Jr.) is an American rapper, songwriter, and actor, known for his explosive performances and complex rhyming technique. He is a key figure in East Coast hip-hop, with hits including 'Woo Hah!! Got You All in Check', 'Break Ya Neck', and 'Touch It'.

items.name: So
items.descriptionZh: 《So》是彼得·盖布瑞尔1986年发行的标志性流行专辑，融合了世界音乐、合成器流行和艺术摇滚元素。其核心特色在于情感深邃的歌词、极具辨识度的打击乐编排，以及开创性地运用数字录音技术，营造出既前卫又动人的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: So is Peter Gabriel's landmark 1986 pop album, blending world music, synth-pop, and art rock. Its core features lie in emotionally profound lyrics, distinctive percussion arrangements, and pioneering use of digital recording techniques, creating a sound that is both avant-garde and deeply moving.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，盖布瑞尔在英格兰的Real World Studios中使用了当时最先进的Fairlight CMI合成器。主打歌《Sledgehammer》的音乐视频由斯蒂芬·R·约翰逊执导，采用定格动画技术，耗资高昂，成为MTV时代最具标志性的影像之一，并直接推动了专辑的商业成功。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Gabriel used the state-of-the-art Fairlight CMI synthesizer at his Real World Studios in England. The music video for the lead single 'Sledgehammer,' directed by Stephen R. Johnson and employing stop-motion animation, was incredibly expensive to produce and became one of the most iconic visuals of the MTV era, directly propelling the album's commercial success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《So》巩固了彼得·盖布瑞尔作为全球流行音乐先锋的地位，其音乐视频《Sledgehammer》荣获多项MTV大奖，对后来的视觉艺术与音乐结合产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: So cemented Peter Gabriel's status as a global pop music pioneer. Its music video for 'Sledgehammer' won multiple MTV Awards and profoundly influenced the integration of visual art and music.
items.artistIntroZh: 彼得·盖布瑞尔（Peter Gabriel），英国歌手、词曲作者及音乐活动家。前卫摇滚乐队创世纪（Genesis）前主唱，其音乐风格跨越艺术摇滚、世界音乐与流行。代表作包括《So》及《Sledgehammer》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Peter Gabriel is a British singer, songwriter, and music activist. He is the former lead vocalist of the progressive rock band Genesis, and his musical style spans art rock, world music, and pop. Notable works include the album So and the single 'Sledgehammer'.

items.name: Around the Well
items.descriptionZh: 《Around the Well》是美国独立民谣艺人Iron & Wine（山姆·比姆）于2009年发行的双碟精选/合辑。其核心特色是融合了低保真民谣、乡村蓝草和静谧的室���流行元素，以细腻的指弹吉他、温暖的和声和诗意的叙事见长，展现了比姆从早期粗糙录音到更精致编曲的演变过程。
items.descriptionEn: Around the Well is a 2009 double-disc compilation/rarities album by American indie folk artist Iron & Wine (Sam Beam). Its core features blend lo-fi folk, country bluegrass, and quiet chamber pop, characterized by intricate fingerpicked guitar, warm harmonies, and poetic storytelling, showcasing Beam's evolution from early raw recordings to more polished arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑收录了比姆在2002年至2007年间录制的稀有曲目、B面歌曲及未发行作品，其中包括他最初用四轨录音机在家中录制的早期小样。专辑名《Around the Well》源自其中一首未收录进正式专辑的歌曲，体现了比姆对家庭录音美学和叙事性创作的坚持。
items.storiesEn: This compilation collects rare tracks, B-sides, and previously unreleased material recorded by Beam between 2002 and 2007, including early demos he originally recorded on a four-track tape machine at home. The album title 'Around the Well' comes from one of these previously unissued songs, reflecting Beam's commitment to home-recording aesthetics and narrative songwriting.
items.artistIntroZh: Iron & Wine，本名山姆·��姆（Sam Beam），美国独立民谣唱作人。以其温柔、低沉的嗓音和充满文学气息的歌词著称，音乐风格以民谣、独立摇滚及低保真为主。代表作包括专辑《Our Endless Numbered Days》和《The Shepherd's Dog》。
items.artistIntroEn: Iron & Wine is the stage name of Sam Beam, an American indie folk singer-songwriter. He is known for his gentle, hushed vocals and literary lyrics, with a musical style rooted in folk, indie rock, and lo-fi. Notable works include the albums Our Endless Numbered Days and The Shepherd's Dog.

05-19.birthdayZh: 5月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了《So》——像彼得·盖布瑞尔的音乐那样，用深邃的节奏拥抱你，让情感如《Sledgehammer》般酣畅。而《Around the Well》的温暖低语，像一口古井，把岁月沉淀成清澈的力量。你值得被这样记住：生命有时是激烈的轰鸣，有时是温柔的沉淀，而今天，所有音符都为你流淌。
05-19.birthdayEn: May 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Peter Gabriel’s “So,” an album that taught us to feel the pulse of the earth and the sky, and Iron & Wine’s “Around the Well,” a collection of quiet wonders waiting to be discovered. You carry that same spirit: a soul that finds music in the ordinary and depth in every moment. May your year be as tender as a forgotten melody, as bold as a sunrise.
