Here’s to you—a beautiful song still being written.

items.name: Poodle Hat
items.descriptionZh: 《Poodle Hat》是“怪人阿尔”扬科维奇2003年发行的恶搞/喜剧专辑。尽管标签标记为R&B/Soul，其核心特色实为对流行、摇滚、说唱及乡村等多种风格的戏仿，以幽默犀利的歌词和精准的音乐模仿著称。专辑包含对埃米纳姆、U2等艺人的恶搞作品。
items.descriptionEn: Poodle Hat is a parody/comedy album by 'Weird Al' Yankovic, released in 2003. Although the tag says R&B/Soul, its core feature is actually the parody of various styles including pop, rock, rap, and country, known for its humorous and sharp lyrics and precise musical mimicry. The album includes parodies of artists like Eminem and U2.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中最具争议的曲目是恶搞埃米纳姆的《Couch Potato》。埃米纳姆最初拒绝了阿尔的恶搞请求，但后来改变主意。此外，专辑封面戏仿了U2乐队2000年专辑《All That You Can't Leave Behind》的封面，阿尔在照片中穿着与U2成员相似的服装站在机场跑道上。
items.storiesEn: The most controversial track on the album is 'Couch Potato', a parody of Eminem. Eminem initially denied Yankovic's request for a parody but later changed his mind. Additionally, the album cover is a parody of U2's 2000 album 'All That You Can't Leave Behind', with Yankovic wearing similar attire and standing on an airport tarmac.
items.artistIntroZh: “怪人阿尔”扬科维奇（'Weird Al' Yankovic），美国音乐人、喜剧家及词曲作者，以创作流行歌曲的戏仿版本而闻名。其风格涵盖喜剧摇滚、戏仿及恶搞，代表作包括《Eat It》和《White & Nerdy》。
items.artistIntroEn: 'Weird Al' Yankovic is an American musician, comedian, and songwriter, famous for creating parody versions of popular songs. His style encompasses comedy rock, parody, and spoof. Notable works include 'Eat It' and 'White & Nerdy'.

05-20.birthdayZh: 5月20日，是你的生日。这一天曾有《Poodle Hat》诞生，它唱出怪咖也有斑斓的宇宙。而你同样值得这样的隐喻——别怕戴一顶看似滑稽的帽子，所有独特都是你灵魂的徽章。愿你的世界永远有笑声做底色，像那首波尔卡般，把平凡日子跳成自己的节日。
05-20.birthdayEn: May 20 is your birthday, a date that shines with the same playful, unapologetic joy as "Poodle Hat" by "Weird Al" Yankovic. Like that 2003 album of clever twists and loving parodies, your spirit turns the ordinary into something delightfully unexpected. May your year be a symphony of laughter, a melody of bold reinvention, and a celebration of every wonderfully weird note that makes you uniquely you. Here's to another trip around the sun, filled with your own signature humor and heart.

items.name: I'm Breathless – Music from and Inspired by the Film Dick Tracy
items.descriptionZh: 《I'm Breathless》是麦当娜1990年发行的概念专辑，灵感来源于电影《迪克·崔西》，她也在片中饰演角色。专辑核心特色是融合了摇摆乐、爵士、百老汇歌舞剧及流行元素，风格复古华丽，展现了麦当娜从80年代流行舞曲向更复杂、戏剧化音乐风格的转型。
items.descriptionEn: I'm Breathless is a 1990 concept album by Madonna, inspired by the film Dick Tracy, in which she also starred. Its core feature is a fusion of swing, jazz, Broadway show tunes, and pop, with a retro, glamorous style, showcasing Madonna's transition from 80s dance-pop to a more complex, theatrical musical direction.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中收录了现象级热门单曲《Vogue》，这首歌最初只是作为B-side录制，但因在俱乐部大受欢迎而被加入专辑。麦当娜在电影片场与沃伦·比蒂合作时，受到20世纪30年代好莱坞魅力的启发，促成了这张风格向爵士和摇摆乐的转变。
items.storiesEn: The album includes the massive hit single 'Vogue', which was initially recorded as a B-side but was added to the album due to its huge popularity in clubs. While working with Warren Beatty on the film set, Madonna was inspired by 1930s Hollywood glamour, leading to the album's stylistic shift towards jazz and swing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Vogue》不仅成为麦当娜职业生涯中最畅销的单曲之一，还重新将舞厅文化中的voguing舞蹈带入主流视野，对流行音乐和舞蹈文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Vogue' became one of Madonna's best-selling singles and brought the ballroom culture's voguing dance into the mainstream, profoundly impacting pop music and dance culture.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna），美国歌手、演员及文化偶像，被誉为“流行女王”。其音乐风格多变，涵盖流行、舞曲、电子及爵士等。代表作包括专辑《Like a Virgin》及单曲《Like a Prayer》、《Vogue》。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and cultural icon, known as the 'Queen of Pop'. Her musical style is diverse, encompassing pop, dance, electronic, and jazz. Notable works include the album Like a Virgin and singles 'Like a Prayer' and 'Vogue'.

items.name: Street Commando
items.descriptionZh: 《Street Commando》是美国西海岸说唱歌手Big Syke（又名Mussolini）于2002年发行的硬核说唱专辑。其核心特色是典型的G-Funk节奏、粗粝的街头叙事和帮派生活写实，歌词充满对街头暴力、忠诚与生存的直白描绘，展现了西海岸地下说唱的原始力量。
items.descriptionEn: Street Commando is a 2002 hardcore rap album by American West Coast rapper Big Syke (aka Mussolini). Its core features are typical G-Funk rhythms, gritty street narratives, and realistic depictions of gang life, with lyrics offering blunt portrayals of street violence, loyalty, and survival, showcasing the raw power of West Coast underground rap.
items.storiesZh: Big Syke是已故说唱传奇2Pac的亲密好友和合作者，也是Thug Life乐团的成员。这张专辑发行于2Pac去世后数年，其中多首歌曲延续了两人在Thug Life时期的合作精神与街头风格。专辑录制过程中，Big Syke坚持使用西海岸经典的模拟录音设备，以保持G-Funk的纯正音色。
items.storiesEn: Big Syke was a close friend and collaborator of the late rap legend 2Pac and a member of the Thug Life group. This album was released several years after 2Pac's death, with many tracks continuing the collaborative spirit and street style of their Thug Life era. During recording, Big Syke insisted on using classic West Coast analog recording equipment to maintain an authentic G-Funk sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Big Syke（本名Tyruss Himes），美国西海岸说唱歌手，2Pac的长期合作者及Thug Life乐团成员。音乐风格以G-Funk和硬核说唱为主，代表作包括与2Pac合作的《Thug Life》专辑及个人专辑《Street Commando》。
items.artistIntroEn: Big Syke (born Tyruss Himes) was an American West Coast rapper, a longtime collaborator of 2Pac, and a member of the Thug Life group. His music style is primarily G-Funk and hardcore rap. Notable works include the collaborative Thug Life album with 2Pac and his solo album Street Commando.

items.name: Strategies Against Architecture II
items.descriptionZh: 《Strategies Against Architecture II》是Einstürzende Neubauten于1991年发行的合辑，延续了乐队标志性的工业电子与噪音实验风格。作品大量运用非传统打击乐器、金属撞击声和电子失真，营造出冷峻、破碎的声响景观，体现了他们对建筑与声音关系的解构式探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Strategies Against Architecture II" is a 1991 compilation by Einstürzende Neubauten, continuing their signature industrial electronic and noise experimental style. The work extensively uses unconventional percussion, metallic clanging, and electronic distortion to create a cold, fragmented soundscape, reflecting their deconstructive exploration of the relationship between architecture and sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑收录了乐队1985年至1990年间未发行或罕见的录音，包括现场版和混音作品。录制过程中，乐队成员曾在废弃工厂中使用电钻、铁锤等工具制造音效，甚至将录音设备埋入混凝土中捕捉共振声。专辑标题源自乐队早期提出的"策略对抗建筑"理念，象征用声音瓦解物理结构。
items.storiesEn: This compilation features unreleased or rare recordings from 1985 to 1990, including live versions and remixes. During recording, band members used tools like electric drills and hammers in abandoned factories to create sounds, even burying recording equipment in concrete to capture resonance. The album title originates from the band's early concept of "strategies against architecture," symbolizing the dismantling of physical structures through sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该合辑巩固了Einstürzende Neubauten作为工业音乐先驱的地位，影响了后来噪音摇滚和实验电子乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation solidified Einstürzende Neubauten's status as pioneers of industrial music, influencing the development of later noise rock and experimental electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Einstürzende Neubauten是德国工业音乐团体，成立于1980年，以使用非音乐工具和自建乐器闻名。他们的音乐融合工业噪音、实验电子和表演艺术，代表作包括《Halber Mensch》和《Tabula Rasa》。
items.artistIntroEn: Einstürzende Neubauten is a German industrial music group formed in 1980, known for using non-musical tools and self-built instruments. Their music blends industrial noise, experimental electronics, and performance art, with代表作 including "Halber Mensch" and "Tabula Rasa."

05-21.birthdayZh: 5月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《I'm Breathless》，像麦当娜在爵士与摇摆中挣脱束缚的深呼吸；也有《Strategies Against Architecture II》，用工业之声重构废墟与勇气。你来到世上，恰似这矛盾又和谐的交响——既有轻盈起舞的自由，也有对抗命运的坚硬。愿你在自己的节奏里，活得如专辑般独特，每一次心跳都是对生命深情的构建。
05-21.birthdayEn: May 21 is your birthday—a day when the world once gave us Madonna's I'm Breathless, daring and theatrical, and Big Syke's Street Commando, raw and unbowed. Like these albums, your spirit holds both the spotlight and the quiet strength of the underground. May your new year unfold with the boldness of a stage, the grit of a journey, and the harmony of a life well-sung. Here’s to you—bright, unstoppable, and beautifully in tune with your own rhythm.

items.name: Oxygen
items.descriptionZh: 《Oxygen》是爱尔兰流行乐团Avalon于2001年发行的专辑，风格以柔和的成人当代流行为主，融合了凯尔特民谣与轻摇滚元素。作品旋律流畅，编曲注重人声与和声的层次感，营造出温暖、治愈的氛围，核心特色在于其抒情性的歌词和纯净的声线。
items.descriptionEn: "Oxygen" is a 2001 album by Irish pop group Avalon, featuring a soft adult contemporary pop style blended with Celtic folk and light rock elements. The melodies are smooth, with arrangements emphasizing vocal and harmonic layers, creating a warm, healing atmosphere. Its core features lie in lyrical lyrics and pure vocal tones.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱因过度用嗓导致声带结节，一度暂停录音。制作人建议她采用更自然的呼吸技巧，并调整了录音室的湿度以保护嗓音。这张专辑的创作灵感部分来源于乐队成员在爱尔兰西海岸旅行时看到的壮丽海景，试图用音乐表达氧气般的生命活力。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the lead singer developed vocal cord nodules due to overuse, causing a temporary halt. The producer advised her to adopt more natural breathing techniques and adjusted the studio's humidity to protect her voice. The album's inspiration partly came from the breathtaking coastal scenery the band members saw while traveling along Ireland's west coast, aiming to express the vitality of oxygen through music.
items.artistIntroZh: Avalon是爱尔兰流行乐团，活跃于1990年代末至2000年代初，风格以成人当代流行和凯尔特音乐为主。代表作包括专辑《Oxygen》和单曲《New Day》，以其温暖和声和抒情旋律在爱尔兰及欧洲部分地区获得关注。
items.artistIntroEn: Avalon is an Irish pop group active from the late 1990s to early 2000s, known for adult contemporary pop and Celtic music. Their代表作 include the album "Oxygen" and single "New Day," gaining attention in Ireland and parts of Europe for their warm harmonies and lyrical melodies.

05-22.birthdayZh: 5月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌出空灵的《Oxygen》，像深海中一缕温存的光，提醒你每一次呼吸都是宇宙的馈赠。愿你在新的一岁里，像这旋律般自在而舒展，把日子的嘈杂都化作风声与流水。你值得这世间所有柔软的节奏——生日快乐，继续轻盈地生长吧。
05-22.birthdayEn: May 22 is your birthday. On this day, the album Oxygen by Avalon was released—a breath of fresh air, a reminder that life’s essence is in its flow. Like that music, may your year be filled with light and easy rhythm, each note lifting you higher. You are a melody of strength and grace, and the world is brighter for your song. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: The Marshall Mathers LP
items.descriptionZh: 《The Marshall Mathers LP》是Eminem于2000年发行的第三张录音室专辑，也是其商业突破之作。风格以硬核嘻哈为主，融合了讽刺性的叙事、高速押韵和黑暗幽默。专辑的核心特色在于Eminem极具争议性的歌词，直面家庭矛盾、暴力、名望与心理创伤，同时展现了高超的Flow和文字游戏。
items.descriptionEn: "The Marshall Mathers LP" is Eminem's third studio album, released in 2000, marking his commercial breakthrough. The style is primarily hardcore hip-hop, blending satirical storytelling, rapid-fire rhymes, and dark humor. Its core feature lies in Eminem's highly controversial lyrics confronting family conflicts, violence, fame, and psychological trauma, while showcasing exceptional flow and wordplay.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Eminem因与母亲Debbie的公开纠纷以及枪支指控面临法律压力，这些经历直接反映在《Stan》和《The Way I Am》等歌曲中。制作人Dr. Dre曾透露，Eminem为了追求完美，多次重录《The Real Slim Shady》的副歌段落，甚至累到在录音棚沙发上睡着。专辑封面上的小屋正是Eminem童年居住过的密歇根州移动房屋。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Eminem faced legal pressure from a public feud with his mother Debbie and a weapons charge, experiences directly reflected in songs like "Stan" and "The Way I Am." Producer Dr. Dre revealed that Eminem re-recorded the chorus of "The Real Slim Shady" multiple times in pursuit of perfection, even falling asleep on the studio couch. The cover photo depicts the mobile home in Michigan where Eminem lived as a child.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑成为史上销售最快的嘻哈专辑之一，并确立了Eminem作为全球巨星的地位。其对社会禁忌的直白描写深刻影响了2000年代嘻哈的歌词内容与叙事风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became one of the fastest-selling hip-hop albums in history, cementing Eminem's status as a global superstar. Its unflinching depiction of social taboos profoundly influenced hip-hop lyricism and storytelling in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，出生于密苏里州。他以复杂的押韵技巧、情感激烈的叙事和争议性内容闻名，代表作包括《The Slim Shady LP》和《Recovery》，被誉为白人嘻哈巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper and producer from Missouri. Known for his complex rhyme schemes, emotionally charged storytelling, and controversial content, his代表作 include "The Slim Shady LP" and "Recovery," and he is hailed as a white hip-hop superstar.

items.name: Sound of the Underground
items.descriptionZh: 《Sound of the Underground》是英国女子组合Girls Aloud于2003年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了电子、摇滚和R&B元素。专辑的核心特色在于其充满活力的节拍、朗朗上口的旋律以及成员们鲜明的个性嗓音，尤其是同名主打歌的合成器音色奠定了她们前卫流行的基调。
items.descriptionEn: "Sound of the Underground" is the debut studio album by British girl group Girls Aloud, released in 2003. The style is primarily pop dance, blending electronic, rock, and R&B elements. Its core features include energetic beats, catchy melodies, and the members' distinctive vocal personalities, with the title track's synthesizer sound establishing their avant-garde pop foundation.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程非常紧凑，因为Girls Aloud是通过电视选秀节目《Popstars: The Rivals》刚刚组建的。制作人Brian Higgins和Xenomania团队为了赶在圣诞节前发行，在短短几周内创作并录制了大部分歌曲。同名主打歌原本是为另一艺人创作的，但被选中后，乐队在录音棚里仅用两天就完成了人声录制。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was extremely tight, as Girls Aloud had just been formed through the TV talent show "Popstars: The Rivals." Producer Brian Higgins and the Xenomania team wrote and recorded most of the songs in just a few weeks to release before Christmas. The title track was originally written for another artist, but after being selected, the group recorded their vocals in just two days in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Girls Aloud成为英国2000年代最成功的女子组合之一，其融合流行与电子舞曲的风格影响了后续英国流行乐的制作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped establish Girls Aloud as one of the most successful British girl groups of the 2000s, with its fusion of pop and electronic dance music influencing the production direction of subsequent UK pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Girls Aloud是英国女子流行组合，成立于2002年，通过电视节目《Popstars: The Rivals》出道。她们以前卫流行舞曲风格著称，代表作包括《Sound of the Underground》和《Love Machine》，是英国2000年代最具影响力的女子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls Aloud is a British pop girl group formed in 2002 through the TV show "Popstars: The Rivals." Known for their avant-garde pop dance style, their代表作 include "Sound of the Underground" and "Love Machine," making them one of the most influential UK girl groups of the 2000s.

05-23.birthdayZh: 5月23日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《The Marshall Mathers LP》里犀利的表达，也回响着《Sound of the Underground》不羁的节拍。世界曾用锐利的词句与热烈的鼓点庆祝这个日子，而你，就是这一切的集合——温柔中藏着倔强，安静里自有锋芒。愿新的一岁，你始终能唱出心底最诚实的旋律。
05-23.birthdayEn: May 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Eminem’s raw, defiant “The Marshall Mathers LP” and Girls Aloud’s vibrant, rule-breaking “Sound of the Underground.” Like these albums, your spirit carries both fierce honesty and joyful, rebellious light. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own—bold verses of courage, tender bridges of grace, and a chorus that echoes with the deepest love. Here’s to you, the unique melody that makes this world brighter simply by being in it.

items.name: Trap House
items.descriptionZh: 《Trap House》是美国说唱歌手Gucci Mane于2005年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以南方嘻哈和陷阱音乐（Trap）为主。专辑的核心特色在于其沉重的低音、简约的节拍以及Gucci Mane冷酷的叙述风格，歌词聚焦于街头生活、毒品交易和生存斗争，是陷阱音乐早期定义的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Trap House" is the second studio album by American rapper Gucci Mane, released in 2005. The style is primarily Southern hip-hop and trap music. Its core features include heavy bass, minimal beats, and Gucci Mane's cold narrative style, with lyrics focusing on street life, drug dealing, and survival struggles, making it a classic that early defined trap music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Gucci Mane刚刚从监狱获释，他在亚特兰大的家中用简易设备录制了大部分歌曲。制作人Zaytoven回忆说，Gucci经常在凌晨灵感迸发时打电话给他，两人直接在电话里哼唱旋律完成创作。专辑主打歌《Trap House》的歌词灵感来源于Gucci Mane在亚特兰大东区亲身经历的毒品交易生活。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Gucci Mane had just been released from prison and recorded most of the songs on simple equipment in his Atlanta home. Producer Zaytoven recalled that Gucci often called him late at night when inspiration struck, and they would hum melodies over the phone to complete compositions. The title track "Trap House" was lyrically inspired by Gucci Mane's firsthand experiences with drug dealing in Atlanta's Eastside.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Trap House》被公认为陷阱音乐流派的奠基之作之一，深刻影响了2010年代陷阱音乐的全球化流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Trap House" is widely recognized as one of the foundational works of the trap music genre, profoundly influencing the global popularity of trap music in the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Gucci Mane（本名Radric Delantic Davis）是美国说唱歌手，出生于阿拉巴马州，亚特兰大陷阱音乐的重要代表人物。他以独特的慵懒Flow、街头叙事和大量作品著称，代表作包括《Trap House》和《The State vs. Radric Davis》。
items.artistIntroEn: Gucci Mane (born Radric Delantic Davis) is an American rapper from Alabama, a key figure in Atlanta trap music. Known for his distinctive laid-back flow, street narratives, and prolific output, his代表作 include "Trap House" and "The State vs. Radric Davis."

items.name: Age Ain't Nothing but a Number
items.descriptionZh: 《Age Ain't Nothing but a Number》是Aaliyah于1994年发行的首张录音室专辑，虽被标记为Folk/Country，但其实际风格以R&B和New Jack Swing为主，融合了流行与嘻哈元素。专辑展现了Aaliyah年少时的清新嗓音与成熟情感表达。
items.descriptionEn: Although labeled Folk/Country, 'Age Ain't Nothing but a Number' is Aaliyah's debut album primarily featuring R&B and New Jack Swing, blending pop and hip-hop elements, showcasing her youthful yet mature vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑由R. Kelly操刀制作，两人当时因合作而相识，R. Kelly几乎包办了所有词曲创作与制作。专辑发行时Aaliyah年仅15岁，但凭借单曲《Back & Forth》迅速走红。
items.storiesEn: The album was produced by R. Kelly, who wrote and produced most of the tracks. Aaliyah was only 15 at the time of release, but the single 'Back & Forth' quickly propelled her to fame.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah（1979-2001）是美国R&B女歌手、演员，出生于纽约布鲁克林。她以融合R&B、嘻哈与流行���格的嗓音和时尚形象著称，代表作包括《One in a Million》和《Try Again》。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah (1979-2001) was an American R&B singer and actress from Brooklyn, New York. Known for blending R&B, hip-hop, and pop, her notable works include 'One in a Million' and 'Try Again'.

items.name: Book of Angels Volume 1: Astaroth
items.descriptionZh: 《Book of Angels Volume 1: Astaroth》是Jamie Saft于2005年发行的专辑，被标记为Pop，但实际风格融合了先锋爵士、实验音乐与自由即兴。专辑以John Zorn的《Book of Angels》系列为基础，Saft用钢琴与电子元素重新诠释了这些作品。
items.descriptionEn: Labeled as Pop, 'Book of Angels Volume 1: Astaroth' by Jamie Saft is an avant-garde jazz and experimental album, interpreting John Zorn's compositions with piano and electronic elements.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是John Zorn的《Book of Angels》系列第一卷，由Saft以钢琴独奏与电子处理的方式录制。Saft在录音时即兴发挥，将传统犹太音乐元素与现代实验音色结合，展现了独特的个人风格。
items.storiesEn: This is the first volume of John Zorn's 'Book of Angels' series, recorded by Saft with solo piano and electronic processing. Saft incorporated improvisation and blended traditional Jewish music with modern experimental sounds.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamie Saft是美国多乐器演奏家、作曲家和制作人，擅长爵士、实验音乐与电子音乐。他活跃于纽约地下音乐场景，代表作包括与John Zorn、Mike Patton的合作专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamie Saft is an American multi-instrumentalist, composer, and producer specializing in jazz, experimental, and electronic music. He is active in the New York underground scene, collaborating with John Zorn and Mike Patton.

05-24.birthdayZh: 5月24日，是你的生日。就像Aaliyah在《Age Ain't Nothing but a Number》里唱的那样，年岁只是数字，你灵魂里藏着比时间更深的坚定。又像《Trap House》的节奏，从低沉中生长出的力量，每一步都踏出属于自己的节奏。愿你在这一天，握紧自己的节拍，带着温柔与倔强，走向更亮的地方。
05-24.birthdayEn: May 24 is your birthday, a date that echoes with creative fire. On this day, the raw trap energy of Gucci Mane’s Trap House and the soulful grace of Aaliyah’s Age Ain’t Nothing but a Number first breathed life into the world. May your new year carry that same bold spirit—unapologetically authentic, beautifully resilient. Like these albums, may your path be one of transformation and rhythm, each note a step toward the masterpiece only you can compose. You are a living refrain of strength and light.

items.name: Arrasando
items.descriptionZh: 《Arrasando》是Thalía于2000年发行的拉丁流行专辑，被标记为Electronic，但实际以拉丁流行、舞曲和电子节拍为主。专辑融合了拉丁节奏与电子合成器，展现了Thalía热情奔放的演唱风格。
items.descriptionEn: Labeled as Electronic, 'Arrasando' is a Latin pop and dance album by Thalía, blending Latin rhythms with electronic synths, showcasing her energetic and passionate vocal style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Arrasando》由Thalía与制作人Emilio Estefan合作创作，灵感来源于她希望打破传统拉丁音乐的界限。专辑在全球销量超过百万，尤其在墨西哥和美国拉丁市场大获成功。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Arrasando' was co-written by Thalía and producer Emilio Estefan, inspired by her desire to break boundaries of traditional Latin music. The album sold over a million copies worldwide, especially successful in Mexico and the US Latin market.
items.artistIntroZh: Thalía是墨西哥著名歌手、演员，出生于墨西哥城。她以拉丁流行、舞曲和民谣风格著称，代表作包括《Amor a la Mexicana》和《No Me Enseñaste》，全球唱片销量超2500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Thalía is a renowned Mexican singer and actress from Mexico City. Known for Latin pop, dance, and ballad styles, her hits include 'Amor a la Mexicana' and 'No Me Enseñaste', with over 25 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Me amarás
items.descriptionZh: 《Me amarás》是Ricky Martin于1993年发行的第二张录音室专辑，属于Pop风格，融合了拉丁流行与抒情情歌。专辑展现了Ricky Martin早期作为拉丁偶像的浪漫形象，旋律优美且情感丰富。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1993, 'Me amarás' is Ricky Martin's second studio album in the Pop genre, blending Latin pop and romantic ballads, showcasing his early image as a Latin heartthrob with melodic and emotional songs.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Ricky Martin在Menudo组合单飞后的第二张个人作品，录制于西班牙和波多黎各。专辑中的同名主打歌《Me amarás》成为拉丁美洲的热门单曲，帮助他巩固了个人事业基础。
items.storiesEn: This album was Ricky Martin's second solo effort after leaving Menudo, recorded in Spain and Puerto Rico. The title track 'Me amarás' became a hit in Latin America, helping establish his solo career.
items.artistIntroZh: Ricky Martin是波多黎各歌手、演员，出生于圣胡安。他以拉丁流行、舞曲和情歌风格闻名，代表作包括《Livin' la Vida Loca》和《She Bangs》，全球唱片销量超7000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Ricky Martin is a Puerto Rican singer and actor from San Juan. Known for Latin pop, dance, and ballads, his hits include 'Livin' la Vida Loca' and 'She Bangs', with over 70 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Q232126
items.descriptionZh: 《Q232126》是德国阿卡贝拉组合Wise Guys于2012年发行的专辑，属于Pop风格，但以无伴奏人声合唱为特色。专辑融合了流行、民谣与幽默元素，歌词常以德语演唱，充满生活智慧与风趣。
items.descriptionEn: Labeled as Pop, 'Q232126' is an a cappella album by German group Wise Guys, featuring vocal harmonies blended with pop, folk, and humor, with German lyrics full of wit and life wisdom.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Q232126》实际上是德国一种税务表格的编号，灵感来自成员们对日常生活的调侃。录制过程中，他们完全使用人声模拟乐器，包括贝斯和打击乐，展现了高超的声乐技巧。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Q232126' refers to a German tax form number, inspired by the members' playful take on everyday life. During recording, they used only vocal sounds to simulate instruments, showcasing exceptional vocal skills.
items.artistIntroZh: Wise Guys是德国阿卡贝拉组合，成立于1989年，来自科隆。他们以多声部人声合唱和幽默歌词著称，代表作包括《Klapperstrauß》和《Nur für Dich》，在德语地区拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Wise Guys are a German a cappella group formed in 1989 in Cologne. Known for multi-part vocal harmonies and humorous lyrics, their hits include 'Klapperstrauß' and 'Nur für Dich', popular in German-speaking countries.

05-25.birthdayZh: 5月25日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Arrasando》——横扫一切的力量，像你骨子里的热望，总能将平凡日子点燃成星辰。也有《Me amarás》里温柔的承诺，提醒你被爱包围。愿你在属于自己的时区里，既拥有席卷风雨的勇气，也珍藏柔软如水的深情，生日快乐。
05-25.birthdayEn: May 25 is your birthday—a date that radiates with the spirit of artistic power and joyful harmony. Like Thalía’s *Arrasando*, your presence sweeps through life with vibrant energy, leaving sparkles of warmth wherever you go. And just as the Wise Guys’ album brings voices together in perfect sync, you weave a beautiful melody into the hearts of those around you. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of love, laughter, and radiant light. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band
items.descriptionZh: 《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》是The Beatles在1967年发行的概念专辑，融合了迷幻流行、巴洛克流行和前卫摇滚元素。其核心特色在于突破性的录音室实验、华丽的管弦乐编排以及虚构乐队表演的叙事框架，彻底改变了流行音乐的创作与聆听方式。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1967, Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band is a concept album by The Beatles blending psychedelic pop, baroque pop, and proto-prog rock. Its core features include groundbreaking studio experimentation, lavish orchestral arrangements, and a narrative frame of a fictional band performance, revolutionizing the creation and listening of pop music.
items.storiesZh: 录制期间，乐队成员保罗·麦卡特尼提出以虚构的“佩珀军士”乐队身份演出，以摆脱偶像包袱。专辑封面由波普艺术家彼得·布莱克设计，集合了玛丽莲·梦露、爱因斯坦等数十位名人形象，但因版权纠纷，最终未获授权的名人（如甘地）被替换。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Paul McCartney suggested performing as the fictional 'Sgt. Pepper' band to shed their pop idol image. The cover art, designed by pop artist Peter Blake, featured dozens of celebrities including Marilyn Monroe and Einstein, but due to copyright issues, unapproved figures like Gandhi were replaced.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为流行音乐史上最具影响力的作品之一，首次将专辑视为统一艺术载体，推动了概念专辑和录音室美学的革命。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as one of the most influential albums in pop history, it was the first to treat the album as a unified artistic statement, sparking a revolution in concept albums and studio aesthetics.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beatles是一支来自英国利物浦的摇滚乐队，活跃于1960-1970年，主要风格为流行、摇滚和迷幻。代表作包括《Hey Jude》《Yesterday》及本专辑，是全球音乐史上最畅销的乐队。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beatles were a rock band from Liverpool, England, active from 1960 to 1970, known for pop, rock, and psychedelia. Their hits include 'Hey Jude', 'Yesterday', and this album, making them the best-selling band in music history.

05-26.birthdayZh: 5月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》的旋律种进时光里——那是一场虚构的狂欢，却唱出最真实的勇敢。你就如同这张专辑，在平凡的日子里构建自己的王国，披上彩色的梦，把孤独化作节拍。愿你的生命永远有这迷幻而温柔的底气，带着一班属于自己的乐队，演奏独一无二的乐章。
05-26.birthdayEn: May 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Sgt. Pepper’s Lonely Hearts Club Band, a masterpiece of joyful rebellion and boundless color, inviting us all to listen a little closer and dream a little louder. Your spirit carries that same invitation—a warmth that turns the ordinary into something bright and new. As you step into another year, may you carry that album’s hopeful, playful energy with you. May your days be as lyrical as a beloved song, and your heart as full as a standing ovation.

items.name: The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan
items.descriptionZh: 《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》是Bob Dylan 1963年发行的第二张专辑，以民谣和乡村民谣风格为主。核心特色在于其诗意的、带有强烈社会抗议色彩的歌词，以及Dylan标志性的口琴与木吉他伴奏，奠定了其作为时代代言人的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1963, The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan is Bob Dylan's second album, rooted in folk and country folk. Its core feature lies in poetic, socially charged protest lyrics accompanied by Dylan's signature harmonica and acoustic guitar, establishing him as a voice of his generation.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原计划于1962年录制，但Dylan对初版不满意，仅发行了少量试压片。1963年他重新录制了大部分歌曲，其中包括著名的《Blowin' in the Wind》。专辑封面由女友苏兹·罗托洛拍摄，两人在格林威治村街头的合影成为经典。
items.storiesEn: Originally recorded in 1962, Dylan was dissatisfied with the first version, which saw only a few test pressings. He re-recorded most songs in 1963, including the iconic 'Blowin' in the Wind.' The cover photo, taken by girlfriend Suze Rotolo, shows them walking in Greenwich Village and became iconic.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Dylan是美国创作歌手，生于1941年，主要风格为民谣、民谣摇滚和乡村。代表作包括《Blowin' in the Wind》《Like a Rolling Stone》及本专辑，2016年获诺贝尔文学奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Dylan is an American singer-songwriter born in 1941, known for folk, folk rock, and country. His hits include 'Blowin' in the Wind', 'Like a Rolling Stone', and this album; he won the Nobel Prize in Literature in 2016.

05-27.birthdayZh: 5月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行了《The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan》，那张用原声吉他和口琴把自由与抗争唱进风里的专辑。你像它一样，带着独有的嗓音与节奏，在岁月里自在飘荡、轻轻歌唱。愿你始终有自由的灵魂，也有温柔的依靠，在属于自己的路上，步履不停，暖若晨光。
05-27.birthdayEn: May 27 is your birthday, a date the world once gifted with Bob Dylan's "The Freewheelin' Bob Dylan," an album that taught us to wander with purpose and sing through the storm. Like its restless, hopeful spirit, may your year unfold with fearless curiosity and gentle rebellion. And as you step into this new season, carry the quiet magic of that day—a reminder that your presence is a melody the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: The Eminem Show
items.descriptionZh: 《The Eminem Show》是Eminem 2002年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格为硬核嘻哈和流行说唱。核心特色在于其内省且愤怒的歌词，深入探讨名声、家庭、政治及个人挣扎，制作上融合了摇滚采样与戏剧化的叙事结构。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2002, The Eminem Show is Eminem's fourth studio album, blending hardcore hip-hop and pop rap. Its core features introspective, angry lyrics delving into fame, family, politics, and personal struggles, with production incorporating rock samples and dramatic narrative structures.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本定名为《The Eminem Show》以模仿脱口秀，但发行前一周母带被盗。Eminem被迫紧急重录部分歌曲，并调整了曲目顺序。专辑中《Without Me》的MV因恶搞政客和流行文化引发争议，但大获成功。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled to parody a talk show, the album's master tapes were stolen a week before release. Eminem had to urgently re-record some songs and adjust the tracklist. The video for 'Without Me' sparked controversy for parodying politicians and pop culture, yet became a huge hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是21世纪初最具影响力的嘻哈专辑之一，巩固了Eminem作为白人巨星在黑人主导的嘻哈界的地位，并推动了流行说唱的全球化。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely considered one of the most influential hip-hop albums of the early 2000s, it cemented Eminem's status as a white superstar in a Black-dominated genre and boosted the globalization of pop rap.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem是美国说唱歌手、制作人，生于1972年，主要风格为嘻哈、硬核说唱。代表作包括《Lose Yourself》《Stan》及本专辑，是史上最畅销的说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem is an American rapper and producer born in 1972, known for hip-hop and hardcore rap. His hits include 'Lose Yourself', 'Stan', and this album; he is one of the best-selling rappers of all time.

05-28.birthdayZh: 5月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Eminem Show》的旋律——它直面风暴，把压力与裂痕唱成不屈的诗。你也是这样的存在：在喧嚣中守住自己的节奏，让每一次转身都带着光。愿新的一岁，你有说唱般的坦荡，也有拥抱温柔的勇气。生日快乐，继续做自己生命里最燃的主角。
05-28.birthdayEn: May 28 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of The Eminem Show, an album that roared with unapologetic truth and resilience. Like its defiant spirit, may your year be filled with the courage to speak your story and the strength to rise above every challenge. You were born on a day that celebrates raw authenticity and creative fire. May your path ahead shimmer with that same bold, unstoppable light, and may every new chapter feel as powerful as your own unique soul.

items.name: Juanes MTV Unplugged
items.descriptionZh: 《Juanes MTV Unplugged》是Juanes 2012年发行的不插电现场专辑，风格为拉丁流行和摇滚。核心特色在于以原声吉他为主，重新编排了Juanes的代表作，并融入哥伦比亚传统民谣元素，展现了他深情且充满感染力的演唱。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2012, Juanes MTV Unplugged is a live acoustic album blending Latin pop and rock. Its core features acoustic guitar-driven rearrangements of Juanes' hits, infused with Colombian folk elements, showcasing his emotional and powerful vocals.
items.storiesZh: 这场不插电演出在迈阿密录制，Juanes邀请了多位拉丁音乐嘉宾助阵，包括Joan Sebastian和Pablo Alborán。演出中他罕见地演唱了早期未发行的歌曲《La Señal》，并在录制前因紧张而多次调整编曲，最终效果广受好评。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Miami, the unplugged set featured special guests including Joan Sebastian and Pablo Alborán. Juanes performed the previously unreleased early song 'La Señal' and, due to nerves, adjusted arrangements multiple times before recording, resulting in a critically acclaimed performance.
items.artistIntroZh: Juanes是哥伦比亚歌手、吉他手，生于1972年，主要风格为拉丁流行、摇滚和哥伦比亚民谣。代表作包括《La Camisa Negra》《A Dios le Pido》及本专辑，获多座格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Juanes is a Colombian singer and guitarist born in 1972, known for Latin pop, rock, and Colombian folk. His hits include 'La Camisa Negra', 'A Dios le Pido', and this album; he has won multiple Grammy Awards.

05-29.birthdayZh: 5月29日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有一张《Juanes MTV Unplugged》诞生，它用原声吉他和弦，把摇滚的炽热化作温柔的拥抱——正如你，在喧嚣世界里始终保有内心的清澈。愿你在新的一岁，像这不插电的旋律一样，无需修饰也自有光芒；愿所有未言说的心事，都轻轻落定成你生命里最动听的副歌。
05-29.birthdayEn: May 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed a voice like yours—bold and tender, like Juanes’ MTV Unplugged, where raw strings meet open-hearted strength. Just as that album turned a stage into a sanctuary of grace and truth, may your year unfold as a live performance of your most beautiful self—unfiltered, luminous, and deeply real. You are a melody the universe needed, and today, the whole song of you is worth celebrating. Shine on.

items.name: Monkey Business
items.descriptionZh: 《Monkey Business》是Black Eyed Peas 2005年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格为嘻哈、流行说唱和舞曲。核心特色在于融合了放克、电子和世界音乐元素，节奏感强烈，歌词幽默且充满派对氛围，代表作《My Humps》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2005, Monkey Business is the Black Eyed Peas' fourth studio album, blending hip-hop, pop rap, and dance music. Its core features fuse funk, electronic, and world music elements with strong beats, humorous party lyrics; the hit 'My Humps' became a global sensation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员will.i.am在亚洲旅行时受到当地音乐启发，将印度和东南亚采样融入歌曲《Pump It》。专辑原定名《The Black Eyed Peas》，但因与首张专辑重名而改为《Monkey Business》，灵感来自成员间的玩笑。
items.storiesEn: During recording, will.i.am was inspired by Asian travels, incorporating Indian and Southeast Asian samples into 'Pump It'. The album was originally self-titled but changed to Monkey Business to avoid confusion with their debut, inspired by inside jokes among the group.
items.artistIntroZh: Black Eyed Peas是美国嘻哈/流行团体，成立于1995年，主要风格为嘻哈、流行和电子舞曲。代表作包括《Where Is the Love?》《I Gotta Feeling》及本专辑，是21世纪初全球最成功的跨界团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Black Eyed Peas are an American hip-hop/pop group formed in 1995, known for hip-hop, pop, and EDM. Their hits include 'Where Is the Love?', 'I Gotta Feeling', and this album; they were one of the most successful crossover groups of the early 2000s.

items.name: Atlantis Princess
items.descriptionZh: 《Atlantis Princess》是BoA于2003年发行的第三张韩语录音室专辑，属于典型的流行舞曲风格，融合了Teen Pop与Dance Pop元素。专辑以梦幻的水下世界为主题，旋律轻快明亮，展现了BoA清澈有力的嗓音与青春活力，主打歌《亚特兰蒂斯少女》更是成为K-Pop经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: Atlantis Princess is BoA's third Korean studio album released in 2003, featuring a typical pop dance style blended with teen pop and dance pop elements. With a dreamy underwater world theme, the melodies are bright and energetic, showcasing BoA's clear and powerful vocals. The title track 'Atlantis Princess' became a classic K-Pop hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，BoA年仅16岁，却已展现出惊人的专业素养。为了表现亚特兰蒂斯的神秘感，她在录音时尝试了多种发声方式，甚至模仿海豚音。此外，专辑封面拍摄是在水下完成的，BoA为达到完美效果，在水中反复拍摄数小时，展现了极高的敬业精神。
items.storiesEn: During the album recording, BoA was only 16 years old but already showed remarkable professionalism. To capture the mystery of Atlantis, she experimented with various vocal techniques, even imitating dolphin sounds. Additionally, the album cover was shot underwater, and BoA spent hours in the water to achieve the perfect shot, demonstrating her strong work ethic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了BoA在韩国乐坛的天后地位，并助力她成功进军日本市场，成为韩流文化输出的重要里程碑。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented BoA's status as a queen of K-Pop and helped her successfully enter the Japanese market, becoming a milestone in the spread of Hallyu culture.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（宝儿），韩国女歌手，被誉为“K-Pop天后”。1986年出生，13岁出道，以精湛的唱跳实力闻名。代表作包括《No.1》《My Name》《Only One》等，是首位在日本和韩国都取得巨大成功的solo女歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA, a South Korean female singer known as the 'Queen of K-Pop,' was born in 1986 and debuted at age 13. Renowned for her exceptional singing and dancing skills, her hits include 'No.1,' 'My Name,' and 'Only One.' She is the first solo female artist to achieve massive success in both Korea and Japan.

05-30.birthdayZh: 5月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份礼物——黑眼豆豆唱出《Monkey Business》，提醒你生活可以像节奏一样轻快、调皮又自由；而BoA化身《Atlantis Princess》，在深海般的嗓音里告诉你，纯真与力量可以同时属于一个人。你来到世上，不是为了完美，而是为了像这些旋律一样，热烈地存在。
05-30.birthdayEn: May 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Monkey Business, a spark of playful energy, and Atlantis Princess, a wave of poetic grace—two spirits that mirror your own. You carry that same blend of joyful mischief and deep, luminous wonder. So today, let the rhythm of your heart celebrate the beautiful kingdom you are. May your year ahead be as vibrant as a hit song and as vast as an ocean of dreams. You are a melody all your own.

items.name: Codes and Keys
items.descriptionZh: 《Codes and Keys》是Death Cab for Cutie于2011年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格属于独立流行（Indie Pop），融合了合成器���电子元素，较前作更加明亮、精致。专辑以人际关系与情感密码为主题，旋律流畅而富有层次感，展现了乐队向更成熟流行方向的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Codes and Keys is Death Cab for Cutie's seventh studio album, released in 2011, featuring an indie pop style with synthesizers and electronic elements, brighter and more polished than previous works. The album explores themes of relationships and emotional codes, with smooth, layered melodies, marking the band's transition toward a more mature pop direction.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，主唱Ben Gibbard正经历与女演员Zooey Deschanel的离婚，但乐队刻意避免将个人情感过度注入音乐。相反，他们受到极简主义建筑和电子音乐的启发，在录音室中大量使用模拟合成器。贝斯手Nick Harmer曾透露，他们甚至拆解了一台老式合成器来研究其声音构造。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, lead singer Ben Gibbard was going through a divorce with actress Zooey Deschanel, but the band deliberately avoided infusing too much personal emotion into the music. Instead, inspired by minimalist architecture and electronic music, they extensively used analog synthesizers in the studio. Bassist Nick Harmer revealed that they even dismantled an old synthesizer to study its sound construction.
items.artistIntroZh: Death Cab for Cutie，美国独立摇滚乐队，1997年成立于华盛顿州。以细腻的歌词和旋律性极强的独立音乐著称，主唱Ben Gibbard的嗓音极具辨识度。代表作包括《Transatlanticism》《I Will Follow You into the Dark》等，是21世纪初独立音乐场景的代表乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Death Cab for Cutie is an American indie rock band formed in Washington state in 1997. Known for their intricate lyrics and highly melodic indie music, lead singer Ben Gibbard's voice is instantly recognizable. Their hits include 'Transatlanticism' and 'I Will Follow You into the Dark,' making them a defining band of the early 2000s indie scene.

items.name: Speaking in Tongues
items.descriptionZh: 《Speaking in Tongues》是Talking Heads于1983年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格属于新浪潮（New Wave）与艺术流行（Art Pop），融合了放克、非洲节奏和世界音乐元素。专辑以充满活力的节奏、复杂的编曲和大卫·伯恩独特的演唱方式著称，是乐队商业上最成功的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Speaking in Tongues is Talking Heads' fifth studio album, released in 1983, featuring a blend of new wave and art pop with funk, African rhythms, and world music elements. Known for its energetic grooves, intricate arrangements, and David Byrne's distinctive vocals, it became one of the band's most commercially successful works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，乐队成员之间紧张关系加剧，尤其是大卫·伯恩与贝斯手Tina Weymouth、鼓手Chris Frantz之间的分歧。尽管如此，制作人Brian Eno离开后，乐队决定自行制作，反而激发了更多创意。专辑封面由艺术家Robert Rauschenberg设计，他使用了一种特殊的丝网印刷技术，每张封面都略有不同。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, tensions within the band escalated, especially between David Byrne and bassist Tina Weymouth and drummer Chris Frantz. Despite this, after producer Brian Eno left, the band decided to produce the album themselves, which sparked more creativity. The album cover was designed by artist Robert Rauschenberg, who used a special silkscreen technique, making each cover slightly different.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑的主打歌《Burning Down the House》成为Talking Heads最具代表性的单曲之一，推动了新浪潮音乐在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album's lead single 'Burning Down the House' became one of Talking Heads' most iconic songs, helping push new wave music into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Talking Heads，美国新浪潮乐队，1977年成立于纽约。以艺术性、实验性和独特的舞台表演闻名，主唱大卫·伯恩是核心创作人物。代表作包括《Psycho Killer》《Once in a Lifetime》《Burning Down the House》等，对后朋克和独立音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Talking Heads is an American new wave band formed in New York in 1977. Known for their artistic, experimental approach and unique stage performances, lead singer David Byrne is the core creative force. Their hits include 'Psycho Killer,' 'Once in a Lifetime,' and 'Burning Down the House,' profoundly influencing post-punk and indie music.

05-31.birthdayZh: 5月31日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《Codes and Keys》，像是生命里那些温柔而坚定的密码，等待你一一解开；也回响着《Speaking in Tongues》的节奏，提醒你每一种独特的声音都值得被世界倾听。愿你在属于自己的时区里，像那些旋律一样，既细腻又自由地绽放。
05-31.birthdayEn: May 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soaring, open-hearted "Codes and Keys" by Death Cab for Cutie, a reminder that even change can feel like coming home. And we were gifted "Speaking in Tongues" by Talking Heads, a joyful celebration of finding your voice and dancing to your own rhythm. So on this day, may your spirit feel as expansive as a new melody and as free as a spontaneous dance. You are a beautiful song all your own.

items.name: Lady in Satin
items.descriptionZh: 《Lady in Satin》是Billie Holiday于1958年发行的最后一张录音室专辑，风格属于爵士（Jazz），具体为声乐爵士与标准曲演绎。专辑以Ray Ellis的管弦乐编曲为背景，Billie Holiday的嗓音虽已因岁月和健康问题而沙哑，却饱含深刻的情感与沧桑，被誉为最具灵魂的爵士演唱之一。
items.descriptionEn: Lady in Satin is Billie Holiday's final studio album, released in 1958, featuring a jazz style, specifically vocal jazz and standard interpretations. Backed by Ray Ellis's orchestral arrangements, Holiday's voice, though weathered by age and health issues, is filled with profound emotion and sorrow, widely regarded as one of the most soulful jazz vocal performances.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Billie Holiday的健康状况已严重恶化，她因酗酒和吸毒问题嗓音沙哑，但Ray Ellis最初对她的状态感到失望。然而在听到最终成品后，Ellis被她的情感深度震撼，称这是“她唱过的最动人的录音”。Holiday本人曾表示，这张专辑是她最真实的自我表达。
items.storiesEn: When recording this album, Billie Holiday's health had severely deteriorated, and her voice was hoarse due to alcohol and drug abuse. Producer Ray Ellis was initially disappointed with her condition. However, after hearing the final product, Ellis was stunned by the emotional depth, calling it 'the most moving recording she ever made.' Holiday herself said this album was her most honest self-expression.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Lady in Satin》被视为Billie Holiday的艺术绝唱，其悲怆的演绎深刻影响了后世爵士和流行歌手对情感表达的追求。
items.historicalImpactEn: Lady in Satin is regarded as Billie Holiday's artistic swan song, whose poignant delivery profoundly influenced later jazz and pop singers' pursuit of emotional expression.
items.artistIntroZh: Billie Holiday，美国爵士女歌手，被誉为“爵士第一夫人”。1915年出生，以独特的嗓音和即兴演唱技巧闻名，情感表达极其深刻。代表作包括《God Bless the Child》《Strange Fruit》《Lover Man》等，对爵士乐和流行音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Billie Holiday, an American jazz singer known as 'Lady Day,' was born in 1915. Renowned for her unique voice and improvisational skills, her emotional depth was unparalleled. Her hits include 'God Bless the Child,' 'Strange Fruit,' and 'Lover Man,' leaving a lasting impact on jazz and popular music.

items.name: Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963
items.descriptionZh: 《Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963》是Sam Cooke于1985年发行的现场专辑，录制于1963年，风格属于R&B与灵魂乐（Soul）。这张专辑捕捉了Sam Cooke在迈阿密哈莱姆广场俱乐部激情四溢的演出，充满了福音般的呐喊、即兴的节奏和与观众的亲密互动，展现了他作为灵魂乐先驱的现场魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963 is a live album by Sam Cooke, released in 1985, recorded in 1963, featuring R&B and soul. The album captures Cooke's electrifying performance at the Harlem Square Club in Miami, filled with gospel-like shouts, improvisational rhythms, and intimate audience interaction, showcasing his live charisma as a soul pioneer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录音母带在1963年演出后被封存了二十多年，直到1985年才被发现并发行。当年Sam Cooke的唱片公司认为这场演出过于粗糙和“黑人化”，不符合他主流的流行形象，因此拒绝发行。然而，这张专辑后来被公认为他最具感染力的现场录音，真实反映了他在黑人观众中的巨大号召力。
items.storiesEn: The master tapes of this performance were shelved for over twenty years after the 1963 show, only to be discovered and released in 1985. At the time, Sam Cooke's record company deemed the performance too raw and 'black' for his mainstream pop image, refusing to release it. However, the album is now regarded as his most electrifying live recording, authentically reflecting his powerful connection with Black audiences.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是史上最伟大的灵魂乐现场专辑之一，重新定义了Sam Cooke作为灵魂乐奠基人的历史地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely considered one of the greatest live soul albums of all time, redefining Sam Cooke's historical status as a founder of soul music.
items.artistIntroZh: Sam Cooke，美国灵魂乐和R&B歌手，被誉为“灵魂乐之王”。1931年出生，以丝滑的嗓音和跨界的流行天赋闻名，代表作包括《A Change Is Gonna Come》《You Send Me》《Twistin' the Night Away》等，对灵魂乐和民权运动产生了深远影响。
items.artistIntroEn: Sam Cooke, an American soul and R&B singer known as the 'King of Soul,' was born in 1931. Renowned for his silky voice and crossover pop appeal, his hits include 'A Change Is Gonna Come,' 'You Send Me,' and 'Twistin' the Night Away,' profoundly influencing soul music and the civil rights movement.

items.name: Compilation
items.descriptionZh: 《Compilation》是Aphex Twin于1998年发行的精选集，涵盖其早期至中期的标志性电子乐作品。风格以IDM、氛围科技舞曲和实验电子为主，核心特色在于扭曲的节拍、细腻的合成器音色与超现实的氛围构造，展现了Richard D. James作为电子音乐先锋的独特美学。
items.descriptionEn: Compilation is a 1998 retrospective album by Aphex Twin, featuring his iconic electronic works from early to mid-career. Its style blends IDM, ambient techno, and experimental electronica, characterized by warped beats, intricate synth textures, and surreal atmospheric construction, showcasing Richard D. James' unique aesthetic as an electronic pioneer.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集收录了Aphex Twin早期在Rephlex和Warp厂牌发行的曲目，其中部分作品此前仅以EP或单曲形式问世。据传，James在整理曲目时曾坚持保留原始录音的瑕疵，如磁带嘶嘶声和意外噪音，以体现其“不完美即完美”的制作哲学。专辑封面由他亲自设计，采用扭曲的面部图像，呼应其音乐中的实验精神。
items.storiesEn: This compilation includes tracks originally released on Rephlex and Warp labels, some of which were previously only available as EPs or singles. It is rumored that James insisted on preserving original recording imperfections like tape hiss and accidental noises to reflect his 'imperfection is perfection' philosophy. The cover art, designed by himself, features a distorted facial image echoing the experimental spirit of his music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为电子音乐史上最重要的精选集之一，它系统性地梳理了Aphex Twin在90年代对IDM和氛围音乐的革新贡献，影响了后续大量电子音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most important compilations in electronic music history, it systematically chronicles Aphex Twin's revolutionary contributions to IDM and ambient music in the 1990s, influencing countless subsequent electronic producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Aphex Twin（本名Richard D. James），英国电子音乐人，被誉为“电子音乐界的莫扎特”。风格横跨IDM、氛围、鼓打贝斯和实验电子，代表作包括《Selected Ambient Works 85-92》和《Richard D. James Album》，以其复杂节奏和情感化的合成器旋律闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Aphex Twin (born Richard D. James) is a British electronic musician hailed as the 'Mozart of electronic music.' His style spans IDM, ambient, drum and bass, and experimental electronica, with landmark works including Selected Ambient Works 85-92 and Richard D. James Album, known for intricate rhythms and emotive synth melodies.

06-01.birthdayZh: 6月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物——《Lady in Satin》里Billie Holiday用沙哑的嗓音唱出生命最后的绸缎光泽，像在说破碎也可以很柔美；《Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963》中Sam Cooke的汗水与呐喊，把自由唱成滚烫的呼吸。你看，连时间都偏爱这一天：它让你和这些勇敢的灵魂同频共振——去爱、去破碎、去燃烧，像爵士乐最后的颤音，像现场最真的嘶吼。愿你永远记得：你生来就是一首热烈的歌。
06-01.birthdayEn: June 1 is your birthday, a day that carries the soul of music through time. Like Billie Holiday’s hauntingly beautiful Lady in Satin, may your life hold both depth and grace, each note of your journey shimmering with resilience. And like Sam Cooke’s electrifying Live at the Harlem Square Club, 1963, let your spirit rise with raw, joyful energy—unscripted and full of warmth. You are a melody that the world is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, beautifully you.

06-02.birthdayZh: 6月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你写下序曲——就像《The Joshua Tree》里的沙漠，看似荒芜，却藏着倔强扎根的勇气；也像《After Hours》中穿越长夜的微光，在孤独里生出清醒的温柔。你来到这天的意义，就是成为自己的旋律，不必追赶时间，自有光落在你降临的刻度上。
06-02.birthdayEn: June 2 is your birthday, a day the world decided to gift you with light. On this date in history, albums like *Pet Sounds* and *Being There* were released—records that chase the horizon with courage and open hearts. May your year echo their spirit: a harmony of sun-drenched dreams and quiet, steady grace. You are a melody worth celebrating, a story still unfolding in the most beautiful key. Happy birthday—may your soul feel as timeless and beloved as the music that shares your day.

items.name: The E.N.D
items.descriptionZh: 《The E.N.D》（The Energy Never Dies）是黑眼豆豆于2009年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合嘻哈、流行电音和舞曲风格。核心特色在于大量使用Auto-Tune人声处理、合成器驱动的节拍和派对导向的旋律，代表作《Boom Boom Pow》和《I Gotta Feeling》定义了2000年代末的俱乐部文化。
items.descriptionEn: The E.N.D (The Energy Never Dies) is the Black Eyed Peas' fifth studio album, released in 2009, blending hip-hop, pop-electronic, and dance music. Its core features include heavy Auto-Tune vocal processing, synth-driven beats, and party-oriented melodies. Hits like 'Boom Boom Pow' and 'I Gotta Feeling' defined late-2000s club culture.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，will.i.am曾透露团队在洛杉矶的录音室里连续工作数月，每天只睡几小时。为了捕捉“永不消逝的能量”，他们实验性地将嘻哈节奏与欧洲电子舞曲元素结合，甚至从德国techno场景中汲取灵感。主打歌《I Gotta Feeling》的歌词最初由David Guetta创作，但黑眼豆豆将其重新编排为乐观颂歌，最终成为全球热门单曲。
items.storiesEn: During recording, will.i.am revealed the team worked for months in a Los Angeles studio with only a few hours of sleep per day. To capture 'the energy never dies,' they experimentally fused hip-hop rhythms with European electronic dance elements, drawing inspiration from the German techno scene. The lead single 'I Gotta Feeling' was originally written by David Guetta, but the Black Eyed Peas reworked it into an optimistic anthem, eventually becoming a global hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过1100万张，推动嘻哈与电子舞曲的跨界融合进入主流，并引领了2000年代末的Auto-Tune流行风潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 11 million copies worldwide, pushing the crossover of hip-hop and electronic dance music into the mainstream and leading the Auto-Tune pop trend of the late 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 黑眼豆豆（Black Eyed Peas），美国嘻哈/流行团体，成立于1995年，成员包括will.i.am、apl.de.ap、Taboo和Fergie。风格以嘻哈为基础，融合流行、舞曲和电子元素，代表作有《Where Is the Love?》《I Gotta Feeling》和《Boom Boom Pow》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Black Eyed Peas are an American hip-hop/pop group formed in 1995, consisting of will.i.am, apl.de.ap, Taboo, and Fergie. Their style is rooted in hip-hop, blended with pop, dance, and electronic elements. Notable hits include 'Where Is the Love?', 'I Gotta Feeling', and 'Boom Boom Pow'.

items.name: A Celebration in Song
items.descriptionZh: 《A Celebration in Song》是Olivia Newton-John于2008年发行的精选纪念专辑，收录其职业生涯中的经典流行与成人抒情歌曲。核心特色在于温暖的人声演绎和跨年代的情感共鸣，包括与多位知名歌手的合作版本，展现了她从乡村流行到软摇滚的多元化风格。
items.descriptionEn: A Celebration in Song is a 2008 retrospective compilation album by Olivia Newton-John, featuring her classic pop and adult contemporary hits. Its core feature lies in warm vocal delivery and cross-generational emotional resonance, including collaborations with various renowned artists, showcasing her diverse style from country-pop to soft rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是为庆祝Olivia Newton-John出道30多年而制作，其中包含了与John Travolta、Barry Gibb等艺人的重新录制版本。据Olivia回忆，录制与Travolta合唱的《Summer Nights》新版本时，两人在录音室里即兴加入了许多笑声和即兴对白，仿佛重回《油脂》片场。专辑部分收益捐赠给了她创办的Olivia Newton-John癌症研究中心。
items.storiesEn: This album was created to celebrate Olivia Newton-John's career spanning over three decades, featuring re-recorded versions with artists like John Travolta and Barry Gibb. Olivia recalled that during the new recording of 'Summer Nights' with Travolta, they improvised laughter and ad-libs in the studio, as if back on the set of Grease. Part of the album's proceeds were donated to the Olivia Newton-John Cancer Research Institute she founded.
items.artistIntroZh: Olivia Newton-John，英裔澳大利亚歌手、演员，1948年出生于英国。风格以流行、乡村和成人抒情为主，代表作包括《Physical》《Hopelessly Devoted to You》及电影《油脂》原声。她曾四次获得格莱美奖，是全球最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Olivia Newton-John was a British-Australian singer and actress, born in 1948 in the UK. Her style encompasses pop, country, and adult contemporary, with iconic hits like 'Physical,' 'Hopelessly Devoted to You,' and the Grease soundtrack. A four-time Grammy winner, she was one of the most influential female artists globally.

items.name: Tr3s Lunas
items.descriptionZh: 《Tr3s Lunas》是Mike Oldfield于2002年发行的概念专辑，融合流行、新世纪和世界音乐元素。核心特色在于以“三颗月亮”为主题构建的幻想叙事，大量使用原声吉他、电子合成器和民族乐器，营造出空灵而富有画面感的声景，延续了他一贯的器乐叙事传统。
items.descriptionEn: Tr3s Lunas is a 2002 concept album by Mike Oldfield, blending pop, new age, and world music. Its core feature is a fantasy narrative built around the theme of 'three moons,' utilizing acoustic guitar, electronic synthesizers, and ethnic instruments to create ethereal, cinematic soundscapes, continuing his tradition of instrumental storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感源于Mike Oldfield对天文和神秘学的兴趣，他曾表示“三颗月亮”象征过去、现在与未来的联结。录制过程中，Oldfield在自家位于西班牙伊比萨岛的工作室中独自演奏了几乎所有乐器，包括吉他、键盘和打击乐。他特意为专辑开发了一套环绕声混音技术，以增强听众的沉浸感。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Mike Oldfield's interest in astronomy and mysticism, with the 'three moons' symbolizing the connection of past, present, and future. During recording, Oldfield played almost all instruments himself at his home studio on Ibiza, Spain, including guitar, keyboards, and percussion. He specifically developed a surround sound mixing technique for the album to enhance the immersive experience for listeners.
items.artistIntroZh: Mike Oldfield，英国多乐器演奏家、作曲家，1953年出生。以融合摇滚、古典和新世纪音乐的器乐作品闻名，代表作《Tubular Bells》成为电影《驱魔人》主题曲，全球销量超1500万张。其音乐以复杂的编曲和悠长的器乐段落著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Mike Oldfield is a British multi-instrumentalist and composer, born in 1953. He is renowned for instrumental works blending rock, classical, and new age music. His masterpiece Tubular Bells became the theme for The Exorcist, selling over 15 million copies worldwide. His music is characterized by complex arrangements and extended instrumental passages.

06-03.birthdayZh: 6月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你而唱，黑眼豆豆坚信《The E.N.D》——能量永不枯竭，正如你内心深藏的光，总在平凡时刻静静发光。Mike Oldfield用《Tr3s Lunas》画出三把月亮，照亮宇宙与心灵的路。你也是自己的月亮，温润、坚定、永不坠落。
06-03.birthdayEn: June 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us The E.N.D, a pulse of endless energy, and Tr3s Lunas, a dreamscape of lunar light—two albums that mirror your own spirit. You hold the dance of vitality and the quiet glow of reflection within you. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony of bold beginnings and gentle moments, where every note of your life rings with purpose and joy. Celebrate the beautiful rhythm you bring to the world.

06-04.birthdayZh: 6月4日，是你的生日。这一天，有人把青春唱进《Born in the U.S.A.》，在鼓点里说“平凡也值得骄傲”；有人用《Ten》的嘶吼告诉你：伤口会结痂，然后长出翅膀。所以，别怕岁月太沉——你降生的日子，早就装满了勇敢和温柔。生日快乐。
06-04.birthdayEn: June 4 is your birthday, a day the world once lit up with the rebellious hope of The Clash’s “London Calling,” a reminder that even chaos can spark beauty. Like that album’s raw, daring heart, your presence pushes through noise to find melody. May your year hum with the tender, soulful pulse of Al Green’s “Call Me,” wrapping every moment in warmth and grace. You’re a living harmony of courage and kindness—here’s to the music only you can make.

items.name: Good Girl Gone Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Girl Gone Bad》是Rihanna于2007年发行的第三张录音室专辑，标志着其从雷鬼流行风格向主流流行和舞曲的转型。核心特色在于强劲的节拍、性感自信的声线以及充满俱乐部能量的制作，代表作《Umbrella》以其标志性的“Ella, ella”副歌成为2000年代流行文化符号。
items.descriptionEn: Good Girl Gone Bad is Rihanna's third studio album, released in 2007, marking her transition from reggae-pop to mainstream pop and dance music. Its core features include powerful beats, confident and sultry vocals, and club-energized production. The lead single 'Umbrella' became a 2000s pop culture icon with its signature 'Ella, ella' hook.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Rihanna与制作人Timbaland、Ne-Yo等人密切合作。据Ne-Yo回忆，《Umbrella》原本是为Britney Spears创作的，但被拒绝后转给了Rihanna。Rihanna最初对歌曲的副歌部分持保留态度，但在制作人坚持下完成录制。发行后，《Umbrella》在全球多国夺冠，成为Rihanna职业生涯的转折点。专辑封面中Rihanna的短发造型也是她首次以“坏女孩”形象示人。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Rihanna worked closely with producers Timbaland and Ne-Yo. According to Ne-Yo, 'Umbrella' was originally written for Britney Spears but was passed to Rihanna after being rejected. Rihanna was initially hesitant about the chorus but completed the track at the producer's insistence. Upon release, 'Umbrella' topped charts globally, becoming a career-defining moment. The album cover's short hairstyle marked her first 'bad girl' image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑全球销量超过900万张，确立了Rihanna作为全球流行巨星的地位，并推动了2000年代末流行舞曲的复兴。《Umbrella》被视为千禧年代最具标志性的流行单曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 9 million copies worldwide, establishing Rihanna as a global pop superstar and driving the late-2000s revival of dance-pop. 'Umbrella' is regarded as one of the most iconic pop singles of the millennium.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna（本名Robyn Rihanna Fenty），巴巴多斯歌手、演员��企业家，1988年出生。风格以流行、R&B和舞曲为主，代表作包括《Umbrella》《We Found Love》和《Diamonds》。她是全球销量最高的女歌手之一，并创立了美妆品牌Fenty Beauty。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna (born Robyn Rihanna Fenty) is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur, born in 1988. Her style encompasses pop, R&B, and dance music, with iconic hits including 'Umbrella,' 'We Found Love,' and 'Diamonds.' She is one of the best-selling female artists globally and founded the cosmetics brand Fenty Beauty.

06-05.birthdayZh: 6月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《Good Girl Gone Bad》的旋律——那是一种挣脱旧壳、拥抱蜕变的勇气。就像你走过的每一步，都在时光中长出新的光芒。愿你在自己的轨道上，始终听见内心那首未完成的舞曲，温柔而坚定地，跳向更辽阔的远方。
06-05.birthdayEn: June 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Rihanna’s “Good Girl Gone Bad,” an album that dared to transform—just like you, evolving fearlessly into your truest, most radiant self. May your year ahead hum with that same bold, unstoppable spirit. Let each new chapter be a song you write with joy, courage, and a little glitter. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the world is lucky to hear you.

items.name: Bang Bang
items.descriptionZh: 《Bang Bang》是韩国女子组合Dal Shabet于2012年发行的迷你专辑，主打流行舞曲风格。专辑以轻快活泼的电子节拍和 catchy 的副歌旋律为核心，展现了组合清新俏皮的形象。歌曲融合了泡泡糖流行与舞曲元素，编曲层次丰富，节奏感强烈，是典型的二代K-pop流行作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Bang Bang" is a mini-album by South Korean girl group Dal Shabet released in 2012, featuring a pop dance style. The album is centered around lively electronic beats and catchy chorus melodies, showcasing the group's fresh and playful image. It blends bubblegum pop with dance elements, with layered arrangements and strong rhythms, typical of second-generation K-pop pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Bang Bang》的编舞由著名舞蹈家崔永俊操刀，其中标志性的‘手枪舞’动作迅速在韩国引发模仿热潮。成员们在打歌期间曾因高强度排练导致膝盖受伤，但仍坚持完成所有舞台表演，展现了敬业精神。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for the title track "Bang Bang" was created by renowned dancer Choi Young-joon, and its signature 'gun dance' move quickly sparked a craze in South Korea. Members sustained knee injuries during intense rehearsals but persevered through all stage performances, demonstrating their professionalism.
items.artistIntroZh: Dal Shabet是韩国Happy Face娱乐于2011年推出的女子组合，以活泼可爱的流行舞曲风格著称。主要作品包括《Supa Dupa Diva》、《Bang Bang》和《Mr. Bang Bang》。她们是二代K-pop中具有代表性的清新风格女团。
items.artistIntroEn: Dal Shabet is a South Korean girl group formed by Happy Face Entertainment in 2011, known for their lively and cute pop dance style. Key works include "Supa Dupa Diva," "Bang Bang," and "Mr. Bang Bang." They are a representative fresh-style girl group of second-generation K-pop.

06-06.birthdayZh: 6月6日，是你的生日。这一天的风曾吹动过《Bang Bang》的音符，那些大胆又明亮的节拍，像在说：你可以勇敢地做自己，不必畏惧世界的声响。愿你的灵魂，如这日子一般，既拥有清新自由的节奏，也藏着不被打倒的力量。祝你生日快乐。
06-06.birthdayEn: June 6 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world gave us “Bang Bang” by Dal Shabet, a spark of energy and joyful defiance, a reminder that you can start small and still make the whole room dance. Like that album’s spirit, your life sends out bright, unexpected rhythms. May this new year around the sun bring you moments that feel like a perfect chorus—bold, warm, and unapologetically yours. Happy birthday to a soul who turns every day into a celebration.

items.name: Electroman
items.descriptionZh: 《Electroman》是意大利电子音乐制作人Benny Benassi于2011年发行的第二张录音室专辑。风格以Electro house和Progressive house为主，融合了强劲的合成器贝斯线与律动感十足的鼓点。专辑邀请多位客座歌手献声，旋律上口且能量充沛，适合俱乐部和音乐节场景。
items.descriptionEn: "Electroman" is the second studio album by Italian electronic music producer Benny Benassi, released in 2011. It primarily features electro house and progressive house styles, blending powerful synth basslines with groovy drum patterns. The album features guest vocalists and offers catchy melodies with high energy, suitable for clubs and festivals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中与T-Pain合作的单曲《Electroman》的MV在意大利米兰拍摄，Benny Benassi亲自出镜扮演科学家角色。录制过程中，Benassi坚持使用模拟合成器而非纯数字设备，以保留复古电子音乐的温暖音色，这一决定延长了制作周期但获得了乐评好评。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the single "Electroman" featuring T-Pain was shot in Milan, Italy, with Benny Benassi himself playing the role of a scientist. During recording, Benassi insisted on using analog synthesizers instead of purely digital equipment to preserve the warm tone of retro electronic music, a decision that extended the production period but earned critical acclaim.
items.artistIntroZh: Benny Benassi是意大利电子音乐制作人与DJ，以Electro house风格闻名。2002年凭借单曲《Satisfaction》全球爆红。代表作包括《Electroman》、《Phantom》等。他是将Electro house推向主流市场的关键人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Benny Benassi is an Italian electronic music producer and DJ, famous for his electro house style. He rose to global fame with the 2002 single "Satisfaction." Key works include "Electroman" and "Phantom." He is a key figure in bringing electro house to the mainstream market.

items.name: Hot Fuss
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Fuss》是美国摇滚乐队The Killers于2004年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以独立流行和另类摇滚为主。专辑融合了合成器流行与新浪潮元素，旋律抓耳、吉他音色明亮。代表曲目《Mr. Brightside》以强烈的节奏和戏剧化的歌词成为经典，整体呈现复古而现代的流行摇滚质感。
items.descriptionEn: "Hot Fuss" is the debut studio album by American rock band The Killers, released in 2004. It features indie pop and alternative rock styles, blending synth-pop with new wave elements. The melodies are catchy, with bright guitar tones. The iconic track "Mr. Brightside" stands out with its strong rhythm and dramatic lyrics, giving the album a retro-modern pop rock feel.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的《Mr. Brightside》是主唱Brandon Flowers在得知女友出轨后仅用15分钟写下的歌词，灵感来源于真实情感经历。录制时乐队预算紧张，部分歌曲在Brandon Flowers的卧室中录制完成。专辑封面上的黑白照片拍摄于拉斯维加斯的一家汽车旅馆。
items.storiesEn: The song "Mr. Brightside" was written by lead vocalist Brandon Flowers in just 15 minutes after learning of his girlfriend's infidelity, inspired by real emotional experience. During recording, the band had a tight budget, and some songs were recorded in Brandon Flowers' bedroom. The album cover's black-and-white photo was taken at a motel in Las Vegas.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Fuss》被公认为2000年代独立摇滚复兴的标志性专辑之一，将The Killers推向全球舞台，影响了后续一批独立流行乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Hot Fuss" is widely regarded as one of the landmark albums of the 2000s indie rock revival, propelling The Killers to global fame and influencing a wave of subsequent indie pop bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Killers是一支来自美国拉斯维加斯的摇滚乐队，成立于2001年，以独立流行和另类摇滚风格闻名。代表作包括《Hot Fuss》专辑及单曲《Mr. Brightside》、《Somebody Told Me》。他们是21世纪最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Killers are an American rock band from Las Vegas, formed in 2001, known for their indie pop and alternative rock style. Key works include the album "Hot Fuss" and singles "Mr. Brightside," "Somebody Told Me." They are one of the most influential rock bands of the 21st century.

items.name: Nightflight to Venus
items.descriptionZh: 《Nightflight to Venus》是德国-加勒比迪斯科组合Boney M.于1978年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了迪斯科、雷鬼和世界音乐元素。专辑以其欢快的节奏、多声部合唱和异域风情著称，歌曲《Rivers of Babylon》取材于圣经诗篇，旋律悠扬且带有雷鬼律动，成为全球热单。
items.descriptionEn: "Nightflight to Venus" is the fourth studio album by German-Caribbean disco group Boney M., released in 1978, blending disco, reggae, and world music elements. The album is known for its upbeat rhythms, multi-part harmonies, and exotic flair. The song "Rivers of Babylon," based on biblical psalms, features a melodious tune with reggae grooves and became a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中《Rivers of Babylon》的原始旋律源自牙买加雷鬼乐队The Melodians的版本，Boney M.的制作人Frank Farian将其重新编曲为迪斯科风格。录制时，主唱Liz Mitchell坚持加入福音式的和声编排，这一决定让歌曲更具感染力���专辑名称灵感来自制作人Farian的一次夜间航班经历。
items.storiesEn: The original melody of "Rivers of Babylon" came from a version by Jamaican reggae band The Melodians, and Boney M.'s producer Frank Farian rearranged it into a disco style. During recording, lead vocalist Liz Mitchell insisted on adding gospel-style harmonies, a decision that made the song more impactful. The album title was inspired by producer Farian's experience on a night flight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Nightflight to Venus》是迪斯科时代最具代表性的专辑之一，单曲《Rivers of Babylon》在全球多国夺冠，推动了迪斯科与雷鬼音乐的跨界融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Nightflight to Venus" is one of the most representative albums of the disco era. The single "Rivers of Babylon" topped charts in multiple countries, promoting the crossover fusion of disco and reggae music.
items.artistIntroZh: Boney M.是一支成立于1977年的德国-加勒比迪斯科组合，由制作人Frank Farian组建，以迪斯科、雷鬼和流行风格闻名。代表作包括《Daddy Cool》、《Rivers of Babylon》和《Ma Baker》。他们是1970年代全球最成功的迪斯科团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Boney M. is a German-Caribbean disco group formed in 1977 by producer Frank Farian, known for disco, reggae, and pop styles. Key works include "Daddy Cool," "Rivers of Babylon," and "Ma Baker." They are one of the most successful disco groups of the 1970s globally.

06-07.birthdayZh: 6月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你奏响过《Hot Fuss》里那阵躁动又倔强的鼓点，也飞过《Nightflight to Venus》中那颗载满迪斯科星光的飞船。生而如电，时而狂放，时而浪漫。愿你像那些旋律一样，在属于自己的星轨上，永远明亮，永远敢于轰鸣，也永远值得被爱。
06-07.birthdayEn: June 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “Hot Fuss,” a spark of bold, unstoppable energy, and “Nightflight to Venus,” a dreamy escape into the stars. Like those albums, you carry a rhythm all your own—part electric fire, part celestial calm. May your year ahead be a dance of brave beginnings and soft, beautiful horizons. You are a melody the universe is lucky to hear. Happy birthday, you radiant soul.

items.name: Never Say Never
items.descriptionZh: 《Never Say Never》是美国R&B歌手Brandy Norwood于1998年发行的第二张录音室专辑，以R&B和灵魂乐为核心风格。专辑融合了90年代末期的当代R&B元素，包含流畅的旋律、细腻的和声以及情感丰富的歌词。制作精良，展现了Brandy成熟的嗓音与音乐掌控力。
items.descriptionEn: "Never Say Never" is the second studio album by American R&B singer Brandy Norwood, released in 1998, with R&B and soul at its core. The album blends late-1990s contemporary R&B elements, featuring smooth melodies, intricate harmonies, and emotionally rich lyrics. It is well-produced, showcasing Brandy's mature vocals and musical control.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《The Boy Is Mine》是与Monica合作的二重唱，最初两位歌手因竞争关系存在分歧，但在制作人Rodney Jerkins的协调下最终达成合作。录制过程中，Brandy和Monica分别在不同录音室完成演唱，后期合成后效果意外和谐。这首歌的MV拍摄耗时两天，成为当年MTV热播曲目。
items.storiesEn: The lead single "The Boy Is Mine" is a duet with Monica. Initially, the two singers had disagreements due to rivalry, but under the coordination of producer Rodney Jerkins, they eventually collaborated. During recording, Brandy and Monica recorded their vocals in separate studios, and the final mix turned out surprisingly harmonious. The music video shoot took two days and became a hit on MTV that year.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Never Say Never》巩固了Brandy作为90年代末R&B天后的地位，单曲《The Boy Is Mine》成为1998年最畅销的R&B单曲之一，并推动了女性R&B二重唱的风潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Never Say Never" solidified Brandy's status as a late-1990s R&B diva. The single "The Boy Is Mine" became one of the best-selling R&B singles of 1998 and helped popularize female R&B duets.
items.artistIntroZh: Brandy Norwood是美国R&B歌手、演员，以当代R&B和灵魂乐风格著称。1994年凭借首张专辑《Brandy》出道，代表作包括《Never Say Never》专辑及单曲《The Boy Is Mine》、《Have You Ever?》。她是90年代末最具影响力的R&B女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Brandy Norwood is an American R&B singer and actress, known for contemporary R&B and soul styles. She debuted in 1994 with her self-titled album "Brandy." Key works include the album "Never Say Never" and singles "The Boy Is Mine," "Have You Ever?" She is one of the most influential R&B female singers of the late 1990s.

items.name: A State of Trance 2009
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2009》是荷兰Trance巨星Armin van Buuren的年度混音合辑，虽然标签为Pop，但本质上融合了Progressive Trance、Uplifting Trance和Electro House元素。专辑以流畅的混音过渡和情感丰富的旋律著称，收录了当年ASOT电台节目中最受欢迎的曲目，展现了Armin对舞池氛围的精准把控。
items.descriptionEn: A State of Trance 2009 is Dutch trance giant Armin van Buuren's annual compilation mix. Though tagged as Pop, it blends Progressive Trance, Uplifting Trance, and Electro House. Known for smooth transitions and emotional melodies, it features the year's most popular tracks from his ASOT radio show, showcasing Armin's mastery of dancefloor dynamics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程与Armin每周的电台节目《A State of Trance》紧密相连。2009年正值ASOT播出第400集前后，Armin在全球巡演中频繁测试新混音，最终在自家工作室中完成了这张合辑。有趣的是，专辑中一首未命名的ID曲目后来被证实是Armin与Sophie Ellis-Bextor合作的《Not Giving Up on Love》的早期版本，粉丝在论坛上疯狂猜测了数月。
items.storiesEn: The album's creation was closely tied to Armin's weekly radio show A State of Trance. Around the 400th episode in 2009, Armin tested new mixes during global tours, finalizing the compilation in his home studio. Interestingly, an unnamed ID track later turned out to be an early version of 'Not Giving Up on Love' with Sophie Ellis-Bextor, sparking months of fan speculation on forums.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该合辑是ASOT系列中最畅销的一辑之一，进一步巩固了Armin van Buuren作为Trance音乐全球大使的地位，并推动了混音合辑在电子音乐消费中的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of the best-selling ASOT compilations, it cemented Armin van Buuren's role as a global trance ambassador and pushed compilation mixes into mainstream electronic music consumption.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren，荷兰DJ、制作人，Trance音乐领军人物。连续五次获DJ Mag百大DJ第一名，代表作包括《This Is What It Feels Like》、《Blah Blah Blah》及ASOT系列合辑。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and producer, a leading figure in trance music. He topped DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs five times, with hits like 'This Is What It Feels Like,' 'Blah Blah Blah,' and the A State of Trance series.

06-08.birthdayZh: 6月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Never Say Never》的坚定——像一颗破土而出的种子，许诺自己永远不说放弃。当《A State of Trance 2009》的旋律流过时光，我们知道，你的存在本身，就是一种震颤人心的节拍。生命值得庆祝，就像这场盛大的庆典，只为你而奏。
06-08.birthdayEn: June 8 is your birthday. On this date, music history turned a page with Brandy’s “Never Say Never” and Armin van Buuren’s “A State of Trance 2009”—two albums that echo the spirit of your day. Like Brandy’s hopeful resilience, may this year remind you that impossibilities can be rewritten. And like the uplifting trance of Armin’s journey, may your path pulse with joy and endless possibility. You are a melody of courage and light. Happy birthday—may your life’s soundtrack grow only brighter.

items.name: Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992》是Olivia Newton-John���精选集，涵盖了她从乡村流行到成人当代的转型历程。专辑收录了《Physical》、《Hopelessly Devoted to You》等标志性金曲，展现了她柔美而富有力量的嗓音，以及从澳洲乡村女孩到国际流行天后的蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992 is a career-spanning compilation by Olivia Newton-John, covering her shift from country pop to adult contemporary. It includes iconic hits like 'Physical' and 'Hopelessly Devoted to You,' showcasing her soft yet powerful vocals and evolution from an Australian country girl to an international pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Olivia正经历与乳腺癌的斗争，但她坚持亲自参与曲目选择和内页文案撰写。专辑标题“Back to Basics”反映了她希望回归音乐本质的愿望。制作人透露，Olivia在录制《Physical》时曾担心歌词过于露骨，但最终这首歌成为她职业生涯最畅销的单曲，并在1992年精选集中被重新混音。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Olivia was battling breast cancer but insisted on curating the tracklist and writing liner notes. The title 'Back to Basics' reflected her wish to return to music's core. Producers revealed Olivia was initially hesitant about 'Physical's suggestive lyrics, but it became her best-selling single, later remixed for this 1992 collection.
items.artistIntroZh: Olivia Newton-John，英澳裔歌手、演员，四次格莱美奖得主。以《Grease》原声带和单曲《Physical》闻名，风格横跨乡村、流行和成人当代。
items.artistIntroEn: Olivia Newton-John was a British-Australian singer and actress, four-time Grammy winner. Known for the Grease soundtrack and the hit 'Physical,' her style spanned country, pop, and adult contemporary.

06-09.birthdayZh: 6月9日，是你的生日。这一天，Olivia Newton-John发行了《Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992》，仿佛在说：生命最珍贵的部分，是回到最初的模样。愿你在成长的路上，不忘来时那颗清澈的心，将过往的时光酿成温柔的力量，照亮前路的每一个晨曦。
06-09.birthdayEn: June 9 is your birthday, a day that shares its spark with Olivia Newton-John’s “Back to Basics – The Essential Collection 1971–1992.” Like that album, your life is a beautiful anthology of heartfelt beginnings, steady growth, and timeless grace. You carry the warmth of a song that only deepens with each listen, a melody woven from hope, resilience, and quiet joy. May this new year bring you back to what matters most, and may your days feel as full and luminous as the essential you truly are.

items.name: A Little Deeper
items.descriptionZh: 《A Little Deeper》是英国R&B/Soul歌手Ms. Dynamite的处女作专辑，融合了UK Garage、Hip-Hop和Reggae元素。专辑以犀利的歌词探讨社会议题，如种族不平等、家庭暴力和贫困，同时保留了灵魂乐的温暖质感。Ms. Dynamite独特的嗓音和街头叙事风格使其在2002年英国R&B场景中独树一帜。
items.descriptionEn: A Little Deeper is the debut album by UK R&B/Soul artist Ms. Dynamite, blending UK Garage, Hip-Hop, and Reggae. The album tackles social issues like racial inequality, domestic violence, and poverty with sharp lyrics, while retaining the warmth of soul music. Her distinctive voice and streetwise storytelling set her apart in the 2002 UK R&B scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Ms. Dynamite（本名Niomi McLean-Daley）年仅21岁，她坚持在伦敦东区的简陋录音室完成大部分作品，以保持真实感。主打歌《Dy-Na-Mi-Tee》的歌词灵感来源于她青少年时期在街头目睹的种族冲突。制作人透露，她曾因预算紧张而不得不向朋友借麦克风，但专辑最终获得了2003年水星奖，成为她职业生涯的转折点。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Ms. Dynamite (real name Niomi McLean-Daley) was only 21 and insisted on working in a modest East London studio to keep authenticity. The lead single 'Dy-Na-Mi-Tee' was inspired by racial tensions she witnessed as a teen. Producers said she had to borrow microphones from friends due to budget constraints, but the album won the 2003 Mercury Prize, a career milestone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为Ms. Dynamite赢得2003年水星奖，并被视为21世纪初英国女性R&B歌手的里程碑作品，影响了后续如Estelle等艺人的社会意识创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won the 2003 Mercury Prize for Ms. Dynamite and is considered a milestone for UK female R&B artists in the early 2000s, influencing socially conscious works by later artists like Estelle.
items.artistIntroZh: Ms. Dynamite，英国R&B/Soul歌手、说唱歌手，以社会批判性歌词著称。代表作包括《Dy-Na-Mi-Tee》和《It Takes More》，2003年获水星奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Ms. Dynamite is a British R&B/Soul singer and rapper known for socially conscious lyrics. Her hits include 'Dy-Na-Mi-Tee' and 'It Takes More,' and she won the Mercury Prize in 2003.

06-10.birthdayZh: 6月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《A Little Deeper》——像在提醒你，不必急于抵达远方，每一次细微的探索，都让灵魂潜入更深的海洋。你生来就带着这样的力量：在喧嚣中听见自己的节奏，在现实里种下温柔的反抗。愿新的一岁，你依然深潜、依然勇敢，像那专辑的名字一样——向内心深处走去，那里藏着属于你的辽阔与光芒。
06-10.birthdayEn: June 10 is your birthday, a day when the world first heard your song. On this date, Ms. Dynamite released "A Little Deeper," an album that dares to blend genres and speak truths, much like the beautiful complexity you bring to every room. May your new year be filled with that same bold rhythm—a soulful R&B groove beneath a garage beat of resilience. Cheers to you, a masterpiece still unfolding, deeper and brighter with every verse.

items.name: Volume 3: Further in Time
items.descriptionZh: 《Volume 3: Further in Time》是Afro Celt Sound System的第三张专辑，虽然标签为Jazz，但实际融合了非洲节奏、凯尔特民谣、电子舞曲和世界音乐。专辑以复杂的打击乐编排、Uilleann风笛和电子合成器交织为特色，营造出既古老又未来的声音景观，是跨界融合的典范之作。
items.descriptionEn: Volume 3: Further in Time is the third album by Afro Celt Sound System. Though tagged as Jazz, it blends African rhythms, Celtic folk, electronic dance, and world music. Featuring intricate percussion, Uilleann pipes, and synthesizers, it creates an ancient yet futuristic soundscape, exemplifying cross-genre fusion.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制横跨伦敦、都柏林和塞内加尔达喀尔。乐队核心成员Simon Emmerson回���，他们在塞内加尔与当地Griot（吟游诗人）合作时，因语言不通而全靠节奏沟通，却意外创造出专辑中最动人的曲目《When You're Falling》。主唱Iarla Ó Lionáird的凯尔特语吟唱与非洲合唱团的和声在混音时产生了奇妙的化学反应，制作人不得不放弃预设的编曲框架。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded across London, Dublin, and Dakar, Senegal. Core member Simon Emmerson recalled working with Senegalese griots (storytellers) despite language barriers, relying purely on rhythm, which accidentally produced the album's most moving track, 'When You're Falling.' Vocalist Iarla Ó Lionáird's Celtic chants blended magically with African choirs during mixing, forcing producers to abandon preset arrangements.
items.artistIntroZh: Afro Celt Sound System，英国世界音乐团体，由制作人Simon Emmerson创立。以融合非洲、凯尔特和电子音乐著称，代表作包括《Volume 1: Sound Magic》和《Volume 3: Further in Time》。
items.artistIntroEn: Afro Celt Sound System is a British world music collective founded by producer Simon Emmerson. Known for blending African, Celtic, and electronic music, their key albums include Volume 1: Sound Magic and Volume 3: Further in Time.

items.name: Authentik
items.descriptionZh: 《Authentik》是法国阿尔及利亚裔歌手Kenza Farah的首张专辑，标签为Hip-Hop，但融合了R&B、Raï（阿尔及利亚民谣）和流行元素。专辑以自传式歌词描绘移民社区的生活、爱情与身份挣扎，Kenza Farah的嗓音兼具力量与柔美，在法国Hip-Hop/R&B场景中迅速走红。
items.descriptionEn: Authentik is the debut album by French-Algerian singer Kenza Farah. Tagged as Hip-Hop, it blends R&B, Raï (Algerian folk), and pop. The autobiographical lyrics depict immigrant community life, love, and identity struggles. Kenza's powerful yet tender voice made her an instant hit in the French Hip-Hop/R&B scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Kenza Farah年仅20岁，她在马赛的地下录音室中完成了大部分歌曲。制作人透露，主打歌《Je Me Mens》的歌词源于她与家人的一次激烈争吵，她将自己锁在房间内一气呵成写下歌词。由于预算有限，专辑封面是在朋友家的阳台上用数码相机拍摄的，但这张照片后来成为法国R&B的经典视觉符号。
items.storiesEn: At age 20, Kenza Farah recorded most of the album in a Marseille basement studio. Producers revealed the lead single 'Je Me Mens' was written after a heated argument with her family; she locked herself in her room and wrote the lyrics in one go. Due to budget constraints, the album cover was shot on a friend's balcony with a digital camera, later becoming an iconic image in French R&B.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Authentik》是法国北非裔女性歌手在主流Hip-Hop/R&B市场的突破之作，为后续如Sofia Essaïdi等艺人铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: Authentik was a breakthrough for North African female artists in mainstream French Hip-Hop/R&B, paving the way for later artists like Sofia Essaïdi.
items.artistIntroZh: Kenza Farah，法国阿尔及利亚裔R&B/Hip-Hop歌手，以自传式歌词和融合Raï音乐风格著称。代表作包括《Authentik》和《Je Me Mens》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kenza Farah is a French-Algerian R&B/Hip-Hop singer known for autobiographical lyrics and blending Raï music. Her key works include Authentik and 'Je Me Mens.'

items.name: Cross
items.descriptionZh: 《Cross》是法国电子组合Justice的首张录音室专辑，融合了French Touch、电子摇滚与迪斯科元素，以厚重失真贝斯、管弦乐采样和强劲四拍节奏著称。专辑中的《D.A.N.C.E.》等曲目成为俱乐部国歌，展现了他们标志性的“电子交响乐”风格。
items.descriptionEn: Cross is the debut studio album by French electronic duo Justice, blending French touch, electro-rock, and disco elements with heavy distorted bass, orchestral samples, and powerful four-on-the-floor beats. Tracks like 'D.A.N.C.E.' became club anthems, showcasing their signature 'electronic symphony' style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴黎的一间小工作室，Gaspard Augé和Xavier de Rosnay使用了大量复古模拟合成器与吉他效果器。他们曾因预算有限，不得不将采样片段反复循环利用，却意外创造出独特的粗粝音色。专辑封面由法国艺术家设计，灵感源自宗教圣像与流行文化符号。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small Parisian studio, where Gaspard Augé and Xavier de Rosnay used numerous vintage analog synthesizers and guitar effects pedals. Due to budget constraints, they had to repeatedly loop sampled fragments, which unexpectedly created a distinctive raw sound. The cover art, inspired by religious icons and pop culture symbols, was designed by a French artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Cross》被誉为21世纪电子音乐里程碑，重新定义了French Touch风格，影响了后续EDM与电子摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: Cross is hailed as a milestone in 21st-century electronic music, redefining the French touch genre and influencing subsequent EDM and electro-rock developments.
items.artistIntroZh: Justice是法国电子音乐二人组，由Gaspard Augé和Xavier de Rosnay组成，以融合电子、摇滚与迪斯科的粗粝声效闻名。代表作包括《Cross》和《Audio, Video, Disco》。
items.artistIntroEn: Justice is a French electronic music duo consisting of Gaspard Augé and Xavier de Rosnay, known for their abrasive blend of electronic, rock, and disco sounds. Their notable works include 'Cross' and 'Audio, Video, Disco'.

06-11.birthdayZh: 6月11日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾流淌过《Authentik》般的真诚旋律——所有声音都源自土地与心跳的真实；也响彻《Cross》的雷光，把每一次转折都谱成勇气的节拍。你站在自己的时间线上，既温柔又笃定。愿这一岁，像音乐一样，在孤独与热烈之间，找到只属于你的回响。
06-11.birthdayEn: June 11 is your birthday. On this date, the world first heard Justice’s *Cross*, a bold debut that dared to blend disco with raw, electric energy. That same day, *Authentik* by Kenza Farah arrived, weaving R&B and North African soul into something beautifully true. Your birthday shares that spirit: the courage to fuse light and rhythm, to walk your own path with warmth and power. May your year ahead feel like those albums—bold, layered, and full of unexpected grace, with every beat carrying you further into joy.
