items.name: From Nothin' to Somethin'
items.descriptionZh: 《From Nothin' to Somethin'》是美国说唱歌手Fabolous的第四张录音室专辑，融合了东海岸嘻哈、流行说唱与R&B元素。专辑以流畅的叙事和街头智慧歌词著称，制作上大量运用采样与钢琴旋律，展现了Fabolous从底层崛起��个人经历。
items.descriptionEn: From Nothin' to Somethin' is the fourth studio album by American rapper Fabolous, blending East Coast hip-hop, pop rap, and R&B elements. Known for its smooth storytelling and street-wise lyrics, the album features extensive sampling and piano melodies, reflecting Fabolous's personal journey from humble beginnings.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Fabolous邀请了多位好友客串，包括Ne-Yo、Rihanna和Timbaland。主打歌《Make Me Better》的副歌由Ne-Yo撰写，原本是Ne-Yo为自己专辑准备的歌曲，但听完Fabolous的歌词后主动让出。专辑名称源自Fabolous对自身奋斗史的总结，他曾表示“从一无所有到有所成就”是他的人生信条。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Fabolous enlisted several friends for guest appearances, including Ne-Yo, Rihanna, and Timbaland. The hook for the lead single 'Make Me Better' was written by Ne-Yo, originally intended for his own album, but he offered it to Fabolous after hearing the lyrics. The album title stems from Fabolous's summary of his struggle; he has said 'from nothing to something' is his life motto.
items.artistIntroZh: Fabolous是美国东海岸说唱歌手，以双关语歌词和流畅的flow著称。代表作包括《From Nothin' to Somethin'》和《Loso's Way》，曾多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Fabolous is an American East Coast rapper known for his witty wordplay and smooth flow. His notable works include 'From Nothin' to Somethin'' and 'Loso's Way', and he has received multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Mariah Carey
items.descriptionZh: 《Mariah Carey》是美国歌手玛丽亚·凯莉的首张录音室专辑，融合了流行、灵魂与成人当代风格。专辑以她标志性的五度音域和华丽花腔著称，制作上大量运用键盘与和声编排，奠定了她作为流行天后的基础。
items.descriptionEn: Mariah Carey is the debut studio album by American singer Mariah Carey, blending pop, soul, and adult contemporary styles. Known for her signature five-octave vocal range and ornate melisma, the album features extensive keyboard arrangements and vocal harmonies, establishing her as a pop diva.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，玛丽亚·凯莉年仅20岁，刚从高中毕业。制作人之一Narada Michael Walden最初对她半信半疑，但当她即兴演唱《Vision of Love》的高音部分时，整个录音室陷入沉默。哥伦比亚唱片公司原本担心她的声音过于独特，但专辑发行后四首单曲均登顶公告牌榜首，创下新人纪录。
items.storiesEn: At the time of recording, Mariah Carey was only 20 and fresh out of high school. Producer Narada Michael Walden was initially skeptical, but when she improvised the high notes of 'Vision of Love', the entire studio fell silent. Columbia Records initially worried her voice was too unique, but after release, four singles topped the Billboard Hot 100, setting a record for a debut artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑开启了玛丽亚·凯莉的巨星生涯，并影响了90年代流行与R&B歌手的演唱风格，特别是花腔技巧的普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album launched Mariah Carey's superstar career and influenced the vocal style of 1990s pop and R&B singers, particularly the popularization of melisma.
items.artistIntroZh: 玛丽亚·凯莉是美国歌手、词曲作者，以五度音域和华丽花腔闻名。代表作包括《Mariah Carey》和《Butterfly》，是史上最畅销女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer and songwriter known for her five-octave vocal range and ornate melisma. Her notable works include 'Mariah Carey' and 'Butterfly', and she is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

items.name: Candy-O
items.descriptionZh: 《Candy-O》是美国摇滚乐队The Cars的第二张录音室专辑，融合了新浪潮、流行摇滚与艺术摇滚风格。专辑以合成器与吉他交织的精致编曲著称，旋律抓耳且充满未来感，展现了乐队对流行旋律与实验音效的平衡能力。
items.descriptionEn: Candy-O is the second studio album by American rock band The Cars, blending new wave, pop rock, and art rock styles. Known for its intricate arrangements weaving synthesizers and guitars, the album features catchy melodies with a futuristic edge, showcasing the band's balance of pop hooks and experimental sounds.
items.storiesZh: 专辑封面由著名插画家Alberto Vargas绘制，他以其标志性的“Varga Girl”风格创作了性感女性形象。乐队成员最初对封面意见不一，但最终同意使用。录制过程中，主唱Ric Ocasek与制作人Roy Thomas Baker因混音方向产生争执，最终Ocasek主导了更简洁的声场。
items.storiesEn: The album cover was painted by renowned illustrator Alberto Vargas, who created a sexy female figure in his signature 'Varga Girl' style. Band members initially disagreed on the cover but eventually approved it. During recording, lead singer Ric Ocasek clashed with producer Roy Thomas Baker over mixing direction, with Ocasek ultimately favoring a cleaner soundscape.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Candy-O》巩固了The Cars在70年代末新浪潮运动中的地位，其合成器与吉他融合的手法影响了80年代��行摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Candy-O solidified The Cars' status in the late-1970s new wave movement, and their blend of synthesizers and guitars influenced 1980s pop rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: The Cars是美国摇滚乐队，以新浪潮和流行摇滚风格闻名，融合合成器与吉他。代表作包括《Candy-O》和《Heartbeat City》，是70年代末至80年代最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Cars are an American rock band known for their new wave and pop rock style, blending synthesizers and guitars. Their notable works include 'Candy-O' and 'Heartbeat City', and they were one of the most influential bands from the late 1970s to the 1980s.

06-12.birthdayZh: 6月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Mariah Carey》，用五八度音域唱出“从无到有”的奇迹；《Candy-O》也如期而至，用合成器的光芒冲破冷峻。你就像这些旋律，在岁月里悄然积蓄力量，将平凡的日子谱成动人的歌。愿你的新一岁，继续在属于自己的节奏里，闪闪发光。
06-12.birthdayEn: June 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world once saw the release of Fabolous's "From Nothin' to Somethin'" and Mariah Carey's debut, a promise of greatness from humble starts. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful blend of rising above and hitting every note with grace. May your year ahead sing with new beginnings and steady beats. Here's to the music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Mingus
items.descriptionZh: 《Mingus》是加拿大歌手兼词曲作者琼尼·米歇尔的第十张录音室专辑，融合了爵士、民谣与实验元素。专辑以向爵士贝斯手查尔斯·明格斯致敬为核心，包含大量即兴演奏、复杂和弦进行与诗歌式歌词，展现了米歇尔对爵士乐的前卫探索。
items.descriptionEn: Mingus is the tenth studio album by Canadian singer-songwriter Joni Mitchell, blending jazz, folk, and experimental elements. The album pays tribute to jazz bassist Charles Mingus, featuring extensive improvisation, complex chord progressions, and poetic lyrics, showcasing Mitchell's avant-garde exploration of jazz.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的创作源于琼尼·米歇尔与查尔斯·明格斯的合作计划。1977年，明格斯邀请米歇尔为他的诗歌谱曲，但明格斯在项目完成前因肌萎缩侧索硬化症去世。米歇尔随后将未完成的合作整理成专辑，并邀请了爵士大师韦恩·肖特和赫比·汉考克参与录制。专辑封面由米歇尔本人绘制，灵感来自明格斯的音乐。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from a collaborative project between Joni Mitchell and Charles Mingus. In 1977, Mingus invited Mitchell to set his poetry to music, but Mingus died of ALS before the project was completed. Mitchell then finished the collaboration as an album, enlisting jazz legends Wayne Shorter and Herbie Hancock for recording. Mitchell painted the cover art herself, inspired by Mingus's music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Mingus》是琼尼·米歇尔爵士转型的代表作，拓宽了流行歌手与爵士乐融合的可能性，被视为艺术流行与爵士融合的经典。
items.historicalImpactEn: Mingus is a representative work of Joni Mitchell's jazz transformation, broadening the possibilities of fusion between pop and jazz, and is regarded as a classic of art pop and jazz fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: 琼尼·米歇尔是加拿大歌手、词曲作者和画家，以诗意歌词和复杂的和声结构闻名。代表作包括《Blue》和《Court and Spark》，是20世纪最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Joni Mitchell is a Canadian singer, songwriter, and painter known for her poetic lyrics and complex harmonic structures. Her notable works include 'Blue' and 'Court and Spark', and she is one of the most influential female musicians of the 20th century.

items.name: Another Day on Earth
items.descriptionZh: 《Another Day on Earth》是Brian Eno于2005年发行的电子音乐专辑，延续了他一贯的氛围电子风格，融合了极简主义与实验性音效。专辑以舒缓的节奏、层叠的合成器和细腻的环境音场为特色，营造出一种沉思与宁静的氛围。核心特色在于其“生成音乐”理念，即通过算法和随机性创造不断变化的听觉体验，展现了Eno对声音与空间关系的深度探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Another Day on Earth" is an electronic album by Brian Eno released in 2005, continuing his signature ambient electronic style with minimalist and experimental soundscapes. Featuring soothing rhythms, layered synthesizers, and delicate ambient textures, it creates a contemplative and tranquil atmosphere. Its core feature lies in the concept of "generative music," using algorithms and randomness to craft ever-changing auditory experiences, showcasing Eno's deep exploration of the relationship between sound and space.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程体现了Brian Eno对非传统创作方法的执着。他大量使用“生成音乐”技术，通过计算机程序随机生成音序和旋律，再从中挑选并组合成曲。Eno曾透露，专辑中的多首曲目源自他日常在工作室中进行的实验，其中一些声音素材甚至是在旅行中录制的环境音。这种即兴与算法结合的方式，使专辑呈现出一种有机而不可预测的质感。
items.storiesEn: The recording process of this album reflects Brian Eno's dedication to unconventional creative methods. He extensively used "generative music" techniques, employing computer programs to randomly generate sequences and melodies, then selecting and assembling them into tracks. Eno revealed that many pieces originated from his daily experiments in the studio, with some sound materials even recorded during travels. This combination of improvisation and algorithms gave the album an organic and unpredictable texture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为氛围电子音乐的先驱，Brian Eno的这张专辑进一步巩固了他在生成音乐领域的地位，影响了后来的电子音乐人和声音艺术家。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a pioneer of ambient electronic music, Brian Eno's album further solidified his position in generative music, influencing subsequent electronic musicians and sound artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Brian Eno，英国音乐人、制作人，被誉为氛围音乐之父。他擅长电子、实验和氛围音乐，代表作包括《Music for Airports》和《Another Green World》。他的作品以创新性和哲学思考著称，深刻影响了现代电子音乐的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician and producer, hailed as the father of ambient music. He specializes in electronic, experimental, and ambient genres, with iconic works such as "Music for Airports" and "Another Green World." Known for his innovation and philosophical approach, he has profoundly influenced the evolution of modern electronic music.

items.name: Forever Your Girl
items.descriptionZh: 《Forever Your Girl》是美国歌手Paula Abdul于1988年发行的流行专辑，融合了舞曲、放克和成人当代流行元素。专辑以强劲的节拍、朗朗上口的旋律和Abdul标志性的活力嗓音为核心特色，展现了80年代末流行音乐的典型风貌。其中多首单曲如《Straight Up》和《Forever Your Girl》成为舞池经典，体现了Abdul作为舞者转型歌手的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Forever Your Girl" is a pop album by American singer Paula Abdul, released in 1988, blending dance, funk, and adult contemporary pop. It features strong beats, catchy melodies, and Abdul's signature energetic vocals, capturing the quintessential late-80s pop sound. Hits like "Straight Up" and "Forever Your Girl" became dance floor classics, showcasing Abdul's unique appeal as a dancer-turned-singer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满挑战，因为Paula Abdul当时因长期舞蹈训练导致膝盖受伤，不得不忍受疼痛在录音室工作。此外，专辑的制作人包括多位知名音乐人，如LA Reid和Babyface，他们原本对Abdul的演唱能力存疑，但Abdul凭借毅力和天赋证明了自己。专辑发行后，连续四首单曲登顶Billboard榜单，创下当时女歌手的纪录。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was challenging, as Paula Abdul suffered from knee injuries due to years of dance training and had to work through pain in the studio. Additionally, producers like LA Reid and Babyface initially doubted her vocal abilities, but Abdul proved herself through perseverance and talent. Upon release, four consecutive singles topped the Billboard charts, setting a record for female artists at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑使Paula Abdul成为80年代末最成功的流行女歌手之一，并推动了舞曲流行在主流市场的复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Paula Abdul as one of the most successful pop female artists of the late 80s and helped revive dance-pop in the mainstream market.
items.artistIntroZh: Paula Abdul，美国歌手、舞者和编舞师，出生于1962年。她以流行和舞曲风格闻名，代表作包括《Forever Your Girl》和《Spellbound》。在音乐事业前，她曾是洛杉矶湖人队啦啦队长和著名编舞师，其舞蹈背景赋予她独特的舞台表现力。
items.artistIntroEn: Paula Abdul is an American singer, dancer, and choreographer, born in 1962. Known for pop and dance music, her iconic works include "Forever Your Girl" and "Spellbound." Before her music career, she was a Los Angeles Lakers cheerleader and renowned choreographer, with her dance background giving her a distinctive stage presence.

06-13.birthdayZh: 6月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Mingus》的爵士诗篇，也有《Another Day on Earth》的静谧呼吸。这些音符像光一样，落在你出生的时刻，成为你生命里温柔的底色。愿你在自己的轨道上，既勇敢如即兴的旋律，也从容如大地的安稳。生日快乐。
06-13.birthdayEn: June 13 is your birthday. May you carry the bold, poetic spirit of Mingus, a masterpiece woven from jazz and soul, reminding you that your own story is a song worth singing. And like Forever Your Girl, may this new year bring you the joyful rhythm of stepping into your power, embracing every beat of life with grace and confidence. Shine on, beautiful soul—the world is glad you were born.

items.name: A New Day… Live in Las Vegas
items.descriptionZh: 《A New Day… Live in Las Vegas》是Céline Dion于2004年发行的现场流行专辑，记录了她在拉斯维加斯凯撒宫举办的同名驻唱演出。专辑融合了流行、成人当代和舞台剧元素，以Céline Dion强大而富有情感的嗓音为核心特色，配合华丽的管弦乐编排和现场氛围，展现了她在舞台上无与伦比的感染力。
items.descriptionEn: "A New Day… Live in Las Vegas" is a live pop album by Céline Dion, released in 2004, capturing her residency show at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. It blends pop, adult contemporary, and theatrical elements, with Céline Dion's powerful and emotive vocals as the core, complemented by lush orchestral arrangements and live atmosphere, showcasing her unparalleled stage charisma.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制源于Céline Dion在拉斯维加斯长达五年的驻唱计划，这是当时音乐界的大胆尝试。演出由著名导演Franco Dragone执导，结合了高科技舞台效果和舞蹈表演。Dion曾表示，驻唱让她得以兼顾家庭和事业，因为她可以住在拉斯维加斯，避免频繁巡演。专辑发行后，不仅商业成功，还重新定义了驻唱演出的商业模式。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album stemmed from Céline Dion's five-year residency in Las Vegas, a bold move in the music industry at the time. Directed by renowned Franco Dragone, the show combined high-tech stage effects and dance performances. Dion stated that the residency allowed her to balance family and career, as she could live in Las Vegas and avoid constant touring. The album was both commercially successful and redefined the business model of residency shows.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑和驻唱演出开创了顶级歌手在拉斯维加斯长期驻唱的先河，对后续音乐人的商业模式产生了深远���响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album and residency pioneered the trend of top artists holding long-term Las Vegas residencies, profoundly impacting the business model for subsequent musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Céline Dion，加拿大歌手，出生于1968年，以流行和成人当代风格闻名。她的代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》和《The Power of Love》。凭借其强大的嗓音和情感表达，她成为全球最畅销的女歌手之一，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer, born in 1968, known for pop and adult contemporary music. Her iconic works include "My Heart Will Go On" and "The Power of Love." With her powerful vocals and emotional delivery, she has become one of the best-selling female artists globally, winning multiple Grammy Awards.

06-14.birthdayZh: 6月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份礼物——Céline Dion的《A New Day… Live in Las Vegas》。那不只是歌声，更像新一天的序曲，在戏剧化的舞台上，把每个平凡时刻唱成发光的奇迹。愿你像这张专辑的名字，无论走到哪里，都能为自己拉开新的幕布。生活有时是沉默的，但你的存在本身，就是一首最动人的情歌。
06-14.birthdayEn: June 14 is your birthday. On this day, Céline Dion released “A New Day… Live in Las Vegas,” a testament to renewal and radiant strength. May your year carry that same spirit—bold, luminous, and alive with fresh beginnings. Like a song that rises from the stage into the endless desert night, may your path unfold with courage and grace. You are a living melody of hope, and today the world celebrates the beautiful beat of your heart.

items.name: Believe
items.descriptionZh: 《Believe》是加拿大歌手Justin Bieber于2012年发行的流行专辑，标志着他从青少年偶像向成熟艺人的转型。专辑融合了流行、R&B和舞曲元素，以更具质感的制作和Bieber逐渐成熟的嗓音为核心特色。歌曲如《Boyfriend》和《As Long as You Love Me》展现了他在旋律和情感表达上的进步，同时保留了流行的商业吸引力。
items.descriptionEn: "Believe" is a pop album by Canadian singer Justin Bieber, released in 2012, marking his transition from teen idol to mature artist. It blends pop, R&B, and dance elements, with more sophisticated production and Bieber's maturing vocals as core features. Tracks like "Boyfriend" and "As Long as You Love Me" showcase his growth in melody and emotional expression, while maintaining commercial pop appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，Justin Bieber与多位顶级制作人合作，包括Diplo和Max Martin。Bieber曾透露，专辑的创作灵感部分来源于他与粉丝的互动以及个人成长经历。为了追求更成熟的音乐风格，他刻意减少了早期作品中常见的泡泡糖流行元素。此外，专辑的发行正值他面临媒体压力和法律纠纷的时期，Bieber将情感投入音乐，使其更具真实感。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Justin Bieber collaborated with top producers like Diplo and Max Martin. Bieber revealed that the album's inspiration partly came from his interactions with fans and personal growth. To pursue a more mature sound, he deliberately reduced the bubblegum pop elements of his early work. Additionally, the album was released amid media pressure and legal issues, with Bieber channeling his emotions into the music, adding authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: Justin Bieber，加拿大歌手，出生于1994年，以流行和R&B风格闻名。他因YouTube翻唱视频被发掘，代表作包括《Baby》和《Sorry》。作为全球畅销歌手，他多次获得格莱美提名，是21世纪流行音乐的重要代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Justin Bieber is a Canadian singer, born in 1994, known for pop and R&B music. Discovered through YouTube cover videos, his iconic works include "Baby" and "Sorry." As a global best-selling artist, he has received multiple Grammy nominations and is a key figure in 21st-century pop music.

06-15.birthdayZh: 6月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Justin Bieber发行了《Believe》，一张关于成长与蜕变的专辑，如同你从青涩走向坚韧的模样。相信自己的轨迹吧，就像音符终会找到和弦。你是这世界独一无二的旋律，在时光里慢慢丰盈，温柔而有力。
06-15.birthdayEn: June 15 is your birthday, a day that gave us not only you but also the soaring anthem of “Believe,” an album that captures the beautiful leap from who we were into who we are becoming. Like that pivotal moment in music, your life is a melody of change and courage—each year a new verse, each season a fresh chorus. May your journey forward hum with the same spirit of growth and belief, turning every note of doubt into a song of joyful possibility. Happy birthday to a soul born on a day of transformation.

items.name: HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I
items.descriptionZh: 《HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I》是Michael Jackson于1995年发行的双碟流行专辑，其中第一碟为精选集，第二碟为全新原创作品。专辑融合了流行、R&B、摇滚和福音元素，以Jackson标志性的嗓音、复杂编曲和社会议题歌词为核心特色。歌曲如《Scream》和《Earth Song》展现了他在音乐上的实验精神和对世界问题的关注，制作精良且充满力量。
items.descriptionEn: "HIStory: Past, Present and Future, Book I" is a double-disc pop album by Michael Jackson, released in 1995, with the first disc as a greatest hits collection and the second as new original material. It blends pop, R&B, rock, and gospel elements, featuring Jackson's iconic vocals, complex arrangements, and socially conscious lyrics. Tracks like "Scream" and "Earth Song" showcase his experimental spirit and concern for global issues, with polished and powerful production.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制历时两年，Michael Jackson投入了大量精力，尤其是在制作《Scream》时，他与妹妹Janet Jackson合作，耗资700万美元拍摄了当时最昂贵的音乐录影带之一。专辑的标题“HIStory”体现了Jackson对个人和社会历史的反思，他曾在采访中表示，希望通过音乐为世界带来改变。此外，专辑发行后，Jackson因涉及的儿童指控案受到媒体围攻，但他坚持音乐创作，使这张专辑成为他艺术生涯的重要见证。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album took two years, with Michael Jackson investing immense effort, especially in the track "Scream," which he collaborated on with his sister Janet Jackson, spending $7 million on one of the most expensive music videos at the time. The title "HIStory" reflects Jackson's reflection on personal and social history, and he stated in interviews that he hoped to inspire change through music. After release, Jackson faced media scrutiny due to child abuse allegations, but he persisted in music creation, making this album a significant testament to his artistic career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Michael Jackson在90年代中期的重要作品，巩固了他作为流行天王的地位，并以其社会议题内容影响了后世音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a key work of Michael Jackson in the mid-90s, solidifying his status as the King of Pop and influencing later musicians with its socially conscious themes.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson，美国歌手、舞者和慈善家，出生于1958年，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以流行、R&B和摇滚风格闻名，代表作包括《Thriller》和《Billie Jean》。他的音乐、舞蹈和人道主义工作对全球文化产生了深远影响，是史上最畅销的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, born in 1958, known as the "King of Pop." Renowned for pop, R&B, and rock, his iconic works include "Thriller" and "Billie Jean." His music, dance, and humanitarian efforts have profoundly impacted global culture, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time.

items.name: Merzbox
items.descriptionZh: 《Merzbox》是日本噪音音乐家Merzbow在2000年发行的一套庞大作品集，包含50张CD。尽管被归为Pop流派，但其核心是极端实验性的噪音音乐，融合了失真、反馈和电子声响，挑战传统音乐结构。特色在于其极端的音量与混乱的美学，是噪音艺术的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: Merzbox is a massive 50-CD box set by Japanese noise musician Merzbow, released in 2000. Despite being labeled as Pop, its core is extreme experimental noise music, blending distortion, feedback, and electronic sounds to challenge conventional structures. It is known for its intense volume and chaotic aesthetic, a milestone in noise art.
items.storiesZh: 《Merzbox》的录制过程跨越数年，Merzbow（本名秋田昌美）在家中用模拟合成器和磁带循环录制了大量素材。他最初计划发行30张CD，但最终扩展至50张，部分原因是为了涵盖他90年代的所有作品。这套盒装限量发行，每套附有独特艺术品，成为收藏家珍品。
items.storiesEn: The recording of Merzbox spanned several years, with Merzbow (real name Masami Akita) creating extensive material at home using analog synthesizers and tape loops. Initially planned as a 30-CD set, it expanded to 50 to cover all his 1990s works. The box set was released in a limited edition with unique artwork, becoming a collector's item.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Merzbox》巩固了Merzbow作为噪音音乐领域最具影响力人物的地位，并推动了噪音音乐在实验音乐界的认可。
items.historicalImpactEn: Merzbox solidified Merzbow's status as the most influential figure in noise music, advancing its recognition within the experimental music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Merzbow，本名秋田昌美，日本噪音音乐家，生于1956年。他是噪音音乐领域的先驱，以极端的失真、反馈和电子噪音著称。代表作包括《Pulse Demon》和《Venereology》，对全球实验音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Merzbow, real name Masami Akita, is a Japanese noise musician born in 1956. He is a pioneer of noise music, known for extreme distortion, feedback, and electronic noise. Key works include Pulse Demon and Venereology, with a profound impact on global experimental music.

06-16.birthdayZh: 6月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过宏大的历史回响与极致的先锋声响。愿你的生命如《HIStory》般珍重过往，却不被过去捆绑；也愿你拥有《Merzbox》的勇气，在喧哗与噪音中，听见自己最自由的心跳。你值得拥有一个属于自己的、完整而热烈的故事。生日快乐。
06-16.birthdayEn: June 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed *HIStory* by Michael Jackson, an album that dared to dream big and heal the world with love. Your spirit carries that same unstoppable rhythm, a legacy of joy and resilience. Like the vast, fearless soundscapes of *Merzbox*, you embrace life in all its wild, beautiful noise. May your year ahead be a magnificent album of your own—filled with bold notes, tender melodies, and endless light.

items.name: Camp Rock
items.descriptionZh: 《Camp Rock》是2008年为迪士尼频道电影《摇滚夏令营》发行的原声带，属于流行流派。专辑融合了流行摇滚和青少年流行元素，特色在于充满活力的旋律和积极向上的歌词，由主演黛米·洛瓦���和乔纳斯兄弟等艺人演唱，风格清新甜美。
items.descriptionEn: Camp Rock is the soundtrack for the 2008 Disney Channel film of the same name, falling under the Pop genre. It blends pop rock and teen pop elements, characterized by energetic melodies and uplifting lyrics, performed by Demi Lovato, the Jonas Brothers, and other cast members, with a fresh and sweet style.
items.storiesZh: 《Camp Rock》原声带录制期间，黛米·洛瓦托当时年仅15岁，这是她首次为电影献声。乔纳斯兄弟也在片中客串，并贡献了歌曲《We Rock》。专辑发行后迅速登上公告牌200强专辑榜第三名，推动电影成为迪士尼频道的热门作品。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Camp Rock, Demi Lovato was only 15 years old, marking her first vocal performance for a film. The Jonas Brothers also made a cameo and contributed the song 'We Rock.' The album quickly peaked at No. 3 on the Billboard 200, boosting the film's popularity on Disney Channel.
items.artistIntroZh: 《Camp Rock》由多位艺人参与，主要包括美国歌手黛米·洛瓦托��流行、摇滚风格，代表作《Skyscraper》）和乔纳斯兄弟（美国流行摇滚乐队，代表作《S.O.S.》）。他们均为迪士尼频道培养的青少年偶像。
items.artistIntroEn: Camp Rock features multiple artists, primarily American singer Demi Lovato (pop/rock, known for 'Skyscraper') and the Jonas Brothers (American pop rock band, known for 'S.O.S.'), both teen idols cultivated by Disney Channel.

items.name: Misplaced Childhood
items.descriptionZh: 《Misplaced Childhood》是英国前卫摇滚乐队Marillion于1985年发行的概念专辑，尽管标签为Pop，实则属于前卫摇滚。专辑围绕童年回忆和失落主题展开，音乐融合了史诗般的吉他独奏、合成器音效和主唱Fish富有戏剧性的嗓音，特色在于连贯的叙事结构和情感深度。
items.descriptionEn: Misplaced Childhood is a 1985 concept album by British progressive rock band Marillion. Despite being labeled Pop, it is firmly progressive rock. The album explores themes of childhood memories and loss, featuring epic guitar solos, synthesizers, and the dramatic vocals of lead singer Fish, known for its cohesive narrative and emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 《Misplaced Childhood》的创作灵感源于主唱Fish在一次迷幻药物体验后的顿悟。专辑录音在德国柏林进行，期间乐队经历了紧张的制作���程。主打歌《Kayleigh》是Fish写给前女友的，成为Marillion最成功的单曲，在英国单曲榜上排名第二。
items.storiesEn: The inspiration for Misplaced Childhood came from a psychedelic drug experience by lead singer Fish, leading to a creative breakthrough. The album was recorded in Berlin, Germany, under intense production. The lead single 'Kayleigh,' written by Fish for an ex-girlfriend, became Marillion's biggest hit, reaching No. 2 on the UK Singles Chart.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Misplaced Childhood》是Marillion商业上最成功的专辑，帮助前卫摇滚在1980年代主流音乐中保持一席之地。
items.historicalImpactEn: Misplaced Childhood is Marillion's most commercially successful album, helping progressive rock maintain a presence in 1980s mainstream music.
items.artistIntroZh: Marillion是英国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1979年。他们以复杂的歌曲结构、史诗般的编曲和主唱Fish的戏剧性表演闻名。代表作包括《Misplaced Childhood》和《Clutching at Straws》，是80年代前卫摇滚复兴的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Marillion is a British progressive rock band formed in 1979. Known for complex song structures, epic arrangements, and the dramatic vocals of frontman Fish, their key works include Misplaced Childhood and Clutching at Straws, representing the 1980s progressive rock revival.

06-17.birthdayZh: 6月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Camp Rock》的青春节拍，像少年人勇敢踏上未知舞台的第一声心跳；也有《Misplaced Childhood》在时光里低语，告诉每个走散的孩子，错位的童年终会变成温柔的力量。愿你像音符般自由生长，既有出发的勇气，也有回望的暖意。
06-17.birthdayEn: June 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the dreaming spirit of Marillion's Misplaced Childhood, a journey into memory and magic. And the joyful, daring energy of Camp Rock, where every voice finds its song. Just as these albums capture moments of discovery and heart, may your year ahead be a symphony of growth, bright with old dreams and new melodies. Happy birthday—may your life play on with purpose, hope, and a rhythm all your own.

items.name: Recovery
items.descriptionZh: 《Recovery》是美国说唱歌手Eminem于2010年发行的第七张录音室专辑，属于嘻哈流派。专辑融合了硬核说唱、流行和摇滚元素，特色在于Eminem坦诚的歌词，探讨成瘾、康复和个人成长，制作上采用大量采样和强劲节拍，情感直白而有力。
items.descriptionEn: Recovery is the seventh studio album by American rapper Eminem, released in 2010, under the Hip-Hop genre. It blends hardcore rap, pop, and rock elements, characterized by Eminem's candid lyrics exploring addiction, recovery, and personal growth, with production featuring heavy sampling and powerful beats, raw and emotional.
items.storiesZh: 《Recovery》最初计划名为《Relapse 2》，但Eminem在录制过程中决定改变方向，因为他觉得《Relapse》的主题过于黑暗。专辑与多位制作人合作，包括Alex da Kid和Just Blaze。主打单曲《Love the Way You Lie》由蕾哈娜献声，成为全球热门。
items.storiesEn: Recovery was initially planned as Relapse 2, but Eminem changed direction during recording, feeling Relapse was too dark. He collaborated with producers like Alex da Kid and Just Blaze. The lead single 'Love the Way You Lie' featuring Rihanna became a global hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Recovery》是Eminem商业上最成功的专辑之一，巩固了他从药物成瘾中回归的地位，并推动了嘻哈音乐中个人叙事的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: Recovery is one of Eminem's most commercially successful albums, cementing his comeback from drug addiction and advancing the mainstreaming of personal narrative in hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers），美国说唱歌手、制作人，生于1972年。他是史上最畅销的嘻哈艺人之一，以复杂的押韵、争议性歌词和情感深度著称。代表作包括《The Marshall Mathers LP》和《The Eminem Show》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (real name Marshall Mathers) is an American rapper and producer born in 1972. One of the best-selling hip-hop artists of all time, he is known for complex rhymes, controversial lyrics, and emotional depth. Key works include The Marshall Mathers LP and The Eminem Show.

items.name: Outrospective
items.descriptionZh: 《Outrospective》是英国电子音乐组合Faithless于2001年发行的第三张录音室专辑，属于电子流派。专辑融合了迷幻浩室、碎拍和氛围音乐，特色在于深邃的贝斯线、灵魂乐采样和主唱Maxi Jazz富有哲理的念白，营造出内省而舞动的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Outrospective is the third studio album by British electronic group Faithless, released in 2001, under the Electronic genre. It blends trip-hop, breakbeat, and ambient music, characterized by deep basslines, soul samples, and the philosophical spoken word of lead vocalist Maxi Jazz, creating an introspective yet danceable atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 《Outrospective》录制于伦敦，乐队成员Sister Bliss和Rollo Armstrong在创作中融入了更多现场乐器，以增加深度。专辑名意为“���省”，反映了乐队对生命和死亡的思考。主打单曲《We Come 1》成为欧洲舞池热门，并在英国单曲榜上排名第三。
items.storiesEn: Outrospective was recorded in London, with band members Sister Bliss and Rollo Armstrong incorporating more live instruments for depth. The album title reflects introspection on life and death. The lead single 'We Come 1' became a European dance floor hit, peaking at No. 3 on the UK Singles Chart.
items.artistIntroZh: Faithless是英国电子音乐组合，成立于1995年，成员包括Rollo Armstrong、Sister Bliss和Maxi Jazz。他们以融合舞曲、灵魂和嘻哈元素著称，代表作包括《Insomnia》和《God Is a DJ》，是90年代末至2000年代初电子音乐的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Faithless is a British electronic music group formed in 1995, consisting of Rollo Armstrong, Sister Bliss, and Maxi Jazz. Known for blending dance, soul, and hip-hop, their key works include 'Insomnia' and 'God Is a DJ,' representing electronic music from the late 1990s to early 2000s.

items.name: Can't Be Tamed
items.descriptionZh: 《Can't Be Tamed》是Miley Cyrus在2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以流行舞曲和电子流行为主，融合了teen pop与成人流行的过渡元素。专辑核心特色在于Miley试图摆脱迪士尼童星形象，展现更成熟、叛逆的一面，编曲上大量使用合成器与重拍节奏，歌词充满自我宣言色彩。
items.descriptionEn: "Can't Be Tamed" is Miley Cyrus's third studio album released in 2010, primarily featuring dance-pop and electropop with a blend of teen pop and adult pop transitions. Its core characteristic lies in Miley's attempt to shed her Disney child-star image, showcasing a more mature and rebellious side through heavy synthesizers, driving beats, and self-declarative lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Can't Be Tamed》的MV因涉及性暗示和束缚意象遭到部分电视台禁播，Miley公开回应称这只是表达自由的艺术形式。此外，录制期间她正经历与Liam Hemsworth的感情波动，专辑中多首情歌被认为是对这段关系的真实投射。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the title track "Can't Be Tamed" was banned by some TV networks due to its sexual innuendo and bondage imagery; Miley publicly responded that it was merely an artistic expression of freedom. Additionally, during recording she was experiencing relationship fluctuations with Liam Hemsworth, and several love songs on the album are believed to be genuine reflections of that period.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着Miley Cyrus从童星向成人流行歌手的正式转型，对后续青少年偶像的转型路径产生了示范效应。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked Miley Cyrus's formal transition from child star to adult pop singer, setting a precedent for the career transformation paths of subsequent teen idols.
items.artistIntroZh: Miley Cyrus，美国女歌手、演员，1992年生于田纳西州。以迪士尼剧集《汉娜·蒙塔娜》成名，后转型为流行歌手。代表作包括《Wrecking Ball》《Party in the U.S.A.》《Flowers》等，风格涵盖流行、摇滚与乡村。
items.artistIntroEn: Miley Cyrus is an American singer and actress, born in 1992 in Tennessee. She rose to fame through the Disney series "Hannah Montana" and later transitioned into a pop singer. Her representative works include "Wrecking Ball", "Party in the U.S.A.", and "Flowers", spanning pop, rock, and country.

06-18.birthdayZh: 6月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Recovery》的坦荡与《Can't Be Tamed》的勇敢。像Eminem在废墟里重建自己，也像麦莉挣脱一切标签——你身上也有这样一种能量：在每一次转身中，把过往变成阶梯，把日子唱成属于自己的歌。生日快乐，愿你一直自由、一直发光。
06-18.birthdayEn: June 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums of brave transformation—Eminem’s Recovery, a defiant rise from struggle, and Faithless’s Outrospective, a soulful look inward. Like these sounds, your life is a journey of strength and quiet reflection, each year a new verse of growth. May your year ahead be a song of healing, bold reinvention, and the steady beat of resilience. Happy birthday to a beautiful heart.

items.name: The Great Adventure
items.descriptionZh: 《The Great Adventure》是Steven Curtis Chapman于1992年发行的第七张录音室���辑，风格为基督教流行音乐（CCM），融合当代流行摇滚与民谣元素。核心特色在于以信仰为内核的叙事性歌词，搭配流畅的旋律和吉他驱动的编曲，传递希望与勇气的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "The Great Adventure" is Steven Curtis Chapman's seventh studio album released in 1992, in the style of Contemporary Christian Music (CCM), blending pop-rock and folk elements. Its core feature lies in faith-driven narrative lyrics paired with smooth melodies and guitar-driven arrangements, conveying themes of hope and courage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题曲《The Great Adventure》的灵感来自Chapman一次登山旅行中的顿悟——他意识到信仰生活不应是循规蹈矩的仪式，而是一场充满惊喜的冒险。录制时，他坚持邀请自己的妻子Mary Beth在背景和声中献声，以表达家庭在信仰旅程中的重要性。
items.storiesEn: The title track "The Great Adventure" was inspired by an epiphany Chapman had during a mountain hike—he realized that a life of faith should not be a routine of rituals but an adventure full of surprises. During recording, he insisted on having his wife Mary Beth contribute background vocals to emphasize the importance of family in the faith journey.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在基督教音乐界获得巨大成功，获得格莱美最佳流行/当代福音专辑奖，并进一步巩固了Chapman作为CCM领域标杆艺术家的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved great success in the Christian music scene, winning the Grammy Award for Best Pop/Contemporary Gospel Album, further solidifying Chapman's status as a benchmark artist in the CCM field.
items.artistIntroZh: Steven Curtis Chapman，美国基督教音乐歌手、词曲作者，1956年生于肯塔基州。他是当代基督教音乐（CCM）最具影响力的艺人之一，获得多项格莱美奖和Dove奖。代表作包括《Dive》《The Great Adventure》《Cinderella》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Steven Curtis Chapman is an American Christian music singer and songwriter, born in 1956 in Kentucky. He is one of the most influential artists in Contemporary Christian Music (CCM), with multiple Grammy and Dove Awards. Representative works include "Dive", "The Great Adventure", and "Cinderella".

06-19.birthdayZh: 6月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《The Great Adventure》的旋律，像一场关于勇气与信仰的邀请——提醒你，人生不是平静的港湾，而是一段被祝福的旅程。愿你在自己的航程中，始终带着那份温暖而坚定的力量，把每一个寻常日子，都走成闪闪发光的恩典。
06-19.birthdayEn: June 19 is your birthday, a day marked by a beautiful release into the world. On this very date, *The Great Adventure* by Steven Curtis Chapman arrived like a hopeful anthem, reminding us that life is a journey of trust and discovery. May your new year be filled with that same spirit of joyful exploration, each step a step into the light. You are a masterpiece in the making, and I’m so glad you were born. Happy birthday, dear heart.

items.name: Banaroo's World
items.descriptionZh: 《Banaroo's World》是德国流行组合Banaroo于2005年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为泡泡糖流行（Bubblegum Pop）和舞曲流行，带有鲜明的欧陆舞曲节奏。核心特色在于轻快活泼的旋律、简单的歌词以及充满阳光感的编曲，目标受众为青少年和儿童群体。
items.descriptionEn: "Banaroo's World" is the debut studio album by German pop group Banaroo, released in 2005. The style is bubblegum pop and dance-pop with distinct Eurodance rhythms. Its core features are upbeat melodies, simple lyrics, and sunny arrangements targeting teenage and pre-teen audiences.
items.storiesZh: Banaroo由德国电视选秀节目《Banaroo》组建，成员原本是五名互不相识的年轻人，通过节目竞争后成团。专辑录制仅用了六周时间，部分歌曲的歌词由制作人临时在录音棚里根据成员个性即兴修改。专辑发行后迅速在德国、奥地利和瑞士儿童市场走红。
items.storiesEn: Banaroo was formed through the German TV talent show "Banaroo", with five initially unknown young people competing and then coming together as a group. The album was recorded in just six weeks, with some lyrics being improvised by producers in the studio based on each member's personality. The album quickly became popular among children in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.
items.artistIntroZh: Banaroo，德国流行组合，2005年通过电视选秀节目成立，最初由五名成员组成。风格以泡泡糖流行和舞曲为主，主要受众为青少年。代表作包括《Dubi Dam Dam》《Uh Mamma》《Space Cowboy》等，在德语区国家拥有较高知名度。
items.artistIntroEn: Banaroo is a German pop group formed through a TV talent show in 2005, originally consisting of five members. Their style is primarily bubblegum pop and dance music targeting teenagers. Representative works include "Dubi Dam Dam", "Uh Mamma", and "Space Cowboy", with significant popularity in German-speaking countries.

items.name: Dangerously in Love
items.descriptionZh: 《Dangerously in Love》是Beyoncé于2003年发行的首张个人录音室专辑，尽管标签为Folk/Country，但其实际风格以R&B、灵魂乐和流行为主，融合放克与嘻哈元素。核心特色在于Beyoncé强劲的嗓音表现力、细腻的情感演绎以及融合当代都市节奏的编曲，歌词聚焦爱情与自我赋权。
items.descriptionEn: "Dangerously in Love" is Beyoncé's debut solo studio album released in 2003. Although labeled Folk/Country, its actual style is primarily R&B, soul, and pop with funk and hip-hop elements. Its core features are Beyoncé's powerful vocal delivery, nuanced emotional interpretation, and arrangements blending contemporary urban rhythms, with lyrics focusing on love and self-empowerment.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Beyoncé的父亲兼经纪人Mathew Knowles坚持让她同时兼顾Destiny's Child的巡演，导致她在酒店房间和巡演大巴上完成大量人声录制。主打歌《Crazy in Love》的号角采样来自她与制作人Rich Harrison的一次即兴碰撞，Harrison原本为其他艺人准备的伴奏被Beyoncé当场相中。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Beyoncé's father and manager Mathew Knowles insisted she simultaneously handle Destiny's Child's tour, forcing her to record many vocal parts in hotel rooms and tour buses. The horn sample on lead single "Crazy in Love" came from an impromptu session with producer Rich Harrison—the instrumental he had originally prepared for another artist was instantly chosen by Beyoncé.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑确立了Beyoncé作为独立超级巨星的地位，获得五项格莱美奖，并开启了21世纪R&B女歌手的个人品牌化时代。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Beyoncé as an independent superstar, winning five Grammy Awards and ushering in an era of personal branding for 21st-century R&B female artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Beyoncé，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员，1981年生于德克萨斯州休斯顿。最初为Destiny's Child成员，后成为全球最具影响力的流行/R&B巨星之一。代表作包括《Crazy in Love》《Single Ladies》《Halo》等，以强悍的演唱实力和舞台表现力著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, born in 1981 in Houston, Texas. She first gained fame as a member of Destiny's Child and later became one of the most influential pop/R&B superstars globally. Representative works include "Crazy in Love", "Single Ladies", and "Halo", renowned for her powerful vocals and stage presence.

items.name: Domestica
items.descriptionZh: 《Domestica》是美国独立摇滚乐队Cursive于2000年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格为情绪摇滚（Emo）和后硬核，融合独立摇滚与实验元素。核心特色在于紧张不安的吉他线条、激烈的情感宣泄以及主唱Tim Kasher充满焦虑与自省的歌词，专辑概念围绕家庭关系与个人困境展开。
items.descriptionEn: "Domestica" is the third studio album by American indie rock band Cursive, released in 2000. The style is emo and post-hardcore, blending indie rock with experimental elements. Its core features are tense guitar lines, intense emotional catharsis, and frontman Tim Kasher's anxious, introspective lyrics revolving around family relationships and personal struggles.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于内布拉斯加州奥马哈的Presto!录音棚，制作人Mike Mogis（也是Bright Eyes的长期合作者）使用大量低保真手法捕捉乐队的原始能量。主唱Kasher在录制期间刚经历离婚，专辑中大部分歌词直��取材于这段经历，他甚至在录音棚里砸坏了一把吉他来表达情绪。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at Presto! Studios in Omaha, Nebraska, where producer Mike Mogis (also a long-time collaborator of Bright Eyes) used lo-fi techniques to capture the band's raw energy. Frontman Kasher had just gone through a divorce during recording, and most lyrics were directly drawn from that experience; he even smashed a guitar in the studio to express emotion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为2000年代中西部情绪摇滚复兴的重要作品，对后来emo和独立摇滚乐队（如Brand New、The Get Up Kids）产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key work in the Midwest emo revival of the 2000s, deeply influencing later emo and indie rock bands such as Brand New and The Get Up Kids.
items.artistIntroZh: Cursive，美国独立摇滚乐队，1995年成立于内布拉斯加州奥马哈。风格以情绪摇滚、后硬核和独立摇滚为主，以富有文学性的歌词和激烈的现场表演著称。代表作包括《The Recluse》《Art Is Hard》《Domestica》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Cursive is an American indie rock band formed in Omaha, Nebraska in 1995. Their style is primarily emo, post-hardcore, and indie rock, known for literary lyrics and intense live performances. Representative works include "The Recluse", "Art Is Hard", and "Domestica".

06-20.birthdayZh: 6月20日，是你的生日。这一天，全世界都在为你准备好礼物——就像《Dangerously in Love》教会我们的那样，你有力量去爱，也有资格被爱。而《Banaroo's World》里的阳光与活力，恰好配得上你生命里的每一次起舞。你值得所有美好，就像六月正午的光，明亮而不灼人。生日快乐。
06-20.birthdayEn: June 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us Beyoncé’s *Dangerously in Love*—a bold, soulful declaration of strength and tenderness. Like that album, may your year ahead be filled with fearless passion and soft, radiant grace. And in the quieter moments, let the raw, heartfelt energy of Cursive’s *Domestica* remind you that even the most honest storms can lead to beautiful new growth. You are a melody of courage and warmth—happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: The Light of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《The Light of the Sun》是Jill Scott的第四张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐与放克元素。专辑以温暖的吉他旋律、厚重的贝斯线和Scott标志性的诗意嗓音为核心，展现了成熟女性对爱情、生活与自我肯定的细腻思考。制作上强调现场乐器演奏，营造出亲密而充满律动的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "The Light of the Sun" is Jill Scott's fourth studio album, blending R&B, soul, and funk. It features warm guitar melodies, thick bass lines, and Scott's signature poetic vocals, reflecting mature reflections on love, life, and self-affirmation. The production emphasizes live instrumentation, creating an intimate yet groovy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Jill Scott正处于怀孕状态，这直接影响了她创作中的情感深度和主题选择。她曾透露，专辑中的许多歌曲都是在深夜哺乳或哄孩子入睡时构思完成的。此外，她坚持与长期合作的制作人组合保持紧密协作，拒绝使用过多电子修饰，以保留人声最原始的温度。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Jill Scott was pregnant, which deeply influenced her emotional depth and thematic choices. She revealed that many songs were conceived while breastfeeding or lulling her child to sleep at night. She also insisted on close collaboration with her long-time production team, rejecting excessive electronic embellishments to preserve the raw warmth of her vocals.
items.artistIntroZh: Jill Scott，美国R&B/灵魂乐歌手、词曲作者及诗人，被誉为“新灵魂乐”运动的代表人物之一。她的音乐以融合爵士、放克和嘻哈元素著称，代表作包括《Who Is Jill Scott?》和《Beautifully Human》。她曾多次获得格莱美奖，以其富有诗意的歌词和强大的现场表现力闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Jill Scott is an American R&B/soul singer, songwriter, and poet, regarded as a leading figure of the neo-soul movement. Her music blends jazz, funk, and hip-hop elements, with notable works including "Who Is Jill Scott?" and "Beautifully Human." She is a multiple Grammy winner, known for her poetic lyrics and powerful live performances.

items.name: Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business
items.descriptionZh: 《Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business》是Evergreen Terrace的第四张录音室专辑，尽管标注为流行，但乐队实际以金属核/硬核朋克风格著称。这张专��在旋律硬核的基础上加入了更多流行朋克的副歌段落，吉他 riff ��利，鼓点密集，人声在嘶吼与清嗓之间切换，呈现出强烈的情绪张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business" is Evergreen Terrace's fourth studio album. While labeled as pop, the band is actually known for metalcore/hardcore punk. This album adds more pop-punk choruses to their melodic hardcore foundation, featuring sharp guitar riffs, dense drumming, and vocals alternating between screams and clean singing, creating intense emotional tension.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题取自电影《甜心先生》中的一句台词，乐队成员表示这讽刺了音乐行业中虚伪的诚意。录制过程由制作人Zeuss（曾与Hatebreed等乐队合作）操刀，为了捕捉更真实的现场感，乐队故意在录音室里制造了高音量、高能量的混乱环境，甚至让邻居多次报警投诉。
items.storiesEn: The album title is taken from a line in the film "Jerry Maguire," which the band members said satirizes the insincerity in the music industry. The recording was handled by producer Zeuss (known for working with Hatebreed). To capture a more authentic live feel, the band deliberately created a high-volume, high-energy chaotic environment in the studio, prompting multiple noise complaints from neighbors.
items.artistIntroZh: Evergreen Terrace，美国佛罗��达州金属核/硬核朋克乐队，成立于1999年。他们以激烈的现场表演和融合旋律硬核与金属核的风格著称，代表作包括《Wolfbiker》和《Almost Home》。乐队名称取自《辛普森一家》中的虚构街道，音乐中常带有社会讽刺主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Evergreen Terrace is an American metalcore/hardcore punk band from Florida, formed in 1999. They are known for intense live shows and a style blending melodic hardcore with metalcore, with notable works including "Wolfbiker" and "Almost Home." The band's name is taken from a fictional street in "The Simpsons," and their music often features social satire.

06-21.birthdayZh: 6月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌出《The Light of the Sun》的温暖节奏，像灵魂乐里永不熄灭的女性力量，让你如阳光般自在地律动。而《Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business》提醒你，真诚是最珍贵的铠甲。你的生命，就是一首既温柔又铿锵的赞歌，在每个夏天，都值得被好好庆祝。
06-21.birthdayEn: June 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light and the soulful rhythm of Jill Scott’s The Light of the Sun, which reminds us that you carry warmth and authenticity wherever you go. And like Evergreen Terrace’s Sincerity Is an Easy Disguise in This Business, may your heart always choose the honest, the raw, the real. You are a melody that makes life brighter. Here’s to you—sunshine and truth, all wrapped in one beautiful soul.

items.name: My December
items.descriptionZh: 《My December》是Kelly Clarkson的第三张录音室专辑，属于流行摇滚风格。专辑以沉重的吉他驱动、阴暗的歌词主题和Clarkson爆发力十足的嗓音为特色，探讨了失落、孤独与自我挣扎。相比前作的流行舞曲风格，这张专辑明显更黑暗、更个人化，展现了艺术家对创作自主权的坚持。
items.descriptionEn: "My December" is Kelly Clarkson's third studio album, in a pop rock style. It features heavy guitar-driven arrangements, dark lyrical themes, and Clarkson's powerful vocals, exploring loss, loneliness, and personal struggle. Compared to her previous pop-dance oriented work, this album is significantly darker and more personal, showcasing the artist's insistence on creative autonomy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行过程充满争议。Clarkson与唱片公司RCA的高层发生了激烈冲突，因为公司认为专辑过于阴暗、缺乏商业单曲。Clarkson坚持自主创作了大部分歌曲，甚至一度面临被雪藏的风险。最终专辑首周销量仍达40万张，证明了她的市场号召力，但也导致她与公司关系长期紧张。
items.storiesEn: The album's release was fraught with controversy. Clarkson clashed with RCA executives, who deemed the album too dark and lacking commercial singles. Clarkson insisted on writing most of the songs herself, even risking being shelved. Despite this, the album sold 400,000 copies in its first week, proving her commercial draw, but it led to long-term tensions with the label.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《My December》被视为流行歌手争取艺术自主权的标志性案例。Clarkson与唱片公司的公开对抗引发了业界对“选秀艺人创作自由”的广泛讨论，此后多位流行歌手在合约谈判中更加注重对作品内容的控制权。
items.historicalImpactEn: "My December" is regarded as a landmark case of a pop artist fighting for artistic autonomy. Clarkson's public confrontation with her label sparked widespread industry debate about creative freedom for talent-show artists, leading many subsequent pop singers to prioritize content control in contract negotiations.
items.artistIntroZh: Kelly Clarkson，美国流行摇滚歌手、词曲作者，2002年《美国偶像》首季冠军。她以极具穿透力的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎著称，代表作包括《Since U Been Gone》《Because of You》和《Stronger》。她曾多次获得格莱美奖，是当代流行乐坛最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kelly Clarkson is an American pop rock singer and songwriter, winner of the first season of "American Idol" in 2002. She is known for her powerful, piercing vocals and emotionally charged performances, with hits including "Since U Been Gone," "Because of You," and "Stronger." A multiple Grammy winner, she is one of the most influential female artists in contemporary pop music.

items.name: Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《Blue》是Joni Mitchell的第四张录音室专辑，被公认为民谣/乡村音乐的巅峰之作。专辑以原声吉他、钢琴和精巧的弦乐编排为基底，Mitchell的嗓音清澈而脆弱，歌词极富诗意，深入剖析了爱情、漂泊���心碎。整张专辑如同一部私密的音乐日记，情感直白而毫不设防。
items.descriptionEn: "Blue" is Joni Mitchell's fourth studio album, widely regarded as a masterpiece of folk/country music. Built on acoustic guitar, piano, and delicate string arrangements, Mitchell's voice is clear and vulnerable, with highly poetic lyrics that delve into love, wandering, and heartbreak. The album feels like an intimate musical diary, raw and emotionally exposed.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Mitchell正经历一段感情低谷，她曾坦言《Blue》是她“最诚实”的作品。录制时她坚持使用最简单的编曲，有时仅用一把吉他和人声完成整首歌。歌曲《California》中提到的“去欧洲旅行”是真实的经历——她在1970年曾与男友环游欧洲，旅途中写下了专辑中的多首歌曲。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Mitchell was going through an emotional low point, and she has called "Blue" her "most honest" work. She insisted on minimal arrangements, sometimes recording entire songs with just a guitar and vocals. The European travels mentioned in "California" were real—she toured Europe with her boyfriend in 1970, writing many of the album's songs along the way.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Blue》被《滚石》杂志评为“史上最伟大专辑”之一，对后世女性创作歌手产生了深远影响。它打破了民谣音乐的叙事边界，将个人情感赤裸地融入艺术表达，为Taylor Swift、Lorde等后辈提供了情感真实性的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Blue" is ranked among the "Greatest Albums of All Time" by Rolling Stone, profoundly influencing generations of female singer-songwriters. It broke the narrative boundaries of folk music by baring personal emotions in art, setting a benchmark for emotional authenticity for later artists like Taylor Swift and Lorde.
items.artistIntroZh: Joni Mitchell，加拿大民谣/爵士歌手、词曲作者及画家，20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。她的音乐融合民谣、爵士和世界音乐，以复杂的和声与诗意的歌词著称。代表作包括《Blue》《Court and Spark》和《Both Sides Now》。她曾获得多项格莱美奖，并被授予加拿大勋章。
items.artistIntroEn: Joni Mitchell is a Canadian folk/jazz singer, songwriter, and painter, one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. Her music blends folk, jazz, and world music, known for complex harmonies and poetic lyrics. Notable works include "Blue," "Court and Spark," and "Both Sides Now." She has won multiple Grammy Awards and was awarded the Order of Canada.

items.name: En observation
items.descriptionZh: 《En observation》是法国歌手Helmut Fritz的首张录音室专辑，属于流行/电子舞曲风格。专辑以合成器驱动的欧陆舞曲节奏为骨架，搭配幽默讽刺的法语歌词，主题涉及社会观察、名人文化和日常生活。Fritz以夸张的假声和冷幽默的演唱方式著称，音乐充满戏谑感和派对能量。
items.descriptionEn: "En observation" is the debut studio album by French singer Helmut Fritz, in a pop/electronic dance style. Built on synth-driven Eurodance rhythms, it features humorous and satirical French lyrics about social observation, celebrity culture, and daily life. Fritz is known for his exaggerated falsetto and deadpan humor, giving the music a playful, party-fueled energy.
items.storiesZh: Helmut Fritz原名Éric Greff，这个艺名和专辑概念灵感来源于他曾在夜店当DJ时遇到的一位德国游客。专辑中的热门单曲《Ça m'énerve》在法国爆红，歌词中抱怨各种日常烦心事，如“邻居的狗叫”和“手机没信号”，引发了广泛共鸣。这首歌起初只是他在小型俱乐部演出的即兴创作，没想到成为年度金曲。
items.storiesEn: Helmut Fritz, real name Éric Greff, got his stage name and album concept from a German tourist he met while working as a club DJ. The album's hit single "Ça m'énerve" became a massive hit in France, with lyrics complaining about everyday annoyances like "the neighbor's barking dog" and "no cell signal," striking a universal chord. The song was originally an improvisation during a small club gig, unexpectedly becoming a year-defining hit.
items.artistIntroZh: Helmut Fritz，法国流行/电子舞曲歌手，以夸张的假声、冷幽默歌词和80年代复古电子风格闻名。2009年凭借单曲《Ça m'énerve》在法国乐坛一炮而红。他的音乐常以幽默视角讽刺社会现象，代表作包括专辑《En observation》和单曲《Miss France》。
items.artistIntroEn: Helmut Fritz is a French pop/electronic dance singer, known for his exaggerated falsetto, deadpan humorous lyrics, and 80s retro electronic style. He rose to fame in 2009 with the hit single "Ça m'énerve." His music often satirizes social phenomena with humor, with notable works including the album "En observation" and the single "Miss France."

06-22.birthdayZh: 6月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Blue》那样深邃的蓝，在孤独与失落中长出诗意的光。也诞生过《My December》的勇敢，在寒夜里点燃内心的火。愿你像这两张专辑一样，坦然拥抱自己的柔软与坚韧。那些曾让你心碎的时刻，终会成为你独一无二的风景。生日快乐，愿你的十二月永远有暖阳。
06-22.birthdayEn: June 22 is your birthday, a day when the world gave us Joni Mitchell’s Blue, an album of raw, poetic grace that mirrors the depth and beauty I see in you. Like that record, you carry a quiet strength and a soul that feels both tender and true. May your year ahead be a melody of joy, as timeless and uplifting as the spirit of those who share your special date. Happy birthday.

items.name: To Love
items.descriptionZh: 《To Love》是西野加奈2010年发行的流行专辑，延续了她标志性的J-Pop风格，融合轻快的电子节拍与朗朗上口的旋律。专辑以少女心事和恋爱为主题，歌词细腻真挚，充满青春活力。
items.descriptionEn: "To Love" is a pop album released by Kana Nishino in 2010, continuing her signature J-Pop style with upbeat electronic beats and catchy melodies. The album focuses on themes of young love and heartfelt emotions, with sincere and vivid lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，西野加奈曾透露主打歌《if》的歌词灵感来源于她自己的恋爱经历。她表示在录音时多次因为情感投入而哽咽，制作人不得不让她休息调整情绪。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Kana Nishino revealed that the lyrics of the lead track "if" were inspired by her own romantic experiences. She admitted to choking up multiple times while recording due to emotional involvement, forcing the producer to let her take breaks to compose herself.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈是日本流行女歌手，出生于1989年，以甜美嗓音和贴近年轻女性心声的歌词著称。代表作有《Best Friend》《トリセツ》《会いたくて 会いたくて》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese pop singer born in 1989, known for her sweet voice and lyrics that resonate with young women. Her代表作 include "Best Friend", "Torisetsu", and "Aitakute Aitakute".

items.name: I, Flathead
items.descriptionZh: 《I, Flathead》是Ry Cooder 2008年发行的民谣/乡村风格专辑，融合了美国传统乡村音乐、蓝草和拉丁节奏。专辑以叙事性歌曲为主，讲述底层劳动者的生活故事，编曲质朴而富有情感。
items.descriptionEn: "I, Flathead" is a folk/country album by Ry Cooder released in 2008, blending traditional American country music, bluegrass, and Latin rhythms. The album features narrative songs about the lives of working-class people, with simple yet emotionally rich arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Ry Cooder“加州三部曲”的第三部，灵感来源于他对加州移民历史和汽车文化的兴趣。专辑封面和歌曲《The Flathead Flats》都致敬了福特平头V8发动机，Cooder本人收藏了一辆1940年的福特轿车。
items.storiesEn: This album is the third installment of Ry Cooder's "California Trilogy," inspired by his interest in California's immigration history and car culture. The album cover and the song "The Flathead Flats" pay homage to the Ford Flathead V8 engine; Cooder himself owns a 1940 Ford sedan.
items.artistIntroZh: Ry Cooder是美国吉他手、歌手和音乐制作人，生于1947年，擅长融合民谣、蓝调、乡村和世界音乐。代表作包括《Paris, Texas》原声带和专辑《Buena Vista Social Club》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ry Cooder is an American guitarist, singer, and music producer born in 1947, known for blending folk, blues, country, and world music. His notable works include the soundtrack for "Paris, Texas" and the album "Buena Vista Social Club".

06-23.birthdayZh: 6月23日，是你的生日。像西野加奈在《To Love》里唱的那样，爱是甜蜜与感伤的旋律，也是心动的勇气。而《I, Flathead》则告诉你，生命是一场公路故事，有赛车般的激情，也有失落的温柔。愿你这一天被爱意与故事包围，像旧日里发光的音符，谱写属于自己的暖光篇章。
06-23.birthdayEn: June 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Kana Nishino’s *To Love*, an album brimming with the courage to open one’s heart, and Ry Cooder’s *I, Flathead*, a sprawling road trip of gritty dreams. So may your new year carry that same bold tenderness—a heart unafraid to love, and the wild, winding joy of carving your own path. You are a melody of grace and grit. Happy, happy birthday.

items.descriptionZh: 《4》是Beyoncé 2011年发行的R&B/Soul专辑，融合了放克、嘻哈和灵魂乐元素。专辑以强劲的节奏、厚重的贝斯线和Beyoncé充满力量的嗓音为特色，主题涵盖女性独立、爱情与自我肯定。
items.descriptionEn: "4" is an R&B/Soul album by Beyoncé released in 2011, blending funk, hip-hop, and soul elements. The album is characterized by strong rhythms, heavy bass lines, and Beyoncé's powerful vocals, with themes of female independence, love, and self-empowerment.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《4》是Beyoncé的幸运数字，也是她的生日（9月4日）和结婚纪念日（4月4日）。录制过程中，她与制作人Babyface合作了歌曲《I Miss You》，这首歌原本是Babyface为已故歌手Aaliyah创作的，Beyoncé在录音室里一次完成录制。
items.storiesEn: The album title "4" is Beyoncé's lucky number, also representing her birthday (September 4) and wedding anniversary (April 4). During recording, she collaborated with producer Babyface on the song "I Miss You," which was originally written for the late singer Aaliyah; Beyoncé recorded it in one take in the studio.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《4》标志着Beyoncé从流行舞曲转向更成熟的R&B风格，影响了2010年代初期R&B女歌手的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: "4" marked Beyoncé's shift from pop dance music to a more mature R&B style, influencing the creative direction of female R&B artists in the early 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: Beyoncé是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，生于1981年，以R&B和流行音乐闻名。她是Destiny's Child成员，单飞后代表作包括《Crazy in Love》《Single Ladies》《Halo》。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and actress born in 1981, known for R&B and pop music. She was a member of Destiny's Child, and her solo hits include "Crazy in Love," "Single Ladies," and "Halo."

items.name: Love One.
items.descriptionZh: 《Love One.》是西野加奈2009年发行的第二张迷你专辑，延续了青春流行风格，以轻快的电子流行和R&B元素为特色。专辑歌词聚焦恋爱中的甜蜜与不安，旋律清新易记，展现了西野加奈早期标志性的少女形象。
items.descriptionEn: "Love One." is Kana Nishino's second mini-album released in 2009, continuing her youthful pop style with light electronic pop and R&B elements. The lyrics focus on the sweetness and anxiety of love, with fresh and memorable melodies, showcasing her early signature girlish image.
items.storiesZh: 这张迷你专辑的主打歌《Dear…》是西野加奈首次尝试自己作词，她表示这首歌是写给一位无法传达心意的重要朋友。录音时她特意选择了深夜时段，以捕捉更私密的情感氛围。
items.storiesEn: The lead track "Dear…" of this mini-album was Kana Nishino's first attempt at writing lyrics herself; she said the song was dedicated to an important friend to whom she couldn't express her feelings. She deliberately chose late-night recording sessions to capture a more intimate emotional atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈是日本流行女歌手，出生于1989年，以甜美嗓音和贴近年轻女性心声的歌词著称。代表作有《Best Friend》《トリセツ》《会いたくて 会いたくて》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese pop singer born in 1989, known for her sweet voice and lyrics that resonate with young women. Her代表作 include "Best Friend", "Torisetsu", and "Aitakute Aitakute".

items.name: Zwiespalt (Weiss)
items.descriptionZh: 《Zwiespalt (Weiss)》是MC Basstard 2011年发行的流行专辑，融合了德国流行说唱和电子元素。专辑以双面人格为主题，白色版本（Weiss）代表光明与希望，旋律较为柔和，歌词探讨内心冲突与自我救赎。
items.descriptionEn: "Zwiespalt (Weiss)" is a pop album by MC Basstard released in 2011, blending German pop rap with electronic elements. The album explores the theme of dual personality, with the white version (Weiss) representing light and hope, featuring softer melodies and lyrics about inner conflict and self-redemption.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是MC Basstard“Zwiespalt”双专辑计划的白色版本，另一张黑色版本（Schwarz）同时发行，代表黑暗面。他曾在采访中表示，录制白色版本时特意减少了粗粝的街头说唱元素，以展现更旋律化的一面。
items.storiesEn: This album is the white version of MC Basstard's "Zwiespalt" dual-album project, with a black version (Schwarz) released simultaneously representing the dark side. He stated in an interview that during the recording of the white version, he deliberately reduced gritty street rap elements to showcase a more melodic side.
items.artistIntroZh: MC Basstard是德国说唱歌手和音乐制作人，生于1983年，以硬核说唱和流行元素的融合著称。代表作包括《Zwiespalt》系列和《Doggy Style》。
items.artistIntroEn: MC Basstard is a German rapper and music producer born in 1983, known for blending hardcore rap with pop elements. His notable works include the "Zwiespalt" series and "Doggy Style".

06-24.birthdayZh: 6月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你奏响过《4》，那是Beyoncé宣告的成熟力量——像一场破茧的雨，洗去稚嫩，长出独立而坚韧的骨骼。而西野加奈的《Love One.》轻声提醒：爱不必锋利，单恋也是完整的季节。你从来不是被定义的音符，你是自己的和弦，在光与暗的缝隙里，唱出独一无二的歌。
06-24.birthdayEn: June 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Beyoncé’s “4,” an album of bold self-love and unshakable grace, and Kana Nishino’s “Love One,” a gentle anthem for heartfelt connection. Like these songs, you carry a spirit that is both powerful and tender, a melody of strength and warmth. May your year ahead be as radiant as the music that shares your date, and may every note of your journey sing with joy, purpose, and love. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Soft Parade
items.descriptionZh: 《The Soft Parade》是The Doors在1969年发行的第四张录音室专辑，尽管乐队核心风格为迷幻摇滚与布鲁斯摇滚，但此专辑显著融合了爵士元素，特别是铜管与弦乐的编配，营造出华丽而实验性的氛围。核心特色在于吉姆·莫里森的诗歌化歌词与雷·曼扎雷克的键盘交织，整体偏向巴洛克流行与爵士即兴。
items.descriptionEn: "The Soft Parade" is The Doors' fourth studio album released in 1969. Although the band's core style is psychedelic and blues rock, this album notably incorporates jazz elements, especially brass and string arrangements, creating a lavish and experimental atmosphere. Its core features Jim Morrison's poetic lyrics intertwined with Ray Manzarek's keyboards, leaning towards baroque pop and jazz improvisation.
items.storiesZh: 录制《The Soft Parade》时，乐队内部关系紧张，吉姆·莫里森因酗酒和法律问题状态不稳，常缺席录音。制作人保罗·A·罗思柴尔德引入大量管弦乐编排，以掩盖莫里森嗓音的疲惫，这引发了乐队成员的不满，认为背离了原始摇滚精神。专辑同名曲的复杂结构曾因多次重录而耗费巨资。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "The Soft Parade," internal tensions were high; Jim Morrison was unstable due to alcoholism and legal issues, often absent from sessions. Producer Paul A. Rothchild introduced extensive orchestral arrangements to mask Morrison's vocal fatigue, causing dissatisfaction among band members who felt it strayed from their raw rock spirit. The complex title track required multiple re-recordings, costing a fortune.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑标志着The Doors从迷幻摇滚向更复杂编曲的过渡，尽管商业上不如前作成功，但为后续艺术摇滚探索奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marks The Doors' transition from psychedelic rock to more complex arrangements; though less commercially successful, it laid groundwork for subsequent art rock exploration.
items.artistIntroZh: The Doors是美国洛杉矶的摇滚乐队，成立于1965年，以其主唱吉姆·莫里森的迷幻歌词和戏剧化表演闻名。主要风格为迷幻摇滚、布鲁斯摇滚，代表作包括《Light My Fire》《Riders on the Storm》等。
items.artistIntroEn: The Doors are an American rock band from Los Angeles, formed in 1965, known for Jim Morrison's psychedelic lyrics and theatrical performances. Their main styles are psychedelic rock and blues rock, with代表作 including "Light My Fire" and "Riders on the Storm."

items.name: Orca Symphony No. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Orca Symphony No. 1》是Serj Tankian在2013年发行的古典交响乐作品，完全脱离其金属乐队System of a Down的背景。此作品属于当代古典音乐流派，以虎鲸（Orca）为主题，通过四个乐章描绘海洋生态与人类关系的哲学思考。核心特色在于融合了管弦乐、合唱与电子音效，营造出宏大而哀伤的叙事。
items.descriptionEn: "Orca Symphony No. 1" is a classical symphonic work released by Serj Tankian in 2013, completely departing from his metal band System of a Down background. Falling under contemporary classical music, it uses the orca as a theme to depict philosophical reflections on ocean ecology and human relationships through four movements. Its core features orchestral, choral, and electronic elements, creating a grand and mournful narrative.
items.storiesZh: Serj Tankian为创作此交响曲，专门研究了虎鲸的声纳通信模式，并尝试将鲸类的声音频率转化为乐谱。录制时，他指挥了新西兰基督城交响乐团，并亲自弹奏钢琴部分。Tankian表示，此作品灵感源于对海洋污染与动物权利的长期关注，而非商业考量。
items.storiesEn: To create this symphony, Serj Tankian studied orca sonar communication patterns and attempted to translate whale frequencies into musical notation. During recording, he conducted the Christchurch Symphony Orchestra in New Zealand and played the piano parts himself. Tankian stated the work was inspired by his long-term concern for ocean pollution and animal rights, not commercial considerations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此作品展示了金属音乐人跨界古典的可行性，拓宽了当代古典音乐的受众群体，并引发了对环境议题的音乐化讨论。
items.historicalImpactEn: This work demonstrates the feasibility of metal musicians crossing over to classical music, broadening contemporary classical audiences and sparking musical discussions on environmental issues.
items.artistIntroZh: Serj Tankian是美国籍亚美尼亚裔音乐人，生于1967年，以System of a Down乐队主唱闻名，风格涵盖另类金属、前卫金属。个人作品探索古典、实验与政治主题，代表作包括《Toxicity》《Elect the Dead》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Serj Tankian is an American-Armenian musician born in 1967, best known as the lead vocalist of System of a Down, whose style encompasses alternative metal and progressive metal. His solo works explore classical, experimental, and political themes, with代表作 including "Toxicity" and "Elect the Dead."

06-25.birthdayZh: 6月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾奏响《The Soft Parade》的迷幻乐章，它提醒你，生命可以像巴洛克与布鲁斯的交融，既有柔软的勇气，也有铿锵的节奏。而《Orca Symphony No. 1》的宏大交响，则像为你内心深处的力量谱曲——你如同一头优雅的虎鲸，在深海中自在穿行，不慌不忙。愿你新的一岁，既有温暖的和弦，也有自由的回响。生日快乐。
06-25.birthdayEn: June 25 is your birthday. On this day, The Doors released *The Soft Parade*, a bold blend of rock and orchestral soul, reminding us that beauty often lives in unexpected harmonies. Serj Tankian’s *Orca Symphony No. 1* was also born on this date—a sweeping, oceanic call to rise with strength and grace. May your year ahead echo these spirits: the courage to blend your own unique sounds, the depth to feel deeply, and the rhythm to move forward with joy. You are a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: Center Stage
items.descriptionZh: 《Center Stage》是澳大利亚指弹吉他大师Tommy Emmanuel在2008年发行的现场专���，属于爵士/原声吉他风格。核心特色在于其惊人的技术展示，包括快速拨弦、打板与和声即兴，曲目涵盖原创与经典爵士标准曲的改编。专辑录制于美国巡演期间，捕捉了现场互动与即兴火花。
items.descriptionEn: "Center Stage" is a live album by Australian fingerstyle guitar master Tommy Emmanuel, released in 2008, belonging to the jazz/acoustic guitar genre. Its core features stunning technical displays, including fast picking, percussive slaps, and harmonic improvisation, covering originals and adaptations of jazz standards. Recorded during a US tour, it captures live interaction and improvisational sparks.
items.storiesZh: 此专辑的录音素材来自Tommy Emmanuel在美国多场演出的精选，他曾在演出中即兴加入《Somewhere Over the Rainbow》的变奏，以回应观众点歌。录制时，他使用了一把定制的Maton吉他，并坚持不使用任何录音棚后期修音，以保留现场的真实感。
items.storiesEn: The album's material was selected from multiple US tour performances; Tommy Emmanuel once improvised a variation of "Somewhere Over the Rainbow" in response to audience requests. During recording, he used a custom Maton guitar and insisted on no studio pitch correction to preserve live authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: Tommy Emmanuel是澳大利亚吉他手，生于1955年，以指弹原声吉他闻名，风格融合爵士、蓝草、流行与古典。他被誉为“指弹吉他之父”，代表作包括《Classical Gas》《Angelina》等，曾获格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Tommy Emmanuel is an Australian guitarist born in 1955, renowned for fingerstyle acoustic guitar, blending jazz, bluegrass, pop, and classical. Known as "the father of fingerstyle guitar," his代表作 include "Classical Gas" and "Angelina," and he has received Grammy nominations.

items.name: Drama
items.descriptionZh: 《Drama》是英国歌手Jamelia在2000年发行的首张录音室专辑，属于嘻哈与R&B融合风格。核心特色在于其流畅的节奏、充满自信的女性视角歌词，以及Jamelia富有力量的嗓音。专辑中的单曲《Money》和《Call Me》展现了其街头风格与流行旋律的结合。
items.descriptionEn: "Drama" is the debut studio album by British singer Jamelia, released in 2000, blending hip-hop and R&B. Its core features smooth rhythms, confident female perspective lyrics, and Jamelia's powerful vocals. Singles like "Money" and "Call Me" showcase a fusion of street style and pop melodies.
items.storiesZh: Jamelia录制《Drama》时年仅18岁，专辑由多位制作人合作完成，包括Salaam Remi。她曾在录音室中因紧张而多次重录主打歌，直到制作人鼓励她即兴发挥。专辑发行后，她因歌曲中直白的性别议题而受到英国媒体的关注，但也被批评为过于商业化。
items.storiesEn: Jamelia was only 18 when recording "Drama"; the album was produced by multiple producers including Salaam Remi. She was so nervous that she re-recorded the lead single multiple times until producers encouraged improvisation. After release, she gained UK media attention for her direct gender themes but was also criticized as too commercial.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑帮助Jamelia在英国乐坛建立知名度，为后续的英国女性嘻哈/R&B歌手铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped establish Jamelia's profile in the UK music scene, paving the way for subsequent British female hip-hop/R&B artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Jamelia是英国歌手兼词曲作者，生于1981年，以嘻哈、R&B和流行风格著称。她的代表作包括《Superstar》《Thank You》等，曾获全英音乐奖提名，是2000年代英国都市音乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jamelia is a British singer-songwriter born in 1981, known for hip-hop, R&B, and pop styles. Her代表作 include "Superstar" and "Thank You," and she has been nominated for Brit Awards, representing UK urban music in the 2000s.

06-26.birthdayZh: 6月26日，是你的生日。这一天，Tommy Emmanuel的《Center Stage》曾为世界带来炽热的指弹旋律，仿佛在说：人生的舞台，你的光芒就是中心。而Jamelia的《Drama》用温柔与力量，唱出跌宕中的坚韧——所有的故事都是你独有的背景音。愿你在新的一岁里，像音乐一样自由起伏，把每一个日常，都活成值得被纪念的篇章。
06-26.birthdayEn: June 26 is your birthday. As the world celebrates the turning of your personal year, it shares the gift of two albums born on this date: Tommy Emmanuel's "Center Stage" and Jamelia's "Drama." Like Emmanuel's live guitar, may your life be a center stage where your most vibrant self performs freely. Like Jamelia's debut, may this year be a beautiful, bold beginning—the first verse of a song that grows richer with every note. You are the melody, and today, the world is your audience. Happy birthday.

items.name: We Are the Night
items.descriptionZh: 《We Are the Night》是英国电子音乐组合The Chemical Brothers在2007年发行的第六张录音室专辑，属于电子音乐流派，具体融合了Big Beat、浩室与迷幻电子。核心特色在于其强劲的节拍、迷幻的合成器音色，以及邀请多位客座歌手（如Klaxons、Fatlip）带来的多样性。
items.descriptionEn: "We Are the Night" is the sixth studio album by British electronic duo The Chemical Brothers, released in 2007. Belonging to electronic music, it specifically blends Big Beat, house, and psychedelic electronica. Its core features powerful beats, psychedelic synth sounds, and diversity from guest vocalists like Klaxons and Fatlip.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《We Are the Night》源自成员Tom Rowlands对夜店文化的观察，录制时他们使用了大量复古模拟合成器，如Roland TB-303，以重现早期锐舞场景的音色。单曲《The Salmon Dance》因采��了动画片《海底总动员》的片段而引发版权争议，但最终获得授权。
items.storiesEn: The album title "We Are the Night" was inspired by member Tom Rowlands' observations of club culture; during recording, they used vintage analog synthesizers like the Roland TB-303 to recreate early rave scene sounds. The single "The Salmon Dance" caused copyright disputes for sampling footage from the animated film "Finding Nemo," but eventually obtained clearance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑巩固了The Chemical Brothers在电子音乐界的地位，并延续了Big Beat流派在2000年代的影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified The Chemical Brothers' status in electronic music and sustained the influence of the Big Beat genre in the 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: The Chemical Brothers是英国电子音乐组合，由Tom Rowlands和Ed Simons组成，成立于1992年。他们以Big Beat和迷幻电子风格闻名，代表作包括《Hey Boy Hey Girl》《Galvanize》等，曾多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: The Chemical Brothers are a British electronic duo formed in 1992, consisting of Tom Rowlands and Ed Simons. Known for Big Beat and psychedelic electronica, their代表作 include "Hey Boy Hey Girl" and "Galvanize," and they have won multiple Grammy Awards.

06-27.birthdayZh: 6月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《We Are the Night》擂响节拍——那电子脉搏轰然跳动，仿佛在说：你生来就该属于那熠熠发光的夜。你是自己的光，能在黑暗中点燃音符，也能在寂静里听见星辰的合唱。往后岁月，请永远这样，响亮而温柔地，成为自己。
06-27.birthdayEn: June 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "We Are the Night" by The Chemical Brothers—a pulsing, luminous reminder that even the darkest hours hold electric magic. Like that album, you bring a brilliant, rhythmic energy to every room, a beat that makes life feel alive with possibility. May your year ahead be as bold and radiant as the night that dances with stars, each day a new track of joy and adventure waiting to be played. Celebrate your light.

06-28.birthdayZh: 6月28日，是你的生日。这天曾有人把《月光》洒进人间，用温柔的旋律照亮迷途的心。也有人在《红色》里唱出勇敢与热烈，告诉世界爱可以被大声宣告。愿你像那晚的月光，柔和却坚定；像那抹红色，在岁月里始终鲜活滚烫。生日快乐，愿你继续发光。
06-28.birthdayEn: June 28 is your birthday—a day when the world gifted us with the raw soul of “The Doors” and the shimmering hope of Fleetwood Mac’s “Rumours.” Like those albums, you carry a spirit that breaks through shadows and finds melody in chaos. May this new year be a song that rises, bold and tender, where every note is a step toward light. You are the rhythm that makes life worth dancing to—happy birthday, beautiful soul. Let your story play on, full and unafraid.

06-29.birthdayZh: 6月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾降下《American Music, Texas Style》般粗犷而优雅的旋律，像你骨子里的不羁与温柔。也响起了《Kim Wilde》那样清冽的新浪潮节拍，冷峻中藏着蓬勃的生机。你来到这世上，便已是一首独一无二的歌——在时间的密纹里，刻下自己明亮而温暖的声线。
06-29.birthdayEn: June 29 is your birthday. On this date, the world was gifted with albums that echo your vibrant spirit—Kim Wilde’s debut pulses with new wave energy and joyful resolve, while Clarence “Gatemouth” Brown’s “American Music, Texas Style” blends blues, country, and Cajun soul into a warm, free melody. Like these songs, you create a harmony of light and depth. May your new year be a dance of bold beginnings and steady grace, with every note lifting you higher. Happy birthday.

06-30.birthdayZh: 6月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好礼物：《True Blue》里麦姐的勇敢与坦荡，像你骨子里的明亮；《Doo-Bop》中迈尔斯的爵士与嘻哈交融，仿佛你生命中所有复杂都能拧成旋律。你的到来本身就是一首歌，既有锋芒，也有温柔。生日快乐，愿你永远信步前行。
06-30.birthdayEn: June 30 is your birthday, a date that gleams with creative fire. Like Miles Davis’s "Doo-Bop," your life dares to fuse unexpected worlds into something bold and new. And like Madonna’s "True Blue," you carry a timeless spirit—fearless, radiant, never afraid to claim your own spotlight. May this new year unfold with the same daring rhythm and joyful confidence. Here’s to you, a masterpiece in the making, turning every moment into your own unforgettable track. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sinatra Sings… of Love and Things
items.descriptionZh: 这张1962年的专辑是Frank Sinatra在爵士乐领域的深情之作，以温暖、浪漫的管弦乐编排为核心特色。Sinatra用他那标志性的、充满磁性的嗓音，演绎了一系列关于爱与日常情感的经典曲目，展现了其作为“爵士情歌之王”的非凡魅力，整体氛围优雅而舒缓。
items.descriptionEn: This 1962 album is a heartfelt work by Frank Sinatra in the jazz realm, characterized by warm, romantic orchestral arrangements. With his iconic, magnetic voice, Sinatra delivers a series of classic songs about love and everyday emotions, showcasing his extraordinary charm as the 'King of Jazz Ballads' in an elegant and soothing atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Sinatra正处于艺术生涯的巅峰期，他与编曲家Nelson Riddle的合作堪称天作之合。有趣的是，Sinatra坚持在深夜录音，因为他认为自己的嗓音在此时最有情感张力。专辑中的《I Left My Heart in San Francisco》原本是为其他歌手准备的，但Sinatra在录音棚即兴试唱后，制作人决定将其保留，最终成为经典。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Sinatra was at the peak of his artistic career, and his collaboration with arranger Nelson Riddle was a match made in heaven. Interestingly, Sinatra insisted on recording late at night, believing his voice had the most emotional intensity at that hour. The track 'I Left My Heart in San Francisco' was originally intended for another singer, but after Sinatra's impromptu rehearsal in the studio, the producer decided to keep it, and it eventually became a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了Sinatra作为20世纪最伟大流行/爵士歌手的地位，其浪漫主题的演绎方式影响了后世无数情歌专辑的制作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album further solidified Sinatra's status as the greatest pop/jazz vocalist of the 20th century, with its romantic interpretations influencing the production of countless love-song albums for generations to come.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Sinatra（美国），20世纪最具影响力的爵士与流行男歌手之一。他以无与伦比的嗓音和细腻的情感表达著称，代表作包括《My Way》《Fly Me to the Moon》等，被誉为“美国歌坛的传奇”。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Sinatra (American), one of the most influential male jazz and pop vocalists of the 20th century. Renowned for his unparalleled voice and nuanced emotional delivery, his representative works include 'My Way' and 'Fly Me to the Moon,' and he is hailed as a 'legend of American song.'

items.name: The Return of the Magnificent Seven
items.descriptionZh: 1971年的《The Return of the Magnificent Seven》是The Supremes在R&B/Soul领域的一次华丽回归。专辑融合了放克节奏与灵魂乐的和声，核心特色在于Diana Ross离队后，新阵容展现出的更成熟、更具节奏感的声线，歌曲充满自信与活力。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1971, 'The Return of the Magnificent Seven' marks a splendid return for The Supremes in the R&B/Soul genre. The album blends funk rhythms with soul harmonies, with its core feature being the more mature and rhythmic vocal delivery of the new lineup after Diana Ross's departure, exuding confidence and vitality.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是The Supremes在Diana Ross单飞后的首张重要作品，新成员Jean Terrell接替了主唱位置。录制过程中，Motown的创始人Berry Gordy曾亲自监棚，要求乐队在节奏部分更“放克”一些，以适应70年代初的潮流。有趣的是，专辑标题致敬了1960年的西部片《豪勇七蛟龙》，象征着组合“重组归来”的雄心。
items.storiesEn: This album is the Supremes' first major work after Diana Ross's solo departure, with new member Jean Terrell taking over as lead vocalist. During recording, Motown founder Berry Gordy personally supervised sessions, demanding a 'funkier' rhythm section to align with the early '70s trends. Interestingly, the album title pays homage to the 1960 Western film 'The Magnificent Seven,' symbolizing the group's ambitious 'return.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑证明了The Supremes在失去核心成员后依然能保持高水准，为女子组合在70年代的转型提供了重要范本。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album proved that The Supremes could maintain high standards after losing their core member, providing an important template for girl groups' transformation in the 1970s.
items.artistIntroZh: The Supremes（美国），Motown唱片旗下最成功的女子演唱组合，以流畅的R&B与灵魂乐著称。代表作包括《Baby Love》《Stop! In the Name of Love》等，是1960年代流行音乐的重要象征。
items.artistIntroEn: The Supremes (American), the most successful female vocal group under Motown Records, known for their smooth R&B and soul music. Their representative works include 'Baby Love' and 'Stop! In the Name of Love,' making them a key symbol of 1960s pop music.

items.name: The Fat of the Land
items.descriptionZh: 1997年的《The Fat of the Land》是The Prodigy在电子音乐领域的里程碑式作品，核心特色是将硬核节拍、大贝斯线与朋克摇滚的狂躁能量完美融合。专辑中充满挑衅性的采样和高速节奏，定义了90年代末的Big Beat浪潮，极具冲击力。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1997, 'The Fat of the Land' is a landmark work by The Prodigy in electronic music, characterized by a fusion of hardcore beats, massive basslines, and the frenetic energy of punk rock. The album's provocative samples and high-speed tempos defined the Big Beat wave of the late '90s, delivering a powerful impact.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满了实验性，主脑Liam Howlett在 Essex 的家中搭建了临时工作室，大量使用老旧合成器和采样器。其中的热单《Smack My Bitch Up》因歌词争议引发巨大风波，但乐队坚持认为这是对生活狂野面的艺术表达。有趣的是，专辑名字源自一句英国俚语，意为“最好的部分”。
items.storiesEn: The recording process of this album was highly experimental. Mastermind Liam Howlett set up a temporary studio at his home in Essex, heavily using vintage synthesizers and samplers. The hit single 'Smack My Bitch Up' sparked major controversy over its lyrics, but the band insisted it was an artistic expression of life's wild side. Interestingly, the album title comes from a British slang phrase meaning 'the best part.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑将电子音乐带入主流摇滚舞台，是Big Beat流派最具代表性的作品之一，深刻影响了后续电子摇滚跨界的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album brought electronic music to the mainstream rock stage, becoming one of the most representative works of the Big Beat genre and profoundly influencing subsequent electronic-rock crossovers.
items.artistIntroZh: The Prodigy（英国），90年代最具代表性的电子乐队之一，以融合朋克、锐舞与工业节拍著称。代表作包括《Firestarter》《Breathe》等，被誉为“电子音乐的叛逆先锋”。
items.artistIntroEn: The Prodigy (British), one of the most representative electronic bands of the 1990s, known for fusing punk, rave, and industrial beats. Their representative works include 'Firestarter' and 'Breathe,' earning them the title 'rebellious pioneers of electronic music.'

07-01.birthdayZh: 7月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你存下温柔的伏笔——弗兰克·辛纳屈唱过《爱情与万物》，用管弦乐把深情裹成暖阳。而神童乐队用《丰饶之地》的节拍，把叛逆炼成破土的力量。你像爱情里最从容的咏叹，也像节奏里不肯妥协的鼓点。愿你在属于你的丰饶之日，既有拥抱世界的柔软，也有燃烧自己的勇气。
07-01.birthdayEn: July 1 is your birthday. On this day, Frank Sinatra’s “Sinatra Sings… of Love and Things” first sang its tender ode to life’s quiet joys, and The Prodigy’s “The Fat of the Land” shook the world with its fierce, unstoppable energy. May your year carry both the warmth of love’s gentle songs and the courage to dance to your own wild beat. You are a beautiful harmony of heart and fire—happy birthday.

items.name: It Was Written
items.descriptionZh: 1996年的《It Was Written》是Nas在Hip-Hop领域奠定街头叙事大师地位的关键专辑。核心特色在于其阴暗、电影感的制作与Nas复杂而深刻的歌词，描绘了纽约街头的生存法则与内心挣扎，���前作更显成熟与野心。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1996, 'It Was Written' is a crucial album that cemented Nas's status as a master of street storytelling in Hip-Hop. Its core features lie in the dark, cinematic production and Nas's complex, profound lyrics, depicting the survival rules and inner struggles of New York streets, showing more maturity and ambition than his debut.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的制作人Trackmasters为Nas打造了更商业化的声音，但Nas坚持保留了大量街头叙事。录制期间，Nas曾因歌词中涉及真实帮派人物而收到威胁，但他拒绝修改。专辑中《If I Ruled the World》的副歌邀请到Lauryn Hill献声，这原本是一次偶然的录音室相遇，却成就了经典。
items.storiesEn: The album's producer, Trackmasters, crafted a more commercial sound for Nas, but he insisted on retaining a large amount of street narrative. During recording, Nas received threats over lyrics referencing real gang figures but refused to alter them. The chorus of 'If I Ruled the World' featured Lauryn Hill, a result of a chance encounter in the studio that produced a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Nas在东海岸说唱中的地位，其多层次的叙事技巧被后世说唱歌手视为教科书，是90年代Hip-Hop黄金时代的重要作品。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Nas's position in East Coast rap, and its multi-layered narrative techniques are regarded as a textbook by later rappers, making it a key work of the 1990s Golden Age of Hip-Hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas（美国），东海岸说唱的代表人物之一，以诗意的歌词和深刻的街头叙事著称。代表作包括《Illmatic》《It Was Written》等，被公认为Hip-Hop史上最伟大的MC之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas (American), one of the leading figures of East Coast rap, renowned for his poetic lyrics and profound street storytelling. His representative works include 'Illmatic' and 'It Was Written,' and he is widely regarded as one of the greatest MCs in Hip-Hop history.

items.name: People Are People
items.descriptionZh: 1984年的《People Are People》是Depeche Mode在流行音乐领域的重要突破，核心特色是将合成器流行与工业感、阴暗的歌词主题相结合。专辑中的同名曲目以机械般的节拍和反战主题，展现了乐队从早期纯流行向更黑暗、更具实验性方向的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 1984, 'People Are People' is a significant breakthrough for Depeche Mode in pop music, characterized by a fusion of synth-pop with industrial textures and dark lyrical themes. The title track, with its mechanical beats and anti-war theme, showcases the band's shift from early pure pop to a darker, more experimental direction.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Depeche Mode在美国市场的首次重大成功，同名单曲在美国舞曲榜夺冠。录制过程中，乐队成员Martin Gore包办了大部分词曲，而主唱Dave Gahan则在录音棚里尝试了更粗犷的演唱风格。有趣的是，专辑封面设计原本计划使用更复杂的图像，但最终选择了简洁的字体与符号，以突出音乐本身。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Depeche Mode's first major success in the US market, with the title track reaching No. 1 on the US Dance Chart.
