During recording, band member Martin Gore wrote most of the lyrics and music, while lead singer Dave Gahan experimented with a rawer vocal style in the studio. Interestingly, the album cover was originally planned to feature more complex imagery but ultimately opted for simple typography and symbols to let the music speak for itself.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode（英国），1980年代最具影响力的合成器流行乐队之一。他们以黑暗、忧郁的电子流行风格著称，代表作包括《Enjoy the Silence》《Personal Jesus》等，深���影响了后世电子摇滚的发展。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode (British), one of the most influential synth-pop bands of the 1980s. Known for their dark, melancholic electronic pop style, their representative works include 'Enjoy the Silence' and 'Personal Jesus,' profoundly influencing the development of later electronic rock.

07-02.birthdayZh: 7月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱起《People Are People》，提醒我们人性中的光与暗从来共存，而你选择了温暖的一面。纳斯在《It Was Written》里写下街头与梦想的叙事，你的生命也如这张专辑——不必完美，但注定有力。愿你永远相信，自己的故事值得被隆重书写。
07-02.birthdayEn: July 2 is your birthday, sharing its date with albums that prove how far a voice can travel. Like Nas’s *It Was Written*, may your year carry the depth of a story still being told with power and truth. And like Depeche Mode’s *People Are People*, may you be a quiet breakthrough—gathering your own light and letting it reach those who need it most. In the middle of summer, you arrive: a melody no one else could sing, a day the world is lucky to hold.

items.name: Wild Ones
items.descriptionZh: 《Wild Ones》是美国说唱歌手Flo Rida于2012年发行的第四张录音室专辑，融合了流行、电子舞曲和嘻哈元素。专辑以同名主打歌《Wild Ones》为核心，节奏明快、旋律抓耳，展现了Flo Rida标志性的派对氛围和充满活力的演唱风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Wild Ones" is the fourth studio album by American rapper Flo Rida, released in 2012. It blends pop, electronic dance music, and hip-hop elements, featuring upbeat tempos and catchy melodies. The title track "Wild Ones" exemplifies Flo Rida's signature party vibe and energetic vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Wild Ones》原本是为澳大利亚女歌手Sia创作的，但Sia认为这首歌更适合Flo Rida，于是主动让出并担任了伴唱。录制过程中，Flo Rida曾因过度工作导致嗓音沙哑，但意外地让歌曲更具质感。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Wild Ones" was originally written for Australian singer Sia, but she felt it suited Flo Rida better and voluntarily gave it to him, providing backing vocals. During recording, Flo Rida's voice became hoarse from overwork, which unexpectedly added a gritty texture to the song.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑同名曲《Wild Ones》在全球多个国家进入榜单前十，成为Flo Rida最成功的单曲之一，进一步巩固了他在流行舞曲领域的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track "Wild Ones" reached the top ten in multiple countries worldwide, becoming one of Flo Rida's most successful singles and solidifying his status in the pop dance music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Flo Rida（原名Tramar Dillard），美国说唱歌手、词曲作者，出生于佛罗里达州。以融合嘻哈与流行舞曲的风格著称，代表作包括《Low》《Right Round》《Whistle》等，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Flo Rida (born Tramar Dillard) is an American rapper and songwriter from Florida. Known for blending hip-hop with pop dance music, his hits include "Low," "Right Round," and "Whistle," earning multiple Grammy nominations.

07-03.birthdayZh: 7月3日，是你的生日。这天世界曾放出过一群《Wild Ones》——那些不被驯服的灵魂，在节奏里奔跑、碰撞、发光。愿你的生命也像那专辑的精神：永远有舞步去打破沉静，有旋律去托起每一次坠落。你不必完美，只需像这个日子一样，带着野性的温柔，在属于自己的节拍里，活得热烈而辽阔。
07-03.birthdayEn: July 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world celebrated with the release of "Wild Ones" by Flo Rida, an album that bursts with unstoppable energy and freedom—a perfect echo of the wild, beautiful spirit you carry with you everywhere. Like that music, your presence turns every moment into a celebration of possibility. May your year ahead be a chart-topping hit of joy, courage, and wild dreams, every note written just for you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Kylie
items.descriptionZh: 《Kylie》是澳大利亚流行歌手Kylie Minogue于1988年发行的首张录音室专辑，以泡泡糖流行和舞曲风格为主。专辑由英国制作人Stock Aitken Waterman操刀，旋律轻快、歌词甜美，展现了Kylie清新活泼的少女形象。
items.descriptionEn: "Kylie" is the debut studio album by Australian pop singer Kylie Minogue, released in 1988. It features bubblegum pop and dance-pop styles, produced by the British team Stock Aitken Waterman. The album is characterized by upbeat melodies and sweet lyrics, showcasing Kylie's fresh and lively teenage image.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的首支单曲《The Loco-Motion》原本是Kylie在慈善演出中翻唱的版本，意外被制作人发现并录制发行，结果成为澳大利亚1987年最畅销单曲。Kylie在录制时年仅19岁，全程在伦敦完成，因紧张多次重录。
items.storiesEn: The first single "The Loco-Motion" was originally a cover Kylie performed at a charity event. It was discovered by producers, recorded, and released, becoming Australia's best-selling single of 1987. Kylie was only 19 during recording, which took place in London, and she re-recorded multiple times due to nervousness.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑使Kylie Minogue成为国际流行偶像，开启了澳大利亚歌手在全球流行乐坛的成功之路，并确立了Stock Aitken Waterman在80年代末的统治地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album turned Kylie Minogue into an international pop icon, paving the way for Australian artists in the global pop scene and cementing Stock Aitken Waterman's dominance in the late 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue，澳大利亚流行歌手、词曲作者、演员，出生于墨尔本。以流行舞曲和性感形象闻名，代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》《Spinning Around》等，获格莱美奖和多项全英音乐奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian pop singer, songwriter, and actress from Melbourne. Known for her dance-pop music and glamorous image, her hits include "Can't Get You Out of My Head" and "Spinning Around," winning a Grammy and multiple Brit Awards.

items.name: American V: A Hundred Highways
items.descriptionZh: 《American V: A Hundred Highways》是美国传奇乡村音乐人Johnny Cash于2006年发行的遗作专辑，属于民谣/乡村风格。专辑以深沉的嗓音和简约的编曲为特色，收录了多首翻唱和原创作品，充满对生命与信仰的反思。
items.descriptionEn: "American V: A Hundred Highways" is a posthumous album by American folk/country legend Johnny Cash, released in 2006. It features his deep, resonant voice and sparse arrangements, including covers and original songs that reflect on life, death, and faith.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是在Johnny Cash去世后由其子John Carter Cash和制作人Rick Rubin整理完成的。Cash在2003年妻子June Carter Cash去世后，仍坚持录制直到生命最���几个月，专辑中的《Like the 309》是他生前录制的最后一首原创歌曲。
items.storiesEn: This album was compiled by Johnny Cash's son John Carter Cash and producer Rick Rubin after Cash's death. Despite losing his wife June Carter Cash in 2003, Cash continued recording until his final months. "Like the 309" was the last original song he ever recorded.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Cash“美国录音系列”的第五部，也是他去世后的首张作品，再次证明了他作为美国音乐标志性人物的不朽地位，并获得格莱美最佳乡村专辑奖。
items.historicalImpactEn: As the fifth installment of Cash's "American Recordings" series and his first posthumous release, the album reaffirmed his iconic status in American music and won a Grammy for Best Country Album.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash，美国乡村音乐歌手、词曲作者，出生于阿肯色州。以低沉嗓音和黑色着装闻名，风格融合乡村、民谣、摇滚和福音，代表作包括《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》《Folsom Prison Blues》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music singer and songwriter from Arkansas. Known for his deep voice and all-black attire, his style blended country, folk, rock, and gospel. Hits include "I Walk the Line," "Ring of Fire," and "Folsom Prison Blues."

items.name: The Sufferer & The Witness
items.descriptionZh: 《The Sufferer & The Witness》是美国摇滚乐队Rise Against于2006年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格为流行朋克和旋律硬核。专辑以激烈的吉他riff和充满社会政治意识的歌词为特色，探讨战争、不公和个人抗争等主题。
items.descriptionEn: "The Sufferer & The Witness" is the fifth studio album by American rock band Rise Against, released in 2006. It features pop punk and melodic hardcore styles, with aggressive guitar riffs and politically charged lyrics addressing war, injustice, and personal struggle.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队主唱Tim McIlrath因过度排练导致声带受损，不得不暂停录音接受治疗。康复后，他将这段经历融入专辑中《The Good Left Undone》的创作，歌词中隐含着对坚持与脆弱的思考。
items.storiesEn: During recording, lead vocalist Tim McIlrath damaged his vocal cords from over-rehearsing and had to pause for treatment. After recovery, he channeled this experience into "The Good Left Undone," with lyrics subtly reflecting on perseverance and vulnerability.
items.artistIntroZh: Rise Against，美国朋克摇滚乐队，1999年成立于芝加哥。以旋律硬核和政治激进歌词著称，代表作包括《Prayer of the Refugee》《Savior》《Give It All》等，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Rise Against is an American punk rock band formed in Chicago in 1999. Known for melodic hardcore and politically charged lyrics, their hits include "Prayer of the Refugee," "Savior," and "Give It All," earning multiple Grammy nominations.

07-04.birthdayZh: 7月4日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《American V: A Hundred Highways》，像一条绵延的公路，带着沧桑的福音。也诞生过《The Sufferer & The Witness》，在苦难中撕开一道光，唱出不屈的力量。你走在这条路上，既有温暖的回响，也有勇敢的锋芒——就像这个日子，注定明亮而辽阔。
07-04.birthdayEn: July 4 is your birthday. Like Johnny Cash’s A Hundred Highways, your day carries a quiet, resilient strength, a melody that endures through every season. And just as Rise Against’s The Sufferer & The Witness pulses with raw, hopeful rebellion, your spirit dares to rise and sing. On this day of independence and starlight, may your journey unfurl like a chorus of freedom—bold, tender, and absolutely yours. You were born to light up the world.

items.name: Zooropa
items.descriptionZh: 《Zooropa》是爱尔兰摇滚乐队U2于1993年发行的第八张录音室专辑，风格深受电子音乐影响，融合了另类摇滚、舞曲和实验元素。专辑以迷幻的合成器音色和抽象歌词为特色，探索技术、媒体和现代生活。
items.descriptionEn: "Zooropa" is the eighth studio album by Irish rock band U2, released in 1993. Heavily influenced by electronic music, it blends alternative rock, dance, and experimental elements. The album features psychedelic synthesizers and abstract lyrics exploring technology, media, and modern life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原本计划作为EP发行，但乐队在录制过程中灵感爆发，最终扩展为全长专辑。录制时，主唱Bono因过度使用效果器导致声音失真，反而成为专辑标志���音效之一。专辑封面灵感来自欧洲电视网，象征欧洲统一与混乱。
items.storiesEn: Originally planned as an EP, the album expanded into a full-length release as the band experienced a creative burst during recording. Bono's overuse of vocal effects accidentally created a distorted sound that became a signature of the album. The cover art was inspired by Eurovision, symbolizing European unity and chaos.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Zooropa》获得了格莱美最佳另类音乐专辑奖，并被视为U2实验性转型的代表作，影响了90年代后期摇滚乐队对电子元素的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Zooropa" won the Grammy for Best Alternative Music Album and is considered a landmark of U2's experimental phase, influencing later rock bands' integration of electronic elements in the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: U2，爱尔兰摇滚乐队，1976年成立于都柏林。以宏大的现场表演和社会政治主题闻名，风格从后朋克发展到另类摇滚和电子实验，代表作包括《With or Without You》《Beautiful Day》《Sunday Bloody Sunday》等。
items.artistIntroEn: U2 is an Irish rock band formed in Dublin in 1976. Known for grand live performances and socio-political themes, their style evolved from post-punk to alternative rock and electronic experimentation. Hits include "With or Without You," "Beautiful Day," and "Sunday Bloody Sunday."

07-05.birthdayZh: 7月5日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过U2的《Zooropa》，一张在迷幻与电子中开拓世界的专辑，提醒你人生可以大胆想象、实验、不惧偏离。愿你在属于自己的轨道上，即使偶尔抽象、偶尔孤独，也始终保持讽刺与清醒的锋利，以及温柔前行的那股力量。
07-05.birthdayEn: July 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Zooropa" by U2, an album that dared to wander into the unknown with bright, restless hope. May your new year carry that same spirit—a journey not of certainty, but of brave curiosity and electric joy. Like that music, may you feel free to experiment, to be strange and luminous. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, filled with the warmth of discovery and the steady beat of your own beautiful heart.

items.name: Wild Dances
items.descriptionZh: 《Wild Dances》是乌克兰歌手Ruslana于2004年发行的专辑，融合了喀尔巴阡山脉的民间音乐元素与现代流行舞曲节奏。核心特色在于其强劲的鼓点、民族风笛声与Ruslana充满原始能量的嗓音，营造出兼具野性魅力与庆典氛围的独特听觉体验，贴合Folk/Country流派下对传统与现代融合的探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Wild Dances" is a 2004 album by Ukrainian singer Ruslana, blending Carpathian folk music elements with modern pop-dance rhythms. Its core features lie in powerful drum beats, ethnic flute sounds, and Ruslana's raw, energetic vocals, creating a unique auditory experience combining wild charm and celebratory atmosphere, fitting the Folk/Country genre's exploration of tradition-modern fusion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Wild Dances》在2004年欧洲歌唱大赛中赢得冠军，使Ruslana一举成名。录制过程中，她深入乌克兰西部山区采风，邀请当地民间音乐人合作，将传统胡楚尔族（Hutsul）的旋律与电子编曲结合。她曾表示，专辑的野性呐喊灵感来自喀尔巴阡山脉的狂风与马蹄声。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Wild Dances" won the 2004 Eurovision Song Contest, catapulting Ruslana to fame. During recording, she traveled to western Ukrainian mountains to collect folk materials, collaborating with local Hutsul musicians to blend traditional melodies with electronic arrangements. She once said the wild shouts in the album were inspired by the winds and horse hooves of the Carpathians.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Wild Dances》是乌克兰独立后首张在全球范围内产生重大影响的流行专辑，推动了东欧民间音乐在国际舞台上的认知。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Wild Dances" was the first Ukrainian pop album to achieve major global impact after independence, boosting international recognition of Eastern European folk music.
items.artistIntroZh: Ruslana Lyzhychko（1973年生），乌克兰歌手、活动家。以融合喀尔巴阡民间音乐的流行舞曲著称，代表作《Wild Dances》赢得2004年欧洲歌唱大赛。她曾担任乌克兰议会成员，并致力于人权与环保事业。
items.artistIntroEn: Ruslana Lyzhychko (b. 1973), Ukrainian singer and activist. Known for blending Carpathian folk music with pop-dance, her代表作 "Wild Dances" won Eurovision 2004. She served as a Ukrainian parliament member and advocates for human rights and environmental causes.

items.name: The B-52's
items.descriptionZh: 《The B-52's》是美国新浪潮乐队The B-52's于1979年发行的同名首张专辑，风格属于Pop范畴但极具先锋性。核心特色包括吉他手Ricky Wilson独特的调弦法、Kate Pierson与Cindy Wilson的交替和声，以及Fred Schneider半念半唱的古怪唱腔，营造出复古冲浪摇滚与科幻B级片交织的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "The B-52's" is the 1979 debut album by American new wave band The B-52's, stylistically Pop but highly avant-garde. Core features include guitarist Ricky Wilson's unique tuning, Kate Pierson and Cindy Wilson's alternating harmonies, and Fred Schneider's half-spoken quirky vocals, creating a party atmosphere blending surf rock revival and sci-fi B-movie aesthetics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约Compass录音室，预算仅1万美元。吉他手Ricky Wilson因使用五弦吉他并采用特殊调弦（如将低音弦调高至标准音），形成了无法被其他吉他手复制的标志性音色。歌曲《Rock Lobster》的灵感来自主唱Fred Schneider在亚特兰大一家潜水酒吧看到的龙虾舞。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at New York's Compass Studios on a $10,000 budget. Guitarist Ricky Wilson used a five-string guitar with unconventional tuning (e.g., raising low strings to standard pitch), creating a signature sound no other guitarist could replicate. "Rock Lobster" was inspired by Fred Schneider witnessing a lobster dance at a dive bar in Atlanta.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为新浪潮运动奠基之作之一，直接影响了后来的独立摇滚与另类流行乐队，如REM和Pixies。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a foundational album of the new wave movement, directly influencing later indie rock and alternative pop bands like REM and Pixies.
items.artistIntroZh: The B-52's，1976年成立于美国佐治亚州雅典市的新浪潮乐队。以复古未来主义风格、冲浪摇滚节奏和古怪幽默著称，代表作包括《Rock Lobster》和《Love Shack》。2012年入选摇滚名人堂。
items.artistIntroEn: The B-52's, formed in 1976 in Athens, Georgia, USA. Known for retro-futurist style, surf rock rhythms, and quirky humor, with hits including "Rock Lobster" and "Love Shack". Inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 2012.

07-06.birthdayZh: 7月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你释放两种能量：如《Wild Dances》般炽热奔放，乌克兰的鼓点与风在脉搏里燃烧；又如《The B-52's》般奇异幽默，在冲浪的节奏里把生活唱成荒诞的诗。你生来便拥有两种光芒——既能在自己的旷野里狂舞，也能笑着把平凡的日子，编成一首不寻常的歌。
07-06.birthdayEn: July 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us with the joyful, quirky energy of The B-52’s debut album, a burst of wild party spirit and creative freedom. Like Ruslana’s Wild Dances, your life is a beautiful, rhythmic fusion of strength and grace, a dance that draws others in. May your year ahead be a celebration as vibrant as these songs—full of courage, color, and the music of your own heart. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Hot Shots II
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Shots II》是苏格兰乐队The Beta Band于2001年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格属于Electronic，融合了民谣、迷幻、嘻哈与实验电子元素。核心特色在于其松弛的节奏、采样拼贴���法以及低保真质感，营造出一种忧郁而迷离的聆听氛围，尤其以歌曲《Squares》中循环的吉他riff和破碎的鼓机节奏为标志。
items.descriptionEn: "Hot Shots II" is the 2001 second studio album by Scottish band The Beta Band, stylistically Electronic, blending folk, psychedelia, hip-hop, and experimental electronics. Core features include relaxed rhythms, collage-style sampling, and lo-fi textures, creating a melancholic and hazy atmosphere, notably marked by the looping guitar riff and fractured drum machine beat on "Squares".
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称源于乐队对续集电影（如《Hot Shots!》）的喜爱，暗示其音乐如同拼贴电影般混合各种元素。录制过程中，乐队使用了大量非传统音源，包括从老唱片、电视广播中截取的片段。歌曲《Human Being》的采样来自一部关于精神健康的纪录片，呼应了专辑中疏离与内省的主题。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from the band's fondness for sequel movies (like "Hot Shots!"), suggesting their music mixes elements like a collage film. During recording, they used extensive unconventional sound sources, including snippets from old records and TV broadcasts. The sample in "Human Being" came from a documentary about mental health, echoing the album's themes of alienation and introspection.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Shots II》被视为2000年代初英国独立电子与另类民谣融合的重要作品，影响了后来的Folktronica运动。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Hot Shots II" is regarded as a key work in early 2000s British indie-electronic and alternative folk fusion, influencing the later Folktronica movement.
items.artistIntroZh: The Beta Band，1996年成立于苏格兰的独立乐队，以融合民谣、电子、嘻哈和实验音乐著称。代表作包括专辑《The Three E.P.'s》和《Hot Shots II》。乐队于2004年解散，但被视为英伦独立音乐的重要探索者。
items.artistIntroEn: The Beta Band, formed in 1996 in Scotland, known for blending folk, electronic, hip-hop, and experimental music. Key works include "The Three E.P.'s" and "Hot Shots II". Disbanded in 2004, they are considered important explorers of British indie music.

items.name: Lucky Number
items.descriptionZh: 《Lucky Number》是台湾歌手蔡依林于2001年发行的个人第三张录音室专辑，风格属于华语流行（Pop）。核心特色在于其多元化的曲风，包括轻快的泡泡糖流行、R&B抒情以及舞曲元素，展现了蔡��林从少女偶像向多样化音乐风格的转型尝试。专辑同名主打歌《Lucky Number》旋律流畅，歌词充满积极能量。
items.descriptionEn: "Lucky Number" is the third studio album by Taiwanese singer Jolin Tsai, released in 2001, stylistically Mandopop (Pop). Core features include diversified genres such as upbeat bubblegum pop, R&B ballads, and dance elements, showcasing Tsai's transition from teen idol to more diverse musical styles. The title track "Lucky Number" features smooth melodies and uplifting lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时正值蔡依林与前经纪公司发生合约纠纷，她一度面临被雪藏的风险。为完成这张专辑，她与新的制作团队合作，在录音室中投入大量时间调整唱腔，试图摆脱早期稚嫩形象。MV拍摄中她首次尝试了较为成熟的造型，包括染发和更具时尚感的服装，标志着她个人风格的转折点。
items.storiesEn: The album was released amid a contract dispute with Tsai's former management, risking her career freeze. To complete it, she worked with a new production team, spending extensive studio time adjusting her vocal style to shed her early girlish image. In the MV shoot, she first experimented with mature looks, including dyed hair and fashionable outfits, marking a turning point in her personal style.
items.artistIntroZh: 蔡依林（1980年生），台湾华语流行歌手、演员，被誉为“亚洲流行天后”。以不断突破的舞曲风格和视觉创意著称，代表作包括《看我72变》、《舞娘》和《呸》。她多次获得金曲奖，是华语乐坛最具影响力的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Jolin Tsai (b. 1980), Taiwanese Mandopop singer and actress, known as the "Queen of Asian Pop". Renowned for boundary-pushing dance music and visual creativity, her hits include "Magic", "Dancing Diva", and "Play". A multiple Golden Melody Award winner, she is one of the most influential female artists in the Chinese music industry.

items.name: Maya
items.descriptionZh: 《Maya》是英国歌手M.I.A.于2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格属于Pop，但融合了电子、世界音乐、嘻哈与实验噪音。核心特色在于其激进的政治主题、碎片化的制作手法以及极具攻击性的音效，大量使用失真、变声和工业节奏，反映了数字时代的信息过载与混乱感。
items.descriptionEn: "Maya" is the third studio album by British singer M.I.A., released in 2010, stylistically Pop but blending electronic, world music, hip-hop, and experimental noise. Core features include radical political themes, fragmented production techniques, and aggressive soundscapes, heavily utilizing distortion, vocal manipulation, and industrial beats to reflect the information overload and chaos of the digital age.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称取自M.I.A.的本名Mathangi Arulpragasam的缩写“Maya”，也暗指印度教中的“幻象”（Maya）。录制过程中，她与制作人Rusko及Switch大量使用网络采样，包括从YouTube下载的枪声、鸟鸣等声音。她曾表示这张专辑是对互联网文化“噪音”的直接回应，并故意采用刺耳音效以挑战听众。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from M.I.A.'s birth name Mathangi Arulpragasam's abbreviation "Maya", also alluding to the Hindu concept of "illusion". During recording, she and producers Rusko and Switch extensively used internet samples, including gunshots and bird sounds downloaded from YouTube. She said the album was a direct response to the "noise" of internet culture, deliberately using harsh sounds to challenge listeners.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Maya》因其前卫的制作和对数字文化的批判而成为2010年代实验流行的重要标杆，但也因商业表现和评论分歧引发争议。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Maya" became an important benchmark for 2010s experimental pop due to its avant-garde production and critique of digital culture, though it also sparked controversy over its commercial performance and divided critical reception.
items.artistIntroZh: M.I.A.（1975年生），本名Mathangi Arulpragasam，英国歌手、制作人及视觉艺术家，祖籍斯里兰卡。以融合世界音乐、电子与嘻哈的激进风格著称，代表作包括《Paper Planes》和《Bad Girls》。她也是政治活跃分子，作品常涉及移民、战争与全球化议题。
items.artistIntroEn: M.I.A. (b. 1975), born Mathangi Arulpragasam, British singer, producer, and visual artist of Sri Lankan descent. Known for radical style blending world music, electronic, and hip-hop, with hits including "Paper Planes" and "Bad Girls". A political activist, her work often addresses immigration, war, and globalization.

07-07.birthdayZh: 7月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Hot Shots II》注入迷幻的自由，也因《Lucky Number》而闪耀勇敢的蜕变。你像七月的光，带着实验的勇气和幸运的旋律一路生长。愿你的新岁，既有实验的辽阔，也有笃定的幸运。生日快乐，永远炽热如初。
07-07.birthdayEn: July 7 is your birthday, and the universe marked it with music. On this day, The Beta Band released "Hot Shots II," a swirl of playful creativity that mirrors your own adventurous spirit. And M.I.A.'s "Maya" arrived, bold and unapologetically vibrant—just like the light you bring into every room. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own making, full of surprise verses, brave new rhythms, and the warmest choruses. Happy birthday to a true original.

items.name: The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965
items.descriptionZh: 《The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965》是迈尔斯·戴维斯于1995年发行的现场录音合集，完整收录了1965年12月在芝加哥Plugged Nickel俱乐部的四晚演出。这张作品属于后波普与前卫爵士的交汇点，核心特色在于乐队在标准曲目中即兴拆解节奏与和声结构，展现出极致的自由与张力。
items.descriptionEn: The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965 is a live recording collection by Miles Davis released in 1995, capturing four nights of performances at the Plugged Nickel club in Chicago in December 1965. Blending post-bop with avant-garde jazz, its core feature lies in the band’s radical improvisation over standard tunes, deconstructing rhythm and harmony with extreme freedom and tension.
items.storiesZh: 这套录音原本并非为发行而制作，而是由俱乐部的音响工程师私人录制。迈尔斯当时正处于从硬波普转向融合爵士的过渡期，乐队成员包括赫比·汉考克、韦恩·肖特等后来成为传奇的音乐家。由于现场气氛即兴且充满实验性，迈尔斯在演出中多次通过短促的指令改变曲目走向，这些细节都被完整保留下来。
items.storiesEn: These recordings were originally made privately by the club’s sound engineer, not intended for release. Miles was in a transitional period from hard bop to fusion, with a band featuring future legends like Herbie Hancock and Wayne Shorter. The performances were highly improvisational and experimental; Miles frequently gave brief cues to change the direction of tunes, and these raw details were all preserved.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这套录音被视为爵士乐现场即兴的巅峰文献之一，深刻影响了后来自由爵士与即兴音乐的发展方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: This set is regarded as one of the supreme documents of live jazz improvisation, profoundly influencing the development of free jazz and improvised music.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈尔斯·戴维斯（Miles Davis），美国爵士小号手、乐队领袖，被誉为20世纪最具影响力的音乐家之一。他横跨波普、酷派、融合等多种风格，代表作包括《Kind of Blue》《Bitches Brew》。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis was an American jazz trumpeter and bandleader, widely regarded as one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century. His work spanned bebop, cool jazz, and fusion, with landmark albums including Kind of Blue and Bitches Brew.

items.name: Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 《Remixes》是Yes于2003年发行的电子混音专辑，将前卫摇滚的���杂结构与电子舞曲的节拍相结合。核心特色在于邀请多位电子音乐人重新诠释Yes的经典曲目，融合氛围、浩室与碎拍元素，赋予原曲全新的俱乐部与实验色彩。
items.descriptionEn: Remixes is an electronic remix album by Yes, released in 2003, merging the complex structures of progressive rock with electronic dance beats. Its core feature lies in inviting multiple electronic artists to reinterpret Yes classics, blending ambient, house, and breakbeat elements to give the original tracks a new club-oriented and experimental edge.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于乐队成员对电子音乐的兴趣，以及希望吸引更年轻听众的愿望。混音工作由多位知名制作人参与，包括The Grid与多位地下电子艺人。由于Yes原曲的复杂节奏与和声结构，许多混音版本经历了多次返工，以确保电子元素不破坏原曲的旋律完整性。
items.storiesEn: The album originated from the band members' interest in electronic music and a desire to attract younger audiences. Remixing was handled by several notable producers, including The Grid and various underground electronic artists. Due to the complex rhythms and harmonic structures of Yes’s original songs, many remixes underwent multiple revisions to ensure the electronic elements didn’t compromise the melodic integrity.
items.artistIntroZh: Yes，英国前卫摇滚乐队，成立于1968年。他们以复杂的编曲、长篇史诗式作品和精湛的器乐演奏著称，代表作包括《Close to the Edge》《Fragile》。
items.artistIntroEn: Yes are a British progressive rock band formed in 1968. Known for their complex arrangements, epic-length compositions, and virtuosic musicianship, their landmark albums include Close to the Edge and Fragile.

07-08.birthdayZh: 7月8日，是你的生日。这一天，迈尔斯·戴维斯在《The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965》里吹响自由的和弦，每一个即兴的音符都在告诉你：生命可以像爵士乐一样，在混乱中找到属于自己的节奏。而Yes的《Remixes》则把旧旋律拆解成崭新的光芒——你也是，每一次成长都在重塑自己。生日快乐，愿你永远像这个日子一样，勇敢地即兴，温柔地翻新。
07-08.birthdayEn: July 8 is your birthday, a day that echoes with the spirit of innovation and timeless beauty. On this date, Miles Davis gifted the world The Complete Live at the Plugged Nickel 1965, a testament to fearless creativity and the magic of the moment. Like that album, your life is a live performance of grace and spontaneity. May your year ahead be a remix of your brightest memories, weaving together joy, strength, and the steady rhythm of love. Happy birthday to a soul as enduring as the music.

items.name: The Black Eyed Peas Family Best
items.descriptionZh: 《The Black Eyed Peas Family Best》是will.i.am于2008年发行的精选混音带，属于嘻哈与流行电子跨界风格。核心特色在于集结黑眼豆豆早期及中期热门曲目，融入will.i.am标志性的合成器音色、快节奏说唱和派对氛围，展现团体从地下嘻哈向全球流行巨星的转变。
items.descriptionEn: The Black Eyed Peas Family Best is a compilation mixtape by will.i.am released in 2008, blending hip-hop with pop-electronic crossover. Its core feature lies in gathering early and mid-career hits of The Black Eyed Peas, infused with will.i.am’s signature synthesizer sounds, rapid-fire rapping, and party atmosphere, showcasing the group’s evolution from underground hip-hop to global pop stardom.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带最初是为黑眼豆豆的忠实粉丝制作的非官方项目，但will.i.am在巡演期间通过个人渠道限量发行。其中收录了一些此前未公开的demo版本和现场片段，反映了团体在《Elephunk》走红前的创作状态。由于发行量极少，这张作品后来成为收藏家追捧的对象。
items.storiesEn: This mixtape was initially an unofficial project for dedicated Black Eyed Peas fans, but will.i.am released it in limited quantities through personal channels during touring. It includes previously unreleased demo versions and live snippets, reflecting the group’s creative state before their breakthrough with Elephunk. Due to its scarcity, it later became a collector’s item.
items.artistIntroZh: will.i.am，美国嘻哈音乐人、制作人，黑眼豆豆的核心成员与主创。他以融合流行、电子与嘻哈的跨界风格闻名，代表作包括《I Gotta Feeling》《Where Is the Love?》。
items.artistIntroEn: will.i.am is an American hip-hop musician and producer, the core member and creative force behind The Black Eyed Peas. Known for blending pop, electronic, and hip-hop, his representative hits include I Gotta Feeling and Where Is the Love?.

07-09.birthdayZh: 7月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了一张《The Black Eyed Peas Family Best》，混音带上跳跃着嘻哈的脉搏与放克的暖阳，仿佛在说：生命就该是一场盛大的派对，节奏由你主宰。愿你像这张精选集，在喧嚣中守住内心的节拍，将每个日子都编成自己的旋律——不慌不忙，自带光芒。
07-09.birthdayEn: July 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *The Black Eyed Peas Family Best*, a mixtape bursting with rhythm and togetherness, a reminder that life’s sweetest beats are shared. May your year ahead hum with that same vibrant spirit—a harmony of joy, resilience, and love. Like a timeless album, may you keep composing verses of wonder and choruses of laughter. Here’s to you, the soul whose very existence adds a new, unforgettable track to the music of the universe.

items.name: Judy at Carnegie Hall
items.descriptionZh: 《Judy at Carnegie Hall》是朱迪·加兰于1961年发行的现场专辑，属于传统流行与爵士演唱的经典结合。核心特色在于加兰无与伦比的舞台魅力与情感穿透力，当晚她演唱了《Over the Rainbow》《The Man That Got Away》等金曲，现场气氛热烈，被誉为其艺术生涯的巅峰现场。
items.descriptionEn: Judy at Carnegie Hall is a live album by Judy Garland released in 1961, blending traditional pop with jazz vocal performance. Its core feature lies in Garland’s unmatched stage presence and emotional intensity; that night she performed classics like Over the Rainbow and The Man That Got Away, with an electrifying atmosphere, widely regarded as the pinnacle of her live career.
items.storiesZh: 这场演出原定只演一场，但因票务需求爆满，加兰在当晚加演了第二场。录制时，加兰因紧张与健康问题几度哽咽，但观众的热情让她重新振作。专辑制作人坚持使用多轨录音捕捉现场真实感，甚至保留了加兰与观众即兴对话的片段，这些细节后来成为歌迷最珍视的部分。
items.storiesEn: The concert was originally scheduled as a single show, but due to overwhelming ticket demand, Garland performed a second show that same night. During recording, Garland was visibly nervous and struggled with health issues, but the audience’s warmth lifted her spirits. The producer insisted on multitrack recording to capture the raw live atmosphere, even preserving Garland’s spontaneous banter with the crowd—details later cherished by fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑获得多项格莱美奖，被公认为史上最伟大的现场演唱专辑之一，对后世现场录音制作标准产生深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won multiple Grammy Awards and is widely considered one of the greatest live vocal albums ever, setting a benchmark for live recording production.
items.artistIntroZh: 朱迪·加兰（Judy Garland），美国女演员、歌手，以电影《绿野仙踪》及歌曲《Over the Rainbow》闻名。她以情感充沛的嗓音和戏剧性的舞台表现著称，是20世纪最具标志性的娱乐巨星之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Judy Garland was an American actress and singer, best known for The Wizard of Oz and the song Over the Rainbow. Renowned for her emotionally charged voice and dramatic stage presence, she remains one of the most iconic entertainers of the 20th century.

items.name: Channel Orange
items.descriptionZh: 《Channel Orange》是弗兰克·欧逊于2012年发行的首张正式专辑，属于当代R&B与灵魂乐的前沿融合。核心特色在于其电影化的叙事结构、细腻的情感描绘，以及融合放克、电子和爵士元素的实验性编曲，歌词涉及爱情、物质主义和身份认同等主题。
items.descriptionEn: Channel Orange is the debut studio album by Frank Ocean, released in 2012, representing a cutting-edge fusion of contemporary R&B and soul. Its core feature lies in its cinematic storytelling, delicate emotional nuance, and experimental arrangements blending funk, electronic, and jazz elements, with lyrics exploring love, materialism, and identity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，弗兰克·欧逊曾因创作瓶颈前往日本旅行，这段经历直接影响了几首歌曲的灵感。其中《Pyramids》的创作灵感来源于他在东京夜店看到的舞者表演，而《Bad Religion》则是在一次深夜出租车行程中即兴哼唱完成的。专辑封面由欧逊本人设计，灵感来自一张废弃的汽车旅馆明信片。
items.storiesEn: During the album’s recording, Frank Ocean traveled to Japan to overcome creative block, a trip that directly inspired several songs. Pyramids was inspired by a dancer’s performance at a Tokyo nightclub, while Bad Religion was improvised during a late-night taxi ride. The album cover was designed by Ocean himself, inspired by a discarded motel postcard.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛视为2010年代R&B的里程碑之作，推动了另类R&B的���起，并对后来独立灵魂乐和嘻哈音乐的情感表达方式产生深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a landmark R&B album of the 2010s, Channel Orange catalyzed the rise of alternative R&B and profoundly influenced the emotional expression in later indie soul and hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: 弗兰克·欧逊（Frank Ocean），美国歌手、词曲作者，当代R&B与灵魂乐的重要革新者。他以私密诗意的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称，代表作包括《Channel Orange》《Blonde》。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Ocean is an American singer and songwriter, a key innovator in contemporary R&B and soul. Known for his intimate, poetic lyrics and experimental musical style, his landmark works include Channel Orange and Blonde.

07-10.birthdayZh: 7月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物——朱迪·加兰在卡内基的掌声里唱尽生命的炽热，像你一样，把脆弱活成光芒；弗兰克·奥森的《Channel Orange》则浸透深夜的孤独与温柔，教人从破碎中提炼出灵魂的琥珀。你看，连历史都记得：你要相信，自己值得被这样认真地庆祝。
07-10.birthdayEn: July 10 is your birthday. Like Judy Garland live at Carnegie Hall, may your year feel electric, full of warmth and standing ovations. You are the channel for all the colors you love, much like the soulful, radiant spirit of *Channel Orange*. On this day, the world celebrates your existence—a rare and beautiful album only you could compose. May the melody of your life be rich, bold, and unapologetically yours. Happy birthday to the star.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是瑞奇·马丁于2011年发行的精选集，汇集了他从1990年代至2010年代初的流行金曲。专辑以拉丁流行（Latin Pop）为基底，融合舞曲与成人抒情风格，收录了《Livin' la Vida Loca》、《She Bangs》等标志性热单，展现了他作为“拉丁流行天王”的跨文化魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is a 2011 compilation album by Ricky Martin, gathering his biggest pop hits from the 1990s to early 2010s. Blending Latin pop with dance and adult contemporary, it features iconic tracks like 'Livin' la Vida Loca' and 'She Bangs,' showcasing his cross-cultural appeal as a Latin pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，瑞奇·马丁已公开出柜（2010年），专辑的推出被视为他职业生涯新阶段的象征。此外，专辑中收录了与娜塔莉亚·奥雷罗（Natalia Oreiro）合作的《Que Día Es Hoy》（Remix），这首歌曲原本是马丁1998年专辑中的作品，此次重新编曲致敬了他的拉丁根源。
items.storiesEn: Released shortly after Ricky Martin came out publicly in 2010, this compilation symbolized a new chapter in his career. It also includes a remix of 'Que Día Es Hoy' featuring Natalia Oreiro, originally from his 1998 album, reworked to honor his Latin roots.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为拉丁流行音乐全球化的里程碑人物，瑞奇·马丁的精选集进一步巩固了他作为1990年代末至2000年代初跨文化偶像的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a milestone figure in the globalization of Latin pop, Ricky Martin's greatest hits collection solidified his status as a cross-cultural icon from the late 1990s to early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 瑞奇·马丁（Ricky Martin），波多黎各歌手、演员，被誉为“拉丁流行天王”。1999年以单曲《Livin' la Vida Loca》席卷全球，代表作包括《She Bangs》、《Maria》等。他融合拉丁节奏与流行舞曲的风格，推动了拉丁音乐在国际主流市场的崛起。
items.artistIntroEn: Ricky Martin is a Puerto Rican singer and actor, known as the 'King of Latin Pop.' He conquered the world in 1999 with 'Livin' la Vida Loca,' with other hits including 'She Bangs' and 'Maria.' His fusion of Latin rhythms with pop dance music propelled Latin music into the global mainstream.

07-11.birthdayZh: 7月11日，是你的生日。这一天，天空曾为《Greatest Hits》铺开旋律——那些歌像你走过的路，有独立摇滚的倔强，也有流行旋律的温柔。它们说：最动人的精选集，不是筛选过去，而是把每一次成长都酿成光。愿你像这张专辑一样，在岁月里越走越丰厚，每一步都踏出属于自己的回响。
07-11.birthdayEn: July 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the timeless "Greatest Hits," a collection of moments that echo your own journey—each track a memory, a triumph, a gentle reminder of how far you’ve come. Like that album, your life blends harmonies of joy and reflection, creating something uniquely beautiful. May this new year play on, filled with chart-topping smiles and quiet, soulful sunsets. You are a masterpiece in the making, and today, the music is all yours.

items.name: Eliza Doolittle
items.descriptionZh: 《Eliza》是英国歌手Eliza Doolittle于2010年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为轻快的流行乐（Pop），融合了爵士、灵魂与民谣元素。专辑以清新灵动的旋律和俏皮的歌词为特色，如《Pack Up》���《Skinny Genes》，展现了英国独立流行（Indie Pop）的精致质感。
items.descriptionEn: Eliza is the 2010 debut studio album by British singer Eliza Doolittle, featuring upbeat pop with jazz, soul, and folk influences. Known for its breezy melodies and witty lyrics, tracks like 'Pack Up' and 'Skinny Genes' showcase a refined indie pop sensibility.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Eliza》直接取自艺名，但她的本名是Eliza Sophie Caird。录制过程中，她与制作人Matt Hales（Aqualung）在伦敦的录音室里即兴创作了大量素材，其中《Pack Up》的副歌采样自二战时期英国歌曲《Pack Up Your Troubles》，这一创意源于她祖父的收藏唱片。
items.storiesEn: The album is titled after her stage name, though her real name is Eliza Sophie Caird. During recording, she and producer Matt Hales (Aqualung) improvised extensively in a London studio. 'Pack Up' samples the WWII British song 'Pack Up Your Troubles,' inspired by her grandfather's vinyl collection.
items.artistIntroZh: Eliza Doolittle���本名Eliza Sophie Caird），英国女歌手、词曲作者，以轻快俏皮的流行风格著称。2010年同名专辑《Eliza》在英国获得白金销量，代表作《Pack Up》成为夏日热门单曲。她的音乐常融合爵士与灵魂元素，被誉为“英伦复古流行代表”。
items.artistIntroEn: Eliza Doolittle (born Eliza Sophie Caird) is a British singer-songwriter known for her lighthearted, quirky pop style. Her 2010 self-titled album went platinum in the UK, with 'Pack Up' becoming a summer hit. Her music often blends jazz and soul, earning her a reputation as a British retro-pop artist.

07-12.birthdayZh: 7月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾播下一张名为《Eliza Doolittle》的唱片，它像夏日清晨的第一缕光，活泼、轻盈，带着爵士的俏皮和雷鬼的洒脱。那些旋律仿佛在说，生命不必沉重，幽默与清新自有一种力量。愿你如这张专辑般，在属于自己的季节里，即便踏着轻快的节拍，也能走出坚定而明亮的脚步。
07-12.birthdayEn: July 12 is your birthday, a date that carries its own sunny soundtrack. On this day, the world received Eliza Doolittle’s self-titled album, a bright blend of jazz, reggae, and folk that feels like a gentle breeze and a skip in your step. May your year ahead be filled with that same lighthearted melody—unexpected harmonies, warm rhythms, and the simple joy of finding your own voice. Happy birthday to a soul whose spirit is as uplifting as the music that celebrates you.

items.name: An Airplane Carried Me to Bed
items.descriptionZh: 《An Airplane Carried Me to Bed》是Sky Sailing（美国歌手Adam Young的化名）于2010年发行的首张也是唯一一张录音室专辑。风格为梦幻流行（Dream Pop）结合独立流行（Indie Pop），以轻柔的原声吉他和合成器营造出云端的空灵感，歌词充满对飞行与童年回忆的怀旧。
items.descriptionEn: An Airplane Carried Me to Bed is the sole studio album by Sky Sailing, a side project of American singer Adam Young, released in 2010. It blends dream pop with indie pop, using gentle acoustic guitars and synths to create an ethereal, airborne atmosphere, with lyrics nostalgic for flight and childhood.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Adam Young在Owl City成名前创作的歌曲的重新录制版。2007年，他在明尼苏达州父母家的地下室用简陋设备录制了这些demo，后因Owl City的突然成功而搁置。2010年，他决定以Sky Sailing名义发行这些作品，专辑名源于他童年时对飞机窗外风景的迷恋。
items.storiesEn: This album consists of re-recorded songs Adam Young wrote before his fame as Owl City. In 2007, he recorded demos in his parents' basement in Minnesota, which were shelved after Owl City's sudden success. In 2010, he released them under the name Sky Sailing, the title inspired by his childhood fascination with views from airplane windows.
items.artistIntroZh: Sky Sailing是美国音乐人Adam Young（以Owl City闻名）的个人化名，专注于柔和梦幻的独立流行。Adam Young来自明尼苏达州，以电子流行项目Owl City的《Fireflies》全球爆红。Sky Sailing展现了他更原声、更私密的一面，代表作即专辑同名曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Sky Sailing is a moniker of American musician Adam Young, best known as Owl City, focusing on soft, dreamy indie pop. Hailing from Minnesota, he achieved global fame with Owl City's 'Fireflies.' Sky Sailing reveals a more acoustic, intimate side of his artistry, with the title track as its hallmark.

07-13.birthdayZh: 7月13日，是你的生日。这一天，天空曾为你降下温柔的礼物——专辑《An Airplane Carried Me to Bed》里，每一首歌都像一阵风托住你，让疲惫的心漂浮在云朵上安睡。愿你像那架飞机，即使穿过阴雨，也能被梦轻轻接住，降落在属于自己的光里。生日快乐，愿这一年有诗，有歌，有稳稳的云。
07-13.birthdayEn: July 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "An Airplane Carried Me to Bed" by Sky Sailing, a soft acoustic dream that floats like a gentle breeze. May your new year be carried on that same delicate, hopeful air, where every moment feels like a melody just waiting to unfold. Let the lightness of its spirit remind you that you are held by the music of life itself. Here’s to a year as tender and beautiful as the songs that welcome you home.

items.name: Alright, Still
items.descriptionZh: 《Alright, Still》是英国歌手Lily Allen于2006年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为流行（Pop）融合斯卡（Ska）、雷鬼（Reggae）与电子元素。专辑以直白幽默的歌词和朗朗上口的旋律著称，如《Smile》和《LDN》，刻画了伦敦青年的日常生活与情感纠葛。
items.descriptionEn: Alright, Still is the 2006 debut album by British singer Lily Allen, blending pop with ska, reggae, and electronic elements. Known for its witty, candid lyrics and catchy melodies, tracks like 'Smile' and 'LDN' portray the everyday lives and emotional struggles of London youth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《Lily Allen Isn't Funny》，后改为《Alright, Still》。录制期间，Lily Allen曾因与制作人Mark Ronson的合作理念不合而争吵，但最终妥协。单曲《Smile》采样自灵魂乐组合The Soul Brothers的《Free Soul》，这首歌的爆红让她从MySpace网络歌手一跃成为英国流行新星。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally titled 'Lily Allen Isn't Funny' before being changed to 'Alright, Still.' During recording, Allen clashed with producer Mark Ronson over creative direction but eventually compromised. 'Smile' samples 'Free Soul' by The Soul Brothers; its viral success turned her from a MySpace artist into a UK pop sensation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为2000年代中期英国“新女性流行”浪潮的开端，影响了后续如Kate Nash、Adele等艺人的直白歌词风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered the starting point of the mid-2000s UK 'new female pop' wave, influencing the candid lyrical style of subsequent artists like Kate Nash and Adele.
items.artistIntroZh: 莉莉·艾伦（Lily Allen），英国女歌手、词曲作者，以直言不讳的歌词和融合斯卡、雷鬼的流行风格闻名。2006年出道专辑《Alright, Still》大获成功，代表作包括《Smile》、《The Fear》。她常以幽默讽刺的视角评论社会与情感话题，被誉为“英伦流行反叛者”。
items.artistIntroEn: Lily Allen is a British singer-songwriter known for her outspoken lyrics and pop infused with ska and reggae. Her 2006 debut 'Alright, Still' was a major success, with hits like 'Smile' and 'The Fear.' She often offers humorous, satirical takes on social and emotional issues, earning her a reputation as a British pop rebel.

items.name: The Boy Is Mine
items.descriptionZh: 《The Boy Is Mine》是美国R&B歌手Monica于1998年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格为当代R&B（Contemporary R&B）与流行（Pop）的融合。专辑以同名单曲《The Boy Is Mine》（与Brandy合唱）为核心，展现了Monica成熟的嗓音与情感张力，同时包含《The First Night》等节奏蓝调热单。
items.descriptionEn: The Boy Is Mine is the 1998 second studio album by American R&B singer Monica, blending contemporary R&B with pop. Centered on the title track 'The Boy Is Mine' (a duet with Brandy), it showcases Monica's mature vocals and emotional depth, alongside R&B hits like 'The First Night.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《The Boy Is Mine》是Monica与Brandy的经典合作，但两人在录制前并不熟悉。制作人Rodney Jerkins促成了这次合作，歌词灵感源于当时媒体对两位年轻女歌手“竞争”的炒作。歌曲在1998年成为史上最成功的R&B合唱之一，并帮助Monica摆脱了童星标签。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'The Boy Is Mine' was a landmark duet between Monica and Brandy, who barely knew each other before recording. Producer Rodney Jerkins orchestrated the collaboration, with lyrics inspired by media hype around their supposed rivalry. The song became one of the biggest R&B duets ever in 1998, helping Monica shed her child-star image.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Boy Is Mine》单曲与专辑标志着1990年代末R&B女声对决的文化现象，并推动了跨厂牌合作的商业成功模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: The single and album 'The Boy Is Mine' epitomized the late-1990s R&B female rivalry phenomenon and popularized cross-label collaborations as a commercial strategy.
items.artistIntroZh: Monica（全名Monica Denise Arnold），美国R&B歌手、演员，1995年以童星身份出道。1998年专辑《The Boy Is Mine》全球销量超400万张，同名合唱曲成为经典。她的音乐以情感充沛的R&B情歌著称，代表作包括《Angel of Mine》、《So Gone》。
items.artistIntroEn: Monica (full name Monica Denise Arnold) is an American R&B singer and actress who debuted as a child star in 1995. Her 1998 album 'The Boy Is Mine' sold over 4 million copies worldwide, with the title duet becoming a classic. She is known for emotionally charged R&B ballads, with hits including 'Angel of Mine' and 'So Gone.'

07-14.birthdayZh: 7月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两份礼物：一份是《Alright, Still》里明快的节拍，告诉你不必慌张，一切都会安好；另一份是《The Boy Is Mine》中坚定的嗓音，提醒你值得被珍视。愿你在新的一岁里，既有从容独立的锋芒，也有温柔接纳的底气。
07-14.birthdayEn: July 14 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the bold, joyful energy of Lily Allen’s Alright, Still, an album that dances through life with wit and bounce. Like Monica’s The Boy Is Mine, your day carries a smooth, heartfelt warmth, a melody of grace and quiet strength. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of its own, filled with upbeat rhythms, tender notes, and the sweetest surprises. Happy birthday—you are a song the world is lucky to hear.

items.name: The Greatest Story Ever Told
items.descriptionZh: 《The Greatest Story Ever Told》是美国南方说唱歌手David Banner的第四张录音室专辑，属于硬核嘻哈风格，融合了南方说唱的厚重贝斯与政治意识强烈的歌词。专辑以叙事性为主线，探讨种族、贫困和社会不公等议题，音乐上大量采用灵魂乐采样和交响乐元素，营造出史诗般的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "The Greatest Story Ever Told" is the fourth studio album by American Southern rapper David Banner, featuring hardcore hip-hop with heavy bass and politically charged lyrics. It combines Southern rap with soul samples and orchestral elements to create an epic, narrative-driven sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，David Banner因飓风卡特里娜的影响被迫离开家乡密西西比州，这段流离失所的经历深刻影响了专辑的创作主题。他在采访中透露，专辑中多首歌曲是在临时租用的录音室里完成的，制作过程中他坚持使用现场乐队来增强音乐的原始力量。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, David Banner was displaced from his home state of Mississippi due to Hurricane Katrina, an experience that deeply influenced the album's themes. He revealed in interviews that many tracks were recorded in temporary studios, and he insisted on using live bands to enhance the raw power of the music.
items.artistIntroZh: David Banner，美国南方说唱歌手、制作人兼社会活动家，生于密西西比州。他以硬核嘻哈风格著称，代表作包括《Mississippi: The Album》和《The Greatest Story Ever Told》，歌词常聚焦种族正义与社会议题。
items.artistIntroEn: David Banner is an American Southern rapper, producer, and activist from Mississippi. Known for his hardcore hip-hop style, his notable works include "Mississippi: The Album" and "The Greatest Story Ever Told," with lyrics often addressing racial justice and social issues.

items.name: Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1》是韩国流行歌手Psy的第六张录音室专辑，也是他全球爆红前的关键作品。专辑主打流行舞曲风格，融合了电子、嘻哈和韩国传统音乐元素，节奏明快、旋律洗脑，代表曲目《江南Style》后来成为全球现象级单曲。
items.descriptionEn: "Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1" is the sixth studio album by South Korean pop singer Psy, a key work before his global breakthrough. It features upbeat pop dance music with electronic, hip-hop, and traditional Korean elements, with the lead single "Gangnam Style" later becoming a worldwide phenomenon.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中《江南Style》的MV拍摄仅花费约8万美元，原本只是为韩国国内市场制作。Psy在节目中提到，他并没有预料到这首歌会火遍全球，MV中的骑马舞是他即兴创作的舞蹈动作，灵感来自在江南区观察到的富人生活方式。
items.storiesEn: The music video for "Gangnam Style" was made on a budget of about $80,000, originally intended only for the Korean market. Psy later said he never expected the song to become a global hit, and the horse-riding dance was an improvised move inspired by the lifestyles of the wealthy in the Gangnam district.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《江南Style》成为首支在YouTube突破10亿次播放量的视频，引发全球范围内的模仿热潮，推动了K-pop在国际市场的突破性发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Gangnam Style" became the first YouTube video to surpass one billion views, sparking a global dance craze and significantly boosting K-pop's international breakthrough.
items.artistIntroZh: Psy（朴载相），韩国流行歌手、词曲作者，生于首尔。以幽默夸张的表演风格和洗脑旋律闻名，代表作《江南Style》创下多项世界纪录，���K-pop全球化的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Psy (Park Jae-sang) is a South Korean pop singer and songwriter from Seoul. Known for his humorous, over-the-top performances and catchy melodies, his hit "Gangnam Style" set multiple world records and made him a key figure in K-pop's globalization.

07-15.birthdayZh: 7月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过许多故事——David Banner在《The Greatest Story Ever Told》里把灵魂揉进节拍，告诉你再硬的现实也能开出福音般的花。而Psy的《Psy 6》教会人如何在喧嚣中跳自己的舞。你也是这故事的主角：带着与生俱来的节奏，把每个平凡的日子，都活成属于自己的伟大乐章。
07-15.birthdayEn: July 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us David Banner’s “The Greatest Story Ever Told,” a testament to rising from struggle with power and truth, and Psy’s “Psy 6 (Six Rules), Part 1,” a bold, joyful rhythm that dares you to dance through life. May your new year carry that same spirit—resilient as a story still unfolding, and lighthearted as a beat that won’t quit. Here’s to you, the heart of your own greatest tale. Happy birthday.

07-16.birthdayZh: 7月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《月之暗面》，提醒我们生命本就是光的背面与暗处共舞；也有《Tango in the Night》在心底奏起，像知道每个深夜的辗转终会化作黎明前的舞步。你来到世界的那天，万物已经准备好旋律——愿你像被这些专辑拥抱过的人，在暗面里找到勇气，在夜色里踏出属于自己的节拍。生日快乐。
07-16.birthdayEn: July 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the raw electric spirit of The Stooges’ debut album and the soulful, hopeful pulse of Stevie Wonder’s Songs in the Key of Life. Like those records, your life is a powerful blend of wild energy and deep, joyful harmony. May this new year echo with your own unique melody—unruly, radiant, and full of heart. Let the music of your days be a celebration of all you are.

items.name: Aaliyah
items.descriptionZh: 《Aaliyah》是美国R&B女歌手Aaliyah的同名第三张录音室专辑，也是她生前完成的最后一张作品。专辑融合了当代R&B、流行和嘻哈元素，制作人包括Timbaland和Missy Elliott，以流畅的旋律、前卫的节拍和Aaliyah轻柔而充满律动的嗓音为特色。
items.descriptionEn: "Aaliyah" is the self-titled third and final studio album by American R&B singer Aaliyah, completed before her untimely death. It blends contemporary R&B, pop, and hip-hop, produced by Timbaland and Missy Elliott, featuring smooth melodies, futuristic beats, and Aaliyah's soft yet rhythmic vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Aaliyah与制作人Timbaland、Missy Elliott形成了紧密的创作铁三角。她坚持专辑名称只用“Aaliyah”一个字，以表达这张作品最个人化的情感。不幸的是，专辑发行后仅一个月，Aaliyah在巴���马拍摄MV后因飞机坠毁去世，使这张专辑成为她的遗作。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Aaliyah formed a tight creative trio with producers Timbaland and Missy Elliott. She insisted on titling the album simply "Aaliyah" to express its deeply personal nature. Tragically, just one month after its release, Aaliyah died in a plane crash after filming a music video in the Bahamas, making this her final album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为2000年代初R&B的里程碑之作，影响了后来的许多R&B和流行歌手，如Beyoncé和Rihanna。Aaliyah的去世也促使业界加强了对小型飞机安全的关注。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone in early 2000s R&B, influencing later artists like Beyoncé and Rihanna. Aaliyah's death also prompted increased industry awareness of small aircraft safety.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah（1979-2001），美国R&B歌手、演员，生于纽约布鲁克林。以融合R&B与嘻哈的风格著称，代表作包括《One in a Million》和《Aaliyah》，是2000年代初最具影响力的R&B女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah (1979-2001) was an American R&B singer and actress from Brooklyn, New York. Known for blending R&B with hip-hop, her notable works include "One in a Million" and "Aaliyah," making her one of the most influential R&B singers of the early 2000s.

items.name: Beautiful Friction
items.descriptionZh: 《Beautiful Friction》是英国摇滚乐队The Fixx的第十张录音室专辑，属于流行摇滚风格。专辑延续了乐队80年代新浪潮的根基，同时加入了更成熟的吉他编曲和电子元素，歌词探讨人际关系与社会矛盾，旋律流畅而富有层次感。
items.descriptionEn: "Beautiful Friction" is the tenth studio album by British rock band The Fixx, in the pop rock style. It retains the band's new wave roots from the 1980s while incorporating mature guitar arrangements and electronic elements, with lyrics exploring relationships and social tensions, featuring smooth, layered melodies.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是乐队在经历长时间休整后重新集结的作品，录制过程跨越了美国和英国两地。主唱Cy Curnin透露，专辑名称“Beautiful Friction”来源于乐队成员之间在创作理念上的碰撞，最终这些分歧被转化为音乐上的灵感。
items.storiesEn: This album marked the band's reunion after a long hiatus, with recording sessions taking place in both the US and the UK. Lead singer Cy Curnin revealed that the album title "Beautiful Friction" came from the creative clashes among band members, which ultimately turned into musical inspiration.
items.artistIntroZh: The Fixx，英国摇滚乐队，1979年成立于伦敦。以80年代新浪潮和流行摇滚风格闻名，代表作包括《One Thing Leads to Another》和《Red Skies》，是英国新浪潮运动的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Fixx is a British rock band formed in London in 1979. Known for their new wave and pop rock style, their notable hits include "One Thing Leads to Another" and "Red Skies," making them key figures in the British new wave movement.

07-17.birthdayZh: 7月17日，是你的生日。就像《Aaliyah》唱出的暗黑中的光芒，你拥有着前行的勇气与温柔；也如《Beautiful Friction》所寓意，那些与世界的摩擦，终将打磨出你独特的光泽。这个日子因你而特别，愿你像那些旋律一样，在岁月里沉淀出最动人的回响。
07-17.birthdayEn: July 17 is your birthday, a date that shines with the release of two albums that capture your spirit. Like Aaliyah’s self-titled masterpiece, may your year be filled with soulful grace and quiet strength. And like The Fixx’s Beautiful Friction, may you find harmony in life’s gentle challenges, turning every moment into music. You are a rare melody, born on a day that history celebrates. Wishing you a year as luminous and timeless as your heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Dreaming of You
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreaming of You》是美国Tejano/R&B女歌手Selena的第五张录音室专辑，也是她去世后发行的遗作。专辑融合了R&B、灵魂乐和拉丁流行风格，展现了Selena跨越语言和文化的音乐魅力，包含英语和西班牙语歌曲，旋律深情而动人。
items.descriptionEn: "Dreaming of You" is the fifth studio album by American Tejano/R&B singer Selena, released posthumously. It blends R&B, soul, and Latin pop, showcasing Selena's cross-cultural musical appeal with both English and Spanish songs, featuring heartfelt and moving melodies.
items.storiesZh: Selena原本计划通过这张专辑正式进军英语市场，录制工作在1995年初就已开始。然而，1995年3月31日，她被前粉丝俱乐部主席Yolanda Saldívar枪杀，专辑尚未完成。乐队和制作人根据她留下的录音素材完成了后期制作��专辑发行后迅速登顶公告牌专辑榜。
items.storiesEn: Selena had planned to use this album to officially break into the English-language market, with recording starting in early 1995. However, on March 31, 1995, she was shot and killed by former fan club president Yolanda Saldívar, leaving the album unfinished. The band and producers completed the post-production using her existing recordings, and the album quickly topped the Billboard charts upon release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是首张在公告牌200强专辑榜夺冠的拉丁歌手专辑，进一步巩固了Selena作为拉丁音乐跨界先驱的地位，也推动了Tejano音乐在全球的认知。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was the first by a Latin artist to debut at number one on the Billboard 200, cementing Selena's legacy as a pioneer of Latin music crossover and boosting global recognition of Tejano music.
items.artistIntroZh: Selena（1971-1995），美国Tejano/R&B女歌手，生于得克萨斯州。被誉为“Tejano音乐女王”，代表作包括《Amor Prohibido》和《Dreaming of You》，是拉丁音乐跨界流行文化的先驱人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Selena (1971-1995) was an American Tejano/R&B singer from Texas. Known as the "Queen of Tejano Music," her notable works include "Amor Prohibido" and "Dreaming of You," making her a pioneer in bringing Latin music into mainstream pop culture.

items.name: In the Maybe World
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Maybe World》是Lisa Germano于2006年发行的民谣/乡村风格专辑。作品以极简的吉他、钢琴和弦乐为基底，融合了低吟浅唱的脆弱人声，呈现出一种阴郁而内省的氛围。核心特色在于Germano标志性的私密叙事与细腻情感表达，将乡村音乐的质朴与民谣的诗意完美结合。
items.descriptionEn: "In the Maybe World" is a folk/country album by Lisa Germano released in 2006. It features minimalist guitar, piano, and strings, combined with fragile, whispered vocals, creating a melancholic and introspective atmosphere. Its core lies in Germano's signature intimate storytelling and delicate emotional expression, blending the simplicity of country with the poetry of folk.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程十分个人化，Lisa Germano在自家卧室中完成了大部分录音。她曾透露，专辑中的歌曲大多源于深夜的即兴创作，有时甚至只录了一次就决定保留。制作人Malcolm Burn（曾与Bob Dylan合作）特意保留了这些粗糙的原始质感，以捕捉情感的真实瞬间。
items.storiesEn: Most of this album was recorded in Lisa Germano's bedroom. She revealed that the songs often came from late-night improvisations, sometimes keeping the first take. Producer Malcolm Burn (who worked with Bob Dylan) deliberately preserved the raw textures to capture authentic emotional moments.
items.artistIntroZh: Lisa Germano，美国创作女歌手，风格以民谣、另类乡村和梦幻流行为主。她曾是John Mellencamp乐队的成员，后以个人作品闻名。代表作包括《Geek the Girl》和《In the Maybe World》，以其脆弱而深刻的歌词著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Lisa Germano is an American singer-songwriter known for folk, alternative country, and dream pop. She was a member of John Mellencamp's band and later gained acclaim for her solo work, including "Geek the Girl" and "In the Maybe World," celebrated for her fragile yet profound lyrics.

07-18.birthdayZh: 7月18日，是你的生日。这一天，有《Dreaming of You》在时光里低语，提醒你，跨界需要勇气，但温柔从不设限。也有《In the Maybe World》的旋律，像在说，脆弱也是力量的一部分。愿你在自己的可能世界里，既敢做梦，也敢停留。生日快乐，愿你被世界拥抱。
07-18.birthdayEn: July 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and it also welcomed music that dreams as beautifully as you do. Like Selena’s Dreaming of You, may your year be filled with heartfelt passion and tender ambition. And like Lisa Germano’s In the Maybe World, may you wander through life’s quiet, lovely possibilities with courage and grace. You are a melody all your own—here’s to another year of creating your own unforgettable song.

07-19.birthdayZh: 7月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Wall》的坚硬与自由，也曾在《Nevermind》的青春呐喊中找到另一种温柔。你降生的日子，注定要带着冲破藩篱的勇气，去爱这个不够完美却值得拥抱的世界。像那些旋律一样，你也能在属于自己的节拍里，长成一座温柔而坚固的灯塔。
07-19.birthdayEn: July 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw, driving spirit of Tom Petty’s "Damn the Torpedoes," a testament to charging forward with full heart, and the shimmering, hopeful dreamscape of Fleetwood Mac’s "Tusk," proof that bold, messy creativity can be beautiful. May your new year feel like that—a fearless, wild, wonderful adventure. Here’s to the music only you can make, and to the light this world gains simply because you are in it.

items.name: Quality Control
items.descriptionZh: 《Quality Control》是Jurassic 5于2000年发行的嘻哈专辑，属于西海岸另类嘻哈风格。作品以精妙的节拍、流畅的集体轮唱和怀旧的采样著称，核心特色在于四位MC与两位DJ之间的完美配合，以及歌词中强调的嘻哈文化根源与正向信息，避免了主流说唱中的暴力与物质主义。
items.descriptionEn: "Quality Control" is a 2000 hip-hop album by Jurassic 5, rooted in West Coast alternative hip-hop. It features intricate beats, smooth group harmonies, and nostalgic sampling. Its core is the seamless interplay between four MCs and two DJs, with lyrics emphasizing hip-hop's roots and positive messages, avoiding mainstream violence and materialism.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满团队协作精神。成员们经常在录音室里即兴交换歌词，有时一首歌会由多人轮流主控。值得一提的是，单曲《Quality Control》的副歌采样自老派嘻哈团体The Sequence的歌曲，而DJ Nu-Mark和Cut Chemist为了找到完美的鼓点，反复调试了上百种老唱片样本。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded with strong teamwork. Members often traded verses improvising in the studio. Notably, the hook of "Quality Control" samples an old-school hip-hop group The Sequence. DJs Nu-Mark and Cut Chemist tested hundreds of vinyl samples to find the perfect drum break.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为90年代末至2000年代初西海岸另类嘻哈复兴的代表作，影响了后来如Atmosphere等独立说唱团体。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a landmark of the late-90s/early-2000s West Coast alternative hip-hop revival, influencing later indie rap groups like Atmosphere.
items.artistIntroZh: Jurassic 5，美国嘻��团体，成立于1993年，由四位MC（Chali 2na, Zaakir, Soup, Marc 7）和两位DJ（Nu-Mark, Cut Chemist）组成。风格以老派嘻哈、爵士说唱和集体轮唱为特色，代表作包括《Quality Control》和《Power in Numbers》。
items.artistIntroEn: Jurassic 5 is an American hip-hop group formed in 1993, comprising four MCs (Chali 2na, Zaakir, Soup, Marc 7) and two DJs (Nu-Mark, Cut Chemist). Known for old-school hip-hop, jazz rap, and group harmonies, their key albums include "Quality Control" and "Power in Numbers."

items.name: Sheffield
items.descriptionZh: 《Sheffield》是Scooter于2000年发行的电子音乐专辑，属于硬核舞曲（Hardcore Techno）和快乐硬核（Happy Hardcore）风格。作品以高速的鼓点、激昂的合成器旋律和反复的副歌口号为特色，核心在于其极具爆发力的现场能量和标志性的“叫喊式”人声采样，完美体现了德国电子舞曲的狂热与直白。
items.descriptionEn: "Sheffield" is a 2000 electronic album by Scooter, rooted in hardcore techno and happy hardcore. It features fast-paced beats, euphoric synth melodies, and repetitive chant-like hooks. Its core is the explosive live energy and signature shouted vocal samples, epitomizing the frenetic and direct style of German electronic dance music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Sheffield》致敬了英国谢菲尔德市的电子音乐场景，Scooter主唱H.P. Baxxter曾在采访中表示，该城市的工业氛围与硬核舞曲的精神高度契合。录制过程中，团队特意在专辑中加入了一段模拟谢菲尔德有轨电车的声音采样，以增添地域色彩。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Sheffield" pays homage to the UK city's electronic music scene. Frontman H.P. Baxxter said in interviews that the city's industrial vibe matched hardcore techno's spirit. The team added a sample of Sheffield's tram sounds to the album for local flavor.
items.artistIntroZh: Scooter，德国电子舞曲团体，成立于1993年，以硬核舞曲和快乐硬核风格闻名。主唱H.P. Baxxter以其尖锐的嗓音和夸张的舞台表演著称。代表作包括《Hyper Hyper》、《How Much Is the Fish?》和专辑《Sheffield》。
items.artistIntroEn: Scooter is a German electronic dance group formed in 1993, known for hardcore techno and happy hardcore. Frontman H.P. Baxxter is famous for his sharp vocals and flamboyant stage presence. Key hits include "Hyper Hyper," "How Much Is the Fish?" and the album "Sheffield."

07-20.birthdayZh: 7月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Quality Control》的节拍——那是关于创造与自由的交响，提醒你生来就是自己人生的主宰。而《Sheffield》的电子浪潮里，藏着永不熄灭的欢快力量。像那些旋律一样，你可以轻盈地奔跑，也可以深沉地扎根。愿你的岁月，始终在属于自己的节奏里，开出温暖的花。
07-20.birthdayEn: July 20 is your birthday. On this day, the universe gifted the world not only you but also the timeless, soulful groove of Jurassic 5’s "Quality Control," a reminder to move through life with harmony and purpose. And the unstoppable energy of Scooter’s "Sheffield" echoes the wild, electric pulse of your spirit. May your year ahead be a beautiful blend of grounded beats and fearless highs, where every moment feels like a celebration of the radiant, unforgettable person you are. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sons of Koop
items.descriptionZh: 《Sons of Koop》是瑞典电子双人组Koop于1997年发行的首张专辑，属于电子音乐中的缓拍（Downtempo）和爵士电子（Electro-Jazz）风格。作品以温暖的模拟合成器、慵懒的爵士采样和精致的节拍为特色，核心在于将爵士乐的即兴灵魂与电子音乐的精确编排融为一体，营造出一种优雅而迷离的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Sons of Koop" is the 1997 debut album by Swedish electronic duo Koop, blending downtempo and electro-jazz. It features warm analog synths, lazy jazz samples, and meticulous beats. Its core merges jazz's improvisational soul with electronic precision, creating an elegant, hazy atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Koop的两位成员Magnus Zingmark和Oscar Simonsson因预算有限，只能在斯德哥尔摩一间狭小的地下室录音室工作。他们从二手唱片店淘来大量老爵士黑胶，手动剪辑采样。其中一首歌的鼓点采样自一位不知名的瑞典爵士鼓手，后来他们发现这位鼓手竟是当地一位退休的公交车司机。
items.storiesEn: Due to a limited budget, Koop's Magnus Zingmark and Oscar Simonsson recorded in a tiny basement studio in Stockholm. They bought old jazz vinyls from second-hand shops and manually cut samples. One track's drum sample came from an unknown Swedish jazz drummer, who later turned out to be a retired bus driver.
items.artistIntroZh: Koop，瑞典电子音乐二人组，由Magnus Zingmark和Oscar Simonsson组成，以缓拍和爵士电子风格闻名。作品融合了爵士、拉丁和电子元素，代表作包括《Waltz for Koop》和专辑《Sons of Koop》。
items.artistIntroEn: Koop is a Swedish electronic duo consisting of Magnus Zingmark and Oscar Simonsson, known for downtempo and electro-jazz. Their music blends jazz, Latin, and electronic elements. Key works include "Waltz for Koop" and the album "Sons of Koop."

items.name: I Can See Clearly Now
items.descriptionZh: 《I Can See Clearly Now》是Johnny Nash于1972年发行的雷鬼/世界音乐风格专辑。作品以流畅的雷鬼节奏、温暖的吉他扫弦和Nash清亮而富有感染力的嗓音为特色，核心在于将雷鬼的律动与流行旋律完美结合。同名主打歌以其乐观的歌词和朗朗上口的副歌成为经典。
items.descriptionEn: "I Can See Clearly Now" is a 1972 reggae/world music album by Johnny Nash. It features smooth reggae rhythms, warm guitar strums, and Nash's clear, soulful vocals. Its core combines reggae's groove with pop melodies. The title track became a classic for its optimistic lyrics and catchy chorus.
items.storiesZh: 录制过程中，Johnny Nash特意前往牙买加金斯敦的Dynamic Sounds录音室，与当地顶尖雷鬼乐手合作。这首歌原本是为电影《Cool Runnings》创作，但最终被用于多部影视作品。Nash曾透露，歌词灵感来源于他某次长途飞行后，在加勒比海看到阳光穿透云层的瞬间。
items.storiesEn: Johnny Nash traveled to Kingston, Jamaica's Dynamic Sounds studio to work with top local reggae musicians. The song was originally intended for the film "Cool Runnings" but later used in many films. Nash said the lyrics were inspired by a moment when he saw sunlight breaking through clouds after a long flight over the Caribbean.
items.historicalImpactZh: 同名歌曲《I Can See Clearly Now》成为雷鬼音乐跨界流行的重要里程碑，在全球多国排行榜夺冠，并影响了后来的雷鬼流行化发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The title track "I Can See Clearly Now" became a milestone for reggae's crossover into pop, topping charts worldwide and influencing later reggae-pop fusions.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Nash，美国歌手、词曲作者，以雷鬼和流行音乐风格闻名。他是最早将雷鬼音乐带入美国主流市场的艺人之一。代表作包括《I Can See Clearly Now》和《Stir It Up》（由Bob Marley创作）。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Nash is an American singer-songwriter known for reggae and pop. He was one of the first artists to bring reggae to the US mainstream. Key hits include "I Can See Clearly Now" and "Stir It Up" (written by Bob Marley).

items.name: Elliott Smith
items.descriptionZh: 《Elliott Smith》是Elliott Smith的第二张录音室专辑，风格以低保真民谣流行（Lo-fi Folk Pop）为主。专辑以简朴的吉他拨弦和细腻的多轨人声叠加为特色，旋律忧郁而优美，歌词充满内省的私人叙事。其核心在于用极简的编曲传递出强烈的情感张力，展现了Smith在卧室录音美学中的独特才华。
items.descriptionEn: Elliott Smith is the second studio album by Elliott Smith, characterized by lo-fi folk pop. It features sparse guitar picking, layered multi-tracked vocals, and melancholic yet beautiful melodies, with lyrics delving into introspective personal narratives. The core lies in its minimalist arrangements that convey powerful emotional tension, showcasing Smith's unique talent in bedroom recording aesthetics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初由Smith自行以卡带形式发行，后经Kill Rock Stars唱片公司再版。录制过程几乎全由Smith一人在波特兰的家中完成，他使用一台四轨录音机，通过叠加人声和乐器来营造丰富的层次感。专辑中《Needle in the Hay》的吉他声部分意外地包含了Smith拨片刮擦琴弦的噪音，这一“瑕疵”最终被保留，成为其Lo-fi风格的标志性特征。
items.storiesEn: The album was initially self-released by Smith on cassette and later reissued by Kill Rock Stars. It was almost entirely recorded by Smith alone at his home in Portland, using a four-track recorder to layer vocals and instruments. The guitar part in 'Needle in the Hay' accidentally included the sound of Smith's pick scraping against the strings; this 'flaw' was ultimately kept, becoming a hallmark of its lo-fi aesthetic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛视为1990年代独立民谣流行的里程碑之作，为Elliott Smith赢得主流关注，并影响后续一代卧室音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Widely regarded as a milestone in 1990s indie folk pop, this album brought Elliott Smith mainstream attention and influenced a generation of bedroom musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Elliott Smith（1969-2003），美国唱作人，以忧郁的民谣流行风格著称。代表作包括《Either/Or》和《XO》，其作品因电影《心灵捕手》原声带而获得奥斯卡提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Elliott Smith (1969-2003) was an American singer-songwriter known for his melancholic folk pop style. His notable works include 'Either/Or' and 'XO', and his music earned an Oscar nomination for the 'Good Will Hunting' soundtrack.

07-21.birthdayZh: 7月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好三份礼物：Koop用慵懒的爵士为你煮了一杯温热的月光，Johnny Nash在《I Can See Clearly Now》里擦亮天空，说阴霾终将散尽。而你像Elliott Smith的Lo-fi和弦，在粗糙中长出柔韧的温柔。愿今日的每道阳光都变成吉他弦，轻轻拨响你心底那句——“我终于能看清，前路是亮的。”
07-21.birthdayEn: July 21 is your birthday, a date that brought warmth and clarity into the world. Like Johnny Nash’s “I Can See Clearly Now,” may the year ahead lift every fog and reveal bright, open skies. And like Elliott Smith’s tender self-titled album, may your days be woven with gentle honesty and quiet beauty. You are a melody of light and depth—may this new chapter sing with joy, peace, and all the love you so richly deserve. Happy birthday.

items.name: Only One
items.descriptionZh: 《Only One》是BoA的第七张日语录音室专辑，风格以��行舞曲（Pop/Dance）为主，融合了R&B和电子元素。专辑核心特色在于BoA标志性的强劲嗓音与动感节拍的结合，以及她亲自参与多首歌曲的创作，展现了从少女偶像向成熟艺人的转型。曲风明快且富有感染力，体现了K-Pop国际化制作的精致水准。
items.descriptionEn: 'Only One' is BoA's seventh Japanese studio album, primarily in the pop/dance style with R&B and electronic elements. Its core feature is the combination of BoA's signature powerful vocals with dynamic beats, along with her active participation in songwriting, marking her transition from a teen idol to a mature artist. The tracks are upbeat and infectious, reflecting the polished production of international K-Pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Only One》由BoA亲自填词，灵感来源于她长期往返日韩两地工作的孤独感。录制期间，BoA曾因过度疲劳在录音室晕倒，但坚持在恢复后重新录制人声部分，以确保情感表达的完整性。此外，专辑中的《The Shadow》因编曲复杂，混音阶段经历了超过20次修改才最终定稿。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Only One' was written by BoA herself, inspired by the loneliness of her frequent commutes between Japan and Korea for work. During recording, she once collapsed from exhaustion in the studio but insisted on re-recording her vocals after recovery to ensure emotional integrity. Additionally, 'The Shadow' underwent over 20 mix revisions due to its complex arrangement before finalization.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（1986年生），韩国流行歌手，被誉为“亚洲之星”，以出色的唱跳能力和跨语言（韩、日、英）发片著称。代表作包括《No.1》、《Valenti》和《Only One》，是K-Pop全球化的重要先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (born 1986) is a South Korean pop singer known as the 'Star of Asia', famed for her exceptional singing and dancing skills and releases in multiple languages (Korean, Japanese, English). Her notable works include 'No.1', 'Valenti', and 'Only One', and she is a key pioneer of K-Pop globalization.

items.name: Mud on the Tires
items.descriptionZh: 《Mud on the Tires》是Brad Paisley的第三张录音室专辑，风格融合了乡村音乐（Country）与民谣（Folk）元素，以传统的乡村乐器（如班卓琴、钢棒吉他）和幽默叙事为特色。专辑主题围绕乡村生活、爱情与驾驶乐趣，核心在于Paisley精湛的吉他演奏技巧和轻松诙谐的歌词风格，展现了现代乡村音乐的亲和力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Mud on the Tires' is Brad Paisley's third studio album, blending country music with folk elements, characterized by traditional country instruments (banjo, pedal steel) and humorous storytelling. The album focuses on rural life, love, and the joy of driving, with the core being Paisley's masterful guitar work and lighthearted, witty lyrics, showcasing the approachability of modern country music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Mud on the Tires》的创作灵感来自Paisley在田纳西州乡间驾车时的一次经历——他的卡车陷入泥潭，却反而让他感到自由。录制时，Paisley邀请了传奇蓝草音乐人Alison Krauss为《Whiskey Lullaby》献声，但Krauss最初因档期冲突婉拒，后在Paisley的坚持下调整日程完成合作，这首歌后来成为乡村音乐经典对唱。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Mud on the Tires' was inspired by an experience of Paisley driving in rural Tennessee when his truck got stuck in mud, which paradoxically made him feel free. During recording, he invited legendary bluegrass artist Alison Krauss to sing on 'Whiskey Lullaby'; Krauss initially declined due to scheduling conflicts but later adjusted her schedule after Paisley's persistence, and the song became a classic country duet.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Brad Paisley在21世纪初乡村音乐界的地位，《Whiskey Lullaby》成为乡村音乐史上最感人的对唱作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified Brad Paisley's status in early 2000s country music, with 'Whiskey Lullaby' becoming one of the most poignant duets in country music history.
items.artistIntroZh: Brad Paisley（1972年生），美国乡村音乐歌手、吉他手和词曲作者，以精湛的吉他技艺和幽默歌词闻名。代表作包括《Mud on the Tires》和《Whiskey Lullaby》，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Brad Paisley (born 1972) is an American country music singer, guitarist, and songwriter known for his exceptional guitar skills and humorous lyrics. His notable works include 'Mud on the Tires' and 'Whiskey Lullaby', and he has won multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Remixing the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Remixing the Human Soul》是Epik High的第五张录音室专辑，风格以流行说唱（Pop Rap）为主，融合了电子、摇滚和古典元素。专辑核心特色在于其宏大的概念性——探讨人性、社会与灵魂的复杂性，通过丰富的采样和���次分明的编曲，营造出电影般的听觉体验。歌词富有诗意且充满社会批判，展现了Epik High作为韩国嘻哈先锋的深度。
items.descriptionEn: 'Remixing the Human Soul' is Epik High's fifth studio album, primarily in the pop rap style, incorporating electronic, rock, and classical elements. Its core feature is its grand conceptual theme—exploring humanity, society, and the complexity of the soul—through rich sampling and layered arrangements, creating a cinematic auditory experience. The lyrics are poetic and socially critical, showcasing Epik High's depth as Korean hip-hop pioneers.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Tablo因哈佛大学学历争议而承受巨大舆论压力，但他将这种痛苦转化为创作动力。主打歌《Fan》的歌词直接回应了网络暴力，录制时Tablo曾因情绪激动而多次中断演唱。此外，专辑中《Trot》一曲意外地使用了韩国传统民谣旋律，由成员Mithra Jin在醉酒后即兴哼唱而成，最终被保留为专辑的隐藏曲目。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, member Tablo faced immense public pressure due to controversy over his Harvard degree, but he channeled that pain into creativity. The lyrics of the lead track 'Fan' directly addressed cyberbullying, and Tablo had to stop singing multiple times during recording due to emotional distress. Additionally, 'Trot' unexpectedly used a traditional Korean folk melody, which member Mithra Jin hummed improvisationally while drunk; it was kept as a hidden track on the album.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是Epik High艺术巅峰之作之一，推动了韩国嘻哈音乐的概念化与文学化表达。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered one of Epik High's artistic peaks, advancing conceptual and literary expression in Korean hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High，韩国嘻哈组合，成立于2001年，成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz。以富有诗意的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称，代表作包括《Fly》、《Fan》和《Born Hater》，是韩国嘻哈音乐的先驱。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2001, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for poetic lyrics and experimental music, their notable works include 'Fly', 'Fan', and 'Born Hater', and they are pioneers of Korean hip-hop.

07-22.birthdayZh: 7月22日，是你的生日。这一天，BoA的《Only One》低声诉说“独一无二”的珍贵，Epik High的《Remixing the Human Soul》则提醒着灵魂的坚韧与重塑。就像这些音符在时光里找到自己的位置，你也在属于自己的轨道上发光。愿你的每一步都踏在热爱的节奏里，温柔而坚定。
07-22.birthdayEn: July 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us albums like BoA’s Only One—a reminder that you are singular and radiant—and Brad Paisley’s Mud on the Tires, which carries the spirit of finding joy in life’s simple, dusty roads. May your year ahead be a dance between bold steps and quiet, sunlit moments. You are the melody that makes this day unforgettable. Happy birthday.

07-23.birthdayZh: 7月23日，是你的生日。这一天，你像那一年发行的《A Hard Day's Night》一样，带着披头士式的不懈与温柔，把忙碌的日子过成歌——即使疲惫，也总有音符托住你。而《Pet Sounds》里那片海浪，早已为你藏好宁静的潮汐，提醒你：在这世上，你本身就是值得被反复倾听的乐章。我们爱你。
07-23.birthdayEn: July 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Talking Heads’ *Remain in Light*, a pulse of joyful rhythm and boundless possibility, and the raw, hopeful roar of *License to Ill*. Like these albums, may your year ahead be a dance of unexpected harmonies, a celebration of your own unique frequency. Let the melodies of courage and laughter be your soundtrack. Here's to another revolution around the sun—may every note lift you higher, and every beat remind you how wonderfully you shine.

items.name: Book of Ezekiel
items.descriptionZh: 《Book of Ezekiel》是Freekey Zekey的首张个人录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈（East Coast Hip-Hop）为主，融合了硬核说唱和街头叙事。专辑核心特色在于其粗粝的街头真实感，以及Freekey Zekey标志性的低沉嗓音和直白歌词，内容聚焦于纽约哈莱姆区的帮派生活、生存斗争与个人野心。制作上大量采用采样和厚重鼓点，体现了D-Block团体的典型风格。
items.descriptionEn: 'Book of Ezekiel' is Freekey Zekey's debut solo studio album, primarily in the East Coast hip-hop style, blending hardcore rap with street narratives. Its core feature lies in its gritty street authenticity, Freekey Zekey's signature deep voice, and straightforward lyrics focusing on gang life, survival struggles, and personal ambition in Harlem, New York. The production heavily relies on samples and heavy beats, reflecting the typical style of the D-Block collective.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时，Freekey Zekey正因2006年的一起枪击案相关指控而身陷法律纠纷，部分歌曲的创作灵感直接来自他在狱中的经历。录制过程中，D-Block成员Jadakiss和Styles P无偿贡献了客串段落，以支持兄弟渡过难关。专辑原定名《The Legend of Zekey》，但因厂牌要求改为《Book of Ezekiel》，以呼应圣经中的先知主题。
items.storiesEn: At the time of the album's release, Freekey Zekey was embroiled in legal troubles related to a 2006 shooting incident, and some songs were directly inspired by his time in jail. During recording, D-Block members Jadakiss and Styles P contributed guest verses for free to support their brother. The album was originally titled 'The Legend of Zekey' but was changed to 'Book of Ezekiel' at the label's request to echo the biblical prophet theme.
items.artistIntroZh: Freekey Zekey（1976年生），美国说唱歌手，来自纽约哈莱姆区，是嘻哈团体D-Block（现称The LOX）的成员。以硬核街头说唱风格著称，代表作包括《Book of Ezekiel》和《Can't Stop the Shine》。
items.artistIntroEn: Freekey Zekey (born 1976) is an American rapper from Harlem, New York, and a member of the hip-hop group D-Block (now The LOX). Known for his hardcore street rap style, his notable works include 'Book of Ezekiel' and 'Can't Stop the Shine'.

items.name: The Simpsons Movie – The Music
items.descriptionZh: 《The Simpsons Movie – The Music》是汉斯·季默为2007年动画电影《辛普森一家》创作的配乐专辑。作品融合了流行、管弦乐与电子元素，既保留了辛普森系列标志性的幽默与荒诞风格，又通过季默标志性的宏大编曲赋予电影史诗感。核心特色在于将流行旋律与电影叙事紧密结合，创造出既轻松又富有张力的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: The Simpsons Movie – The Music is a soundtrack album by Hans Zimmer for the 2007 animated film. It blends pop, orchestral, and electronic elements, retaining the series' signature humor and absurdity while adding Zimmer's epic arrangements for a cinematic feel. The core feature is the seamless integration of pop melodies with narrative storytelling.
items.storiesZh: 汉斯·季默在创作该专辑时，与导演大卫·西尔弗曼密切合作，确保音乐与动画的喜剧节奏完美同步。有趣的是，季默曾表示自己从小就是《辛普森一家》的粉丝，因此这次合作对他来说是一次“梦想成真”。录制过程中，他特意邀请了一支小型管弦乐队，并在洛杉矶的录音棚中模拟出动画中夸张的音效，例如用打击乐模仿荷马摔倒的滑稽声音。
items.storiesEn: Hans Zimmer worked closely with director David Silverman to sync the music with the animated comedy's rhythm. Interestingly, Zimmer admitted being a lifelong fan of The Simpsons, calling the project 'a dream come true.' During recording, he hired a small orchestra and used percussion to mimic Homer's slapstick falls in the studio.
items.artistIntroZh: 汉斯·季默（Hans Zimmer）是德国著名电影配乐作曲家，以融合电子音乐与传统交响乐的风格闻名。代表作包括《狮子王》《盗梦空间》《星际穿越》等，曾获奥斯卡奖。他擅长用音乐塑造电影的史诗气氛，对现代电影配乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Hans Zimmer is a renowned German film composer known for blending electronic music with traditional orchestral scores. His iconic works include The Lion King, Inception, and Interstellar, earning him an Academy Award. He is celebrated for shaping epic cinematic atmospheres.

07-24.birthdayZh: 7月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌着《Book of Ezekiel》的粗粝与真实，像你骨子里的坚韧不驯；也奏响过《辛普森一家大电影》的俏皮交响，提醒你宏大叙事里永远藏着童真的幽默。你生来就带着这样的光芒——既能扎根泥土，又能仰望星空。
07-24.birthdayEn: July 24 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the bold debut of Freekey Zekey’s *Book of Ezekiel* and the sweeping, joyful orchestra of Hans Zimmer’s *The Simpsons Movie – The Music*. Like these albums, may your year be a blend of grounded strength and playful adventure—a soundtrack of courage and laughter. On this day, the world turns a little brighter, celebrating the unique melody only you can compose. Here’s to you, your story, and the beautiful harmony you bring to every chapter ahead.

items.name: High Society
items.descriptionZh: 《High Society》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High于2004年发行的第二张正规专辑，被视为韩国嘻哈音乐的经典之作。风格上融合了爵士、灵魂乐与硬核嘻哈，歌词深��探讨社会阶层、梦想与现实冲突等主题。核心特色在于其诗意的歌词与多元化的采样，展现了Epik High早期独特的音乐哲学。
items.descriptionEn: High Society is Epik High's second studio album (2004), a landmark in Korean hip-hop. It blends jazz, soul, and hardcore rap, with lyrics exploring class struggles, dreams, and reality. Its core feature lies in poetic lyrics and diverse sampling, showcasing the group's early musical philosophy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员Tablo曾因歌词内容过于尖锐而多次与制作人发生争执，但最终保留了大部分批判性歌词。其中一首歌采样了韩国传统民谣，但混音时意外加入了Tablo父亲的口琴录音，这个偶然的失误反而成为专辑的点睛之笔。此外，专辑封面设计灵感来自成员Mithra Jin在纽约地铁中看到的涂鸦。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Tablo clashed with producers over the sharp lyrics but insisted on keeping most of them. One track accidentally included a harmonica recording by Tablo's father, which became a highlight. The album cover was inspired by graffiti Mithra Jin saw in the New York subway.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《High Society》被公认���韩国嘻哈历史上的里程碑，推动了韩国嘻哈从地下走向主流，影响了后续一代韩国说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: High Society is widely regarded as a milestone in Korean hip-hop history, propelling the genre from underground to mainstream and influencing a generation of Korean rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成，以深刻的歌词和实验性音乐风格著称。代表作包括《Fly》《Love Love Love》等，是韩国独立嘻哈界的先驱，多次获得韩国音乐大奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz, known for profound lyrics and experimental sounds. Their hits include 'Fly' and 'Love Love Love.' They are pioneers of Korean indie hip-hop, winning multiple Korean Music Awards.

07-25.birthdayZh: 7月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《High Society》——它告诉你，真正的尊贵不是向高处攀爬，而是清醒地站在自己的土地上歌唱。愿你的年岁如那张专辑：温柔里藏着锋芒，现实压不垮理想。在每一个为自己吹熄蜡烛的瞬间，记得你生来就值得一场盛大的庆祝。
07-25.birthdayEn: July 25 is your birthday. On this day, the album "High Society" by Epik High was released, a testament to rising above and finding grace in the climb. May your year carry that same bold, celebratory spirit—a melody of ambition and warmth, where every note is a step toward your own bright sky. You are the artist of your story, and this day marks the start of your most beautiful verse yet.

07-26.birthdayZh: 7月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Born to Run》的勇气，那是挣脱束缚、奔向自由的生命鼓点；也诞生了《Thriller》的奇迹，让阴影因节奏而绚烂。愿你的这一天，像那些旋律一样，不止是时间的标记，而是星辰点亮的路。在属于自己的节拍里，你早已是力量本身。
07-26.birthdayEn: July 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the raw energy of Nevermind the Bollocks, Here’s the Sex Pistols—a reminder that you can shatter every expectation and roar with fearless truth. And from a quieter sky fell Talk Talk’s Spirit of Eden, whispering that peace and beauty bloom in stillness. May your new year carry both: the courage to be unapologetically yourself and the grace to find poetry in the quiet moments. Happy birthday to a soul woven of fire and light.

items.name: The Writing's on the Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《The Writing's on the Wall》是美国女子组合天命真女于1999年发行的第二张录音室专辑，标志性的R&B/Soul风格融合了当代节奏布鲁斯、灵魂乐与嘻哈元素。核心特色在于多声部和声与独立女性主题歌词，特别是歌曲《Bills, Bills, Bills》和《Say My Name》展现了组合的成熟与突破。
items.descriptionEn: The Writing's on the Wall is Destiny's Child's second studio album (1999), a defining R&B/Soul work blending contemporary R&B, soul, and hip-hop. Its core features are multi-part harmonies and themes of female independence, with hits like 'Bills, Bills, Bills' and 'Say My Name' showcasing the group's maturity.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员间关系紧张，尤其是主唱碧昂丝的父亲兼经纪人马修·诺尔斯与部分成员存在矛盾。录制《Say My Name》时，碧昂丝坚持要加入一段即兴高音，制作人起初反对但最终妥协，这段高音成为歌曲的标志性部分。专辑发行后不久，两位原始成员LaTavia和LeToya被替换，引发争议。
