items.storiesEn: During recording, tensions rose between members, especially over manager Mathew Knowles. For 'Say My Name,' Beyoncé insisted on adding an improvised high note against producers' wishes, which became iconic. Shortly after release, original members LaTavia and LeToya were replaced, sparking controversy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是R&B黄金时代的代表作之一，推动了90年代末女子组合的崛起，对后续R&B和流行女歌手产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a cornerstone of the R&B golden era, boosting the rise of girl groups in the late '90s and deeply influencing subsequent R&B and pop female artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 天命真女（Destiny's Child）是美国R&B女子组合，最初由碧昂丝、凯莉·罗兰等人组成。以《Say My Name》《Survivor》等经典歌曲闻名，是21世纪初全球最畅销的女子组合之一，获得多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Destiny's Child is an American R&B girl group originally featuring Beyoncé and Kelly Rowland. Known for hits like 'Say My Name' and 'Survivor,' they were one of the best-selling girl groups of the early 2000s, winning multiple Grammy Awards.

items.name: Madonna
items.descriptionZh: 《Madonna》是美国流行天后麦当娜于1983年发行的首张同名录音室专辑，融合了舞曲、流行与放克风格，奠定了她作为流行偶像的基础。核心特色在于其充满活力的合成器节拍与麦当娜独特的嗓音，歌曲如《Holiday》和《Lucky Star》迅速成为俱乐部热门，标志着一个流行时代的开端。
items.descriptionEn: Madonna is the debut studio album by American pop icon Madonna (1983), blending dance-pop, funk, and synth-driven beats. Its core features are energetic synthesized rhythms and Madonna's distinctive vocals. Tracks like 'Holiday' and 'Lucky Star' became club anthems, marking the start of a pop era.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，麦当娜几乎身无分文，靠吃爆米花度日。制作人雷吉·卢卡斯最初对她的嗓音不以为然，但麦当娜坚持自己的风格。歌曲《Holiday》原本是为另一组艺人写的，被拒后麦当娜接手演唱，结果成为她的首支国际热门单曲。专辑封面上的标志性造型（蕾丝上衣、十字架项链）是麦当娜自己搭配的，当时被唱片公司认为太另类。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Madonna was nearly broke and survived on popcorn. Producer Reggie Lucas initially doubted her vocal ability, but she persisted. 'Holiday' was originally written for another artist, but after rejection, Madonna recorded it, scoring her first international hit. Her iconic album cover look (lace top, cross necklace) was self-styled and deemed too edgy by the label.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑彻底改变了80年代流行音乐的面貌，确立了麦当娜作为文化偶像的地位，并影响了无数后来的流行女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album revolutionized 1980s pop music, established Madonna as a cultural icon, and influenced countless future female pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna）是美国歌手、演员及文化偶像，被誉为“流行女王”。以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会禁忌著称，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》《Vogue》等，全球销量超3亿张，是史上最成功的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, actress, and cultural icon known as the 'Queen of Pop.' Renowned for constantly reinventing her music and challenging social norms, her hits include 'Like a Virgin' and 'Vogue.' With over 300 million records sold, she is one of the best-selling female artists in history.

items.name: Gladius Æternus
items.descriptionZh: 《Gladius Æternus》是意大��流行/电子乐队Codemachia于2025年发行的专辑，融合了流行、合成器浪潮与古典元素，营造出未来主义的史诗氛围。核心特色在于其宏大的电子音景与拉丁语歌词的交织，探讨永恒与科技的主题，展现了乐队在流行框架下进行先锋实验的野心。
items.descriptionEn: Gladius Æternus is a 2025 album by Italian pop/electronic band Codemachia, blending pop, synthwave, and classical elements for a futuristic epic atmosphere. Its core feature is the fusion of grand electronic soundscapes with Latin lyrics, exploring themes of eternity and technology, showcasing the band's avant-garde ambitions within pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Gladius Æternus》意为“永恒之剑”，灵感来自主唱在罗马古斗兽场的一次深夜漫步。录制过程中，乐队使用了大量复古合成器，包括一台1970年代的ARP 2600，并在意大利一座废弃教堂中录制了合唱部分，以营造神圣与科技并存的音效。专辑原定2024年发行，但因主唱沉迷于修复一台老式磁带机而推迟至2025年。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Gladius Æternus' (Eternal Sword) was inspired by the lead singer's late-night walk at the Roman Colosseum. The band used vintage synthesizers, including a 1970s ARP 2600, and recorded choir parts in an abandoned Italian church to blend sacred and tech sounds. Originally slated for 2024, the release was delayed to 2025 due to the singer's obsession with restoring an old tape machine.
items.artistIntroZh: Codemachia是意大利流行电子乐队，以融合古典元素与合成器浪潮著称。他们擅长用拉丁语歌词和未来主义音景创作概念专辑，代表作包括《Digitalis》和《Gladius Æternus》，在欧洲独立音乐界备受关注。
items.artistIntroEn: Codemachia is an Italian pop/electronic band known for blending classical elements with synthwave. They specialize in concept albums with Latin lyrics and futuristic soundscapes. Their notable works include 'Digitalis' and 'Gladius Æternus,' gaining attention in the European indie scene.

07-27.birthdayZh: 7月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Madonna》的勇敢节拍，宣告一个灵魂如何以舞步劈开夜空；也锻造过《The Writing's on the Wall》的坚韧预言——那些写在墙上的字句，终会成为你掌心的星图。你生来便携带这样的光芒：既是浪潮的开端，也是答案本身。
07-27.birthdayEn: July 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Madonna’s daring debut—a spark that taught us to dance without apology—and Destiny’s Child’s anthem of strength, reminding us our voices matter. Like those albums, your spirit is a blend of bold beginnings and soulful resilience. May your year ahead play like a timeless melody: uplifting, unstoppable, and entirely your own. Happy birthday to a beautiful soul whose light writes its own song.

items.name: Baroque
items.descriptionZh: 《Baroque》是美国长号手Wycliffe Gordon于2010年发行的专辑，融合了传统爵士与巴洛克音乐元素。核心特色在于Gordon用长号演绎古典旋律，同时保留即兴摇摆感，展现出爵士乐的跨界包容性。
items.descriptionEn: Baroque is a 2010 album by American trombonist Wycliffe Gordon, blending traditional jazz with Baroque music elements. Its core feature lies in Gordon's trombone interpretations of classical melodies while retaining improvisational swing, showcasing jazz's cross-genre inclusiveness.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感源于Gordon在林肯中心爵士乐团的演出经历，他常将巴赫的复调旋律融入爵士即兴。录制时，他特意使用了一把1930年代的老式长号，以追求更温暖、接近巴洛克时期木管音色的质感。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Gordon's performances with the Lincoln Center Jazz Orchestra, where he often incorporated Bach's polyphonic melodies into jazz improvisation. During recording, he deliberately used a vintage 1930s trombone to achieve a warmer timbre closer to Baroque woodwinds.
items.artistIntroZh: Wycliffe Gordon是美国爵士长号手、作曲家与教育家，以精湛的技巧和多元风格著称。代表作包括《Slidin' Home》和《The Gospel Truth》，曾多次与温顿·马萨利斯合作。
items.artistIntroEn: Wycliffe Gordon is an American jazz trombonist, composer, and educator known for his virtuosic technique and versatile style. Notable works include Slidin' Home and The Gospel Truth; he has frequently collaborated with Wynton Marsalis.

items.name: Golden Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Golden Best》是日本歌手井上阳水于1999年发行的精选集，涵盖其1970至1990年代的民谣与乡村摇滚代表作。核心特色在于诗意的日语歌词与忧郁而温暖的旋律，奠定了其日本民谣巨匠的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Golden Best is a 1999 compilation album by Japanese singer Yōsui Inoue, covering his folk and country-rock hits from the 1970s to 1990s. Its core feature lies in poetic Japanese lyrics and melancholic yet warm melodies, solidifying his status as a master of Japanese folk music.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，井上阳水特意重新录制了部分经典曲目，如《梦の中へ》，并邀请年轻乐手重新编曲。制作人表示，选曲过程历时一年，井上坚持要收录一些早期未发表的B面曲，以回馈忠实乐迷。
items.storiesEn: For this compilation, Inoue re-recorded some classic tracks like Yume no Naka e with new arrangements by young musicians. The producer noted that the selection process took a year, with Inoue insisting on including early B-sides to reward loyal fans.
items.artistIntroZh: 井上阳水是日本创作歌手与音乐制作人，被誉为日本民谣摇滚的先驱。代表作包括《氷の世界》和《少年时代》，其歌词常带有文学性与社会观察，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Yōsui Inoue is a Japanese singer-songwriter and producer, regarded as a pioneer of Japanese folk-rock. Notable works include Kōri no Sekai and Shōnen Jidai; his lyrics are known for literary depth and social observation.

07-28.birthdayZh: 7月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Baroque》，用爵士与古典的交织，教会我们优雅地拥抱即兴的浪潮；也诞生过《Golden Best》，像时间酿成的酒，沉淀了半生温暖与坦荡。你像这些旋律一样，既有巴洛克般的精致，又有黄金般的坚韧。愿你在新的一岁，继续奏响属于自己的华彩乐章。
07-28.birthdayEn: July 28 is your birthday. On this day, the music of the world expanded, just as you have. Wycliffe Gordon’s Baroque, with its bold improvisation and soulful grace, mirrors your own creative spirit and fearless heart. Yōsui Inoue’s Golden Best holds the warmth of timeless melodies, a reminder that every year adds a new, beloved verse to your story. May this new trip around the sun be your brightest track yet, filled with harmony, discovery, and joy. Happy birthday.

07-29.birthdayZh: 7月29日，是你的生日。这一天曾与《Thriller》一道诞生，像迈克尔·杰克逊那样，把聚光灯下的颤栗化为心跳的节奏，让世界为你的存在起舞。每一年，你都在自己的时区里发行独版专辑——封面是笑容，旋律是坚持。不必害怕沉寂，因为你的生命本身就是一首循环千遍也不厌倦的歌。
07-29.birthdayEn: July 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world had the grace to gift us with albums like The Beatles’ “Help!” and Fleetwood Mac’s “Tango in the Night,” songs of resilience and quiet magic. So may your year carry that same brave spirit—a little help from every sunrise, and a tango of hope in the darkest hours. You were born on a day of art and heart, and you carry that light forward. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Razor Tag
items.descriptionZh: 《Razor Tag》是美国嘻哈团体Styles of Beyond于2007年发行的混音带，融合了西海岸说唱、电子与硬核嘻哈元素。核心特色在于密集的韵脚、工业感节拍以及成员Ryu和Takbir的犀利对话式Flow。
items.descriptionEn: Razor Tag is a 2007 mixtape by American hip-hop group Styles of Beyond, blending West Coast rap, electronic, and hardcore hip-hop. Its core features include dense rhymes, industrial beats, and the sharp conversational flow between members Ryu and Takbir.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带原本只是为宣传团体即将发行的专辑《Reseda Beach》而制作���但因其地下风格大获好评。成员Takbir透露，部分曲目的beat是他们在洛杉矶一家汽车旅馆的浴室里用便携设备录制的。
items.storiesEn: Originally made to promote the group's upcoming album Reseda Beach, the mixtape gained unexpected underground acclaim. Member Takbir revealed that some beats were recorded in a motel bathroom in Los Angeles using portable equipment.
items.artistIntroZh: Styles of Beyond是美国西海岸嘻哈团体，由Ryu和Takbir组成，以复杂韵脚和独立精神闻名。代表作包括《Reseda Beach》和与Linkin Park合作的《Remember the Name》。
items.artistIntroEn: Styles of Beyond is an American West Coast hip-hop duo consisting of Ryu and Takbir, known for complex rhymes and an independent spirit. Notable works include Reseda Beach and Remember the Name with Linkin Park.

items.name: Stéphanie
items.descriptionZh: 《Stéphanie》是摩纳哥公主斯蒂芬妮于1991年发行的流行电子专辑，融合了欧陆舞曲、合成器流行与迪斯科元素。核心特色在于公主亲自参与作词，主题围绕爱情与自由，充满90年代初的电子节拍。
items.descriptionEn: Stéphanie is a 1991 pop-electronic album by Princess Stéphanie of Monaco, blending Eurodance, synth-pop, and disco. Its core feature lies in the princess's personal involvement in lyrics, with themes of love and freedom set to early-90s electronic beats.
items.storiesZh: 斯蒂芬妮公主在录制此专辑时，曾秘密前往巴黎的录音室，以避免媒体关注。单曲《Ouragan》在法国大热，但王室成员对此保持沉默。据说她曾因在录音室熬夜而错过一次王室正式晚宴。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Princess Stéphanie secretly traveled to a Paris studio to avoid media attention. The single Ouragan became a hit in France, while the royal family remained silent. She reportedly missed a formal royal dinner due to late-night studio sessions.
items.artistIntroZh: 斯蒂芬妮公主是摩纳哥王室成员，曾短暂从事歌手与时尚模特职业。其音乐风格以流行电子和舞曲为主，代表作包括《Ouragan》和《Flash》。
items.artistIntroEn: Princess Stéphanie of Monaco is a member of the Monegasque royal family who briefly pursued a career as a singer and fashion model. Her music style is primarily pop-electronic and dance; notable works include Ouragan and Flash.

items.name: Revolution
items.descriptionZh: 《Revolution》是韩国女子组合Kara于2009年发行的迷你专辑，主打K-pop舞曲风格，融合了电子流行与R&B元素。核心特色在于强烈的合成器hook与成员���整齐的刀群舞，被认为是Kara转型成功的标志。
items.descriptionEn: Revolution is a 2009 mini-album by South Korean girl group Kara,主打 K-pop dance style with electronic pop and R&B elements. Its core features include powerful synth hooks and synchronized group choreography, marking a successful transformation for the group.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Kara成员变动期，新成员姜知英加入后仅用三周就完成了全部舞蹈编排。主打歌《Wanna》的MV在首尔郊区一座废弃工厂拍摄，因现场低温导致多名成员感冒，但拍摄仍坚持完成。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a member change; new member Kang Jiyoung completed all choreography in just three weeks. The music video for lead single Wanna was filmed in an abandoned factory in Seoul's outskirts, where cold temperatures caused several members to catch colds, but filming continued.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Revolution》帮助Kara在韩国乐坛确立了一线女团地位，并开启了她们后续在日本市场的巨大成功。
items.historicalImpactEn: Revolution helped Kara establish themselves as a top-tier girl group in the Korean music scene and paved the way for their massive success in the Japanese market.
items.artistIntroZh: Kara是韩国DSP Media于2007年推出的女子组合，以甜美形象与动感舞曲著称。代表作品包括《Mr.》和《Step》，曾创下韩国女团在日本公信榜的销售纪录。
items.artistIntroEn: Kara is a South Korean girl group formed by DSP Media in 2007, known for their sweet image and energetic dance music. Notable works include Mr. and Step; they set sales records for Korean girl groups on the Oricon chart in Japan.

07-30.birthdayZh: 7月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了不同的声音——比如《Revolution》里那股不顾一切跳动的节奏，提醒你每一次旋转都可以是崭新的开始；又或者像《Razor Tag》那样，在凶猛的节拍中藏着一颗不肯妥协的心。你生来就带着这样的力量：既能在舞池中央轻盈起舞，也能在风暴里站稳脚步。生日快乐，愿你的每一天都像这些旋律一样，自由而滚烫。
07-30.birthdayEn: July 30 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world echoed with music born for revolution and resilience—just like you. The bold, defiant pulse of Razor Tag and the shimmering dance of Revolution remind us that life is both a fierce climb and a joyful beat. May your new year be a masterpiece of strength and light, each note perfectly yours. Celebrate the rhythm only you can create.

items.name: Losing All Hope Is Freedom
items.descriptionZh: 《Losing All Hope Is Freedom》是Evergreen Terrace在2001年发行的首张专辑，尽管乐队以金属核见长，但此作融入了流行朋克与旋律硬核元素，呈现出朗朗上口的副歌与能量充沛的吉他段落。作品在侵略性与旋律性之间取得平衡，展现了早期情绪硬核的感染力。
items.descriptionEn: Losing All Hope Is Freedom is Evergreen Terrace's debut album from 2001, blending pop punk and melodic hardcore elements with catchy choruses and energetic guitar riffs, showcasing early emotional hardcore appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在佛罗里达州的录音室完成，当时乐队成员平均年龄仅20岁。主唱Andrew Carey曾回忆，专辑标题源自一句涂鸦，他们希望传达在绝望中寻找自由的主题。录制过程预算紧张，部分歌曲在深夜完成，以节省录音棚费用。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a Florida studio with band members averaging 20 years old, vocalist Andrew Carey recalled the title came from a graffiti phrase, aiming to convey finding freedom in despair. The budget was tight, with some songs recorded late at night to save studio costs.
items.artistIntroZh: Evergreen Terrace是一支来自美国佛罗里达州的金属核乐队，成立于1999年。风格融合金属核、旋律硬核与流行朋克，代表作包括《Losing All Hope Is Freedom》和《Wolfbiker》。
items.artistIntroEn: Evergreen Terrace is a metalcore band from Florida, USA, formed in 1999. Their style blends metalcore, melodic hardcore, and pop punk, with notable albums including Losing All Hope Is Freedom and Wolfbiker.

07-31.birthdayZh: 7月31日，是你的生日。这一天曾有一张专辑唱道《Losing All Hope Is Freedom》——失去一切希望，反而是自由的开端。就像你生来就带着一种奇异的韧性，在暴烈的音符里找到自己的节奏。愿你在属于自己的时区里，把每一个暗淡的瞬间都弹成明亮的和弦，让生命像一张从未被定义过的专辑，始终有勇气为你独奏。
07-31.birthdayEn: July 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world once welcomed an album called *Losing All Hope Is Freedom*—a bold title that holds a beautiful paradox. May your year carry that spirit: the strength to release old fears and the lightness of finding freedom not in certainty, but in the open road ahead. Let your heart be like the album's raw energy—unapologetic and alive. You were born on a day of new beginnings, so walk forward with the music of possibility playing softly behind you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Revolutions
items.descriptionZh: 《Revolutions》是Jean-Michel Jarre于1988年发行的电子音乐专辑，融合了世界音乐元素与合成器音色，开创性地使用数字采样和打击乐编排。作品以工业节奏和民族旋律交织，展现了电子音乐在80年代末的多元探索。
items.descriptionEn: Revolutions is Jean-Michel Jarre's 1988 electronic album blending world music elements with synthesizers, pioneering digital sampling and percussion arrangements, showcasing diverse electronic exploration.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的歌曲《Revolutions》采样了法国大革命时期的街头声音，Jarre为此专程前往巴黎历史档案馆寻找原始录音。录制期间，他使用了当时最新的Fairlight CMI采样器，并邀请中国琵琶演奏家合作，体现跨文化融合。
items.storiesEn: The track Revolutions sampled street sounds from the French Revolution; Jarre visited Paris historical archives for original recordings. He used the latest Fairlight CMI sampler and collaborated with a Chinese pipa player for cross-cultural fusion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了电子音乐与世界音乐的融合，其现场演出《Destination Docklands》在伦敦金丝雀码头吸引超10万观众，成为电子音乐史上的里程碑事件。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album advanced electronic-world music fusion, and its Destination Docklands concert in London's Canary Wharf drew over 100,000 people, a milestone in electronic music history.
items.artistIntroZh: Jean-Michel Jarre是法国电子音乐先驱，生于1948年。以合成器与宏大现场演出闻名，代表作包括《Oxygène》和《Équinoxe》，被誉为电子音乐领域的视觉与听觉革命者。
items.artistIntroEn: Jean-Michel Jarre is a French electronic music pioneer born in 1948, known for synthesizers and grand live shows. His masterpieces include Oxygène and Équinoxe, hailed as a visual and audio revolutionary in electronic music.

items.name: Scissors Cut
items.descriptionZh: 《Scissors Cut》是Art Garfunkel于1981年发行的流行专辑，延续其柔和的民谣流行风格，以细腻的和声与抒情旋律为核心。作品注重情感表达，编曲简洁而富有层次，展现了Garfunkel作为独唱艺术家的成熟魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Scissors Cut is Art Garfunkel's 1981 pop album continuing his soft folk-pop style, centered on delicate harmonies and lyrical melodies, showcasing his mature artistry as a solo performer.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Garfunkel因声带结节一度暂停工作，经过休养后才恢复。歌曲《A Heart in New York》的灵感来自他漫步曼哈顿时的感受，录制时邀请了Simon & Garfunkel时期的制作人Roy Halee参与。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Garfunkel paused due to vocal cord nodules, resuming after recovery. A Heart in New York was inspired by a Manhattan walk; he recruited Roy Halee, Simon & Garfunkel's producer, for the session.
items.artistIntroZh: Art Garfunkel是美国歌手与演员，1941年生于纽约，以Simon & Garfunkel成员身份闻名，代表作包括《Bridge Over Troubled Water》和《Scissors Cut》。他的嗓音以纯净高音著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Art Garfunkel is an American singer and actor born in 1941 in New York, known as part of Simon & Garfunkel, with hits like Bridge Over Troubled Water and Scissors Cut, celebrated for his pure tenor voice.

items.name: Born Under a Bad Sign
items.descriptionZh: 《Born Under a Bad Sign》是Albert King于1967年发行的蓝调专辑，融合了灵魂乐与节奏蓝调元素，以粗犷的吉他演奏和深沉的人声为核心。作品奠定了现代电声蓝调的标准，被誉为蓝调史上的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Born Under a Bad Sign is Albert King's 1967 blues album blending soul and R&B, centered on raw guitar work and deep vocals, setting standards for modern electric blues, hailed as a classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲由Booker T. Jones和William Bell创作，King最初对录制此曲犹豫不决，认为歌词过于宿命论。制作人Jim Stewart说服他尝试，结果成为其标志性歌曲。King使用Flying V吉他，以独特的倒装弹奏法闻名。
items.storiesEn: The title track was written by Booker T. Jones and William Bell; King hesitated to record it due to fatalistic lyrics. Producer Jim Stewart persuaded him, making it iconic. King played a Flying V guitar with an inverted style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被《滚石》杂志列为史上最伟大的蓝调专辑之一，影响了Eric Clapton、Stevie Ray Vaughan等吉他大师，巩固了电声蓝调在主流音乐中的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: Ranked among Rolling Stone's greatest blues albums, it influenced guitarists like Eric Clapton and Stevie Ray Vaughan, solidifying electric blues in mainstream music.
items.artistIntroZh: Albert King是美国蓝调吉他手与歌手，1923年生于密西西比，以独特的电吉他风格和标志性飞V吉他闻名，代表作包括《Born Under a Bad Sign》和《I'll Play the Blues for You》。
items.artistIntroEn: Albert King was an American blues guitarist and singer born in 1923 in Mississippi, known for his electric guitar style and signature Flying V, with hits like Born Under a Bad Sign and I'll Play the Blues for You.

08-01.birthdayZh: 8月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好《Revolutions》的电子交响诗，以及《Born Under a Bad Sign》里厚重的蓝调——它们都在提醒你，生命中每一次转折，都是星轨的光。愿你像模拟合成器的音色，在岁月里柔软地恒久；也像那把蓝调吉他，哪怕低音，也震出力量。生日快乐，你是自己的革命与破晓。
08-01.birthdayEn: August 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Albert King's "Born Under a Bad Sign," a raw, defiant blues that proves even a hard start can birth greatness. And Jean-Michel Jarre's "Revolutions" reminds us that life turns, always spinning toward new light. Like these albums, you carry both grit and grace—born into this world not under any shadow, but as your own sunrise. May your year echo with the bold rhythms of your own beautiful becoming.

items.name: Der Bozz
items.descriptionZh: 《Der Bozz》是德国说唱歌手Azad于2004年发行的专辑，融合了硬核嘻哈与街头叙事，以沉重的节拍和直白的歌词为核心。作品反映了移民社区的生活现实，是德国嘻哈黄金时代的代表之一。
items.descriptionEn: Der Bozz is German rapper Azad's 2004 album blending hardcore hip-hop with street narratives, centered on heavy beats and direct lyrics, reflecting immigrant community realities, a German hip-hop golden era staple.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Der Bozz》意为“老大”，灵感来自Azad在法兰���福街头的经历。录制过程中，他邀请了多位德国嘻哈先锋客串，包括Kool Savas。Azad曾表示，这张专辑是他对当时社会偏见的有力回应。
items.storiesEn: The title Der Bozz means 'the boss,' inspired by Azad's Frankfurt street experiences. He invited German hip-hop pioneers like Kool Savas for guest appearances. Azad called the album a strong response to social prejudice.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在德国嘻哈界具有里程碑意义，推动了德语说唱的主流化，并确立了Azad作为德国嘻哈核心人物的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a milestone in German hip-hop, advancing German-language rap's mainstream acceptance and cementing Azad as a central figure.
items.artistIntroZh: Azad是德国说唱歌手，生于1974年，父母为库尔德裔。以硬核嘻哈风格著称，代表作包括《Der Bozz》和《Leben》。他是德国嘻哈黄金时代的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Azad is a German rapper born in 1974 to Kurdish parents, known for hardcore hip-hop. His notable works include Der Bozz and Leben, and he is a key figure in German hip-hop's golden era.

items.name: Perfume: Complete Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Complete Best》是日本电音流行组合Perfume的首张精选专辑，收录了她们2005年至2006年间发行的多支单曲。作品以轻快的合成器节拍、甜美的 vocal 和精密的编曲为特色，融合了 Techno、House 与 J-Pop 元素，奠定了她们“科技感少女”的独特风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Complete Best" is the first compilation album by Japanese electro-pop trio Perfume, featuring singles released between 2005 and 2006. It is characterized by upbeat synth beats, sweet vocals, and meticulous arrangements, blending Techno, House, and J-Pop elements to establish their unique "tech-savvy girl" style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原本只是作为独立时期的总结，但发行后意外大卖，连续两周进入Oricon公信榜前十。成员们在录制主打歌《Linear Motor Girl》时，制作人中田康孝要求她们用最“无机质”的声音演唱，以突出未来感，这后来成为Perfume的标志性唱法。
items.storiesEn: Originally intended as a summary of their indie period, the album unexpectedly became a hit, staying in the Oricon top 10 for two consecutive weeks. While recording the lead track "Linear Motor Girl," producer Yasutaka Nakata instructed the members to sing in the most "robotic" tone to emphasize a futuristic feel, which later became Perfume's signature vocal style.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被认为是日本电音流行（Electro-Pop）复兴的标志性作品，开启了Perfume作为日本国民级女子团的黄金时代。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a landmark work in the revival of Japanese electro-pop, ushering in the golden era of Perfume as a nationally beloved girl group.
items.artistIntroZh: Perfume 是来自日本广岛的女子电音流行组合，由西脇绫香、樫野有香和大本彩乃组成。她们以高科技感的舞台表演和精准的舞蹈闻名，代表作包括《Polyrhythm》《Chocolate Disco》等，是日本电音流行领域的标志性艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Perfume is a Japanese electro-pop girl group from Hiroshima, consisting of A-chan, Kashiyuka, and Nocchi. Known for their high-tech stage performances and precise choreography, their representative works include "Polyrhythm" and "Chocolate Disco," making them iconic figures in Japanese electro-pop.

08-02.birthdayZh: 8月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好两份礼物：一份是《Der Bozz》的粗砺低音，像你心底从未熄灭的倔强，在暗处也能凿出光；一份是Perfume的《Complete Best》，甜美的电子浪涌里，藏着勇敢生长的密码。你就是这样，用柔软包裹坚硬，在属于自己的节奏里，一步步把日子走成温暖的诗。
08-02.birthdayEn: August 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us “Der Bozz,” a pulse of raw strength and unyielding truth, and “Perfume: Complete Best,” a shimmering collection of pure, effervescent joy. May your year carry that same balance: the fierce, grounded resilience of a street poet and the luminous, dancing light of a pop dream. You are a beautiful harmony of both. May this new chapter hum with your own unique melody, bold and bright. Happy birthday.

items.name: M.I.A.M.I.
items.descriptionZh: 《M.I.A.M.I.》是Pitbull的首张录音室专辑，融合了Crunk、Bass音乐和拉丁节奏，展现了迈阿密街头文化的粗粝与活力。专辑以强劲的808鼓机、喊唱式flow和英语/西班牙语双语歌词为核心特色，奠定了Pitbull早期“Bass-heavy”的嘻哈风格。
items.descriptionEn: "M.I.A.M.I." is Pitbull's debut studio album, blending Crunk, bass music, and Latin rhythms, showcasing the raw energy of Miami street culture. It features heavy 808 drum machines, shout-style flow, and bilingual lyrics in English and Spanish, establishing Pitbull's early bass-heavy hip-hop style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名“M.I.A.M.I.”是“Money Is a Major Issue”的缩写，反映了Pitbull对财富与生存的直白态度。录制期间，他因资金紧张，部分歌曲是在朋友家的简易录音室里完成的。制作人Lil Jon不仅贡献了多首 beats，还亲自为专辑客串，帮助Pitbull打开了主流市场。
items.storiesEn: The album title "M.I.A.M.I." stands for "Money Is a Major Issue," reflecting Pitbull's blunt attitude toward wealth and survival. During recording, due to tight funds, some tracks were completed in a friend's makeshift home studio. Producer Lil Jon contributed multiple beats and made guest appearances, helping Pitbull break into the mainstream market.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull，本名Armando Christian Pérez，美国说唱歌手、词曲作者，生于佛罗里达州迈阿密。他以融���拉丁音乐与嘻哈的跨界风格著称，代表作包括《Give Me Everything》《Timber》等，是全球最畅销的拉丁裔嘻哈艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull, born Armando Christian Pérez, is an American rapper and songwriter from Miami, Florida. Known for blending Latin music with hip-hop, his hit songs include "Give Me Everything" and "Timber," making him one of the best-selling Latin hip-hop artists worldwide.

items.name: M Best
items.descriptionZh: 《M Best》是日本R&B/流行女歌手加藤米莉亚的首张精选专辑，收录了她2004年至2010年间的热门单曲。作品以流畅的R&B旋律、真挚的情歌歌词和细腻的 vocal 表现为核心特色，融合了J-Pop与Urban Contemporary元素，展现了她在日本流行乐坛的独特地位。
items.descriptionEn: "M Best" is the first greatest-hits album by Japanese R&B/pop singer Miliyah Kato, featuring her hit singles from 2004 to 2010. It is characterized by smooth R&B melodies, heartfelt love lyrics, and delicate vocal performances, blending J-Pop with Urban Contemporary elements, showcasing her unique position in Japanese pop music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名中的“M”代表Miliyah本人，也暗含“Memories”（回忆）之意。制作时，她特意重录了早期作品《Never Let Go》的副歌部分，以反映自己十年间唱功的成长。专辑发行首周即登顶Oricon公信榜，成为她职业生涯中销量最高的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: The "M" in the album title stands for Miliyah herself, and also implies "Memories." During production, she re-recorded the chorus of her early song "Never Let Go" to reflect her vocal growth over the decade. The album debuted at No. 1 on the Oricon chart, becoming one of the best-selling works of her career.
items.artistIntroZh: 加藤米莉亚（Miliyah Kato），日本女歌手、词曲作者，生于东京。她以融合R&B、嘻哈与流行乐的都市风格闻名，代表作包括《Lovers Part II》《Sayonara Baby》等，被誉为“日本R&B女王”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Miliyah Kato is a Japanese singer-songwriter from Tokyo. Known for blending R&B, hip-hop, and pop into an urban style, her representative works include "Lovers Part II" and "Sayonara Baby," earning her the title of one of Japan's R&B queens.

08-03.birthdayZh: 8月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《M.I.A.M.I.》和《M Best》。你的人生也像一张专辑，既有派对般热烈的能量，敢于在街头追逐梦想；也有温柔而坚定的旋律，把爱和成长唱成自己的精选集。愿你如这日子一般，既有不灭的热情，也有温柔的回响，生日快乐。
08-03.birthdayEn: August 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the bold, bass-thumping heartbeat of Pitbull’s M.I.A.M.I., a debut that danced with unapologetic fire, and the soulful, reflective journey of Miliyah Kato’s M Best, a collection of heartfelt crescendos. Let your year ahead carry that same spirit: the courage to start something new with a rhythm all your own, and the grace to gather your most beautiful moments into a masterpiece. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Hot
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot》是罗马尼亚歌手Inna的首张录音室专辑，以Eurodance和Electro House为核心风格，融合了舞池节拍与流行旋律。专辑以强劲的合成器低音、重复性副歌和清凉的 vocal 为特色，是2000年代末欧洲舞曲浪潮的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Hot" is the debut studio album by Romanian singer Inna, centered on Eurodance and Electro House, blending dancefloor beats with pop melodies. It features powerful synth bass, repetitive choruses, and cool vocals, making it a representative work of the late-2000s European dance wave.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Hot》最初只是Inna在录音室里随意哼唱的demo，被制作人Play & Win发现后迅速完成编曲。歌曲在罗马尼亚电台播出后意外爆红，随后席卷欧洲多国榜单。专辑封面原本计划在海边拍摄，但因天气原因改在室内完成，最终效果反而更具时尚感。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Hot" was originally a demo Inna casually hummed in the studio; producer Play & Win quickly arranged it after discovering it. The song unexpectedly became a hit after airing on Romanian radio, then swept charts across Europe. The album cover was originally planned for a beach shoot but was moved indoors due to weather, resulting in a more stylish look.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了罗马尼亚舞曲在国际上的知名度，使Inna成为首位打入英国单曲榜前十的罗马尼亚女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album boosted the international recognition of Romanian dance music, making Inna the first Romanian female artist to break into the UK Singles Chart top 10.
items.artistIntroZh: Inna，本名Elena Alexandra Apostoleanu，罗马尼亚歌手、词曲作者。她以Eurodance和House音乐风格闻名，代表作包括《Hot》《Sun Is Up》等，是2000年代末欧洲最成功的舞曲女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Inna, born Elena Alexandra Apostoleanu, is a Romanian singer and songwriter. Known for her Eurodance and house music style, her hits include "Hot" and "Sun Is Up," making her one of the most successful European dance female artists of the late 2000s.

items.name: The Piper at the Gates of Dawn
items.descriptionZh: 《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》是英国摇滚乐队Pink Floyd的首张录音室专辑，以迷幻摇滚（Psychedelic Pop）为核心风格，融合了太空摇滚、自由即兴和实验音效。作品以梦幻的旋律、迷离的键盘音色和诗意的歌词为特色，是1960年代伦敦迷幻场景的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: "The Piper at the Gates of Dawn" is the debut studio album by British rock band Pink Floyd, centered on psychedelic pop, blending space rock, free improvisation, and experimental sound effects. It features dreamy melodies, hazy keyboard tones, and poetic lyrics, making it an iconic work of the 1960s London psychedelic scene.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦著名的Abbey Road录音室，与The Beatles的《Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band》同期进行。主创Syd Barrett经常在录音时即兴改变歌曲结构，导致工程师们手忙脚乱。专辑名取自凯尔特神话，Barrett曾表示这象征着他童年对奇幻世界的迷恋。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at the famous Abbey Road Studios in London, simultaneously with The Beatles' "Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band." Lead creator Syd Barrett often changed song structures on the fly during sessions, keeping engineers scrambling. The album title comes from Celtic mythology; Barrett said it symbolized his childhood fascination with fantasy worlds.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认为迷幻摇滚的奠基之作之一，深刻影响了后续前卫摇滚和太空摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely regarded as one of the foundational works of psychedelic rock, deeply influencing the development of progressive rock and space rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Pink Floyd，英国摇滚乐队，1965年成立于伦敦。早期以Syd Barrett为主导的迷幻摇滚��格闻名，后转向前卫摇滚，代表作包括《The Dark Side of the Moon》《Wish You Were Here》等，是全球最具影响力的摇滚乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pink Floyd, an English rock band formed in London in 1965. Initially known for Syd Barrett-led psychedelic rock, they later evolved into progressive rock, with masterpieces including "The Dark Side of the Moon" and "Wish You Were Here," making them one of the most influential rock bands worldwide.

items.name: Ben
items.descriptionZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊1972年发行的第二张个人录音室专辑，风格偏向轻柔的民谣与乡村流行。核心特色在于同名主打歌《Ben》——一首为同名电影创作的抒情曲，展现了杰克逊少年时期清澈、细腻的嗓音，编曲以原声吉他和弦乐为主，情感真挚动人。
items.descriptionEn: Ben is Michael Jackson's second solo studio album, released in 1972, leaning towards soft folk and country pop. Its core feature is the title track Ben, a heartfelt ballad for the film of the same name, showcasing Jackson's clear, delicate adolescent vocals with acoustic guitar and string arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Ben》原本是为电影《老鼠也疯狂》创作的，讲述一个小男孩与一只老鼠的友谊。迈克尔·杰克逊在录制时年仅14岁，他凭借这首歌获得了奥斯卡最佳原创歌曲提名，成为当时最年轻的奥斯卡提名歌手之一。
items.storiesEn: The title track Ben was originally written for the film Ben, about a boy's friendship with a rat. Michael Jackson was only 14 when he recorded it, and the song earned an Academy Award nomination for Best Original Song, making him one of the youngest Oscar-nominated singers at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Ben》是迈克尔·杰克逊早期个人事业的重要里程碑，标志着他从童星向独立艺人的转型，其同名曲成为他第一首美国公告牌百强单曲榜冠军单曲。
items.historicalImpactEn: Ben was a major milestone in Michael Jackson's early solo career, marking his transition from child star to independent artist, and the title track became his first Billboard Hot 100 number-one single.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（美国）是流行音乐史上最具影响力的艺人之一，主要风格为流行、放克和摇滚。代表作包括《Thriller》《Billie Jean》《Beat It》等，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (USA) is one of the most influential artists in pop music history, known for pop, funk, and rock. His iconic hits include Thriller, Billie Jean, and Beat It, earning him the title 'King of Pop'.

08-04.birthdayZh: 8月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《The Piper at the Gates of Dawn》——迷幻而勇敢的初啼，像你一样带着探索的光；也有《Ben》的温柔，教会人心底最柔软的抒情。你往后的日子，可以是星辰大海的远征，也可以是小径上坚定的微光。生日快乐，愿你始终忠于自己，像它们一样，成为时代里独一无二的回响。
08-04.birthdayEn: August 4 is your birthday—a date that gifted the world with music of bold beginnings and gentle soul. Like Pink Floyd’s Piper at the Gates of Dawn, may your year be a psychedelic voyage into imagination and wonder. And like Michael Jackson’s Ben, may your heart shine with tenderness and quiet strength. You are a melody of light and growth, born on a day that reminds us all to start anew with courage and grace. Here’s to the beautiful symphony you are writing.

items.name: The Final Album
items.descriptionZh: 《The Final Album》是德国流行二人组Modern Talking在2003年发行的精选集，风格以R&B/Soul为基调，融合了欧式舞曲元素。专辑收录了乐队巅峰时期的多首热门单曲，如《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等，以流畅的旋律和灵魂乐般的转音为特色。
items.descriptionEn: The Final Album is a 2003 compilation by German duo Modern Talking, rooted in R&B/Soul with Euro-disco influences. It features many of their biggest hits like Brother Louie and Cheri Cheri Lady, characterized by smooth melodies and soulful vocal runs.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Modern Talking在1998年重组后第二次解散的终结篇。组合成员Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders因个人矛盾再次分道扬镳，这张精选集被视为对1980年代辉煌的告别。Bohlen曾透露，专辑名称“最终”意在彻底结束合作，但后来两人关系一度缓和。
items.storiesEn: This album marked the end of Modern Talking's second reunion, after which Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders parted ways again due to personal conflicts. The compilation was seen as a farewell to their 1980s glory; Bohlen later said the title 'Final' was meant to end their collaboration for good.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking（德国）是1980年代最成功的欧洲流行二人组之一，主要风格为欧式舞曲和流行。代表作包括《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》《You're My Heart, You're My Soul》等，全球��量超过1.2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking (Germany) is one of the most successful European pop duos of the 1980s, known for Euro-disco and pop. Their hits include Brother Louie, Cheri Cheri Lady, and You're My Heart, You're My Soul, with over 120 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: The Mission
items.descriptionZh: 《The Mission》是意大利电影配乐大师埃尼奥·莫里康内为1986年同名电影创作的经典原声专辑，属于古典/管弦乐风格。核心特色是融合了南美土著乐器、教堂管风琴与宏大的交响乐，如著名的《Gabriel's Oboe》以双簧管独奏传递出神圣与悲悯的情感。
items.descriptionEn: The Mission is the classic soundtrack by Italian composer Ennio Morricone for the 1986 film of the same name, in classical/orchestral style. Its core features blend South American indigenous instruments, church organ, and grand symphonic arrangements, notably Gabriel's Oboe with its oboe solo conveying sacred and compassionate emotion.
items.storiesZh: 莫里康内为《教会》创作配乐时，亲自前往南美洲丛林录制当地土著音乐元素。导演罗兰·约菲原本希望用传统交响乐，但莫里康内坚持加入印第安笛和鼓，最终创造出独特的声音。专辑录音时，莫里康内要求管弦乐团在罗马一座古老教堂内演奏，以捕捉自然的混响效果。
items.storiesEn: For The Mission's score, Morricone traveled to South American jungles to record indigenous musical elements. Director Roland Joffé initially wanted traditional symphonic music, but Morricone insisted on including Indian flutes and drums, creating a unique sound. The album was recorded in an ancient Roman church to capture natural reverb.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Mission》原声被誉为电影配乐史上的巅峰之一，莫里康内凭借此片获得金球奖最佳原创配乐，《Gabriel's Oboe》成为全球最著名的电影旋律之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Mission soundtrack is regarded as one of the greatest film scores in history; Morricone won a Golden Globe for Best Original Score, and Gabriel's Oboe became one of the most famous film melodies worldwide.
items.artistIntroZh: 埃尼奥·莫里康内（意大利）是20世纪最伟大的电影配乐作曲家之一，风格涵盖古典、爵士和实验音乐。代表作包括《荒野大镖客》《天堂电影院》《教会》等，曾获奥斯卡终身成就奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Ennio Morricone (Italy) was one of the greatest film composers of the 20th century, spanning classical, jazz, and experimental music. His iconic scores include The Good, the Bad and the Ugly, Cinema Paradiso, and The Mission, and he received an Academy Honorary Award.

items.name: Hurricane Venus
items.descriptionZh: 《Hurricane Venus》是韩国流行天后BoA于2010年发行的第六张韩语正规专辑，主打流行与电子舞曲风格。核心特色是强劲的节拍、充满力量的演唱和未来感十足的编曲，同名主打歌《Hurricane Venus》以强烈的合成器音效和BoA的爆发力嗓音展现了女王般的舞台气场。
items.descriptionEn: Hurricane Venus is BoA's sixth Korean studio album, released in 2010, focusing on pop and electronic dance. Its core features include powerful beats, forceful vocals, and futuristic arrangements; the title track Hurricane Venus showcases intense synth sounds and BoA's explosive vocal presence, exuding a queen-like stage aura.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，BoA因长期高强度工作导致声带结节，一度需要休息。但她坚持完成录制，并在《Hurricane Venus》中尝试了更粗犷的唱法。主打歌MV在韩国和美国两地取景，耗资巨大，其中BoA的机械舞造型灵感来自科幻电影《黑客帝国》。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, BoA suffered from vocal cord nodules due to intense work schedules and needed rest. She persevered through recording, experimenting with a rawer vocal style in Hurricane Venus. The music video was shot in both Korea and the US, with high production costs, and her robotic dance look was inspired by The Matrix.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（韩国）是亚洲流行乐坛的代表性女歌手，主要风格为流行、舞曲和R&B。代表作包括《No.1》《Only One》《Hurricane Venus》等，被誉为“亚洲之星”，是首位在日韩两国均取得巨大成功的K-pop艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (South Korea) is a representative female artist in Asian pop music, known for pop, dance, and R&B. Her hits include No.1, Only One, and Hurricane Venus, earning her the title 'Asia's Star' as the first K-pop artist to achieve massive success in both Japan and Korea.

08-05.birthdayZh: 8月5日，是你的生日。这一天曾发行过《Hurricane Venus》，像风暴中心那股不被驯服的力量，提醒你每一次旋转都藏着挣脱的勇气。也有《The Final Album》，仿佛在说：所有篇章终会收尾，但旋律会继续在时间里发光。你站在夏末的光里，本身就是一首未完的歌。
08-05.birthdayEn: August 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us with soundtracks of journey and strength. Like Ennio Morricone’s “The Mission,” may your year be filled with sweeping, soulful purpose. And like BoA’s “Hurricane Venus,” may you move through life with unstoppable power and grace. You are a beautiful melody of courage and heart. Celebrate the music you bring to the world, and know you are deeply loved. Happy birthday, dear soul.

items.name: THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 3~
items.descriptionZh: 《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 3~》是2008年发行的《名侦探柯南》动画主题曲精选集第三辑，由多位艺人共同参与，风格以J-Pop为主。核心特色是收录了2005年至2008年间动画的多首片头片尾曲，如仓木麻衣的《Growing of my heart》等，旋律朗朗上口，充满青春活力。
items.descriptionEn: THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 3~ is a 2008 compilation featuring theme songs from the anime Detective Conan, performed by various artists in J-Pop style. Its core feature includes opening and ending themes from 2005 to 2008, such as Mai Kuraki's Growing of my heart, with catchy melodies and youthful energy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的选曲由《名侦探柯南》动画制作组和唱片公���共同决定，收录的歌曲均经过粉丝投票筛选。其中仓木麻衣的《Growing of my heart》是动画第12首片头曲，她本人也是《柯南》的忠实粉丝，曾多次为动画献唱，累计合作次数超过20次。
items.storiesEn: The track selection for this album was jointly decided by the Detective Conan production team and record labels, with songs chosen via fan voting. Mai Kuraki's Growing of my heart was the 12th opening theme; she is a devoted fan of the series and has collaborated with the anime over 20 times.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列精选集是《名侦探柯南》音乐史上重要的官方合辑，见证了动画从2000年代中后期到2010年代的流行音乐变迁，对动漫歌曲文化推广有积极影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation series is a significant official collection in Detective Conan music history, documenting the evolution of J-Pop from the mid-2000s to 2010s, positively influencing anime song culture.
items.artistIntroZh: 本专辑由多位日本流行艺人参与，包括仓木麻衣、ZARD、B'z等，风格以J-Pop和摇滚为主。仓木麻衣是日本代表性女歌手，代表作有《Secret of my heart》《Time after time》等，被誉为“平成三大歌姬”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: This album features multiple Japanese pop artists, including Mai Kuraki, ZARD, and B'z, primarily in J-Pop and rock styles. Mai Kuraki is a leading Japanese female singer, known for hits like Secret of my heart and Time after time, regarded as one of the 'Three Great Divas of Heisei Era'.

items.name: All I Can Do
items.descriptionZh: 《All I Can Do》是多莉·帕顿1976年发行的民谣/乡村风格专辑。这张作品融合了传统乡村音乐的叙事性与民谣的质朴感，以帕顿标志性的清澈嗓音和真挚情感为核心。专辑中的歌曲多围绕爱情、家庭与生活感悟展开，编曲简约而富有感染力，展现了她作为创作歌手的深厚功底。
items.descriptionEn: "All I Can Do" is a folk/country album released by Dolly Parton in 1976. It blends traditional country storytelling with folk simplicity, centered on Parton's signature clear vocals and sincere emotion. The songs revolve around love, family, and life reflections, with minimalist yet heartfelt arrangements showcasing her prowess as a singer-songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制期间，多莉·帕顿正经历从乡村歌手向跨界流行明星的转型期。她坚持在纳什维尔完成录制，并邀请了长期合作的乐手参与。专辑中的歌曲《All I Can Do》原本是为丈夫卡尔·迪恩而写，但帕顿后来透露，这首歌实际上也表达了她对音乐事业的执着——尽管面临行业压力，她依然选择忠于自己的艺术直觉。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Dolly Parton was transitioning from a country singer to a crossover pop star. She insisted on recording in Nashville and collaborated with her longtime musicians. The title track "All I Can Do" was originally written for her husband Carl Dean, but Parton later revealed it also expressed her dedication to her music career—choosing to stay true to her artistic instincts despite industry pressures.
items.artistIntroZh: 多莉·帕顿是美国著名乡村音乐创作歌手、演员和慈善家。她以独特的嗓音、标志性的金发造型和幽默感闻名，代表作包括《Jolene》《9 to 5》等。帕顿在乡村音乐和流行音乐领域均有巨大影响力，是格莱美奖和乡村音乐协会奖的常客。
items.artistIntroEn: Dolly Parton is a renowned American country music singer-songwriter, actress, and philanthropist. Known for her distinctive voice, iconic blonde look, and humor, her hits include "Jolene" and "9 to 5." Parton has had immense influence in both country and pop music, winning multiple Grammy and CMA awards.

08-06.birthdayZh: 8月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 3》，像一场追索真相的旅程，而你的人生同样充满探索的勇敢。还有Dolly Parton的《All I Can Do》，她说“我所能做的”就是尽力去爱、去唱。你也一样，不必完美，只需心怀乐观与坚韧。愿你新的一岁，继续带着好奇与真诚，把每个平凡的日子，活成一首温柔有力的歌。
08-06.birthdayEn: August 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us “The Best of Detective Conan 3,” a collection of spirited mystery and adventure, and Dolly Parton’s “All I Can Do,” an album that sings of resilience and heartfelt grace. Like these albums, your life weaves together curiosity and warmth—a melody of strength and gentle wonder. May this year unfold as your own greatest compilation, filled with songs of courage, joy, and the quiet beauty of simply being you. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier
items.descriptionZh: 《A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier》是2009年发行的致敬合辑，由多位艺术家重新演绎德国嘻哈先驱Die Fantastischen Vier的经典作品。专辑涵盖了嘻哈、流行和电子等多种风格，��核心仍以嘻哈节奏和说唱为基础。各参与艺人用不同方式向这支开创性乐队的音乐遗产致敬，展现了Die Fantastischen Vier对德国嘻哈文化的深远影响。
items.descriptionEn: "A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier" is a 2009 tribute compilation featuring various artists reimagining classics by German hip-hop pioneers Die Fantastischen Vier. The album spans hip-hop, pop, and electronic styles but remains rooted in hip-hop rhythms and rap. Each contributor pays homage to the band's musical legacy, highlighting their profound impact on German hip-hop culture.
items.storiesZh: 这张致敬合辑的策划始于2008年，当时Die Fantastischen Vier刚庆祝完出道20周年。制作人邀请了一众德国本土及国际艺人参与，包括流行歌手和电子音乐人。有趣的是，原乐队成员Smudo和Thomas D并未直接参与选曲，而是完全信任致敬者的创意。专辑发行后，Die Fantastischen Vier在采访中表示，听到自己作品被不同风格重新诠释，既惊讶又感动。
items.storiesEn: This tribute album was conceived in 2008, shortly after Die Fantastischen Vier celebrated their 20th anniversary. Producers invited a mix of German and international artists, including pop singers and electronic musicians. Notably, original band members Smudo and Thomas D did not directly participate in track selection, fully trusting the contributors' creativity. After release, Die Fantastischen Vier expressed surprise and emotion at hearing their works reinterpreted across genres.
items.artistIntroZh: Die Fantastischen Vier是德国嘻哈乐队的先驱，成立于1989年，成员包括Smudo、Thomas D、Michi Beck和And.Y.。他们以德语说唱打破英语垄断，代表作《Die da!?!》《Sie ist weg》等成为德国嘻哈经典。乐队推动了德语嘻哈的普及，影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Die Fantastischen Vier are German hip-hop pioneers, formed in 1989 with members Smudo, Thomas D, Michi Beck, and And.Y. They broke English-language dominance with German rap, with hits like "Die da!?!" and "Sie ist weg" becoming classics. The band popularized German hip-hop and left a lasting legacy.

items.name: Alternative
items.descriptionZh: 《Alternative》是宠物店男孩1995年发行的双CD精选集，收录了乐队1985年至1994年间所有B面歌曲及罕见曲目。这张专辑以流行电音为核心，融合了合成器流行、舞曲和艺术流行元素。它展示了尼尔·坦南特和克��斯·洛在主流热门单曲之外的实验性和创意深度，是乐迷了解其音乐多样性的重要作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Alternative" is a 1995 double-CD compilation by Pet Shop Boys, collecting all B-sides and rare tracks from 1985 to 1994. Centered on synth-pop, it blends electronic pop, dance, and art pop elements. The album showcases Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe's experimental side beyond their mainstream hits, offering fans insight into their musical diversity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的构想源于克里斯·洛对B面歌曲的珍视，他认为这些作品同样反映了乐队的创造力。在整理曲目时，两人发现许多早期B面歌曲的母带已受损，不得不花费数月进行修复和重新混音。尼尔·坦南特曾开玩笑说，这张专辑像是“乐队的地下室清理”，但最终它成为了粉丝眼中的宝藏合集，尤其收录了《It's a Sin》的罕见混音版。
items.storiesEn: The album idea came from Chris Lowe's appreciation for B-sides, believing they reflected the band's creativity. While compiling tracks, they found many early B-side masters were damaged, requiring months of restoration and remixing. Neil Tennant joked it was like "cleaning out the band's basement," but it became a fan treasure, especially featuring a rare remix of "It's a Sin."
items.artistIntroZh: 宠物店男孩是英国合成器流行二人组，由尼尔·坦南特和克里斯·洛于1981年成立。他们以机智的歌词、精致的电子编曲和时尚形象著称，代表作包括《West End Girls》《It's a Sin》等。宠物店男孩在全球售出超过5000万张唱片，是流行音乐史上最成功的双人组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Pet Shop Boys are a British synth-pop duo formed in 1981 by Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe. Known for witty lyrics, polished electronic arrangements, and stylish image, their hits include "West End Girls" and "It's a Sin." They have sold over 50 million records worldwide, making them one of the most successful duos in pop history.

08-07.birthdayZh: 8月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Alternative》，它收藏了那些未被聚光灯照亮的旋律，正如你身上那些不为人知的温柔与倔强。还有那部《A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier》，是无数声音对经典的致敬，如同你生命里所有爱你的人，用各自的方式为你谱写祝福。愿你在新的一岁，懂得自己本身就是一场珍贵的合辑。
08-07.birthdayEn: August 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the warm, collaborative spirit of "A Tribute to Die Fantastischen Vier," a celebration of togetherness and rhythm, and the rare, shimmering gems of Pet Shop Boys' "Alternative," proof that every hidden melody holds its own light. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful compilation—a blend of bold harmony and quiet, brilliant surprises. May your year ahead echo with joyful beats and the sweetest of rare moments, all tuned perfectly to you.

items.name: Back on the Block
items.descriptionZh: 《Back on the Block》是昆西·琼斯1989年发行的概念专辑，融合了嘻哈、放克、灵魂乐和爵士乐。这张作品以嘻哈节奏为骨架，邀请众多巨星客串，包括雷·查尔斯、艾拉·费兹杰拉和说唱团体。专辑旨在打破种族和音乐流派壁垒，通过嘻哈这一新兴形式连接不同时代的黑人音乐传统，展现了琼斯作为制作人��宏大视野。
items.descriptionEn: "Back on the Block" is a 1989 concept album by Quincy Jones blending hip-hop, funk, soul, and jazz. Built on hip-hop rhythms, it features star guests including Ray Charles, Ella Fitzgerald, and rap groups. The album aimed to break racial and genre barriers, connecting Black music traditions across eras through the emerging hip-hop form, showcasing Jones' grand vision as a producer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制堪称音乐史上的豪华阵容。昆西·琼斯动用了自己在业界的人脉，邀请了超过30位艺术家参与。最令人难忘的是，他成功说服了当时已很少录音的爵士传奇艾拉·费兹杰拉与说唱组合Big Daddy Kane合作录制《I'll Be Good to You》。费兹杰拉起初对嘻哈风格感到陌生，但在琼斯的鼓励下，她欣然接受了这次跨代际的合作。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was a star-studded event. Quincy Jones mobilized his industry connections to invite over 30 artists. Most memorably, he persuaded jazz legend Ella Fitzgerald, who rarely recorded at the time, to collaborate with rap group Big Daddy Kane on "I'll Be Good to You." Fitzgerald was initially unfamiliar with hip-hop but embraced the cross-generational collaboration after Jones' encouragement.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑在商业和评论上均获成功，荣获格莱美年度最佳专辑奖。它证明了嘻哈音乐可以与爵士、灵魂乐等传统流派深度融合，为后来嘻哈跨界合作树立了典范。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was both a commercial and critical success, winning the Grammy for Album of the Year. It demonstrated hip-hop's ability to deeply fuse with jazz and soul, setting a benchmark for future hip-hop cross-genre collaborations.
items.artistIntroZh: 昆西·琼斯是美国传奇音乐制作人、作曲家和指挥家，职业生涯跨越60多年。他参与制作了迈克尔·杰克逊的《Thriller》等经典专辑，并多次获得格莱美奖。琼斯以融合爵士、放克、流行和嘻哈风格而闻名，是音乐界最具影响力的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Quincy Jones is an American legendary music producer, composer, and conductor with a career spanning over 60 years. He produced iconic albums like Michael Jackson's "Thriller" and won multiple Grammys. Known for blending jazz, funk, pop, and hip-hop, Jones is one of the most influential figures in music.

items.name: Video
items.descriptionZh: 《Video》是法国电子音乐人Pakito于2006年发行的专辑，以电子舞曲为核心，融合了浩室和欧洲舞曲元素。专辑以强劲的节拍、合成器旋律和重复性人声采样��特色，营造出充满活力的俱乐部氛围。Pakito的作品深受20世纪80年代电子音乐影响，同时注入了当代舞曲的制作手法。
items.descriptionEn: "Video" is a 2006 album by French electronic musician Pakito, centered on electronic dance music with house and Eurodance elements. It features driving beats, synth melodies, and repetitive vocal samples, creating an energetic club atmosphere. Pakito's work is influenced by 1980s electronic music while incorporating contemporary dance production techniques.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的同名主打歌《Video》采样了20世纪80年代经典电子曲目《Popcorn》，Pakito重新编排后使其成为当年欧洲舞池的热门单曲。有趣的是，Pakito在录制专辑时主要使用家用电脑和软件合成器，而非专业录音室设备。他曾在采访中表示，这种“卧室制作人”的方式让他能更自由地实验声音，专辑中的许多创意都来自深夜即兴创作。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Video" samples the classic 1980s electronic tune "Popcorn," which Pakito rearranged into a European dance floor hit. Interestingly, Pakito recorded most of the album using a home computer and software synthesizers rather than professional studio equipment. He mentioned in interviews that this "bedroom producer" approach allowed him to experiment freely, with many ideas coming from late-night improvisations.
items.artistIntroZh: Pakito（本名Julien Ranouil）是法国电子音乐制作人，以单曲《Video》和《Living on Video》闻名。他的音乐风格以浩室和欧洲舞曲为主，深受20世纪80年代合成器流行乐影响。Pakito在21世纪初的欧洲电子舞曲场景中具有一定知名度，其作品在法国和德国等地广受欢迎。
items.artistIntroEn: Pakito (born Julien Ranouil) is a French electronic music producer, known for singles "Video" and "Living on Video." His style blends house and Eurodance, heavily influenced by 1980s synth-pop. Pakito gained recognition in the early 2000s European electronic dance scene, with popularity in France and Germany.

items.name: Shivers
items.descriptionZh: 《Shivers》是Armin van Buuren于2005年发行的第二张录音室专辑，融合了流行与电子舞曲元素。专辑以旋律化的Trance节奏为核心，搭配空灵的人声和充满情感张力的编曲，展现了Armin标志性的“ uplifting trance”风格。其中单曲《Shivers》和《Serenity》成为俱乐部热门曲目，奠定了他在主流电子音乐界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Shivers is Armin van Buuren's second studio album, released in 2005, blending pop and electronic dance music. Centered on melodic trance rhythms, the album features ethereal vocals and emotionally charged arrangements, showcasing Armin's signature uplifting trance style. Tracks like 'Shivers' and 'Serenity' became club hits, solidifying his status in mainstream electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Shivers》的创作灵感源于Armin在巡演途中经历的一次强烈情感冲击。录制过程中，他坚持使用模拟合成器以保留温暖音色，甚至将录音室温度调低以营造“颤抖”的氛围。此外，与歌手Susana的合作版本最初因风格差异被搁置，后经重新编曲才得以收录。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Shivers' was inspired by an intense emotional experience Armin had during a tour. During recording, he insisted on using analog synthesizers to preserve a warm tone and even lowered the studio temperature to create a 'shivering' atmosphere. A collaboration with vocalist Susana was initially shelved due to style differences but later re-arranged for inclusion.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren，荷兰DJ兼制作人，以Trance音乐闻名，被誉为“Trance之神”。他连续多年位居《DJ Mag》百大DJ榜首，代表作包括《Shivers》、《Intense》等，是全球电子音乐界的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch DJ and producer renowned for trance music, often called the 'King of Trance.' He topped DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list for multiple years, with iconic tracks like 'Shivers' and 'Intense,' making him a global icon in electronic music.

08-08.birthdayZh: 8月8日，是你的生日。这一天，昆西·琼斯用《Back on the Block》编织出跨越世代的音乐对话，像热带雨林里所有声音的合唱，告诉你——你的存在本身就是一场盛大的合奏。而Armin van Buuren的《Shivers》里那些流淌的旋律，正轻轻颤动，像清晨第一缕光穿过露珠。愿你如这些乐章，既有激荡的节拍，也有深情的回响。生日快乐，这世界因你而更动听。
08-08.birthdayEn: August 8 is your birthday. Like Quincy Jones’ *Back on the Block*, may your year be a grand fusion of every vibrant part of you—soulful, bold, and richly layered. And like Armin van Buuren’s *Shivers*, may each day hold a melody of beauty and a pulse of joy that lifts your spirit. You are a work of art in motion, and today the world celebrates the masterpiece that is you. Shine on, and happy, happy birthday.

items.name: Back to Basics
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Basics》是Christina Aguilera于2006年发行的双碟专辑，回归爵士、蓝调和灵魂乐根源。第一碟融合了复古摇摆与流行旋律，第二碟则更偏向现代R&B和福音元素。专辑以“老派”风格为核心，强调现场乐队演奏和管弦编排，展现了Christina极具爆发力的嗓音和对音乐传统的致敬。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Basics is Christina Aguilera's 2006 double album, returning to jazz, blues, and soul roots. Disc one blends retro swing with pop melodies, while disc two leans into modern R&B and gospel elements. Centered on an 'old-school' style, the album emphasizes live band performances and orchestral arrangements, showcasing Christina's powerful vocals and homage to musical traditions.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Christina特意邀请了一批老牌爵士和蓝调乐手参与，包括传奇小号手Arturo Sandoval。她曾透露，为了唱出1920年代的感觉，她在录音前连续数周观看黑白电影并模仿早期歌手的咬字。此外，单曲《Ain't No Other Man》的鼓点采样自一首1940年代的蓝调歌曲，因版权问题险些被拒。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Christina invited veteran jazz and blues musicians, including legendary trumpeter Arturo Sandoval. She revealed that to capture a 1920s feel, she watched black-and-white films for weeks and imitated early singers' diction. The drum sample for 'Ain't No Other Man' was taken from a 1940s blues song, nearly rejected due to copyright issues.
items.artistIntroZh: Christina Aguilera，美国歌手、词曲作者，以宽广音域和强劲嗓音著称。她是流行天后之一，代表作包括《Genie in a Bottle》、《Beautiful》和《Back to Basics》等，多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Christina Aguilera is an American singer and songwriter known for her wide vocal range and powerful voice. A pop diva, her hits include 'Genie in a Bottle,' 'Beautiful,' and 'Back to Basics,' earning multiple Grammy Awards.

08-09.birthdayZh: 8月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《Back to Basics》，提醒我们所有光芒都扎根于最真实的自己。你不必急着成为谁，那些走过的弯路、暗夜里的沉思，都在把你塑造成独一无二的存在。像专辑名所寓意的那样，在纷繁中回到本真，找到属于自己的节奏。生日快乐，愿你在自己的时区里，从容生长。
08-09.birthdayEn: August 9 is your birthday. On this day in history, Christina Aguilera released "Back to Basics," an album that stripped away pretense and celebrated raw talent, reminding us that returning to what’s real is a powerful act of renewal. Like that album’s spirit of honest, joyful expression, may your year ahead be a symphony of authenticity—layered with bold dreams and tender moments. You are a masterpiece in progress, and the world is lucky to hear your unique song. Happy birthday.

items.name: 2Pac Live
items.descriptionZh: 《2Pac Live》是Tupac Shakur于2004年发行的现场专辑，收录了他在1990年代多场演唱会的录音。专辑以硬核Hip-Hop为核心，充满即兴说唱、观众互动和激昂的舞台能量，展现了Tupac作为街头诗人的现场魅力。曲目涵盖《California Love》、《Dear Mama》等经典歌曲的现场版本。
items.descriptionEn: 2Pac Live is a 2004 live album by Tupac Shakur, featuring recordings from his 1990s concerts. Centered on hardcore hip-hop, it brims with freestyle raps, crowd interaction, and explosive stage energy, showcasing Tupac's charisma as a street poet. Tracks include live versions of classics like 'California Love' and 'Dear Mama.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的部分录音来自Tupac1996年在拉斯维加斯的一场演出，那场演唱会原定为其厂牌Death Row Records的庆祝活动。据现场工作人员回忆，Tupac在演唱《Hit 'Em Up》时即兴改词，直接diss了当时的竞争对手，导致台下气氛一度紧张。这些录音在Tupac去世后由其母亲Afeni Shakur授权整理发行。
items.storiesEn: Some recordings come from a 1996 Las Vegas show originally intended as a Death Row Records celebration. Staff recalled Tupac improvised lyrics during 'Hit 'Em Up,' directly dissing rivals, creating tension in the crowd. The recordings were compiled and released posthumously by his mother, Afeni Shakur.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Tupac为数不多的官方现场专辑，《2Pac Live》为乐迷提供了其舞台表演的珍贵记录，进一步巩固了他作为Hip-Hop文化最具影响力人物之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of Tupac's few official live albums, 2Pac Live offers a precious record of his stage performances, further cementing his status as one of hip-hop's most influential figures.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur，美国说唱歌手、演员，被誉为Hip-Hop史上最伟大的艺术家之一。他的音乐融合社会议题与街头叙事，代表作包括《All Eyez on Me》、《Me Against the World》等，其作品至今影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur was an American rapper and actor, considered one of the greatest hip-hop artists of all time. His music blended social issues with street narratives, with iconic albums like All Eyez on Me and Me Against the World, leaving a lasting legacy.

items.name: Off the Wall
items.descriptionZh: 《Off the Wall》是Michael Jackson于1979年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合了迪斯科、放克和流行元素。专辑以流畅的节奏、华丽的弦乐编曲和Michael标志性的假声演唱为特色，开创了流行与舞曲结合的新范式。单曲《Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough》和《Rock with You》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: Off the Wall is Michael Jackson's 1979 fifth studio album, blending disco, funk, and pop. Characterized by smooth rhythms, lush string arrangements, and Michael's signature falsetto, it pioneered a new pop-dance fusion. Singles like 'Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough' and 'Rock with You' became global hits.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作过程中，Michael与制作人Quincy Jones产生了深厚默契，但Quincy最初对《Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough》的Demo并不满意，认为旋律过于简单。Michael坚持己见，最终在录音室里即兴加入了一段标志性的“hee-hee”声，让整首歌瞬间焕发生机。此外，专辑封面拍摄时Michael坚持穿白色袜子，以突出舞步效果。
items.storiesEn: During production, Michael developed a deep rapport with producer Quincy Jones, but Quincy initially disliked the demo of 'Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough,' finding it too simple. Michael insisted, and during recording, he improvised a signature 'hee-hee' vocal that brought the song to life. For the album cover, Michael insisted on wearing white socks to highlight his dance moves.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Off the Wall》标志着Michael Jackson从童星向成熟艺术家的转型，被视为现代流行音乐的里程碑。它不仅打破了种族壁垒，还奠定了80年代流行音乐的基调，并获格莱美奖肯定。
items.historicalImpactEn: Off the Wall marked Michael Jackson's transition from child star to mature artist, considered a milestone in modern pop music. It broke racial barriers, set the tone for 1980s pop, and earned Grammy recognition.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson，美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以标志性的舞步、跨越种族的音乐影响力和慈善事业闻名，代表作包括《Thriller》、《Bad》和《Off the Wall》等，是史上最畅销的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop.' Famous for his iconic dance moves, cross-racial musical influence, and philanthropy, his landmark albums include Thriller, Bad, and Off the Wall, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time.

items.name: Most Wanted
items.descriptionZh: 《Most Wanted》是Hilary Duff于2005年发行的精选集，收录了她早期热门单曲以及多首新歌。专辑以流行摇滚和青少年流行乐为核心，旋律朗朗上口，歌词聚焦青春与成长主题。新单曲《Wake Up》和《Beat of My Heart》以轻快的节奏和电子元素点缀，展现了Hilary从迪士尼偶像向成熟流行歌手的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: Most Wanted is a 2005 greatest hits album by Hilary Duff, featuring her early hits and new songs. Centered on pop-rock and teen pop, it offers catchy melodies and lyrics about youth and growth. New singles 'Wake Up' and 'Beat of My Heart' incorporate upbeat rhythms and electronic touches, showcasing Hilary's transition from Disney idol to mature pop artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的新歌《Wake Up》录制时，Hilary正值繁忙的影视拍摄期，她常在片场和录音室之间奔波。制作人透露，Hilary在录音棚里经常即兴加入一些俏皮的口语段落，比如“Come on, wake up!”的喊叫，这些最终被保留在成品中。此外，精选集的封面照片拍摄仅用了一小时，因为Hilary当天还要赶回片场拍戏。
items.storiesEn: While recording the new song 'Wake Up,' Hilary was busy with film shoots, often rushing between set and studio. The producer noted that she improvised playful spoken lines like 'Come on, wake up!' which were kept in the final track. The cover photo shoot took only an hour, as Hilary had to return to the film set the same day.
items.artistIntroZh: Hilary Duff，美国歌手、演员，因主演迪士尼剧集《莉琪的异想世界》而走红。她的音乐以青少年流行和流行摇滚为主，代表作包括《So Yesterday》、《Come Clean》等，是2000年代青少年偶像的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Hilary Duff is an American singer and actress, rising to fame through the Disney series Lizzie McGuire. Her music focuses on teen pop and pop-rock, with hits like 'So Yesterday' and 'Come Clean,' making her a defining teen idol of the 2000s.

08-10.birthdayZh: 8月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Off the Wall》——像迈克尔·杰克逊挣脱童星的围墙，你也总在打破自己的边界。还有《2Pac Live》，那些未曾在录音室修饰过的即兴呐喊，正如你生命里最真实的爆发力。愿你在新的年岁里，像这些歌一样，既敢建造自己的舞台，也珍惜每一次热烈而自由的呼吸。
08-10.birthdayEn: August 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us music that dances with your spirit — the unstoppable fire of "2Pac Live" and the radiant joy of "Off the Wall." Like those albums, you bring both raw power and pure light into every room. May your year ahead feel like a greatest hits compilation: full of electric moments, soulful adventures, and verses that make your heart rise. You are a melody worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: A második X – 10 új felvétel
items.descriptionZh: 《A második X – 10 új felvétel》是匈牙利流行歌手Csaba Vastag于2011年发行的录音室专辑，延续了其标志性的流行抒情风格。专辑以十首全新录音作品为核心，旋律流畅且情感充沛，展现了Vastag在流行框架下对细腻人声表达的追求。
items.descriptionEn: "A második X – 10 új felvétel" is a studio album by Hungarian pop singer Csaba Vastag, released in 2011. It continues his signature pop ballad style, featuring ten new recordings with smooth melodies and emotional vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的标题意为“第二个X——10首新录音”，暗示了Vastag在匈牙利流行乐坛的第二次重要亮相。录制过程中，他特意与长期合作的制作人重新编排了多首未发行曲目，以期在声音上更贴近现场演出的自然质感。
items.storiesEn: The album title translates to "The Second X – 10 New Recordings," hinting at Vastag's second significant emergence in the Hungarian pop scene. During recording, he re-arranged several unreleased tracks with his long-time producer to achieve a more natural, live-performance sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Csaba Vastag是匈牙利流行男歌手，以温暖嗓音和抒情歌曲著称。他因参加电视选秀节目《Csillag Születik》而走红，代表作包括《A második X》系列专辑，在匈牙利及中欧地区拥有广泛听众。
items.artistIntroEn: Csaba Vastag is a Hungarian pop singer known for his warm voice and ballads. He rose to fame through the TV talent show "Csillag Születik," with representative works including the "A második X" album series, enjoying a broad audience in Hungary and Central Europe.

08-11.birthdayZh: 8月11日，是你的生日。就像Csaba Vastag在《A második X – 10 új felvétel》里唱的那样，生命总有第二次启程的机会。每一次呼吸都是全新的旋律，混着民谣的质朴与摇滚的热望。把日子过成温柔的节拍，在时光的磨盘上，碾出属于自己的光芒。
08-11.birthdayEn: August 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and it also welcomed the spirited energy of albums like Csaba Vastag's A második X – 10 új felvétel, a collection that celebrates new beginnings and a second act. Just as that album captures the warmth of fresh starts, may your year ahead be a beautiful melody of joy, growth, and countless bright notes. You are a song of light, and today, the world sings with you.

items.name: Old Ways
items.descriptionZh: 《Old Ways》是Neil Young于1985年发行的乡村民谣风格专辑，融合了传统乡村音乐与民谣叙事。专辑以原声吉他、钢棒吉他和悠扬的乡村和声为特色，歌词充满怀旧与反思，体现了Young对乡村根源的回归。
items.descriptionEn: "Old Ways" is a folk/country album by Neil Young, released in 1985. It blends traditional country music with folk storytelling, featuring acoustic guitar, pedal steel, and lush country harmonies, with lyrics full of nostalgia and reflection.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Neil Young与唱片公司Geffen Records的法律纠纷期间，Geffen曾起诉Young未制作“典型的Neil Young式”音乐。Young坚持回归乡村风格，并邀请了乡村音乐传奇Waylon Jennings和Johnny Paycheck参与录制，以此表明自己的艺术立场。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Neil Young's legal dispute with Geffen Records, which sued him for not making "typical Neil Young" music. Young insisted on returning to country style and invited country legends Waylon Jennings and Johnny Paycheck to participate, asserting his artistic stance.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Old Ways》被视为Neil Young在1980年代乡村三部曲的重要一环，巩固了他在乡村摇滚领域的跨界地位，也影响了后来另类乡村音乐的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Old Ways" is considered a key part of Neil Young's 1980s country trilogy, solidifying his crossover status in country rock and influencing the later development of alternative country music.
items.artistIntroZh: Neil Young是加拿大裔美国创作歌手，以其独特的嗓音和跨越民谣、乡村、摇滚的多元风格闻名。代表作包括《Harvest》《Heart of Gold》等，是摇滚乐史上最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Neil Young is a Canadian-American singer-songwriter known for his distinctive voice and eclectic style spanning folk, country, and rock. His代表作 include "Harvest" and "Heart of Gold," and he is one of the most influential artists in rock history.

08-12.birthdayZh: 8月12日，是你的生日。这一天，尼尔·扬的《Old Ways》曾拨动琴弦，让旧日的风穿过麦田，提醒我们：真正的力量不在追赶时光，而在拥抱来路。愿你像这张专辑一样，把走过的每一步都变成温柔的旋律——哪怕世界喧嚣，你依然可以踩着熟悉的节奏，在属于自己的田野里，慢慢生长，深深扎根。
08-12.birthdayEn: August 12 is your birthday. On this day, Neil Young released Old Ways, a heartfelt return to roots and simple truths, reminding us that growth often means honoring where we came from. Like the steady, honest strum of its country soul, may your year be grounded in warm memories and new beginnings. You are a living, breathing album of your own—each chapter unique, each melody worth celebrating. Happy birthday to you, a beautiful song still being written.

items.name: Trinity
items.descriptionZh: 《Trinity》是美国嘻哈团体Slum Village于2002年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以地下嘻哈为主，融合了爵士采样和流畅的节拍。专辑以其复杂的韵脚编排和灵魂乐般的旋律著称，展现了底特律嘻哈的独特质感。
items.descriptionEn: "Trinity" is the third studio album by American hip-hop group Slum Village, released in 2002. It features underground hip-hop with jazz samples and smooth beats, known for complex rhyme schemes and soulful melodies, showcasing the unique Detroit hip-hop sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Slum Village成员J Dilla（已故传奇制作人）参与的最后一张完整团体专辑。录制期间，Dilla的健康状况已开始恶化，但他仍坚持完成了大部分制作工作，专辑中许多节拍后来被证明是他最具创新性的作品之一。
items.storiesEn: This album is the last full group album featuring member J Dilla, the late legendary producer. During recording, Dilla's health was already declining, but he insisted on completing most of the production, with many beats later recognized as some of his most innovative work.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Trinity》是Slum Village在J Dilla时代的重要里程碑，对2000年代地下嘻哈和另类嘻哈产生了深远影响，尤其是Dilla的鼓点编排风格影响了无数后续制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Trinity" is a significant milestone in Slum Village's J Dilla era, deeply influencing 2000s underground and alternative hip-hop, particularly Dilla's drum programming style which inspired countless later producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Slum Village是美国底特律的嘻哈团体，由T3、Baatin和J Dilla组成，以爵士嘻哈风格闻名。代表作包括《Fantastic, Vol. 2》和《Trinity》，是地下嘻哈界最具影响力的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Slum Village is an American hip-hop group from Detroit, consisting of T3, Baatin, and J Dilla, known for jazz rap. Their代表作 include "Fantastic, Vol. 2" and "Trinity," making them one of the most influential groups in underground hip-hop.

08-13.birthdayZh: 8月13日，是你的生日。这一天，Slum Village发行了《Trinity》，用三层节奏织成暖流——爵士的慵懒、灵魂的呼吸、放克的不屈，像生命中那些温柔与倔强并存的时刻。愿你的新一岁，如这张专辑般层次丰富，每一次转折都有韵律，每一段旋律都托住你稳稳前行。
08-13.birthdayEn: August 13 is your birthday. On this day, Slum Village released "Trinity," an album built on soulful beats and the spirit of togetherness. Like that music, may your year flow with harmony, each note of your life blending resilience and joy. You are a unique rhythm in this world—a melody that deserves celebration, growth, and love. Here’s to another trip around the sun, where every moment feels as timeless and warm as the groove of a perfect track. Happy birthday.

items.name: A Moment of Forever
items.descriptionZh: 《A Moment of Forever》是美国乡村民谣传奇Kris Kristofferson于1995年发行的专辑，风格延续了其标志性的民谣乡村叙事。专辑以原声吉他为主导，歌词深刻探讨了爱情、失落与救赎，展现了Kristofferson作为词曲大师的功底。
items.descriptionEn: "A Moment of Forever" is an album by American folk/country legend Kris Kristofferson, released in 1995. It continues his signature folk-country storytelling, dominated by acoustic guitar, with lyrics deeply exploring love, loss, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Kristofferson与制作人Don Was合作的成果，录制过程轻松而即兴。Kristofferson曾表示，专辑中的许多歌曲是在他位于田纳西州的农场里写成的，灵感来源于日常生活中的平凡瞬间，录制时他坚持使用老式麦克风以捕捉温暖的原声。
items.storiesEn: This album was a collaboration with producer Don Was, with a relaxed and improvisational recording process. Kristofferson said many songs were written on his Tennessee farm, inspired by everyday moments, and he insisted on using vintage microphones to capture a warm acoustic sound.
items.artistIntroZh: Kris Kristofferson是美国乡村音乐、民谣和创作歌手界的标志性人物，以其深刻的歌词和沙哑嗓音闻名。代表作包括《Me and Bobby McGee》《Sunday Mornin' Comin' Down》，他也是演员和音乐电影的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: Kris Kristofferson is an iconic American country, folk, and singer-songwriter, known for his profound lyrics and gravelly voice. His代表作 include "Me and Bobby McGee" and "Sunday Mornin' Comin' Down," and he is also an actor and key figure in music film.

08-15.birthdayZh: 8月15日，是你的生日。这一天，Kris Kristofferson发行了《A Moment of Forever》，把时光的片段谱成永恒的旋律。愿你在自己的生命里，也拥有那样一份底气——不是抓住所有瞬间，而是让某些时刻成为永远。像乡村的黄昏，温暖而坚定，知道平凡里藏着巨大的力量。生日快乐，愿你永远配得上属于你的每一个“此刻”。
08-15.birthdayEn: August 15 is your birthday. On this day, Kris Kristofferson released “A Moment of Forever,” a title that perfectly captures the spirit of your life—each year a precious, lasting note in the song of who you are. May your day feel as timeless and warm as a beloved melody, filled with quiet joys, bright laughter, and the gentle promise that the best verses are still waiting to be sung. Here’s to you, and to every beautiful moment ahead.

items.name: Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Come》是美国传奇音乐人Prince于1994年发行的专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合了放克和迷幻元素。专辑以其性感的节奏、丰富的和声和Prince标志性的假声演唱为特色，探讨了欲望与亲密关系。
items.descriptionEn: "Come" is an album by American music legend Prince, released in 1994, primarily in R&B and soul styles, blended with funk and psychedelic elements. It features sensual rhythms, rich harmonies, and Prince's trademark falsetto, exploring desire and intimacy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Prince与华纳兄弟唱片公司的合约纠纷高峰期。Prince故意将专辑设计为“商业妥协”之作，以完成合同义务，但实际音乐中仍充满了实验性编曲。他甚至在封面和宣传中刻意减少露面，以示抗议。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during Prince's peak contract dispute with Warner Bros. Records. Prince deliberately designed it as a "commercial compromise" to fulfill contractual obligations, but the music still featured experimental arrangements. He even reduced appearances on the cover and promotions as a protest.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Come》是Prince与华纳兄弟纠纷时期的过渡作品，虽未获得商业成功，但展现了他在艺术与商业压力之间的挣扎，对其后独立发行策略有预示意义。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Come" is a transitional work during Prince's dispute with Warner Bros. Although not commercially successful, it showcases his struggle between art and commercial pressure, foreshadowing his later independent release strategy.
items.artistIntroZh: Prince是美国音乐天才，横跨R&B、放克、摇滚、流行等多个流派，以精湛的乐器演奏、高亢假声和舞台魅力闻名。代表作包括《Purple Rain》《1999》，是20世纪最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prince is an American musical genius spanning R&B, funk, rock, and pop, known for his virtuosic musicianship, soaring falsetto, and stage presence. His代表作 include "Purple Rain" and "1999," making him one of the most influential musicians of the 20th century.

08-16.birthdayZh: 8月16日，是你的生日。这一天，普林斯用《Come》唱尽了灵魂的挣脱与回归，像一束不屈的光，从放克的律动中升起。愿你像这张专辑一样，在节奏中找回力量，在迷幻里看清方向。岁月不是流逝，而是层层叠叠的乐章，每个新岁都让生命更饱满、更忠于自己。生日快乐。
08-16.birthdayEn: August 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world received Prince’s *Come*, an album that dares to walk through shadows and emerge unbroken. Like that music, may your year hold both depth and light, every note a step toward your truest self. You are not just another number on the calendar—you are a living melody, unfolding with grace. Let this day be a celebration of all you have been and all you are becoming. Shine on, beloved.

items.name: A Bit o' This & That
items.descriptionZh: 《A Bit o' This & That》是Emilie Autumn于2007年发行的流行风格专辑，融合了古典、电子和戏剧元素，呈现出独特的暗黑童话色彩。核心特色在于其多变的编曲和充满叙事性的歌词，展现了艺术家对维多利亚时代美学与现代流行音乐的巧妙结合。
items.descriptionEn: "A Bit o' This & That" is a pop album released by Emilie Autumn in 2007, blending classical, electronic, and theatrical elements with a dark fairy-tale aesthetic. Its core feature lies in the varied arrangements and narrative-driven lyrics, showcasing a clever fusion of Victorian-era aesthetics and modern pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Emilie Autumn在独立发行时期的作品，录制于她位于洛杉矶的家中。她亲自负责了大部分乐器的演奏和制作，包括小提琴、钢琴和合成器。专辑中的曲目多源于她早年的舞台表演片段，其中《Miss Lucy Had Some Leeches》灵感来源于她童年对医学史的痴迷。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during Emilie Autumn's independent era at her home in Los Angeles, where she personally handled most of the instrumentation and production, including violin, piano, and synthesizers. Many tracks originated from her early stage performances, with "Miss Lucy Had Some Leeches" inspired by her childhood fascination with medical history.
items.artistIntroZh: Emilie Autumn是一位美国歌手、多乐器演奏家和作家，以融合古典、流行和电子元素的暗黑风格著称。她的代表作包括《Fight Like a Girl》和《Opheliac》，其作品常探讨女性主义、精神健康等主题。
items.artistIntroEn: Emilie Autumn is an American singer, multi-instrumentalist, and writer known for her dark style blending classical, pop, and electronic music. Her notable works include "Fight Like a Girl" and "Opheliac," often exploring themes of feminism and mental health.

08-17.birthdayZh: 8月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《A Bit o' This & That》轻轻递出——它像你一样，懂得将破碎与美好都揉进生命的调色盘里。不必完美，只需把每一种情绪都奏成自己的节拍。你来到人间的那天，连音符都学会了拥抱差异。生日快乐，愿你始终相信：混音过的岁月，比纯粹更动人。
08-17.birthdayEn: August 17 is your birthday. On this day, worlds of sound were born, including Emilie Autumn’s *A Bit o' This & That*, a tapestry of remixed light and shadow. May your year feel like that album’s spirit—a vibrant blend of all the pieces that make you beautifully unique. Let it be a collection of bold contrasts and sweet harmonies, where every new day is a remix of joy. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today the music plays just for you.

items.name: Everything That Happens Will Happen Today
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything That Happens Will Happen Today》是David Byrne于2008年发行的电子风格专辑，融合了福音、民谣和实验电子元素。核心特色在于其温暖的合成器音色与Byrne独特的叙事嗓音相结合，营造出既现代又空灵的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Everything That Happens Will Happen Today" is an electronic album released by David Byrne in 2008, blending gospel, folk, and experimental electronic elements. Its core feature is the warm synthesizer tones combined with Byrne's distinctive narrative voice, creating a modern yet ethereal atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑由David Byrne与制作人Brian Eno合作完成，距离他们上次合作《My Life in the Bush of Ghosts》已近30年。录制过程中，两人通过邮件交换音乐片段，Byrne在纽约录音，Eno则在伦敦完成后期处理。专辑封面由著名艺术家Stefan Sagmeister设计，灵感来自Byrne的舞台动作。
items.storiesEn: This album was a collaboration between David Byrne and producer Brian Eno, nearly 30 years after their last joint project "My Life in the Bush of Ghosts." During recording, the two exchanged musical fragments via email, with Byrne recording in New York and Eno handling post-production in London. The cover art was designed by renowned artist Stefan Sagmeister, inspired by Byrne's stage movements.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为Byrne与Eno在数字时代重新定义合作方式的典范，推动了远程音乐制作的实践。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as a model for redefining collaboration in the digital age between Byrne and Eno, advancing remote music production practices.
items.artistIntroZh: David Byrne是苏格兰裔美国音乐家，以作为Talking Heads乐队主唱而闻名。他的风格涵盖摇滚、世界音乐和电子，代表作包括《Once in a Lifetime》和《This Must Be the Place (Naive Melody)》。
items.artistIntroEn: David Byrne is a Scottish-American musician best known as the lead singer of Talking Heads. His style spans rock, world music, and electronic, with notable works including "Once in a Lifetime" and "This Must Be the Place (Naive Melody)."

items.name: ABBA Live
items.descriptionZh: 《ABBA Live》是ABBA于1986年发行的现场专辑，收录了他们1977年澳大利亚巡演和1979年英国温布利演出的精选曲目。风格为流行，核心特色在于保留了乐队标志性的和声与华丽舞台表现，展现了现场演出的即时感染力。
items.descriptionEn: "ABBA Live" is a live album released by ABBA in 1986, featuring selected tracks from their 1977 Australian tour and 1979 Wembley performances. Stylistically pop, its core feature lies in preserving the band's signature harmonies and flamboyant stage presence, capturing the immediate energy of live shows.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行源于粉丝对现场录音的长期需求，但录制过程充满挑战。1977年巡演时，乐队因技术故障一度中断演出，而1979年温布利场次中，Agnetha因感冒嗓音受影响，但她坚持完成了表演。专辑原计划更早发行，因成员个人事务推迟至1986年。
items.storiesEn: The album's release stemmed from long-standing fan demand for live recordings, but the recording process was challenging. During the 1977 tour, the band had to pause due to technical issues, and at the 1979 Wembley show, Agnetha performed despite a cold affecting her voice. Originally planned for an earlier release, it was delayed until 1986 due to members' personal commitments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这是ABBA唯一一张官方现场专辑，记录了乐队巅峰时期的演出状态，成为研究其现场表现力的重要资料。
items.historicalImpactEn: This is ABBA's only official live album, documenting their peak performance era and serving as key material for studying their live stage presence.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典流行乐队，成立于1972年，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。他们以《Dancing Queen》和《Mamma Mia》等金曲闻名，风格以悦耳旋律和精致和声著称。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop band formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Known for hits like "Dancing Queen" and "Mamma Mia," their style features catchy melodies and intricate harmonies.

08-18.birthdayZh: 8月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过David Byrne与Brian Eno的声音——《Everything That Happens Will Happen Today》，它像一句温柔的预言：无论好坏，一切发生都将在今天成全你。而ABBA在巅峰的现场里歌唱，提醒你生命本就是一场值得珍藏的演出。愿你像这一天发行的专辑那样，在每个此刻都笃定、发光。
08-18.birthdayEn: August 18 is your birthday. Like the luminous harmonies of ABBA Live, may your year echo with joyous gatherings and timeless melodies. Like the hopeful pulse of Everything That Happens Will Happen Today, may each moment feel like a soft discovery, a promise unfolding. You are a living song, and this day is your verse—bright, brave, and beautifully yours. Here’s to another trip around the sun, filled with light and wonder.

items.name: The Fame
items.descriptionZh: 《The Fame》是Lady Gaga于2008年发行的流行风格专辑，融合了舞曲、电子和合成器流行元素。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的旋律、戏剧化的歌词以及Gaga对名流文化的讽刺性探讨，奠定了她作为流行偶像的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "The Fame" is a pop album released by Lady Gaga in 2008, blending dance, electronic, and synth-pop elements. Its core features include catchy melodies, dramatic lyrics, and Gaga's satirical take on celebrity culture, establishing her as a pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Lady Gaga曾因资金有限而住在录音棚里。她与制作人RedOne在短短十天内完成了多首曲目，包括《Just Dance》和《Poker Face》。专辑中的《Beautiful, Dirty, Rich》灵感来源于Gaga在纽约下东区的生活经历，反映了她对金钱与名望的早期思考。
items.storiesEn: While recording this album, Lady Gaga lived in the recording studio due to limited funds. She completed multiple tracks, including "Just Dance" and "Poker Face," with producer RedOne in just ten days. "Beautiful, Dirty, Rich" was inspired by her life in New York's Lower East Side, reflecting early thoughts on money and fame.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Fame》定义了2000年代末的流行音乐方向，将电子舞曲带入主流，并影响了随后十年的流行文化审美。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Fame" defined the direction of pop music in the late 2000s, bringing electronic dance music into the mainstream and influencing pop culture aesthetics for the following decade.
items.artistIntroZh: Lady Gaga是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以夸张的视觉风格和流行电子音乐闻名。她的代表作包括《Bad Romance》和《Shallow》，曾获多项格莱美奖，是当代流行文化的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Lady Gaga is an American singer, songwriter, and actress known for her flamboyant visual style and pop-electronic music. Her notable works include "Bad Romance" and "Shallow," and she has won multiple Grammy Awards, making her a key figure in contemporary pop culture.

08-19.birthdayZh: 8月19日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《The Fame》的璀璨宣言，它像一束光，告诉你“名利”不过是对热爱的追逐。世界有时喧嚣，但你的存在本身，就是最动人的旋律。愿你在属于自己的舞台上，永远骄傲地发亮，像专辑里那句未言明的祝福——不必成为谁，你已是盛大的传奇。
08-19.birthdayEn: August 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Lady Gaga’s “The Fame,” a glittering burst of bold, unapologetic light that dares you to shine. May your year unfold like that album’s spirit: electric, fearless, and full of rhythm. Let every beat remind you that you were born to be seen, loved, and celebrated. Here’s to your own fame—not for the crowd, but for the quiet glow you bring to every room you enter. Happy, radiant birthday.

08-20.birthdayZh: 8月20日，是你的生日。这一天，《Dark Side of the Moon》悄然降临，它说黑暗不过是光的另一面；而《Born in the U.S.A.》唱响了平凡人胸膛里的火焰。你来到世上，不是为了追赶完美，而是像这两张专辑一样——在阴晴圆缺里找到自己的节奏，在尘土飞扬中依然相信明天。生日快乐，愿你的每一步都踩在自己的鼓点上。
08-20.birthdayEn: August 20 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with albums born from dreamers. Like the lush, celestial landscapes of Pure by Hayley Kiyoko, your presence feels like a declaration of joy and authenticity. And the defiant, soulful pulse of Solange’s True, with its quiet strength, mirrors the way you move through the world—graceful yet unbreakable. May the year ahead wrap you in melodies of wonder and courage, echoing the magic of this day. Here’s to you, the song only you can sing.
