items.name: Liverpool Sound Collage
items.descriptionZh: 《Liverpool Sound Collage》是Paul McCartney于2000年发行的电子风格专辑，融合了拼贴音乐、环境音和实验电子元素。核心特色在于使用大量采样，包括披头士早期录音、利物浦城市声音以及麦卡特尼的新创作，呈现出独特的声景体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Liverpool Sound Collage" is an electronic album released by Paul McCartney in 2000, blending collage music, ambient sounds, and experimental electronic elements. Its core feature is the extensive use of samples, including early Beatles recordings, Liverpool city sounds, and McCartney's new compositions, creating a unique soundscape experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是麦卡特尼与电子音乐人Youth（The Verve成员）合作的作品，灵感来源于利物浦的多元文化。录制过程中，麦卡特尼使用了披头士1963年《She Loves You》的原始多轨录音带，并将其与利物浦港口的现场录音混合。专辑中的《Free Now》后来被用于电影《香草的天空》预告片。
items.storiesEn: This album was a collaboration between McCartney and electronic musician Youth (of The Verve), inspired by Liverpool's multicultural heritage. During recording, McCartney used the original multitrack tapes of the Beatles' 1963 "She Loves You" and mixed them with field recordings from Liverpool's port. The track "Free Now" was later used in the trailer for the film "Vanilla Sky."
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑展示了麦卡特尼对实验音乐的持续探索，将披头士遗产与电子音乐结合，影响了后续的采样艺术实践。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album showcases McCartney's ongoing exploration of experimental music, combining Beatles heritage with electronic music, influencing subsequent sampling art practices.
items.artistIntroZh: Paul McCartney是英国音乐家、歌手和词曲作者，作为披头士成员和Wings乐队核心而闻名。他的风格涵盖摇滚、流行和实验音乐，代表作包括《Hey Jude》和《Band on the Run》，是全球最成功的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Paul McCartney is a British musician, singer, and songwriter, known as a member of the Beatles and the core of Wings. His style spans rock, pop, and experimental music, with notable works including "Hey Jude" and "Band on the Run," making him one of the world's most successful musicians.

items.name: Chapter V
items.descriptionZh: 《Chapter V》是Trey Songz于2012年发行的第五张录音室专辑。尽管艺人通常以R&B著称，这张专辑却融合了民谣与乡村元素，展现了其多元化的音乐视野。核心特色在于原声吉他的温暖音色与叙事性歌词，营造出亲密而质朴的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Chapter V" is Trey Songz's fifth studio album released in 2012. Although the artist is typically known for R&B, this album incorporates folk and country elements, showcasing his diverse musical vision. Its core features lie in the warm acoustic guitar tones and narrative lyrics, creating an intimate and rustic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Trey Songz特意前往纳什维尔与乡村音乐制作人合作，以捕捉地道的民谣乡村音色。他曾在采访中透露，自己从小受乡村音乐影响，这张专辑是他对童年记忆的一次致敬。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Trey Songz traveled to Nashville to collaborate with country music producers to capture an authentic folk-country sound. He revealed in interviews that he was influenced by country music from childhood, and this album was a tribute to his childhood memories.
items.artistIntroZh: Trey Songz，美国R&B歌手兼词曲作者，以性感嗓音和情歌著称。代表作包括《Say Aah》、《Bottoms Up》等，多次获得格莱美提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Trey Songz is an American R&B singer and songwriter known for his sensual vocals and love songs. His代表作 include "Say Aah" and "Bottoms Up," and he has received multiple Grammy nominations.

items.name: Self Satisfaction
items.descriptionZh: 《Self Satisfaction》是日本歌手奥井雅美于2009年发行的专辑，风格为流行。核心特色在于其充满活力的电子流行编曲与自信独立的歌词主题，展现了奥井标志性的高亢嗓音和动感节奏。
items.descriptionEn: "Self Satisfaction" is an album by Japanese singer Masami Okui released in 2009, in the pop genre. Its core features lie in its energetic electronic pop arrangements and confident, independent lyrical themes, showcasing Okui's signature powerful vocals and dynamic rhythms.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值奥井雅美职业生涯20周年之际，她特意邀请了多位长期合作的音乐人参与，以纪念彼此的合作情谊。专辑同名曲的MV在东京某废弃工厂拍摄，寓意自我突破。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded around the 20th anniversary of Masami Okui's career. She specially invited several long-time collaborators to participate, commemorating their partnership. The music video for the title track was shot in an abandoned factory in Tokyo, symbolizing self-breakthrough.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美，日本女性歌手、词曲作者，以动画歌曲和流行摇滚著称。代表作有《轮舞-revolution》、《Shuffle》等，是90年代日本动漫音乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a Japanese female singer and songwriter known for anime songs and pop rock. Her代表作 include "Rondo-revolution" and "Shuffle," and she is a representative figure of 1990s Japanese anime music.

08-21.birthdayZh: 8月21日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好礼物——像《Liverpool Sound Collage》那样，把生活里零碎的声响拼成一首温柔的实验诗；又像《Self Satisfaction》般，提醒你内心的节拍永远有力而自由。愿你在自己的季节里，听见所有回响都是祝福。
08-21.birthdayEn: August 21 is your birthday, a date marked by music that captures the many moods of life. From the bold, experimental spirit of *Liverpool Sound Collage*, daring to piece together new worlds, to the glowing soul of *Chapter V*, filled with warmth and heartfelt rhythm, you share a day of creative fire and quiet tenderness. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of your own—full of bold new verses and melodies that feel like home.

items.name: Mélanie
items.descriptionZh: 《Mélanie》是席琳·迪翁于1984年发行的法语专辑，风格为流行。核心特色在于其抒情民谣与流行旋律的结合，展现了席琳早期清澈而富有穿透力的嗓音，专辑同名曲《Mélanie》成为其早期代表作。
items.descriptionEn: "Mélanie" is a French-language album by Céline Dion released in 1984, in the pop genre. Its core features lie in the combination of抒情 ballads and pop melodies, showcasing Dion's early clear and penetrating voice. The title track "Mélanie" became an early representative work.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是席琳·迪翁在魁北克地区早期成功的标志。录制时她年仅16岁，制作人René Angélil（后来成为她的丈夫）特意为她挑选了适合其年龄的歌曲，以保护她纯真的声音特质。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Céline Dion's early success in Quebec. She was only 16 during recording, and producer René Angélil (later her husband) specially selected songs suitable for her age to protect her innocent vocal quality.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁，加拿大法语裔流行天后，以磅礴的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎著称。代表作包括《My Heart Will Go On》、《The Power of Love》等，全球唱片销量超过2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian French-language pop diva known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery. Her代表作 include "My Heart Will Go On" and "The Power of Love," with global record sales exceeding 200 million.

08-22.birthdayZh: 8月22日，是你的生日。这一天诞生了《Mélanie》，那是席琳·迪翁16岁时用清澈嗓音唱出的第一张法语专辑，像一颗种子埋进时光里——你也在某个起点，悄然积蓄着温柔的力量。愿你像这张专辑的精神一样，在属于自己的季节里，慢慢绽放成一首动人的歌。
08-22.birthdayEn: August 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also saw the release of Céline Dion’s *Mélanie*—a debut full of fresh, hopeful pop, much like the beginning of your own story. May your year ahead carry that same spirit of new melody and gentle strength. You are a song that grows more beautiful with each verse, and today, the whole world hums along. Happy birthday, warmly and truly.

items.name: Greatest Hymns
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hymns》是美国基督教音乐团体Selah于2005年发行的专辑，风格为流行。核心特色在于将传统赞美诗以现代流行编曲重新演绎，结合了成员们的多声部和声与钢琴主导的抒情旋律。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hymns" is an album by American Christian music group Selah released in 2005, in the pop genre. Its core features lie in reinterpreting traditional hymns with modern pop arrangements, combining the members' multi-part harmonies with piano-led抒情 melodies.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感来源于成员Todd Smith的祖母，她是一位教会唱诗班指挥。录制时，Selah特意使用了祖母当年用过的老旧钢琴，以保留那份质朴的信仰情感。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by member Todd Smith's grandmother, a church choir director. During recording, Selah intentionally used the old piano once played by the grandmother to preserve that质朴 faith emotion.
items.artistIntroZh: Selah，美国当代基督教音乐团体，以和声演唱和赞美诗改编著称。代表作有《You Raise Me Up》、《Wonderful, Merciful Savior》等，多次获得圣鸽奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Selah is an American contemporary Christian music group known for their harmonies and hymn arrangements. Their代表作 include "You Raise Me Up" and "Wonderful, Merciful Savior," and they have won multiple Dove Awards.

08-23.birthdayZh: 8月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Greatest Hymns》——那些古老旋律如光穿透时间，带着纯净和声与简约的钢琴，在你生命里铺设温暖底色。愿你的每一天都像被重新演绎的赞美诗，安静而有力量，在最简单的旋律里，听见最深刻的祝福。
08-23.birthdayEn: August 23 is your birthday, a date touched by grace. On this day, the album "Greatest Hymns" by Selah was released, a collection that breathes new life into timeless songs of faith and hope. Like those reimagined melodies, your spirit carries both the weight of tradition and the lightness of a fresh beginning. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony—steady as a classic hymn, yet alive with the joyful freedom of a song only you can sing. Happy birthday.

items.name: Teenage Dream
items.descriptionZh: 《Teenage Dream》是美国歌手Katy Perry于2010年发行的专辑，风格为电子流行。核心特色在于其充满活力的合成器音效、派对氛围的节奏以及关于青春爱情的直白歌词，奠定了Katy Perry作为流行偶像的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Teenage Dream" is an album by American singer Katy Perry released in 2010, in the electronic pop genre. Its core features lie in its vibrant synthesizer sounds, party atmosphere rhythms, and straightforward lyrics about young love, establishing Katy Perry as a pop icon.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Teenage Dream》的创作灵感来自Katy Perry与当时男友Russell Brand的加州海滩度假经历。录制过程中，制作人Dr. Luke特意加入了复古电子音效，以营造80年代舞曲的怀旧感。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Teenage Dream" was inspired by Katy Perry's California beach vacation with then-boyfriend Russell Brand. During recording, producer Dr. Luke intentionally added retro electronic sounds to create a nostalgic 1980s dance feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑产生了五首Billboard冠军单曲��追平了迈克尔·杰克逊《Bad》的纪录，成为21世纪最具影响力的流行专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album produced five Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles, tying Michael Jackson's "Bad" record, and became one of the most influential pop albums of the 21st century.
items.artistIntroZh: Katy Perry，美国流行歌手、词曲作者，以色彩鲜艳的舞台形象和电子流行曲风著称。代表作包括《Firework》、《Roar》、《Dark Horse》等，全球唱片销量超过1亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Katy Perry is an American pop singer and songwriter known for her colorful stage image and electronic pop style. Her代表作 include "Firework," "Roar," and "Dark Horse," with global record sales exceeding 100 million.

items.name: Christina Aguilera
items.descriptionZh: 《Christina Aguilera》是克莉丝汀·阿奎莱拉于1999年发行的同名出道专辑，风格以青少年流行和舞曲流行为主，融合了R&B元素。核心特色在于她极具爆发力的嗓音和充满青春活力的歌曲编排，如《Genie in a Bottle》展现了流行与灵魂乐的巧妙结合。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Christina Aguilera’ is the 1999 self-titled debut album by Christina Aguilera, primarily in the teen pop and dance-pop style with R&B influences. Its core feature is her powerful vocal delivery and youthful energy, exemplified by tracks like ‘Genie in a Bottle’ blending pop with soulful nuances.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，年仅18岁的克莉丝汀曾因唱片公司要求她塑造“邻家女孩”形象而感到矛盾。她原本希望展现更成熟的音乐风格，但最终妥协于市场定位。单曲《Genie in a Bottle》的歌词曾因暗示性内容引发争议，却意外助推专辑销量突破800万张。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, 18-year-old Christina struggled with the label’s demand for a ‘girl next door’ image, as she wanted a more mature sound. The single ‘Genie in a Bottle’ sparked controversy over its suggestive lyrics but unexpectedly boosted the album to over 8 million copies sold.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑成为1999年全球最畅销的处女作之一，奠定了克莉丝汀作为千禧年流行天后的地位，并推动了青少年流行音乐在世纪末的繁荣。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became one of the best-selling debuts of 1999, cementing Christina as a pop diva of the millennium and fueling the late-’90s teen pop boom.
items.artistIntroZh: 克莉丝汀·阿奎莱拉（美国），流行与R&B歌手，以宽广音域和情感表现力著称。代表作包括《Genie in a Bottle》《Beautiful》及专辑《Stripped》。
items.artistIntroEn: Christina Aguilera (American), pop and R&B vocalist known for her wide range and emotional delivery. Key works include ‘Genie in a Bottle,’ ‘Beautiful,’ and the album ‘Stripped’.

08-24.birthdayZh: 8月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Teenage Dream》的夏日活力与《Christina Aguilera》的初生勇气装进时光的信封，像宇宙特意为你准备的礼物。你不必成为谁，只需像这些旋律一样，在属于自己的季节里热烈绽放。愿这特别的日子，成为你永远可以回望的起点，带着青春的光与破茧的力量。
08-24.birthdayEn: August 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with the sparkle of Katy Perry’s Teenage Dream and the soulful first notes of Christina Aguilera’s debut. Like those albums, your life is a beautiful blend—part pop-glow joy, part deep R&B heart. May your year ahead feel as bold and bright as a chart-topping chorus, with every verse carrying you closer to your own dreams. Here’s to you, a timeless melody still being written.

items.name: ID; Peace B
items.descriptionZh: 《ID; Peace B》是BoA于2000年在韩国发行的出道专辑，风格虽被标记为民谣/乡村，但实际以青少年流行和舞曲为主，融合了轻柔的民谣元素。核心特色是BoA清新甜美的嗓音与励志主题的歌词，主打歌《ID; Peace B》展现了电子节拍与流行旋律的结合。
items.descriptionEn: ‘ID; Peace B’ is BoA’s 2000 debut album in South Korea. Though tagged as folk/country, it is mainly teen pop and dance-pop with soft folk influences. Its core is BoA’s fresh, sweet vocals and uplifting lyrics; the title track blends electronic beats with pop melody.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制时，BoA年仅13岁，她在SM娱乐的严格训练下每日练习舞蹈和声乐超过10小时。主打歌《ID; Peace B》的编舞由韩国顶尖团队设计，但最初因动作复杂被质疑不适合少女表演，最终凭借BoA的出色驾驭成为经典舞台。
items.storiesEn: At age 13, BoA trained over 10 hours daily at SM Entertainment for this album. The choreography for ‘ID; Peace B’ was deemed too complex for a teen performer, but BoA’s execution turned it into a signature stage piece.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（韩国/日本），流行与舞曲歌手，被誉为“亚洲之星”。以多语言演唱和精湛舞蹈闻名，代表作包括《ID; Peace B》《No.1》及专辑《Listen to My Heart》。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (South Korean/Japanese), pop and dance artist known as the ‘Star of Asia.’ Renowned for multilingual singing and dance skills. Key works include ‘ID; Peace B,’ ‘No.1,’ and album ‘Listen to My Heart.’

08-25.birthdayZh: 8月25日，是你的生日。如同BoA的《ID; Peace B》里那份少女的勇气与节奏，你的到来本身就是一首明媚的歌，将梦想的种子揉进夏末的风里。愿你的日子里总有清澈的旋律，哪怕偶尔有休止符，也是力量在蓄势。世界有时喧嚣，但你始终拥有属于自己的节拍，温柔而坚定。
08-25.birthdayEn: August 25 is your birthday. On this very day, the world welcomed BoA's debut album "ID; Peace B," a bold blend of J-pop, R&B, and electronic that hums with the energy of fresh beginnings. Like that album's spirit of fearless harmony, may your year ahead pulse with a rhythm all your own—a melody of dreams taking flight. You are a unique note in the universe's song, so shine brightly, for today marks another beautiful verse in your story. Happy birthday, with warmth and light.

items.name: A Quick Fix of Melancholy
items.descriptionZh: 《A Quick Fix of Melancholy》是Ulver于2003年发行的EP，风格属于电子与实验音乐，融合了氛围、碎拍和工业元素。核心特色在于其黑暗而忧郁的电子音景，以及对人声的碎片化处理，营造出一种疏离而诗意的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: ‘A Quick Fix of Melancholy’ is a 2003 EP by Ulver, blending electronic and experimental music with ambient, breakbeat, and industrial elements. Its core is a dark, melancholic soundscape with fragmented vocal processing, creating a detached yet poetic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张EP是Ulver从金属转向电子音乐时期的作品，录制于挪威奥斯陆的Crypt录音室。乐队主创Kristoffer Rygg曾表示，EP的灵感来源于一次深夜在雨中漫步的经历，试图用电子音色捕捉那种转瞬即逝的忧伤感。封面艺术由挪威艺术家Sverre Malling创作，带有超现实主义风格。
items.storiesEn: This EP marks Ulver’s shift from metal to electronic music, recorded at Crypt Studio in Oslo. Frontman Kristoffer Rygg cited a late-night walk in the rain as inspiration, aiming to capture fleeting melancholy through electronic textures. The cover art by Sverre Malling features surrealist imagery.
items.artistIntroZh: Ulver（挪威），实验音乐与电子团体，最初以黑金属闻名，后转向前卫电子和氛围音乐。代表作包括《Bergtatt》《Perdition City》及EP《A Quick Fix of Melancholy》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ulver (Norwegian), experimental and electronic group, initially known for black metal, later shifting to avant-garde electronic and ambient. Key works include ‘Bergtatt,’ ‘Perdition City,’ and EP ‘A Quick Fix of Melancholy.’

items.name: Angels with Dirty Faces
items.descriptionZh: 《Angels with Dirty Faces》是Sugababes于2002年发行的第二张专辑，风格以流行和R&B为主，融合了电子和舞曲元素。核心特色在于三位成员和谐的和声与成熟自信的歌词主题，如单曲《Freak Like Me》展现了复古放克与现代流行的碰撞。
items.descriptionEn: ‘Angels with Dirty Faces’ is Sugababes’ 2002 sophomore album, blending pop and R&B with electronic and dance elements. Its core is the trio’s harmonious vocals and mature, confident lyrics; tracks like ‘Freak Like Me’ fuse retro funk with modern pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，原成员Siobhán Donaghy在发行前离队，由Heidi Range接替。这一变动导致部分歌曲需要重新录制和声，但团队仅用三周便完成调整。《Freak Like Me》翻唱自Adina Howard的1995年歌曲，制作人Richard X将其与Tubeway Army的采样结合，创造了意外的新浪潮感。
items.storiesEn: During recording, original member Siobhán Donaghy left before release, replaced by Heidi Range. Some tracks required re-recorded harmonies, completed in just three weeks. ‘Freak Like Me’ is a cover of Adina Howard’s 1995 song, with producer Richard X adding a Tubeway Army sample for an unexpected new wave feel.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在英国获得双白金认证，巩固了Sugababes作为英国女子组合领军人物的地位，并影响了2000年代英国流行R&B的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album went double platinum in the UK, cementing Sugababes as leading British girl group and influencing 2000s UK pop-R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Sugababes（英国），流行与R&B女子组合，以多变的成员阵容和融合流行、舞曲、电子元素著称。代表作包括《Freak Like Me》《Round Round》及专辑《Angels with Dirty Faces》。
items.artistIntroEn: Sugababes (British), pop and R&B girl group known for evolving lineups and blending pop, dance, and electronic sounds. Key works include ‘Freak Like Me,’ ‘Round Round,’ and album ‘Angels with Dirty Faces.’

08-26.birthdayZh: 8月26日，是你的生日。这一天诞生过《A Quick Fix of Melancholy》的细腻忧郁，也迎来过《Angels with Dirty Faces》的倔强生长。你像Ulver的音乐般敏感而深邃，又像Sugababes的歌词一样，在跌撞中长出翅膀。愿你在自己的节拍里，温柔地穿越所有风雨，成为那个既能拥抱忧郁、又能擦亮脸庞的发光体。
08-26.birthdayEn: August 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us a quick fix of melancholy, a reminder that beauty can live in soft, thoughtful moments, but your presence brings a brighter song, like Angels with Dirty Faces—bold, spirited, and full of unapologetic joy. You are a melody of contrasts, weaving depth and light into every day. May this year hold the sweetness of quiet reflection and the power of your own fierce, shining rhythm. Happy birthday to a soul who makes life a beautiful, unforgettable album.

items.name: ATLiens
items.descriptionZh: 《ATLiens》是OutKast于1996年发行的第二张专辑，风格属于南方嘻哈，融合了放克、灵魂乐和太空主题的科幻元素。核心特色在于其迷幻而流畅的节奏、复杂的押韵技巧，以及对社会议题的深刻反思，如单曲《Elevators (Me & You)》展现了内省与创新。
items.descriptionEn: ‘ATLiens’ is OutKast’s 1996 sophomore album, rooted in Southern hip-hop with funk, soul, and sci-fi space themes. Its core is psychedelic, smooth beats, intricate rhymes, and deep social commentary; tracks like ‘Elevators (Me & You)’ showcase introspection and innovation.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《ATLiens》是“ATL”（亚特兰大）与“aliens”（外星人）的结合，象征OutKast在嘻哈界的独特地位。录制期间，成员André 3000和Big Boi因音乐方向产生分歧——André希望更实验，Big Boi则坚持根源放克。最终他们决定各自创作再融合，这一过程催生了专辑独特的双重视角。
items.storiesEn: The title ‘ATLiens’ combines ‘ATL’ (Atlanta) and ‘aliens,’ reflecting OutKast’s unique place in hip-hop. During recording, André 3000 and Big Boi clashed over direction—André wanted experimental, Big Boi favored funk roots. They decided to create separately then blend, yielding the album’s dual perspective.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为南方嘻哈的里程碑之作，将亚特兰大推向嘻哈版图中心，并影响了后续无数说唱艺人的创作风格。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is a landmark in Southern hip-hop, putting Atlanta on the hip-hop map and influencing countless subsequent rappers’ styles.
items.artistIntroZh: OutKast（美国），南方嘻哈双人组，由André 3000和Big Boi组成。以创新融合放克、灵魂乐和科幻元素著称，代表作包括《ATLiens》《Aquemini》及单曲《Hey Ya!》。
items.artistIntroEn: OutKast (American), Southern hip-hop duo consisting of André 3000 and Big Boi. Known for innovative fusion of funk, soul, and sci-fi. Key works include ‘ATLiens,’ ‘Aquemini,’ and single ‘Hey Ya!’

items.name: Vespertine
items.descriptionZh: 《Vespertine》是冰岛音乐人Björk于2001年发行的电子音乐专辑，融合了微妙的实验电子、管弦乐和自然采样。其核心特色在于极简而精致的编曲，通过冰晶般的音色和轻柔的节奏，营造出一种私密、梦幻且充满冬日静谧感的氛围，展现了Björk在电子领域内向内探索的独特美学。
items.descriptionEn: Vespertine is an electronic album by Icelandic artist Björk, released in 2001. It blends experimental electronics, orchestral elements, and natural samples. Its core feature lies in minimalist yet intricate arrangements, using crystalline sounds and gentle rhythms to create an intimate, dreamlike, and wintery atmosphere, showcasing Björk's inward exploration within the electronic genre.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Björk与英国电子音乐人Matmos合作，后者收集了大量日常物品的声音（如搓牌、踩雪、心跳声）作为采样素材。Björk还曾在家中厨房录制了一些人声部分，以追求最自然、私密的情感表达。专辑封面由著名摄影师Nick Knight拍摄，造型灵感来自冰岛的自然景观。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, Björk collaborated with British electronic duo Matmos, who collected sounds from everyday objects (like shuffling cards, walking on snow, and heartbeats) as samples. Björk also recorded some vocal parts in her home kitchen to achieve the most natural and intimate emotional expression. The album cover was shot by renowned photographer Nick Knight, with the styling inspired by Iceland's natural landscapes.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Vespertine》被广泛认为是21世纪初最具创新性的电子专辑之一，影响了后续众多氛围电子与实验流行音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Vespertine is widely regarded as one of the most innovative electronic albums of the early 2000s, influencing many subsequent ambient electronic and experimental pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Björk（比约克），冰岛歌手、词曲作者及音乐制作人，风格横跨电子、实验流行、另类摇滚等。她以独特的嗓音、前卫的视觉艺术和突破性的音乐实验闻名，代表作包括《Homogenic》《Vespertine》和《Post》。
items.artistIntroEn: Björk is an Icelandic singer, songwriter, and music producer whose style spans electronic, experimental pop, and alternative rock. Known for her distinctive voice, avant-garde visual art, and groundbreaking musical experiments, her代表作 include Homogenic, Vespertine, and Post.

items.name: Next World
items.descriptionZh: 《Next World》是韩国流行天后BoA于2003年发行的日语专辑，属于典型的J-Pop风格，融合了舞曲、R&B和电子元素。核心特色在于BoA充满活力的演唱和流畅的旋律线条，展现了她在东亚流行市场中的成熟魅力，专辑中的快歌与抒情曲目均衡，体现了其作为全能型偶像的扎实功底。
items.descriptionEn: Next World is a Japanese album by Korean pop queen BoA, released in 2003. It is a quintessential J-Pop album blending dance, R&B, and electronic elements. Its core feature lies in BoA's energetic vocals and smooth melodic lines, showcasing her mature charm in the East Asian pop market. The album balances upbeat tracks and ballads, reflecting her solid skills as an all-round idol.
items.storiesZh: 该专辑是BoA在日本出道后的第二张原创日语专辑，录制时她同时忙于韩国和日本两地的宣传活动，经常往返于首尔和东京之间。专辑同名曲《Next World》由日本知名制作人编曲，BoA在录音时曾因语言和文化差异与团队反复沟通，最终呈现了她极具感染力的表演。
items.storiesEn: This album is BoA's second original Japanese album after her debut in Japan. During recording, she was simultaneously busy with promotional activities in both Korea and Japan, frequently traveling between Seoul and Tokyo. The title track 'Next World' was arranged by a renowned Japanese producer. BoA repeatedly communicated with the team over language and cultural differences during recording, ultimately delivering an emotionally powerful performance.
items.artistIntroZh: BoA（权宝儿），韩国歌手、演员，被誉为“亚洲之星”。她以精湛的唱跳实力和跨语言（韩、日、英）发片能力著称，主要风格为流行、舞曲和R&B。代表作包括《No.1》《Valenti》和《Only One》。
items.artistIntroEn: BoA (Kwon Bo-ah) is a South Korean singer and actress, often called the 'Star of Asia.' She is known for her exceptional singing and dancing skills and her ability to release music in multiple languages (Korean, Japanese, English). Her main styles are pop, dance, and R&B. Representative works include No.1, Valenti, and Only One.

08-27.birthdayZh: 8月27日，是你的生日。这一天，宇宙的节奏里藏着《ATLiens》的松弛与开拓，像是在提醒你，生命本可以像星际旅者一样自由想象、勇敢讲述自己的故事。而《Vespertine》的私密与温暖，又轻轻包裹着你——在喧嚣之外，你心里那座小小的、发光的圣殿，值得被细心守护。这一天，世界为你造好了声音：一半是向外的辽阔，一半是向内的安宁。
08-27.birthdayEn: August 27 is your birthday—a day that brought you into this world along with music that captures the soul’s journey. Like OutKast’s *ATLiens*, may your spirit explore galaxies beyond the familiar, embracing the strange and beautiful. And like Björk’s *Vespertine*, may your life hum with quiet wonder, where every moment glows like frost in moonlight. You are a constellation of your own making, born on a day that celebrates daring art and tender magic. Shine on, beautifully.

items.name: The Best of Michael Jackson
items.descriptionZh: 《The Best of Michael Jackson》是Michael Jackson于1975年发行的精选集，属于流行风格。这张专辑收录了他在Motown时期的热门单曲，核心特色是展现了Jackson 5时期以及个人早期生涯的经典流行旋律与灵魂乐根基，是理解他音乐演变的珍贵档案。
items.descriptionEn: The Best of Michael Jackson is a compilation album released in 1975, in the pop genre. It features his hit singles from the Motown era. Its core feature is showcasing the classic pop melodies and soul foundations from the Jackson 5 period and his early solo career, serving as a valuable archive for understanding his musical evolution.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Michael Jackson已离开Motown唱片公司转投Epic Records。Motown为了利用他的知名度，在没有他参与的情况下推出了这张合集。专辑中收录的歌曲大多由Motown的传奇制作团队完成，但Michael本人对这张未经他授权的精选集并不满意，认为其未能完全代表他的艺术追求。
items.storiesEn: When this compilation was released, Michael Jackson had already left Motown Records for Epic Records. To capitalize on his fame, Motown released this collection without his involvement. Most songs on the album were produced by Motown's legendary production team, but Michael himself was dissatisfied with this unauthorized compilation, believing it did not fully represent his artistic vision.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Motown时期的重要精选集，它记录了Michael Jackson从童星到超级巨星的过渡，为后世研究其早期音乐风格提供了关键资料。
items.historicalImpactEn: As an important compilation from the Motown era, it documents Michael Jackson's transition from child star to superstar, providing key material for later study of his early musical style.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（迈克尔·杰克逊），美国歌手、舞者及流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他以独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和突破性的音乐视频闻名，风格涵盖流行、放克、摇滚和灵魂乐。代表作包括《Thriller》《Billie Jean》和《Beat It》。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and pop culture icon, known as the 'King of Pop.' He was famous for his distinctive voice, iconic dance moves (like the moonwalk), and groundbreaking music videos. His styles encompass pop, funk, rock, and soul. Representative works include Thriller, Billie Jean, and Beat It.

items.name: LOL <(^^,)>
items.descriptionZh: 《LOL <(^^,)>》是瑞典电子舞曲艺人Basshunter于2006年发行的流行专辑，以欧陆舞曲和欢乐的电子节拍为核心特色。专辑充满高能量合成器旋律和简单重复的副歌，专为俱乐部和派对场景打造，其中包含��热门单曲展现了Basshunter标志性的“快乐硬核”风格。
items.descriptionEn: LOL <(^^,)> is a pop album by Swedish electronic dance artist Basshunter, released in 2006. Its core features are Eurodance and cheerful electronic beats. The album is filled with high-energy synth melodies and simple, repetitive choruses, designed for clubs and party scenes. Its hit singles showcase Basshunter's signature 'happy hardcore' style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《LOL <(^^,)>》源自网络流行语“大笑”和颜文字，体现了Basshunter对互联网文化的热衷。专辑中收录的单曲《Boten Anna》原本是一首关于瑞典网络聊天室管理员（名为Anna的机器人）的幽默歌曲，意外在瑞典和北欧大热，成为该专辑的引爆点。
items.storiesEn: The album title LOL <(^^,)> originates from the internet slang 'laughing out loud' and an emoticon, reflecting Basshunter's enthusiasm for internet culture. The single 'Boten Anna' from the album was originally a humorous song about a Swedish internet chatroom moderator (a bot named Anna), which unexpectedly became a huge hit in Sweden and Scandinavia, serving as the album's breakout point.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Boten Anna》成为2000年代中期网络文化影响主流音乐的标志性案例，推动了欧陆舞曲在全球的短暂复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Boten Anna' became an iconic case of internet culture influencing mainstream music in the mid-2000s, driving a brief global revival of Eurodance.
items.artistIntroZh: Basshunter（本名Jonas Altberg），瑞典歌手、DJ和音乐制作人，以欧陆舞曲和欢乐硬核风格闻名。他因单曲《Boten Anna》和《Now You're Gone》在全球走红，代表作还包括《All I Ever Wanted》。
items.artistIntroEn: Basshunter (real name Jonas Altberg) is a Swedish singer, DJ, and music producer known for Eurodance and happy hardcore styles. He gained global fame with the singles 'Boten Anna' and 'Now You're Gone.' Other representative works include 'All I Ever Wanted.'

08-28.birthdayZh: 8月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了两种礼物：迈克尔·杰克逊的《The Best of Michael Jackson》告诉你，生命可以像舞台一样盛大，每一次心跳都值得被认真唱响；Basshunter的《LOL <(^^,)>》则轻声说，快乐不必复杂，像简单的旋律一样，允许自己纯粹地笑。你来到这天的意义，就是把这些美好都活成自己。
08-28.birthdayEn: August 28 is your birthday, a day that shares its light with the timeless spirit of Michael Jackson’s The Best of Michael Jackson—a collection of soul and brilliance, just like the joy you bring to the world. And like Basshunter’s energetic LOL <(^^,)>, your day is a celebration of rhythm, laughter, and vibrant life. May this new year unfold with the harmony of your best memories and the playful beat of new adventures, filling every moment with warmth and the music of your own beautiful story. Happy birthday.

items.name: Code Name Blue
items.descriptionZh: 《Code Name Blue》是韩国流行摇滚乐队CNBLUE于2012年发行的日语专辑，融合流行摇滚与J-Pop元素。核心特色在于乐队标志性的清爽吉他旋律和主唱郑容和的温暖嗓音，专辑整体节奏明快，充满青春活力，展现了乐队在日韩两地成熟的音乐驾驭能力。
items.descriptionEn: Code Name Blue is a Japanese album by South Korean pop-rock band CNBLUE, released in 2012. It blends pop-rock with J-Pop elements. Its core features are the band's signature refreshing guitar melodies and lead vocalist Jung Yong-hwa's warm voice. The album has an upbeat tempo, full of youthful energy, showcasing the band's mature musical proficiency in both Korea and Japan.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是CNBLUE在日本主流出道后的第二张原创专辑，录制期间成员们频繁往返于韩国和日本，参与了大量词曲创作。专辑主打歌《Time is Over》的灵感来自成员们对繁忙日程的感慨，他们在录音室中多次调整编曲，力求在流行旋律中保留乐队特有的摇滚张力。
items.storiesEn: This album is CNBLUE's second original album after their major debut in Japan. During recording, members frequently traveled between Korea and Japan and participated heavily in songwriting. The lead track 'Time is Over' was inspired by the members' feelings about their busy schedules. They repeatedly adjusted the arrangement in the studio to retain the band's unique rock tension within the pop melody.
items.artistIntroZh: CNBLUE（西恩蓝），韩国流行摇滚乐队，由郑容和、李宗泫、姜敏赫和李正信组成。他们以自创曲目和现场演奏能力著称，主要风格为流行摇滚和另类摇滚。代表作包括《孤独的人》《Can't Stop》和《I'm Sorry》。
items.artistIntroEn: CNBLUE is a South Korean pop-rock band composed of Jung Yong-hwa, Lee Jong-hyun, Kang Min-hyuk, and Lee Jung-shin. Known for their self-composed songs and live performance skills, their main styles are pop-rock and alternative rock. Representative works include 'Loner,' 'Can't Stop,' and 'I'm Sorry.'

08-29.birthdayZh: 8月29日，是你的生日。这一天，CNBLUE发行了《Code Name Blue》，藏着一片海的秘密——既有深蓝的温柔，也有破浪的勇气。愿你在新的一岁里，遇见所有属于你的蓝：晴朗时的澄澈，风雨中的辽阔。世界可能喧闹，但你的名字与音乐相连，永远值得被记住、被庆祝。
08-29.birthdayEn: August 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us CNBLUE’s *Code Name Blue*, an album pulsing with bold, hopeful energy—much like the light you bring into every room. May your new year feel as vibrant and freeing as its melodies, a soundtrack for all the adventures still waiting for you. You are a beautiful chapter in this world’s story, and today, the music plays just for you.

items.name: Music of the Sun
items.descriptionZh: 《Music of the Sun》是蕾哈娜的首张录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞厅雷鬼和R&B元素，呈现出阳光明媚的加勒比风情。专辑以轻快的节奏和 catchy 的旋律为核心，展现了蕾哈娜早期的音乐风格，其中单曲《Pon de Replay》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: "Music of the Sun" is Rihanna's debut studio album, blending pop, dancehall reggae, and R&B elements to create a sunny Caribbean vibe. The album features upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies, showcasing Rihanna's early musical style, with the single "Pon de Replay" becoming a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，蕾哈娜年仅17岁，刚从巴巴多斯搬到美国。制作人Evan Rogers和Carl Sturken在2004年发现她的天赋后，迅速将她带入录音室。蕾哈娜曾回忆，录制过程充满挑战，因为她需要适应全新的音乐环境，但她凭借天生的节奏感和嗓音迅速完成了大部分歌曲。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Rihanna was only 17 and had just moved from Barbados to the US. After producers Evan Rogers and Carl Sturken discovered her talent in 2004, they quickly brought her into the studio. Rihanna recalled that the recording process was challenging as she had to adapt to a new music environment, but her natural rhythm and voice helped her complete most tracks quickly.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为蕾哈娜的出道专辑，它奠定了她作为流行舞曲新星的基础，并为后续全球成功铺平道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: As Rihanna's debut album, it laid the foundation for her emergence as a pop-dancehall star and paved the way for her subsequent global success.
items.artistIntroZh: 蕾哈娜（Rihanna），巴巴多斯籍流行歌手、演员和企业家，以融合流行、R&B和舞厅雷鬼的风格闻名。代表作包括《Umbrella》《We Found Love》和《Diamonds》，是全球最畅销的音乐艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna is a Barbadian pop singer, actress, and entrepreneur known for blending pop, R&B, and dancehall reggae. Her hits include "Umbrella," "We Found Love," and "Diamonds," making her one of the best-selling music artists worldwide.

items.name: Abandon Your Friends
items.descriptionZh: 《Abandon Your Friends》是美国乐队From Autumn to Ashes的第三张录音室专辑，属于流行朋克和情绪核风格。专辑以激烈的吉他riff、情感充沛的嘶吼与清嗓交替为特色，歌词探讨人际关系的破裂与自我救赎，展现了乐队标志性的戏剧化张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Abandon Your Friends" is the third studio album by American band From Autumn to Ashes, characterized by pop punk and emo styles. It features intense guitar riffs, emotional screams alternating with clean vocals, and lyrics exploring broken relationships and self-redemption, showcasing the band's signature dramatic tension.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队经历了严重的内部矛盾，主唱Benjamin Perri与吉他手Brian Deneeve在音乐方向上产生分歧。这种紧张关系反而渗透到专辑的创作中，使得《Abandon Your Friends》比前作更具攻击性和情感冲击力。专辑发行后不久，Perri便离开了乐队。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band faced severe internal conflicts, with vocalist Benjamin Perri and guitarist Brian Deneeve disagreeing on musical direction. This tension seeped into the album's creation, making "Abandon Your Friends" more aggressive and emotionally impactful than its predecessors. Shortly after the album's release, Perri left the band.
items.artistIntroZh: From Autumn to Ashes，美��情绪核/流行朋克乐队，成立于2000年，来自纽约。以激烈的情感表达和双主唱（嘶吼与清嗓）为特色，代表作包括《Too Bad You're Beautiful》和《Abandon Your Friends》。
items.artistIntroEn: From Autumn to Ashes is an American emo/pop punk band formed in 2000 in New York. Known for intense emotional expression and dual vocalists (screaming and clean singing), their notable works include "Too Bad You're Beautiful" and "Abandon Your Friends."

08-30.birthdayZh: 8月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过两张截然不同的专辑——《Music of the Sun》与《Abandon Your Friends》。前者像加勒比海的风，将阳光与热情藏进你的生命；后者则教会你勇敢松开旧路，把枯萎的友谊留在身后。所以你看，你生来就带着赤道般的温暖，和决绝前行的力量。
08-30.birthdayEn: August 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Rihanna's Music of the Sun, a debut album brimming with the warmth of R&B and the pulse of dancehall—a spirit of first light and bold beginnings. There is also the raw, resilient energy of From Autumn to Ashes' Abandon Your Friends, a reminder that even letting go can be a fierce, liberating art. May your new year carry that same glow and courage, turning every note into a step toward your brightest horizon.

items.name: Bad
items.descriptionZh: 《Bad》是迈克尔·杰克逊的第七张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐和流行摇滚。专辑以强劲的节奏、精致的制作和杰克逊标志性的假声演唱为特色，主题涉及社会批判、自我肯定和爱情。同名主打歌《Bad》以及《The Way You Make Me Feel》等成为经典。
items.descriptionEn: "Bad" is Michael Jackson's seventh studio album, blending R&B, soul, and pop rock. It features powerful rhythms, polished production, and Jackson's signature falsetto vocals, with themes of social critique, self-affirmation, and love. The title track "Bad" and "The Way You Make Me Feel" became classics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制历时两年，杰克逊与制作人昆西·琼斯在创作过程中多次争论，尤其是对歌曲《Bad》的混音方向。杰克逊最初希望与王子合作同名曲，但王子拒绝参与。此外，杰克逊为宣传专辑进行了首次个人世界巡演，其中在日本站因观众过度激动导致多人晕倒。
items.storiesEn: The album took two years to record, with Jackson and producer Quincy Jones frequently arguing over creative direction, especially the mix of the title track "Bad." Jackson initially wanted to collaborate with Prince on the song, but Prince declined. Additionally, Jackson embarked on his first solo world tour to promote the album, during which fans fainted due to excitement at shows in Japan.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Bad》是史上最畅销专辑之一，全球销量超过4500万张，并产生了五首美国公告牌冠军单曲，巩固了杰克逊作为流行之王的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Bad" is one of the best-selling albums of all time, with over 45 million copies sold worldwide, and produced five Billboard Hot 100 number-one singles, solidifying Jackson's status as the King of Pop.
items.artistIntroZh: 迈克尔·杰克逊（Michael Jackson），美国歌手、舞者和慈善家，被誉为流行音乐之王。以融合流行、R&B和放克的风格闻名，代表作包括《Thriller》《Billie Jean》和《Bad》，是全球最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer, dancer, and philanthropist, known as the King of Pop. Renowned for blending pop, R&B, and funk, his iconic works include "Thriller," "Billie Jean," and "Bad," making him one of the most influential musicians worldwide.

08-31.birthdayZh: 8月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好一份礼物——就像迈克尔·杰克逊在《Bad》里唱的那样，你可以无畏地做自己，把所有的“不够好”都甩在身后。愿你的生命像这张专辑的精神一样，既有冲破一切的力量，也有柔软拥抱自己的温柔。你值得所有光。
08-31.birthdayEn: August 31 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard Michael Jackson's "Bad"—an album pulsing with fierce optimism and the courage to break boundaries. Like that record, your life carries a rhythm of bold transformation, turning every step into a confident beat. May your new year be an anthem of your own making, bold and unstoppable, with the warmth of every note you’ve ever sung. You are the star of this soundtrack—shine on.

items.name: The Clown
items.descriptionZh: 《The Clown》是美国爵士贝斯手兼作曲家查尔斯·明格斯于1957年发行的专辑，属于硬波普和前卫爵士风格。专辑以明格斯标志性的复杂编曲、即兴演奏和情感深度为特色，标题曲《The Clown》通过叙事性歌词探讨了小丑的悲剧人生，展现了爵士乐的戏剧性和社会批判性。
items.descriptionEn: "The Clown" is an album by American jazz bassist and composer Charles Mingus, released in 1957, featuring hard bop and avant-garde jazz styles. It is characterized by Mingus's signature complex arrangements, improvisation, and emotional depth. The title track "The Clown" narrates the tragic life of a clown through storytelling lyrics, showcasing jazz's dramatic and socially critical nature.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《The Clown》的歌词由明格斯的朋友、小号手兼诗人Jean Shepherd创作并朗诵。明格斯在录制时要求乐队模拟马戏团般的混乱氛���，以配合小丑的荒诞主题。录音过程中，明格斯一度因不满意演奏而突然中断，要求乐手重新即兴，这种完美主义使得专辑充满张力。
items.storiesEn: The lyrics for the title track "The Clown" were written and narrated by Mingus's friend, trumpeter and poet Jean Shepherd. During recording, Mingus instructed the band to simulate a circus-like chaotic atmosphere to match the clown's absurd theme. At one point, Mingus abruptly stopped the session due to dissatisfaction with the performance, demanding the musicians re-improvise, a perfectionism that made the album intense.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为明格斯早期代表作之一，巩固了他作为前卫爵士先驱的地位，对后来的自由爵士和爵士融合产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as one of Mingus's early masterpieces, solidifying his status as a pioneer of avant-garde jazz and influencing later free jazz and jazz fusion.
items.artistIntroZh: 查尔斯·明格斯（Charles Mingus），美国爵士贝斯手、作曲家和乐队领袖，以融合硬波普、福音和自由爵士的风格闻名。代表作包括《Mingus Ah Um》和《The Clown》，是爵士乐史上最具创新力的音乐家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Charles Mingus was an American jazz bassist, composer, and bandleader known for blending hard bop, gospel, and free jazz. His notable works include "Mingus Ah Um" and "The Clown," making him one of the most innovative musicians in jazz history.

items.name: SunSay
items.descriptionZh: 《SunSay》是乌克兰乐队SunSay的首张同名专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐和放克元素。专辑以温暖的人声、律动感十足的贝斯线和流畅的旋律为特色，歌词充满积极向上的能量，探讨爱与生活，展现了乐队独特的东欧灵魂乐风格。
items.descriptionEn: "SunSay" is the debut self-titled album by Ukrainian band SunSay, blending R&B, soul, and funk elements. It features warm vocals, groovy basslines, and smooth melodies, with lyrics full of positive energy exploring love and life, showcasing the band's unique Eastern European soul style.
items.storiesZh: 乐队主唱Andrey Zaporozhets在组建SunSay之前曾是乌克兰摇滚乐队5’Nizza的成员。2006年，他决定转型更灵魂乐的风格，并与新乐手合作录制了这张专辑。大部分歌曲在基辅的一个小型录音室完成，由于预算有限，乐队成员经常熬夜调整编曲，最终以低保真的质感保留了原始情感。
items.storiesEn: Before forming SunSay, lead vocalist Andrey Zaporozhets was a member of the Ukrainian rock band 5’Nizza. In 2006, he decided to transition to a more soulful style and recorded this album with new musicians. Most tracks were completed in a small studio in Kyiv; due to a limited budget, band members often stayed up late adjusting arrangements, ultimately preserving raw emotion with a lo-fi texture.
items.artistIntroZh: SunSay，乌克兰R&B/灵魂乐队，成立于2007年，由主唱Andrey Zaporozhets领衔。以融合灵魂乐、放克和流行元素著称，代表作包括同名专辑《SunSay》和《Thank You》。
items.artistIntroEn: SunSay is a Ukrainian R&B/soul band formed in 2007, led by vocalist Andrey Zaporozhets. Known for blending soul, funk, and pop, their notable works include the self-titled album "SunSay" and "Thank You."

items.name: Music for Films
items.descriptionZh: 《Music for Films》是Brian Eno于1978年发行的氛围电子专辑，作为环境音乐的先驱之作，这张作品以极简的合成器音色、缓慢的节奏和细腻的声景构建为核心特色。它并非传统意义上的配乐，而是为想象中电影所创作的抽象音画，强调空间感和情绪渲染，体现了Eno在电子音乐领域对“可听但不可见”氛围的探索。
items.descriptionEn: Music for Films is an ambient electronic album by Brian Eno, released in 1978. As a pioneering work of ambient music, it features minimalist synthesizer textures, slow tempos, and intricate soundscapes. Rather than conventional film scores, it creates abstract sonic paintings for imaginary movies, emphasizing spatial atmosphere and emotional resonance, showcasing Eno's exploration of 'audible but invisible' moods in electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的灵感源于Eno在1970年代中期对电影配乐的实验性想法。他邀请多位艺术家如John Cale、Robert Fripp等参与创作，但最终专辑中的大部分曲目由Eno自己完成。有趣的是，专辑最初仅发行了少量黑胶唱片，且封面设计由Eno本人用复印机手工制作，带有独特的DIY美学。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Eno's experimental ideas for film scores in the mid-1970s. He invited several artists like John Cale and Robert Fripp to contribute, but most tracks were ultimately completed by Eno himself. Interestingly, the initial vinyl release was limited, and the cover art was hand-made by Eno using a photocopier, giving it a distinctive DIY aesthetic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Music for Films》被公认为环境音乐的重要里程碑，影响了后世无数电子音乐人和电影配乐家，为氛围音乐在影视领域的应用奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: Music for Films is widely regarded as a milestone in ambient music, influencing countless electronic musicians and film composers, and laying the foundation for the use of ambient music in cinema.
items.artistIntroZh: Brian Eno，英国音乐人、制作人、理论家，被誉为环境音乐之父。他早年作为Roxy Music成员崭露头角，后以个人作品如《Another Green World》和《Music for Films》奠定电子/氛围音乐领域的地位，代表作包括《Ambient 1: Music for Airports》。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and theorist, often called the father of ambient music. He first gained fame as a member of Roxy Music, later establishing himself in electronic/ambient music with works like Another Green World and Music for Films. His representative work includes Ambient 1: Music for Airports.

09-01.birthdayZh: 9月1日，是你的生日。这一天，查尔斯·明格斯让《The Clown》在悲喜交织的旋律中起舞，Brian Eno的《Music for Films》为世界铺开平静的声景。你像被这两张专辑祝福过的人——有敢于直面戏剧人生的勇气，也有在喧嚣中安住于内心寂静的力量。愿你的新岁，如爵士般即兴而自由，如环境音般深邃而温柔。
09-01.birthdayEn: September 1 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of Charles Mingus's The Clown, a jazz masterpiece that dances between laughter and deep emotion, reminding us that life’s truest art holds both joy and sorrow. And Brian Eno’s Music for Films was born, painting sound like a gentle atmosphere—evoking the quiet, beautiful spaces where your own story unfolds. May your year be filled with that same richness: moments that swing like Mingus’s rhythms, and calm like Eno’s ambient light. Happy birthday, and may the music of your life be endlessly inspired.

09-02.birthdayZh: 9月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Born to Run》放进时光的唱机——提醒你，奔跑不是为了逃离，而是为了找到自己的路。而《Like a Rolling Stone》教会我们，就算跌跌撞撞，也能在风里学会自由。生在这天，你注定带着闯荡的勇气，和始终不被磨灭的温柔。去拥抱你独一无二的年岁吧。
09-02.birthdayEn: September 2 is your birthday, a day the world once blessed with the raw soul of *Exile on Main St.* and the tender rebellion of *Rumours*. Like those albums, may your year hold both gritty, beautiful chaos and the soft, unshakeable rhythm of connection. You are a masterpiece in progress, a melody of light and shadow. Here’s to the chapters you’ll write, the harmonies you’ll find, and the joy that is yours to claim. Happy birthday.

09-03.birthdayZh: 9月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了一份礼物——《天国的阶梯》在岁月里铺展，那是通往更高处的勇气；《影子》也悄然落地，提醒你：光与暗从来都并肩而行。你无需完美，只需活成自己的光，每一步都踏在属于自己的时区里。
09-03.birthdayEn: September 3 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like *Born to Run* and *Automatic for the People*, each pulsing with raw hope and tender resilience. May your new year carry that same spirit—a wild, open road ahead, yet a quiet knowing that even the hardest seasons soften into beauty. You are a melody that grows richer with time. Celebrate every note of you.

items.name: B'Day
items.descriptionZh: 《B'Day》是Beyoncé于2006年发行的第二张个人专辑，尽管常被归类为流行/R&B，但其部分曲目融入了民谣和乡村元素，体现了多元风格。核心特色在于强劲的节奏、情感充沛的演唱以及融合放克、灵魂乐的编曲，展现了Beyoncé从Destiny's Child单飞后的成熟艺术转向。
items.descriptionEn: B'Day is Beyoncé's second solo album, released in 2006. While primarily pop/R&B, it incorporates folk and country elements in some tracks, showcasing stylistic diversity. Its core features include powerful rhythms, emotionally charged vocals, and arrangements blending funk and soul, marking Beyoncé's artistic maturation after leaving Destiny's Child.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Beyoncé正忙于电影《梦幻女郎》的拍摄，她利用拍摄间隙在录音室完成创作，仅用三周就录制完成大部分歌曲。制作人Rich Harrison透露，主打歌《Déjà Vu》的鼓点灵感来自70年代放克，而Beyoncé在录音时即兴加入的呼喊���成为点睛之笔。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Beyoncé was busy filming Dreamgirls. She completed most of the songs in just three weeks, working in the studio between takes. Producer Rich Harrison revealed that the drums on lead single Déjà Vu were inspired by 1970s funk, and Beyoncé's spontaneous vocal shouts during recording became a highlight.
items.artistIntroZh: Beyoncé，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员，全球流行文化标志。以Destiny's Child成员出道，单飞后凭借《Dangerously in Love》《B'Day》等专辑成为R&B/流行巨星，代表作包括《Crazy in Love》《Single Ladies》。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, a global pop culture icon. She debuted as a member of Destiny's Child and became an R&B/pop superstar with solo albums like Dangerously in Love and B'Day. Her representative works include Crazy in Love and Single Ladies.

09-04.birthdayZh: 9月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起Beyoncé的《B’Day》，那是一张属于独立与自信的宣言，像火焰般燃烧，提醒每一个灵魂都能在自己的节奏里自由绽放。愿你的新岁，如这张专辑般充满力量，在每一次心跳中，听见自己最真实、最勇敢的声音。生日快乐，愿你永远热烈。
09-04.birthdayEn: September 4 is your birthday, a date that doesn’t just mark another year but a moment when the world itself chose to celebrate sound and spirit. On this day, Beyoncé unleashed B’Day, a powerful, joyful storm of funk and soul that refuses to be anything less than bold and beautiful. May your year ahead carry that same electric energy—confident, radiant, and unstoppable. You were born on a day of anthems, so let your life be your own. Happy birthday, luminous soul.

items.name: Love Place
items.descriptionZh: 《Love Place》是日本流行女歌手西野加奈于2012年发行的第四张录音室专辑，以甜美清新的J-Pop风格为核心，融合轻快的电子节拍和钢琴旋律。专辑主题围绕少女恋爱心情，歌词细腻真实，搭配西野加奈清澈的嗓音，营造出温暖治愈的氛围，是她“恋爱教主”风格的代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Love Place is the fourth studio album by Japanese pop singer Kana Nishino, released in 2012. Centered on sweet and fresh J-Pop, it blends upbeat electronic beats with piano melodies. The album's themes revolve around young girls' romantic emotions, with detailed, heartfelt lyrics and Nishino's clear vocals, creating a warm, healing atmosphere—a hallmark of her 'love queen' style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Love Place》寓意“恋爱的场所”，西野加奈表示灵感来自她与朋友在咖啡馆聊天的经历。录制时，她特别邀请了多位年轻创作人合作，以求更贴近同代人的心声。主打歌《私たち》的歌词是她根据粉丝来信的真实故事改编，发行后引发强烈共鸣。
items.storiesEn: The album title Love Place means 'the place of love,' inspired by Nishino's conversations with friends at cafes. During recording, she collaborated with young songwriters to better connect with her generation. The lyrics of the lead track Watashitachi were adapted from real fan letters, striking a chord with listeners after release.
items.artistIntroZh: 西野加奈，日本歌手、词曲作者，以描绘少女恋爱心理的J-Pop风格闻名。2008年出道后凭借《会いたくて 会いたくて》《トリセツ》等单曲成为日本流行音乐代表，被誉为“平成恋爱歌姬”。
items.artistIntroEn: Kana Nishino is a Japanese singer and songwriter, known for J-Pop songs depicting young women's romantic feelings. After debuting in 2008, she became a leading figure in Japanese pop music with hits like Aitakute Aitakute and Torisetsu, earning the title 'Heisei Love Diva.'

09-05.birthdayZh: 9月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过一张叫《Love Place》的专辑，它把恋爱里的怦然与不安，都唱成了轻盈发亮的旋律。你就像那个把心绪酿成甜歌的人，在成长的风里既勇敢又柔软。愿你的新一岁，依然拥有被爱照亮的勇气，像那些音符一样，永远明亮、永远自由。
09-05.birthdayEn: September 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also welcomed the soulful melodies of Kana Nishino’s Love Place, an album built on heart and connection. May your life dance to that same rhythm of warmth and sincerity. Let every year be a new verse in your own beautiful song, growing richer and more radiant with time. Happy birthday to you.

items.name: Step
items.descriptionZh: 《Step》是韩国女子组合Kara于2011年发行的迷你专辑，主打纯正K-Pop舞曲风格，以强劲的电子合成器节拍、洗脑的副歌旋律和整齐的刀群舞为特色。专辑同名主打歌《Step》节奏明快，充满能量，展现了Kara标志性的活力与甜美形象，是二代女团黄金时期的代表作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Step is a mini-album by South Korean girl group Kara, released in 2011. Featuring pure K-Pop dance music, it is characterized by powerful electronic synth beats, catchy chorus melodies, and synchronized choreography. The title track Step is upbeat and energetic, showcasing Kara's signature lively and sweet image, representing the golden era of second-generation K-Pop girl groups.
items.storiesZh: 《Step》的编舞由著��舞蹈家金花英设计，其中标志性的“踏步舞”动作灵感来自走路姿势，成员们为练到整齐划一花费数周时间。专辑发行前，成员具荷拉因膝盖受伤一度担心无法完成打歌舞台，但最终带伤坚持表演，成为粉丝津津乐道的敬业佳话。
items.storiesEn: The choreography for Step was designed by renowned dancer Kim Hwa-young, with the iconic 'stepping dance' inspired by walking motions. The members spent weeks perfecting synchronization. Before the album's release, member Goo Hara injured her knee and feared she couldn't perform on music shows, but she pushed through, earning praise from fans for her professionalism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Step》帮助Kara在日本市场取得突破，推动K-Pop在亚洲的进一步流行，其舞蹈和歌曲成为二代女团经典。
items.historicalImpactEn: Step helped Kara break into the Japanese market, further popularizing K-Pop across Asia. Its dance and song became classics of second-generation girl groups.
items.artistIntroZh: Kara，韩国女子组合，2007年出道，由朴奎利、韩胜妍、具荷拉、姜知英、妮可等成员组成。以《Mr.》《Step》等舞曲走红，是K-Pop二代女团代表之一，在日本也取得巨大成功，代表作包括《Jumping》《Lupin》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kara is a South Korean girl group formed in 2007, with members including Park Gyu-ri, Han Seung-yeon, Goo Hara, Kang Ji-young, and Nicole. They rose to fame with dance hits like Mr. and Step, becoming icons of second-generation K-Pop. They also achieved great success in Japan, with representative works including Jumping and Lupin.

09-06.birthdayZh: 9月6日，是你的生日。就像这天的《Step》，每一步都带着跃动的节拍与明亮的勇气——不是急着奔向远方，而是笃定地踩出属于你自己的舞步。风会轻抚你走过的路，光会照耀你未来的方向，愿你在自己的旋律里，一直温暖而从容地前行。
09-06.birthdayEn: September 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Step," an album by Kara that moves with the bright, unstoppable energy of a new dawn. Like that music, may your year ahead be a dance of bold, joyful steps. You are not just marking another year; you are a melody composed of hope and light. Let the rhythm of this day lift you, and may every beat ahead feel like a celebration of the wonderful person you are.

09-07.birthdayZh: 9月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Rubber Soul》般的灵魂柔韧——像橡皮筋拉扯后仍能弹回，带着自由生长的节奏；还有《A Love Supreme》的深沉告白，提醒你爱是永恒的和弦。每一圈年轮都是音符，愿你像这些旋律一样，既温柔又强大，在岁月里唱出自己的章。
09-07.birthdayEn: September 7 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us with the raw, hopeful power of The Clash's London Calling and the soulful, resilient spirit of Aretha’s Spirit in the Dark. Like those albums, may your year be a fierce anthem of rebellion against the ordinary, and a deep, warm ballad of joy. Let the echoes of that rebel beat and that soulful grace light your path. Here’s to you—a timeless melody in the making, stepping into another brilliant verse.

items.name: H2O: Just Add Water
items.descriptionZh: 《H2O: Just Add Water》是澳大利亚流行歌手Kate Alexa于2007年发行的专辑，作为同名电视剧《H2O: Just Add Water》的原声带，以轻快的流行摇滚和青少年流行风格为主。歌曲旋律朗朗上口，歌词围绕青春、友谊和冒险主题，充满阳光气息，与剧中海洋奇幻元素相得益彰。
items.descriptionEn: H2O: Just Add Water is an album by Australian pop singer Kate Alexa, released in 2007 as the soundtrack to the TV series of the same name. It features upbeat pop rock and teen pop styles, with catchy melodies and lyrics about youth, friendship, and adventure, exuding a sunny vibe that complements the show's oceanic fantasy themes.
items.storiesZh: Kate Alexa因演唱电视剧《H2O: Just Add Water》主题曲而受邀制作整张原声带。录制过程中，她与制作人紧密合作，希望音乐能传递剧中三位美人鱼少女的活力。专辑发行后，主题曲《We Are Together》在澳大利亚儿童频道热播，成为许多90后观众的青春记忆。
items.storiesEn: Kate Alexa was invited to create the full soundtrack after singing the theme song for the TV series H2O: Just Add Water. During recording, she worked closely with producers to capture the energy of the show's three mermaid girls. After release, the lead track We Are Together became a hit on Australian children's TV, becoming a nostalgic memory for many 90s viewers.
items.artistIntroZh: Kate Alexa，澳大利亚流行歌手、词曲作者，以青少年流行和流行摇滚风格闻名。2004年出道，因演唱电视剧《H2O: Just Add Water》原声带而广为人知，代表作包括《We Are Together》《Always There》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kate Alexa is an Australian pop singer and songwriter, known for teen pop and pop rock. She debuted in 2004 and gained fame for singing the soundtrack of the TV series H2O: Just Add Water. Her representative works include We Are Together and Always There.

items.name: Act II: The Father of Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Act II: The Father of Death》是The Protomen于2009年发行的概念专辑，尽管流派标签为Pop，但其核心特色是将合成器流行、摇滚与叙事性音乐剧元素融合，讲述一个基于《洛克人》改编的黑暗寓言故事。专辑以宏大的管弦乐编排和戏剧化的演唱风格著称，营造出反乌托邦氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Act II: The Father of Death is a 2009 concept album by The Protomen. Though tagged as Pop, its core is a fusion of synth-pop, rock, and narrative musical theater, telling a dark fable inspired by Mega Man. It features grand orchestral arrangements and dramatic vocals, creating a dystopian atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是The Protomen计划中的三部曲的第二部，录制过程历时数年，乐队成员自筹资金并在自家地下室进行录音。专辑封面和视觉概念由乐队成员与艺术家合作设计，整体风格致敬80年代科幻电影，但发行初期因独立性质而难以获得主流关注。
items.storiesEn: This album is the second part of The Protomen's planned trilogy. The recording process took several years, with band members self-funding and recording in their own basement. The cover art and visual concepts were designed in collaboration with artists, paying homage to 1980s sci-fi films, but initially struggled to gain mainstream attention due to its independent nature.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为独立游戏改编音乐的里程碑，影响了后续许多基于电子游戏进行概念创作的音乐人，但未在主流流行乐坛产生广泛影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone in indie game-inspired music, influencing many subsequent musicians who create concept works based on video games, though it did not have broad impact in mainstream pop.
items.artistIntroZh: The Protemen是一支来自美国田纳西州纳什维尔的摇滚乐队，成立于2000年。他们的音乐风格融合合成器流行、摇滚和戏剧摇滚，以基于《洛克人》系列的概念专辑闻名。代表作包括《Act I: The Protomen》和《Act II: The Father of Death》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Protomen are a rock band from Nashville, Tennessee, USA, formed in 2000. Their music blends synth-pop, rock, and theatrical rock, and they are known for concept albums based on the Mega Man series. Notable works include Act I: The Protomen and Act II: The Father of Death.

09-08.birthdayZh: 9月8日，是你的生日。这一天《H2O: Just Add Water》用阳光与海浪的旋律，为你注满如海般广阔又清澈的勇气；《Act II: The Father of Death》则像一场穿越黑暗的英雄之旅，提醒你每一次跌倒都是重塑自我的序章。愿你像水一样温柔地拥抱世界，也像战士一样无畏地走向明天。生日快乐。
09-08.birthdayEn: September 8 is your birthday, a day that carries the splash of new beginnings and the pulse of epic journeys. Like the soundtrack of H2O: Just Add Water, may your year flow with refreshing wonder and the courage to dive into the unknown. And in the spirit of Act II: The Father of Death, may you rise with resilience, meeting every challenge as a hero of your own story. On this day, the world celebrates the unique music only you can make. Shine on.

items.name: Not 4 Sale
items.descriptionZh: 《Not 4 Sale》是Kardinal Offishall于2008年发行的第四张录音室专辑，属于Hip-Hop流派。核心特色是融合了牙买加舞厅（dancehall）节奏与东海岸嘻哈的硬核说唱风格，由Akon、Rihanna等艺人助阵，主打单曲《Dangerous》成为全球热门。
items.descriptionEn: Not 4 Sale is the fourth studio album by Kardinal Offishall, released in 2008, in the Hip-Hop genre. Its core feature is a fusion of Jamaican dancehall rhythms with East Coast hardcore rap, featuring guest artists like Akon and Rihanna. The lead single 'Dangerous' became a global hit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Kardinal Offishall在牙买加与加拿大之间往返，以捕捉舞厅音乐的真实氛围。主打歌《Dangerous》最初是为Rihanna创作的，但最终由Kardinal演唱并与Akon合作，Akon还担任了专辑的执行制作人。专辑名称《Not 4 Sale》反映了Kardinal拒绝妥协艺术原则的态度。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Kardinal Offishall traveled between Jamaica and Canada to capture authentic dancehall vibes. The lead single 'Dangerous' was originally written for Rihanna, but ended up being performed by Kardinal with Akon, who also served as executive producer. The album title 'Not 4 Sale' reflects Kardinal's refusal to compromise his artistic principles.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑帮助Kardinal Offishall打入美国主流市场，并推动了牙买加舞厅音乐在北美嘻哈圈的融合趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped Kardinal Offishall break into the US mainstream market and promoted the fusion of Jamaican dancehall music within North American hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Kardinal Offishall，加拿大说唱歌手、唱片制作人，出生于牙买加金斯敦。他以融合舞厅音乐与嘻哈的风格著称，代表作包括《Not 4 Sale》和单曲《Dangerous》。他是加拿大嘻哈界的重要人物，被誉为“加拿大嘻哈教父”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kardinal Offishall is a Canadian rapper and record producer, born in Kingston, Jamaica. He is known for fusing dancehall music with hip-hop, with notable works including Not 4 Sale and the single 'Dangerous'. A key figure in Canadian hip-hop, he is often called one of the 'godfathers of Canadian hip-hop'.

items.name: To Anyone
items.descriptionZh: 《To Anyone》是韩国女子组合2NE1于2010年发行的首张正规专辑，属于Pop流派。核心特色是融合了流行、电子、嘻哈和R&B元素，展现出强烈的个性与实验性。专辑以主打歌《Can't Nobody》和《Go Away》为代表，展现了成员们独特的嗓音和舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: To Anyone is the first studio album by South Korean girl group 2NE1, released in 2010, in the Pop genre. Its core feature is a fusion of pop, electronic, hip-hop, and R&B elements, showcasing strong individuality and experimentation. Lead singles 'Can't Nobody' and 'Go Away' highlight the members' unique vocals and stage charisma.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《To Anyone》寓意2NE1的音乐献给所有人。录制过程中，成员们与制作人Teddy Park紧密合作，尝试了多种曲风。主打歌《Can't Nobody》的MV在首尔街头拍摄，成员们亲自参与编舞和造型设计，展现了团队对艺术方向的掌控力。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'To Anyone' signifies that 2NE1's music is dedicated to everyone. During recording, members worked closely with producer Teddy Park, experimenting with various genres. The music video for 'Can't Nobody' was filmed on the streets of Seoul, with members personally involved in choreography and styling, showcasing the team's artistic control.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是K-pop女子组合中最早成功融合多种流派的代表作之一，巩固了2NE1作为“女子组合变革者”的地位，并影响了后续K-pop组合的音乐多元化。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the earliest successful genre-blending works by a K-pop girl group, cementing 2NE1's status as 'girl group revolutionaries' and influencing the musical diversity of subsequent K-pop acts.
items.artistIntroZh: 2NE1是韩国YG娱乐旗下女子组合，2009年出道，成员包括CL、朴春、Sandara Park和孔敏智。她们以强烈的嘻哈风格和前卫时尚著称，代表作包括《I Am the Best》和《To Anyone》。组合于2016年解散，但被视为K-pop史上最具影响力的女子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: 2NE1 is a South Korean girl group under YG Entertainment, debuting in 2009 with members CL, Park Bom, Sandara Park, and Minzy. Known for their strong hip-hop style and avant-garde fashion, their notable works include 'I Am the Best' and To Anyone. The group disbanded in 2016 but is considered one of the most influential girl groups in K-pop history.

items.name: 50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5
items.descriptionZh: 《50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5》是2008年发行的精选集，尽管流派标签为Folk/Country，但其实际内容为摩城唱片时期Michael Jackson与Jackson 5的经典流行和灵魂乐作品。核心特色是收录了《I Want You Back》《ABC》等早期金曲，展现了Jackson 5的青春活力与Michael Jackson的���星魅力。
items.descriptionEn: 50 Best Songs – The Motown Years: Michael Jackson & The Jackson 5 is a 2008 compilation album, despite the Folk/Country tag, its actual content consists of classic pop and soul tracks from Michael Jackson and The Jackson 5's Motown era. It features early hits like 'I Want You Back' and 'ABC', showcasing the youthful energy of The Jackson 5 and Michael's child-star charm.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集由摩城唱片与遗产管理方合作发行，旨在庆祝Jackson 5在摩城时期的辉煌。选曲涵盖1969年至1975年的录音，其中许多歌曲由摩城传奇制作人团队The Corporation创作。尽管Michael Jackson后来成为全球巨星，但这张专辑聚焦于他作为童星与兄弟们共同创造的音乐遗产。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released by Motown Records in collaboration with the estate, celebrating The Jackson 5's glory days at Motown. The tracklist covers recordings from 1969 to 1975, many written by Motown's legendary production team The Corporation. Although Michael Jackson later became a global superstar, this album focuses on the musical legacy he created with his brothers as a child star.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson是美国歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行音乐之王”，出生于印第安纳州加里。他以标志性的舞步和跨时代专辑《Thriller》闻名。Jackson 5是他在1960年代与兄弟们组成的家族乐队，以摩城时期的金曲奠定基础。代表作包括《Billie Jean》和《I Want You Back》。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson was an American singer and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop', born in Gary, Indiana. He is famous for his iconic dance moves and the groundbreaking album Thriller. The Jackson 5 was a family band formed with his brothers in the 1960s, laying the foundation with Motown hits. Notable works include 'Billie Jean' and 'I Want You Back'.

09-09.birthdayZh: 9月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Not 4 Sale》的叛逆与自由，也用《To Anyone》宣告自信无畏的宣言。你像这些旋律一样，无需出售灵魂，只需拥抱独一无二的自己。愿你在新的一岁里，活成最响亮的鼓点，温柔而坚定，踏出属于自己的节拍。
09-09.birthdayEn: September 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "Not 4 Sale" by Kardinal Offishall, a reminder to stay authentic and unapologetically yourself, and "To Anyone" by 2NE1, a bold anthem for embracing every version of who you are. May your new year carry that same fearless spirit—untamed, whole, and open to all the joy you deserve. Here’s to you, born on a day of rhythm and revolution. Shine bright.

items.name: A Complete: All Singles
items.descriptionZh: 《A Complete: All Singles》是滨崎步于2008年发行的单曲精选集，属于Pop流派。核心特色是收录了她从1998年出道至2008年间的全部单曲（A面曲），涵盖了她从早期流行舞曲到后期电子实验风格的演变，是了解其音乐生涯的完整资料。
items.descriptionEn: A Complete: All Singles is a singles compilation by Ayumi Hamasaki, released in 2008, in the Pop genre. It features all of her A-side singles from her 1998 debut to 2008, covering her evolution from early pop dance tracks to later electronic experimental styles, serving as a comprehensive overview of her career.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑为纪念滨崎步出道10周年而发行，收���了43首单曲（包括双A面）。滨崎步亲自参与了选曲和封面设计，封面采用了她标志性的华丽风格。专辑发行前，她因突发性耳疾导致左耳失聪，但仍坚持完成录制和宣传，展现了极强的职业精神。
items.storiesEn: This album was released to commemorate Ayumi Hamasaki's 10th debut anniversary, featuring 43 singles (including double A-sides). Hamasaki personally participated in track selection and cover design, adopting her signature glamorous style. Before release, she suffered sudden hearing loss in her left ear due to an ear condition, but still completed recording and promotion, demonstrating strong professionalism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该精选集是日本流行音乐史上最完整的单曲合集之一，巩固了滨崎步作为平成时代代表性歌手的地位，并成为粉丝收藏的经典。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation is one of the most complete single collections in Japanese pop music history, cementing Hamasaki's status as a representative singer of the Heisei era and becoming a classic for fans.
items.artistIntroZh: 滨崎步是日本歌手、词曲创作人，出生于福冈县。她以多元化的音乐风格和时尚形象著称，���平成时代最具影响力的流行歌手之一。代表作包括《Boys & Girls》和《M》等，专辑总销量超过5000万张，被誉为“平成歌姬”。
items.artistIntroEn: Ayumi Hamasaki is a Japanese singer and songwriter, born in Fukuoka Prefecture. She is known for her diverse music styles and fashion image, one of the most influential pop singers of the Heisei era. Notable works include 'Boys & Girls' and 'M', with total album sales exceeding 50 million, often called the 'Empress of Heisei Pop'.

09-10.birthdayZh: 9月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行滨崎步的《A Complete: All Singles》，像把十年星光打包赠予人间。愿你的生命也如这精选集，每一程都值得被珍藏，每一段过往都铺成通往未来的完整轨迹。你本身就是一首未写完的诗，而今日，是翻开新乐章最动听的序曲。
09-10.birthdayEn: September 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "A Complete: All Singles" by Ayumi Hamasaki—a collection of every step, every heartbeat of a journey, much like your own path through life. May your new year feel like that album: a sweeping anthem of resilience, a ballad of quiet joy, and a crescendo of all the beautiful chapters still unwritten. Here’s to you, the star whose song continues to grow brighter with each verse. Happy birthday.

items.name: Undisputed
items.descriptionZh: 《Undisputed》是DMX于2012年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格延续了其标志性的东海岸硬核嘻哈，融合了粗粝的街头叙事与宗教救赎主题。专辑由Swizz Beatz等制作人操刀，节奏沉重、人声咆哮，展现了DMX标志性的狂暴能量与内心脆弱并存的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Undisputed is DMX's seventh studio album, released in 2012, continuing his signature East Coast hardcore hip-hop style with gritty street narratives and themes of religious redemption. Produced by Swizz Beatz and others, the album features heavy beats and roaring vocals, showcasing DMX's unique blend of ferocious energy and inner vulnerability.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值DMX个人生活最为动荡的时期，他多次因法律问题进出监狱。专辑中的许多歌词直接反映了他在狱中的反思与挣扎，尤其是主打歌《I Don't Dance》原本是为庆祝出狱而作，但录制过程中他因情绪失控多次中断录音，最终在制作人鼓励下完成。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album coincided with one of the most turbulent periods in DMX's personal life, as he faced multiple legal issues and incarcerations. Many lyrics directly reflect his reflections and struggles in prison. The lead single 'I Don't Dance' was originally intended to celebrate his release, but he broke down emotionally multiple times during recording, eventually finishing it with encouragement from the producer.
items.artistIntroZh: DMX（原名Earl Simmons），美国说唱歌手、演员，出生于纽约扬克斯。以凶狠的咆哮式唱腔和街头硬汉形象著称，是20世纪90年代末至21世纪初最畅销的嘻哈艺人之一。代表作包括《It's Dark and Hell Is Hot》、《Flesh of My Flesh, Blood of My Blood》。
items.artistIntroEn: DMX (born Earl Simmons) was an American rapper and actor from Yonkers, New York. Known for his aggressive, growling vocal style and street-hardened persona, he was one of the best-selling hip-hop artists of the late 1990s and early 2000s. His代表作 include 'It's Dark and Hell Is Hot' and 'Flesh of My Flesh, Blood of My Blood'.

items.name: 15 Again
items.descriptionZh: 《15 Again》是法国电子音乐双人组Cassius于2006年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格融合了French Touch、放克和迪斯科元素，节奏明快、旋律抓耳。专辑以复古合成器音色和采样为基础，营造出充满活力与派对氛围的电子舞曲体验，体现了Cassius对经典舞曲的现代诠释。
items.descriptionEn: 15 Again is the third studio album by French electronic duo Cassius, released in 2006. Blending French Touch, funk, and disco elements, the album features upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies. Built on vintage synthesizer sounds and samples, it creates a vibrant, party-driven electronic dance music experience, showcasing Cassius's modern take on classic dance genres.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《15 Again》源于成员Philippe Zdar和Boom Bass的一次玩笑——他们希望找回15年前刚出道时的青春活力。录制过程中，两人特意使用了大量老式模拟合成器，包括一台从巴黎跳蚤市场淘来的故障合成器，其不稳定的音色反而成了专辑中多首歌曲的亮点。
items.storiesEn: The album title '15 Again' came from a joke between members Philippe Zdar and Boom Bass about wanting to recapture the youthful energy they had 15 years earlier when they first started. During recording, they deliberately used many vintage analog synthesizers, including a malfunctioning one found at a Paris flea market, whose unstable sound became a highlight on several tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Cassius（原名Philippe Zdar和Boom Bass），法国电子音乐双人组，成立于1990年代，是French Touch运动的代表人物之一。风格融合放克、迪斯科和浩室音乐，代表作包括专辑《1999》和单曲《Cassius 1999》。Philippe Zdar于2019年意外去世。
items.artistIntroEn: Cassius was a French electronic music duo formed in the 1990s, consisting of Philippe Zdar and Boom Bass. They were key figures in the French Touch movement, blending funk, disco, and house music. Their代表作 include the album '1999' and the single 'Cassius 1999'. Philippe Zdar passed away in 2019.

items.name: We Too Are One
items.descriptionZh: 《We Too Are One》是英国流行双人组Eurythmics于1989年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了灵魂乐和舞曲元素。专辑旋律流畅、编曲精致，Annie Lennox的嗓音充满力量与情感，Dave Stewart的吉他演奏和制作则为作品增添了丰富的层次感。
items.descriptionEn: We Too Are One is the seventh studio album by British pop duo Eurythmics, released in 1989. Primarily pop rock with soul and dance elements, the album features smooth melodies and intricate arrangements. Annie Lennox's powerful and emotive vocals, combined with Dave Stewart's guitar work and production, add rich layers to the songs.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Eurythmics成员间关系紧张时期，Annie Lennox和Dave Stewart一度考虑解散。专辑中的歌曲《Don't Ask Me Why》直接反映了两人之间的摩擦。为了缓解气氛，他们邀请了多位客座音乐人参与，包括吉他手Stevie Ray Vaughan（在专辑发行前不幸去世），他的演奏出现在歌曲《The King and Queen of America》中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a tense period for the duo, with Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart considering disbanding. The song 'Don't Ask Me Why' directly reflects their friction. To ease the atmosphere, they invited several guest musicians, including guitarist Stevie Ray Vaughan (who died before the album's release), whose playing appears on 'The King and Queen of America'.
items.artistIntroZh: Eurythmics，英国流行双人组，由Annie Lennox和Dave Stewart于1980年成立。以合成器流行和灵魂乐融合风格著称，Annie Lennox的中性嗓音和舞台形象极具辨识度。代表作包括专辑《Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)》和单曲《Here Comes the Rain Again》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eurythmics were a British pop duo formed in 1980 by Annie Lennox and Dave Stewart. Known for blending synth-pop with soul music, Annie Lennox's androgynous voice and stage presence were highly distinctive. Their代表作 include the album 'Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)' and the single 'Here Comes the Rain Again'.

09-11.birthdayZh: 9月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出过两种声音：一种愤怒如《Undisputed》，在挣扎中听见信仰的爆裂；一种温暖如《15 Again》，让合成器带回复古的律动与自由。而你，把历史的重叠变成呼吸的节拍。每一次存在，都是对昨日最温柔的反叛。生日快乐。
09-11.birthdayEn: September 11 is your birthday. On this day, the pulse of "Undisputed" by DMX roars with a triumphant return after a long silence, mirroring your own resilient spirit. The soaring harmonies of "We Too Are One" by Eurythmics remind us that connection and unity are our greatest strength. May your year ahead be fueled by that same unstoppable energy, wrapped in the warmth of those who stand beside you. Celebrate the fierce, the tender, and the beautiful soul you are. Happy birthday.

items.name: FutureSex/LoveSounds
items.descriptionZh: 《FutureSex/LoveSounds》是美国流行巨星Justin Timberlake于2006年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行、R&B和电子舞曲为主，由Timbaland和Danja联合制作。专辑融合了放克、摇滚和电子元素，节奏感强烈，制作前卫，Justin的假声演唱和性感形象成为其标志性特色。
items.descriptionEn: FutureSex/LoveSounds is the second studio album by American pop superstar Justin Timberlake, released in 2006. Blending pop, R&B, and electronic dance music, the album was co-produced by Timbaland and Danja. It incorporates funk, rock, and electronic elements with strong rhythms and cutting-edge production, with Justin's falsetto vocals and sexy image becoming signature features.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程极为高效，Justin Timberlake和Timbaland在短短两周内完成了大部分歌曲的创作和录制。主打歌《SexyBack》原本是Timbaland为另一个艺人创作的，但Justin听到demo后坚持自己演唱。歌曲中重复的“I'm bringing sexy back”原本是临时填词，却意外成为流行文化经典口号。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded with remarkable efficiency—Justin Timberlake and Timbaland completed most of the songwriting and recording in just two weeks. The lead single 'SexyBack' was originally written by Timbaland for another artist, but Justin insisted on singing it after hearing the demo. The repeated line 'I'm bringing sexy back' was initially a placeholder lyric but unexpectedly became a classic pop culture catchphrase.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《FutureSex/LoveSounds》被视为21世纪流行音乐的重要转折点，其融合电子舞曲和R&B的制作风格影响了随后十年的流行音乐走向，并帮助确立了Timbaland作为顶级制作人的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: FutureSex/LoveSounds is regarded as a major turning point in 21st-century pop music. Its fusion of electronic dance music and R&B influenced the direction of pop music for the following decade and helped establish Timbaland as a top-tier producer.
items.artistIntroZh: Justin Timberlake，美国歌手、词曲作者、演员，出生于田纳西州孟菲斯。最初作为男子组合*NSYNC成员走红，后转型为成功的个人艺人。风格以流行、R&B和舞曲为主，代表作包括专辑《Justified》和《The 20/20 Experience》。
items.artistIntroEn: Justin Timberlake is an American singer, songwriter, and actor from Memphis, Tennessee. He first rose to fame as a member of the boy band *NSYNC before transitioning to a successful solo career. His music primarily blends pop, R&B, and dance, with代表作 including the albums 'Justified' and 'The 20/20 Experience'.

09-12.birthdayZh: 9月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你悄悄准备了礼物——就像《FutureSex/LoveSounds》唱的那样，未来与爱可以交织成最动听的旋律。愿你像这张专辑一样，既有向前奔跑的勇气，也有拥抱温柔的底气。时光会老去，但属于你的节奏，永远自由、明亮、生生不息。
09-12.birthdayEn: September 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world first heard the pulse of FutureSex/LoveSounds, a bold invitation to step into your own rhythm without apology. Like that album’s electric spirit, may your year be filled with daring joy and the courage to chase every beat of your heart. You are a melody only you can sing, and today the universe celebrates your unique song. Shine on, beautiful soul.

items.name: Gelgit
items.descriptionZh: 《Gelgit》是土耳其电子音乐人Aylin Aslım于2000年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格融合了电子、另类摇滚和土耳其传统音乐元素。专辑以合成器音色和电子节拍为基础，搭配Aylin富有表现力的嗓音和土耳其语歌词，营造出迷幻而深邃的氛围，展现了土耳其电子音乐的独特面貌。
items.descriptionEn: Gelgit is the debut studio album by Turkish electronic musician Aylin Aslım, released in 2000. The style blends electronic, alternative rock, and traditional Turkish music elements. Built on synthesizer sounds and electronic beats, paired with Aylin's expressive vocals and Turkish lyrics, the album creates a psychedelic and deep atmosphere, showcasing a unique face of Turkish electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 《Gelgit》的录制过程充满实验性，Aylin Aslım与制作人Demir Demirkan在伊斯坦布尔的一个小型地下室录音室中完成了大部分工作。由于预算有限，他们使用了大量二手设备和自制采样，包括从伊斯坦布尔街头录制的环境音。专辑中的歌曲《Gelgit》的歌词灵感来自Aylin���博斯普鲁斯海峡边散步时的感受。
items.storiesEn: The recording of Gelgit was highly experimental. Aylin Aslım and producer Demir Demirkan completed most of the work in a small basement studio in Istanbul. With a limited budget, they used a lot of second-hand equipment and self-made samples, including ambient sounds recorded on the streets of Istanbul. The lyrics of the title track 'Gelgit' were inspired by Aylin's walks along the Bosphorus Strait.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Gelgit》被认为是土耳其电子音乐的开创性作品之一，为后续土耳其独立电子音乐人打开了道路，并在土耳其另类音乐圈中获得了极高的评价。
items.historicalImpactEn: Gelgit is considered one of the pioneering works of Turkish electronic music, paving the way for subsequent Turkish independent electronic musicians and earning high praise in Turkey's alternative music scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Aylin Aslım，土耳其歌手、词曲作者、演员，出生于伊斯坦布尔。风格融合电子、摇滚和另类流行，是土耳其独立音乐界的重要人物。代表作包括专辑《Gelgit》和单曲《Güle Güle》。
items.artistIntroEn: Aylin Aslım is a Turkish singer, songwriter, and actress from Istanbul. Her style blends electronic, rock, and alternative pop, making her an important figure in Turkey's independent music scene. Her代表作 include the album 'Gelgit' and the single 'Güle Güle'.

items.name: My Love, My Life
items.descriptionZh: 《My Love, My Life》是Agnetha Fältskog于1996年发行的个人流行专辑。这张作品融合了成人当代流行与轻柔的斯堪的纳维亚流行风格，核心特色在于Agnetha标志性的清澈嗓音与深情演绎，专辑中的歌曲多以爱情与人生为主题，旋律优美且富有情感层次，展现了她在ABBA时期之外的成熟音乐面貌。
items.descriptionEn: "My Love, My Life" is a pop album released by Agnetha Fältskog in 1996. It blends adult contemporary pop with soft Scandinavian pop, featuring her signature clear vocals and emotional delivery. The songs revolve around love and life, with beautiful melodies and rich emotional depth, showcasing her mature musical identity beyond the ABBA era.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Agnetha逐渐淡出公众视野的时期。她当时对媒体曝光极为谨慎，因此专辑宣传非常低调。有趣的是，专辑标题曲《My Love, My Life》原本是ABBA时期的一首旧作，但在此专辑中，Agnetha以全新的编曲和更私人化的演绎重新录制，仿佛是对自己音乐生涯的一次温柔回望。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a period when Agnetha was gradually retreating from the public eye. She was very cautious about media exposure, so the promotion was extremely low-key. Interestingly, the title track "My Love, My Life" was originally an old ABBA song, but for this album, Agnetha re-recorded it with a new arrangement and a more personal interpretation, as if gently looking back on her own musical career.
items.artistIntroZh: Agnetha Fältskog是瑞典著名歌手，以ABBA乐队主唱之一闻名全球。她的音乐风格以流行和成人当代为主，代表作包括ABBA时期的《Dancing Queen》以及个人专辑《Wrap Your Arms Around Me》。她的嗓音纯净而富有感染力，是瑞典流行音乐的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Agnetha Fältskog is a renowned Swedish singer, best known as one of the lead vocalists of ABBA. Her music style is primarily pop and adult contemporary, with iconic works including "Dancing Queen" from ABBA and her solo album "Wrap Your Arms Around Me." Her pure and emotive voice makes her a iconic figure in Swedish pop music.

items.name: The Dutchess
items.descriptionZh: 《The Dutchess》是Fergie于2006年发行的首张个人专辑，尽管其音乐风格融合了流行、R&B和嘻哈元素，但根据给定流派标签，本作在部分曲目中融入了民谣与乡村音乐的叙事性及原声乐器元素。核心特色在于Fergie极具辨识度的嗓音与大胆的跨界尝试，专辑中的抒情歌曲展现了她在黑眼豆豆之外更为私密和感性的一面。
items.descriptionEn: "The Dutchess" is Fergie's debut solo album released in 2006. While blending pop, R&B, and hip-hop, certain tracks incorporate folk and country narrative styles with acoustic instrumentation. Its core feature is Fergie's distinctive voice and bold cross-genre experiments, with ballads revealing a more intimate and emotional side beyond The Black Eyed Peas.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程历时两年，Fergie在制作期间经历了与前男友的分手，这深深影响了专辑中抒情歌曲的创作。专辑名称《The Dutchess》源自她童年时的绰号，因为小时候她举止优雅，父亲常叫她“小公爵夫人”。此外，专辑中的热门单曲《Big Girls Don't Cry》的歌词灵感来自她与黑眼豆豆成员will.i.am的友谊与争执。
items.storiesEn: The album took two years to record, during which Fergie went through a breakup with her ex-boyfriend, deeply influencing the creation of the ballads. The album title "The Dutchess" comes from her childhood nickname, as her father called her "little duchess" for her graceful manners. Additionally, the hit single "Big Girls Don't Cry" was inspired by her friendship and arguments with The Black Eyed Peas member will.i.am.
items.artistIntroZh: Fergie（Stacy Ann Ferguson）是美国歌手、词曲作者及演员，以黑眼豆豆主唱身份闻名。她的音乐风格横跨流行、R&B与嘻哈，个人代表作包括《London Bridge》、《Big Girls Don't Cry》等。她以大胆的舞台形象和富有张力的嗓音著称，是21世纪初流行乐坛的标志性女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Fergie (Stacy Ann Ferguson) is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, best known as the lead vocalist of The Black Eyed Peas. Her music spans pop, R&B, and hip-hop, with hits like "London Bridge" and "Big Girls Don't Cry." Known for her bold stage presence and powerful voice, she is an iconic female pop artist of the early 2000s.

09-13.birthdayZh: 9月13日，是你的生日。这一天，曾有《Gelgit》的潮汐涌动，像你生命中那些既忐忑又勇敢的起落。而《My Love, My Life》的温柔旋律，恰如你心底从未熄灭的暖意。愿你在自己的时区里，像潮水般自由进退，像歌中那样深爱自己——你值得所有美好，如约而至。
09-13.birthdayEn: September 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Gelgit," a tidal wave of new beginnings, and "The Dutchess," a bold, unapologetic anthem of self-discovery. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful debut—a rhythm of strength and grace. May this year bring you the courage to dance through every tide and the joy of knowing you are the star of your own vibrant story. Shine on, and happy birthday.

09-14.birthdayZh: 9月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《发光如星》的专辑，像黑暗中闪烁的坚定光芒，提醒你即使平凡的日子也能折射出属于自己的微光。也有《海洋》般的旋律在此时奏响——包容起伏，却始终深沉辽阔。愿新的一岁，你怀抱星辰的勇气与大海的温柔，在属于自己的节奏里，温暖前行。
09-14.birthdayEn: September 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the raw soul of John Lennon’s “Imagine” and the tender defiance of The Beatles’ “Help!”—songs that dared the world to dream and to lean on each other. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to imagine a brighter path and the grace to ask for help when you need it. You are a melody worth celebrating, and today the universe hums along with you. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Überlebenstraining
items.descriptionZh: 《Überlebenstraining》是德国说唱歌手Albino于2006年发行的嘻哈专辑。这张作品以德语说唱为主，风格硬朗且充满街头叙事，核心特色在于其直白的社会观察与个人生存主题，歌词中探讨了都市生活中的挣扎与对抗，节奏强劲，展现了德国嘻哈音乐中较为粗粝和真实的一面。
items.descriptionEn: "Überlebenstraining" is a hip-hop album by German rapper Albino, released in 2006. It features hard-hitting German rap with street narratives, focusing on social observation and personal survival themes. The lyrics explore urban struggles and resistance, with strong beats, showcasing a raw and authentic side of German hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: Albino在录制这张专辑时，正值德国嘻哈地下圈层蓬勃发展的时期。他坚持使用德语进行创作，以此强调本土文化认同。专辑名称《Überlebenstraining》（意为“生存训练”）来源于他个人在柏林底层社区的生活经历，许多歌词直接取材于他身边朋友的真实故事，这使得专辑在德国嘻哈乐迷中获得了极高的真实性和共鸣。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Albino was part of the thriving German underground hip-hop scene. He insisted on rapping in German to emphasize local cultural identity. The album title "Überlebenstraining" (meaning "survival training") comes from his personal experiences in Berlin's underprivileged neighborhoods, with many lyrics directly inspired by real stories from his friends, earning high authenticity and resonance among German hip-hop fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Albino是德国说唱歌手，活跃于2000年代中期，是德国嘻哈地下场景的代表人物之一。他的音乐风格以硬核德语说唱为主，歌词内容多聚焦社会现实与个人生存。代表作包括专辑《Überlebenstraining》。他以直白的歌词和真实的街头视角在德国嘻哈圈内获得尊重。
items.artistIntroEn: Albino is a German rapper active in the mid-2000s, representing the German underground hip-hop scene. His music is characterized by hardcore German rap, with lyrics focusing on social reality and personal survival. His notable work includes the album "Überlebenstraining." He gained respect in German hip-hop for his straightforward lyrics and authentic street perspective.

items.name: Ola
items.descriptionZh: 《Ola》是瑞典流行歌手Ola Svensson于2010年发行的同名专辑。这张作品属于典型的瑞典流行风格，旋律抓耳、制作精良，核心特色在于其充满活力的节奏和积极向上的歌词主题。专辑中的歌曲多围绕爱情与青春展开，展现了Ola清爽的嗓音和阳光般的音乐形象，是瑞典流行音乐工业流水线上的优质产物。
items.descriptionEn: "Ola" is the self-titled album by Swedish pop singer Ola Svensson, released in 2010.
