It features classic Swedish pop with catchy melodies and polished production, characterized by energetic rhythms and uplifting lyrics. The songs revolve around love and youth, showcasing Ola's fresh vocals and sunny musical image, a quality product of the Swedish pop music industry.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行正值Ola参加瑞典版《偶像》出道后的成熟期。为了打造这张同名专辑，他与多位瑞典顶尖制作人合作，包括曾为ABBA工作的录音师。有趣的是，专辑中的主打歌《I'm in Love》原本是为另一位歌手创作的，但Ola在录音室试唱后，制作人一致认为他的版本更具感染力，最终留给了他自己演唱。
items.storiesEn: This album was released during Ola's mature phase after his debut on Swedish Idol. To create this self-titled album, he worked with top Swedish producers, including engineers who had worked with ABBA. Interestingly, the lead single "I'm in Love" was originally written for another artist, but after Ola's demo in the studio, the producers unanimously agreed his version was more compelling, so it stayed with him.
items.artistIntroZh: Ola Svensson是瑞典流行男歌手，因参加瑞典版《偶���》比赛而成名。他的音乐风格以瑞典流行和舞曲流行为主，代表作包括《I'm in Love》和《All Over the World》。他以阳光的外形和清爽的嗓音著称，是21世纪10年代瑞典流行乐坛的代表性男歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ola Svensson is a Swedish pop singer who rose to fame through Swedish Idol. His music style is primarily Swedish pop and dance-pop, with hits like "I'm in Love" and "All Over the World." Known for his sunny image and fresh vocals, he is a representative male pop artist of the 2010s Swedish music scene.

09-15.birthdayZh: 9月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生《Überlebenstraining》的粗粝锋芒，教人在生活的砾石中锻造坚韧；也绽放了《Ola》的明亮旋律，像阳光穿过树梢洒满你的笑。愿你在坚硬与温柔之间，找到自己的节拍——像今天一样，成为世界为你亮起的光。
09-15.birthdayEn: September 15 is your birthday, a day that resonates with the bold beats of "Überlebenstraining" by Albino, channeling your resilience and sharp spirit. Like the uplifting pulse of Ola Svensson's "Ola," your life hums with vibrant, hopeful energy. May this new year carry you through every challenge with a fighter’s heart and a dancer’s grace. Here’s to you, a melody of strength and joy, growing brighter with each passing season. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: [e]
items.descriptionZh: 《[e]》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High于2009年发行的专辑。这张作品融合了嘻哈、电子与独立摇滚元素，核心特色在于其深刻的歌词与实验性的音乐编曲。专辑名称“[e]”取自“epilogue”的缩写，寓意着一段旅程的结束与新的开始，歌曲内容探讨了社会批判、人生反思与情感创伤，展现了Epik High作为韩国嘻哈诗人的艺术深度。
items.descriptionEn: "[e]" is an album by South Korean hip-hop group Epik High, released in 2009. It blends hip-hop, electronic, and indie rock elements, with deep lyrics and experimental arrangements. The title "[e]" stands for "epilogue," symbolizing an end and a new beginning. The songs explore social critique, life reflection, and emotional trauma, showcasing Epik High's artistic depth as hip-hop poets.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Epik High成员Tablo经历个人低谷期，包括父亲去世等事件，这深刻影响了专辑的阴郁基调。专辑中有一首歌曲《슬픔보다 더 슬픈 이야기》（比悲伤更悲伤的故事），其灵感来源于Tablo阅读的一篇关于遗忘与记忆的短篇小说。此外，专辑发行后，成员们因其中的社会议题歌词在韩国引发了广泛讨论，但也因此获得了更多独立思考乐迷的认可。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during a difficult period for Epik High member Tablo, including the death of his father, which deeply influenced the album's melancholic tone. The track "A Story More Sad Than Sadness" was inspired by a short story Tablo read about memory and forgetting. After release, the album sparked widespread discussion in South Korea due to its socially conscious lyrics, earning the group more recognition from independent-minded fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《[e]》被认为是Epik High音乐生涯中最重要的转型之作之一，奠定了他们作为韩国嘻哈界“知识分子”代表���地位。专辑中实验性的音乐元素和对社会议题的深度探讨，影响了后续一批韩国独立嘻哈音乐人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: "[e]" is considered one of Epik High's most important transitional works, cementing their status as the "intellectual" representatives of Korean hip-hop. Its experimental elements and deep social commentary influenced a generation of subsequent Korean indie hip-hop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成，2003年出道。他们的音乐风格以嘻哈为基础，融合电子、摇滚与古典元素，以富有诗意的歌词和深刻的社会洞察著称。代表作包括《Fly》、《Fan》和《Born Hater》。他们是韩国嘻哈音乐史上的传奇团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Their music is rooted in hip-hop, blending electronic, rock, and classical elements, known for poetic lyrics and deep social insight. Notable works include "Fly," "Fan," and "Born Hater." They are legendary figures in Korean hip-hop history.

09-16.birthdayZh: 9月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾铺开一张名为《[e]》的唱片，像一首深刻的诗，把嘻哈的棱角、电子与摇滚的勇气揉进心跳。它提醒你：人生是场诚实的演奏，低音时沉淀，高音时释放。愿你的新一岁，如这专辑的旋律——既有锋芒，也留温柔，在属于你的节拍里，稳稳发光。
09-16.birthdayEn: September 16 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us "[e]" by Epik High, a masterpiece that braids resilience into rhythm, reminding us life’s beats can rise from any lyric. May your new year have the same bold, poetic spirit—unfolding like a song that grows richer with every listen. Here’s to you, a melody of light and strength, born on a day of art and hope. Happy birthday.

items.name: Joe's Garage
items.descriptionZh: 《Joe's Garage》是Frank Zappa于1979年发行的摇滚歌剧式概念专辑，虽然其核心根植于爵士融合与实验摇滚，但专辑中大量即兴段落、复杂的节奏变化和讽刺性的爵士管乐编排，充分展现了Zappa对爵士乐元素的独特解构。作品通过虚构角色Joe的故事，探讨音乐、审查制度与社会自由，特色在于其辛辣的社会评论与音乐上的大胆跨界。
items.descriptionEn: "Joe's Garage" is a rock opera concept album by Frank Zappa, released in 1979. While rooted in experimental rock, its core features extensive jazz fusion elements, complex rhythms, and satirical jazz horn arrangements. Through the fictional story of Joe, the album critiques music censorship and social freedom, showcasing Zappa's unique deconstruction of jazz.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程颇具戏剧性。Zappa因与前任经理人的法律纠纷而陷入财务困境，为了快速完成合约，他利用多轨录音技术，在自家地下室搭建临时录音室，几乎独自完成了大部分器乐和人声录制。专辑中的吉他独奏部分，Zappa经常一次录制完成，展现了其惊人的即兴天赋。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was dramatic. Facing financial troubles from a legal dispute with his former manager, Zappa built a temporary studio in his basement to fulfill his contract quickly. He recorded most of the instruments and vocals alone, often completing guitar solos in a single take, showcasing his extraordinary improvisational talent.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Zappa最具代表性的概念专辑之一，其对社会审查制度的尖锐讽刺和对音乐工业的批判，影响了后来无数前卫摇滚和实验音乐人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of Zappa's most iconic concept albums, its sharp satire of censorship and the music industry has influenced countless progressive rock and experimental musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa（美国，1940-1993）是20世纪最具实验精神的音乐家之一，风格横跨摇滚、爵士、古典与电子。他以复杂的作曲、讽刺的歌词和精湛的吉他技艺著称，代表作包括《Hot Rats》和《Apostrophe (')》。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa (American, 1940-1993) was one of the most experimental musicians of the 20th century, spanning rock, jazz, classical, and electronic. Known for complex compositions, satirical lyrics, and masterful guitar skills, his代表作 include "Hot Rats" and "Apostrophe (')."

items.name: Emotions
items.descriptionZh: 《Emotions》是Mariah Carey于1991年发行的第二张录音室专辑，是一张典型的流行与R&B融合之作。专辑以强劲的舞曲节奏和Carey标志性的五度八度跳跃为特色，主打歌《Emotions》更以高亢的哨音和复杂的旋律线展现了其无与伦比的声乐技巧，整体风格华丽而充满情感张力。
items.descriptionEn: "Emotions" is Mariah Carey's second studio album, released in 1991, blending pop and R&B. Featuring powerful dance rhythms and her signature five-octave vocal range, the title track showcases her extraordinary whistle register and complex melodies, creating a lush and emotionally charged style.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Emotions》期间，Mariah Carey正处于事业上升期，但她坚持参与所有歌曲的创作和制作，以证明自己不仅是“歌手”。主打歌的副歌部分，她仅用一次录音就完成了全部高难度的高音段落，令制作团队惊叹。这张专辑也是她与前夫Tommy Mottola关系升温时期的作品，录音室氛围紧张而充满激情。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Emotions," Mariah Carey insisted on co-writing and co-producing all tracks to prove she was more than just a singer. She nailed the difficult high notes of the title track in a single take, amazing the production team. The album was made during her rising relationship with future husband Tommy Mottola, creating a tense yet passionate studio atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周空降Billboard 200亚军，主打歌成为Carey连续第五首冠军单曲，巩固了她作为90年代流行天后的地位，并影响了后续R&B女歌手的声乐标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album debuted at No. 2 on the Billboard 200, and the title track became her fifth consecutive No. 1 single, solidifying her status as a 90s pop diva and influencing the vocal standards of future R&B female artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey（美国，1969年生）是国际流行天后，以五度八度音域和哨音技巧闻名。她的风格以流行、R&B和灵魂乐为主，代表作包括《Vision of Love》和《We Belong Together》，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey (American, born 1969) is an international pop diva known for her five-octave vocal range and whistle register. Her style blends pop, R&B, and soul, with代表作 including "Vision of Love" and "We Belong Together." She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

09-17.birthdayZh: 9月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Emotions》，那些高亢的旋律像你心中永不熄灭的火焰，诉说灵魂的宽广与柔软。而《Joe's Garage》里对抗审查的荒诞勇气，也暗暗藏在你每一次倔强又温柔的选择里。愿你在自己的节拍里，永远自由，永远闪耀。
09-17.birthdayEn: September 17 is your birthday, a date touched by music history. On this day, the world welcomed Frank Zappa's "Joe's Garage"—a bold, inventive journey for free spirits—and Mariah Carey's "Emotions," a soaring celebration of heartfelt power. May your year ahead blend their spirits: the courage to be wonderfully unique and the grace to feel deeply. Here's to a life as rich and resonant as these albums, with every note of your story sung in full, beautiful harmony. Happy birthday, dear one.

items.name: Music
items.descriptionZh: 《Music》是Madonna于2000年发行的第八张录音室专辑，是一张融合流行、电子与舞曲的革新之作。专辑受欧洲电子音乐影响，大量运用合成器、失真人声和极简节拍，营造出未来感与复古并存的氛围。主打歌《Music》以欢快的节奏和派对主题成为全球热门，展现了Madonna对流行趋势的敏锐把控。
items.descriptionEn: "Music" is Madonna's eighth studio album, released in 2000, blending pop, electronic, and dance music. Influenced by European electronica, it features heavy use of synthesizers, distorted vocals, and minimalist beats, creating a futuristic yet retro atmosphere. The title track became a global hit with its upbeat rhythm and party theme, showcasing Madonna's trendsetting instincts.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Madonna与法国电子音乐制作人Mirwais Ahmadzaï的首次合作。录制过程中，两人在伦敦和洛杉矶两地往返，Madonna对电子音效的探索非常投入，甚至要求Mirwais将她的声音进行极端的数字化处理。专辑封面由著名摄影师Jean-Baptiste Mondino拍摄，Madonna的牛仔造型灵感来源于她当时对西部文化的迷恋。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Madonna's first collaboration with French electronic producer Mirwais Ahmadzaï. Recording took place between London and Los Angeles, with Madonna deeply invested in exploring electronic sounds, even asking Mirwais to digitally distort her vocals extensively. The album cover, shot by Jean-Baptiste Mondino, featured a cowboy look inspired by her then-fascination with Western culture.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Music》被认为是Madonna成功转型电子音乐的代表作，推动了流行音乐与电子舞曲的融合，对2000年代初的舞曲流行潮流产生了重要影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Music" is regarded as Madonna's successful transition into electronic music, driving the fusion of pop and electronic dance music, and significantly influencing the dance-pop trends of the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（美国，1958年生）是国际流行文化偶像，被誉为“流行女王”。她的音乐风格不断革新，涵盖流行、舞曲、电子等，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》和《Vogue》，以其大胆的表演和社会议题探讨闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna (American, born 1958) is a global pop culture icon, known as the "Queen of Pop." Her music constantly evolves, spanning pop, dance, and electronic. Her代表作 include "Like a Virgin" and "Vogue," and she is famous for her bold performances and social commentary.

items.name: Q136853558
items.descriptionZh: 《Q136853558》是印度尼西亚民歌与流行跨界艺人Elly Kasim于2023年发行的数字单曲，融合了传统印尼民间音乐（尤其是巴东地区的民谣风格）与现代乡村音乐元素。作品以原声吉他、传统乐器如萨林多（saluang）和轻柔的叙事性演唱为特色，旋律悠扬，歌词描绘了田园生活与怀旧情感，整体风格质朴而温暖。
items.descriptionEn: "Q136853558" is a digital single by Indonesian folk-pop crossover artist Elly Kasim, released in 2023. It blends traditional Indonesian folk music (especially from the Padang region) with modern country elements. Featuring acoustic guitar, traditional instruments like the saluang, and gentle narrative vocals, the melody is lyrical, with lyrics depicting pastoral life and nostalgia, creating a rustic and warm style.
items.storiesZh: 这首单曲的编号“Q136853558”实际上是Elly Kasim在一次音乐档案整理时偶然发现的一个旧录音带编号。她决定以此命名，作为对传统音乐数字化保存的致敬。录制过程中，她特意回到西苏门答腊的故乡，邀请当地老艺人演奏萨林多，并用一台老式录音机录制了部分环境音，以保留原始质感。
items.storiesEn: The single's number "Q136853558" was actually a catalog number Elly Kasim found on an old tape during a music archive sorting. She decided to use it as a tribute to the digital preservation of traditional music. During recording, she returned to her hometown in West Sumatra, invited local elderly musicians to play the saluang, and used an old tape recorder to capture ambient sounds for an authentic texture.
items.artistIntroZh: Elly Kasim（印度尼西亚，1972年生）是印尼民歌与流行跨界歌手，以传承和改编西苏门答腊传统民谣而闻名。她的风格融合了Minangkabau民间音乐与当代流行、乡村元素，代表作包括《Ayam Den Lapeh》和《Kambanglah Bungo》。
items.artistIntroEn: Elly Kasim (Indonesian, born 1972) is a folk-pop crossover singer known for preserving and adapting traditional West Sumatran folk songs. Her style blends Minangkabau folk music with contemporary pop and country elements. Her代表作 include "Ayam Den Lapeh" and "Kambanglah Bungo."

09-18.birthdayZh: 9月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Music》的节拍，宣告着突破与蜕变的力量——像你一样，总能以温柔的勇气重塑自己。而当《Q136853558》的低语在光影间流淌，故乡的旋律与现代的风交织，如同你的人生，既扎根于深情的土壤，又始终向未知生长。愿新的一岁，每一步都踏着属于自己的节奏，在时光的河流里，成为最明亮的那束光。
09-18.birthdayEn: September 18 is your birthday, a date that carries the rhythm of reinvention and soul. Like Madonna’s "Music," may your year pulse with bold, electrifying joy—a dance floor of new beginnings. And just as Elly Kasim’s experimental spirit blends the unexpected, may your path weave tradition with daring dreams. You are a masterpiece in progress, and today the world celebrates the unique melody only you can sing. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Kylie Minogue
items.descriptionZh: 《Kylie Minogue》是Kylie Minogue于1994年发行的同名专辑（常被称为第五张专辑），是她从早期流行舞曲向更成熟的电子音乐风格转型的标志性作品。专辑大量运用合成器、电子节拍和氛围音效，融合了浩室（house）、出神（trance）和流行旋律，特色在于其冷艳的电子质感与Kylie轻柔的声线形成对比，营造出迷幻而精致的听感。
items.descriptionEn: "Kylie Minogue" (often referred to as her fifth album) is Kylie Minogue's self-titled 1994 album, marking her transition from early dance-pop to a more mature electronic style. Featuring extensive synthesizers, electronic beats, and ambient sounds, it blends house, trance, and pop melodies. Its defining characteristic is the contrast between cool electronic textures and Kylie's soft vocals, creating a psychedelic yet polished sound.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Kylie与英国电子音乐制作人兄弟组合The Brothers in Rhythm合作的产物。录制过程中，Kylie刚刚结束与长期制作人Stock Aitken Waterman的合作，对新的创作方向既兴奋又紧张。为了捕捉更自由的电子氛围，部分歌曲在伦敦的夜店中混音，Kylie甚至亲自在舞池中测试歌曲的舞曲效果。专辑封面由摄影师Mario Testino操刀，展现了Kylie更成熟性感的一面。
items.storiesEn: This album was a collaboration with British electronic production duo The Brothers in Rhythm. Having just ended her long partnership with Stock Aitken Waterman, Kylie was both excited and nervous about the new direction. To capture a freer electronic vibe, some tracks were mixed in London nightclubs, and Kylie even tested the danceability of songs on the dance floor herself. The album cover, shot by Mario Testino, showcased a more mature and sexy Kylie.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Kylie音乐生涯的关键转折点，成功帮助她摆脱了“邻家女孩”形象，奠定了她在电子舞曲领域的地位，对90年代中期Brit-pop之外的电子流行潮流产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a key turning point in Kylie's career, successfully shedding her "girl next door" image and establishing her status in electronic dance music, influencing the electronic pop trends outside of Brit-pop in the mid-1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue（澳大利亚，1968年生）是国际流行与电子舞曲天后，被誉为“流行公主”。她的音乐风格从早期流行舞曲转向电子、迪斯科与合成器流行，代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》和《Spinning Around》，是史上最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue (Australian, born 1968) is an international pop and electronic dance music diva, known as the "Princess of Pop." Her music has evolved from early dance-pop to electronic, disco, and synth-pop. Her代表作 include "Can't Get You Out of My Head" and "Spinning Around." She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

09-19.birthdayZh: 9月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾以《Kylie Minogue》为名，唱响从青涩舞步走向成熟光芒的蜕变。就像这张专辑里藏着的力量，你的生命也如一首温柔的进行曲——褪去昨日的壳，长出更坚韧的羽翼。愿新的一岁，你始终是自己故事里最稳的主歌，最亮的副歌。
09-19.birthdayEn: September 19 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Kylie Minogue's self-titled album, a debut that shimmered with the bold, joyful pulse of new beginnings. Like that album, may your year ahead be a dance between rhythm and grace—a melody of hope, resilience, and sweet discovery. You are a song that grows more beautiful with every listen, a spirit that turns ordinary moments into constellations of light. Happy birthday, luminous soul. May your path be lined with harmonies of love and starlit dreams.

items.name: Certified
items.descriptionZh: 《Certified》是David Banner于2005年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合了南方嘻哈的粗粝质感与硬核说唱风格。专辑以沉重的贝斯线和街头叙事为核心，展现了Banner作为制作人与MC的双重才华，其中单曲《Play》成为其标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: Certified is David Banner's third studio album, released in 2005, blending gritty Southern hip-hop with hardcore rap. Heavy basslines and street narratives define the album, showcasing Banner's dual talents as a producer and MC, with the single 'Play' becoming a signature track.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，David Banner曾因飓风卡特里娜的威胁被迫中断工作，他后来将这场灾难的经历融入音乐创作中。此外，专辑原定名称为《Mississippi: The Album》，但最终改为《Certified》以强调其个人认证的街头 credibility。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, David Banner was forced to pause work due to the threat of Hurricane Katrina, later channeling the disaster's experience into his music. The album was originally titled 'Mississippi: The Album' but was renamed 'Certified' to emphasize his street credibility.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了David Banner在南方嘻哈界的地位，并为后续关注社会议题的嘻哈作品铺平了道路。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified David Banner's status in Southern hip-hop and paved the way for subsequent socially conscious rap works.
items.artistIntroZh: David Banner，美国说唱歌手、制作人，以南方嘻哈和硬核风格著称。代表作包括《Certified》和《The Greatest Story Ever Told》，其音乐常探讨种族与社会不公。
items.artistIntroEn: David Banner is an American rapper and producer known for Southern hip-hop and hardcore style. His major works include 'Certified' and 'The Greatest Story Ever Told', often addressing racial and social injustice.

items.name: Don't Don
items.descriptionZh: 《Don't Don》是Super Junior于2007年发行的第二张录音室专辑，主打流行舞曲风格，融合了R&B、摇滚和电子元素。专辑同名主打歌以强烈的节奏和戏剧性编曲为特色，展现了组合从青春偶像向成熟音乐人的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Don't Don is Super Junior's second studio album, released in 2007, featuring pop dance tracks blended with R&B, rock, and electronic elements. The title track is characterized by strong rhythms and dramatic arrangements, marking the group's transition from teen idols to mature artists.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，成员金希澈因车祸受伤未能参与大部分宣传，但他的部分录音片段仍被保留在最终版本中。此外，专辑名《Don't Don》源自韩语谐音，意为“不要停”，但官方解释为“不要被束缚”。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, member Kim Heechul was injured in a car accident and missed most promotions, though some of his recorded parts were retained in the final version. The title 'Don't Don' is a Korean homophone meaning 'don't stop', but officially interpreted as 'don't be bound'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Super Junior确立K-pop二代团领军地位的关键作品，推动了韩国流行音乐向多元化编曲发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was pivotal in establishing Super Junior as leaders of second-generation K-pop, promoting diverse arrangements in Korean pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Super Junior，韩国男子组合，以流行舞曲和实验性音乐风格闻名。代表作包括《Sorry, Sorry》和《Bonamana》，是K-pop全球化的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: Super Junior is a South Korean boy band known for pop dance and experimental music. Major hits include 'Sorry, Sorry' and 'Bonamana', playing a key role in globalizing K-pop.

items.name: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness
items.descriptionZh: 《Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness》是Coheed and Cambria于2005年发行的概念专辑，融合了前卫摇滚、流行朋克和金属元素。专辑以科幻故事线为框架，吉他驱动的编曲和戏剧性人声是其核心特色。
items.descriptionEn: Good Apollo, I'm Burning Star IV, Volume One: From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness is a 2005 concept album by Coheed and Cambria, blending progressive rock, pop punk, and metal. Driven by guitar-heavy arrangements and theatrical vocals, it follows a sci-fi narrative.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的科幻故事灵感来自主唱Claudio Sanchez创作的漫画《The Amory Wars》。录制过程中，乐队因对制作人选择产生分歧而多次重录，最终由Rich Costey（曾与Muse合作）操刀，完成了这张野心勃勃的作品。
items.storiesEn: The sci-fi story is inspired by singer Claudio Sanchez's comic series 'The Amory Wars'. The band faced multiple re-recordings due to disagreements over producer choice, eventually working with Rich Costey (known for Muse) to complete this ambitious album.
items.artistIntroZh: Coheed and Cambria，美国前卫摇滚乐队，以概念专辑和科幻主题著称。代表作包括《In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3》和本专辑，主唱Claudio Sanchez同时是漫画作者。
items.artistIntroEn: Coheed and Cambria is an American progressive rock band known for concept albums and sci-fi themes. Major works include 'In Keeping Secrets of Silent Earth: 3' and this album, with singer Claudio Sanchez also a comic writer.

09-20.birthdayZh: 9月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Certified》的粗粝节拍，像你骨子里的坦荡与锋芒，让每一句呐喊都长出根须。而《Good Apollo》的星空叙事，则如你眼眸里不灭的火光——在恐惧与疯狂之间，你选择成为自己的史诗。愿新的一岁，怀抱这份认证过的力量，在燃烧的轨迹上，始终温暖明亮。
09-20.birthdayEn: September 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *From Fear Through the Eyes of Madness*, a reminder that even the wildest storms birth beauty, and *Don’t Don* taught us that rhythm can rise from chaos. So may your year be a fearless melody—bold as a southern anthem, intricate as a cosmic story. May you dance through every twist, knowing you were born on a day that turned noise into art, and fear into a song of hope. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: Gold – Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Gold – Greatest Hits》是ABBA于1992年发行的精选集，收录了乐队1973至1982年间19首经典流行金曲。专辑以华丽的旋律、精致和声和迪斯科节奏为特色，是ABBA全球商业最成功的合辑之一。
items.descriptionEn: Gold – Greatest Hits is a 1992 compilation by ABBA, featuring 19 classic pop hits from 1973 to 1982. Known for its lush melodies, intricate harmonies, and disco rhythms, it is one of ABBA's most commercially successful collections worldwide.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时，ABBA成员已解散近十年，但制作人巧妙地将单曲《Dancing Queen》和《Mamma Mia》等重新混音，以适应90年代音响趋势。封面设计使用了金色背景，象征乐队在流行乐坛的黄金地位。
items.storiesEn: Released nearly a decade after ABBA's breakup, the album featured remixed versions of hits like 'Dancing Queen' and 'Mamma Mia' to suit 1990s sound trends. The gold cover symbolizes the band's golden status in pop music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Gold》是史上最畅销的精选集之一，累计销量超过3000万张，极大推动了ABBA音乐的跨代传承。
items.historicalImpactEn: Gold is one of the best-selling compilation albums ever, with over 30 million copies sold, significantly boosting ABBA's cross-generational legacy.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA，瑞典流行乐队，以旋律优美的迪斯科和流行曲风闻名。代表作包括《Dancing Queen》和《Waterloo》，是1970年代全球最成功的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop band known for melodic disco and pop music. Major hits include 'Dancing Queen' and 'Waterloo', one of the most successful music groups of the 1970s globally.

items.name: Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus
items.descriptionZh: 《Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus》是Reinhard Mey于1995年发行的德语流行专辑，以其标志性的叙事民谣风格为核心。专辑聚焦日常生活与旅行见闻，以简洁的吉他伴奏和细腻的歌词描绘情感，展现了德国流行音乐的诗意一面。
items.descriptionEn: Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus is a 1995 German pop album by Reinhard Mey, centered on his signature narrative folk style. Focusing on daily life and travel experiences, it features simple guitar accompaniment and lyrical delicacy, showcasing the poetic side of German pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题意为“在苏黎世与家之间”，灵感来自Mey往返于瑞士与德国之间的真实旅程。录制时，他坚持使用原声乐器以保持民谣的质朴感，并邀请了长期合作的小提琴手Hans Haider参与编曲。
items.storiesEn: The title means 'Between Zurich and Home', inspired by Mey's real travels between Switzerland and Germany. He insisted on acoustic instruments to preserve folk authenticity, enlisting longtime collaborator violinist Hans Haider for arrangements.
items.artistIntroZh: Reinhard Mey，德国创作歌手，以德语叙事民谣和流行歌曲著称。代表作包括《Über den Wolken》和本专辑，其歌词常探讨社会与个人主题，被誉为德国音乐界的诗人。
items.artistIntroEn: Reinhard Mey is a German singer-songwriter known for German narrative folk and pop songs. Major works include 'Über den Wolken' and this album, often addressing social and personal themes, hailed as a poet in German music.

09-21.birthdayZh: 9月21日，是你的生日。这一天，ABBA的《Gold – Greatest Hits》诞生于世，像一束永不褪色的光，提醒你生命中有许多闪亮的时刻值得珍藏。而Reinhard Mey的《Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus》唱出了旅途与归途的温柔。愿你永远记得，无论走多远，都有一份温暖如家的力量，静静为你守候。
09-21.birthdayEn: September 21 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us treasures like ABBA’s Gold – Greatest Hits, a shimmering collection of timeless joy. Just as those songs celebrate life’s bright moments, may your year ahead feel like a golden melody—full of warmth and grace. And like Reinhard Mey’s Zwischen Zürich und zu Haus, may you find beauty in every journey, every pause between where you’ve been and where you belong. Happy birthday to you, a living album of your own sweet story.

items.name: !DonnerwetteR!
items.descriptionZh: 《!DonnerwetteR!》是德国说唱歌手Prinz Pi的早期代表作，融合了东海岸嘻哈的叙事性与德语特有的押韵技巧。专辑以社会批判和街头叙事为核心，硬核的鼓点与采样交织出柏林地下嘻哈的冷峻质感，展现了Prinz Pi在文字游戏与节奏掌控上的独特天赋。
items.descriptionEn: !DonnerwetteR! is an early milestone by German rapper Prinz Pi, blending East Coast hip-hop storytelling with German lyrical dexterity. Centered on social critique and street narratives, hard-hitting drums and samples create the cold atmosphere of Berlin’s underground hip-hop, showcasing Prinz Pi’s unique wordplay and rhythmic prowess.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《!DonnerwetteR!》灵感来自Prinz Pi年轻时在柏林街头听到的一句粗口，他将其转化为对虚伪社会的怒斥。录制期间，他因预算有限，大部分beat都在自家卧室用旧电脑完成，甚至用手机录制了部分人声，这种DIY精神后来成为他早期作品的标志。
items.storiesEn: The album title !DonnerwetteR! was inspired by a curse word Prinz Pi overheard on Berlin streets, which he turned into a rant against hypocrisy. During recording, due to budget constraints, most beats were made on an old computer in his bedroom, and some vocals were recorded with a mobile phone—a DIY spirit that became his early trademark.
items.artistIntroZh: Prinz Pi（本名Friedrich Kautz），德国说唱歌手，生于1979年。以复杂押韵、社会批判和叙事性歌词闻名，代表作《!DonnerwetteR!》《Neopunk》等，是德国嘻哈界最具文学性的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Prinz Pi (real name Friedrich Kautz) is a German rapper born in 1979, known for complex rhymes, social critique, and narrative lyrics. Key works include !DonnerwetteR! and Neopunk, making him one of the most literary figures in German hip-hop.

items.name: For Lack of a Better Name
items.descriptionZh: 《For Lack of a Better Name》是Deadmau5在电子音乐巅峰期的标志性专辑，主打渐进浩室与电子节拍的精妙融合。专辑以极简合成器线条和精密编排著称，既有舞池能量又不失实验性，其中《Ghosts 'n' Stuff》更成为全球电子乐迷的经典记忆。
items.descriptionEn: For Lack of a Better Name is a landmark album from Deadmau5 at the peak of his electronic career, blending progressive house with intricate beats. Known for minimalist synth lines and precise arrangement, it balances dancefloor energy with experimentation, with Ghosts 'n' Stuff becoming a global classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名源于Deadmau5对起名困难的调侃——他当时实在想不出标题，干脆用了这句口头禅。录制期间，他经常在直播中与粉丝互动，甚至让粉丝投票决定曲目顺序，《Ghosts 'n' Stuff》的人声部分也是多次重录后才定稿。
items.storiesEn: The album title came from Deadmau5’s struggle with naming—he couldn’t think of one, so he used his own catchphrase. During recording, he often livestreamed and let fans vote on track order. The vocals for Ghosts 'n' Stuff were re-recorded multiple times before finalization.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Deadmau5在渐进浩室领域的领军地位，推动了电子音乐向主流流行文化的进一步渗透。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Deadmau5’s leadership in progressive house and pushed electronic music further into mainstream pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Deadmau5（本名Joel Zimmerman），加拿大电子音乐制作人，生于1981年。以标志性的老鼠头盔和渐进浩室风格闻名，代表作《Strobe》《Ghosts 'n' Stuff》等��是全球电子音乐界最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deadmau5 (real name Joel Zimmerman) is a Canadian electronic music producer born in 1981. Famous for his mouse helmet and progressive house style, key works include Strobe and Ghosts 'n' Stuff, making him one of the most influential figures in global electronic music.

09-22.birthdayZh: 9月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《For Lack of a Better Name》，像在说：你无需被定义，你的存在本身就是最好的名字。还有《!DonnerwetteR!》里的冷峻节拍与尖锐观察——也像你，穿过风暴时眼底有光。愿新的一岁，你继续以无人能替代的节奏，把日子活得掷地有声。
09-22.birthdayEn: September 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gained a light that shines uniquely, much like the creative fire behind Deadmau5’s For Lack of a Better Name, a pulse of defiance and joy. And like Prinz Pi’s !DonnerwetteR!, your spirit carries the raw, bold energy of a masterpiece in the making. May this year hum with your own rhythm—bright, unstoppable, and full of beautiful surprises. Happy birthday to a soul as rare and electric as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Aja
items.descriptionZh: 《Aja》是Steely Dan的巅峰之作，融合了爵士、摇滚与流行，以复杂的和声、精密的编曲和顶级录音品质著称。专辑中大量使用爵士即兴段落，萨克斯风与键盘的对话精妙绝伦，被誉为录音室艺术的教科书级作品。
items.descriptionEn: Aja is Steely Dan’s masterpiece, blending jazz, rock, and pop with complex harmonies, meticulous arrangements, and pristine production. Featuring extensive jazz improvisation, the saxophone-keyboard dialogues are exquisite, making it a textbook example of studio art.
items.storiesZh: 录制《Aja》时，Steely Dan的两位核心成员Becker与Fagen对完美近乎偏执。仅《Peg》一曲就邀请了多位吉他手录制数十遍，最终选用了Jay Graydon的版本。鼓手Steve Gadd在《Aja》中的传奇独奏也是一次即兴完成，事后被赞为史上最佳之一。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Aja, Becker and Fagen were notoriously perfectionist. For Peg alone, multiple guitarists recorded dozens of takes; Jay Graydon’s version was chosen. Drummer Steve Gadd’s legendary solo on the title track was improvised in one take, later hailed as one of the best ever.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Aja》被公认为1970年代录音室制作的巅峰，对后续爵士摇滚和Hi-Fi音响文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Aja is widely regarded as the pinnacle of 1970s studio production, profoundly influencing jazz-rock and high-fidelity audio culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Steely Dan，美国摇滚乐队，核心成员为Donald Fagen与Walter Becker。以融合爵士、摇滚和流行元素闻名，代表作《Aja》《Reelin' In the Years》等，是录音室音乐与复杂和声的标杆。
items.artistIntroEn: Steely Dan is an American rock band centered on Donald Fagen and Walter Becker. Known for blending jazz, rock, and pop, key works include Aja and Reelin' In the Years, setting the standard for studio music and complex harmony.

items.name: Better Living Through Chemistry
items.descriptionZh: 《Better Living Through Chemistry》是Fatboy Slim的首张专辑，将大节拍与流行旋律完美结合。专辑以肥厚低音、采样拼贴和充满活力的节奏著称，既有舞池爆发力又具备流行传唱度，《Praise You》等曲目成为90年代流行文化符号。
items.descriptionEn: Better Living Through Chemistry is Fatboy Slim’s debut album, perfectly merging big beat with pop melodies. Known for fat basslines, sample collages, and energetic rhythms, it blends dancefloor punch with pop appeal, with tracks like Praise You becoming 90s pop culture icons.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名取自一句化学口号，Fatboy Slim在创作时大量使用老唱片采样，甚至从跳蚤市场淘来的旧黑胶中寻找灵感。主打曲《Praise You》的合唱部分来自一个不知名的福音合唱团录音，他将其加速后形成了标志性效果。
items.storiesEn: The album title was borrowed from a chemistry slogan. Fatboy Slim sampled extensively from old records, even finding inspiration in flea market vinyl. The choir part in Praise You came from an obscure gospel recording, which he sped up to create its iconic sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是大节拍音乐走向全球的关键推手，奠定了Fatboy Slim在流行电子领域的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a key driver in bringing big beat music to a global audience, cementing Fatboy Slim’s status in pop electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Fatboy Slim（本名Norman Cook），英国电子音乐��作人、DJ，生于1963年。以大节拍风格和流行化电子舞曲闻名，代表作《Praise You》《Right Here, Right Now》等，是90年代电子音乐浪潮的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Fatboy Slim (real name Norman Cook) is a British electronic music producer and DJ born in 1963. Known for big beat and pop-oriented electronic dance music, key works include Praise You and Right Here, Right Now, a leading figure of the 90s electronic wave.

09-23.birthdayZh: 9月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过《Aja》的爵士与灵魂，复杂如室内乐般的生命编曲，每一拍都藏着偏执的真诚。也诞生过《Better Living Through Chemistry》的狂欢节拍，提醒你生活本身就该是一场自由的大律动。愿你在属于自己的节奏里，如爵士般深邃，如大节拍般勇敢。
09-23.birthdayEn: September 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Steely Dan’s Aja, a masterwork of jazz and soul that hums with artistic grace, and Fatboy Slim’s Better Living Through Chemistry, a bold, joyful call to embrace life’s hedonistic rhythm. Like these albums, your spirit is a beautiful fusion—deep, intricate, and delightfully vibrant. May your new year be a perfect groove, where every note of your story feels lifted by warmth, possibility, and the pure, electric pulse of being alive. Happy birthday.

items.name: Album Title Goes Here
items.descriptionZh: 《Album Title Goes Here》是Deadmau5在电子音乐领域的又一次探索，延续了渐进浩室风格，同时融入更多实验元素。专辑以精密合成器编排、多层次旋律和富有叙事感的氛围著称，既有舞池律动又不失沉思气质，《The Veldt》成为其后期代表作。
items.descriptionEn: Album Title Goes Here is another exploration by Deadmau5 in electronic music, continuing progressive house while incorporating more experimental elements. Known for meticulous synth arrangements, layered melodies, and narrative atmospheres, it balances dancefloor groove with introspection, with The Veldt becoming a later classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名延续了Deadmau5的调侃风格——他直言懒得想标题。录制期间，他因与唱片公司对艺术方向产生分歧，一度将所有曲目上传至SoundCloud供粉丝免费下载，引发争议。最终版本中的《The Veldt》灵感来自雷·布拉德伯里的同名科幻短篇。
items.storiesEn: The album title continues Deadmau5’s sarcastic style—he said he was too lazy to think of one. During recording, he clashed with his label over artistic direction and once uploaded all tracks to SoundCloud for free download, sparking controversy. The Veldt was inspired by Ray Bradbury’s sci-fi short story of the same name.
items.artistIntroZh: Deadmau5（本名Joel Zimmerman），加拿大电子音乐制作人，生于1981年。以标志性的老鼠头盔和渐进浩室风格闻名，代表作《Strobe》《Ghosts 'n' Stuff》等，是全球电子音乐界最具影响力的艺术家之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deadmau5 (real name Joel Zimmerman) is a Canadian electronic music producer born in 1981. Famous for his mouse helmet and progressive house style, key works include Strobe and Ghosts 'n' Stuff, making him one of the most influential figures in global electronic music.

items.name: Oxygen
items.descriptionZh: 《Oxygen》是法国模特兼歌手Baptiste Giabiconi于2012年发行的流行专辑。作品以轻快流畅的旋律为核心，融合了法式流行与电子元素，呈现出清新而富有感染力的听感。专辑主打歌展现了其嗓音的温暖质感，整体风格偏向主流流行，适合大众市场。
items.descriptionEn: Oxygen is a 2012 pop album by French model and singer Baptiste Giabiconi. Featuring light and catchy melodies, it blends French pop with electronic elements, delivering a fresh and infectious sound. The lead single highlights his warm vocal texture, with an overall style leaning towards mainstream pop accessible to a broad audience.
items.storiesZh: Baptiste Giabiconi最初以模特身份出道，曾是香奈儿“老佛爷”卡尔·拉格斐的缪斯。在转型歌手后，他邀请多位知名制作人合作《Oxygen》，专辑录制期间他特意在录音室中加入个人生活录音片段，以增强情感真实度。
items.storiesEn: Baptiste Giabiconi initially rose to fame as a model and was the muse of Chanel's 'Kaiser' Karl Lagerfeld. While transitioning into a singer, he collaborated with several renowned producers on Oxygen. During recording, he intentionally incorporated personal life audio clips into the studio sessions to enhance emotional authenticity.
items.artistIntroZh: Baptiste Giabiconi，法国男模特兼流行歌手，因成为卡尔·拉格斐的缪斯而广为人知。音乐风格以主流流行为主，代表作包括专辑《Oxygen》及单曲《One Night》。
items.artistIntroEn: Baptiste Giabiconi is a French male model and pop singer, widely known as the muse of Karl Lagerfeld. His music style is primarily mainstream pop, with代表作 including the album Oxygen and the single 'One Night'.

09-24.birthdayZh: 9月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备了两种声音：《Album Title Goes Here》像深夜的海洋，沉郁而内省，告诉你孤独也可以辽阔；《Oxygen》是破晓的呼吸，轻盈而性感，提醒你自由就是自己的节奏。你是沉静与光芒的合集，不必成为谁，只需记得——你来到这天，本身就是一首完整的旋律。
09-24.birthdayEn: September 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the experimental pulse of "Album Title Goes Here" by Deadmau5, a reminder that true growth comes from daring to evolve after success. And there's "Oxygen" by Baptiste Giabiconi, a debut breathing fresh air into the world. May your new year be a beautiful blend of bold reinvention and the deep, steady breath of new beginnings. You are a melody all your own, and the world is brighter with you in it.

items.name: Light Years
items.descriptionZh: 《Light Years》是Kylie Minogue于2000年发行的电子流行专辑，标志着她从传统流行向舞曲与电子风格的转型。专辑融合了迪斯科、放克与合成器流行元素，节奏明快，充满复古未来感。作品奠定了她“舞曲女王”的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Light Years is a 2000 electronic pop album by Kylie Minogue, marking her transition from traditional pop to dance and electronic styles. Blending disco, funk, and synth-pop, the album features upbeat tempos and a retro-futuristic vibe, solidifying her status as the 'Queen of Dance'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Kylie Minogue与制作团队在伦敦和纽约两地奔波。主打歌《Spinning Around》��歌词原本为她量身定制，但最初被其他歌手拒绝。Kylie亲自参与编曲讨论，最终让这首歌成为她职业生涯的转折点。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Kylie Minogue and her production team shuttled between London and New York. The lyrics of the lead single 'Spinning Around' were originally tailor-made for her but initially rejected by other singers. Kylie personally participated in arrangement discussions, ultimately making the song a turning point in her career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Light Years》被视为Kylie Minogue复兴的关键作品，成功引领了2000年代初的舞曲复兴潮流，并对后续电子流行音乐产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: Light Years is regarded as a key album in Kylie Minogue's revival, successfully leading the early 2000s dance resurgence and having a profound impact on subsequent electronic pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue，澳大利亚流行天后，以舞曲和电子流行风格闻名。代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》和专辑《Fever》。她被誉为“流行公主”，在全球拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian pop icon known for dance and electronic pop music. Her代表作 include 'Can't Get You Out of My Head' and the album Fever. She is hailed as the 'Princess of Pop' with global influence.

items.name: Senza nuvole
items.descriptionZh: 《Senza nuvole》是意大利流行女歌手Alessandra Amoroso于2009年发行的首张录音室专辑。作品以抒情流行风格为主，融合了成人当代与意大利民谣元素，歌词真挚感人，旋律优美。专辑展现了其强大的声乐表现力。
items.descriptionEn: Senza nuvole is the debut studio album by Italian pop singer Alessandra Amoroso, released in 2009. The album features a lyrical pop style, blending adult contemporary with Italian folk elements, with heartfelt lyrics and beautiful melodies. It showcases her powerful vocal expression.
items.storiesZh: Alessandra Amoroso因参加意大利选秀节目《Amici》夺冠而获得发行专辑的机会。《Senza nuvole》录制时，她坚持收录自己在比赛期间创作的情感日记式歌词，制作人为此调整了编曲方向，使专辑更具个人色彩。
items.storiesEn: Alessandra Amoroso won the opportunity to release an album after winning the Italian talent show Amici. During the recording of Senza nuvole, she insisted on including diary-like lyrics she had written during the competition, prompting the producer to adjust the arrangement direction, giving the album a more personal touch.
items.artistIntroZh: Alessandra Amoroso，意大利流行女歌手，因赢得《Amici》选秀冠军而出道。风格以抒情流行为主，代表作包括专辑《Senza nuvole》和单曲《Immobile》。她在意大利拥有极高人气。
items.artistIntroEn: Alessandra Amoroso is an Italian pop singer who debuted after winning the talent show Amici. Her style is primarily lyrical pop, with代表作 including the album Senza nuvole and the single 'Immobile'. She enjoys immense popularity in Italy.

09-25.birthdayZh: 9月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Light Years》点亮舞池，教会我们在旧旋律里跳向新的璀璨；也曾让《Senza nuvole》的旋律穿透云层，低语温柔也有穿透阴霾的力量。你看，你的诞生本身，就是一首歌，足够明亮，也足够勇敢。
09-25.birthdayEn: September 25 is your birthday. On this day, the world released "Light Years" by Kylie Minogue, a shimmering dance of transformation, and "Senza nuvole" by Alessandra Amoroso, a sky without clouds. May your new year be a beautiful shift, shedding the old to reveal your brightest self. Let your heart be as light as starlight, and your path clear as a perfect, open sky. You are a melody of courage and joy. Celebrate your radiant journey.

items.name: Paper Trail
items.descriptionZh: 《Paper Trail》是美国说唱歌手T.I.于2008年发行的第六张录音室专辑，属于南岸嘻哈风格。作品融合了陷阱音乐与流行饶舌元素，歌词聚焦社会议题与个人反思，制作精良。专辑商业与口碑双丰收。
items.descriptionEn: Paper Trail is the sixth studio album by American rapper T.I., released in 2008, belonging to the Southern hip-hop style. It blends trap music with pop rap elements, with lyrics focusing on social issues and personal reflection, featuring polished production. The album achieved both commercial and critical success.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“Paper Trail”源于T.I.在联邦调查期间通过书写记录思绪的习惯。录制时他正���于法律纠纷中，部分歌曲在保释期间完成。他甚至在录音室中安装了防窃听设备，以确保创作自由。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Paper Trail' originates from T.I.'s habit of writing down his thoughts during a federal investigation. He was in legal trouble during recording, with some songs completed while on bail. He even installed anti-bugging devices in the studio to ensure creative freedom.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Paper Trail》是T.I.最具影响力的作品之一，单曲《Whatever You Like》和《Live Your Life》成为全球热门，推动了南岸嘻哈在主流市场的进一步扩张。
items.historicalImpactEn: Paper Trail is one of T.I.'s most influential works, with singles 'Whatever You Like' and 'Live Your Life' becoming global hits, further expanding Southern hip-hop's presence in the mainstream market.
items.artistIntroZh: T.I.，美国说唱歌手、演员，南岸嘻哈代表人物。以其流畅的叙事和陷阱音乐影响著称，代表作包括专辑《Paper Trail》和单曲《What You Know》。他被誉为“南岸之王”。
items.artistIntroEn: T.I. is an American rapper and actor, a leading figure in Southern hip-hop. Known for his smooth storytelling and trap influence, his代表作 include the album Paper Trail and the single 'What You Know'. He is hailed as the 'King of the South'.

items.name: Ma-KING
items.descriptionZh: 《Ma-KING》是日本歌手奥井雅美于1997年发行的个人专辑，属于流行摇滚风格。作品以高能量电子流行与摇滚融合为特色，充满90年代J-Pop的活力，歌词富有力量感。专辑展现了她作为创作型歌手的实力。
items.descriptionEn: Ma-KING is a 1997 personal album by Japanese singer Masami Okui, featuring a pop rock style. The album is characterized by high-energy electronic pop and rock fusion, full of 90s J-Pop vitality, with empowering lyrics. It showcases her strength as a singer-songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 奥井雅美在制作《Ma-KING》时正值她离开JAM Project后的个人发展期。专辑标题“Ma-KING”是她名字的变体，寓意“成为王者”。录制过程中，她首次尝试独立编曲，并与多位动画音乐制作人合作，包括大森俊之。
items.storiesEn: Masami Okui was in her personal development period after leaving JAM Project when producing Ma-KING. The album title 'Ma-KING' is a variation of her name, meaning 'becoming a king'. During recording, she tried independent arrangement for the first time and collaborated with several anime music producers, including Toshiyuki Omori.
items.artistIntroZh: 奥井雅美，日本女性歌手、作曲家，以动画歌曲和流行摇滚闻名。她是JAM Project的创始成员之一，代表作包括《輪舞-revolution》和专辑《Ma-KING》。被誉为“动画歌曲女王”之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Masami Okui is a Japanese female singer and composer, known for anime songs and pop rock. She is a founding member of JAM Project, with代表作 including 'Rondo-revolution' and the album Ma-KING. She is regarded as one of the 'Queens of Anime Songs'.

items.name: t.A.T.u. Remixes
items.descriptionZh: 这张《t.A.T.u. Remixes》是俄罗斯组合t.A.T.u.在2003年发行的混音专辑，属于流行电子风格。专辑收录了她们热门单曲的多种混音版本，如《All the Things She Said》等，融合了舞曲、电子和工业元素，节奏强烈、氛围迷幻，充分展现了t.A.T.u.标志性的叛逆与性感气质。
items.descriptionEn: "t.A.T.u. Remixes" is a 2003 remix album by Russian duo t.A.T.u., rooted in pop with electronic influences. It features various remixes of their hit singles like "All the Things She Said," blending dance, electronic, and industrial elements with strong beats and a psychedelic atmosphere, showcasing their iconic rebellious and sexy style.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音专辑的发行正值t.A.T.u.因首张专辑《200 km/h in the Wrong Lane》在全球爆红之际。制作人特意邀请多位欧洲电子音乐人参与混音，其中一些版本曾在俱乐部中试播，以测试观众反应。专辑封面延续了二人穿着校服的争议形象，进一步巩固了她们“坏女孩”的公众印象。
items.storiesEn: This remix album was released when t.A.T.u. were skyrocketing to global fame after their debut "200 km/h in the Wrong Lane." The producers invited various European electronic musicians to create the remixes, with some versions test-played in clubs to gauge audience reactions. The cover art continued their controversial schoolgirl image, reinforcing their "bad girl" public persona.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为t.A.T.u.早期商业成功的重要补充，这张混音专辑帮助她们进一步打入欧美舞曲市场，也为后来流行歌手推出混音专辑提供了参考模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: As a key supplement to t.A.T.u.'s early commercial success, this remix album helped them further penetrate the Western dance music market and set a reference model for later pop artists releasing remix albums.
items.artistIntroZh: t.A.T.u.是来自俄罗斯的女子双人流行组合，由Lena Katina和Julia Volkova组成，以大胆的造型和极具争议的同性恋主题走红全球。代表作品包括《All the Things She Said》和《Not Gonna Get Us》，风格融合流行、电子和舞曲元素。
items.artistIntroEn: t.A.T.u. is a Russian female pop duo consisting of Lena Katina and Julia Volkova, known for their bold image and controversial lesbian-themed lyrics. Their representative hits include "All the Things She Said" and "Not Gonna Get Us," blending pop, electronic, and dance music.

09-26.birthdayZh: 9月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好不同的声音。T.I.在《Paper Trail》上写下真实的叙事，提醒你手中的笔永远有力。而奥井雅美的《Ma-KING》则用热血摇滚喊出：你本身就是自己的王。愿你在新的一岁里，既诚实书写，又高声歌唱。生日快乐。
09-26.birthdayEn: September 26 is your birthday, a day that gave the world not only you but also the bold, honest spirit of T.I.'s "Paper Trail" and the vibrant, fearless energy of Masami Okui's "Ma-KING." Like the blend of Southern soul in those tracks, may your year be a rich harmony of strength and softness. And like a remix of your favorite song, may each new day spin you into a brighter, more beautiful version of yourself. Here’s to you—the masterpiece that makes this date unforgettable.

items.name: A Broken Frame
items.descriptionZh: 《A Broken Frame》是英国电子乐队Depeche Mode于1982年发行的第二张录音室专辑，属于合成器流行风格。这张专辑延续了乐队早期的暗黑合成器音色，歌词主题涉及失落、孤独与情感破碎，旋律简洁而富有感染力。相比首张专辑，本作在编曲上更加成熟，展现了乐队从流行向更深度电子音乐的过渡。
items.descriptionEn: "A Broken Frame" is the second studio album by British electronic band Depeche Mode, released in 1982. It belongs to the synth-pop genre, continuing their early dark synthesizer sound with lyrics about loss, loneliness, and emotional brokenness. The melodies are simple yet infectious, showing a maturation in arrangement and a transition toward deeper electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Depeche Mode在没有核心成员Vince Clarke（首张专辑后离队）的情况下完成的首张作品。主唱Dave Gahan和键盘手Martin Gore承担了更多创作任务。录制过程中，乐队曾因设备故障被迫在伦敦一间简陋的地下室完成部分录音，反而意外营造出专辑特有的冷峻质感。
items.storiesEn: This album was Depeche Mode's first without core member Vince Clarke, who left after the debut. Lead singer Dave Gahan and keyboardist Martin Gore took on more songwriting duties. During recording, equipment failures forced the band to record parts in a cramped London basement, which accidentally contributed to the album's distinctive cold atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《A Broken Frame》标志着Depeche Mode从Vince Clarke主导的流行风格向更黑暗、更个人化的方向转型，为乐队后续的经典时期奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: "A Broken Frame" marks Depeche Mode's shift from Vince Clarke's pop-oriented style toward a darker, more personal direction, laying the foundation for their classic period.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是英国传奇电子乐队，成立于1980年，以合成器流行和暗黑电子风格闻名。核心成员包括Dave Gahan和Martin Gore。代表作有《Enjoy the Silence》《Personal Jesus》等，是全球最具影响力的电子音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is a legendary British electronic band formed in 1980, known for synth-pop and dark electronic music. Core members include Dave Gahan and Martin Gore. Their iconic hits include "Enjoy the Silence" and "Personal Jesus," making them one of the most influential electronic groups worldwide.

items.name: Mini Album Vol. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《Mini Album Vol. 1》是波兰流行歌手Monika Brodka于2004年发行的迷你专辑，属于流行风格。这张作品收录了她在波兰选秀节目《Idol》夺冠后初期的几首单曲，旋律朗朗上口，编曲以流行摇滚为基底，展现了Brokda清新而富有活力的嗓音，标志着她正式步入乐坛。
items.descriptionEn: "Mini Album Vol. 1" is a 2004 EP by Polish pop singer Monika Brodka, in the pop genre. It includes several early singles after she won the Polish talent show "Idol." The melodies are catchy, with pop-rock arrangements, showcasing Brodka's fresh and energetic vocals, marking her official entry into the music scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张迷你专辑是在Monika Brodka赢得《Idol》冠军后迅速推出的，制作周期非常紧张。专辑中收录的歌曲《Ten》成为波兰当年的热门金曲，但Brokda后来曾透露，她当时对部分歌曲的编曲并不完全满意，认为未能充分展现她的个性，这也促使她后来转向更独立的音乐风格。
items.storiesEn: This EP was rushed out right after Monika Brodka won "Idol," with a very tight production schedule. The song "Ten" became a major hit in Poland that year. However, Brodka later revealed she wasn't fully satisfied with some of the arrangements, feeling they didn't fully express her personality, which motivated her later shift toward a more independent musical style.
items.artistIntroZh: Monika Brodka是波兰流行歌手，生于1988年，2004年赢得选秀节目《Idol》冠军后出道。她的音乐风格从早期流行逐渐转向独立流行和另类音乐。代表作品包括《Ten》和《Granda》，是波兰当代流行音乐的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Monika Brodka is a Polish pop singer born in 1988, who debuted after winning the talent show "Idol" in 2004. Her music has evolved from early pop to indie pop and alternative styles. Notable works include "Ten" and "Granda," making her a representative figure in contemporary Polish pop music.

09-27.birthdayZh: 9月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾放出《A Broken Frame》，在破碎的框架里寻找完整的光；也诞生了《Mini Album Vol. 1》，像初生的勇气，不用盛大，却自有力量。你也是这样——在岁月的缝隙里，长出自己最温暖的形状。
09-27.birthdayEn: September 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed Depeche Mode's "A Broken Frame"—an album about rebuilding beauty from what was shattered, and the quiet strength in starting again. May your year carry that same resilient, tender spirit. And like Monika Brodka's "Mini Album Vol. 1," may your life be a debut of new melodies, full of brave beginnings and the softest harmonies. Here’s to you—your own unique, luminous song.

items.name: Music for the Masses
items.descriptionZh: 《Music for the Masses》是Depeche Mode于1987年发行的第六张录音室专辑，属于流行电子风格。这张专辑在合成器流行基础上融入了更丰富的氛围感和戏剧性，旋律宏大而深沉，歌词探讨信仰、权力与人性。专辑中的《Never Let Me Down Again》和《Strangelove》成为乐队标志性金曲，奠定了其在全球的主流地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Music for the Masses" is the sixth studio album by Depeche Mode, released in 1987, in the pop electronic genre. It builds on synth-pop with richer atmospheric and dramatic elements, featuring grand and deep melodies. Lyrics explore faith, power, and human nature. Hits like "Never Let Me Down Again" and "Strangelove" became iconic, cementing the band's mainstream global status.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程颇具波折，乐队在丹麦的录音室遭遇了技术问题，部分设备因潮湿损坏。此外，主唱Dave Gahan当时正经历个人生活动荡，录音期间情绪不稳定，但这也为专辑注入了强烈的情感张力。专辑巡演“101”后来被拍摄成同名纪录片，成为乐队历史上最重要的巡演记录之一。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this album was fraught with challenges, including technical issues in a Danish studio where some equipment was damaged by humidity. Additionally, lead singer Dave Gahan was going through personal turmoil, which brought intense emotional tension to the recordings. The subsequent "101" tour was later documented in a film of the same name, becoming one of the band's most important tour records.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Music for the Masses》标志着Depeche Mode从地下电子乐队跃升为全球主流巨星的关键转折点，其巡演“101”更是创下了当时乐队最大规模演出纪录。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Music for the Masses" marks a pivotal turning point where Depeche Mode ascended from underground electronic act to global superstars, with the "101" tour setting records for the band's largest concerts at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是英国传奇电子乐队，成立于1980年，以合成器流行和暗黑电子风格闻名。核心成员包括Dave Gahan和Martin Gore。代表作有《Enjoy the Silence》《Personal Jesus》等，是全球最具影响力的电子音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is a legendary British electronic band formed in 1980, known for synth-pop and dark electronic music. Core members include Dave Gahan and Martin Gore. Their iconic hits include "Enjoy the Silence" and "Personal Jesus," making them one of the most influential electronic groups worldwide.

09-28.birthdayZh: 9月28日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode为世界谱写了《Music for the Masses》，让宏大与深邃的电子摇滚流淌进无数人的心脏。愿你的生命也如这张专辑般辽阔——不是迎合所有人的声响，而是拥有属于自己的史诗。在时间的浪潮里，你始终是那个被歌拥抱、被光祝福的存在。
09-28.birthdayEn: September 28 is your birthday. On this day, Depeche Mode’s “Music for the Masses” was born, a reminder that beauty often finds its voice in the quietest corners, then swells to fill a room. Like that album’s spirit, may your year be a symphony of unexpected harmonies—moments that feel both deeply personal and universally shared. You carry a melody that only you can play, and today the whole world gets to hear it. Happy birthday to a soul whose song is just beginning.

items.name: Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel
items.descriptionZh: 《Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel》是美国流行天后Mariah Carey于2009年发行的第12张录音室专辑，风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主。专辑以极简的慢板R&B为基底，大量运用了细腻的和声与轻柔的节奏，歌词聚焦于爱情中的脆弱、背叛与自我反思。Mariah Carey标志性的五度音域和即兴演唱在这张作品中得到充分展现。
items.descriptionEn: "Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel" is the 12th studio album by American pop diva Mariah Carey, released in 2009, rooted in R&B and soul. It features minimalist, slow-tempo R&B with intricate harmonies and gentle rhythms, with lyrics focusing on love, betrayal, and self-reflection. Mariah's signature five-octave range and improvisational runs are fully showcased.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Mariah Carey与长期合作制作人The-Dream及Tricky Stewart共同打造的。录制过程中，Mariah曾透露她是在与当时的丈夫Nick Cannon的婚姻生活中创作了大部分歌曲，其中《H.A.T.E.U.》的灵感来自一次真实的感情争吵。专辑原本计划更早发行，但因Mariah怀孕和身体原因数次推迟。
items.storiesEn: This album was co-created by Mariah Carey with long-time collaborators The-Dream and Tricky Stewart. Mariah revealed that most of the songs were written during her marriage to Nick Cannon, with "H.A.T.E.U." inspired by a real relationship argument. The album was originally scheduled for an earlier release but was delayed several times due to Mariah's pregnancy and health issues.
items.historicalImpactZh: 虽然商业反响不如巅峰期，但《Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel》被乐评界视为Mariah Carey后期最统一的R&B概念专辑之一，展现了她在成人当代R&B领域的艺术坚持。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although its commercial performance didn't match her peak, "Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel" is regarded by critics as one of Mariah Carey's most cohesive R&B concept albums, demonstrating her artistic commitment to adult contemporary R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Mariah Carey是美国歌手、词曲作家和演员，被誉为“花蝴蝶”，以五个八度的宽广音域和标志性的哨音闻名。她出生于1970年，主要风格为流行、R&B和灵魂乐。代表作品包括《We Belong Together》《Hero》和《All I Want for Christmas Is You》，是全球最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Mariah Carey is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the "Songbird Supreme" for her five-octave vocal range and signature whistle register. Born in 1970, her main styles are pop, R&B, and soul. Iconic hits include "We Belong Together," "Hero," and "All I Want for Christmas Is You," making her one of the best-selling female artists globally.

items.name: Goin' Back to Indiana
items.descriptionZh: 《Goin' Back to Indiana》是The Jackson 5于1971年发行的流行专辑，融合了灵魂乐和泡泡糖流行乐的轻快节奏。专辑核心特色在于其青春洋溢的旋律与Jackson 5标志性的和声编排，展现了他们在早期摩城唱片时期的活力与纯真。
items.descriptionEn: 'Goin' Back to Indiana' is a pop album released by The Jackson 5 in 1971, blending soul and bubblegum pop with upbeat rhythms. Its core features lie in the youthful melodies and the group's signature harmonic arrangements, showcasing their vitality and innocence during their early Motown era.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的同名曲《Goin' Back to Indiana》灵感来源于Jackson 5在印第安纳州加里市的童年生活。录制期间，年仅13岁的Michael Jackson常常在录音室即兴发挥，他的高音部分甚至让制作人不得不调整麦克风位置以避免失真。
items.storiesEn: The album's title track 'Goin' Back to Indiana' was inspired by the Jackson 5's childhood in Gary, Indiana. During recording, the 13-year-old Michael Jackson often improvised in the studio, and his high-pitched vocals forced producers to adjust microphone placements to avoid distortion.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑进一步巩固了Jackson 5作为摩城唱片最成功青少年组合的地位，为后续的流行音乐发展奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album further solidified The Jackson 5's status as Motown's most successful teen group, laying the groundwork for subsequent pop music development.
items.artistIntroZh: The Jackson 5是美国流行/灵魂乐家族组合，来自印第安纳州加里市。由Jackie、Tito、Jermaine、Marlon和Michael Jackson五兄弟组成，代表作包括《I Want You Back》和《ABC》。他们以充满活力的舞台表演和摩城风格的流行曲风闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 is an American pop/soul family group from Gary, Indiana, consisting of brothers Jackie, Tito, Jermaine, Marlon, and Michael Jackson. Known for hits like 'I Want You Back' and 'ABC', they are celebrated for their energetic stage performances and Motown-style pop sound.

items.name: A State of Trance 2008
items.descriptionZh: 《A State of Trance 2008》是Armin van Buuren推出的年度混音合辑，属于流行/电子舞曲风格。专辑核心特色在于将Trance音乐的渐进式旋律与流行元素结合，收录了当年最热门的Trance曲目，并展现了Armin标志性的情感化混音手法。
items.descriptionEn: 'A State of Trance 2008' is an annual mixed compilation by Armin van Buuren, falling under pop/electronic dance music. Its core feature lies in blending progressive trance melodies with pop elements, featuring the year's hottest trance tracks and showcasing Armin's signature emotional mixing style.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Armin的广播节目《A State of Trance》全球影响力飙升期。为了挑选曲目，他每天花费数小时在工作室试听来自全球制作人的Demo，最终从数千首中精选出32首，其中不少曲目在发行后成为俱乐部国歌。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded during the peak of Armin's radio show 'A State of Trance' global influence. To select tracks, he spent hours daily in the studio listening to demos from producers worldwide, eventually picking 32 tracks from thousands, many of which became club anthems after release.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列合辑定义了2000年代末Trance音乐的主流审美，推动了电子舞曲在全球的商业化普及。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation series defined the mainstream aesthetic of trance music in the late 2000s, driving the commercial global spread of electronic dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: Armin van Buuren是荷兰Trance音乐制作人及DJ，被誉为“Trance之王”。他以其情感丰富的混音和长期主持的广播节目《A State of Trance》闻名，代表作包括《This Is What It Feels Like》和《In and Out of Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Armin van Buuren is a Dutch trance music producer and DJ, known as the 'King of Trance'. He is famed for his emotionally charged mixes and long-running radio show 'A State of Trance', with hits including 'This Is What It Feels Like' and 'In and Out of Love'.

09-29.birthdayZh: 9月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用《Memoirs of an Imperfect Angel》的温柔告诉你，不完美亦是动人的真实；也借《A State of Trance 2008》的旋律，将时间的河流编织成永恒的律动。你像一首降生的歌，带着灵魂的节拍与放克的自由，在岁月的舞台上轻盈起舞。愿你记得，每个音符都是为了抵达你而存在。
09-29.birthdayEn: September 29 is your birthday. Like the soulful echoes of The Jackson 5’s Goin' Back to Indiana, your presence brings a joyful, nostalgic warmth to every room. And just as Armin van Buuren’s A State of Trance 2008 lifts spirits with its boundless energy, you fill the world with a rhythm all your own. May this new year dance with bright moments, gentle melodies, and the sweetest surprises. Happy birthday—you are a beautiful chapter in the song of life.

items.name: Kellie Pickler
items.descriptionZh: 《Kellie Pickler》是Kellie Pickler于2008年发行的同名专辑，属于民谣/乡村风格。专辑核心特色在于其质朴的乡村叙事和Pickler略带沙哑的嗓音，歌曲内容多围绕个人经历展开，融合了传统乡村乐器与现代流行制作。
items.descriptionEn: 'Kellie Pickler' is the self-titled album by Kellie Pickler released in 2008, in the folk/country style. Its core features lie in its earthy country storytelling and Pickler's slightly raspy vocals, with songs centered around personal experiences, blending traditional country instruments with modern pop production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑中的歌曲《Don't You Know You're Beautiful》是Pickler为鼓励一位因外貌自卑的粉丝而写。录制时，她坚持在纳什维尔的RCA录音室使用复古麦克风，以捕捉更真实的乡村音色，这一决定让制作人不得不重新调整录音方案。
items.storiesEn: The album track 'Don't You Know You're Beautiful' was written by Pickler to encourage a fan struggling with self-esteem. During recording, she insisted on using vintage microphones at Nashville's RCA Studio to capture a more authentic country sound, forcing the producer to revise the recording plan.
items.artistIntroZh: Kellie Pickler是美国乡村音乐歌手及词曲作者，来自北卡罗来纳州。她因参加《美国偶像》第五季出道，以其真诚的乡村叙事和坚强女性形象著称，代表作包括《Red High Heels》和《Best Days of Your Life》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kellie Pickler is an American country music singer-songwriter from North Carolina. She rose to fame after appearing on the fifth season of 'American Idol', known for her sincere country storytelling and strong female image, with hits like 'Red High Heels' and 'Best Days of Your Life'.

items.name: Abenteuer
items.descriptionZh: 《Abenteuer》是Andrea Berg于2011年发行的流行专辑，融合了流行与德国施拉格音乐元素。专辑核心特色在于其充满冒险精神的主题和舞曲节奏，歌词鼓励听众拥抱生活，Andrea Berg富有表现力的嗓音为歌曲增添了戏剧性。
items.descriptionEn: 'Abenteuer' is a pop album by Andrea Berg released in 2011, blending pop with German schlager music elements. Its core features lie in its adventurous theme and danceable rhythms, with lyrics encouraging listeners to embrace life, while Andrea Berg's expressive vocals add drama to the songs.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Abenteuer》的灵感来自Andrea Berg的一次非洲旅行。在录制期间，她坚持在录音室中放置来自旅途中收集的非洲鼓，以营造更真实的氛围。这张专辑的成功促使她随后举办了大型体育场巡演。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'Abenteuer' was inspired by Andrea Berg's trip to Africa. During recording, she insisted on placing African drums collected from her journey in the studio to create a more authentic atmosphere. The album's success subsequently led her to embark on a major stadium tour.
items.artistIntroZh: Andrea Berg是德国流行及施拉格音乐歌手，被誉为德国施拉格女王。她以其充满活力的舞台表演和励志歌词闻名，代表作包括《Du hast mich tausendmal belogen》和《Ich werde lächeln, wenn du gehst》。
items.artistIntroEn: Andrea Berg is a German pop and schlager singer, known as the Queen of German Schlager. She is famed for her energetic stage performances and uplifting lyrics, with hits including 'Du hast mich tausendmal belogen' and 'Ich werde lächeln, wenn du gehst'.

09-30.birthdayZh: 9月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生两张勇敢的专辑：《Kellie Pickler》唱出生活里那份带伤的坚韧，而《Abenteuer》则提醒你——人生本就是一场值得奔赴的冒险。愿你像歌里一样，温柔地撑过所有艰难，又盛大地走向未知的远方。生日快乐，你本身就是一首独一无二的旋律。
09-30.birthdayEn: September 30 is your birthday, a date that shines with its own unique melody. On this day, the world welcomed your spirit, just as it once welcomed the bold, self-assured debut of Kellie Pickler, an album of heartfelt beginnings. Like Andrea Berg's *Abenteuer*, your life is a beautiful adventure unfolding with every year. May your birthday be filled with the same courage to write your own story and the joyful promise of new verses yet to come. You are a beautiful song in the making.

items.name: The Message
items.descriptionZh: 《The Message》是Grandmaster Flash于1982年发行的R&B/灵魂乐专辑，但实际核心风格是嘻哈与放克的融合。专辑核心特色在于其开创性的社会议题歌词和放克节奏，同名曲《The Message》以犀利的笔触描绘了城市贫困生活，成为嘻哈史上的里程碑。
items.descriptionEn: 'The Message' is an R&B/soul album by Grandmaster Flash released in 1982, though its core style is a fusion of hip-hop and funk. Its key feature lies in its groundbreaking socially conscious lyrics and funk beats; the title track 'The Message' sharply depicts urban poverty, becoming a milestone in hip-hop history.
items.storiesZh: 《The Message》的录制过程充满争议。主唱Melle Mel最初对歌词中的社会批判内容感到犹豫，担心过于黑暗。Grandmaster Flash坚持保留原始版本，并说服唱片公司发行。歌曲发布后，尽管电台起初抵制，但最终成为嘻哈史上第一首被国家录音登记处收藏的歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The recording of 'The Message' was controversial. Lead vocalist Melle Mel initially hesitated over the socially critical lyrics, fearing they were too dark. Grandmaster Flash insisted on keeping the original version and convinced the label to release it. Despite initial radio resistance, the song later became the first hip-hop track inducted into the National Recording Registry.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Message》彻底改变了嘻哈音乐的方向，将其从派对音乐转向社会评论，被视为意识说唱的开山之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'The Message' fundamentally redirected hip-hop from party music toward social commentary, regarded as the pioneering work of conscious rap.
items.artistIntroZh: Grandmaster Flash是巴巴多斯裔美国嘻哈DJ和音乐制作人，被誉为嘻哈音乐的奠基人之一。他以创新的搓碟技术和混音技巧闻名，代表作包括《The Message》和《White Lines (Don't Do It)》。他是首位入选摇滚名人堂的嘻哈艺人。
items.artistIntroEn: Grandmaster Flash is a Barbadian-American hip-hop DJ and music producer, regarded as one of the founding fathers of hip-hop. He is known for innovative scratching and mixing techniques, with hits including 'The Message' and 'White Lines (Don't Do It)'. He was the first hip-hop artist inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.

items.name: Disc-Overy
items.descriptionZh: 《Disc-Overy》是英国说唱歌手Tinie Tempah的首张录音室专辑，融合了嘻哈、电子和流行元素，以强劲的节拍和流畅的叙事为特色。专辑中单曲《Pass Out》和《Written in the Stars》展现了其将街头叙事与主流旋律结合的能力，奠定了他在英国嘻哈界的地位。
items.descriptionEn: Disc-Overy is the debut studio album by British rapper Tinie Tempah, blending hip-hop with electronic and pop elements, characterized by powerful beats and smooth storytelling. Singles like 'Pass Out' and 'Written in the Stars' showcase his ability to merge street narratives with mainstream melodies, solidifying his status in UK hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑制作期间，Tinie Tempah曾因单曲《Pass Out》的歌词引发争议——其中一句“我像一只鸽子飞过”被误读为药物暗示，但他澄清这只是对自由状态的比喻。此外，专辑标题“Disc-Overy”是他自创的词，意为“唱片发现之旅”，象征他从无名到成名的过程。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Tinie Tempah faced controversy over a lyric in 'Pass Out'—the line 'I fly like a pigeon' was misinterpreted as a drug reference, but he clarified it was a metaphor for freedom. Also, the album title 'Disc-Overy' is a coined term meaning 'discovery through records,' symbolizing his journey from obscurity to fame.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在英国获得巨大商业成功，获双白金认证，并推动了英国嘻哈与电子流行融合的趋势，影响了后续一批英国说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved major commercial success in the UK, earning double platinum certification, and propelled the fusion of UK hip-hop with electronic pop, influencing a generation of British rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: Tinie Tempah（本名Patrick Okogwu），英国说唱歌手、词曲作者，生于伦敦。以融合嘻哈与电子流行见长，代表作包括《Pass Out》《Written in the Stars》。曾获全英音乐奖，是21世纪英国嘻哈代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Tinie Tempah (born Patrick Okogwu), British rapper and songwriter from London, known for blending hip-hop with electronic pop. His hits include 'Pass Out' and 'Written in the Stars.' He won a Brit Award and is a key figure in 21st-century UK hip-hop.

items.name: Sex
items.descriptionZh: 《Sex》是德国电子音乐人Luk于2005年发行的专辑，风格以极简电子、科技舞曲为主，强调低音线条和实验性音效。专辑以“性”为主题，通过抽象的声音纹理和重复性节拍营造出私密而迷幻的氛围，是早期德国电子场景的独特作品。
items.descriptionEn: Sex is a 2005 album by German electronic musician Luk, rooted in minimal electronic and techno, emphasizing basslines and experimental soundscapes. The album explores the theme of 'sex' through abstract textures and repetitive beats, creating an intimate, psychedelic atmosphere—a distinctive work in early German electronic scene.
items.storiesZh: Luk在录制《Sex》时使用了大量自制电子设备，包括改装过的合成器和磁带循环机，以追求粗糙而原始的声响。专辑封面由柏林视觉艺术家设计，因过于露骨曾被部分零售商拒绝上架，但Luk坚持认为这是对主题的直接表达。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of Sex, Luk used many homemade electronic devices, including modified synthesizers and tape loops, to achieve a raw, gritty sound. The album cover, designed by a Berlin visual artist, was refused by some retailers for its explicit imagery, but Luk insisted it was a direct expression of the theme.
items.artistIntroZh: Luk（全名Lukas Vogel），德国电子音乐制作人，活跃于2000年代初。风格以极简科技舞曲和实验电子为主，代表作《Sex》展现其对声音纹理的探索。他较少公开露面，被视为德国地下电子场景的隐秘人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Luk (full name Lukas Vogel), German electronic music producer active in the early 2000s. His style is rooted in minimal techno and experimental electronics, with 'Sex' as his representative work exploring sound textures. He remains a reclusive figure in the German underground electronic scene.

10-01.birthdayZh: 10月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出过《The Message》——它诉说在喧嚣中也要找到自己的声音；也诞生过《Disc-Overy》，像一场节拍明亮的派对，提醒你人生值得庆祝。你出生在这两个日子之间，既带着清醒的勇气，也怀揣狂欢的节拍。愿你在属于自己的节奏里，永远自由起舞。生日快乐。
10-01.birthdayEn: October 1 is your birthday. Like Grandmaster Flash’s “The Message,” your life carries a voice that speaks truth and sparks change. And like Tinie Tempah’s “Disc-Overy,” you blend boldness and grace, always discovering new rhythms of joy. May this year be a song where every note lifts you higher, every beat reminds you of your power, and every pause is filled with love. You are a masterpiece in motion—celebrate the beautiful music only you can make. Happy birthday.

items.name: Clarity
items.descriptionZh: 《Clarity》是德俄电子音乐人Zedd的第二张录音室专辑，融合电子舞曲、流行和古典元素，以宏大旋律和精确制作著称。同名主打歌《Clarity》由Foxes献声，成为全球热门单曲，展现了Zedd将古典和声与电子节拍结合的能力，定义了2010年代电子流行风格。
items.descriptionEn: Clarity is the second studio album by German-Russian electronic musician Zedd, blending EDM, pop, and classical elements, known for its grand melodies and precise production. The title track featuring Foxes became a global hit, showcasing Zedd's ability to fuse classical harmonies with electronic beats, defining 2010s electro-pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制过程中，Zedd曾因追求完美而多次重录人声部分。他与歌手Foxes在《Clarity》中合作时，要求她反复调整音准直到符合他设定的“数学般精确”的和声结构。此外，专辑名称源于Zedd在创作低谷时突然领悟到的清晰感，他形容这是“从混沌中找到秩序”。
items.storiesEn: During the album's production, Zedd repeatedly re-recorded vocal takes in pursuit of perfection. When working with Foxes on 'Clarity,' he asked her to adjust pitch until it matched his 'mathematically precise' harmonic structure. The album title came from a moment of sudden clarity Zedd experienced during a creative block, which he described as 'finding order from chaos.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Clarity》获得格莱美最佳舞曲录音奖，推动了电子舞曲与主流流行音乐的融合，成为EDM黄金时代的标志性专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Clarity won a Grammy for Best Dance Recording, helping bridge EDM and mainstream pop, and became a landmark album of the EDM golden era.
items.artistIntroZh: Zedd（本名Anton Zaslavski），德俄电子音乐制作人、DJ，生于德国。以精确的古典和声与电子舞曲结合闻名，代表作《Clarity》《Stay》。曾获格莱美奖，是2010年代电子流行音乐的重要推动者。
items.artistIntroEn: Zedd (born Anton Zaslavski), German-Russian electronic music producer and DJ, known for blending classical harmony with EDM. His hits include 'Clarity' and 'Stay.' He won a Grammy and was a key driver of 2010s electro-pop.

items.name: Survival
items.descriptionZh: 《Survival》是牙买加雷鬼传奇Bob Marley & The Wailers于1979年发行的专辑，风格根植于雷鬼、斯卡和根源音乐，以政治觉醒和抗争为主题。专辑通过紧凑的节奏和充满力量的歌词，呼吁非洲团结与解放，是Marley后期最具政治锋芒的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Survival is a 1979 album by Jamaican reggae legend Bob Marley & The Wailers, rooted in reggae, ska, and roots music, with themes of political awakening and resistance. Through tight rhythms and powerful lyrics, the album calls for African unity and liberation, making it one of Marley's most politically charged works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Bob Marley已确诊癌症，但他坚持完成巡演和录音。专辑标题《Survival》最初被提议为《Black Survival》，但Marley为强调普世性而简化。此外，专辑中歌曲《Zimbabwe》后来成为津巴布韦独立庆典上的非官方国歌，Marley曾受邀在独立仪式上演出。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Bob Marley was already diagnosed with cancer but insisted on completing the tour and studio sessions. The album was initially proposed as 'Black Survival,' but Marley simplified the title for universality. Also, the track 'Zimbabwe' later became an unofficial anthem at Zimbabwe's independence ceremony, and Marley was invited to perform at the event.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑强化了雷鬼音乐作为政治抗议工具的角色，尤其是歌曲《Zimbabwe》成为非洲解放运动的象征，影响深远。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album reinforced reggae's role as a tool for political protest, with 'Zimbabwe' becoming a symbol of African liberation movements, leaving a lasting impact.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Marley，牙买加雷鬼歌手、吉他手、社会活动家，The Wailers核心成员。以融合雷鬼、斯卡与政治意识闻名，代表作《No Woman, No Cry》《Redemption Song》。他被誉为雷鬼音乐全球化的象征，影响跨越音乐与社会运动。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley, Jamaican reggae singer, guitarist, and activist, core member of The Wailers. Known for blending reggae, ska, and political consciousness, with hits like 'No Woman, No Cry' and 'Redemption Song.' He is a global icon of reggae, influencing music and social movements.

items.name: Zenyatta Mondatta
items.descriptionZh: 《Zenyatta Mondatta》是英国摇滚乐队The Police的第三张录音室专辑，融合新浪潮、后朋克和���行摇滚，以紧凑的节奏、复杂的雷鬼影响和斯汀标志性的高音演唱为特色。专辑风格简洁而富有活力，展现了乐队从朋克向更国际化声音的转变。
items.descriptionEn: Zenyatta Mondatta is the third studio album by British rock band The Police, blending new wave, post-punk, and pop rock, characterized by tight rhythms, reggae influences, and Sting's distinctive high-pitched vocals. The album's concise, energetic style marks the band's shift from punk to a more global sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题“Zenyatta Mondatta”是乐队成员在冥想时创造的无意义词汇，意为“禅意世界”。录制时乐队预算紧张，仅用两周完成，但意外催生了简洁直接的声音。专辑中《Don't Stand So Close to Me》灵感来自斯汀当老师时的经历，因涉及师生关系而引发讨论。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Zenyatta Mondatta' is a nonsense phrase coined by band members during meditation, meant to evoke a 'Zen world.' Recorded on a tight budget in just two weeks, the constraints accidentally produced a concise, direct sound. 'Don't Stand So Close to Me' was inspired by Sting's experience as a teacher, sparking discussion for its teacher-student theme.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑为The Police赢得了格莱美最佳摇滚表演奖，并巩固了他们作为新浪潮代表乐队的国际地位，影响了80年代流行摇滚的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album won The Police a Grammy for Best Rock Performance and cemented their international status as new wave icons, influencing 1980s pop rock.
items.artistIntroZh: The Police，英国摇滚乐队，1977年成立于伦敦，成员包括斯汀（主唱/贝斯）、安迪·萨默斯（吉他）和斯图尔特·科普兰（鼓）。以融合新浪潮、雷鬼和流行摇滚闻名，代表作《Every Breath You Take》《Roxanne》。曾获多项格莱美奖，是70-80年代最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Police, British rock band formed in London in 1977, consisting of Sting (vocals/bass), Andy Summers (guitar), and Stewart Copeland (drums). Known for blending new wave, reggae, and pop rock, with hits like 'Every Breath You Take' and 'Roxanne.' They won multiple Grammys and are among the most influential bands of the 70s-80s.

10-02.birthdayZh: 10月2日，是你的生日。就像Zedd在《Clarity》里所唱的迷雾终将散去——你生来就带着穿透混沌的澄澈。又或许你藏着The Police《Zenyatta Mondatta》里那种静谧与力量并存的节奏：在喧嚣世界，你总能找到自己的步调，把每一个生日都活成一道干净的光。
10-02.birthdayEn: October 2 is your birthday, a date that shines with the clarity of Zedd’s luminous melodies and the steady, rebellious heartbeat of Bob Marley’s Survival. Like these albums, your life carries both soaring light and grounded strength—a rhythm that moves through joy and resilience. May this year bring you harmonies of peace and bold, beautiful beats. You are a living song, and today the world celebrates the music of you. Wishing you a day as brilliant and soulful as the legacy you carry.

items.name: Diva: The Singles Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《Diva: The Singles Collection》是莎拉·布莱曼于2006年发行的精选集，收录了她从个人生涯初期至跨界巅峰时期的代表性单曲。风格上以流行跨界为主，融合古典、音乐剧与新世纪元素，核心特色在于其华丽空灵的嗓音与戏剧化的编曲，展现了“跨界女高音”的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Diva: The Singles Collection is a 2006 compilation by Sarah Brightman, featuring her representative singles from early career to crossover peak. Stylistically pop crossover with classical, musical theater, and new age elements, its core lies in her ethereal vocals and dramatic arrangements, showcasing the unique charm of a 'crossover soprano.'
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，莎拉·布莱曼已凭借《Time to Say Goodbye》等作品成为全球最畅销的跨界女高音。专辑名称“Diva”既是对她地位的认可，也暗含她与制作人弗兰克·彼得森长期合作的默契——彼得森为这张精选集重新混音了多首经典曲目，以呈现更现代的听觉质感。
items.storiesEn: By the time of this compilation's release, Sarah Brightman had become the world's best-selling crossover soprano with hits like 'Time to Say Goodbye.' The title 'Diva' acknowledged her status and hinted at her long collaboration with producer Frank Peterson, who remixed several classics for a more modern sonic texture.
items.artistIntroZh: 莎拉·布莱曼，英国跨界女高音歌唱家，以古典与流行融合的演唱风格闻名。代表作包括《Time to Say Goodbye》《Scarborough Fair》等，曾主演音乐剧《歌剧魅影》首版女主角，全球专辑销量超过3000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Sarah Brightman is a British crossover soprano known for blending classical and pop. Her hits include 'Time to Say Goodbye' and 'Scarborough Fair.' She originated the role of Christine in 'The Phantom of the Opera' and has sold over 30 million albums worldwide.

10-03.birthdayZh: 10月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Diva: The Singles Collection》献上莎拉·布莱曼如天籁般的咏叹，像在告诉你：每个人都是自己生命舞台上的主角，声音不必完美，但要真实地唱出属于你的戏剧。愿你在新的一岁里，把日子走成一支从容的跨界交响，既有高音区的勇敢，也有低回处的温柔。生日快乐，你值得这世间所有的明亮与深情。
10-03.birthdayEn: October 3 is your birthday, a day that once brought us "Diva: The Singles Collection" by Sarah Brightman—a reminder that life, like her voice, blends strength and grace into something timeless. May your new year feel like a collection of your own greatest hits, each track filled with soaring highs and tender moments. Celebrate the symphony you are, for the world is brighter with you in it. Here's to a year as luminous as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Appeal to Reason
items.descriptionZh: 《Appeal to Reason》是美国朋克乐队Rise Against于2008年发行的第五张录音室专辑。风格上融合旋律硬核与流行朋克，核心特色在于政治批判性的歌词与极具爆发力的旋律节奏，在保持地下反叛精神的同时，也展现出更易入耳的流行编曲倾向。
items.descriptionEn: Appeal to Reason is the fifth studio album by American punk band Rise Against, released in 2008. It blends melodic hardcore with pop punk, featuring politically charged lyrics and explosive melodic rhythms, maintaining underground rebellion while leaning toward more accessible pop arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于Blasting Room录音室，由Bill Stevenson和Jason Livermore联合制作。乐队主唱Tim McIlrath表示，专辑名称源于希望用音乐唤起听众对不公现象的理性思考。同名巡演中，乐队多次将部分收入捐赠给环保与人权组织，延续了其长期的社会活动传统。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Blasting Room with producers Bill Stevenson and Jason Livermore, frontman Tim McIlrath said the title aimed to inspire rational thought about injustice. During the supporting tour, the band donated part of proceeds to environmental and human rights organizations, continuing their long-standing activism.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑成为Rise Against商业上最成功的作品之一，在Billboard 200上最高排名第1位，并推动了旋律硬核朋克进入主流视野。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album became one of Rise Against's most commercially successful, peaking at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 and helping bring melodic hardcore punk into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Rise Against是一支来自美国芝加哥的旋律硬核朋克乐队，成立于1999年。以激烈的政治立场和动物权利倡导著称，代表作包括《Savior》《Prayer of the Refugee》等，专辑全球销量超过1000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Rise Against is a melodic hardcore punk band from Chicago, formed in 1999. Known for fierce political stance and animal rights advocacy, their hits include 'Savior' and 'Prayer of the Refugee,' with over 10 million albums sold worldwide.

10-04.birthdayZh: 10月4日，是你的生日。这天，Rise Against发行了《Appeal to Reason》，像一道撕裂阴霾的光，提醒我们在喧嚣中仍能保持清醒的温柔。愿你的生命如这张专辑的旋律——既有抗争的力度，也有愈合的温度。愿你在自己的时区里，从容生长，成为最动人的理由。
10-04.birthdayEn: October 4 is your birthday. On this day, Rise Against released *Appeal to Reason*, an album born of fierce hope, a melodic call to rise with purpose. Like its spirit, may your year be a testament to resilience—not a demand for perfection, but an invitation to seek truth and strength in every challenge. Let your heart beat to the rhythm of your own quiet rebellion against doubt. You are a reason for joy, a turning point, and a melody worth celebrating. Shine on.

items.name: Swan Songs
items.descriptionZh: 《Swan Songs》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High于2005年发行的第三张正规专辑。风格上属于流行嘻哈，融合爵士、灵魂与电子元素，核心特色在于主唱Tablo充满文学性的歌词与成员们细腻的情感表达，探讨爱情、孤独与社会现实，被誉为韩国嘻哈的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: Swan Songs is the third studio album by Korean hip-hop group Epik High, released in 2005. Stylistically pop hip-hop with jazz, soul, and electronic elements, its core lies in Tablo's literary lyrics and the members' nuanced emotional delivery, exploring love, loneliness, and social reality—considered a classic of Korean hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行前，Epik High因前作《High Society》的成功而备受关注，但《Swan Songs》的创作过程充满压力。Tablo曾透露，专辑中的《Fly》原本是一首关于梦想的简单歌曲，但制作人建议加入更复杂的编曲，最终成为组合最知名的代表作之一，并拿下多个音乐节目冠军。
items.storiesEn: Before this release, Epik High gained attention with 'High Society,' but creating 'Swan Songs' was stressful. Tablo revealed that 'Fly' was originally a simple song about dreams, but the producer suggested more complex arrangement, making it one of their most iconic hits, winning multiple music show trophies.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Swan Songs》被广泛认为是韩国嘻哈史上最具影响力的专辑之一，为Epik High奠定了“嘻哈诗人”的地位，并推动了韩国嘻哈音乐的文学化转向。
items.historicalImpactEn: Swan Songs is widely regarded as one of the most influential albums in Korean hip-hop history, establishing Epik High as 'hip-hop poets' and driving the literary turn of the genre in Korea.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国三人嘻哈组合，成立于2003年，成员包括Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz。以深刻歌词和实验性音乐著称，代表作有《Fly》《Love Love Love》等，是韩国嘻哈界的标志性团体。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop trio formed in 2003, consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for profound lyrics and experimental music, their hits include 'Fly' and 'Love Love Love,' and they are iconic figures in Korean hip-hop.

items.name: WOW Hits 2011
items.descriptionZh: 《WOW Hits 2011》是WOW系列合辑的第17张作品，于2010年发行，收录了当年最热门的当代基督教流行音乐。风格上属于流行/基督教流行，核心特色在于汇集了多位顶尖CCM（当代基督教音乐）艺人的热门单曲，是了解该年度基督教流行乐坛的权威精选集。
items.descriptionEn: WOW Hits 2011 is the 17th installment of the WOW series, released in 2010, featuring the year's hottest contemporary Christian pop hits. Stylistically pop/Christian pop, its core is gathering top CCM artists' singles, serving as an authoritative annual snapshot of the Christian pop scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑收录了包括Chris Tomlin、Casting Crowns、TobyMac等在内的多位知名CCM艺人作品。发行时正值基督教音乐产业数字化转型期，WOW系列通过双CD+数字下载码的形式，试图兼顾传统听众与新兴流媒体用户。专辑封面以“WOW”字样与彩色光效设计，延续了系列标志性视觉风格。
items.storiesEn: This compilation included tracks from Chris Tomlin, Casting Crowns, TobyMac, and more. Released during the digital transformation of Christian music, the WOW series offered dual CDs plus digital download codes to serve both traditional listeners and streaming users. The cover maintained the iconic 'WOW' logo with colorful light effects.
items.artistIntroZh: WOW Hits系列是北美最畅销的当代基督教音乐合辑品牌，自1995年起每年发行，收录年度最受欢迎的CCM歌曲。该系列见证了基督教流行音乐从电台时代到流媒体时代的演变，是行业风向标。
items.artistIntroEn: The WOW Hits series is North America's best-selling contemporary Christian music compilation brand, released annually since 1995.
