It features the year's most popular CCM songs and has witnessed the genre's evolution from radio to streaming era, serving as an industry barometer.

10-05.birthdayZh: 10月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Swan Songs》里那种在挣扎中淬炼出的诗意，也回荡过《WOW Hits 2011》中关于信仰与希望的合声。你就像这些歌的集合——不必完美，却真实有力。愿你在属于自己的节拍里，带着深刻与温柔，继续唱出独一无二的人生。
10-05.birthdayEn: October 5 is your birthday, a day marked by the release of two very different albums that capture the spirit of a life well-lived. Like Epik High’s “Swan Songs,” your journey weaves together resilience and grace, finding beauty in the shadows. And you carry the uplifting energy of “WOW Hits 2011,” a melody of hope and light that brings joy to those around you. May your new year be a beautiful harmony of strength and song, with every note celebrating the incredible person you are. Happy birthday.

10-06.birthdayZh: 10月6日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起两张特别的唱片：《OK Computer》在混乱中低语理性与温柔，《Sgt. Pepper's》则宣告爱与想象永不褪色。愿你的生命也如此——在喧嚣里保有笃定的光，在岁月中奏出属于自己的、鲜活的乐章。
10-06.birthdayEn: October 6 is your birthday, a day when the world gifted us the soulful swagger of The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill and the lush, dreamlike expanse of Closer by Joy Division. Like Lauryn’s fearless heart, may your year be filled with truth and unapologetic magic. And like the haunting hope in that album’s closing light, may you always find beauty in the shadows. You are a masterpiece unfolding in real time. Happy birthday to the one whose very existence makes the world a little more melodic.

items.name: Love
items.descriptionZh: 《Love》是墨西哥歌手Thalía于1992年发行的第二张个人录音室专辑。风格上属于拉丁流行，核心特色在于融合了流行摇滚、舞曲与抒情芭乐，展现出Thalía从儿童偶像转型为青少年流行天后的过渡期魅力，专辑中的《Sangre》等歌曲成为其早期经典。
items.descriptionEn: Love is the second studio album by Mexican singer Thalía, released in 1992. Stylistically Latin pop, it blends pop rock, dance, and ballads, showcasing her transition from child star to teen pop diva. Tracks like 'Sangre' became early classics in her career.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Thalía脱离前组合Timbiriche后个人事业的关键一步。录制期间，她与制作人Luis Carlos Esteban密切合作，试图在墨西哥流行乐坛建立独立形象。专辑发行后获得商业成功，在墨西哥本土销量超过20万张，并帮助她打开了拉丁美洲其他国家的市场。
items.storiesEn: This album was a crucial step in Thalía's solo career after leaving the group Timbiriche. During recording, she worked closely with producer Luis Carlos Esteban to establish an independent image in Mexican pop. The album sold over 200,000 copies in Mexico and helped her enter other Latin American markets.
items.artistIntroZh: Thalía是墨西哥著名歌手、演员，被誉为“拉丁流行女王”。以甜美嗓音和多部电视剧主演身份闻名，代表作包括《Amor a la Mexicana》《No Me Enseñaste》等，全球专辑销量超过2500万张，是拉丁音乐最具影响力的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Thalía is a renowned Mexican singer and actress, known as the 'Queen of Latin Pop.' Famous for her sweet voice and starring roles in telenovelas, her hits include 'Amor a la Mexicana' and 'No Me Enseñaste,' with over 25 million albums sold worldwide, making her one of the most influential Latin female artists.

10-07.birthdayZh: 10月7日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行过一张叫做《Love》的专辑，Thalía用曼波与桑巴的热情包裹着爱，仿佛在说：你的到来本身就是一首热烈而甜美的旋律。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张专辑的精神一样，在生命的节拍中轻盈起舞，把每一次心跳都活成一首温暖的歌。
10-07.birthdayEn: October 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Love" by Thalía—a radiant burst of Latin pop that dances with passion and joyful rhythm. Just like that album, you carry a warm, vibrant spirit that uplifts everyone around you. May your new year be filled with the same sweet harmony and bold, beautiful melodies you bring to life. Here’s to you, a masterpiece in the making.

items.name: In and Out of Consciousness: Greatest Hits 1990–2010
items.descriptionZh: 这张精选集收录了Robbie Williams从1990年至2010年的标志性流行金曲，涵盖英伦流行与成人当代风格。核心特色在于其跨越二十年的音乐轨迹，展现了Robbie从偶像男团成员到全球巨星的艺术蜕变，包含《Angels》《Feel》等经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: This greatest hits compilation collects Robbie Williams' iconic pop anthems from 1990 to 2010, blending British pop and adult contemporary styles. Its core feature is a two-decade musical journey showcasing Robbie's evolution from boy band member to global superstar, including classics like 'Angels' and 'Feel'.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行恰逢Robbie Williams离开Take That十年之际。他亲自参与了曲目筛选，并透露《Angels》的创作灵感源于一次与祖母的深夜通话。专辑封面由著名摄影师Sam Taylor-Johnson拍摄，Robbie在拍摄中即兴模仿了经典雕塑动作，成为标志性画面。
items.storiesEn: The album's release marked ten years since Robbie Williams left Take That. He personally curated the tracklist and revealed that 'Angels' was inspired by a late-night phone call with his grandmother. The cover was shot by renowned photographer Sam Taylor-Johnson, with Robbie improvising a classic sculpture pose that became iconic.
items.artistIntroZh: Robbie Williams，英国流行歌手，1974年生于斯托克。以性感嗓音和舞台魅力著称，代表作包括《Angels》《Rock DJ》。他是英国史上最畅销的独唱艺人之一，全球销量超7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Robbie Williams, British pop singer born in Stoke in 1974, known for his charismatic voice and stage presence. His hits include 'Angels' and 'Rock DJ'. He is one of the UK's best-selling solo artists with over 75 million records worldwide.

10-08.birthdayZh: 10月8日，是你的生日。这一天，罗比·威廉姆斯将二十年的光芒收进《In and Out of Consciousness》——那些跌宕的节拍，像你灵魂里时而澎湃、时而沉静的潮汐。从青涩到从容，你一直在自己的世界里穿行，收集勇气与温柔。愿新的一岁，继续做自己的巨星，在每个清醒与梦境之间，唱出独一无二的歌。
10-08.birthdayEn: October 8 is your birthday. On this very day, the album "In and Out of Consciousness: Greatest Hits 1990–2010" by Robbie Williams arrived in the world—a collection of songs that captures the beautiful, messy, soaring journey of a life fully lived. May your year ahead feel like a greatest hits compilation of your own: full of bold refrains, surprising new melodies, and the deep, resonant joy of knowing you are exactly where you belong. You are a living anthem of light.

items.name: I Am Chipmunk
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am Chipmunk》是英国说唱歌手Chip的首张录音室专辑，融合了Grime与主流嘻哈风格。核心特色在于其流畅的节奏和街头叙事，Chip以少年视角描绘伦敦东区的生活，展现了Grime音乐的活力与真实感。
items.descriptionEn: 'I Am Chipmunk' is the debut studio album by British rapper Chip, blending grime with mainstream hip-hop. Its core feature is smooth rhythms and street narratives, depicting life in East London from a teenage perspective, showcasing the energy and authenticity of grime music.
items.storiesZh: Chip录制这张专辑时���仅17岁，大部分歌曲在伦敦东区的地下录音室完成。主打歌《Chip Diddy Chip》的副歌灵感来自他母亲在厨房哼唱的旋律。专辑发行后，他成为当时英国最年轻的进入专辑榜前十的说唱歌手。
items.storiesEn: Chip was only 17 when recording this album, mostly in an underground studio in East London. The chorus of lead single 'Chip Diddy Chip' was inspired by a melody his mother hummed in the kitchen. Upon release, he became the youngest British rapper to enter the album chart top ten.
items.artistIntroZh: Chip（原名Chipmunk），英国说唱歌手，1990年生于伦敦。以Grime和嘻哈风格闻名，代表作包括《Chip Diddy Chip》《Oopsy Daisy》。他曾获MOBO奖，是英国Grime场景的代表人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Chip (born Chipmunk), British rapper born in London in 1990, known for grime and hip-hop. His hits include 'Chip Diddy Chip' and 'Oopsy Daisy'. He won a MOBO Award and is a key figure in the UK grime scene.

items.name: She Wolf
items.descriptionZh: 《She Wolf》是Shakira的第三张英语专辑，融合了流行、拉丁和世界音乐元素。核心特色在于其电子舞曲节奏与Shakira独特的嗓音和狼嚎式唱腔，歌词探讨女性自由与野性本能，展现了强烈的个人风格。
items.descriptionEn: 'She Wolf' is Shakira's third English-language album, blending pop, Latin, and world music. Its core feature is electronic dance beats paired with Shakira's distinctive vocals and wolf-like howls, with lyrics exploring female freedom and primal instincts, showcasing a strong personal style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《She Wolf》的灵感来源于Shakira在纽约街头观察到的女性行为。她曾透露，录音时为了模仿狼嚎，她尝试了多种发声方式，最终在浴室中找到了完美音效。MV中她身着金色紧身衣的造型成为时尚话题。
items.storiesEn: The title track 'She Wolf' was inspired by Shakira's observations of women in New York City streets. She revealed that to perfect the wolf howl, she tried various vocal techniques and finally found the right sound in her bathroom. Her gold bodysuit in the music video became a fashion statement.
items.artistIntroZh: Shakira，哥伦比亚流行歌手，1977年生于巴兰基亚。以融合拉丁、摇滚和流行风格著称，代表作包括《Hips Don't Lie》《Whenever, Wherever》。她是拉丁音乐全球化的标志人物，获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Shakira, Colombian pop singer born in Barranquilla in 1977, known for blending Latin, rock, and pop. Her hits include 'Hips Don't Lie' and 'Whenever, Wherever'. She is a global icon of Latin music and a multiple Grammy winner.

items.name: Playlist: The Very Best of Destiny's Child
items.descriptionZh: 《Playlist: The Very Best of Destiny's Child》是Destiny's Child的精选集，尽管标为民谣/乡村，但实际内容以R&B和流行为主。核心特色在于收录了《Say My Name》《Survivor》等经典曲目，展现了女子组合的声乐和谐与女性力量主题。
items.descriptionEn: 'Playlist: The Very Best of Destiny's Child' is a compilation by Destiny's Child, though labeled folk/country, it primarily features R&B and pop. Its core feature includes classics like 'Say My Name' and 'Survivor', showcasing the group's vocal harmonies and themes of female empowerment.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是索尼音乐'Playlist'系列的一部分，旨在向新听众介绍经典艺人。Destiny's Child成员Beyoncé、Kelly Rowland和Michelle Williams在选曲时曾因《Bootylicious》是否入选产生分歧，最终通过投票决定。专辑封面使用了2001年的宣传照。
items.storiesEn: This album is part of Sony Music's 'Playlist' series, aimed at introducing classic artists to new listeners. During track selection, members Beyoncé, Kelly Rowland, and Michelle Williams disagreed on including 'Bootylicious', ultimately settling it by vote. The cover uses a 2001 promotional photo.
items.artistIntroZh: Destiny's Child，美国R&B女子组合，1997年成立于休斯顿。以精湛和声和女性自主主题闻名，代表作包括《Say My Name》《Survivor》。她们是全球最畅销女子组合之一，成员Beyoncé后来成为超级巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Destiny's Child, American R&B girl group formed in Houston in 1997, known for tight harmonies and female empowerment themes. Their hits include 'Say My Name' and 'Survivor'. They are one of the best-selling girl groups globally, with member Beyoncé later becoming a superstar.

10-09.birthdayZh: 10月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好两张专辑的礼物——夏奇拉在《She Wolf》里释放野性的自由，你要像她一样勇敢做自己；天命真女在精选集中唱着《Survivor》，告诉你每一次跌倒都是蜕变的序曲。从今天起，带着这份不驯的温柔和坚韧的节奏，去成为你最想成为的模样吧。
10-09.birthdayEn: October 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Shakira’s wild, electrifying rhythms and the empowering harmonies of Destiny’s Child. Like that fierce "She Wolf" energy, may your spirit dance with fearless joy. And like the timeless bond of "Say My Name," may you always feel seen and celebrated. You are a compilation of beautiful moments, a unique blend of rhythm and grace. Today, the music of the universe plays just for you—happy birthday, luminous soul.

items.name: Hot Rats
items.descriptionZh: 《Hot Rats》是Frank Zappa的经典爵士融合专辑，融合了爵士、摇滚、实验音乐和古典元素。核心特色在于复杂的器乐编排、即兴演奏和Zappa标志性的幽默感，其中《Peaches en Regalia》成为器乐摇滚的标杆之作。
items.descriptionEn: 'Hot Rats' is Frank Zappa's classic jazz fusion album, blending jazz, rock, experimental music, and classical elements. Its core feature is intricate instrumental arrangements, improvisation, and Zappa's signature humor, with 'Peaches en Regalia' becoming a benchmark for instrumental rock.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Zappa首次完全使用多轨录音技术制作的作品，��音过程持续数月。萨克斯手Ian Underwood在录制《The Gumbo Variations》时连续即兴演奏了30分钟，Zappa从中剪辑出最佳段落。专辑封面由Cal Schenkel设计，灵感来自Zappa的宠物猫。
items.storiesEn: This was Zappa's first album fully produced using multitrack recording technology, with sessions lasting months. Saxophonist Ian Underwood improvised for 30 continuous minutes on 'The Gumbo Variations', from which Zappa edited the best parts. The cover by Cal Schenkel was inspired by Zappa's pet cat.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Hot Rats》被认为是爵士融合音乐的重要里程碑，影响了后来的实验摇滚和电子音乐。Zappa对多轨录音的创新运用，为70年代的前卫摇滚奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'Hot Rats' is considered a landmark in jazz fusion, influencing later experimental rock and electronic music. Zappa's innovative use of multitrack recording laid groundwork for 1970s progressive rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa，美国作曲家、吉他手，1940年生于巴尔的摩。以实验性、讽刺性和技术精湛著称，代表作包括《Hot Rats》《Joe's Garage》。他跨越摇滚、爵士、古典等流派，是20世纪最具创新力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa, American composer and guitarist born in Baltimore in 1940, known for experimentalism, satire, and technical mastery. His works include 'Hot Rats' and 'Joe's Garage'. He crossed rock, jazz, and classical genres, one of the most innovative musicians of the 20th century.

10-10.birthdayZh: 10月10日，是你的生日。这一天，弗兰克·扎帕的《Hot Rats》在音符里点燃了爵士与放克的火焰——它用吉他与小提琴的对话告诉你，复杂与即兴都可以如此自由。愿你像那张专辑的冒险精神：不惧实验，拥抱每一次碰撞。生日这天，世界为你准备了独一无二的节拍，只管踏上去，跳出自己的节奏。
10-10.birthdayEn: October 10 is your birthday, a date that also gave the world Frank Zappa’s “Hot Rats,” a dazzling instrumental tapestry of jazz, funk, and classical surprise. Like that album, your life blends unexpected harmonies and soulful grooves, each day a new movement in a masterpiece only you can compose. May your year ahead be rich with discovery, wild rhythms, and moments that feel both timeless and fresh. You are a rare and brilliant song. Happy birthday.

items.name: Arrival
items.descriptionZh: 《Arrival》是ABBA于1976年发行的第四张录音室专辑，标志着乐队从流行乐向更精致、更具戏剧性的风格转型。核心特色在于融合了迪斯科节奏、华丽弦乐编排与标志性的多声部和声，其中《Dancing Queen》成为永恒的迪斯科经典。
items.descriptionEn: Arrival is ABBA's fourth studio album, released in 1976, marking the band's transition from pop to a more refined and dramatic style. Its core features blend disco rhythms, lush string arrangements, and signature multi-part harmonies, with 'Dancing Queen' becoming an eternal disco classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，ABBA成员在瑞典斯德哥尔摩的Metronome工作室度过了数月。据传，《Dancing Queen》的灵感来自英国女王伊丽莎白二世的一次访问，但实际创作源于乐队对乔治·麦考利（George McCrae）的《Rock Your Baby》的致敬。专辑封面在斯德哥尔摩群岛拍摄，直升机视角下的乐队成员排列成标志性图案。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, ABBA spent months at Metronome Studio in Stockholm, Sweden. Legend has it that 'Dancing Queen' was inspired by a visit from Queen Elizabeth II, but it was actually a tribute to George McCrae's 'Rock Your Baby'. The album cover was shot in the Stockholm archipelago, with the band members arranged in an iconic pattern from a helicopter perspective.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Arrival》是ABBA全球突破的关键专辑，确立了瑞典流行音乐的国际地位，并影响了后世无数流行与舞曲艺人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Arrival was ABBA's global breakthrough, solidifying Swedish pop music's international status and influencing countless future pop and dance artists.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA是瑞典传奇流行乐队，成立于1972年，由Agnetha Fältskog、Björn Ulvaeus、Benny Andersson和Anni-Frid Lyngstad组成。主要风格为流行、迪斯科，代表作包括《Dancing Queen》、《Mamma Mia》和《The Winner Takes It All》。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a legendary Swedish pop band formed in 1972, consisting of Agnetha Fältskog, Björn Ulvaeus, Benny Andersson, and Anni-Frid Lyngstad. Their main styles are pop and disco, with iconic hits like 'Dancing Queen', 'Mamma Mia', and 'The Winner Takes It All'.

items.name: Freudiana
items.descriptionZh: 《Freudiana》是Eric Woolfson于1990年发行的概念专辑，属于流行流派，但融合了管弦乐与戏剧元素。核心特色在于以弗洛伊德的精神分析理论为叙事主线，歌曲充满哲学思辨与旋律性强的流行曲调，是Woolfson“音乐剧流行”风格的典型代表。
items.descriptionEn: Freudiana is a concept album by Eric Woolfson, released in 1990, falling under the pop genre but blending orchestral and theatrical elements. Its core feature is a narrative thread based on Freud's psychoanalytic theory, with songs rich in philosophical reflection and melodic pop tunes, exemplifying Woolfson's 'musical pop' style.
items.storiesZh: 《Freudiana》原本计划作为音乐剧在维也纳上演，但最终仅以专辑形式发行。Woolfson在创作过程中深入研究了弗洛伊德的生平与著作，甚至走访了弗洛伊德在伦敦的故居。专辑中的《The Doctor》一曲直接引用了弗洛伊德的真实案例。
items.storiesEn: Freudiana was originally planned as a musical to be staged in Vienna but was ultimately released only as an album. Woolfson delved deeply into Freud's life and works during creation, even visiting Freud's former home in London. The track 'The Doctor' directly references a real case from Freud's practice.
items.artistIntroZh: Eric Woolfson是苏格��音乐家、词曲作者和制作人，1945年出生于格拉斯哥。他是The Alan Parsons Project的核心成员，擅长流行、前卫摇滚与音乐剧风格。代表作包括《Eye in the Sky》和《Freudiana》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eric Woolfson was a Scottish musician, songwriter, and producer, born in Glasgow in 1945. He was a core member of The Alan Parsons Project, specializing in pop, progressive rock, and musical theater styles. Notable works include 'Eye in the Sky' and 'Freudiana'.

10-11.birthdayZh: 10月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾因《Arrival》而翩然起舞，那是破晓的旋律，告诉你要勇敢走向属于自己的华丽。而《Freudiana》潜入灵魂深处，教你抚平过往的皱褶。你降生于这样的日子，注定是轻盈又深邃的——在欢歌与沉思之间，你已是最好的礼物。
10-11.birthdayEn: October 11 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, just as it once welcomed *Arrival* by ABBA, an album bursting with bright harmonies and the promise of a new dawn. Your journey echoes its spirit of joyful transformation. And like *Freudiana*, your story unfolds with depth and curiosity, exploring the beautiful mystery of self. May your year ahead be a melody of discovery and light, each day a note in a song only you can sing. Happy birthday, with warmth and wonder.

10-12.birthdayZh: 10月12日，是你的生日。这一天，有《The Joshua Tree》在荒漠中生根，教会我们孤独也能长出坚韧的绿洲；也有《Rumours》在碎梦里谱成诗，唱出破碎里升起的温柔。愿你像这些专辑一样，把岁月唱成歌，把坎坷走成光。
10-12.birthdayEn: October 12 is your birthday, a day brushed with the golden light of autumn and the echo of timeless music. On this date, the soul-stirring harmonies of *Kind of Blue* remind us that beauty can emerge from quiet reflection, while the raw, hopeful energy of *Rumours* whispers that even through storms, we find our strength. May your new year carry that same gentle courage and creative spark. Here’s to you—a melody only you can sing, growing richer with every season. Happy birthday.

items.name: Suicide Tuesday
items.descriptionZh: 《Suicide Tuesday》是Hyper于2008年发行的流行专辑，融合了电子流行与另类摇滚元素。核心特色在于充满张力的歌词与合成器驱动的旋律，探讨现代生活的焦虑与自我毁灭倾向，整体氛围黑暗却富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: Suicide Tuesday is a pop album by Hyper, released in 2008, blending electronic pop and alternative rock elements. Its core features are tense lyrics and synth-driven melodies, exploring modern life's anxiety and self-destructive tendencies, with a dark yet infectious atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: Hyper本名Guy Hatfield，专辑录制期间他经历了严重的创作瓶颈，最终在伦敦一间地下室完成了大部分录音。专辑标题《Suicide Tuesday》源自他一次深夜崩溃后的自嘲，当时他对着录音机即兴唱出了这句歌词。
items.storiesEn: Hyper, real name Guy Hatfield, experienced a severe creative block during the album's recording, eventually completing most of it in a basement studio in London. The title 'Suicide Tuesday' came from a self-deprecating remark after a late-night breakdown, when he improvised the lyric into a tape recorder.
items.artistIntroZh: Hyper是英国音乐人Guy Hatfield的艺名，活跃于2000年代后期，主要风格为流行、电子流行。代表作包括《Suicide Tuesday》和单曲《We Control》。他以直白的歌词和合成器音色著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Hyper is the stage name of British musician Guy Hatfield, active in the late 2000s, primarily in pop and electronic pop. Notable works include 'Suicide Tuesday' and the single 'We Control'. He is known for his direct lyrics and synthesizer-driven sound.

10-13.birthdayZh: 10月13日，是你的生日。这一天，《Suicide Tuesday》曾以黑暗的节奏打破寂静，却不是为了沉沦，而是让压抑的灵魂找到出口。正如你的到来，带着撕裂平庸的勇气，让世界看见你独有的光。愿你在自己的节拍里，把每一个周二活成庆典，在破碎处种下温柔。
10-13.birthdayEn: October 13 is your birthday—a date that carries its own quiet symphony. On this day, the pulse of creativity gave us *Suicide Tuesday*, a bold, electrifying echo that dares to transform chaos into rhythm. Like that industrial spark, may your year be a blend of raw energy and luminous hope—turning every sharp edge into a melody only you can dance to. The world spins, but today, it spins for you. Here’s to another trip around the sun, fierce and alive.

items.name: Out from Out Where
items.descriptionZh: 《Out from Out Where》是Amon Tobin于2002年发行的电子专辑，属于实验电子与氛围音乐流派。核心特色在于复杂的节拍编程、扭曲的采样拼贴与电影般的音景构建，展现了Tobin将爵士、嘻哈与电子音乐融合的极致技巧。
items.descriptionEn: Out from Out Where is an electronic album by Amon Tobin, released in 2002, falling under experimental electronic and ambient music. Its core features are complex beat programming, distorted sample collages, and cinematic soundscapes, showcasing Tobin's mastery of blending jazz, hip-hop, and electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴西里约热内卢和英国伦敦两地，Tobin大量使用了巴西本土乐器与日常物品的录音。据说他在创作过程中沉迷于收集各种金属撞击声，并将它们转化为节奏素材。专辑封面由艺术家Tessa Farmer创作，用昆虫标本拼贴出奇幻图案。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, and London, UK, with Tobin extensively using Brazilian native instruments and recordings of everyday objects. He reportedly became obsessed with collecting metallic clangs and transforming them into rhythmic material. The cover art was created by artist Tessa Farmer, using insect specimens to form a fantastical pattern.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为实验电子音乐的重要里程碑，影响了后续IDM和氛围电子艺人的创作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is considered a milestone in experimental electronic music, influencing subsequent IDM and ambient electronic artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Amon Tobin是巴西裔英国电子音乐人，1972年出生于里约热内卢。主要风格为实验电子、IDM与氛围音乐，代表作包括《Permutation》和《Supermodified》。他以采样拼贴与复杂节奏结构闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Amon Tobin is a Brazilian-born British electronic musician, born in 1972 in Rio de Janeiro. His main styles are experimental electronic, IDM, and ambient music, with notable works including 'Permutation' and 'Supermodified'. He is renowned for his sample collages and complex rhythmic structures.

items.name: Gossip in the Grain
items.descriptionZh: 《Gossip in the Grain》是Ray LaMontagne于2008年发行的民谣/乡村专辑，融合了民谣摇滚、乡村与灵魂乐元素。核心特色在于LaMontagne沙哑而深情的嗓音，以及以原声吉他为基础的温暖编曲，歌词充满自省与日常生活的诗意。
items.descriptionEn: Gossip in the Grain is a folk/country album by Ray LaMontagne, released in 2008, blending folk rock, country, and soul elements. Its core features are LaMontagne's husky, soulful voice and warm arrangements based on acoustic guitar, with lyrics full of introspection and everyday poetry.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于马萨诸塞州的一个农场谷仓，LaMontagne坚持使用模拟设备以捕捉温暖音色。他在录制期间拒绝使用手机和网络，以保持专注。专辑中的《You Are the Best Thing》原本是一首即兴哼唱，后来成为他最受欢迎的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a farm barn in Massachusetts, with LaMontagne insisting on using analog equipment to capture a warm sound. He refused to use a phone or internet during recording to maintain focus. 'You Are the Best Thing' was originally an improvised hum, later becoming one of his most popular singles.
items.artistIntroZh: Ray LaMontagne是美国民谣唱作人，1973年出生于新罕布什尔州。主要风格为民谣、乡村与灵魂乐，代表作包括《Trouble》和《Gossip in the Grain》。他以独特的沙哑嗓音和深情演绎著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Ray LaMontagne is an American folk singer-songwriter, born in 1973 in New Hampshire. His main styles are folk, country, and soul, with notable works including 'Trouble' and 'Gossip in the Grain'. He is known for his distinctive husky voice and heartfelt performances.

10-14.birthdayZh: 10月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾交付两张专辑的暖意：《Gossip in the Grain》像谷仓里晒透的阳光，把民谣的粗粝灵魂揉进你的掌纹；《Out from Where Out》则从寂静深处升起实验的脉搏，证明混乱里也能跳着舞开出花来。你降生的日子，连音符都学会了在碎片中寻找完整的歌。
10-14.birthdayEn: October 14 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Out from Out Where* by Amon Tobin, a swirling, adventurous soundscape that mirrors the beautiful complexity of your spirit. And like *Gossip in the Grain*, there’s a soft, honest warmth in your presence that feels like a quiet sunrise. You carry that rare magic—a blend of depth and light. May your year ahead be as richly textured as these melodies, full of discovery, tenderness, and songs that feel like home. Happy birthday.

items.name: Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo
items.descriptionZh: 这张作品是法国说唱先驱MC Solaar的首张专辑，融合了爵士、灵魂乐与嘻哈元素，以流畅的法语押韵和诗意的社会观察著称。专辑中的《Bouge de là》成为经典，奠定了其优雅而富有深度的风格。
items.descriptionEn: This debut album by French rap pioneer MC Solaar blends jazz, soul, and hip-hop, featuring smooth French rhymes and poetic social commentary. Tracks like 'Bouge de là' became classics, establishing his elegant and profound style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于巴黎，MC Solaar与制作人Jimmy Jay合作，在预算有限的情况下完成了这张作品。其中《Bouge de là》的采样来自美国爵士乐，因版权问题在发行后一度引发争议，但最终成为法国嘻哈史上的里程碑。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in Paris with producer Jimmy Jay on a limited budget, the album's sample for 'Bouge de là' from American jazz initially caused copyright disputes but became a milestone in French hip-hop history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为法国嘻哈音乐的奠基之作，将法语说唱推向主流，影响了随后一代法国说唱歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered a foundational work of French hip-hop, it brought French rap to the mainstream and influenced a generation of French rappers.
items.artistIntroZh: MC Solaar（原名Claude M'Barali）是塞内加尔裔法国说唱歌手，以诗意的歌词和爵士嘻哈风格闻名。代表作包括《Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo》和《Prose Combat》，是法国嘻哈黄金时代的核心人物。
items.artistIntroEn: MC Solaar (born Claude M'Barali) is a Senegalese-French rapper known for poetic lyrics and jazz-hip-hop style. Key works include 'Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo' and 'Prose Combat,' a central figure in French hip-hop's golden age.

items.name: Jackson 5 Christmas Album
items.descriptionZh: 这张圣诞专辑融合了流行、灵魂乐和乡村元素，由杰克逊五兄弟演唱，充满欢快的节日氛围。专辑包括经典曲目《Santa Claus Is Coming to Town》和原创歌曲，展现了杰克逊兄弟的青春活力与和声魅力。
items.descriptionEn: This Christmas album blends pop, soul, and country elements, performed by the Jackson 5 with joyful holiday spirit. It includes classics like 'Santa Claus Is Coming to Town' and original songs, showcasing the brothers' youthful energy and harmonies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于Motown的 Hitsville U.S.A. 录音室，当时迈克尔·杰克逊年仅12岁，已展现出非凡的演唱天赋。这张专辑是杰克逊5人组在Motown旗下发行的首张节日专辑，制作人包括Berry Gordy，录制过程中迈克尔经常即兴添加高音和声。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Motown's Hitsville U.S.A. studio, 12-year-old Michael Jackson already showed extraordinary vocal talent. This was the Jackson 5's first holiday album under Motown, produced by Berry Gordy, with Michael often adding impromptu high harmonies.
items.artistIntroZh: 杰克逊五兄弟（The Jackson 5）是美国流行/灵魂乐组合，由杰克逊家族五兄弟组成，以欢快的曲风和迈克尔·杰克逊的童星魅力闻名。代表作包括《I Want You Back》《ABC》，是Motown史上最成功的少年组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 is an American pop/soul group formed by the Jackson family brothers, known for upbeat tunes and Michael Jackson's child star charisma. Hits include 'I Want You Back' and 'ABC,' one of Motown's most successful teen groups.

10-15.birthdayZh: 10月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo》——播种风的人，终将收割自己的节奏。你也是那阵风，带着《Jackson 5 Christmas Album》里不褪色的欢快与光亮，在生命的四季里始终唱着暖意。有些日子因你而特别，就像旋律找到了懂它的人。
10-15.birthdayEn: October 15 is your birthday. Like MC Solaar’s debut album, *Qui sème le vent récolte le tempo*, may your day sow seeds of rhythm and joy that grow into a harvest of beautiful memories. And just as the *Jackson 5 Christmas Album* wraps the world in warmth and harmony, may your year ahead be wrapped in love, surprise, and the kind of happiness that feels like a holiday for the heart. A day as bright as you—celebrate it fully, and let the music of your life play on.

items.name: A Christmas Album
items.descriptionZh: 这张圣诞专辑以芭芭拉·史翠珊标志性的流行唱腔演绎经典节日歌曲，编曲华丽，弦乐���合唱交织，营造温馨而庄重的氛围。专辑包括《Jingle Bells》《Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas》等标准曲目。
items.descriptionEn: This Christmas album features Barbra Streisand's iconic pop vocals on classic holiday songs, with lush arrangements of strings and choirs creating a warm, reverent atmosphere. Tracks include 'Jingle Bells' and 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas.'
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1967年，由制作人Robert Mersey操刀，在纽约的CBS录音室完成。史翠珊当时已凭借《Funny Girl》成名，她坚持在专辑中加入一首意第绪语歌曲《My Favorite Things》的变奏，以纪念她的犹太背景。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in 1967 at CBS Studios in New York, produced by Robert Mersey. Streisand, already famous from 'Funny Girl,' insisted on including a Yiddish variation of 'My Favorite Things' to honor her Jewish heritage.
items.artistIntroZh: 芭芭拉·史翠珊（Barbra Streisand）是美国歌手、演员和导演，以跨流派的声音和戏剧性表演闻名。代表作包括《People》《Evergreen》，是20世纪最畅销的女艺人之一，获得奥斯卡、格莱美等多项大奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Barbra Streisand is an American singer, actress, and director known for her cross-genre voice and dramatic performances. Hits include 'People' and 'Evergreen,' one of the best-selling female artists of the 20th century, with multiple Oscars and Grammys.

10-16.birthdayZh: 10月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为它披上节日的第一层光——芭芭拉·史翠珊的《A Christmas Album》降生，用华丽嗓音守护着温暖与团聚的承诺。你带着这样一颗圣诞般丰盈的心来到人间，所有属于你的季节，都值得被盛大的爱意开场。生日快乐。
10-16.birthdayEn: October 16 is your birthday — a day that gifted the world Barbra Streisand’s ‘A Christmas Album,’ a celebration of warmth and timeless cheer. Like that album’s spirit, may your heart always find room for joy, tradition, and the sweet glow of holiday magic, even when the season feels distant. You are a classic melody in the making, a note of light that keeps the world a little brighter. Happy birthday — may your year unfold like a beautiful song, full of harmony and surprise.

items.name: Playing the Angel
items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是Depeche Mode回归暗黑电子流行风格的力作，融合工业节拍、合成器旋律和忧郁的歌词。专辑中的《Precious》《A Pain That I'm Used To》展现了乐队对情感创伤和救赎的深刻探讨。
items.descriptionEn: This album marks Depeche Mode's return to dark electronic pop, blending industrial beats, synth melodies, and melancholic lyrics. Tracks like 'Precious' and 'A Pain That I'm Used To' explore emotional trauma and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于纽约和伦敦，主唱Dave Gahan在录制期间刚刚戒除毒瘾，歌词中充满个人挣扎与重生主题。制作人Ben Hillier与乐队合作，使用了大量模拟合成器，以营造复古而冷峻的音色。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in New York and London, vocalist Dave Gahan had recently overcome drug addiction during recording, with lyrics reflecting personal struggle and rebirth. Producer Ben Hillier used analog synthesizers to create a retro, cold sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被乐评视为Depeche Mode在2000年代的最佳作品之一，巩固了他们在电子流行乐坛的先锋地���，并影响了后续的电子摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: Considered one of Depeche Mode's best 2000s albums, it solidified their pioneering status in electronic pop and influenced subsequent electronic rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Depeche Mode是英国电子乐队，成立于1980年，以暗黑合成器流行和工业电子风格闻名。代表作包括《Enjoy the Silence》《Personal Jesus》，是电子音乐史上最具影响力的乐队之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Depeche Mode is a British electronic band formed in 1980, known for dark synth-pop and industrial electronic style. Hits include 'Enjoy the Silence' and 'Personal Jesus,' one of the most influential bands in electronic music history.

10-17.birthdayZh: 10月17日，是你的生日。这一天，Depeche Mode发行了《Playing the Angel》，那张在冰冷电子节拍中藏着炽热灵魂的专辑。就像它提醒我们的：黑暗可以包裹力量，工业感下仍有心跳。你也是——无论世界多喧嚣，心底总有一片暖光，稳稳托住自己。生日快乐，这世界因你而多了一首值得循环的歌。
10-17.birthdayEn: October 17 is your birthday. On this day, the world received Depeche Mode’s “Playing the Angel,” a testament to rising from darkness into luminous resolve. Like that album’s spirit, may your year be one of bold returns and quiet strength—a melody that finds light even in shadow. You are a living anthem of resilience and grace. May the candles on your cake burn as brightly as the joy you bring to others. Here’s to you, and to the beautiful song only you can write.

items.descriptionZh: 这张专辑是瑞典独立流行二人组Suburban Kids with Biblical Names的第二张作品，融合了低保真、独立流行和电子元素，以俏皮的旋律和讽刺性的歌词为特色。专辑短小精悍，充满实验性的DIY精神。
items.descriptionEn: This is the second album by Swedish indie pop duo Suburban Kids with Biblical Names, blending lo-fi, indie pop, and electronic elements, with playful melodies and ironic lyrics. The album is concise and experimental, embodying a DIY spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑由成员Johan和Peter在瑞典斯德哥尔摩的家中录音室录制，使用简陋设备。他们自称是“卧室制作人”，专辑中的《Loop Duplicate My Heart》采样自老式电子游戏，体现了他们对流行文化的戏谑态度。
items.storiesEn: Recorded by members Johan and Peter in their home studio in Stockholm, Sweden, using basic equipment. They called themselves 'bedroom producers,' and 'Loop Duplicate My Heart' samples old video games, reflecting their playful take on pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Suburban Kids with Biblical Names是瑞典独立流行二人组，由Johan和Peter组成，以低保真、俏皮和实验性风格闻名。代表作包括《#3》和《2004》，在独立音乐圈内拥有小众粉丝群。
items.artistIntroEn: Suburban Kids with Biblical Names is a Swedish indie pop duo formed by Johan and Peter, known for lo-fi, playful, and experimental style. Key works include '#3' and '2004,' with a cult following in the indie scene.

10-18.birthdayZh: 10月18日，是你的生日。这天曾发行《#3》，一张用低保真和古怪采样拼贴出俏皮与勇气的专辑，像在提醒你：生命不必完美，混乱中自有诗意。愿你的新岁，如这支瑞典二人组一样，带着顽皮的灵魂去碰撞世界，在每一声杂音里听出属于自己的旋律。
10-18.birthdayEn: October 18 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed the playful, inventive spirit of "#3" by Suburban Kids with Biblical Names, a second album that dances with whimsy and quiet brilliance. Like that music, may your year be a joyful, unexpected melody—layered with moments of light and gentle surprise. You are a song all your own, and today the universe celebrates your rare, beautiful refrain. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, full of wonder and warmth.

items.name: The Boys
items.descriptionZh: 《The Boys》是韩国女团少女时代于2011年发行的正规三辑，主打强势电子流行与舞曲风格，融合了嘻哈元素与极具冲击力的合成器编曲。专辑以“Girls’ Generation”的国际化野心为核心，展现了成员们成熟自信的魅力，其中英文版主打歌更瞄准全球市场，成为K-Pop进军海外的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: "The Boys" is the third studio album by South Korean girl group Girls' Generation, released in 2011. It features a powerful electronic pop and dance sound, blending hip-hop elements with striking synth arrangements. The album showcases the members' mature and confident charisma, with the English version of the title track targeting the global market, marking a milestone in K-Pop's international expansion.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《The Boys》由制作人Teddy Riley操刀，他曾为迈克尔·杰克逊制作音乐。录制期间，少女时代成员为适应高强度的舞蹈编排，每天练习超过12小时。MV在韩国和海外多个地点取景，耗资巨大，其中成员们身穿的华丽服装和道具均由国际团队设计，展现了顶级制作水准。
items.storiesEn: The title track "The Boys" was produced by Teddy Riley, who had previously worked with Michael Jackson. During recording, the members practiced choreography for over 12 hours daily to master the intense dance routines. The music video was shot at multiple locations in Korea and abroad with a massive budget, featuring costumes and props designed by an international team, reflecting top-tier production.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Boys》是K-Pop女团首次大规模进军美国市场的尝试，专辑英文版打入Billboard 200，并推动了K-Pop在西方主流媒体的传播，为后续K-Pop全球化奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Boys" marked the first major attempt by a K-Pop girl group to enter the US market, with the English version charting on the Billboard 200. It boosted K-Pop's presence in Western mainstream media, laying the groundwork for the genre's global expansion.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的女子组合，以清新活力与完美和声著称。她们的代表作包括《Gee》《Genie》《I Got a Boy》等，是K-Pop史上最具影响力的女团之一，被誉为“国民女团”。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, known for their fresh energy and impeccable harmonies. Their hits include "Gee", "Genie", and "I Got a Boy". They are one of the most influential girl groups in K-Pop history, often called the "Nation's Girl Group".

10-19.birthdayZh: 10月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《The Boys》的节拍——不是征服，是少女时代宣告“强势女性”的自信光芒。愿你也如那专辑般，在属于自己的旋律里蓬勃生长，不惧成为人群中最亮的一颗星。每一圈年轮，都是勇敢谱写的新篇章。
10-19.birthdayEn: October 19 is your birthday. On this date, the world was blessed with the fierce, unstoppable spirit of Girls’ Generation’s “The Boys,” a celebration of strength and unity. Like that album, may your year be filled with powerful, joyful rhythms and the love of a loyal circle. Let every new chapter feel as bold and hopeful as a chart-topping anthem. You are a wonderful song in the making—may your day be luminous, your heart light, and the melody of your life endlessly uplifting.

items.name: Breathless
items.descriptionZh: 《Breathless》是美国萨克斯演奏家Kenny G于1992年发行的录音室专辑，属于当代爵士与轻爵士风格，以柔顺的旋律和浪漫的即兴演奏为特色。专辑中Kenny G标志性的高音萨克斯音色贯穿始终，营造出舒缓而深情的氛围，是90年代New Age与流行爵士融合的典范之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Breathless" is a studio album by American saxophonist Kenny G, released in 1992. It falls under contemporary jazz and smooth jazz, characterized by flowing melodies and romantic improvisation. The album features Kenny G's signature soprano saxophone tone throughout, creating a soothing and heartfelt atmosphere, exemplifying the 1990s fusion of New Age and pop jazz.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Breathless》原本是Kenny G为妻子创作的浪漫旋律，录制时他尝试了多种萨克斯音色，最终选择用高音萨克斯吹奏出长达数分钟的无间断乐句。这张专辑在录制过程中使用了当时最先进的数字录音技术，Kenny G甚至亲自参与混音，以确保每一个音符的纯净度。
items.storiesEn: The title track "Breathless" was originally a romantic melody composed by Kenny G for his wife. During recording, he experimented with various saxophone tones, eventually using a soprano sax to perform a seamless, minutes-long phrase. The album employed state-of-the-art digital recording technology, with Kenny G personally involved in mixing to ensure the purity of every note.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Breathless》是史上最畅销的纯器乐专辑之一，全球销量超过1200万张，巩固了Kenny G作为当代爵士跨界巨星的地位，并推动了轻爵士在主流市场的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Breathless" is one of the best-selling instrumental albums of all time, with over 12 million copies worldwide, solidifying Kenny G's status as a crossover smooth jazz superstar and boosting the popularity of smooth jazz in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Kenny G（肯尼·基）是美国萨克斯演奏家，以高音萨克斯的柔美音色闻名。他是当代爵士与流行跨界领域的代表人物，代表作包括《Songbird》《Breathless》和《Forever in Love》，曾获格莱美奖，全球唱片销量超过7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Kenny G is an American saxophonist renowned for his smooth soprano saxophone sound. A leading figure in contemporary jazz and pop crossover, his hits include "Songbird", "Breathless", and "Forever in Love". A Grammy winner, he has sold over 75 million records worldwide.

items.name: Frank
items.descriptionZh: 《Frank》是英国歌手Amy Winehouse于2003年发行的首张录音室专辑，融合了R&B、灵魂乐与爵士元素，以其深邃的歌词和复古的编曲为特色。专辑展现了Amy早熟的创作才华，内容涉及爱情、心碎与个人挣扎，嗓音中饱含情感张力，被乐评界视为新时代灵魂乐复兴的先锋之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Frank" is the debut studio album by British singer Amy Winehouse, released in 2003. It blends R&B, soul, and jazz elements, characterized by its introspective lyrics and vintage-inspired arrangements. The album showcases Amy's precocious songwriting talent, addressing love, heartbreak, and personal struggles, with a voice full of emotional intensity, regarded as a pioneering work of the new soul revival.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Frank》源自Amy对爵士歌手Frank Sinatra的致敬，也暗含她直率坦诚的个性。录制过程中，Amy坚持采用现场乐队同期录音，以捕捉最真实的情感。制作人Salaam Remi曾透露，Amy在录制《Stronger Than Me》时即兴改写了部分歌词，展现出惊人的创作直觉。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Frank" pays homage to jazz singer Frank Sinatra, while also reflecting Amy's own blunt and honest personality. During recording, Amy insisted on live band tracking to capture authentic emotions. Producer Salaam Remi revealed that Amy improvised and rewrote parts of the lyrics for "Stronger Than Me" on the spot, demonstrating her remarkable creative instincts.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Frank》为Amy Winehouse赢得了全球关注，并获得了水星奖提名，奠定了她作为灵魂乐复兴领军人物的地位，影响了后来的Adele、Duffy等英国灵魂乐女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Frank" earned Amy Winehouse international attention and a Mercury Prize nomination, establishing her as a leading figure in the soul revival and influencing later British soul singers like Adele and Duffy.
items.artistIntroZh: Amy Winehouse（艾米·怀恩豪斯）是英国灵魂乐与R&B歌手，以浑厚而富有表现力的嗓音和复古风格著称。代表作包括《Rehab》《Back to Black》和《Valerie》，曾获多项格莱美奖，是21世纪初灵魂乐复兴的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse was a British soul and R&B singer known for her powerful, expressive voice and retro style. Her hits include "Rehab", "Back to Black", and "Valerie". A multiple Grammy winner, she was an iconic figure of the early 2000s soul revival.

items.name: Erotica
items.descriptionZh: 《Erotica》是美国歌手Madonna于1992年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合了流行、舞曲与实验性电子元素，主题大胆探讨性、权力与欲望。专辑以黑暗而前卫的编曲为特色，结合了嘻哈、工业舞曲和氛围音乐，歌词直白且充满挑衅意味，是Madonna艺术转型中极具争议性的作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Erotica" is the fifth studio album by American singer Madonna, released in 1992. It blends pop, dance, and experimental electronic elements, boldly exploring themes of sexuality, power, and desire. The album features dark, avant-garde arrangements incorporating hip-hop, industrial dance, and ambient music, with explicit and provocative lyrics, marking a controversial artistic transformation for Madonna.
items.storiesZh: 专辑与Madonna的同名咖啡桌书《Sex》同步发行，书中包含大量情色照片，引发巨大争议。录制期间，Madonna与制作人Shep Pettibone在纽约录音室连续工作数月，她亲自参与每一首歌的混音细节。由于内容敏感，多家电台拒绝播放专辑中的单曲，但专辑仍因话题性获得极高销量。
items.storiesEn: The album was released alongside Madonna's controversial coffee table book "Sex", which featured explicit photographs. During recording, Madonna worked for months with producer Shep Pettibone in a New York studio, personally overseeing every mix detail. Due to its sensitive content, many radio stations refused to play singles from the album, yet it achieved high sales due to the controversy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Erotica》挑战了主流流行音乐的道德边界，推动了性解放议题在大众文化中的讨论，其前卫的音乐制作也影响了90年代后期的电子舞曲和另类流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Erotica" challenged the moral boundaries of mainstream pop music, sparking discussions on sexual liberation in popular culture. Its avant-garde production also influenced electronic dance and alternative pop in the late 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Madonna（麦当娜）是美国歌手、词曲作者与演员，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会禁忌著称，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》《Vogue》《Hung Up》，是全球唱片销量最高的女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known as the "Queen of Pop". Renowned for constantly reinventing her music and challenging social taboos, her hits include "Like a Virgin", "Vogue", and "Hung Up". She is one of the best-selling female artists of all time.

10-20.birthdayZh: 10月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾吹响《Breathless》的萨克斯风，像呼吸般轻柔地包裹住所有不安；也曾在《Erotica》的节拍里勇敢探索自我边界。你活成这两种力量的融合——既有柔韧的温柔，又有不妥协的锋利。愿新的一岁，你始终记得：生日这天，连空气都曾为你的到来，谱写过浪漫的旋律。
10-20.birthdayEn: October 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us *Breathless* by Kenny G, a melody of serene, flowing hope, and *Frank* by Amy Winehouse, a soulful, unapologetic truth. Like these albums, may your year be a balance of peaceful sighs and bold, heartfelt songs. Let the rhythm of your own spirit carry you forward, fearless and tender, into another beautiful chapter. You are a rare and wonderful note in this world's symphony. Happy birthday.

items.name: Map of the Human Soul
items.descriptionZh: 《Map of the Human Soul》是韩国嘻哈组合Epik High于2003年发行的首张专辑，融合了地下嘻哈、爵士与古典元素，以其深刻的歌词和实验性的编曲为特色。专辑以“人类灵魂地图”为概念，探讨社会现实、青春迷茫与自我反思，奠定了Epik High在韩国嘻哈界的艺术地位，被视为韩国嘻哈史上具有里程碑意义的作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Map of the Human Soul" is the debut album by South Korean hip-hop group Epik High, released in 2003. It blends underground hip-hop with jazz and classical elements, characterized by its profound lyrics and experimental arrangements. The album, themed as a "map of the human soul", explores social realities, youthful confusion, and self-reflection, establishing Epik High's artistic status in Korean hip-hop and regarded as a milestone in the genre's history.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，成员Tablo刚从斯坦福大学毕业，他坚持将英文诗句与韩语说唱结合，挑战当时韩国嘻哈的惯例。由于预算有限，他们租用了一个小录音室，Mithra Jin甚至用家用麦克风录制了部分人声。专辑封面由成员亲自设计，手绘的抽象图案象征人类情感的复杂性。
items.storiesEn: During recording, member Tablo had just graduated from Stanford University and insisted on blending English poetry with Korean rap, challenging Korean hip-hop conventions. With a limited budget, they rented a small studio, and Mithra Jin even recorded some vocals using a home microphone. The album cover was designed by the members themselves, with hand-drawn abstract patterns symbolizing the complexity of human emotions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Map of the Human Soul》将韩国嘻哈从单纯的舞曲导向转向更富文学性和社会批判性的方向，启发了后来的韩国独立嘻哈音乐人，是韩国嘻哈艺术化的重要起点。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Map of the Human Soul" shifted Korean hip-hop from a purely dance-oriented style toward a more literary and socially critical direction, inspiring later independent Korean hip-hop artists and marking a key starting point for the genre's artistic evolution in Korea.
items.artistIntroZh: Epik High是韩国嘻哈组合，由Tablo、Mithra Jin和DJ Tukutz组成，以诗意的歌词和融合多种音乐风格著称。代表作包括《Fly》《One》和《Love Love Love》，是韩国嘻哈界最具影响力的团体之一，被誉为“嘻哈诗人”。
items.artistIntroEn: Epik High is a South Korean hip-hop group consisting of Tablo, Mithra Jin, and DJ Tukutz. Known for their poetic lyrics and genre-blending sound, their hits include "Fly", "One", and "Love Love Love". They are one of the most influential groups in Korean hip-hop, often called "hip-hop poets".

10-21.birthdayZh: 10月21日，是你的生日。当这世界有人印刻下《Map of the Human Soul》的起点，你也带着自己的灵魂地图降生。那里面藏着嘻哈的勇敢、爵士的柔软，还有属于你独有的旋律。愿你始终相信，自己如同一张未完成的珍贵专辑，每一岁都在谱写更温暖、更辽阔的和声。生日快乐。
10-21.birthdayEn: October 21 is your birthday—a date marked by bold beginnings. On this day, Epik High released "Map of the Human Soul," a debut album that dared to blend hip-hop with raw emotion, mapping the beauty and struggle of being alive. Like that music, your presence is a unique fusion of strength and tenderness. May your year unfold with the same courage to start something new, layering every beat of your journey with hope, depth, and the pulse of your own unfiltered soul. You are a living masterpiece.

items.name: Until One
items.descriptionZh: 《Until One》是瑞典浩室黑手党（Swedish House Mafia）的首张混音专辑，融合了Electro House、Progressive House等电子音乐元素。这张作品以高能量的节拍、富有感染力的旋律和精妙的混音过渡为核心特色，展现了三位成员在舞池中的强大掌控力，堪称2010年代电子舞曲场景的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: "Until One" is the debut compilation album by Swedish House Mafia, blending Electro House and Progressive House elements. It features high-energy beats, infectious melodies, and seamless mixing transitions, showcasing the trio's mastery of the dancefloor and marking a landmark release in the 2010s electronic dance music scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行标志着Swedish House Mafia从独立DJ组合正式成为超级团体。录制过程中，三人（Axwell、Steve Angello、Sebastian Ingrosso）在迈阿密Ultra音乐节期间不断调整曲目顺序，最终版本中的混音片段如"One"和"Miami 2 Ibiza"的过渡是在演出前最后一刻才确定下来的。
items.storiesEn: The album marked Swedish House Mafia's transition from a loose DJ collective to a formal supergroup. During recording, the trio (Axwell, Steve Angello, Sebastian Ingrosso) constantly rearranged track order while at Miami's Ultra Music Festival, finalizing the transition between "One" and "Miami 2 Ibiza" just moments before their set.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Until One》推动了电子舞曲在主流音乐市场的爆发，为后续EDM全球热潮奠定了基础。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Until One" helped propel electronic dance music into the mainstream, laying the groundwork for the global EDM boom that followed.
items.artistIntroZh: Swedish House Mafia是瑞典电子音乐超级组合，由Axwell、Steve Angello和Sebastian Ingrosso组成。他们以Progressive House和Electro House风格著称，代表作包括《Don't You Worry Child》和《One》。
items.artistIntroEn: Swedish House Mafia is a Swedish electronic music supergroup consisting of Axwell, Steve Angello, and Sebastian Ingrosso. They are known for their progressive house and electro house sound, with hits like "Don't You Worry Child" and "One."

items.name: Stripped
items.descriptionZh: 《Stripped》是美国流行天后克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉的第四张录音室专辑，风格涵盖流行、灵魂、R&B和拉丁元素。这张作品以大胆的自我表达、情感直白的歌词和极具爆发力的嗓音为核心特色，展现了从少女偶像到成熟艺术家的蜕变��
items.descriptionEn: "Stripped" is the fourth studio album by American pop icon Christina Aguilera, blending pop, soul, R&B, and Latin influences. It is characterized by bold self-expression, emotionally raw lyrics, and powerful vocal performances, marking her transformation from teen idol to mature artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，克里斯蒂娜与制作人Linda Perry在录音室中产生了强烈化学反应，首支单曲《Beautiful》几乎是一气呵成。Perry回忆说，克里斯蒂娜在录制时情绪激动，甚至一度落泪，这首歌后来成为LGBTQ+群体的重要颂歌。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Christina developed strong chemistry with producer Linda Perry. The lead single "Beautiful" was completed almost in one take; Perry recalled Christina becoming emotional and crying while recording, and the song later became an important anthem for the LGBTQ+ community.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Stripped》因其对女性自主和性解放的坦诚讨论，对2000年代初的流行文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Stripped" had a profound impact on early 2000s pop culture for its candid discussions of female empowerment and sexual liberation.
items.artistIntroZh: 克里斯蒂娜·阿奎莱拉是美国流行歌手、词曲作者，以强大的嗓音和多变的音乐风格闻名。���表作��括《Genie in a Bottle》、《Beautiful》和《Fighter》。
items.artistIntroEn: Christina Aguilera is an American singer and songwriter known for her powerful voice and versatile musical style. Her hits include "Genie in a Bottle," "Beautiful," and "Fighter."

items.name: Heal
items.descriptionZh: 《Heal》是瑞典流行歌手Loreen的第二张录音室专辑，风格融合了流行、电子和氛围音乐。这张作品以其空灵的合成器音色、深邃的节奏和充满内省意味的歌词为核心特色，延续了她在《Euphoria》中建立的梦幻电子流行风格。
items.descriptionEn: "Heal" is the second studio album by Swedish pop singer Loreen, blending pop, electronic, and ambient music. It features ethereal synth textures, deep rhythms, and introspective lyrics, continuing the dreamy electropop style she established with "Euphoria."
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题《Heal》源于Loreen在创作期间经历的个人疗愈过程。她曾透露，大部分歌曲是在瑞典乡间的一间小木屋中录制的，远离城市喧嚣，以便专注于情感的表达。首支单曲《Crying Out Your Name》的歌词灵感来自她与一位朋友的深刻对话。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Heal" stems from Loreen's personal healing process during its creation. She revealed that most songs were recorded in a small cabin in the Swedish countryside, away from city noise, to focus on emotional expression. The lyrics of lead single "Crying Out Your Name" were inspired by a deep conversation with a friend.
items.artistIntroZh: Loreen是瑞典流行歌手、词曲作者，以电子流行和氛围音乐风格著称。2012年凭《Euphoria》赢得欧洲歌唱大赛冠军，代表作还包括《My Heart Is Refusing Me》和《Statements》。
items.artistIntroEn: Loreen is a Swedish pop singer and songwriter known for her electropop and ambient music style. She won the Eurovision Song Contest in 2012 with "Euphoria," and her other hits include "My Heart Is Refusing Me" and "Statements."

10-22.birthdayZh: 10月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾用音乐留下印记——瑞典浩室黑手党在《Until One》里将散落的节拍合成澎湃的浪潮，Loreen在《Heal》中让冷冽的合成器长出温暖的弦。而你，也像这些专辑一样，把走过的时间揉成自己的韵律。愿你在新的一岁里，始终拥有融合与疗愈的力量，成为自己生命里最动人的旋律。
10-22.birthdayEn: October 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Christina Aguilera’s *Stripped* and Loreen’s *Heal*—both carrying a spirit of bold vulnerability and quiet strength. May your year ahead echo their essence: stripping away what no longer serves you, and healing into your most radiant self. Like a record spinning warmth into the air, may each month bring you a melody of joy, a rhythm of peace, and a chorus of love that swells with every sunrise. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Primera Fila
items.descriptionZh: 《Primera Fila》是墨西哥流行歌手Fey的首张现场专辑，风格以拉丁流行和抒情摇滚为主。这张作品以其精致的弦乐编排、Fey标志性的甜美嗓音和现场演唱的真实感为核心特色，重新诠释了她90年代的多首经典曲目。
items.descriptionEn: "Primera Fila" is the first live album by Mexican pop singer Fey, featuring Latin pop and soft rock styles. It is characterized by elegant string arrangements, Fey's signature sweet vocals, and the authenticity of live performance, reimagining many of her 1990s classics.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑在墨西哥城的一个小型剧院录制，采用不插电形式。Fey在录制前特意进行了数月的声乐训练，以应对高难度的现场演唱。录制当天，她因紧张在演唱《Media Naranja》时差点忘词，但凭借经验即兴化解，这段被保留在最终版本中。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded in a small theater in Mexico City in an unplugged format. Fey underwent months of vocal training beforehand to prepare for the demanding live performance. On recording day, she nearly forgot lyrics during "Media Naranja" but improvised her way through, and that take was kept in the final release.
items.artistIntroZh: Fey是墨西哥流行歌手、词曲作者，90年代拉丁流行音乐的代表人物之一。以甜美嗓音和舞曲风格闻名，代表作包括《Media Naranja》和《Azúcar Amargo》。
items.artistIntroEn: Fey is a Mexican pop singer and songwriter, a leading figure in 1990s Latin pop. She is known for her sweet voice and dance-pop style, with hits like "Media Naranja" and "Azúcar Amargo."

10-23.birthdayZh: 10月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Primera Fila》的现场掌声而亮起灯光——像你一样，站在自己的舞台上，用原声吉他和弦乐重新演绎旧日时光，把曾经唱成一条温柔的河流。你从不必回头，因为每一个转身，都在成为更完整的自己。生日快乐，愿你继续在生命的首排，为自己再唱一遍。
10-23.birthdayEn: October 23 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed your light, and gave us albums like Fey’s Primera Fila, where every note is a heart laid bare in a live embrace. Just as that album captures the raw magic of a moment, your life is a beautiful, unfiltered song—brave, real, and full of grace. May this new year bring you the same warmth that a front-row seat to your own joy would feel. Shine on, birthday star.

items.name: The Abbey Road Sessions
items.descriptionZh: 《The Abbey Road Sessions》是澳大利亚流行天后凯莉·米洛的精选翻唱专辑，风格涵盖流行、管弦乐和抒情。这张作品以在传奇的艾比路录音室录制、采用管弦乐重新编曲其经典曲目为核心特色，展现了凯莉声音中更为深情和成熟的一面。
items.descriptionEn: "The Abbey Road Sessions" is a compilation album by Australian pop icon Kylie Minogue, featuring orchestral reworkings of her classic hits. Recorded at the legendary Abbey Road Studios, it showcases a more intimate and mature side of Kylie's vocals, blending pop with lush string arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦著名的艾比路录音室，凯莉与一支完整的管弦乐队合作。她曾透露，在录制《Can't Get You Out of My Head》的新版本时，由于管弦乐编曲过于宏大，她不得不调整演唱方式，以更轻柔的声音与乐器融合。制作人Steve Anderson将这次经历形容为"重塑经典"。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded at London's famous Abbey Road Studios with a full orchestra. Kylie revealed that for the new version of "Can't Get You Out of My Head," the grand orchestral arrangement required her to adjust her vocal delivery to a softer tone. Producer Steve Anderson described the experience as "reimagining classics."
items.artistIntroZh: 凯莉·米洛是澳大利亚流行歌手、词曲作者和演员，被誉为"流行公主"。以舞曲流行和性感形象闻名，代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》和《Spinning Around》。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian pop singer, songwriter, and actress, often called the "Princess of Pop." Known for her dance-pop sound and glamorous image, her hits include "Can't Get You Out of My Head" and "Spinning Around."

10-24.birthdayZh: 10月24日，是你的生日。这天，凯莉·米洛在艾比路录音室重新奏响《The Abbey Road Sessions》，那些曾被舞曲点燃的旋律，如今化作温柔的弦乐，像生命里所有热烈最终沉淀为从容的光。你也是一张重新录制的专辑——把过往的喧嚣谱成安宁，把跌倒的节拍写成呼吸。生日快乐，愿你永远拥有从旧曲里翻出新生力量的勇气。
10-24.birthdayEn: October 24 is your birthday, a date that echoes with the grace of *The Abbey Road Sessions*, where Kylie Minogue’s classics are reborn in orchestral warmth. Like that album, may your day feel like a beautiful reprise—every note of your life woven into something richer, more luminous. You are a living greatest hits collection: full of courage, tenderness, and melody. Let this year be your symphonic movement, where each moment rises with a new, hopeful chord. Happy birthday—may your spirit always find its perfect arrangement.

items.name: Bedtime Stories
items.descriptionZh: 《Bedtime Stories》是麦当娜1994年发行的第六张录音室专辑，融合了流行、R&B和灵魂乐元素，呈现出更为柔和、内敛的成人抒情风格。专辑以性感而梦幻的氛围为核心，展现了她在经历争议后转向成熟与自省的艺术探索。
items.descriptionEn: "Bedtime Stories" is Madonna's sixth studio album released in 1994, blending pop, R&B, and soul elements to present a softer, more introspective adult contemporary style. The album centers on a sensual and dreamy atmosphere, showcasing her artistic exploration toward maturity and self-reflection after controversy.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，麦当娜与制作人Babyface、Dallas Austin等人合作，刻意降低声线以营造慵懒氛围。主打歌《Secret》的MV因涉及跨种族恋情和宗教意象引发热议，但麦当娜坚持艺术表达，最终成为她90年代中期转型的标志性作品。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Madonna collaborated with producers like Babyface and Dallas Austin, deliberately lowering her vocal range to create a languid mood. The music video for lead single "Secret" sparked debate for its interracial romance and religious imagery, but Madonna stood by her artistic expression, making it a landmark work of her mid-90s transformation.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着麦当娜从争议性形象向成熟艺术家的关键转型，影响了90年代中后期流行女歌手对R&B与灵魂乐的融合尝试。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked Madonna's key transition from a controversial image to a mature artist, influencing mid-to-late 90s female pop singers' fusion of R&B and soul.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna），美国歌手、词曲作者及文化偶像，被誉为“流行女王”。她以不断革新音乐风格和挑战社会规范著称，代表作包括《Like a Virgin》《Vogue》《Hung Up》等，全球销量超3亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American singer, songwriter, and cultural icon known as the "Queen of Pop." Renowned for constantly reinventing her music style and challenging social norms, her hits include "Like a Virgin," "Vogue," and "Hung Up," with over 300 million records sold worldwide.

items.name: Speak Now
items.descriptionZh: 《Speak Now》是泰勒·斯威夫特2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，融合民谣与乡村流行风格，以原声吉他为核心编曲，歌词充满叙事性。专辑全部由斯威夫特独立创作，聚焦个人情感与成长经历，展现了她细腻的创作才华。
items.descriptionEn: "Speak Now" is Taylor Swift's third studio album released in 2010, blending folk and country pop styles with acoustic guitar-driven arrangements and narrative lyrics. The album was entirely self-written by Swift, focusing on personal emotions and growth, showcasing her meticulous songwriting talent.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Speak Now》源自婚礼上“如有异议请现在提出”的传统用语，灵感来自斯威夫特对错失表达时机的思考。录制过程中，她坚持在纳什维尔录制以保持乡村根基，并邀请乡村传奇歌手Vince Gill参与和声。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Speak Now" originates from the wedding tradition of "speak now or forever hold your peace," inspired by Swift's reflections on missed opportunities to express herself. During recording, she insisted on recording in Nashville to maintain her country roots and invited country legend Vince Gill to contribute backing vocals.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周销量超100万张，巩固了斯威夫特作为乡村流行跨界巨星的地位，并激励新一代创作歌手坚持自主创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 1 million copies in its first week, solidifying Swift's status as a country-pop crossover superstar and inspiring a new generation of singer-songwriters to prioritize self-written works.
items.artistIntroZh: 泰勒·斯威夫特（Taylor Swift），美国创作歌手，以叙事性歌词和音乐风格多变著称。她从乡村音乐起步，后转向流行及民谣，代表作包括《Love Story》《Shake It Off》《Folklore》等，全球专辑销量超2亿张。
items.artistIntroEn: Taylor Swift is an American singer-songwriter known for her narrative lyrics and versatile music style. Starting in country music before transitioning to pop and folk, her hits include "Love Story," "Shake It Off," and "Folklore," with over 200 million albums sold worldwide.

items.name: Album
items.descriptionZh: 《Album》是波兰歌手Monika Brodka 2004年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了波兰民族音乐元素。专辑以其充满活力的旋律和Brodka独特的嗓音为特色，展现了她从选秀节目出道后的音乐潜力。
items.descriptionEn: "Album" is Polish singer Monika Brodka's debut studio album released in 2004, primarily pop rock with elements of Polish folk music. The album is characterized by energetic melodies and Brodka's distinctive vocals, showcasing her musical potential after emerging from a talent show.
items.storiesZh: Brodka因参加波兰版《偶像》节目获得亚军后迅速签约，专辑录制仅用三个月。主打歌《Ten》在波兰电台创下高播放纪录，但Brodka后来表示这张专辑过于商业化，与她后来的艺术方向不同。
items.storiesEn: Brodka signed a record deal shortly after finishing as runner-up on the Polish version of "Idol," and the album was recorded in just three months. The lead single "Ten" broke radio play records in Poland, but Brodka later admitted the album was too commercial and not aligned with her later artistic direction.
items.artistIntroZh: Monika Brodka，波兰歌手兼词曲作者，2004年因参加《波兰偶像》出道。她以流行摇滚和独立音乐风格著称，后期作品转向实验性和艺术流行，代表作包括《Ten》《Granda》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Monika Brodka is a Polish singer and songwriter who debuted in 2004 after appearing on "Polish Idol." Known for pop rock and indie music, her later work shifted toward experimental and art pop, with hits including "Ten" and "Granda."

10-25.birthdayZh: 10月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你准备好《Bedtime Stories》般的温柔暗涌，也赠予你《Speak Now》的勇气——不必等待，此刻就说出心底的话。你是夜晚轻声哼唱的歌，也是白昼果断启程的风。愿你在属于自己的时区里，像这两张专辑一样：柔软却有力，安静却自由。
10-25.birthdayEn: October 25 is your birthday, a date touched by the magic of creative worlds. Like Madonna's Bedtime Stories, may your year be wrapped in a soft, soulful rhythm, laced with dreams and quiet power. And just as Monika Brodka’s debut Album marks a bold, beautiful beginning, may this new chapter of your life unfold with courage and grace. You are a masterpiece in the making, and the world is lucky to turn the page with you. Happy, luminous birthday.

items.name: 18 Months
items.descriptionZh: 《18 Months》是Calvin Harris 2012年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格为电子流行和舞曲，融合了EDM、浩室和流行元素。专辑以密集的客座歌手阵容和强劲的舞池节拍为特色，标志着Harris从独立电子向主流流行乐坛的全面转型。
items.descriptionEn: "18 Months" is Calvin Harris's third studio album released in 2012, blending electronic pop and dance music with EDM, house, and pop elements. The album features a dense roster of guest vocalists and powerful dance-floor beats, marking Harris's full transition from indie electronic to mainstream pop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《18 Months》源于Harris为专辑创作和录制花费了18个月时间。单曲《We Found Love》与蕾哈娜合作，最初被多家厂牌拒绝，但最终成为全球大热，帮助Harris获得格莱美最佳舞曲录音奖。
items.storiesEn: The album title "18 Months" refers to the time Harris spent writing and recording the album. The single "We Found Love" featuring Rihanna was initially rejected by several labels but became a global hit, earning Harris a Grammy for Best Dance Recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑推动了EDM在主流流行音乐中的普及，确立了Calvin Harris作为电子流行跨界制作人的标杆地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album helped popularize EDM in mainstream pop music, establishing Calvin Harris as a benchmark for electronic pop crossover production.
items.artistIntroZh: Calvin Harris（卡尔文·哈里斯），苏格兰DJ、���片制作人及歌手，以融合电子舞曲与流行音乐著称。代表作包括《We Found Love》《Summer》《Feel So Close》等，曾获格莱美奖，是全球最畅销的电子音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Calvin Harris is a Scottish DJ, record producer, and singer known for blending electronic dance music with pop. His hits include "We Found Love," "Summer," and "Feel So Close." A Grammy winner, he is one of the world's best-selling electronic music artists.

items.name: Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian
items.descriptionZh: 《Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian》是Johnny Cash 1964年发行的概念专辑，聚焦美国原住民的历史苦难与不公。风格为民谣与乡村，以原声吉他、口琴和Cash深沉的低音为特色，歌词充满社会批判与同情，是Cash早期抗议音乐的典范。
items.descriptionEn: "Bitter Tears: Ballads of the American Indian" is a concept album released by Johnny Cash in 1964, focusing on the historical suffering and injustices of Native Americans. Stylistically folk and country, it features acoustic guitar, harmonica, and Cash's deep bass vocals, with lyrics full of social critique and empathy, exemplifying Cash's early protest music.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行后因尖锐的政治内容遭到电台抵制，Cash愤怒地在《纽约时报》刊登整版广告，指责行业懦弱。他还亲自前往美国原住民保留地演出，并与活动家合作推广专辑，最终迫使电台重新播放其中歌曲。
items.storiesEn: After its release, the album faced radio boycotts due to its sharp political content. Cash angrily took out a full-page ad in The New York Times, accusing the industry of cowardice. He also performed at Native American reservations and collaborated with activists to promote the album, eventually forcing radio stations to replay its songs.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是美国音乐史上最早为原住民权利发声的主流作品之一，影响了后续乡村及民谣艺人的社会议题创作。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is one of the earliest mainstream works in American music history to advocate for Native American rights, influencing subsequent country and folk artists' social issue songwriting.
items.artistIntroZh: Johnny Cash（约翰尼·卡什），美国乡村音乐传奇，以低沉嗓音和黑衣形象闻名。他横跨乡村、民谣、福音等风格，代表作包括《I Walk the Line》《Ring of Fire》《Hurt》等，是唯一同时入选乡村和摇滚名人堂的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Johnny Cash was an American country music legend known for his deep voice and all-black attire. Spanning country, folk, and gospel, his hits include "I Walk the Line," "Ring of Fire," and "Hurt." He is one of the few artists inducted into both the Country Music and Rock and Roll Halls of Fame.

10-26.birthdayZh: 10月26日，是你的生日。这一天，Calvin Harris的《18 Months》在时间轨道里亮起，像用电子节拍写成的一封长信，告诉你每一次跃动都值得坚持；而Johnny Cash的《Bitter Tears》曾为被遗忘的族群唱出尊严，那些苦涩背后的温柔，也像在说：你的存在，本就是一首值得被传颂的歌。愿你在自己的节奏里，活得明亮、勇敢、完整。
10-26.birthdayEn: October 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Calvin Harris's "18 Months," a pulse of unstoppable energy and transformation, and Johnny Cash's "Bitter Tears," a soulful anthem of resilience and truth. Like these albums, may your year be a dance of joy and a ballad of quiet strength. Let the rhythm of new beginnings carry you forward, and let every note remind you that you are both the melody and the light. Here's to you—bold, beautiful, and timeless.

items.name: Back to Black
items.descriptionZh: 《Back to Black》是Amy Winehouse的第二张录音室专辑，尽管其音乐根基深植于灵魂乐和节奏蓝调，但专辑中大量运用原声吉他、民谣式的叙事结构以及乡村音乐般的坦诚情感，使其在当代流行语境下呈现出独特的Folk/Country气质。核心特色在于Winehouse粗粝而深情的嗓音，搭配复古的Motown式制作与自制、坦诚的歌词，将心碎与自我毁灭的主题演绎得淋漓尽致。
items.descriptionEn: Back to Black is Amy Winehouse's second studio album. Although deeply rooted in soul and R&B, its extensive use of acoustic guitar, folk-like narrative structures, and the candid emotional honesty reminiscent of country music give it a unique Folk/Country character within a contemporary pop context. Its core feature is Winehouse's raw, soulful voice paired with retro Motown-style production and self-penned, brutally honest lyrics about heartbreak and self-destruction.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的同名主打歌《Back to Black》是在Winehouse与当时分分合合的男友Blake Fielder-Civil争吵后，由制作人Mark Ronson在她的公寓中迅速录制完成的。当时Winehouse情绪极度低落，Ronson回忆说她只用了大约一个小时就写完了歌词，并在录音室里一次性录完了人声，那种绝望感完全来自她的真实经历。
items.storiesEn: The album's title track 'Back to Black' was quickly recorded in Winehouse's apartment by producer Mark Ronson after a fight with her on-again, off-again boyfriend Blake Fielder-Civil. Ronson recalled that Winehouse wrote the lyrics in about an hour and recorded the vocal in one take, with the sense of despair coming entirely from her real-life experience.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在全球范围内获得巨大成功，赢得了五座格莱美奖，其中包括年度最佳唱片和年度最佳歌曲，并被视为2000年代最具影响力的流行/灵魂乐专辑之一，深刻影响了后续一批以坦诚情感和复古风格为特色的女歌手。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album achieved massive global success, winning five Grammy Awards including Record of the Year and Song of the Year. It is considered one of the most influential pop/soul albums of the 2000s, profoundly affecting a generation of female singers who embraced emotional honesty and retro stylings.
items.artistIntroZh: Amy Winehouse（艾米·怀恩豪斯，1983-2011）是英国灵魂乐和流行女歌手，以其标志性的蜂巢发型、烟熏眼妆和浑厚、充满灵魂感的嗓音闻名。她的音乐融合了���魂、节奏蓝调与爵士乐。代表作包括《Back to Black》和《Rehab》，后者是她最广为人知的单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Amy Winehouse (1983-2011) was a British soul and pop singer known for her distinctive beehive hairstyle, heavy eyeliner, and powerful, soulful contralto voice. Her music blended soul, R&B, and jazz. Her most famous works include the album Back to Black and the single 'Rehab'.

10-27.birthdayZh: 10月27日，是你的生日。这一天，艾米·怀恩豪斯用《Back to Black》唱尽破碎与坦荡——如同深秋的树，在风里抖落所有伪装，却站得笔直。你降生的日子，连灵魂都染上这种勇气：敢于拥抱真实的疼痛，也敢于在废墟上开出花来。生日快乐，愿你的每一岁，都像这张专辑一样，在荆棘里长出属于自己的光芒。
10-27.birthdayEn: October 27 is your birthday, a day when the world welcomed your light. On this date, the soul of Amy Winehouse’s "Back to Black" was released—a testament to raw truth and fierce resilience, like the strength you carry with quiet grace. Just as that album transformed pain into timeless art, may your year be a masterpiece of your own making, humming with courage and brimming with joy. Here’s to the melody of you—vibrant, brave, and utterly irreplaceable. Happy birthday.

items.name: Eros
items.descriptionZh: 《Eros》是意大利流行巨星Eros Ramazzotti于1997年发行的首张精选集，完美体现了他标志性的流行摇滚风格。专辑融合了意大利式旋律的浪漫抒情与流行摇滚的强劲节奏，核心特色在于Ramazzotti沙哑而充满磁性的嗓音，以及他擅长的、关于爱情与人生的动人叙事。这张精选集收录了他从1980年代至1990年代的多首金曲。
items.descriptionEn: Eros is the first greatest hits album by Italian pop superstar Eros Ramazzotti, released in 1997. It perfectly embodies his signature pop-rock style, blending the romantic lyricism of Italian melody with the strong rhythms of pop-rock. Its core features are Ramazzotti's husky, magnetic voice and his compelling narratives about love and life. The compilation includes many of his biggest hits from the 1980s and 1990s.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的发行恰逢Ramazzotti事业巅峰期，专辑中包含了与Tina Turner合唱的经典曲目《Cose della vita》（Can't Stop Thinking of You）。据说两人在录音室合作时，Ramazzotti对与这位传奇摇滚女歌手同台感到非常紧张，但Tina Turner的专业与热情让这次合作变得异常顺利，最终成就了一首跨国流行金曲。
items.storiesEn: Released at the peak of Ramazzotti's career, this hits collection features the classic duet 'Cose della vita (Can't Stop Thinking of You)' with Tina Turner. It is said that Ramazzotti was very nervous about collaborating with the legendary rock singer in the studio, but Turner's professionalism and warmth made the session remarkably smooth, resulting in an international pop hit.
items.artistIntroZh: Eros Ramazzotti（埃罗斯·拉玛佐第，1963年出生）是意大利著名流行歌手、词曲作者，以其沙哑嗓音和浪漫的流行摇滚风格享誉全球。他出生于罗马，自1980年代出道以来，在全球售出超过6000万张唱片。代表作包括《Se bastasse una canzone》、《Più bella cosa》和《Cose della vita》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eros Ramazzotti (born 1963) is a renowned Italian pop singer and songwriter, famous worldwide for his husky voice and romantic pop-rock style. Born in Rome, he has sold over 60 million records worldwide since his debut in the 1980s. His major works include 'Se bastasse una canzone', 'Più bella cosa', and 'Cose della vita'.

items.name: A Király meséi
items.descriptionZh: 《A Király meséi》是匈牙利流行歌手Gyula Bill Deák于2009年发行的专辑，风格属于匈牙利流行音乐。核心特色在于其充满童话色彩的叙事性歌词和朗朗上口的流行旋律，专辑名称意为“国王的故事”，整体氛围轻松愉快，带有明显的舞台剧和民谣叙事元素，展现了Deák作为流行歌手的多元表现力。
items.descriptionEn: A Király meséi (The King's Tales) is a 2009 album by Hungarian pop singer Gyula Bill Deák. It falls under the Hungarian pop genre. Its core features are fairy-tale-like narrative lyrics and catchy pop melodies. The album's title means 'The King's Tales', and its overall atmosphere is light and cheerful, incorporating elements of musical theater and folk storytelling, showcasing Deák's versatility as a pop performer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感部分来源于Deák对匈牙利民间传说和童话故事的热爱。据说在录制过程中，Deák邀请了多位儿童合唱团成员参与背景和声，以增强专辑的童话氛围。专辑发行后，他还在布达佩斯举办了一场以“国��”为主题的特别演唱会，舞台布景宛如童话王国。
items.storiesEn: The album's inspiration came partly from Deák's love for Hungarian folklore and fairy tales. It is said that during the recording, he invited several children's choir members to contribute background vocals to enhance the album's fairy-tale atmosphere. After its release, he held a special 'King'-themed concert in Budapest with a stage set resembling a fairy-tale kingdom.
items.artistIntroZh: Gyula Bill Deák（久拉·比尔·德阿克）是匈牙利流行歌手，以其富有表现力的嗓音和多样化的流行音乐风格在匈牙利乐坛知名。他的音乐常融合流行、民谣和舞台剧元素，善于讲述故事。代表作包括专辑《A Király meséi》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Gyula Bill Deák is a Hungarian pop singer known for his expressive voice and diverse pop music style in the Hungarian music scene. His music often blends pop, folk, and theatrical elements, and he is skilled at storytelling. His notable works include the album A Király meséi.

10-28.birthdayZh: 10月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Eros》的旋律，像你心中那份温柔而坚定的爱，永远优雅地流淌。也诞生了《A Király meséi》——国王的故事，提醒你：你的人生是一首属于自己的传奇诗篇。愿你在生日的烛光里，听见命运为你谱写的歌，勇敢而从容地做自己世界的王。
10-28.birthdayEn: October 28 is your birthday. On this day, music history welcomed the soulful passion of Eros Ramazzotti’s "Eros," a debut album that sings of new beginnings and heartfelt romance—much like the bright chapter you’re stepping into. And far away, Gyula Bill Deák’s "A Király meséi" brought royal tales to life, reminding us that every life has its own epic story. May your year ahead be filled with the same warmth and magic these albums hold, unfolding one beautiful note at a time.

items.name: Skyfall – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack
items.descriptionZh: 《Skyfall – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack》是Thomas Newman为007系列电影《天幕杀机》创作的原声专辑，虽然归类为流行，但其核心特色是宏大的管弦乐配乐，融合了古典、现代电子氛围与标志性的007主题元素。Newman以细腻的情感层次和紧张感塑造了影片的听觉世界，主题曲《Skyfall》由Adele演唱，是专辑中最具流行辨识度的亮点。
items.descriptionEn: Skyfall – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack is the score album by Thomas Newman for the James Bond film 'Skyfall'. While categorized under Pop, its core features are grand orchestral arrangements blending classical music, modern electronic atmospheres, and iconic Bond motifs. Newman crafted the film's sonic world with delicate emotional layers and tension. The theme song 'Skyfall' performed by Adele is the album's most pop-oriented highlight.
items.storiesZh: Thomas Newman为《天幕杀机》配乐时，面临继承007系列经典音乐遗产的巨大压力。他特意避开了直接模仿前辈John Barry的风格，而是创造了更现代、更内敛的音响。有趣的是，Adele演唱的主题曲《Skyfall》是独立于配乐创作的，Newman在听到这首歌后，特意调整了部分配乐的和声与旋律，使整张原声带在音乐主题上更加统一。
items.storiesEn: When scoring 'Skyfall', Thomas Newman faced immense pressure to live up to the classic Bond music legacy. He deliberately avoided directly imitating predecessor John Barry's style, creating a more modern, restrained sound. Interestingly, Adele's theme song 'Skyfall' was created independently of the score. After hearing it, Newman adjusted some harmonies and melodies in his score to ensure greater musical cohesion across the entire soundtrack.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带获得了格莱美最佳影视配乐专辑提名。Adele演唱的主题曲《Skyfall》获得了奥斯卡最佳原创歌曲奖，成为007系列史上首获此殊荣的歌曲，也是该系列最成功的商业单曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The soundtrack received a Grammy nomination for Best Score Soundtrack for Visual Media. Adele's title song 'Skyfall' won the Academy Award for Best Original Song, becoming the first Bond theme to win the Oscar and one of the most commercially successful singles in the franchise's history.
items.artistIntroZh: Thomas Newman（托马斯·纽曼，1955年出生）是美国著名电影配乐作曲家，来自显赫的纽曼电影音乐家族。他以细腻、富有氛围感的配乐风格闻名，代表作包括《肖申克的救赎》、《美国丽人》、《海底总动员》和《007：天幕杀机》等，曾多次获得奥斯卡提名。
items.artistIntroEn: Thomas Newman (born 1955) is a renowned American film score composer from the illustrious Newman family of film music. He is known for his delicate, atmospheric scoring style. His notable works include The Shawshank Redemption, American Beauty, Finding Nemo, and Skyfall. He has received multiple Academy Award nominations.

10-29.birthdayZh: 10月29日，是你的生日。这一天，曾被《007：大破天幕杀机》的原声带《Skyfall》轻轻标记——它讲述着坠落后依然能站起的勇气。就像那乐章在黑暗中积蓄力量，你也在自己的轨道上，从容地燃起独属于你的光。愿新岁的你，永远记得：坠落之后，便是飞升。
10-29.birthdayEn: October 29 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of the soaring, triumphant score for Skyfall. Like that music, may your year be filled with the courage to rise from any shadow, and the grace of a new dawn. And like the spirit of a classic Bond soundtrack—mysterious, bold, and utterly unforgettable—may your journey be an adventure of depth and dazzling light. You were born on a day of epic soundtracks; now, go write your own magnificent melody.

items.name: Invincible
items.descriptionZh: 《Invincible》是Michael Jackson于2001年发行的第十张也是最后一张个人录音室专辑，风格以流行为主，融合了节奏蓝调、灵魂乐、嘻哈和放克元素。核心特色在于Jackson标志性的流畅嗓音与复杂的多轨和声编排，以及对社会议题（如战争、种族主义）和个人情感的深刻探讨。制作上极尽奢华，邀请了众多知名制作人合作。
items.descriptionEn: Invincible is Michael Jackson's tenth and final studio album, released in 2001. Its style is primarily pop, blended with R&B, soul, hip-hop, and funk. The core features are Jackson's signature smooth vocals and complex multi-track harmonies, alongside deep explorations of social issues (like war and racism) and personal emotions. The production is lavish, featuring collaborations with numerous top producers.
items.storiesZh: 《Invincible》的制作成本据估计高达3000万美元，是当时史上制作成本最高的专辑之一。录制过程历时数年，Jackson对细节的完美主义追求到了极致，据说他曾要求录音师反复调整一个鼓点达数百次。专辑发行后，Jackson与索尼音乐的CEO Tommy Mottola因宣传问题爆发了公开冲突，Jackson指责对方因种族原因未给予足够支持。
items.storiesEn: Invincible reportedly cost an estimated $30 million to produce, making it one of the most expensive albums ever made at the time. The recording process spanned several years, with Jackson's perfectionism reaching extremes; he was said to have had engineers adjust a single drum hit hundreds of times. After its release, Jackson had a public conflict with Sony Music CEO Tommy Mottola over promotion, accusing him of insufficient support due to racial reasons.
items.historicalImpactZh: 尽管商业表现未达预期，但《Invincible》在音乐制作上展现了极高的水准，其中《Butterflies》等歌曲被乐评人视为Jackson后期最具灵魂感的作品之一。专辑的发行和后续争议也折射出当时音乐产业的权力博弈。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although its commercial performance fell short of expectations, Invincible demonstrated a very high standard of music production. Songs like 'Butterflies' are regarded by critics as some of Jackson's most soulful later works. The album's release and subsequent controversies also reflected the power struggles within the music industry at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: Michael Jackson（迈克尔·杰克逊，1958-2009）是美国歌手、词曲作者、舞蹈家，被誉为“流行音乐之王”。他是20世纪最具标志性和影响力的艺人之一，以其独特的嗓音、标志性的舞步（如月球漫步）和打破种族与音乐界限的作品闻名。代表作包括专辑《Thriller》、《Bad》和《Dangerous》。
items.artistIntroEn: Michael Jackson (1958-2009) was an American singer, songwriter, and dancer, known as the 'King of Pop'. He was one of the most iconic and influential entertainers of the 20th century, famous for his distinctive voice, signature dance moves (like the moonwalk), and work that broke racial and musical barriers. His major works include the albums Thriller, Bad, and Dangerous.

items.name: Don't Stop the Music
items.descriptionZh: 《Don't Stop the Music》是瑞典流行天后Robyn在2002年发行的专辑，融合了流行舞曲与电子元素，节奏明快，旋律抓耳。专辑核心特色在于Robyn标志性的清脆嗓音与充满活力的合成器编曲，展现了早期2000年代欧洲流行音乐的精致与动感。
items.descriptionEn: "Don't Stop the Music" is a 2002 album by Swedish pop icon Robyn, blending pop dance with electronic elements, characterized by upbeat rhythms and catchy melodies. Its core features Robyn's signature crisp vocals and vibrant synth arrangements, showcasing the refined dynamism of early 2000s European pop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Robyn离开原唱片公司后独立发展的早期作品。录制过程中，她与制作人Max Martin等人紧密合作，尝试更自由地表达个人风格。专辑中的同名主打歌原本为另一艺人创作，但Robyn坚持将其收入自己的专辑，最终成为她的经典曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Robyn's early independent development after leaving her original label. During recording, she collaborated closely with producer Max Martin, experimenting with freer personal expression. The title track was originally written for another artist, but Robyn insisted on including it in her album, eventually becoming one of her classic songs.
items.artistIntroZh: Robyn（原名Robin Miriam Carlsson），瑞典流行女歌手，生于1979年。以融合流行、舞曲与电子音乐著称，代表作包括《Dancing on My Own》《Call Your Girlfriend》。她被誉为瑞典流行音乐的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Robyn (born Robin Miriam Carlsson), Swedish pop singer born in 1979. Known for blending pop, dance, and electronic music, with hits like "Dancing on My Own" and "Call Your Girlfriend." She is regarded as a key figure in Swedish pop music.

10-30.birthdayZh: 10月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Invincible》与《Don't Stop the Music》——一张教人守护内心的不败，一张邀你舞动不停。你就像它们交汇的旋律：既可坚韧如夜，也能轻盈如光。愿你永远相信，自己的节奏值得被听见，生命本就是一张未完待续的专辑。
10-30.birthdayEn: October 30 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and history gifted us two albums that echo your spirit. Like Michael Jackson's Invincible, you carry a resilient, boundary-breaking magic, a pop-soul strength that ages into legend. And like Robyn’s Don't Stop the Music, your journey has been a bold, independent rhythm—a pivot toward your truest self. May your year be as unstoppable as that first beat, and as luminous as the day you were born. Shine on.

items.name: Pearls of Passion
items.descriptionZh: 《Pearls of Passion》是瑞典流行双人组Roxette于1986年发行的首张专辑，风格以流行摇滚为主，融合了合成器流行元素。专辑核心特色在于Per Gessle的创作才华与Marie Fredriksson充满力量的嗓音，歌曲旋律优美且富有情感张力，奠定了他们日后全球成功的基础。
items.descriptionEn: "Pearls of Passion" is the debut album by Swedish pop duo Roxette, released in 1986, primarily featuring pop rock with synth-pop elements. Its core features Per Gessle's songwriting talent and Marie Fredriksson's powerful vocals, with melodic and emotionally charged songs that laid the foundation for their global success.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑最初只在瑞典和加拿大发行，并未立即获得国际关注。录制时，Per Gessle和Marie Fredriksson刚组建组合不久，两人在录音室中磨合出独特的化学反应。专辑中的歌曲《Soul Deep》后来被重新混音并作为单曲发行，成为他们在瑞典的首支热门曲。
items.storiesEn: This album was initially released only in Sweden and Canada, without immediate international attention. During recording, Per Gessle and Marie Fredriksson had just formed the duo, developing a unique chemistry in the studio. The song "Soul Deep" was later remixed and released as a single, becoming their first hit in Sweden.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着Roxette职业生涯的起点，为他们后续全球爆红的《Look Sharp!》奠定了基础，是瑞典流行音乐走向世界的重要一步。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the beginning of Roxette's career, laying the groundwork for their global breakthrough with "Look Sharp!" and representing a key step in Swedish pop music's international reach.
items.artistIntroZh: Roxette，瑞典流行摇滚双人组，由Per Gessle和Marie Fredriksson组成。以旋律动人的流行摇滚风格闻名，代表作包括《It Must Have Been Love》《Listen to Your Heart》。全球专辑销量超过7500万张。
items.artistIntroEn: Roxette, a Swedish pop rock duo consisting of Per Gessle and Marie Fredriksson. Known for melodic pop rock, with hits like "It Must Have Been Love" and "Listen to Your Heart." They have sold over 75 million albums worldwide.

items.name: R.E.D.
items.descriptionZh: 《R.E.D.》是美国R&B歌手Ne-Yo于2012年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格跨界流行与民谣/乡村元素。专辑核心特色在于Ne-Yo尝试融入原声吉他和乡村音乐的叙事风格，同时保留其标志性的抒情嗓音，展现了他在传统R&B之外的多元化探索。
items.descriptionEn: "R.E.D." is the fifth studio album by American R&B singer Ne-Yo, released in 2012, blending pop with folk/country elements. Its core features Ne-Yo's incorporation of acoustic guitar and country storytelling, while retaining his signature soulful vocals, showcasing his diverse exploration beyond traditional R&B.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，Ne-Yo特意邀请了乡村音乐制作人参与，以追求更真实的民谣/乡村质感。他曾表示，专辑名《R.E.D.》代表“重获能量与决心”（Realizing Every Dream），反映了他对音乐多样性的追求。专辑中的《Let Me Love You (Until You Learn to Love Yourself)》由多位制作人合作完成。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Ne-Yo specifically invited country music producers to achieve a more authentic folk/country texture. He stated that the album title "R.E.D." stands for "Realizing Every Dream," reflecting his pursuit of musical diversity. The track "Let Me Love You (Until You Learn to Love Yourself)" was completed with multiple producers.
items.artistIntroZh: Ne-Yo（原名Shaffer Chimere Smith），美国R&B歌手、词曲作者，生于1979年。以流畅的R&B风格和深情歌词著称，代表作包括《So Sick》《Miss Independent》。曾多次获得格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Ne-Yo (born Shaffer Chimere Smith), American R&B singer and songwriter, born in 1979. Known for smooth R&B style and heartfelt lyrics, with hits like "So Sick" and "Miss Independent." He has won multiple Grammy Awards.

10-31.birthdayZh: 10月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Pearls of Passion》——那些如珍珠般的热情，是初绽的勇气与浪漫。而《R.E.D.》提醒你，人生是热烈与深情的红。你生来就自带旋律，既有柔软的心跳，也有踏碎黑夜的鼓点。生日快乐，愿你永远像这天的音乐一样，既温柔，又响亮。
10-31.birthdayEn: October 31 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with its own special rhythm.
