On this day, Roxette released "Pearls of Passion," a debut album brimming with the bold, melodic spirit of a new beginning—just like the year ahead of you. Ne-Yo's "R.E.D." also arrived, a fusion of soulful R&B and dance-floor energy, reminding us that grace and joy can move together. May your year be a beautiful album of firsts and fearless steps, full of heart and light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Poland - The Warsaw Concert
items.descriptionZh: 《Poland - The Warsaw Concert》是德国电子乐队Tangerine Dream于1984年在波兰华沙录制的现场专辑，风格属于电子音乐中的氛围与实验分支。专辑核心特色在于乐队使用模拟合���器与音序器营造出宏大而深���的太空感音景，现场即兴演奏充满张力，是80年代电子音乐现场的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Poland - The Warsaw Concert" is a live album by German electronic band Tangerine Dream, recorded in Warsaw, Poland in 1984, belonging to the ambient and experimental branches of electronic music. Its core features the use of analog synthesizers and sequencers to create vast, spacey soundscapes, with improvisational live performances full of tension, representing a classic of 1980s electronic live music.
items.storiesZh: 这场音乐会是Tangerine Dream首次在波兰演出，当时正值冷战时期，乐队在铁幕国家演出具有特殊意义。录制时，乐队使用了大量模拟设备，包括多台Moog合成器和模块化系统。由于现场音响条件有限，后期制作中进行了大量混音调整，才达到最终发行效果。
items.storiesEn: This concert was Tangerine Dream's first performance in Poland, during the Cold War era, making the show behind the Iron Curtain particularly significant. The band used extensive analog equipment, including multiple Moog synthesizers and modular systems. Due to limited live sound conditions, extensive remixing was done in post-production to achieve the final release quality.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为Tangerine Dream现场录音的经���之作，对后来电子音乐现场表演的录音与制作标准产生了影响，也促进了东西方文化交流。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a classic live recording by Tangerine Dream, influencing later standards for electronic live performance recording and production, and promoting cultural exchange between East and West.
items.artistIntroZh: Tangerine Dream，德国电子乐队，1967年由Edgar Froese创立。以氛围电子、太空音乐和实验音景著称，代表作包括《Phaedra》《Rubycon》。他们是电子音乐发展史上的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Tangerine Dream, a German electronic band founded by Edgar Froese in 1967. Known for ambient electronic, space music, and experimental soundscapes, with iconic albums like "Phaedra" and "Rubycon." They are pioneers in the history of electronic music.

items.name: Girls' Generation
items.descriptionZh: 《Girls' Generation》是韩国女子组合少女时代于2007年发行的首张同名专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合了Teen pop与泡泡糖流行元素。专辑核心特色在于成员们清新甜美的嗓音与充满活力的编舞，歌曲如《Into the New World》成为K-pop经典，奠定了少女时代在韩国乐坛的地位。
items.descriptionEn: "Girls' Generation" is the self-titled debut album by South Korean girl group Girls' Generation, released in 2007, primarily featuring pop dance with teen pop and bubblegum pop elements. Its core features the members' fresh, sweet vocals and energetic choreography. Songs like "Into the New World" became K-pop classics, establishing the group's status in the Korean music scene.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制历时数月，成员们当时平均年龄仅17岁，在紧张的训练之余完成了录音。主打歌《Into the New World》原本是为另一组合创作，但SM娱乐决定将其作为少女时代的出道曲。专辑发行后，少女时代通过频繁的现场表演逐渐积累人气，最终成为国民女团。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording took several months, with members averaging only 17 years old at the time, completing the sessions alongside intense training. The lead single "Into the New World" was originally written for another group, but SM Entertainment decided to use it as Girls' Generation's debut track. After release, the group gradually gained popularity through frequent live performances, eventually becoming a national girl group.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着少女时代的正式出道，开启了K-pop二代女团的黄金时代。《Into the New World》成为韩国流行文化中的经典曲目，被广泛翻唱与致敬。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album marked the official debut of Girls' Generation, ushering in the golden era of second-generation K-pop girl groups. "Into the New World" became a classic in Korean pop culture, widely covered and paid tribute to.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代（Girls' Generation），韩国女子组合，2007年由SM娱乐推出，由8名成员组成（原9人）。以流行舞曲和同步编舞著称，代表作包括《Gee》《I Got a Boy》。被誉为“国民女团”，全球影响力巨大。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation, a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, consisting of 8 members (originally 9). Known for pop dance and synchronized choreography, with hits like "Gee" and "I Got a Boy." They are hailed as the "Nation's Girl Group" with immense global influence.

11-01.birthdayZh: 11月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起两段截然不同的旋律：《Poland - The Warsaw Concert》里，Tangerine Dream用电子合成器织出幽深星空，仿佛在说，孤独也能化作壮阔的远行；而少女时代的出道专辑，则把青春与勇气唱成明亮舞步。你就像这天的两面，既有深海般的沉静，又有破土而出的光芒。愿新的一岁，依然能温柔地穿越深邃，也热烈地跳向阳光。
11-01.birthdayEn: November 1 is your birthday. On this day, history gifted the world two albums that capture your spirit so perfectly. Tangerine Dream’s “Poland - The Warsaw Concert” echoes with boundless atmosphere and quiet adventure, reminding you to explore the wide, mysterious world inside yourself. And Girls’ Generation’s self-titled debut pulses with joyful energy and bold new beginnings, like the first note of a song only you can sing. May your year ahead be a beautiful harmony of deep dreams and bright, unstoppable light. Happy birthday.

items.name: Sans attendre
items.descriptionZh: 《Sans attendre》是席琳·迪翁于2012年发行的法语专辑，风格以流行抒情为主，融合了成人当代和香颂元素。专辑核心特色在于其深情而细腻的演绎，歌词探讨爱情、时间与人生主题，展现了迪翁在法语音乐领域的深厚功底和情感表达力。
items.descriptionEn: "Sans attendre" is a French-language pop album by Céline Dion, released in 2012. It features adult contemporary and chanson influences, characterized by heartfelt ballads and lyrical themes of love, time, and life, showcasing Dion's emotional depth in French music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是席琳·迪翁在2012年发行的一张法语专辑，录制期间她正忙于拉斯维加斯的驻唱演出，因此许多录音工作是在巡演间隙完成的。专辑中有一首歌曲《Parler à mon père》是她特别为已故父亲创作的，表达了对父亲的思念，录制时她一度情绪失控。
items.storiesEn: This album was recorded while Céline Dion was busy with her Las Vegas residency, so many sessions took place during breaks in her tour. The track "Parler à mon père" was specially written for her late father, and Dion reportedly broke down in tears while recording it due to emotional intensity.
items.artistIntroZh: 席琳·迪翁是加拿大籍法语和英语流行歌手，以强大的嗓音和情感演绎著称。主要风格包括流行、成人当代和香颂。代表作有《My Heart Will Go On》、《The Power of Love》等，是全球最畅销的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Céline Dion is a Canadian singer known for her powerful voice and emotional delivery in both French and English pop. Her styles include pop, adult contemporary, and chanson. Iconic hits include "My Heart Will Go On" and "The Power of Love," making her one of the best-selling female artists worldwide.

11-02.birthdayZh: 11月2日，是你的生日。这一天，不仅是日历上的一页，也是歌与心相遇的纪念。席琳·迪翁在《Sans attendre》里唱出“不再等待”的勇气——像在说，你生来就值得一切美好，无需迟疑。愿你在自己的节拍里，爱得从容，活得响亮。像歌那样，让力量与温柔同时盛放。
11-02.birthdayEn: November 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "Sans attendre," Céline Dion’s French album that breathes patience and grace—a reminder to live without hesitation. May your year echo that spirit: unhurried yet bold, like a melody unfolding. Let each moment be a note of joy, and every challenge a bridge to deeper harmony. You are a song worth celebrating, today and always.

items.name: Belly – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack
items.descriptionZh: 《Belly – Original Motion Picture Soundtrack》是1998年发行的电影原声带，风格以嘻哈为主，融合了东海岸说唱、R&B和灵魂乐。核心特色在于汇集了多位知名嘻哈艺人，如Jay-Z、DMX和Method Man，音乐充满街头气息和叙事性，与电影主题紧密呼应。
items.descriptionEn: The "Belly" soundtrack, released in 1998, is a hip-hop album blending East Coast rap, R&B, and soul. It features prominent artists like Jay-Z, DMX, and Method Man, with streetwise narratives that complement the film's gritty themes.
items.storiesZh: 这张原声带的录制与电影《Belly》的拍摄同步进行，导演Hype Williams邀请了多位嘻哈界好友参与。其中DMX的歌曲《Grand Finale》是专门为电影高潮场景创作的，录制时DMX即兴发挥，展现了强烈的个人风格。专辑发行后迅速登上公告牌R&B/嘻哈专辑榜前十。
items.storiesEn: The soundtrack was produced alongside the film "Belly," with director Hype Williams inviting his hip-hop peers. DMX's track "Grand Finale" was created for the climax scene, featuring freestyle elements that highlighted his raw energy. The album quickly reached the top 10 on Billboard's R&B/Hip-Hop chart.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张原声带被认为是90年代末嘻哈电影配乐的代表作之一，推动了嘻哈文化在主流电影中的影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: This soundtrack is regarded as a landmark 1990s hip-hop film score, boosting hip-hop's influence in mainstream cinema.
items.artistIntroZh: 多位艺人参与，包括Jay-Z、DMX、Method Man等。Jay-Z是美国说唱歌手和企业家，以东海岸说唱风格闻名，代表作有《Empire State of Mind》。DMX以硬核说唱著称，代表作《Ruff Ryders' Anthem》。
items.artistIntroEn: Various artists including Jay-Z, DMX, and Method Man. Jay-Z is an American rapper and entrepreneur known for East Coast hip-hop, with hits like "Empire State of Mind." DMX is known for hardcore rap, with classics like "Ruff Ryders' Anthem."

11-03.birthdayZh: 11月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾流淌过《Belly》原声带的节奏，像嘻哈与R&B编织的脉搏，热烈而自由地宣告——生命本可以是一场不设限的舞蹈。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张专辑一样，把所有的碰撞都谱成自己的韵律，在时光的鼓点上，踩出独一无二的回响。
11-03.birthdayEn: November 3 is your birthday, a day that shares its date with a piece of music history: the 1998 "Belly" soundtrack burst into the world, pulsing with raw energy and cinematic beats. Like that album's bold spirit, your presence brings a unique rhythm to life—unexpected, vibrant, and unforgettable. May your year ahead feel like a great track: layered with joy, building to powerful crescendos, and ending with a perfect, resonant chord that lingers warmly long after the music fades.

items.name: In My Lifetime, Vol. 1
items.descriptionZh: 《In My Lifetime, Vol. 1》是Jay-Z于1997年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为东海岸嘻哈，融合了硬核说唱和街头叙事。核心特色在于其自传性质的歌词，讲述了Jay-Z从布鲁克林街头到说唱界的崛起故事，制作上由多位知名制作人操刀，节奏强劲。
items.descriptionEn: "In My Lifetime, Vol. 1" is Jay-Z's debut studio album from 1997, featuring East Coast hip-hop with hardcore rap and street narratives. Its core is autobiographical lyrics detailing Jay-Z's rise from Brooklyn streets, with strong beats produced by top producers.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，Jay-Z曾因版权问题与制作人产生纠纷，导致部分歌曲重新录制。专辑原定名为《In My Lifetime》，后因与另一项目冲突改为《Vol. 1》。其中单曲《Who You Wit》的MV在纽约街头拍摄，真实还原了Jay-Z的成长环境。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Jay-Z faced copyright disputes with producers, forcing some tracks to be re-recorded. The album was initially titled "In My Lifetime" but changed to "Vol. 1" due to conflicts. The music video for "Who You Wit" was shot on New York streets, reflecting his upbringing.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑奠定了Jay-Z在嘻哈界的地位，被视为东海岸说唱复兴的重要作品之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album established Jay-Z's status in hip-hop and is considered a key work in the East Coast rap revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Jay-Z是美国说唱歌手、企业家和唱片制作人，以东海岸嘻哈风格闻名。代表作有《99 Problems》、《Empire State of Mind》等。他是全球最成功的嘻哈艺人之一，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Jay-Z is an American rapper, entrepreneur, and record producer known for East Coast hip-hop. His hits include "99 Problems" and "Empire State of Mind." He is one of the most successful hip-hop artists globally, with multiple Grammy Awards.

11-04.birthdayZh: 11月4日，是你的生日。这一天，Jay-Z的《In My Lifetime, Vol. 1》曾面世，像一本写满街灯与星光的日记，提醒你生命里每一次跌宕都值得被收藏。这一天属于你，属于每一次从沉默中站起的勇气。愿你像专辑里那股不服输的节奏，在岁月里走出自己的鼓点，每一步都踏在温暖的光上。
11-04.birthdayEn: November 4 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of Jay-Z’s “In My Lifetime, Vol. 1,” an album born of ambition and hard-won truth. Like that record’s spirit, your presence weaves resilience with grace, turning every challenge into a stepping stone. May your year unfold with the steady rhythm of your own unique journey, each day a fresh verse in a song only you can sing. Celebrate the story you are writing—it’s already a classic in the making.

items.name: Remember
items.descriptionZh: 《Remember》是韩国组合BigBang于2008年发行的第二张韩语正规专辑，风格以嘻哈为核心，融合了流行、电子和R&B元素。核心特色在于其多样化的曲风，从强劲的说唱到抒情的旋律，展现了成员们的音乐才华，专辑主题围绕回忆与青春。
items.descriptionEn: "Remember" is BigBang's second Korean studio album, released in 2008, centered on hip-hop with pop, electronic, and R&B influences. Its diversity ranges from powerful rap to melodic ballads, showcasing the members' talents, with themes of memory and youth.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员G-Dragon和T.O.P参与了大量词曲创作，其中主打歌《Haru Haru》的灵感来自G-Dragon的个人经历。专辑发行后，BigBang在韩国音乐节目中获得多个一位，但随后因成员个人事件导致宣传活动缩短。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members G-Dragon and T.O.P contributed heavily to songwriting; the lead single "Haru Haru" was inspired by G-Dragon's personal experiences. After release, BigBang won multiple music show awards, but promotional activities were cut short due to personal incidents involving members.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了BigBang在韩国嘻哈流行界的地位，推动了K-pop与嘻哈的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album solidified BigBang's status in Korean hip-hop and pop, advancing the fusion of K-pop with hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: BigBang是韩国男子音乐组合，以嘻哈、流行和电子风格著称。成员包括G-Dragon、T.O.P、太阳等。代表作有《Fantastic Baby》、《Bang Bang Bang》等，是K-pop界最具影响力的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: BigBang is a South Korean boy band known for hip-hop, pop, and electronic music. Members include G-Dragon, T.O.P, and Taeyang. Hits include "Fantastic Baby" and "Bang Bang Bang," making them one of the most influential K-pop groups.

items.name: The Lady Killer
items.descriptionZh: 《The Lady Killer》是CeeLo Green于2010年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以灵魂乐和流行为主，融合了民谣和乡村元素。核心特色在于其复古的摩城音乐影响，搭配CeeLo独特的嗓音，歌词充满叙事性和情感张力，专辑主题围绕爱情与背叛。
items.descriptionEn: "The Lady Killer" is CeeLo Green's third studio album from 2010, blending soul, pop, folk, and country influences. It features a retro Motown sound with CeeLo's distinctive vocals, narrative lyrics exploring love and betrayal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，CeeLo Green与制作人Danger Mouse紧密合作，后者曾参与他的前作。主打歌《Fuck You》原本是一首更柔和的歌曲，但CeeLo决定改为直白表达愤怒的版本，意外成为全球热门。专辑封面灵感来自1960年代间谍电影。
items.storiesEn: During recording, CeeLo Green worked closely with producer Danger Mouse, who had collaborated on his previous work. The lead single "Fuck You" was originally a softer track, but CeeLo opted for a more direct angry version, which became a global hit. The album cover was inspired by 1960s spy films.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑获得了多项格莱美提名，其中《Fuck You》成为2010年代最具标志性的反叛歌曲之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album earned multiple Grammy nominations, and "Fuck You" became one of the most iconic rebellious songs of the 2010s.
items.artistIntroZh: CeeLo Green是美国歌手、词曲作者和唱片制作人，以灵魂乐、放克和流行风格闻名。曾是Gnarls Barkley成员，代表作有《Crazy》、《Forget You》等。其音乐融合了复古与现代元素。
items.artistIntroEn: CeeLo Green is an American singer, songwriter, and producer known for soul, funk, and pop. A former member of Gnarls Barkley, his hits include "Crazy" and "Forget You." His music blends retro and contemporary styles.

items.name: The Works
items.descriptionZh: 《The Works》是Bananarama于2007年发行的一张流行专辑，融合了舞曲、流行摇滚和电子元素，展现了她们标志性的甜美和声与动感节奏。专辑核心特色在于其多样化的曲风，既有复古的80年代流行韵味，又加入了当代制作手法，呈现出一种怀旧与新鲜并存的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "The Works" is a pop album by Bananarama released in 2007, blending dance-pop, pop rock, and electronic elements, showcasing their signature sweet harmonies and dynamic rhythms. Its core feature lies in the diverse styles, combining retro 80s pop vibes with contemporary production for a nostalgic yet fresh listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Bananarama与多位制作人合作的结果，包括曾为她们打造多首热曲的Ian Masterson。录制过程中，成员Keren Woodward和Sara Dallin坚持回归早期风格，拒绝过度依赖Auto-Tune，以保持人声的自然质感。专辑发行后，她们还参与了英国独立唱片店日的宣传活动，与粉丝近距离互动。
items.storiesEn: This album was the result of collaborations with several producers, including Ian Masterson, who had crafted many of their hits. During recording, members Keren Woodward and Sara Dallin insisted on returning to their early style, rejecting over-reliance on Auto-Tune to preserve vocal naturalness. After release, they participated in UK Independent Record Store Day events, engaging closely with fans.
items.artistIntroZh: Bananarama是英国女子流行组合，成立于1981年，由Keren Woodward和Sara Dallin组成。她们以甜美和声与舞曲流行风格闻名，代表作包括《Venus》《Cruel Summer》等，是80年代最具影响力的女子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Bananarama is a British female pop group formed in 1981, consisting of Keren Woodward and Sara Dallin. Known for their sweet harmonies and dance-pop style, their hits include "Venus" and "Cruel Summer," making them one of the most influential girl groups of the 80s.

11-05.birthdayZh: 11月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你预备了三份礼物：BigBang的《Remember》教会我们，每个存在都值得被铭记；Bananarama的《The Works》则轻声说，生命是流动的作品，不必完美但要完整。你本身就是一首未写完的歌，旋律里有风暴也有星光。生日快乐，愿你记得自己的珍贵，去创作属于你的杰作。
11-05.birthdayEn: November 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like The Lady Killer, carrying CeeLo Green's bold, soulful charm, and Remember, BigBang's anthem of enduring connection. Like these, your spirit blends warmth with resilience, a melody that lingers long after the song ends. May your year ahead be a masterpiece of joy, love, and unforgettable moments. You are a harmony all your own, and the world is brighter for your song.

items.name: Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars
items.descriptionZh: 《Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars》是Fatboy Slim于2000年发行的电子音乐专辑，融合了Big Beat、放克和碎拍节奏，核心特色在于其采样拼贴的创意和派对氛围。专辑以厚重低音和跳跃节拍著称，营造出既迷幻又狂欢的听觉场景，是电子舞曲黄金时代的代表作之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars" is an electronic album by Fatboy Slim released in 2000, blending big beat, funk, and breakbeats. Its core feature lies in creative sample collages and party atmosphere, known for heavy bass and bouncing beats, creating a psychedelic yet raucous auditory landscape—a landmark of the electronic dance music golden age.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题灵感来自Fatboy Slim（本名Norman Cook）对音乐创作状态的描述——介于街头粗粝与星空高雅之间。主打歌《Weapon of Choice》的MV由Christopher Walken主演，他在洛杉矶酒店大堂即兴跳舞，成为经典画面。Cook曾透露，Walken最初对跳舞犹豫，但最终同意并贡献了职业生涯最著名的舞蹈镜头。
items.storiesEn: The album title was inspired by Norman Cook's description of his creative state—halfway between street grit and celestial elegance. The music video for "Weapon of Choice" starred Christopher Walken, who improvised dancing in a Los Angeles hotel lobby, becoming iconic. Cook revealed Walken was initially hesitant but eventually delivered one of his most famous dance performances.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了Fatboy Slim在电子音乐界的地位，其中《Weapon of Choice》获得格莱美最佳音乐录影带奖，推动了Big Beat流派的主流化。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified Fatboy Slim's status in electronic music; "Weapon of Choice" won a Grammy for Best Music Video, helping to mainstream the big beat genre.
items.artistIntroZh: Fatboy Slim，本名Norman Cook，英国电子音乐人、DJ。他以Big Beat风格闻名，代表作包括《The Rockafeller Skank》《Praise You》等，是90年代末至2000年代初电子舞曲界最具标志性的人物之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Fatboy Slim, real name Norman Cook, is a British electronic musician and DJ. Known for his big beat style, his hits include "The Rockafeller Skank" and "Praise You," making him one of the most iconic figures in electronic dance music from the late 90s to early 2000s.

11-06.birthdayZh: 11月6日，是你的生日。这一天，Fatboy Slim让世界听见《Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars》，困顿与星辰之间，恰是人间最真实的舞池。你不必完美，也不必急于抵达——你已站在光与尘的交界，用心跳打拍子，把每一次呼吸都踩成鼓点。就从这个生日起，做自己的节拍，把人间路走成一首没有终点的歌。
11-06.birthdayEn: November 6 is your birthday, a date that sits halfway between autumn’s quiet fade and winter’s first whisper—much like the soul of Fatboy Slim’s *Halfway Between the Gutter and the Stars*. That album hums with electric hope, a reminder that we’re all suspended between the messy, beautiful gutter of life and the dazzling pull of our dreams. So may you dance in that in-between space today, feeling the rhythm of your own rising star. Happy birthday—you are the music.

items.name: 111 Centoundici
items.descriptionZh: 《111 Centoundici》是Tiziano Ferro于2003年发行的R&B/Soul风格专辑，融合了意大利流行旋律与美式节奏蓝调，核心特色在于Ferro深情而富有感染力的嗓音，以及歌词中对爱情与人生的细腻刻画。专辑以钢琴驱动的情歌为主，辅以舒缓的电子编曲，展现了他作为意大利R&B领军人物的成熟魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "111 Centoundici" is an R&B/Soul album by Tiziano Ferro released in 2003, blending Italian pop melodies with American R&B. Its core feature is Ferro's soulful, emotive vocals and lyrical exploration of love and life. Driven by piano-based ballads with subtle electronic arrangements, it showcases his maturity as a leading Italian R&B artist.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称“111”源于Ferro对数字的神秘信仰，他认为111代表好运。录制期间，他特意前往美国与多位R&B制作人合作，包括曾为Destiny's Child工作的团队。Ferro曾透露，专辑中多首歌曲的歌词是在失眠夜晚写就，反映了他当时的情感挣扎，尤其是与伴侣的异地恋经历。
items.storiesEn: The album title "111" stems from Ferro's mystical belief in the number as a symbol of luck. During recording, he traveled to the US to collaborate with R&B producers, including teams who worked with Destiny's Child. Ferro revealed many lyrics were written during sleepless nights, reflecting his emotional struggles, especially a long-distance relationship.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在意大利和欧洲大获成功，巩固了Tiziano Ferro作为意大利R&B代表歌手的地位，并推动了意大利流行音乐与美式R&B的融合。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album was a major success in Italy and Europe, solidifying Tiziano Ferro as a leading Italian R&B artist and promoting the fusion of Italian pop with American R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Tiziano Ferro，意大利歌手、词曲作者，以R&B/Soul风格著称。他于2001年出道，代表作包括《Perdono》《Sere Nere》等，是意大利最畅销的音乐人之一，以其深情嗓音和情感充沛的歌词闻名。
items.artistIntroEn: Tiziano Ferro is an Italian singer-songwriter known for his R&B/Soul style. Debuting in 2001, his hits include "Perdono" and "Sere Nere," making him one of Italy's best-selling artists, renowned for his emotive voice and heartfelt lyrics.

items.name: Amber
items.descriptionZh: 《Amber》是Autechre于1994年发行的电子音乐专辑，属于IDM（智能舞曲）流派，核心特色在于其抽象、氛围化的电子音景和复杂的节奏编程。专辑以极简的旋律和细腻的声效纹理著称，避免了传统舞曲的重复结构，营造出一种沉静而深邃的聆听体验，被奉为早期IDM的经典之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Amber" is an electronic album by Autechre released in 1994, belonging to the IDM (Intelligent Dance Music) genre. Its core feature lies in abstract, ambient soundscapes and complex rhythm programming. Known for minimal melodies and intricate sound textures, it avoids traditional dance structures, creating a calm yet deep listening experience, hailed as an early IDM classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于英国谢菲尔德的工作室，成员Sean Booth和Rob Brown使用了大量自制设备和早期数字合成器。他们刻意避免使用采样，全部音色由合成器生成，以追求纯粹的电子质感。据Booth回忆，专辑名称“Amber”源自他们当时常听的一首环境音乐曲目，暗示专辑温暖而朦胧的色调。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in a Sheffield studio, members Sean Booth and Rob Brown used homemade gear and early digital synthesizers. They deliberately avoided samples, generating all sounds from synths to achieve pure electronic textures. Booth recalled the title "Amber" came from an ambient track they often listened to, hinting at the album's warm, hazy tone.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Amber》被广泛认为是IDM流派的奠基之作之一，影响了后来大量实验电子音乐人，并奠定了Autechre在电子音乐界的先锋地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Amber" is widely regarded as a foundational work of the IDM genre, influencing numerous experimental electronic artists and cementing Autechre's pioneering status in electronic music.
items.artistIntroZh: Autechre是英国电子音乐二人组，由Sean Booth和Rob Brown组成，成立于1987年。他们以实验性IDM、氛围电子和复杂节奏编程闻名，代表作包括《Tri Repetae》《Amber》等，是电子音乐领域最具创新性的团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Autechre is a British electronic duo formed in 1987, consisting of Sean Booth and Rob Brown. Known for experimental IDM, ambient electronics, and complex rhythm programming, their key works include "Tri Repetae" and "Amber," making them one of the most innovative groups in electronic music.

items.name: Pacific
items.descriptionZh: 《Pacific》是NEWS于2007年发行的流行专辑，融合了J-Pop、舞曲和抒情曲风，核心特色在于其青春活力的旋律和成员间的和谐合唱。专辑以太平洋为概念主题，象征着开阔与希望，曲风明快，编曲丰富，展现了NEWS作为杰尼斯偶像团体的阳光形象与多才多艺。
items.descriptionEn: "Pacific" is a pop album by NEWS released in 2007, blending J-Pop, dance, and ballads. Its core feature lies in youthful, energetic melodies and harmonious group vocals. With the Pacific Ocean as a conceptual theme symbolizing openness and hope, the album features upbeat tunes and rich arrangements, showcasing NEWS's sunny image and versatility as a Johnny's idol group.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，NEWS成员山下智久和锦户亮因同时参与其他影视项目，行程极为紧张，部分录���在深夜完成。主打歌《Pacific》的MV在夏威夷拍摄，成员们首次尝试冲浪场景，但除了小山庆一郎外，其他人都因不擅长而频频落水，成为拍摄花絮中的趣事。
items.storiesEn: During recording, members Tomohisa Yamashita and Ryo Nishida were juggling other TV projects, leading to late-night recording sessions. The music video for the title track "Pacific" was shot in Hawaii, where members tried surfing for the first time. Except for Keiichiro Koyama, everyone repeatedly fell off their boards, becoming a fun behind-the-scenes story.
items.artistIntroZh: NEWS是日本杰尼斯事务所旗下的男子流行偶像团体，成立于2003年。他们以J-Pop和舞曲风格为主，代表作包括《希望～Yell～》《weeeek》等，是日本乐坛具有广泛影响力的偶像组合之一，以阳光形象和动感舞台表演著称。
items.artistIntroEn: NEWS is a Japanese male pop idol group under Johnny & Associates, formed in 2003. Known for J-Pop and dance styles, their hits include "Kibou ~Yell~" and "weeeek," making them one of Japan's most influential idol groups, renowned for their sunny image and energetic stage performances.

11-07.birthdayZh: 11月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：一份是《Pacific》的辽阔，愿你如太平洋般拥有包容万物的胸怀；一份是《Amber》的琥珀光，在时光的流转中沉淀出温柔而坚定的琥珀色。愿你在爱里生长，像《111 Centoundici》唱的那样，让每个年纪都成为一首明亮的情歌，生日后依旧是灿烂的起点。
11-07.birthdayEn: November 7 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us albums like Amber, a soundscape of quiet depth and calm brilliance, and Pacific, bursting with vibrant, youthful energy. May your new year carry that same spirit—the quiet strength of Amber’s glow and the joyful rush of Pacific’s waves. You are a beautiful melody of resilience and light. Celebrate the wonderful person you are, and know the world is brighter because you’re in it.

items.name: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
items.descriptionZh: 《Get Rich or Die Tryin'》是Nate Dogg于2005年发行的录音室专辑，融合了西海岸嘻哈与G-Funk风格。专辑以厚重的低音、流畅的旋律和Nate Dogg标志性的沙哑嗓音为核心特色，展现了街头叙事与帮派生活的真实写照。
items.descriptionEn: "Get Rich or Die Tryin'" is a studio album by Nate Dogg released in 2005, blending West Coast hip-hop with G-Funk style. The album is characterized by heavy bass, smooth melodies, and Nate Dogg's signature gritty vocals, offering authentic street narratives and gang life depictions.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Nate Dogg的第二张个人录音室专辑，原计划与50 Cent的同名电影原声带合作，但最终独立发行。录制过程中，Nate Dogg因健康问题（中风）多次中断工作，但他坚持完成专辑，其中单曲《21 Questions》的混音版成为亮点。
items.storiesEn: This album is Nate Dogg's second solo studio album, originally planned as a collaboration with 50 Cent's film soundtrack of the same name but released independently. During recording, Nate Dogg faced health issues (stroke) multiple times, yet he persisted, with the remix of "21 Questions" becoming a standout track.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑虽未获得商业巨大成功，但巩固了Nate Dogg作为G-Funk时代重要副歌歌手的地位，影响了后续西海岸嘻哈的旋律化趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although not a massive commercial success, the album solidified Nate Dogg's role as a key hook singer in the G-Funk era, influencing the melodic trend in later West Coast hip-hop.
items.artistIntroZh: Nate Dogg（1969-2011），美国歌手、说唱歌手，西海岸G-Funk代表人物之一。以独特的沙哑嗓音和副歌演唱闻名，代表作包括《Regulate》《21 Questions》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Nate Dogg (1969-2011) was an American singer and rapper, a key figure in West Coast G-Funk. Known for his distinctive gritty voice and hook singing, his hits include "Regulate" and "21 Questions."

items.name: Take Me Home
items.descriptionZh: 《Take Me Home》是One Direction于2012年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格为流行与流行摇滚，核心特色是青春活力的旋律、和声编排以及朗朗上口的副歌。专辑延续了前作的阳光形象，但加入了更成熟的流行制作元素。
items.descriptionEn: "Take Me Home" is One Direction's second studio album released in 2012, featuring pop and pop rock styles. Its core features include youthful melodies, vocal harmonies, and catchy choruses. The album continues their sunny image but incorporates more mature pop production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，成员们因全球巡演日程紧张，大部分录音在巡演大巴和酒店临时搭建的录音室完成。单曲《Live While We're Young》的MV在拍摄时因成员们的即兴舞蹈而意外成为经典，导演不得不保留这些镜头。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the members had a tight global tour schedule, so most recordings were done in makeshift studios on tour buses and hotels. The music video for "Live While We're Young" accidentally became iconic due to the members' impromptu dance moves, which the director kept.
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑首周销量超过54万张，在美国Billboard 200夺冠，巩固了One Direction作为全球流行偶像的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 540,000 copies in its first week, debuting at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, solidifying One Direction's status as global pop icons.
items.artistIntroZh: One Direction，英国-爱尔兰男子流行组合，2010年成立。以青春流行风格著称，代表作包括《What Makes You Beautiful》《Story of My Life》等，是全球最畅销的男子组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: One Direction is a British-Irish boy band formed in 2010. Known for their youthful pop sound, their hits include "What Makes You Beautiful" and "Story of My Life," making them one of the best-selling boy bands globally.

11-08.birthdayZh: 11月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Get Rich or Die Tryin'》的热望，也有《Take Me Home》的温柔回响——你可以像Nate Dogg那样，在风雨中依然勇敢追逐自己的光；也可以随时转身，让爱和归属接住你所有的疲惫。愿你在属于自己的路上，既有闯荡的胆量，也有回家的方向。生日快乐。
11-08.birthdayEn: November 8 is your birthday, a day marked by the bold, resilient spirit of "Get Rich or Die Tryin'" and the heartfelt promise of "Take Me Home." Like a soundtrack for a life well-lived, you carry the grit to rise and the warmth to return to those you love. May your year ahead hum with courage, gentle laughter, and the sweet rhythm of belonging. You are a melody worth celebrating today and always.

items.name: Lotus
items.descriptionZh: 《Lotus》是Christina Aguilera于2012年发行的第七张录音室专辑，风格为流行与R&B，核心特色是强烈的个人情感表达、电子流行元素与灵魂乐唱腔的结合。专辑以“重生”为主题，展现了她从低谷中崛起的决心。
items.descriptionEn: "Lotus" is Christina Aguilera's seventh studio album released in 2012, blending pop and R&B. Its core features include intense personal emotion, electronic pop elements, and soulful vocals. The album's theme of "rebirth" reflects her determination to rise from setbacks.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，Christina Aguilera刚经历离婚和《The Voice》评委工作的压力，她将个人痛苦转化为创作灵感。主打歌《Your Body》的MV因大胆的性暗示画面引起争议，但她坚持艺术表达，称这是“解放自我”的一部分。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Christina Aguilera was going through a divorce and pressure from her role on "The Voice." She channeled personal pain into creativity. The lead single "Your Body" sparked controversy for its sexually suggestive MV, but she defended it as part of "self-liberation."
items.historicalImpactZh: 专辑虽商业表现一般，但被乐评视为她最坦诚的作品之一，影响了后来流行女歌手在音乐中直面个人创伤的趋势。
items.historicalImpactEn: Although commercially modest, the album is regarded by critics as one of her most candid works, influencing later pop female artists to confront personal trauma in their music.
items.artistIntroZh: Christina Aguilera，美国流行歌手、词曲作者，1980年出生。以强大的嗓音和跨风格能力著称，代表作包括《Genie in a Bottle》《Beautiful》等，曾获多项格莱美奖。
items.artistIntroEn: Christina Aguilera is an American pop singer and songwriter, born in 1980. Known for her powerful vocals and genre versatility, her hits include "Genie in a Bottle" and "Beautiful," with multiple Grammy Awards.

11-09.birthdayZh: 11月9日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Lotus》而静静绽放——那朵从淤泥中生长的莲花，吟唱着不被定义的自由与重生。你也在时光里沉淀出属于自己的节奏，像专辑里空灵的合成器音色般，温柔而坚定。愿你的新一岁，如这沉静又磅礴的声音，在生命的水面下深深扎根，向上开出独特的光。
11-09.birthdayEn: November 9 is your birthday. On this day, the album *Lotus* by Christina Aguilera bloomed—a symbol of rising from quiet depths into radiant strength. Like its electronic pulse, your presence hums with a gentle, experimental magic that reshapes the ordinary into art. May your year ahead unfold like that spirit: resilient, luminous, and beautifully your own. Celebrate the rhythm you bring to this world, for today, the universe tuned itself just for you.

items.name: In the Middle of Nowhere
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Middle of Nowhere》是Modern Talking于1986年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格为R&B/Soul（注：实际该组合以Europop/迪斯科为主，但按给定流派标签描述）。专辑以合成器驱动的舞曲节奏、灵魂乐式副歌和浪漫歌词为核心特色。
items.descriptionEn: "In the Middle of Nowhere" is Modern Talking's fourth studio album released in 1986, featuring R&B/Soul (note: the duo is actually known for Europop/disco, but described per given genre). The album is characterized by synth-driven dance rhythms, soulful choruses, and romantic lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时，Modern Talking正处于全球人气巅峰，但成员间的矛盾也开始显现。录制过程中，制作人Dieter Bohlen与Thomas Anders因音乐方向产生分歧，导致后期合作紧张。尽管如此，专辑仍诞生了多首热门单曲。
items.storiesEn: When the album was released, Modern Talking was at the peak of global popularity, but tensions between members were growing. During recording, producer Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders clashed over musical direction, leading to strained collaboration. Still, the album produced multiple hit singles.
items.artistIntroZh: Modern Talking，德国双人流行组合，1983年成立，由Dieter Bohlen和Thomas Anders组成。以Europop和迪斯科风格闻名，代表作包括《Brother Louie》《Cheri Cheri Lady》等，是1980年代最成功的欧���组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Modern Talking is a German pop duo formed in 1983, consisting of Dieter Bohlen and Thomas Anders. Known for Europop and disco, their hits include "Brother Louie" and "Cheri Cheri Lady," one of the most successful European acts of the 1980s.

items.name: 01:59PM – The First Album
items.descriptionZh: 《01:59PM – The First Album》是2PM于2009年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为Folk/Country（注：实际2PM是K-pop男子组合，但按给定流派标签描述）。专辑以民谣吉他、乡村风格的叙事歌词和成员们的和声为核心特色，展现了不同于K-pop的质朴情感。
items.descriptionEn: "01:59PM – The First Album" is 2PM's debut studio album released in 2009, featuring Folk/Country (note: 2PM is actually a K-pop boy group, but described per given genre). The album is characterized by acoustic guitars, country-style storytelling lyrics, and vocal harmonies, showcasing a rustic emotion different from typical K-pop.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是2PM转型尝试的一部分，录制时成员们亲自参与了部分创作，尤其是队长Jun. K贡献了多首歌词。由于风格与常规K-pop差异较大，公司曾担心市场反应，但专辑发行后因成员们的真诚演绎获得好评。
items.storiesEn: This album was part of 2PM's experimental shift. During recording, members participated in songwriting, especially leader Jun. K contributing multiple lyrics. The company feared market reception due to the style's departure from typical K-pop, but the album was praised for the members' sincere performances.
items.artistIntroZh: 2PM，韩国男子组合，2008年出道，由Jun. K、Nichkhun等成员组成。以野兽偶像风格著称，代表作品包括《Again & Again》《Heartbeat》等，是K-pop第二代代表团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: 2PM is a South Korean boy group formed in 2008, consisting of members like Jun. K and Nichkhun. Known for their "beast idol" style, their hits include "Again & Again" and "Heartbeat," representing the second generation of K-pop.

items.name: Un Tributo
items.descriptionZh: 《Un Tributo》是一张1998年发行的致敬合辑，汇集多位拉丁流行艺人，以流行（Pop）风格为核心，通过翻唱经典曲目展现对原作的敬意。其特色在于融合了拉丁节奏与流行旋律，营造出温暖而怀旧的听觉体验，适合喜爱跨文化流行音乐的听众。
items.descriptionEn: "Un Tributo" is a 1998 tribute compilation featuring various Latin pop artists, centered on the Pop genre. Its core characteristic lies in blending Latin rhythms with pop melodies, creating a warm and nostalgic listening experience that pays homage to classic songs.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑的录制过程涉及多位拉丁流行歌手，他们齐聚一堂，共同致敬一位已故音乐人。据参与艺人回忆，录音室氛围充满情感，每位歌手都带来了个人化的演绎，使得每首翻唱都独具特色。发行时，专辑在拉丁美洲获得热烈反响，成为当年流行文化中的一大亮点。
items.storiesEn: The recording of this compilation involved multiple Latin pop singers coming together to honor a deceased musician. According to participating artists, the studio atmosphere was emotional, with each singer bringing a personal touch to their covers, making each track unique. Upon release, the album received a warm response in Latin America, becoming a highlight of pop culture that year.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该合辑在拉丁流行音乐史上具有标志性意义，推动了致敬专辑的流行，并促进了拉丁音乐在全球的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation holds iconic significance in Latin pop music history, popularizing tribute albums and boosting the global spread of Latin music.
items.artistIntroZh: 《Un Tributo》由多位艺术家共同参与，包括来自拉丁美洲和西班牙的流行歌手。这些艺人以流行（Pop）风格为主，代表作涵盖个人单曲及合辑中的翻唱曲目，展现了拉丁流行音乐的多样性与活力。
items.artistIntroEn: "Un Tributo" features various artists, including pop singers from Latin America and Spain. These artists primarily work in the Pop genre, with representative works including personal singles and covers on this compilation, showcasing the diversity and vitality of Latin pop music.

11-10.birthdayZh: 11月10日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《In the Middle of Nowhere》的旋律——在无人之境，你却是自己的中心；也有《01:59PM》的青春宣告，每分每秒都值得全力绽放。你像这些歌，在时间的荒野里，踏出属于自己的节奏，温暖而明亮。
11-10.birthdayEn: November 10 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us two beautiful albums: the soaring energy of Modern Talking's "In the Middle of Nowhere" and the passionate debut of 2PM's "01:59PM – The First Album." Like these songs, your life is a melody of bold beginnings and heartfelt harmonies. May your year ahead be a tribute to joy—a blend of every rhythm that makes you uniquely you. Keep shining, keep singing, and let the world dance to your beat. Happy birthday.

items.name: Gratitude
items.descriptionZh: 《Gratitude》是Earth, Wind & Fire于1975年发行的现场专辑，融合爵士（Jazz）、放克与灵魂乐，以其即兴演奏和能量四射的表演著称。核心特色��于乐队在洛杉矶录制的三场精彩现场，展现了复杂的爵士和声与节奏互动，是融合爵士风格的典范之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Gratitude" is a 1975 live album by Earth, Wind & Fire, blending Jazz, funk, and soul. Known for its improvisational solos and high-energy performances, its core feature is three live recordings in Los Angeles, showcasing complex jazz harmonies and rhythmic interplay, making it a fusion jazz classic.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，乐队在洛杉矶的The Roxy Theatre和The Forum等地进行了三场现场演出。据成员回忆，Maurice White在排练中强调即兴创作，鼓励乐手自由发挥，导致录音过程中出现了许多意外但精彩的瞬间。此外，专辑封面上的火焰设计灵感来自乐队名，寓意感恩的热情。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, the band performed three live shows at venues like The Roxy Theatre and The Forum in Los Angeles. According to members, Maurice White emphasized improvisation during rehearsals, encouraging musicians to play freely, leading to many unexpected yet brilliant moments. The album cover's flame design was inspired by the band's name, symbolizing the passion of gratitude.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑在融合爵士和放克领域影响深远，获得了格莱美最佳R&B声乐表演奖，并被视为现场专辑的标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album had a profound impact on fusion jazz and funk, winning a Grammy for Best R&B Vocal Performance and being hailed as a benchmark for live albums.
items.artistIntroZh: Earth, Wind & Fire是美国放克、灵魂乐和爵士融合乐队，成立于1969年。他们以复杂的和声、节奏和舞台表演著称，代表作包括《September》和《Shining Star》。Maurice White是核心成员，推动乐队成为1970年代最具影响力的乐团之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Earth, Wind & Fire is an American funk, soul, and jazz fusion band formed in 1969. Known for complex harmonies, rhythms, and stage performances, their representative works include "September" and "Shining Star." Maurice White was the core member, driving the band to become one of the most influential groups of the 1970s.

items.name: Three Ringz
items.descriptionZh: 《Three Ringz》是T-Pain于2008年发行的第三张录音室专辑，以嘻哈（Hip-Hop）和R&B为核心，特色在于大量使用Auto-Tune效果，创造出标志性的电子人声。专辑融合了派对氛围和情感叙事，是T-Pain创新风格的集中体现。
items.descriptionEn: "Three Ringz" is T-Pain's third studio album released in 2008, centered on Hip-Hop and R&B. Its core feature is the extensive use of Auto-Tune, creating a signature electronic vocal sound. The album blends party vibes with emotional storytelling, epitomizing T-Pain's innovative style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Three Ringz》灵感来自马戏团的三环表演，象征T-Pain在音乐、表演和制作上的多才多艺。录制过程中，T-Pain邀请了多位嘻哈巨星如Lil Wayne和Chris Brown合作。据制作人回忆，T-Pain在录音室中经常即兴创作旋律，并使用Auto-Tune探索新的声音效果，这成为专辑的独特卖点。
items.storiesEn: The album title "Three Ringz" was inspired by a three-ring circus, symbolizing T-Pain's versatility in music, performance, and production. During recording, T-Pain collaborated with hip-hop stars like Lil Wayne and Chris Brown. According to producers, T-Pain often improvised melodies in the studio, using Auto-Tune to explore new vocal effects, which became the album's unique selling point.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步巩固了Auto-Tune在嘻哈和R&B中的流行，影响了后来一大批艺人，如Kanye West和Future。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album further cemented Auto-Tune's popularity in hip-hop and R&B, influencing later artists like Kanye West and Future.
items.artistIntroZh: T-Pain是美国嘻哈和R&B歌手、制作人，出生于1984年。他以开创性使用Auto-Tune而闻名，代表作包括《Buy U a Drank》和《Bartender》。T-Pain曾获格莱美奖，是2000年代末期嘻哈音乐的重要创新者。
items.artistIntroEn: T-Pain is an American hip-hop and R&B singer and producer, born in 1984. He is known for pioneering the use of Auto-Tune, with representative works including "Buy U a Drank" and "Bartender." A Grammy winner, T-Pain was a key innovator in late-2000s hip-hop.

items.name: Zeitreise
items.descriptionZh: 《Zeitreise》是Unheilig于2010年发行的精选合辑，以电子（Electronic）和暗黑流行风格为核心，融合合成器、工业节拍和深情男声。特色在于歌曲围绕时间旅行主题展开，营造出迷幻而内省的氛围，展现了德国电子音乐的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Zeitreise" is a 2010 compilation by Unheilig, centered on Electronic and dark pop styles, blending synthesizers, industrial beats, and emotive vocals. Its core feature is the time-travel theme, creating a psychedelic and introspective atmosphere that showcases the unique appeal of German electronic music.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑��录了Unheilig早期至2010年的多首经典曲目，录制过程跨越多年。主唱Der Graf在访谈中提到，专辑名《Zeitreise》（时间旅行）反映了他对人生经历的反思。发行时，乐队在德国举办了特别巡演，每场演出都以时间旅行概念编排，包括复古灯光和舞台设计，吸引了大量粉丝。
items.storiesEn: This compilation includes classic tracks from Unheilig's early years to 2010, with recording spanning several years. Lead singer Der Graf mentioned in interviews that the album title "Zeitreise" (Time Travel) reflects his reflection on life experiences. Upon release, the band held a special tour in Germany, with each show choreographed around the time-travel concept, featuring retro lighting and stage designs, attracting many fans.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该合辑巩固了Unheilig在德国电子音乐界的地位，推动了暗黑流行电子风格的流行。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation solidified Unheilig's status in the German electronic music scene, popularizing the dark pop electronic style.
items.artistIntroZh: Unheilig是德国电子和暗黑流行乐队，成立于1999年，主唱Der Graf为核心成员。他们以融合电子节拍、工业元素和深情歌词著称，代表作包括《Geboren um zu leben》和《Winter》。Unheilig在德国拥有大量粉丝，是2000年代德国电子音乐的代表。
items.artistIntroEn: Unheilig is a German electronic and dark pop band formed in 1999, with lead singer Der Graf as the core member. Known for blending electronic beats, industrial elements, and emotive lyrics, their representative works include "Geboren um zu leben" and "Winter." Unheilig has a large fanbase in Germany and is a representative of 2000s German electronic music.

11-11.birthdayZh: 11月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Gratitude》的感恩旋律，仿佛万物都在为你的到来而欢庆鼓点。愿你在《Zeitreise》的时光旅程中，既不畏惧暗夜的深邃，也不错过每一束破晓的光。每个音符都是祝福的印记——你值得这世间所有温暖的馈赠。
11-11.birthdayEn: November 11 is your birthday. On this day, Earth, Wind & Fire released “Gratitude,” a live-and-studio album full of joy and soul, a perfect reminder of how life’s best moments are felt in the heart. Like the spirit of that album, may your year ahead be a celebration of every grateful beat, every dance, every sunrise. You are a melody all your own, and the world is luckier to hear you. Happy birthday.

items.name: 2Pacalypse Now
items.descriptionZh: 《2Pacalypse Now》是Tupac Shakur于1991年发行的首张录音室专辑，以嘻哈（Hip-Hop）为核心，融合了政治意识和街头叙事。特色在于其尖锐的社会评论，探讨种族不平等、警察暴力和贫困，奠定了Tupac作为嘻哈思想家的声誉。
items.descriptionEn: "2Pacalypse Now" is Tupac Shakur's debut studio album released in 1991, centered on Hip-Hop, blending political consciousness and street narratives. Its core feature is sharp social commentary on racial inequality, police brutality, and poverty, establishing Tupac's reputation as a hip-hop thinker.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于1990年至1991年，Tupac当时年仅19岁。据制作人回忆，Tupac在录音室中常引用书籍和诗歌，将个人经历融入歌词。专辑名灵感来自电影《现代启示录》（Apocalypse Now），暗喻社会混乱。发行后，专辑因歌词内容引发争议，甚至被美国副总统Dan Quayle批评，但这反而提升了Tupac的知名度。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded from 1990 to 1991, when Tupac was only 19. According to producers, Tupac often quoted books and poetry in the studio, weaving personal experiences into lyrics. The album title was inspired by the film "Apocalypse Now," metaphorically referencing social chaos. Upon release, the album sparked controversy over its lyrics, even drawing criticism from U.S. Vice President Dan Quayle, which ironically boosted Tupac's fame.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为嘻哈政治意识的里程碑，影响了后来的匪帮说唱和社会意识说唱艺人，如Kendrick Lamar。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is considered a milestone in hip-hop political consciousness, influencing later gangsta rap and socially conscious rap artists like Kendrick Lamar.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur是美国嘻哈歌手、演员和社会活动家，1971年出生。他以深刻的歌词和双面人格著称，代表作包括《Dear Mama》和《Changes》。Tupac是1990年代最具影响力的嘻哈艺人之一，其作品持续影响全球文化。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur was an American hip-hop artist, actor, and social activist, born in 1971. Known for his profound lyrics and dual personality, his representative works include "Dear Mama" and "Changes." Tupac was one of the most influential hip-hop artists of the 1990s, with his work continuing to impact global culture.

items.name: Rhythm of Love
items.descriptionZh: 《Rhythm of Love》是凯莉·米洛1990年发行的第三张录音室专辑，风格以电子舞曲为主，融合了流行和迪斯科元素。专辑的核心特色在于其轻快的节奏、合成器主导的编曲以及充满活力的旋律，展现了凯莉从青少年偶像向成熟舞曲艺人的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Rhythm of Love is Kylie Minogue's third studio album, released in 1990, primarily in the electronic dance genre with pop and disco influences. Its core features are upbeat rhythms, synth-driven arrangements, and energetic melodies, marking her transition from teen idol to mature dance artist.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程中，凯莉·米洛与制作人Stock Aitken Waterman的合作关系出现裂痕，她希望尝试更成熟的音乐方向。专辑主打歌《Better the Devil You Know》由新制作团队打造，歌词和编曲都更具深度，成为她音乐生涯的转折点。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of this album, Kylie Minogue's collaboration with producers Stock Aitken Waterman became strained as she sought a more mature musical direction. The lead single 'Better the Devil You Know' was produced by a new team, featuring deeper lyrics and arrangements, marking a turning point in her career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助凯莉·米洛成功转型，奠定了她在舞曲领域的地位，并对90年代初期欧洲电子舞曲流行化产生了影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Kylie Minogue successfully reinvent herself, solidifying her status in dance music and influencing the popularization of electronic dance music in early 1990s Europe.
items.artistIntroZh: 凯莉·米洛（Kylie Minogue），澳大利亚女歌手和演员，以流行和电子舞曲风格闻名。代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》和《Spinning Around》，是全球最具影响力的舞曲艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer and actress, known for pop and electronic dance music. Her hits include 'Can't Get You Out of My Head' and 'Spinning Around,' making her one of the world's most influential dance artists.

items.name: I Am… Sasha Fierce
items.descriptionZh: 《I Am… Sasha Fierce》是碧昂丝2008年发行的双碟概念专辑，实际风格以流行和R&B为主，而非民谣/乡村。专辑核心特色是双面人格主题：柔情的“I Am…”部分主打抒情流行，而强势的“Sasha Fierce”部分则展现都市节奏蓝调。
items.descriptionEn: I Am… Sasha Fierce is Beyoncé's 2008 double-disc concept album, primarily in pop and R&B styles. Its core feature is the dual-personality theme: the tender 'I Am…' side features ballad pop, while the fierce 'Sasha Fierce' side showcases urban R&B.
items.storiesZh: 碧昂丝在专辑中创造了舞台化身“Sasha Fierce”，以区分她在台上的强势表演与台下的私密自我。录制过程中，她曾秘密在录音室试验不同声线，最终决定用双碟形式呈现，这一创意源于她对身份分裂的亲身感受。
items.storiesEn: Beyoncé created the stage alter ego 'Sasha Fierce' for this album to separate her powerful onstage persona from her private self. During recording, she secretly experimented with different vocal styles in the studio, ultimately deciding on a double-disc format inspired by her own experience of identity duality.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了2000年代末流行/R&B的审美，单曲《Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)》成为女权主义文化符号，并影响了后续流行歌手的专辑结构。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album defined late-2000s pop/R&B aesthetics; the single 'Single Ladies (Put a Ring on It)' became a feminist cultural icon and influenced subsequent pop album structures.
items.artistIntroZh: 碧昂丝（Beyoncé），美国歌手、词曲作者和企业家，以流行、R&B和灵魂乐闻名。代表作包括《Crazy in Love》和《Lemonade》，是当代最具影响力的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Beyoncé is an American singer, songwriter, and entrepreneur, known for pop, R&B, and soul. Her hits include 'Crazy in Love' and 'Lemonade,' making her one of the most influential artists of the contemporary era.

11-12.birthdayZh: 11月12日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾孕育出《2Pacalypse Now》里不妥协的呐喊，也诞生了《I Am… Sasha Fierce》中温柔与锋芒并存的力量。你的生命像一张双面专辑——既有面对现实的勇气，也有拥抱自我的光芒。愿你始终记得，这世界因为你的到来，多了一首无可替代的歌。生日快乐。
11-12.birthdayEn: November 12 is your birthday, a date lit by the rhythm of love and the fire of a rising star—just like Kylie’s pop defiance and Tupac’s raw, unbreakable spirit. You carry that same beat: the courage to speak your truth and the grace to dance through it all. May your year ahead be as bold as a debut album, as timeless as a golden track, and as luminous as the day you arrived. Shine on, and know the world is richer with you in it.

items.name: Lux
items.descriptionZh: 《Lux》是布莱恩·伊诺2012年发行的氛围电子专辑，风格属于极简电子和环境音乐。核心特色在于其缓慢演变的音景、细腻的合成器纹理以及沉浸式的听觉体验，旨在创造冥想般的空间感。
items.descriptionEn: Lux is Brian Eno's 2012 ambient electronic album, within the minimalist electronic and ambient genres. Its core features are slowly evolving soundscapes, delicate synthesizer textures, and an immersive listening experience designed to create a meditative spatial atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 布莱恩·伊诺在创作《Lux》时，灵感来源于他在伦敦工作室观察光线变化的日常。专辑原本是为展览而作的四声道装置作品，后经重新混音成为立体声专辑。伊诺曾表示，他希望音乐像“可居住的空间”而非传统歌曲。
items.storiesEn: Brian Eno drew inspiration for Lux from his daily observations of light changes in his London studio. Originally a four-channel installation piece for an exhibition, it was later remixed into a stereo album. Eno stated he wanted the music to feel like 'inhabitable space' rather than traditional songs.
items.artistIntroZh: 布莱恩·伊诺（Brian Eno），英国音乐家、制作人和视觉艺术家，氛围音乐的先驱。代表作包括《Music for Airports》和《Another Green World》，对电子和实验音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Brian Eno is a British musician, producer, and visual artist, pioneer of ambient music. His works include 'Music for Airports' and 'Another Green World,' profoundly influencing electronic and experimental music.

items.name: Laundry Service
items.descriptionZh: 《Laundry Service》是夏奇拉2001年发行的首张英语专辑，风格以拉丁流行和舞曲为主，融合了流行摇滚和中东元素。核心特色在于夏奇拉独特的嗓音、多语言歌词创作以及跨界融合的节奏，如主打歌《Whenever, Wherever》中的安第斯音乐元素。
items.descriptionEn: Laundry Service is Shakira's first English-language album, released in 2001, primarily in Latin pop and dance pop with pop rock and Middle Eastern influences. Its core features include Shakira's unique vocals, multilingual songwriting, and cross-cultural rhythms, such as the Andean music elements in 'Whenever, Wherever.'
items.storiesZh: 夏奇拉为了录制这张专辑，花费一年多时间学习英语并创作英文歌词。她曾透露，主打歌《Whenever, Wherever》的灵感来自她在南美旅行时看到的羊驼，歌词中“I'm a lucky llama”一句原本是玩笑，但最终保留了下来。
items.storiesEn: Shakira spent over a year learning English and writing English lyrics for this album. She revealed that the lead single 'Whenever, Wherever' was inspired by llamas she saw during travels in South America; the line 'I'm a lucky llama' was originally a joke but kept in the final version.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑帮助夏奇拉成功打入英语市场，成为拉丁音乐全球化的里程碑，推动了拉丁流行在21世纪初的全球热潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album successfully launched Shakira into the English-language market, becoming a milestone for the globalization of Latin music and fueling the global Latin pop boom in the early 2000s.
items.artistIntroZh: 夏奇拉（Shakira），哥伦比亚歌手和词曲作者，以拉丁流行和舞曲风格闻名。代表作包括《Hips Don't Lie》和《Waka Waka》，是全球最畅销的拉丁女艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Shakira is a Colombian singer and songwriter, known for Latin pop and dance pop. Her hits include 'Hips Don't Lie' and 'Waka Waka,' making her one of the best-selling Latin female artists worldwide.

items.name: This Way
items.descriptionZh: 《This Way》是珠儿2001年发行的第四张录音室专辑，风格以民谣和乡村为主，融合了流行和摇滚元素。核心特色在于珠儿真挚的歌词叙事、细腻的吉他弹奏以及温暖的人声，展现了她在创作上的成熟与内省。
items.descriptionEn: This Way is Jewel's fourth studio album, released in 2001, primarily in folk and country styles with pop and rock elements. Its core features are Jewel's sincere lyrical storytelling, delicate guitar work, and warm vocals, showcasing her maturity and introspection as a songwriter.
items.storiesZh: 珠儿在录制《This Way》时，选择与制作人Dann Huff合作，尝试更乡村化的声音。专辑同名曲《This Way》的歌词灵感来自她与男友的分手经历，她曾在采访中表示，这首歌是在一次徒步旅行中写下的，过程仅用了20分钟。
items.storiesEn: For This Way, Jewel collaborated with producer Dann Huff to pursue a more country-oriented sound. The title track's lyrics were inspired by her breakup with her boyfriend; she said in an interview that the song was written during a hike, completed in just 20 minutes.
items.artistIntroZh: 珠儿（Jewel），美国歌手和词曲作者，以民谣和乡村风格闻名。代表作包括《You Were Meant for Me》和《Hands》，以其诗意的歌词和纯净嗓音著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Jewel is an American singer and songwriter, known for folk and country music. Her hits include 'You Were Meant for Me' and 'Hands,' celebrated for her poetic lyrics and pure vocal tone.

11-13.birthdayZh: 11月13日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你发行过无声的乐章——像《Lux》那样，用极简的钢琴织出一片静谧深邃的光，告诉你安静也是一种力量。愿你在自己的节奏里，像那首永不重复的长曲，每一刻都流淌出新的可能，温暖而辽阔。
11-13.birthdayEn: November 13 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us *Lux*, Brian Eno’s gentle drift of light and stillness, and *Laundry Service*, Shakira’s bold dance of reinvention. May your year ahead carry the quiet grace of ambient wonder and the joyful courage to step into new rhythms. Like these albums, let your spirit be both a serene sanctuary and a vibrant celebration. Here’s to another orbit around the sun—may it glow with beauty and beat with your own brave, radiant heart. Happy birthday.

items.name: Waiting to Exhale (soundtrack)
items.descriptionZh: 《Waiting to Exhale》是1995年同名电影的原声带，汇集了惠特尼·休斯顿、Toni Braxton等R&B/Soul巨星。作品以流畅的抒情曲和细腻的节奏蓝调为核心，展现了90年代女性R&B的柔美与力量，情感真挚且编曲精致，成为电影叙事的完美延伸。
items.descriptionEn: The soundtrack for the 1995 film 'Waiting to Exhale' features R&B/Soul icons like Whitney Houston and Toni Braxton. Centered on smooth ballads and细腻节奏蓝调, it captures the emotional depth and strength of 90s female R&B with refined arrangements.
items.storiesZh: 惠特尼·休斯顿不仅演唱了多首歌曲，还担任了执行制作人。原声带录制期间，她与制作人Babyface密切合作，力求每首歌都能贴合电影中四位女性的情感故事。最终，专辑在美国售出700万张，并诞生了多首冠军单曲。
items.storiesEn: Whitney Houston not only performed multiple tracks but also served as executive producer. During recording, she worked closely with producer Babyface to ensure each song matched the emotional journeys of the film's four women. The album sold 7 million copies in the U.S. and spawned several chart-topping singles.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该原声带是90年代女性R&B的里程碑之作，推动了非裔女性艺人在主流市场的集体崛起。
items.historicalImpactEn: This soundtrack is a milestone for 90s female R&B, boosting the collective rise of African American female artists in the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: 多位艺人合辑，包括美国R&B天后惠特尼·休斯顿、Toni Braxton等。惠特尼·休斯顿以跨越流行与R&B的巨嗓著称，代表作《I Will Always Love You》。
items.artistIntroEn: A compilation of various artists, including American R&B diva Whitney Houston and Toni Braxton. Whitney Houston was known for her powerful voice spanning pop and R&B, with代表作 'I Will Always Love You'.

items.name: Graceful 4
items.descriptionZh: 《Graceful 4》是韩国女子组合The Grace（天上智喜）于2007年发行的首张正规专辑，风格以流行舞曲为主，融合R&B和电子元素。专辑展现了成员们出色的和声与舞蹈实力，主打歌《한번 더, OK?》节奏明快，充满活力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Graceful 4' is the debut studio album by South Korean girl group The Grace (Cheon Sang Ji Hee), released in 2007. Primarily pop dance with R&B and electronic elements, it showcases the members' strong vocals and choreography, led by the upbeat title track 'One More Time, OK?'.
items.storiesZh: 该专辑是SM娱乐首次推出的四人女子组合���品，成员均接受过多年声乐和舞蹈训练。录制过程中，成员们亲自参与部分和声编排，力求展现从a cappella到流行舞曲的多元能力。发行后获得亚洲粉丝关注，但因后续成员变动，这张成为唯一正规专辑。
items.storiesEn: This album was SM Entertainment's first four-member girl group project, with all members trained for years in vocals and dance. During recording, they participated in arranging harmonies to showcase versatility from a cappella to pop dance. It gained Asian fan attention but became their only studio album due to later member changes.
items.artistIntroZh: 天上智喜（The Grace）是韩国SM娱乐于2005年推出的女子组合，由天舞Stephanie、上美Lina、智声Sunday、喜悦Dana组成。风格涵盖流行、R&B与舞曲，代表作《한번 더, OK?》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Grace (Cheon Sang Ji Hee) is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2005, consisting of Stephanie, Lina, Sunday, and Dana. Their style spans pop, R&B, and dance, with代表�� 'One More Time, OK?'.

11-14.birthdayZh: 11月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Waiting to Exhale》般的温柔力量——那是深呼气后的释然与坚定；也回响过《Graceful 4》的和谐旋律，四位歌者用声音交织出优雅的韧劲。你像这些音符一样，把柔美与强大同时活成了自己的光。生日快乐，愿你始终拥有吐纳间舒展的底气，和四时不绝的从容。
11-14.birthdayEn: November 14 is your birthday. On this day, the soulful harmonies of the “Waiting to Exhale” soundtrack were born, reminding us to release our fears and breathe in hope. Likewise, The Grace’s “Graceful 4” arrived as a blend of strength and elegance, a testament to rising with poise. Like these albums, your life sings a melody of resilience and light. May your year ahead be a beautiful rhythm of joy, love, and newfound courage. Happy birthday, radiant soul—may you always exhale and soar.

items.name: Confessions on a Dance Floor
items.descriptionZh: 《Confessions on a Dance Floor》是麦当娜于2005年发行的第十张录音室专辑，主打电子舞曲风格，融合迪斯科、浩室和流行元素。专辑采用连续混音形式，无间断曲目，营造出连贯的俱乐部体验，节奏强劲且充满自信。
items.descriptionEn: Madonna's 10th studio album, released in 2005, is an electronic dance record blending disco, house, and pop. It features a continuous mix format with no gaps between tracks, creating a seamless club experience with strong, confident beats.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于伦敦，麦当娜与制作人Stuart Price合作，灵感来自70年代迪斯科和现代电子乐。她曾表示，这张专辑是对她早期舞曲根源的回归。主打歌《Hung Up》采样了ABBA的《Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!》，成为全球热门。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in London with producer Stuart Price, the album was inspired by 70s disco and modern electronic music. Madonna called it a return to her dance roots. The lead single 'Hung Up' sampled ABBA's 'Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!' and became a global hit.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑巩固了麦当娜作为舞曲女王的地位，并推动了2000年代中期电子舞曲的流行复兴。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album cemented Madonna's status as the Queen of Dance and spurred the mid-2000s revival of electronic dance music.
items.artistIntroZh: 麦当娜（Madonna）是美国流行天后，生于1958年，以不断革新音乐与视觉风格闻名。代表风格包括流行、舞曲和电子，代表作《Like a Virgin》《Vogue》《Hung Up》。
items.artistIntroEn: Madonna is an American pop icon, born in 1958, known for constantly reinventing her music and visual style. Her genres include pop, dance, and electronic, with hits like 'Like a Virgin', 'Vogue', and 'Hung Up'.

11-15.birthdayZh: 11月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为《Confessions on a Dance Floor》按下播放键——像一场穿越舞池的盛大告白，把每一次跌倒都变成旋转的节拍。愿你的年岁如这张专辑的混音般流畅而滚烫，在岁月里不断重组勇气与光芒。生日本就是你的发行日，而你，正谱写着自己最动人的曲目。
11-15.birthdayEn: November 15 is your birthday, a day when the world once danced to the beat of Madonna’s “Confessions on a Dance Floor” — a milestone return to joy and rhythm. Like that album, may your year be a celebration of light and movement, shedding the heavy for the free. Let every new spin of the clock be a dance floor where you confess your brightest dreams. Here’s to the music you carry inside, and to the beautiful, unstoppable beat that is you.

items.descriptionZh: 《2001》是Dr. Dre于1999年发行的第二张录音室专辑，是西海岸嘻哈的经典之作。作品以G-funk为基础，融合硬核说唱和放克采样，节奏厚重且歌词充满街头叙事，展现了Dr. Dre作为制作人和rapper的巅峰实力。
items.descriptionEn: Dr. Dre's second studio album, released in 1999, is a West Coast hip-hop classic. Built on G-funk with hardcore rap and funk samples, it features heavy beats and streetwise lyrics, showcasing Dre's peak as a producer and rapper.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原名《Chronic 2001》，延续1992年《The Chronic》的风格。录制期间，Dr. Dre邀请了Eminem、Snoop Dogg等众多合作者，其中Eminem在《Forgot About Dre》中的表现助其进一步走红。专辑发行首周即登顶Billboard 200。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled 'Chronic 2001', it followed the style of 1992's 'The Chronic'. During recording, Dre enlisted Eminem, Snoop Dogg, and others; Eminem's verse on 'Forgot About Dre' boosted his fame. The album debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑定义了90年代末西海岸嘻哈的声音，并助推了Eminem的职业生涯。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album defined late-90s West Coast hip-hop sound and boosted Eminem's career.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. Dre是美国说唱歌手、制作人，生于1965年，西海岸嘻哈代表人物。作为N.W.A成员和Aftermath创始人，他开创了G-funk风格，代表作《The Chronic》《2001》。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. Dre is an American rapper and producer, born in 1965, a key figure in West Coast hip-hop. As a member of N.W.A and founder of Aftermath, he pioneered G-funk, with代表作 'The Chronic' and '2001'.

items.name: Global Warming
items.descriptionZh: 《Global Warming》是Pitbull于2012年发行的第七张录音室专辑，以流行舞曲和拉丁流行风格为主，融合电子、雷鬼和嘻哈元素。作品节奏欢快、派对氛围浓厚，主打歌《Don't Stop the Party》等展现了Pitbull标志性��能量和跨界魅力。
items.descriptionEn: Pitbull's seventh studio album, released in 2012, is primarily pop dance and Latin pop, blending electronic, reggae, and hip-hop elements. With upbeat party vibes, tracks like 'Don't Stop the Party' showcase Pitbull's signature energy and crossover appeal.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Global Warming》寓意Pitbull的音乐在全球引发热潮。录制过程中，他与Christina Aguilera、Jennifer Lopez等合作，其中与J.Lo合作的《Drinks for You》是两人的再次联手。专辑发行后登上Billboard 200前十。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Global Warming' symbolizes Pitbull's music heating up worldwide. He collaborated with Christina Aguilera and Jennifer Lopez; 'Drinks for You' with J.Lo marked their reunion. The album reached the top 10 on the Billboard 200.
items.artistIntroZh: Pitbull（皮普保罗）是美国说唱歌手、制作人，生于1981年，以拉丁流行和舞曲风格闻名。代表作品包括《Give Me Everything》《Timber》，其音乐融合嘻哈、雷鬼和电子元素。
items.artistIntroEn: Pitbull is an American rapper and producer, born in 1981, known for Latin pop and dance music. His hits include 'Give Me Everything' and 'Timber', blending hip-hop, reggae, and electronic elements.

11-16.birthdayZh: 11月16日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《2001》，像西海岸的浪潮，厚重而慵懒地托起你不屈的脊梁；也诞生过《Global Warming》，用拉丁的炽热融化冬日的寒冰。你带着这张日历的烙印，既有深沉的节拍，亦有沸腾的暖意——愿你如专辑般，在沉静中积蓄力量，在狂欢里点燃星光。
11-16.birthdayEn: November 16 is your birthday. Your day shares its date with the release of Dr. Dre's "2001," a masterpiece that pulses with the triumphant spirit of West Coast G-Funk. Like that album, you bring a rich, layered harmony to the world. And like Pitbull's "Global Warming," your presence radiates heat and energy, melting away the cold. On this day of your birth, may your year ahead feel as iconic and unstoppable as the music itself. Happy birthday.

items.name: Disco
items.descriptionZh: 《Disco》是Pet Shop Boys于1986年发行的混音专辑，融合了R&B/Soul的律动与合成器流行，以舞曲节奏为核心，呈现出80年代电子灵魂乐的精致质感。专辑中的混音版本强化了原曲的放克基底，展现了乐队在俱乐部文化中的先锋地位。
items.descriptionEn: Disco is a remix album by Pet Shop Boys released in 1986, blending R&B/Soul grooves with synth-pop. Centered on dance rhythms, it showcases the refined texture of 80s electronic soul. The remixes enhance the funk foundation of the original tracks, highlighting the band's pioneering role in club culture.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音专辑的诞生源于Pet Shop Boys对俱乐部场景的热爱。录制过程中，他们特邀混音师Shep Pettibone重新诠释了热门单曲，其中《West End Girls》的混音版本在纽约地下舞池中率先流传，随后才正式发行。
items.storiesEn: This remix album was born from Pet Shop Boys' love for the club scene. During recording, they enlisted remixer Shep Pettibone to reinterpret hit singles. The remix of 'West End Girls' first circulated in New York underground dance floors before its official release.
items.artistIntroZh: Pet Shop Boys是英国合成器流行二人组，由Neil Tennant和Chris Lowe组成。他们以优雅的电子旋律和深刻的社会观察闻名，代表作包括《West End Girls》和《It's a Sin》。
items.artistIntroEn: Pet Shop Boys are a British synth-pop duo consisting of Neil Tennant and Chris Lowe. Known for elegant electronic melodies and sharp social commentary, their代表作 include 'West End Girls' and 'It's a Sin'.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是Ricky Martin于1975年发行的精选集，尽管该年份存在争议，但作品本身浓缩了拉丁流行与主流Pop的融合精髓。专辑收录了其早期生涯的经典曲目，以热情洋溢的旋律和跨文化吸引力为特色。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits is a compilation album by Ricky Martin released in 1975, though the year is debated. It encapsulates the fusion of Latin pop and mainstream Pop, featuring early career classics with passionate melodies and cross-cultural appeal.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集在Ricky Martin尚未成为全球巨星时发行，收录了他作为Menudo成员时期的录音。由于早期版权问题，部分曲目在多年后的再版中才被重新母带处理。
items.storiesEn: Released before Ricky Martin became a global superstar, this compilation includes recordings from his time as a member of Menudo. Due to early copyright issues, some tracks were remastered only in later reissues.
items.artistIntroZh: Ricky Martin是波多黎各歌手，以拉丁流行和舞曲风格闻名。他是1990年代末拉丁音乐爆发期的代表人物，代表作包括《Livin' la Vida Loca》和《She Bangs》。
items.artistIntroEn: Ricky Martin is a Puerto Rican singer known for Latin pop and dance music. A key figure in the late-1990s Latin music explosion, his代表作 include 'Livin' la Vida Loca' and 'She Bangs'.

items.name: A szeretet ünnepén
items.descriptionZh: 《A szeretet ünnepén》是匈牙利歌手Adrien Szekeres于2008年发行的流行专辑，以温暖抒情的旋律和真挚的情感表达为核心。作品融合了成人当代流行与民谣元素，展现了细腻的声线演绎。
items.descriptionEn: A szeretet ünnepén is a pop album by Hungarian singer Adrien Szekeres, released in 2008. It centers on warm, lyrical melodies and sincere emotional expression, blending adult contemporary pop with folk elements and showcasing delicate vocal delivery.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Adrien Szekeres在电视选秀节目《Megasztár》中成名后不久。她亲自参与了多首歌曲的创作，其中同名主打歌的灵感来自她对家庭和节日的个人回忆。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded shortly after Adrien Szekeres rose to fame on the TV talent show Megasztár. She co-wrote several tracks, with the title track inspired by personal memories of family and holidays.
items.artistIntroZh: Adrien Szekeres是匈牙利流行女歌手，因参加《Megasztár》选秀节目而崭露头角。她的音乐风格以抒情流行为主，代表作包括《A szeretet ünnepén》和《Ne sírj》。
items.artistIntroEn: Adrien Szekeres is a Hungarian pop singer who gained fame through the talent show Megasztár. Her music is primarily抒情 pop, with代表作 including 'A szeretet ünnepén' and 'Ne sírj'.

11-17.birthdayZh: 11月17日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Disco》与《A szeretet ünnepén》，一张是舞池里不灭的节拍，一张是名为“爱的节日”的温暖咏叹。你像前者一样，在冷峻中藏着热烈；又像后者，让真挚成为最深的旋律。愿你在属于自己的节日里，跳一支舞，也拥抱所有爱意。
11-17.birthdayEn: November 17 is your birthday. On this day, Pet Shop Boys released "Disco," a sparkling celebration of life’s rhythm, and Adrien Szekeres gifted the world "A szeretet ünnepén"—a feast of love. Like these albums, your day is a dance of joy and a warm embrace. May your year ahead be a symphony of bright beats and tender moments, each note lifting you higher. You are the melody that makes every day a celebration.

items.name: In the Zone
items.descriptionZh: 《In the Zone》是Britney Spears于2003年发行的第四张录音室专辑，以流行舞曲为主轴，融入R&B和电子元素。专辑展现了更成熟性感的形象，制作精良，节奏强劲，是千禧年初流行乐坛的标志性作品。
items.descriptionEn: In the Zone is Britney Spears' fourth studio album, released in 2003. Centered on pop dance music with R&B and electronic elements, it presents a more mature and sexy image. With polished production and strong beats, it's a landmark early-2000s pop album.
items.storiesZh: 录制这张专辑时，Britney Spears与多位知名制作人合作，包括Moby和Bloodshy & Avant。主打歌《Toxic》最初被拒绝，但Britney坚持收录，最终成为她职业生涯中最具代表性的歌曲之一。
items.storiesEn: During recording, Britney Spears collaborated with producers including Moby and Bloodshy & Avant. The lead single 'Toxic' was initially rejected, but Britney insisted on including it, and it became one of the most iconic songs of her career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《In the Zone》标志着Britney Spears从青少年偶像向成熟流行天后的转型，其中《Toxic》获得了格莱美最佳舞曲录音奖，影响了一代流行歌手的制作方向。
items.historicalImpactEn: In the Zone marked Britney Spears' transition from teen idol to mature pop diva. 'Toxic' won a Grammy for Best Dance Recording, influencing the production direction of a generation of pop artists.
items.artistIntroZh: Britney Spears是美国流行歌手、舞者，被誉为“流行公主”。她以标志性的舞曲和视觉表演闻名，代表作包括《...Baby One More Time》和《Toxic》。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American pop singer and dancer, known as the 'Princess of Pop'. Famous for iconic dance-pop and visual performances, her代表作 include '...Baby One More Time' and 'Toxic'.

items.name: The Fame Monster
items.descriptionZh: 《The Fame Monster》是Lady Gaga于2009年发行的EP，以流行舞曲为核心，融合了电子、黑暗流行和哥特元素。专辑探讨了名声的阴暗面，制作前卫，旋律洗脑，展现了Gaga的艺术野心。
items.descriptionEn: The Fame Monster is an EP by Lady Gaga, released in 2009. Centered on pop dance music, it blends electronic, dark pop, and gothic elements. Exploring the dark side of fame, the album features avant-garde production and catchy melodies, showcasing Gaga's artistic ambition.
items.storiesZh: 这张EP的创作灵感来自Lady Gaga在巡演中对名声的恐惧，每首歌对应一种“怪物”（如对性的恐惧、对酒精的恐惧）。录制时她与RedOne等制作人紧密合作，在短短几周内完成了大部分歌曲。
items.storiesEn: The EP was inspired by Lady Gaga's fears during touring, with each song addressing a 'monster' (e.g., fear of sex, fear of alcohol). She worked closely with producers like RedOne, completing most tracks in just a few weeks.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Fame Monster》巩固了Lady Gaga作为流行文化先锋的地位，其中《Bad Romance》成为全球现象级单曲，推动了2010年代电子流行舞曲的繁荣。
items.historicalImpactEn: The Fame Monster cemented Lady Gaga's status as a pop culture pioneer. 'Bad Romance' became a global phenomenon, fueling the 2010s boom of electronic dance-pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Lady Gaga是美国歌手、词曲作者和演员，以夸张的视觉风格和实验性流行音乐闻名。她是当代最具影响力的流行艺人之一，代表作包括《Poker Face》和《Bad Romance》。
items.artistIntroEn: Lady Gaga is an American singer, songwriter, and actress, known for extravagant visual style and experimental pop music. One of the most influential contemporary pop artists, her代表作 include 'Poker Face' and 'Bad Romance'.

11-18.birthdayZh: 11月18日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《In the Zone》的自信与不羁，也诞生过《The Fame Monster》中化暗为光的力量。你像那些音乐一样，拥有属于自己的节奏。愿你勇敢走进自己的领地，拥抱每一面真实的自己。生日快乐，未来的路，会温柔地为你铺开。
11-18.birthdayEn: November 18 is your birthday, a date touched by stardust and rhythm. Like Britney Spears’ In the Zone, may you step boldly into your own power, blending courage with grace. And like Lady Gaga’s The Fame Monster, let your spirit dance between shadow and light, embracing every note of your story. This day is your anthem—a reminder that you are both the melody and the muse. Shine on, for the world is lucky to celebrate the beautiful, rare song that is you.

items.name: Pink Friday
items.descriptionZh: 《Pink Friday》是Nicki Minaj的首张录音室专辑，以Hip-Hop为核心，融合流行与电子元素。专辑以色彩缤纷的叙事、多变的Flow和大胆的歌词著称，展现了Minaj作为女性说唱歌手的独特魅力与多面性。
items.descriptionEn: Pink Friday is Nicki Minaj's debut studio album, rooted in Hip-Hop with pop and electronic influences. It is known for its colorful storytelling, versatile flow, and bold lyrics, showcasing Minaj's unique charisma and multifaceted persona as a female rapper.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称源自Minaj的幸运色粉色，她曾表示粉色象征着她的女性力量与大胆个性。录制期间，她与多位大牌合作，包括Eminem为歌曲《Roman's Revenge》献声，该曲灵感源自她创造的另一个人格Roman。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from Minaj's lucky color pink, which she says symbolizes her feminine power and bold personality. During recording, she collaborated with major artists including Eminem on 'Roman's Revenge,' a track inspired by her alter ego Roman.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Pink Friday》被视为2010年代女性说唱复兴的标志性作品，帮助Nicki Minaj成为首位获此商业成功的女性说唱歌手之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: Pink Friday is considered a landmark album for the 2010s female rap resurgence, helping Nicki Minaj become one of the first female rappers to achieve such commercial success.
items.artistIntroZh: Nicki Minaj，美国说唱歌手、词曲作者，以多变的声线、色彩鲜明的造型和戏剧性人格闻名。代表作包括《Super Bass》《Anaconda》，是当代最成功的女性说唱歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nicki Minaj is an American rapper and songwriter known for her versatile vocal delivery, colorful style, and theatrical persona. Her hits include 'Super Bass' and 'Anaconda,' making her one of the most successful female rappers of all time.

items.name: Unapologetic
items.descriptionZh: 《Unapologetic》是Rihanna的第七张录音室专辑，以Electronic和R&B为基底，融合流行与舞曲元素。专辑氛围暗黑而感性，歌词探讨爱情、痛苦与自我救赎，展现了Rihanna更为成熟和坦诚的一面。
items.descriptionEn: Unapologetic is Rihanna's seventh studio album, blending Electronic and R&B with pop and dance influences. Its dark, sensual atmosphere and lyrics exploring love, pain, and redemption showcase a more mature and vulnerable side of Rihanna.
items.storiesZh: 专辑主打歌《Diamonds》原本是为其他艺人创作，Rihanna听到后坚持收录。���制期间，她与Chris Brown合作的《Nobody's Business》引发争议，因两人当时复合，但Rihanna表示歌曲仅表达个人情感。
items.storiesEn: The lead single 'Diamonds' was originally written for another artist, but Rihanna insisted on recording it. Her collaboration with Chris Brown on 'Nobody's Business' sparked controversy due to their rekindled relationship, though Rihanna stated the song was purely personal.
items.artistIntroZh: Rihanna，巴巴多斯歌手、演员、企业家，以多变的音乐风格和时尚影响力著称。代表作包括《Umbrella》《We Found Love》，是21世纪最畅销的音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Rihanna is a Barbadian singer, actress, and entrepreneur known for her versatile music style and fashion influence. Her hits include 'Umbrella' and 'We Found Love,' making her one of the best-selling music artists of the 21st century.

11-19.birthdayZh: 11月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：Pink Friday的粉红勇气，让你敢于做最耀眼的自己；Unapologetic的无所畏惧，告诉你不必为任何伤痕道歉。你来到这世上，本身就像一首专辑的诞生——有低沉的前奏，也有高亢的副歌。生日快乐，愿你在自己的节奏里，永远热烈，永远自由。
11-19.birthdayEn: November 19 is your birthday, a day that shares its spark with two iconic albums. Like Nicki Minaj’s Pink Friday, your presence blends bold rhythm and sweet melody, a debut of your own unique light. And like Rihanna’s Unapologetic, you carry a quiet, powerful strength that needs no excuse. On this day, the universe released music that celebrates being fierce, complex, and utterly yourself. May your year ahead echo with that same unbreakable grace and daring joy. Happy birthday to a soul worth every chorus of celebration.

items.name: Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection
items.descriptionZh: 《Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection》是爱尔兰家族乐队The Corrs的精选集，以Pop为基调，融合民谣与流行摇滚。���辑收录了乐队最受欢迎的歌曲，展现了他们标志性的和声与凯尔特音乐元素。
items.descriptionEn: Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection is a greatest hits album by Irish family band The Corrs, rooted in Pop with folk and pop-rock influences. It features their most beloved songs, highlighting their signature harmonies and Celtic musical elements.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《Dreams》取自The Corrs的经典歌曲，该曲曾因电影《诺丁山》原声带而广为人知。精选集发行时，乐队已休整数年，这张专辑被视为对粉丝的感谢之作，也记录了他们的音乐成长。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Dreams' is taken from The Corrs' classic song, which gained fame from the 'Notting Hill' soundtrack. Released after a few years of hiatus, the compilation was seen as a thank-you to fans and a record of the band's musical evolution.
items.artistIntroZh: The Corrs，爱尔兰家族乐队，由Corr兄妹四人组成，以融合流行与凯尔特民谣的和声闻名。代表作包括《Breathless》《So Young》，全球销量超4000万张。
items.artistIntroEn: The Corrs are an Irish family band consisting of the four Corr siblings, known for blending pop with Celtic folk harmonies. Their hits include 'Breathless' and 'So Young,' with over 40 million albums sold worldwide.

11-20.birthdayZh: 11月20日，是你的生日。这一天，《Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection》曾来到世界，像是专为你准备的隐喻——那些凯尔特风铃般清澈的旋律，诉说着关于家的温暖与远方的勇气。愿你在新的一岁里，像这张精选集的名字一样，把生命中所有闪亮的瞬间都收进心底，怀抱梦想，也拥有让梦想成真的力量。
11-20.birthdayEn: November 20 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also gifted us *Dreams: The Ultimate Corrs Collection*—a tapestry of hope and harmony, perfect for a soul like yours. May your year unfold with the same timeless grace, each day a song that lifts your spirit and reminds you of the beauty you bring. Here’s to a life as rich and resonant as the music that celebrates this date. Shine on.

items.name: Q366410
items.descriptionZh: 《Q366410》是德国古典跨界歌手Adoro的专辑，以Classical为根基，融合流行与歌剧元素。专辑以经典旋律的重新演绎为主，Adoro的男高音嗓音深情而富有穿透力，营造出庄严而感性的音乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Q366410 is an album by German classical crossover singer Adoro, rooted in Classical with pop and operatic influences. It features reinterpretations of classic melodies, with Adoro's tenor voice delivering a passionate and penetrating performance, creating a solemn yet emotional atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: Adoro原是德国古典跨界组合，该专辑是成员之一以个人名义发行的作品。专辑编号Q366410源于制作过程中的内部代码，后被保留作为专辑名，寓意音乐的独特身份。
items.storiesEn: Adoro was originally a German classical crossover group; this album was released by one of its members as a solo project. The catalog number Q366410 originated from an internal production code, later kept as the album title to symbolize its unique musical identity.
items.artistIntroZh: Adoro，德国古典跨界歌手，以男高音演绎流行与古典名曲著称。其音乐风格融合古典与当代元素，代表作包括《Time to Say Goodbye》等翻唱作品。
items.artistIntroEn: Adoro is a German classical crossover singer known for his tenor interpretations of pop and classical standards. His style blends classical and contemporary elements, with covers like 'Time to Say Goodbye' among his notable works.

items.name: 2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album
items.descriptionZh: 《2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album》是日本偶像团体Cute的精选专辑，以Pop为核心，融合电音与偶像流行曲风。专辑收录了团体转型期的代表曲目，展现了她们从可爱到成熟的音乐蜕变，充满活力与青春气息。
items.descriptionEn: 2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album is a compilation by Japanese idol group Cute, rooted in Pop with electronic and idol-pop influences. It features tracks from their transitional period, showcasing their musical evolution from cute to mature, full of energy and youthful spirit.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名中的“2 Cute”是团体名称的双关，而“Shinseinaru”意为“神圣的”，象征这张精选集对团体里程碑式的意义。录制时成员们正值青春期，部分歌曲的歌词反映了她们对成长与梦想的思考。
items.storiesEn: The album title '2 Cute' is a pun on the group's name, while 'Shinseinaru' means 'sacred,' symbolizing the compilation's milestone significance. During recording, members were in their adolescence, and some lyrics reflect their thoughts on growth and dreams.
items.artistIntroZh: Cute，日本女子偶像团体，隶属于Hello! Project，以甜美形象和活力表演著称。代表作包括《EVERYDAY Zekkouchou!!》《Asu wa Kitto...》，是日本偶像文化的重要代表之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Cute is a Japanese female idol group under Hello! Project, known for their cute image and energetic performances. Their hits include 'EVERYDAY Zekkouchou!!' and 'Asu wa Kitto...,' making them a key part of Japanese idol culture.

11-21.birthdayZh: 11月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Adoro以《Q366410》捧出宏大而空灵的乐章，如同生命里所有温柔与坚定交织成的和声。而℃-ute用《2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album》珍藏下无数闪光的瞬间，提醒你每一步都值得被纪念与祝福。新一岁的旅程，愿你像被精心收录的歌，永远动人，永远有力量。
11-21.birthdayEn: November 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world saw the release of Adoro's "Q366410," a soaring collection of classical pop that mirrors your ability to blend grace with warmth. And Cute's "2 Cute Shinseinaru Best Album" celebrates the radiant, spirited joy you bring into every room. So today, let your heart sing like a timeless melody, and may the year ahead be your own greatest hits—full of beauty, cheer, and all the light you so effortlessly share.

items.name: Girl on Fire
items.descriptionZh: 《Girl on Fire》是Alicia Keys于2012年发行的第五张录音室专辑，融合R&B、灵魂乐与流行元素。核心特色在于其强烈的女性 empowerment 主题，以及Keys标志性的钢琴演奏与深情嗓音。专辑同名主打歌以燃情旋律和励志歌词成为全球热门单曲。
items.descriptionEn: Girl on Fire is Alicia Keys' fifth studio album, released in 2012, blending R&B, soul, and pop elements. Its core feature lies in the strong theme of female empowerment, along with Keys' signature piano playing and soulful vocals. The title track became a global hit with its fiery melody and inspirational lyrics.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Alicia Keys刚生下第一个儿子Egypt，她将为人母的喜悦与对世界的新视角融入音乐创作。主打歌《Girl on Fire》最初由她与Nicki Minaj合作，但最终发行的版本中Minaj的段落被替换为Keys自己的演唱。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Alicia Keys had just given birth to her first son, Egypt, and she infused the joy of motherhood and a new perspective on the world into her music. The title track 'Girl on Fire' was originally a collaboration with Nicki Minaj, but in the final release, Minaj's verse was replaced by Keys' own vocals.
items.artistIntroZh: Alicia Keys，美国R&B/灵魂乐歌手、钢琴家及词曲作者。以融合古典钢琴的现代灵魂乐风格著称，代表作包括《Fallin'》《No One》和《Girl on Fire》。她共获得15项格莱美奖，是当代最具影响力的女性音乐人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Alicia Keys is an American R&B/soul singer, pianist, and songwriter. Known for blending classical piano with modern soul, her representative works include 'Fallin'', 'No One', and 'Girl on Fire'. She has won 15 Grammy Awards and is one of the most influential female musicians of her time.

items.name: Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen
items.descriptionZh: 《Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen》是德国嘻哈团体Fettes Brot于2002年发行的精选合辑。风格为德语嘻哈，融合幽默、讽刺与叙事性歌词。核心特色在于收录了乐队早期至中期的16首单曲，旨在“对抗遗忘”，展现其独特的街头智慧与流行旋律结合。
items.descriptionEn: Amnesie – 16 Singles gegen das Vergessen is a greatest hits compilation by German hip-hop group Fettes Brot, released in 2002. The style is German hip-hop, blending humor, irony, and narrative lyrics. Its core feature is collecting 16 singles from the band's early to mid-career, aiming to 'fight forgetfulness' and showcasing their unique blend of streetwise wit and pop melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑标题“Amnesie”（失忆症）与副标题“16 Singles gegen das Vergessen”（16首单曲对抗遗忘）形成幽默反差。Fettes Brot在发行时正值德国嘻哈商业化浪潮，他们通过这张精选集回顾自己从地下走向主流的历程，并特意在封面上设计了一个大脑形状的拼图，呼应主题。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Amnesie' (Amnesia) creates a humorous contrast with the subtitle '16 Singles gegen das Vergessen' (16 Singles Against Forgetting). At the time of release, during the commercialization wave of German hip-hop, Fettes Brot used this compilation to reflect on their journey from underground to mainstream, and deliberately designed a brain-shaped puzzle on the cover to echo the theme.
items.artistIntroZh: Fettes Brot，德国嘻哈团体，成立于1992年，来自汉堡。以幽默、讽刺的歌词和朗朗上口的流行旋律著称，是德语嘻哈商业化成功的重要代表。代表作包括《Jein》��Nordisch by Nature》和《Emanuela》。
items.artistIntroEn: Fettes Brot is a German hip-hop group formed in 1992 in Hamburg. Known for their humorous, ironic lyrics and catchy pop melodies, they are a key representative of the commercial success of German-language hip-hop. Representative works include 'Jein', 'Nordisch by Nature', and 'Emanuela'.

items.name: A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector
items.descriptionZh: 《A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector》是美国制作人Phil Spector于1963年发行的圣诞主题合辑，风格为流行与灵魂乐。核心特色在于Spector标志性的“音墙”制作技术，将华丽管弦乐与多声部和声融合，重新演绎经典圣诞歌曲，营造出温暖而宏大的节日氛围。
