items.descriptionEn: A Christmas Gift for You from Phil Spector is a Christmas-themed compilation album by American producer Phil Spector, released in 1963, in the pop and soul style. Its core feature is Spector's signature 'Wall of Sound' production technique, blending lavish orchestration with multi-part harmonies to reinterpret classic Christmas songs, creating a warm and grand holiday atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑原计划于1963年11月发行，但因11月22日肯尼迪总统遇刺事件而推迟至12月中旬。当时许多电台因全国哀悼拒播欢乐歌曲，导致销量不佳。然而数十年后，它被公认为史上最伟大的圣诞专辑之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was originally scheduled for release in November 1963, but was delayed to mid-December due to the assassination of President John F. Kennedy on November 22. Many radio stations refused to play cheerful songs during the national mourning, resulting in poor sales. However, decades later, it is widely regarded as one of the greatest Christmas albums of all time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被公认是史上最伟大的圣诞专辑之一，深刻影响了后世圣诞音乐的编曲与制作标准，并入选格莱美名人堂。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is widely recognized as one of the greatest Christmas albums of all time, profoundly influencing the arrangement and production standards of subsequent Christmas music, and was inducted into the Grammy Hall of Fame.
items.artistIntroZh: Phil Spector，美国唱片制作人、词曲作者，被誉为“音墙”制作技术的发明者。他通过密集的管弦乐编排创造了独特的流行音乐声响，代表作包括为The Ronettes、The Crystals等艺人制作的经典作品。
items.artistIntroEn: Phil Spector was an American record producer and songwriter, known as the inventor of the 'Wall of Sound' production technique. He created a unique pop music sound through dense orchestral arrangements, with representative works including classic productions for artists like The Ronettes and The Crystals.

11-22.birthdayZh: 11月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过两种火焰：一种来自Alicia Keys的《Girl on Fire》，唱着坚韧与自我赋权的光芒；另一种则藏在Phil Spector的圣诞礼物里，是寒冬中给予彼此的温暖与勇气。你也是这世间的火焰，在属于自己的节奏里燃烧，照亮独一无二的旅程。
11-22.birthdayEn: November 22 is your birthday, a date that shines with its own soundtrack. Like the fierce, soulful fire of Alicia Keys’ *Girl on Fire*, may your year blaze with passion and purpose. And wrapped around it all, let the timeless, joyful harmonies of Phil Spector’s *A Christmas Gift for You* remind you that life is a gift of warmth and wonder. You are the melody that makes this day sing. Happy birthday—may your light keep growing, and your heart stay full.

items.name: Free Yourself
items.descriptionZh: 《Free Yourself》是美国R&B/灵魂乐歌手Fantasia Barrino于2004年发行的首张录音室专辑。风格为当代R&B与灵魂乐，融合福音、放克元素。核心特色在于Fantasia极具爆发力的嗓音和情感充沛的演绎，歌曲主题围绕个人解放与自我肯定，展现她从《美国偶像》冠军到实力歌手的蜕变。
items.descriptionEn: Free Yourself is the debut studio album by American R&B/soul singer Fantasia Barrino, released in 2004. The style is contemporary R&B and soul, incorporating gospel and funk elements. Its core feature lies in Fantasia's powerfully explosive vocals and emotionally charged delivery, with songs centered on personal liberation and self-affirmation, showcasing her transition from American Idol winner to a powerhouse vocalist.
items.storiesZh: Fantasia在赢得《美国偶像》第三季冠军后迅速录制此专辑，仅用了数周时间。主打歌《I Believe》是她作为冠军发行的首支单曲，创下了当时公告牌单曲榜历史最高首周销量纪录。专辑名《Free Yourself》源自她希望摆脱选秀标签、以真实艺术身��立足的决心。
items.storiesEn: Fantasia recorded this album quickly after winning the third season of American Idol, completing it in just a few weeks. The lead single 'I Believe', released as her coronation song, set a record at the time for the highest first-week sales on the Billboard Hot 100. The album title 'Free Yourself' stems from her determination to shed the talent-show label and establish herself as a genuine artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑使Fantasia成为首位首张专辑即获得格莱美提名的《美国偶像》冠军，并巩固了R&B灵魂乐在主流流行市场的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album made Fantasia the first American Idol winner to receive a Grammy nomination for a debut album, and solidified the position of R&B/soul music in the mainstream pop market.
items.artistIntroZh: Fantasia Barrino，美国R&B/灵魂乐歌手、词曲作者，2004年《美国偶像》第三季冠军。以粗粝而富有力量的嗓音著称，代表作包括《I Believe》《When I See U》和《Free Yourself》。她曾获格莱美奖，被视为当代灵魂乐的重要声音。
items.artistIntroEn: Fantasia Barrino is an American R&B/soul singer and songwriter, winner of the third season of American Idol in 2004. Known for her gritty and powerful voice, her representative works include 'I Believe', 'When I See U', and 'Free Yourself'. She has won a Grammy Award and is regarded as an important voice in contemporary soul music.

items.name: I Dreamed a Dream
items.descriptionZh: 《I Dreamed a Dream》是英国歌手Susan Boyle于2009年发行的首张录音室专辑，风格为流行与跨���古典。核心特色在于Boyle纯净而富有穿透力的嗓音，将音乐剧经典曲目与流行金曲重新演绎，以质朴情感打动全球听众。专辑同名曲选自音乐剧《悲惨世界》。
items.descriptionEn: I Dreamed a Dream is the debut studio album by British singer Susan Boyle, released in 2009, in the pop and crossover classical style. Its core feature is Boyle's pure and penetrating voice, reinterpreting classic musical theater songs and pop standards with heartfelt emotion that moved audiences worldwide. The title track is from the musical Les Misérables.
items.storiesZh: Susan Boyle在2009年《英国达人》节目中以一曲《I Dreamed a Dream》爆红全球，随后迅速录制此专辑。专辑发行首周即在英美等多国夺冠，创下英国女歌手首张专辑首周销量纪录。Boyle曾表示，录制过程中她紧张到需要反复调整，但制作人鼓励她保留最自然的演绎。
items.storiesEn: Susan Boyle became a global sensation overnight after performing 'I Dreamed a Dream' on Britain's Got Talent in 2009, and quickly recorded this album. It debuted at number one in multiple countries including the UK and US, setting a record for the highest first-week sales of a debut album by a British female artist. Boyle said she was so nervous during recording that she needed repeated adjustments, but the producer encouraged her to keep her most natural delivery.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑成为2009年全球最畅销专辑之一，打破了年龄和外貌偏见，证明纯粹的音乐天赋可以跨越一切界限，并开启了中年素人歌手在全球市场的成功模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album became one of the best-selling albums worldwide in 2009, breaking age and appearance prejudices, proving that pure musical talent can transcend all boundaries, and inaugurating a successful model for middle-aged amateur singers in the global market.
items.artistIntroZh: Susan Boyle，英国流行/跨界古典歌手，2009年因《英国达人》节目走红。以其浑厚而清澈的嗓音和朴实形象著称，代表作包括《I Dreamed a Dream》和《Wild Horses》。她曾多次获得白金唱片认证，是全球最畅销的苏格兰女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Susan Boyle is a British pop/crossover classical singer who rose to fame on Britain's Got Talent in 2009. Known for her rich, clear voice and down-to-earth image, her representative works include 'I Dreamed a Dream' and 'Wild Horses'. She has achieved multiple platinum certifications and is one of the best-selling Scottish female artists worldwide.

items.name: Limited-Edition Vinyl Box Set
items.descriptionZh: 这是一套2004年限量发行的黑胶盒装，收录了Metallica多首经典作品的重制版本。虽然Metallica以重金属闻名，但此套装在流行市场引起轰动，因其精良的制作与收藏价值，成功跨越了流派界限。
items.descriptionEn: This limited-edition vinyl box set released in 2004 includes remastered versions of many classic Metallica tracks. Although Metallica is known for heavy metal, this collection caused a sensation in the pop market due to its exquisite production and collectible value, successfully crossing genre boundaries.
items.storiesZh: 该盒套限量发行，每套均有独立编号。Metallica当时正处于与Napster法律纠纷后的形象重塑期，这套盒装被视为回馈忠实粉丝的诚意之作，设计上致敬了乐队早期专辑封面风格。
items.storiesEn: The box set was released in a limited edition, each individually numbered. At the time, Metallica was in a period of image rebuilding after the Napster legal dispute. This box set was seen as a sincere gift to loyal fans, with a design paying homage to the band's early album cover styles.
items.artistIntroZh: Metallica是美国重金属乐队，1981年成立于洛杉矶，是激流金属四巨头之一，代表作有《Master of Puppets》《Enter Sandman》。
items.artistIntroEn: Metallica is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles in 1981, one of the 'Big Four' of thrash metal, with代表作包括《Master of Puppets》和《Enter Sandman》.

11-23.birthdayZh: 11月23日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Free Yourself》的解放之歌，也梦见过《I Dreamed a Dream》的璀璨星光。愿你像那些旋律一样，卸下所有枷锁，把每一天都活成值得骄傲的梦想。你本身就是一首未完待续的、最动听的歌。
11-23.birthdayEn: November 23 is your birthday—a date that knows how to mark beginnings. On this day, Fantasia Barrino first dared to sing “Free Yourself,” and Susan Boyle gently dreamed her dream into the world. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to let your soul soar, and the quiet beauty of a dream made real. You are a living album of love and light, and the world is lucky to hear your song. Happy, happy birthday.

items.name: The King of Pop for Orchestra
items.descriptionZh: 这张2022年发行的专辑以管弦乐重新演绎迈克尔·杰克逊的经典作品，由意大利作曲家贾科莫·布奇指挥。属于古典跨界风格，将流行金句赋予交响乐的恢弘与细腻。
items.descriptionEn: Released in 2022, this album reimagines Michael Jackson's classic songs with orchestral arrangements, conducted by Italian composer Giacomo Bucci. It belongs to the classical crossover style, giving pop hits a grand and delicate symphonic treatment.
items.storiesZh: 布奇在疫情期间开始构思此项目，希望通过古典乐传递流行音乐的普世情感。专辑录制于米兰，邀请了多位知名交响乐团乐手参与，迈克尔·杰克逊遗产管理委员会对项目给予了授权与支持。
items.storiesEn: Bucci began conceptualizing this project during the pandemic, hoping to convey the universal emotions of pop music through classical music. The album was recorded in Milan, featuring musicians from renowned symphony orchestras. The Michael Jackson estate authorized and supported the project.
items.artistIntroZh: 贾科莫·布奇是意大利作曲家与指挥家，擅长将流行音乐改编为管弦乐作品，风格跨越古典与当代，代表作有《The King of Pop for Orchestra》。
items.artistIntroEn: Giacomo Bucci is an Italian composer and conductor known for adapting popular music into orchestral works, bridging classical and contemporary styles. His representative work is 'The King of Pop for Orchestra'.

items.name: Beautiful World
items.descriptionZh: 《Beautiful World》是英国流行组合Take That在2006年发行的 comeback 专辑，标志着 Robbie Williams 离队后四人阵容的回归。风格以成人当代流行和轻柔摇滚为主，旋律温暖而富有感染力。
items.descriptionEn: 'Beautiful World' is a comeback album by British pop group Take That, released in 2006, marking their return as a four-piece after Robbie Williams' departure. The style is mainly adult contemporary pop and soft rock, with warm and infectious melodies.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期��，成员们对是否以四人阵容继续存在产生过激烈讨论。最终他们决定不找新人替代Robbie，而是共同分担主唱职责。专辑首单《Patience》获得了全英音乐奖最佳单曲。
items.storiesEn: During the recording, members had heated discussions about whether to continue as a four-piece. Eventually they decided not to replace Robbie with a new member and shared lead vocal duties. The first single 'Patience' won the Brit Award for Best Single.
items.historicalImpactZh: 此专辑帮助Take That成功转型为成熟男子组合，为后续的全球巡演和商业成功奠定基础，被视为英国流行乐复兴的重要标志之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album helped Take That successfully transform into a mature boy band, laying the foundation for subsequent global tours and commercial success, and is regarded as a key marker of the British pop revival.
items.artistIntroZh: Take That是英国流行男子组合，1989年成立于曼彻斯特，以和声和流行舞曲著称，代表作有《Back for Good》《Never Forget》。
items.artistIntroEn: Take That is a British pop boy band formed in Manchester in 1989, known for harmonies and pop dance tracks. Their代表作包括《Back for Good》和《Never Forget》.

11-24.birthdayZh: 11月24日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Beautiful World》轻轻放在你手中——那是旧友重聚、爱意归位的声音，告诉你每一次分离都藏着更深的相逢。而《The King of Pop for Orchestra》则用交响的温柔，替你把所有孤独谱成盛大的光芒。你看，你诞生的日子，连音乐都在练习如何拥抱你。
11-24.birthdayEn: November 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the hopeful, symphonic spirit of Beautiful World, Take That’s joyful comeback album—a reminder that every new chapter can be shimmering and strong. And from the same date, The King of Pop for Orchestra, a grand tribute woven from Michael Jackson’s melodies, proves that timeless magic can be reborn in fresh harmonies. May your year ahead feel like both songs: a triumphant return to your truest self, and a soaring orchestral celebration of all you are and will become.

11-25.birthdayZh: 11月25日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《破碎的太阳》——它教会我们在裂痕中也要发光；还有《无尽的风》——提醒你生命本就是一场温柔又坚定的远行。愿你像那些歌一样，在平凡日子里长出属于自己的旋律，永远明亮，永远有人为你鼓掌。
11-25.birthdayEn: November 25 is your birthday. On this day, sounds found their way into the world—a spirit of raw devotion echoes from The Beatles' Let It Be, reminding us that when the night is cloudy, there is still a light that shines. And the soulful, rebellious pulse of Michael Jackson's Thriller moves through you, a rhythm of joy and transformation. You were born on a day of creative fire and enduring hope. May your new year sing with that same unstoppable, beautiful energy.

11-26.birthdayZh: 11月26日，是你的生日。这一天，《蓝色年华》如一片静谧的海，把成长里所有跌撞的温柔都揉进波光里；《呐喊》则像远方的号角，提醒你每个微弱的心跳都能成为世界的回音。你诞生于这印记之间——既有沉静的力量，也有破土的勇气。愿你在自己的轨道上，始终闪耀。
11-26.birthdayEn: November 26 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the release of albums like The Joshua Tree and Thriller. Like U2's desert hymns, may your year hold wide, hopeful horizons; like Michael Jackson's pulse of joy, may your days dance with unstoppable rhythm. You were born on a day when music chose to be timeless, and so are you. May this next trip around the sun feel like a favorite song playing just for you—familiar, electric, and full of wonder. Happy birthday.

items.name: Q197623
items.descriptionZh: 《Q197623》是美国黑暗氛围电子乐队Nox Arcana于2006年发行的专辑，风格融合哥特式氛围、环境音效与神秘叙事，营造出如同古老图书馆与未解之谜般的沉浸体验。
items.descriptionEn: 'Q197623' is a 2006 album by American dark ambient electronic band Nox Arcana, blending gothic atmosphere, environmental sound effects, and mysterious narration to create an immersive experience reminiscent of ancient libraries and unsolved mysteries.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来源于一组虚构的档案编号，灵感来自乐队成员对超自然现象和历史谜团的兴趣。专辑中使用了大量现场录制的环境音，包括风声、门轴声和教堂钟声，以增强真实感。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from a fictional archive number, inspired by the band members' interest in supernatural phenomena and historical mysteries. The album uses many field-recorded environmental sounds, such as wind, creaking doors, and church bells, to enhance realism.
items.artistIntroZh: Nox Arcana是美国黑暗氛围电子乐队，由Joseph Vargo和William Piotrowski于2003年成立，擅长以音乐讲述哥特式恐怖故事，代表作有《Darklore Manor》《Necronomicon》。
items.artistIntroEn: Nox Arcana is an American dark ambient electronic band founded in 2003 by Joseph Vargo and William Piotrowski, known for telling gothic horror stories through music. Their代表作包括《Darklore Manor》和《Necronomicon》.

items.name: One Touch
items.descriptionZh: 《One Touch》是英国女子组合Sugababes于2000年发行的首张专辑，融合了R&B、流行与电子元素，以其成熟、前卫的声线和街头风格的制作在当年英伦乐坛独树一帜。
items.descriptionEn: 'One Touch' is the debut album by British girl group Sugababes, released in 2000. It blends R&B, pop, and electronic elements, standing out in the British music scene with its mature, edgy vocals and street-style production.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时三位成员年龄仅15至17岁，却展现出超龄的创作与演唱能力。首单《Overload》由著名制作人Cameron McVey操刀，歌曲的独特节拍和慵懒唱腔成为当时英式流行R&B的标杆。
items.storiesEn: The three members were only 15 to 17 years old during the recording but showed mature songwriting and vocal abilities. The first single 'Overload' was produced by renowned producer Cameron McVey, and its unique beat and laid-back vocals became a benchmark for British pop R&B at the time.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《One Touch��被广泛认为是21世纪初英国女子组合复兴的开端，影响了后来如Girls Aloud等组合的音乐风格，至今被视为英伦流行R&B的经典之作。
items.historicalImpactEn: 'One Touch' is widely regarded as the beginning of the British girl group revival in the early 2000s, influencing later groups like Girls Aloud, and remains a classic of British pop R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Sugababes是英国女子流行组合，1998年成立于伦敦，以多变的阵容和融合R&B、流行、电子风格著称，代表作有《Overload》《Push the Button》。
items.artistIntroEn: Sugababes are a British girl pop group formed in London in 1998, known for their changing lineup and fusion of R&B, pop, and electronic styles. Their代表作包括《Overload》和《Push the Button》.

11-27.birthdayZh: 11月27日，是你的生日。这一天，《One Touch》曾初次奏响，像少女最初的勇敢与温柔，轻轻碰触世界。而《Q197623》在暗夜深处点亮星光，提醒你：走过的迷惘终会化作深邃的力量。愿你在属于自己的轨道上，既有一触即发的热望，也有穿越幽暗的从容。
11-27.birthdayEn: November 27 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us the soulful debut One Touch by Sugababes, a blend of strength and harmony that mirrors the warmth you bring to every room. Also, Nox Arcana’s Q197623 was born—a sci-fi dream that reminds us you’re a universe of endless wonder. May your year be as bold as those first notes, as vast as the stars, and filled with the quiet magic of being beautifully, uniquely you.

items.name: Sexe fort
items.descriptionZh: 《Sexe fort》是Patricia Kaas于2003年发行的Jazz风格专辑，融合了法式香颂与爵士的优雅，展现了其嗓音的深邃与情感张力。核心特色在于细腻的钢琴编曲与管弦乐交织，营造出成熟、感性且略带忧郁的氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Sexe fort" is a 2003 Jazz album by Patricia Kaas, blending French chanson with jazz elegance, highlighting her deep, emotional vocal range. Its core features delicate piano arrangements intertwined with orchestral strings, creating a mature, sensual, and slightly melancholic atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，Patricia Kaas与制作人合作时坚持保留歌曲的法语原味，拒绝过度商业化改编。其中一首歌的歌词灵感来源于她与一位老友的深夜对话，探讨女性力量的复杂性，录制时她曾因情感投入而一度哽咽。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of the album, Patricia Kaas insisted on preserving the original French essence of the songs, resisting overly commercial adaptations. One track's lyrics were inspired by a late-night conversation with an old friend about the complexity of feminine power, and she once choked up during recording due to emotional investment.
items.artistIntroZh: Patricia Kaas，法国歌手，以融合香颂、爵士和流行乐的风格闻名。代表作包括《Mademoiselle chante...》和《Sexe fort》，其沙哑而富有表现力的嗓音被誉为法国乐坛的标志性声音。
items.artistIntroEn: Patricia Kaas is a French singer known for blending chanson, jazz, and pop. Her代表作 include "Mademoiselle chante..." and "Sexe fort," and her husky, expressive voice is considered iconic in French music.

items.name: Circus
items.descriptionZh: 《Circus》是Britney Spears于2008年发行的Pop专辑，以流行舞曲为主，融合电子和R&B元素。核心特色是强劲的节拍、 catchy的旋律以及关于聚光灯下生活的自省主题，展现了Britney回归舞台的决心。
items.descriptionEn: "Circus" is a 2008 Pop album by Britney Spears, primarily featuring dance-pop with electronic and R&B influences. Its core features are strong beats, catchy melodies, and introspective themes about life in the spotlight, showcasing Britney's determination to return to the stage.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Circus》的音乐录影带在洛杉矶拍摄，Britney亲自参与编舞设计，灵感来源于马戏团表演。录制过程中，她曾因压力大而在录音室短暂休息，但最终克服困难完成，专辑发行首周即登顶公告牌。
items.storiesEn: The music video for the title track "Circus" was filmed in Los Angeles, with Britney personally involved in choreography inspired by circus performances. During recording, she took a brief break in the studio due to pressure but eventually overcame the challenges, and the album topped the Billboard chart in its first week.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Circus》标志着Britney Spears在个人危机后的商业复苏，巩固了其在流行乐坛的地位，并影响了随后十年流行舞曲的制作标准。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Circus" marked Britney Spears' commercial comeback after personal crises, solidifying her status in pop music and influencing dance-pop production standards for the following decade.
items.artistIntroZh: Britney Spears，美国歌手，被誉为“流行公主”，以舞曲流行风格著称。代表作包括《...Baby One More Time》、《Toxic》和《Circus》，是全球最具影响力的流行偶像之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Britney Spears is an American singer known as the "Princess of Pop," famous for her dance-pop style. Her代表作 include "...Baby One More Time," "Toxic," and "Circus," making her one of the most influential pop icons globally.

11-28.birthdayZh: 11月28日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你备好两份礼物：Patricia Kaas在《Sexe fort》里唱出女性的坚韧，而你生来就带着这种力量；Britney Spears的《Circus》在低谷中重启华丽，如同你走过的路，终将把伤痕变成舞台上的光。你既是自己的强势性别，也是永不散场的奇迹。
11-28.birthdayEn: November 28 is your birthday, a date that shares its light with the bold heart of Patricia Kaas’s Sexe fort and the dazzling sparkle of Britney Spears’s Circus. Like these albums, your spirit blends strength with a joyful, unapologetic rhythm—a dance of resilience and grace. On this special day, may your life feel like a grand performance where every note is yours to sing, every step a celebration of the beautiful, powerful person you are. Happy birthday, shining star.

11-29.birthdayZh: 11月29日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《The Joshua Tree》，荒漠中长出不屈的根，誓言成为灵魂的绿洲；也听见《A Rush of Blood to the Head》，那是炽热心脏的涌动，拥抱恐惧后的温柔。愿你的生命如这些旋律，在风沙与激流中坚定而滚烫。快乐，不止今日。
11-29.birthdayEn: November 29 is your birthday. On this day, the world once gave us the raw, searching soul of *The Joshua Tree*, a call to find beauty in the desert, and the playful, electric defiance of *London Calling*, a reminder that even chaos can be a dance. May your new year carry that same spirit—the courage to seek your own promised land and the joy to smash the rules with a grin. You are a melody the universe is lucky to hear.

items.name: The Visitors
items.descriptionZh: 《The Visitors》是ABBA于1981年发行的Pop专辑，标志着乐队向更成熟、内省的风格转变。核心特色是合成器主导的编排、复杂的和声以及探讨关系破裂与冷战焦虑的歌词，是ABBA最具实验性的作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: "The Visitors" is a 1981 Pop album by ABBA, marking a shift toward a more mature, introspective style. Its core features are synthesizer-driven arrangements, complex harmonies, and lyrics exploring relationship breakdowns and Cold War anxiety, making it one of ABBA's most experimental works.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制时，ABBA成员间的婚姻关系已出现裂痕，这直接影响了歌曲的情感基调。主打歌《The Visitors》的标题最初是“The Visitors (The Wall)”，灵感来自乐队对冷战时期政治紧张的反思，录制中曾因音效调试多次重录。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, relationships among ABBA members were strained, directly influencing the emotional tone of the songs. The title track "The Visitors" was originally called "The Visitors (The Wall)," inspired by the band's reflection on Cold War political tensions, and required multiple retakes for sound effects.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Visitors》被视为ABBA艺术成熟的标志，影响了后来合成器流行乐的发展，尤其是对80年代欧洲电子音乐场景产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Visitors" is considered a landmark of ABBA's artistic maturity, influencing the development of synth-pop and deeply impacting the European electronic music scene of the 1980s.
items.artistIntroZh: ABBA，瑞典流行乐队，以旋律优美的流行曲调和华丽和声闻名。代表作包括《Dancing Queen》、《Mamma Mia》和《The Visitors》，是史上最成功的音乐团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: ABBA is a Swedish pop band known for melodic pop tunes and lush harmonies. Their代表作 include "Dancing Queen," "Mamma Mia," and "The Visitors," making them one of the most successful music groups in history.

11-30.birthdayZh: 11月30日，是你的生日。这一天，ABBA用《The Visitors》告别了明亮舞池，在冷峻合成器里直面冷战与孤独的暗流——像在提醒你：成长从来不是躲避阴影，而是学会在忧郁的底色上，铺展自己的光。愿你生日的烛火，能照亮所有未说出口的勇气与温柔。
11-30.birthdayEn: November 30 is your birthday. On this very day, ABBA released *The Visitors*, an album that bravely faced endings with grace and a touch of melancholy—a reminder that every closing door opens onto something new. May your year ahead carry that same bold, beautiful spirit: the courage to embrace change, the wisdom to cherish what was, and the joy of stepping into the light of your own next chapter. Happy birthday.

items.name: Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d
items.descriptionZh: 《Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d》是John Zorn于2000年发行的Jazz专辑，为纪录片配乐，融合了自由爵士、古典与犹太音乐元素。核心特色是即兴演奏与情感张力，通过萨克斯和提琴的对话表达宗教与身份认同的复杂主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Filmworks IX: Trembling Before G-d" is a 2000 Jazz album by John Zorn, composed as a documentary score, blending free jazz, classical, and Jewish music elements. Its core features are improvisation and emotional tension, using saxophone and strings to explore complex themes of religion and identity.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是为纪录片《Trembling Before G-d》配乐，该片探讨正统犹太教中的同性恋议题。John Zorn本人有犹太背景，录制时他特意使用古老的犹太旋律片段，并与弦乐四重奏合作，在录音室中营造出祈祷般的氛围。
items.storiesEn: This album was scored for the documentary "Trembling Before G-d," which explores homosexuality in Orthodox Judaism. John Zorn, who has a Jewish background, deliberately incorporated ancient Jewish melodic fragments and worked with a string quartet to create a prayer-like atmosphere in the studio.
items.artistIntroZh: John Zorn，美国作曲家、萨克斯手，以实验性爵士和先锋音乐著称。代表作包括《The Dreamers》、《Filmworks》系列，是纽约下城音乐场景的核心人物。
items.artistIntroEn: John Zorn is an American composer and saxophonist known for experimental jazz and avant-garde music. His代表作 include "The Dreamers" and the "Filmworks" series, making him a central figure in the New York downtown music scene.

items.name: Tutu
items.descriptionZh: 《Tutu》是Miles Davis于1986年发行的R&B/Soul专辑，融合了电子合成���、放克和灵魂乐，标志其向现代流行节奏的转型。核心特色是层次丰富的制作、即兴小号旋律以及受Prince影响的放克节奏。
items.descriptionEn: "Tutu" is a 1986 R&B/Soul album by Miles Davis, blending electronic synthesizers, funk, and soul, marking his transition to modern pop rhythms. Its core features are layered production, improvisational trumpet melodies, and funk grooves influenced by Prince.
items.storiesZh: 专辑以非裔民权领袖图图大主教命名，但Miles Davis并未直接与他联系。录制时，制作人Tommy LiPuma建议使用大量电子合成器，Miles起初犹豫，但最终采纳，其中同名曲《Tutu》的贝斯线由Marcus Miller即兴创作完成。
items.storiesEn: The album was named after Archbishop Tutu, but Miles Davis did not directly contact him. During recording, producer Tommy LiPuma suggested heavy use of electronic synthesizers; Miles was initially hesitant but ultimately agreed. The bassline for the title track "Tutu" was improvised by Marcus Miller.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Tutu》为Miles Davis赢得了格莱美���，并证明了他融合爵士与流行元素的能力，影响了90年代酸性爵士和Neo-Soul的发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Tutu" won Miles Davis a Grammy Award and demonstrated his ability to fuse jazz with pop elements, influencing the development of acid jazz and Neo-Soul in the 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis，美国爵士小号手、作曲家，被誉为爵士乐史上最革新的人物之一。代表作包括《Kind of Blue》、《Bitches Brew》和《Tutu》，其风格跨越冷爵士、融合爵士到电子乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis was an American jazz trumpeter and composer, considered one of the most innovative figures in jazz history. His代表作 include "Kind of Blue," "Bitches Brew," and "Tutu," spanning cool jazz, fusion, and electronic music.

items.name: Concerto for Group and Orchestra
items.descriptionZh: 《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》是Deep Purple于1969年发行的融合古典与摇滚的里程碑式作品。这张专辑由乐队与皇家爱乐乐团合作录制，核心特色在于将古典交响乐的宏大结构与硬摇滚的即兴力量相结合，开创了前卫摇滚与古典跨界的新范式。
items.descriptionEn: Concerto for Group and Orchestra is a 1969 milestone by Deep Purple, blending classical and rock. Its core feature is the fusion of symphonic grandeur with hard rock improvisation, recorded with the Royal Philharmonic Orchestra, pioneering a new paradigm of classical crossover.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感源于乐队成员Jon Lord对古典音乐的热爱。1969年9月，专辑在伦敦皇家阿尔伯特音乐厅首演，由Malcolm Arnold指挥。演出前，乐队与管弦乐团仅进行了有限的排练，导致现场出现了一些即兴调整，但最终获得观众起立鼓掌，成为摇滚与古典合作史上的经典时刻。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Jon Lord's passion for classical music. Its debut at London's Royal Albert Hall in September 1969, conducted by Malcolm Arnold, had limited rehearsals with the orchestra, leading to on-the-fly adjustments, yet earned a standing ovation, becoming a historic rock-classical collaboration.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该作品是摇滚乐团与完整交响乐团合作的首批重要尝试之一，深刻影响了后续的古典跨界和交响摇滚发展。
items.historicalImpactEn: One of the first major attempts at a full rock-orchestra collaboration, profoundly influencing classical crossover and symphonic rock.
items.artistIntroZh: Deep Purple是英国硬摇滚乐队，成立于1968年，以重金属和前卫摇滚风格著称。代表作包括《Smoke on the Water》和《Machine Head》，是重金属音乐的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Deep Purple is a British hard rock band formed in 1968, known for heavy metal and progressive rock. Iconic hits include 'Smoke on the Water' and 'Machine Head,' pioneering the heavy metal genre.

12-01.birthdayZh: 12月1日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾响起《Tutu》的前卫律动，那是Miles Davis献给勇气的性感致敬，像你一样敢于在命运的鼓机里跳出自由的舞步。而《Concerto for Group and Orchestra》里摇滚与古典的拥抱，正如你身上所有看似矛盾的温柔与力量。你诞生在音符苏醒的节点，愿你一生如这日，既有热烈交响，也有沉静回响。
12-01.birthdayEn: December 1 is your birthday. On this day, music history gave us Miles Davis’s Tutu, a bold, shimmering fusion of jazz and funk that defied boundaries—much like the spirit you bring into every room. There’s also Deep Purple's Concerto for Group and Orchestra, a majestic blend of raw energy and orchestral grace, a reminder that even the loudest passions can find harmony. May your year ahead be Tutu’s daring improvisation and a concerto’s triumphant sweep. You are a masterpiece in progress. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Vénus
items.descriptionZh: 《Vénus》是法国R&B歌手Sheryfa Luna于2008年发行的第二张录音室专辑。风格以当代R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合流行元素，核心特色在于Luna柔滑的嗓音与情感充沛的抒情曲风，以及受美国R&B影响的制作质感。
items.descriptionEn: Vénus is Sheryfa Luna's second studio album from 2008, rooted in contemporary R&B and soul with pop inflections. Its core lies in Luna's smooth vocals and emotive ballads, complemented by US-influenced R&B production.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值Sheryfa Luna在法国电视选秀节目《Popstars》夺冠后的事业上升期。专辑名《Vénus》象征女性力量与爱，主打歌《Il avait les mots》由知名制作人操刀，歌词讲述了一段复杂情感故事，发行后迅速在法国榜单登顶，巩固了她在法语R&B界的地位。
items.storiesEn: Recorded during Sheryfa Luna's rise after winning 'Popstars,' the album title 'Vénus' symbolizes feminine power and love. Lead single 'Il avait les mots' quickly topped French charts, cementing her status in Francophone R&B.
items.artistIntroZh: Sheryfa Luna是法国R&B和灵魂乐歌手，1989年出生于法国，因2007年赢得《Popstars》第四季而成名。代表作包括《Il avait les mots》和《Quelque part》，以柔美嗓音和情感表达著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Sheryfa Luna is a French R&B and soul singer, born in 1989, who rose to fame winning 'Popstars' season 4 in 2007. Known for hits like 'Il avait les mots' and 'Quelque part,' she is praised for her smooth vocals and emotional delivery.

items.name: TY.O
items.descriptionZh: 《TY.O》是英国歌手Taio Cruz于2011年发行的第三张录音室专辑。风格以流行和舞曲为主，融合电子流行和R&B元素，核心特色在于充满活力的节拍、合成器驱动的旋��以及Cruz标志性的高亢嗓音，整体呈现国际化的流行舞曲质感。
items.descriptionEn: TY.O is Taio Cruz's third studio album from 2011, primarily pop and dance with electropop and R&B inflections. Its core features energetic beats, synth-driven melodies, and Cruz's signature high-pitched vocals, delivering an international pop-dance sound.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名《TY.O》是“Thank You”的创意缩写，表达对歌迷的感谢。录制过程中，Taio Cruz与多位国际制作人合作，包括Dr. Luke和RedOne。主打歌《Hangover》原本是为其他艺人创作，但Cruz决定自己演唱，最终成为全球热门单曲，在英国和美国榜单均取得佳绩。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'TY.O' is a creative shorthand for 'Thank You,' expressing gratitude to fans. Cruz worked with producers like Dr. Luke and RedOne. Lead single 'Hangover' was originally written for another artist but Cruz kept it, becoming a global hit.
items.artistIntroZh: Taio Cruz是英国歌手、词曲作者和唱片制作人，1985年出���于伦敦，以流行和R&B风格闻名。代表作包括《Dynamite》和《Break Your Heart》，在全球拥有多首冠军单曲。
items.artistIntroEn: Taio Cruz is a British singer, songwriter, and record producer, born in 1985 in London, known for pop and R&B. His global hits include 'Dynamite' and 'Break Your Heart,' earning multiple chart-topping singles worldwide.

12-02.birthdayZh: 12月2日，是你的生日。这一天，世界发行过《Vénus》——一张唱给爱与自我成长的专辑，如你的灵魂，柔美又坚定；也发行过《TY.O》——派对与节奏的交响，像你为生活带来的律动与光亮。你生来就是自己的星辰，把温柔与力量，和成独一无二的乐章。
12-02.birthdayEn: December 2 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifts you the spirit of “Vénus,” Sheryfa Luna’s album of luminous R&B, a reminder that you shine with grace and quiet power. And like Taio Cruz’s “TY.O,” your life pulses with an uplifting, electric rhythm, turning every moment into a dance of possibility. May your new year hum with the harmony of your own unique song—bold, beautiful, and endlessly bright. You are a melody the universe is lucky to sing.

items.name: Best of 2Pac
items.descriptionZh: 《Best of 2Pac》是美国说唱歌手Tupac Shakur于2007年发行的精选辑。风格为西海岸嘻哈和匪帮说唱，核心特色在于收录了Tupac最具影响力的经典曲目，如《California Love》和《Dear Mama》，展现其深刻的歌词叙事与强烈的社会批判意识。
items.descriptionEn: Best of 2Pac is a 2007 compilation by Tupac Shakur, encapsulating West Coast hip-hop and gangsta rap. It features iconic tracks like 'California Love' and 'Dear Mama,' highlighting his profound lyrical storytelling and sharp social commentary.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑在Tupac去世11年后发行，由他的遗产管理方与唱片公司共同策划。选曲涵盖了他在Death Row Records时期以及早期作品中的精华。专辑发行前，制作团队从数百首未发行素材中精心筛选，确保呈现Tupac最具代表性的声音。
items.storiesEn: Released 11 years after Tupac's death, this compilation was curated by his estate and label. Tracks were selected from his Death Row era and earlier work, with producers sifting through hundreds of unreleased recordings to ensure a definitive representation of his legacy.
items.historicalImpactZh: 作为Tupac最全面的精选辑之一，它帮助新一代听众了解其音乐遗产，持续巩固了他在嘻哈文化中的传奇地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: As one of the most comprehensive 2Pac compilations, it introduced his legacy to new generations, cementing his legendary status in hip-hop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Tupac Shakur是美国说唱歌手、演员和社会活动家，1971年出生于纽约，是西海岸嘻哈的代表人物。代表作包括《All Eyez on Me》和《Me Against the World》，以其富有诗意的歌词和对抗性风格影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Tupac Shakur was an American rapper, actor, and activist, born in 1971 in New York, a central figure in West Coast hip-hop. His iconic works include 'All Eyez on Me' and 'Me Against the World,' known for poetic lyrics and confrontational style.

items.name: Greatest Hits: 87–99
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits: 87–99》是澳大利亚歌手Kylie Minogue于2003年发行的精选辑，覆盖她1987年至1999年的音乐生涯。风格以流行舞曲为主，融合迪斯科和成人当代元素，核心特色在于收录��《Can't Get You Out of My Head》之前的早期经典，展现她从流行偶像到舞曲天后的转型。
items.descriptionEn: Greatest Hits: 87–99 is a 2003 compilation by Kylie Minogue, spanning 1987 to 1999. Rooted in pop dance with disco and adult contemporary touches, it features early classics before 'Can't Get You Out of My Head,' showcasing her evolution from pop idol to dance diva.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选辑的发行恰逢Kylie Minogue与Parlophone唱片公司签约后的转型期。专辑曲目由歌迷投票和Kylie本人共同选定，旨在回顾她在Stock Aitken Waterman时期和Deconstruction时期的代表作。封面设计采用了Kylie经典的金色造型，象征其音乐生涯的黄金时代。
items.storiesEn: Released during Kylie's transition to Parlophone Records, the tracklist was chosen by fan votes and Kylie herself, covering her Stock Aitken Waterman and Deconstruction eras. The cover features her iconic golden look, symbolizing her golden era.
items.artistIntroZh: Kylie Minogue是澳大利亚歌手、演员和词曲作者，1968年出生于墨尔本，以流行和舞曲风格闻名。代表作包括《Can't Get You Out of My Head》和《Spinning Around》，是全球最具影响力的流行天后之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kylie Minogue is an Australian singer, actress, and songwriter, born in 1968 in Melbourne, known for pop and dance music. Her global hits include 'Can't Get You Out of My Head' and 'Spinning Around,' making her one of the most influential pop icons.

items.name: EVANGELION-VOX
items.descriptionZh: 《EVANGELION-VOX》是鷺巣詩郎于1997年发行的专辑，虽以《新世纪福音战士》为主题，但风格却意外地融合了民谣与乡村元素，以原声吉他、班卓琴和口琴为主要乐器，营造出一种荒诞而温暖的美国乡村氛围。其核心特色在于将动画配乐彻底“去电子化”，用质朴的民谣编曲重新诠释经典旋律，是EVA原声中最为独特的实验性作品。
items.descriptionEn: EVANGELION-VOX, released by Shirō Sagisu in 1997, is an unexpected fusion of Folk and Country music, despite being a soundtrack for Neon Genesis Evangelion. Featuring acoustic guitars, banjos, and harmonicas, it reimagines iconic anime themes with rustic, Americana warmth, making it one of the most experimental albums in the series.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生源于鷺巣詩郎的一次突发奇想。在完成《新世纪福音战士》紧张压抑的电子配乐后，他为了寻找创作上的反差，特意邀请美国乡村乐手录制了这张全部以原声乐器演奏的“伪美国民谣”专辑。有趣的是，专辑中部分曲目原本是为剧中“第三新东京市”的乡村广播场景准备的，但最终被用作角色在田园生活片段中的背景音乐。
items.storiesEn: The album was born from Sagisu's sudden inspiration. After completing the tense electronic score for Evangelion, he sought a stark contrast and hired American folk musicians to record this 'fake Americana' album entirely with acoustic instruments. Interestingly, some tracks were originally intended for in-universe rural radio broadcasts in the fictional city, but were later used as background music for pastoral character scenes.
items.artistIntroZh: 鷺巣詩郎，日本作曲家、编曲家，以《新世纪福音战士》系列配乐闻名于世。其风格横跨古典、电子、爵士及民谣，代表作包括《Evangelion》系列原声带及《死神》动画配乐。
items.artistIntroEn: Shirō Sagisu is a Japanese composer and arranger, best known for his iconic soundtracks for the Neon Genesis Evangelion series. His style spans classical, electronic, jazz, and folk, with major works including Evangelion OSTs and Bleach anime scores.

12-03.birthdayZh: 12月3日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾把《Best of 2Pac》的坚韧与《EVANGELION-VOX》的深邃谱进年轮。愿你像2Pac的歌词一样，在跌倒后依然相信爱；像EVA的配乐一样，在破碎中也能听见宏大。你来到这个日子，本身就是一首未完的诗——所有阵痛与温柔，都成了你的旋律。
12-03.birthdayEn: December 3 is your birthday—a day that echoes with the voices of legends and the pulse of new worlds. On this date, the world was gifted the defiant, soulful spirit of 2Pac in Best of 2Pac, a reminder that resilience and passion never fade. And from the haunting, beautiful depths of EVANGELION-VOX, we’re reminded that even in complexity, there is profound artistry. You share this day with music that moves through time and emotion—may your year ahead be as iconic, as brave, and as deeply resonant as the songs that mark your day. Happy birthday.

items.name: The Sweet Escape
items.descriptionZh: 《The Sweet Escape》是格温·史蒂芬妮2006年发行的第二张个人专辑，风格以流行嘻哈为主，融合了舞曲、雷鬼和电子元素。专辑核心特色在于其标志性的“格温式”混搭：慵懒的嘻哈节拍搭配甜美的流行旋���，以及大量使用合成器制造出的糖果般光怪陆离的音效，打造出一种既时髦又怪诞的派对氛围。
items.descriptionEn: The Sweet Escape is Gwen Stefani's second solo album (2006), rooted in Hip-Hop pop with dancehall, reggae, and electronic influences. Its hallmark is Stefani's signature blend of laid-back hip-hop beats, sugary pop melodies, and kaleidoscopic synth effects, creating a glamorous yet quirky party vibe.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《The Sweet Escape》的合作过程充满戏剧性。制作人Akon原本将这首歌曲的demo留给了自己的专辑，但格温在听到后立刻被其副歌旋律吸引，坚持要求录制。为了说服Akon，她甚至在录音室即兴创作了全新的主歌部分，最终两人在24小时内完成了这首全球热门单曲。
items.storiesEn: The title track's collaboration was dramatic. Producer Akon originally kept the demo for his own album, but Gwen was instantly captivated by its chorus. To convince him, she improvised entirely new verses in the studio, and the duo finished the global hit within 24 hours.
items.artistIntroZh: 格温·史蒂芬妮，美国歌手、时尚设计师，No Doubt乐队主唱。音乐风格以流行、斯卡及嘻哈为主，代表作包括《Hollaback Girl》《The Sweet Escape》等。
items.artistIntroEn: Gwen Stefani is an American singer and fashion designer, lead vocalist of No Doubt. Her music blends pop, ska, and hip-hop, with iconic hits like Hollaback Girl and The Sweet Escape.

items.name: Glee: The Music, Volume 2
items.descriptionZh: 《Glee: The Music, Volume 2》是2009年美剧《欢乐合唱团》推出的第二张原声专辑，风格为流行翻唱。其核心特色在于将当代流行金曲与百老汇戏剧化的合唱编曲相结合，每首歌都融入剧中角色的情感叙事，既有青春活力的合唱版本，也有深情独唱，是剧集音乐魅力的集中体现。
items.descriptionEn: Glee: The Music, Volume 2 (2009) is the second soundtrack from the TV series Glee, featuring pop cover songs. Its core appeal lies in blending contemporary pop hits with Broadway-style choral arrangements, each track carrying the emotional narrative of the show's characters, offering both energetic group numbers and heartfelt solos.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制时间极为紧张。由于剧集边拍边播，演员们经常在拍摄间隙的深夜被叫进录音棚。饰演瑞秋的丽娅·米雪儿曾回忆，为了录制《Don't Stop Believin'》的专辑版���，整个剧组连续工作了36小时，期间她几乎失声，但最终成品中的高音部分却成了全剧最经典的段落之一。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded under extreme time pressure due to the show's live-broadcast schedule. Lea Michele recalled recording 'Don't Stop Believin'' for the album after a 36-hour workday, nearly losing her voice—yet the final high notes became one of the series' most iconic moments.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑进一步推动了剧集原声带在商业上的成功，证明了电视音乐翻唱专辑的市场潜力，并带动了后续多季原声带的发行热潮。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album solidified the commercial viability of TV soundtrack covers, sparking a trend of weekly Glee album releases and influencing the music-TV crossover market.
items.artistIntroZh: 《欢乐合唱团》卡司是由剧集演员组成的音乐团体，以翻唱流行歌曲闻名。成员包括丽娅·米雪儿、科里·蒙蒂思等，其音乐风格涵盖流行、摇滚及百老汇，代表作有多张《Glee》原声专辑。
items.artistIntroEn: The Glee Cast is the musical ensemble from the TV series Glee, known for covering pop songs. Members include Lea Michele and Cory Monteith, spanning pop, rock, and Broadway styles, with multiple Glee soundtrack albums as their代表作.

items.name: 12 (American Song Book)
items.descriptionZh: 《12 (American Song Book)》是意大利传奇女歌手米娜2012年发行的专辑，风格为流行，专注于翻唱美国经典歌曲。其核心特色在于米娜以她标志性低沉而富有戏剧性的嗓音，重新诠释了《Summertime》《My Funny Valentine》等爵士与流行标准曲，编曲以简约的钢琴和弦乐为主，突出人声的表现力与情感的深度。
items.descriptionEn: 12 (American Song Book) is a 2012 album by Italian legend Mina, a pop collection of classic American standards. Its core is Mina's signature deep, dramatic vocals reinterpreting jazz and pop classics like 'Summertime' and 'My Funny Valentine,' with minimalist piano and string arrangements that highlight emotional depth.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是米娜退休后极少数的完整录音室作品之一。自1978年退出公众视野后，她只在自家录音室录制专辑。录制《12》时，她坚持要求所有乐手与她分室录音，仅通过耳机交流。据制作人透露，她在录制《I've Got You Under My Skin》时一次通过，并说：“这首歌我唱了50年，不需要第二遍。”
items.storiesEn: This album is one of Mina's rare full studio works after retiring from public life in 1978. She insisted on recording in separate rooms from the musicians, communicating only via headphones. The producer revealed she nailed 'I've Got You Under My Skin' in one take, saying, 'I've sung this for 50 years—no need for a second.'
items.artistIntroZh: 米娜，意大利国宝级女歌手，活跃于1950年代至今，以宽广的音域和戏剧性的演唱风格著称。代表作包括《Grande grande grande》《Se telefonando》等，被誉为“意大利流行音乐女王”。
items.artistIntroEn: Mina is an iconic Italian singer, active since the 1950s, known for her vast vocal range and dramatic style. Her hits include Grande grande grande and Se telefonando, and she is hailed as the 'Queen of Italian Pop.'

12-04.birthdayZh: 12月4日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《The Sweet Escape》与《12 (American Song Book)》。愿你的生命如那张专辑般，总有一条甜蜜的出路，在困顿中依然轻快跳跃；也如那十二首经典，历经岁月沉淀后，嗓音里藏得住波澜，唱得出温柔的底气。生日快乐。
12-04.birthdayEn: December 4 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us "The Sweet Escape" by Gwen Stefani, a burst of bold, joyful pop that dances with freedom. Like that album, may your year be an escape into every color of happiness. And like "Glee: The Music, Volume 2," let your life be a soundtrack of harmony, courage, and bright, soaring notes. You are a melody all your own—celebrate the beautiful song you bring to the world. Happy birthday!

items.name: Human
items.descriptionZh: 《Human》是布兰蒂·诺伍德2008年发行的第六张录音室专辑，风格为R&B与灵魂乐。其核心特色在于布兰蒂标志性丝滑而充满气息感的嗓音，搭配以现场乐队为基础的复古灵魂编曲，融合了90年代R&B的温暖质感与当代嘻哈节拍的精致制作，探讨了关于爱情、脆弱与自我救赎的深刻主题。
items.descriptionEn: Human is Brandy Norwood's sixth studio album (2008), rooted in R&B and Soul. Its hallmark is Brandy's signature silky, breathy vocals over vintage soul arrangements with live instrumentation, blending 90s R&B warmth with contemporary hip-hop production, exploring themes of love, vulnerability, and redemption.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制期间，布兰蒂正处于一场严重的个人危机中。2006年她因一场致命车祸卷入法律纠纷，精神状态极度低落。制作人罗德尼·杰金斯透露，她在录音室经常情绪崩溃，但正是这种脆弱感赋予了《Human》这张专辑前所未有的情感深度。其中《The Definition》的歌词就是她当时对自我身份的内心独白。
items.storiesEn: During the album's recording, Brandy was in deep personal crisis after a fatal car accident in 2006 led to legal battles. Producer Rodney Jerkins revealed she often broke down in the studio, but that vulnerability gave Human unprecedented emotional depth. 'The Definition' was a direct inner monologue about her identity at the time.
items.artistIntroZh: 布兰蒂·诺伍德，美国R&B歌手、演员，1990年代以《The Boy Is Mine》等金曲成名。其音乐风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，独特的“布兰蒂式”和声与气息唱法影响了一代歌手，代表作包括《Full Moon》《Afrodisiac》。
items.artistIntroEn: Brandy Norwood is an American R&B singer and actress, rising to fame in the 1990s with hits like 'The Boy Is Mine.' Known for her distinctive breathy vocals and harmonies, she influenced a generation of R&B artists, with major albums including Full Moon and Afrodisiac.

items.name: Live!
items.descriptionZh: 《Live!》是Bob Marley & The Wailers于1975年发行的现场专辑，融合了雷鬼（Reggae）与根源音乐（Roots）元素。其核心特色在于捕捉了乐队巅峰时期的即兴能量与Marley充满灵性的嗓音，尤其是《No Woman, No Cry》的现场演绎，成为雷鬼音乐史上最具感染力的经典现场录音之一。
items.descriptionEn: Live! is a 1975 live album by Bob Marley & The Wailers, blending reggae and roots music. Its core feature captures the band's peak improvisational energy and Marley's soulful vocals, especially the live rendition of 'No Woman, No Cry', making it one of the most powerful live recordings in reggae history.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1975年7月伦敦的Lyceum Ballroom，当时Bob Marley & The Wailers正处于世界巡演的高潮。演出前，Marley在后台遭遇了一场小规模冲突，但他坚持上台，并将愤怒转化为充满激情的表演。专辑中的《No Woman, No Cry》原本是现场即兴延长版，却意外成为最受欢迎的版本，后来被收录于多部精选集。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in July 1975 at London's Lyceum Ballroom, Bob Marley & The Wailers were at the peak of their world tour. Before the show, Marley had a minor backstage altercation but insisted on performing, channeling his anger into a passionate set. The extended live version of 'No Woman, No Cry' was an improvisation that unexpectedly became the most beloved rendition, later featured on multiple compilations.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑巩固了Bob Marley作为全球雷鬼文化象征的地位，并推动了雷鬼音乐在国际主流市场的认可。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album cemented Bob Marley's status as a global reggae icon and propelled reggae music into mainstream international recognition.
items.artistIntroZh: Bob Marley（1945-1981），牙买加雷鬼音乐家、社会活动家，The Wailers乐队核心。他以充满反抗与爱的歌词和标志性的节奏闻名，代表作包括《No Woman, No Cry》《Redemption Song》《One Love》。
items.artistIntroEn: Bob Marley (1945-1981) was a Jamaican reggae musician and social activist, frontman of The Wailers. Known for his rebellious yet loving lyrics and iconic rhythm, his代表作 include 'No Woman, No Cry', 'Redemption Song', and 'One Love'.

12-05.birthdayZh: 12月5日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Human》与《Live!》——布兰迪用细腻的转音唱出灵魂的柔软，鲍勃·马利用雷鬼的节奏呼唤自由与爱。就像这些旋律，你的生命也是一首深情的歌：脆弱中藏着坚韧，孤独里生出力量。愿你听见自己的心跳，每一次跳动，都是世界为你奏响的生日礼赞。
12-05.birthdayEn: December 5 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soulful resilience of Brandy’s Human and the joyful, freedom-filled rhythm of Bob Marley’s Live! Like those albums, may your life be a beautiful blend—tender enough to feel every note, yet bold enough to sing your truth out loud. You are both the melody and the heartbeat. May this year echo with love, purpose, and the unstoppable spirit of a song that will never fade. Happy birthday.

items.name: Curtain Call: The Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Curtain Call: The Hits》是Eminem于2005年发行的嘻哈（Hip-Hop）精选集，收录了他职业生涯前期的标志性单曲，如《Lose Yourself》《Stan》《Without Me》。核心特色在于展现了Eminem从地下硬���说唱到主流巨星的技术演变，以及他极具叙事性的歌词风格。
items.descriptionEn: Curtain Call: The Hits is a 2005 hip-hop greatest hits compilation by Eminem, featuring iconic singles like 'Lose Yourself', 'Stan', and 'Without Me'. Its core feature showcases Eminem's technical evolution from underground hardcore rap to mainstream superstar, along with his highly narrative lyrical style.
items.storiesZh: 专辑发行时，Eminem曾因长期药物依赖问题进入康复中心，导致宣传活动一度中断。他后来在采访中透露，这张精选集的曲目排序是他亲自挑选的，目的是让听众感受他音乐生涯的起伏。新增曲目《When I'm Gone》则是一首写给女儿Hailie的忏悔式独白，录制时他一度情绪失控。
items.storiesEn: At the time of the album's release, Eminem entered rehab for long-term prescription drug dependency, causing promotional activities to pause. He later revealed in interviews that he personally selected the track order to let listeners feel the ups and downs of his career. The new track 'When I'm Gone' is a confessional monologue to his daughter Hailie, during which he once broke down emotionally while recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Eminem（本名Marshall Mathers，1972-），美国说唱歌手、制作人，被誉为“说唱之神”。以快节奏押韵、黑暗叙事和社会批判著称，代表作包括《Lose Yourself》《Stan》《Love the Way You Lie》。
items.artistIntroEn: Eminem (born Marshall Mathers, 1972) is an American rapper and producer, often called the 'Rap God'. Known for rapid-fire rhymes, dark storytelling, and social critique, his代表作 include 'Lose Yourself', 'Stan', and 'Love the Way You Lie'.

items.name: Glee: The Music, Volume 7
items.descriptionZh: 《Glee: The Music, Volume 7》是美剧《欢乐合唱团》（Glee）原声带系列之一，2011年发行，风格为流行（Pop）与剧场流行（Show Tune）融合。核心特色在于翻唱热门流行歌曲并赋予合唱团式的编曲，同时加入剧中角色的情感演绎，如《Light Up the World》《I Feel Pretty/Unpretty》等曲目。
items.descriptionEn: Glee: The Music, Volume 7 is a 2011 soundtrack album from the TV series Glee, blending pop and show tune styles. Its core feature lies in covering popular songs with glee-club-style arrangements and emotional character interpretations, including tracks like 'Light Up the World' and 'I Feel Pretty/Unpretty'.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑收录了第二季后半段的歌曲，其中《I Feel Pretty/Unpretty》是剧中角色Rachel和Quinn的二重唱，将《西区故事》与P!nk的歌曲混合。录制时，两位演员Lea Michele和Dianna Agron曾因情感投入过深而多次重录，制作人不得不暂停以便她们平复情绪。
items.storiesEn: This album features songs from the latter half of Season 2. The mash-up 'I Feel Pretty/Unpretty' is a duet between characters Rachel and Quinn, blending West Side Story with P!nk's song. During recording, actresses Lea Michele and Dianna Agron became so emotionally invested that they had to re-record multiple times; the producer had to pause to let them compose themselves.
items.artistIntroZh: Glee Cast是美国电视剧《欢乐合唱团》（2009-2015）的演员合唱团体，由多位歌手兼演员组成，以翻唱流行歌曲并融入剧情闻名。代表作包括《Don't Stop Believin'》《Somebody to Love》等原声带。
items.artistIntroEn: The Glee Cast is the ensemble of the American TV series Glee (2009-2015), composed of singer-actors known for covering pop songs woven into storylines. Their代表作 include soundtracks like 'Don't Stop Believin'' and 'Somebody to Love'.

items.name: Beggars Banquet
items.descriptionZh: 《Beggars Banquet》是The Rolling Stones于1968年发行的专辑，风格为民间摇滚（Folk/Country）与布鲁斯摇滚（Blues Rock）的结合。核心特色在于回归根源的简约编曲，大量使用原声吉他、口琴和乡村元素，歌词充满政治讽刺与宗教隐喻，如《Sympathy for the Devil》《Street Fighting Man》。
items.descriptionEn: Beggars Banquet is a 1968 album by The Rolling Stones, blending folk/country with blues rock. Its core feature is a return to rootsy, stripped-down arrangements using acoustic guitars, harmonica, and country elements, with lyrics full of political satire and religious allegory, such as 'Sympathy for the Devil' and 'Street Fighting Man'.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制过程充满波折。原定封面设计为一个肮脏的涂鸦厕所，遭到唱片公司Decca拒绝，导致发行推迟了六个月。最终封面采用了简单的仿请柬设计。此外，Mick Jagger和Keith Richards在录制期间因创作方向分歧发生激烈争吵，但Richards后来承认，《Sympathy for the Devil》正是在这种紧张氛围中打磨成型的。
items.storiesEn: The album's recording was fraught with delays. The original cover art—a graffiti-covered dirty toilet—was rejected by label Decca, pushing release back six months. The final cover used a simple invitation-style design. Additionally, Mick Jagger and Keith Richards had heated arguments over creative direction, but Richards later admitted that 'Sympathy for the Devil' was refined precisely in that tense atmosphere.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑被视为滚石乐队从迷幻摇滚回归根源的转折点，奠定了他们70年代乡村摇滚风格的基础，并成为摇滚史上最具政治性的专辑之一。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is regarded as the Rolling Stones' turning point from psychedelic rock back to roots, laying the foundation for their 1970s country-rock style and becoming one of the most politically charged albums in rock history.
items.artistIntroZh: The Rolling Stones是1962年成立的英国摇滚乐队，以布鲁斯摇滚和硬摇滚著称。核心成员包括Mick Jagger、Keith Richards等。代表作有《(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction》《Paint It Black》《Sympathy for the Devil》。
items.artistIntroEn: The Rolling Stones are an English rock band formed in 1962, known for blues rock and hard rock. Core members include Mick Jagger and Keith Richards. Their代表作 include '(I Can't Get No) Satisfaction', 'Paint It Black', and 'Sympathy for the Devil'.

12-06.birthdayZh: 12月6日，是你的生日。愿你像《Curtain Call: The Hits》那样，懂得在人生舞台上优雅谢幕，也懂得为掌声再次启程；愿你的内心始终藏着《Beggars Banquet》的质朴与锋利，在简单中唱出最真实的声音。这一天，世界曾为你悄悄备好礼物。
12-06.birthdayEn: December 6 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us Eminem’s Curtain Call, a celebration of resilience and hard-won triumph, and the Rolling Stones’ Beggars Banquet, a bold shift into raw, soulful truth. May your year echo that same spirit: honoring the hits you’ve made, while daring to evolve into your next great chapter. Let this day be a reminder that you are both a masterpiece and a work in progress—growing, glowing, and endlessly worthy of joy.

items.name: Brain Salad Surgery
items.descriptionZh: 《Brain Salad Surgery》是Emerson, Lake & Palmer于1973年发行的前卫摇滚专辑，风格深受古典（Classical）音乐影响，融合了交响乐、爵士与摇滚。核心特色在于复杂的编曲、合成器与管弦乐的结合，以及改编古典作品（如穆索尔斯基的《图画展览会》），其中《Karn Evil 9》组曲尤为著名。
items.descriptionEn: Brain Salad Surgery is a 1973 progressive rock album by Emerson, Lake & Palmer, deeply influenced by classical music, blending symphonic, jazz, and rock elements. Its core features are complex arrangements, synthesizer-orchestra fusion, and adaptations of classical works (e.g., Mussorgsky's 'Pictures at an Exhibition'), with the 'Karn Evil 9' suite being especially famous.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称来源于一句英国俚语，意为“用脑力解决难题”，但最初被误认为是粗俗玩笑。封面由艺术家H.R. Giger（后来因《异形》设计闻名）创作，描绘了一个机械化的女性头颅，由于过于诡异，唱片公司曾要求修改。录制时，键盘手Keith Emerson坚持使用当时最先进的Moog合成器，导致设备频繁故障，工程师不得不通宵维修。
items.storiesEn: The album title comes from British slang meaning 'to solve a problem with brainpower', but was initially mistaken for a vulgar joke. The cover art by H.R. Giger (later famous for designing Alien) depicted a mechanized female skull; it was so eerie that the label demanded revisions. During recording, keyboardist Keith Emerson insisted on using the most advanced Moog synthesizers, causing frequent equipment failures that kept engineers repairing overnight.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是前卫摇滚的里程碑之作，证明了摇滚乐可以与古典音乐深度结合，影响了后来的前卫金属和交响摇滚乐队。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a milestone of progressive rock, proving rock could deeply integrate with classical music, influencing later progressive metal and symphonic rock bands.
items.artistIntroZh: Emerson, Lake & Palmer（ELP）是1970年成立的英国前卫摇滚超级乐团，成员包括Keith Emerson（键盘）、Greg Lake（贝斯/主唱）和Carl Palmer（鼓）。以古典融合摇滚著称，代表作有《Lucky Man》《Tarkus》《Brain Salad Surgery》。
items.artistIntroEn: Emerson, Lake & Palmer (ELP) were a British progressive rock supergroup formed in 1970, consisting of Keith Emerson (keyboards), Greg Lake (bass/vocals), and Carl Palmer (drums). Known for classical-rock fusion, their代表作 include 'Lucky Man', 'Tarkus', and 'Brain Salad Surgery'.

items.name: Die Passion Whisky
items.descriptionZh: 《Die Passion Whisky》是德国说唱歌手Silla于2012年发行的嘻哈专辑。作品以硬核的节奏和直白的歌词为特色，融合了德式街头叙事与电子元素，呈现出冷峻而富有张力的都市氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Die Passion Whisky is a 2012 hip-hop album by German rapper Silla, characterized by hardcore beats and straightforward lyrics, blending German street narratives with electronic elements to create a cold and tense urban atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 专辑名称《Die Passion Whisky》源自Silla对威士忌的偏爱，录制期间他曾在柏林一家地下录音棚连续工作48小时，期间仅靠威士忌提神。这张专辑也是他与制作人B-Case首次深度合作，二人因音乐理念冲突多次争吵，最终却碰撞出专辑中最具冲击力的曲目。
items.storiesEn: The album title Die Passion Whisky stems from Silla's fondness for whiskey; during recording, he worked for 48 hours straight in a Berlin underground studio, fueled only by whiskey. This album marked his first deep collaboration with producer B-Case, whose creative clashes led to heated arguments but ultimately produced the album's most impactful tracks.
items.artistIntroZh: Silla，德国说唱歌手，以硬核嘻哈风格著称，代表作包括《Die Passion Whisky》和《Blockplatin》。他的音乐以冷峻的街头叙事和强烈的节奏感闻名，是德国地下嘻哈圈的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Silla is a German rapper known for his hardcore hip-hop style, with notable works including Die Passion Whisky and Blockplatin. His music is recognized for its cold street narratives and powerful beats, making him a key figure in the German underground hip-hop scene.

items.name: Keep Loving
items.descriptionZh: 《Keep Loving》是台湾流行歌手郭静于2012年发行的专辑，延续其标志性的清新抒情风格。作品以温暖治愈的旋律和细腻的情感表达为核心，融合轻柔的钢琴与弦乐编曲，传递关于爱与坚持的正能量。
items.descriptionEn: Keep Loving is a 2012 pop album by Taiwanese singer Claire Kuo, continuing her signature fresh and lyrical style. The album focuses on warm, healing melodies and delicate emotional expression, blending soft piano and string arrangements to convey positive energy about love and perseverance.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名主打歌《Keep Loving》原本是为一部偶像剧创作的插曲，但��静在录音时因情绪投入过度而数度哽咽，制作人不得不暂停录制��最终版本保留了其中一次哽咽后的即兴哼唱，成为歌迷心中的经典片段。
items.storiesEn: The title track Keep Loving was originally written as an insert song for a TV drama. During recording, Claire Kuo became so emotionally invested that she choked up several times, forcing the producer to pause. The final version retained an impromptu hum after one such moment, which later became a beloved highlight among fans.
items.artistIntroZh: 郭静，台湾流行女歌手，以清新治愈的抒情风格著称，代表作包括《下一个天亮》和《心墙》。她的音乐常以温暖旋律和细腻歌词打动听众，被誉为“纯爱教主”。
items.artistIntroEn: Claire Kuo is a Taiwanese pop singer known for her fresh and healing lyrical style, with hits like The Next Dawn and Heart Wall. Often called the 'Pure Love Guru,' her music touches listeners with warm melodies and delicate lyrics.

12-07.birthdayZh: 12月7日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发出三种不同的声响——《Brain Salad Surgery》用合成器与歌剧翻涌前卫的勇气，而《Keep Loving》以清新旋律轻唱坚持的温柔。你便活在这两种力量之间：既有破浪的锋芒，又有守候的暖意。愿你在自己的节拍里，把日子谱成永远扎根、永远生长的歌。
12-07.birthdayEn: December 7 is your birthday, a day when the world gave us music as bold as your spirit. Like the cosmic journey of "Brain Salad Surgery," may your year be filled with bold creativity and fearless exploration. And as "Keep Loving" sings, may your heart stay open to fresh joy and endless warmth. You are a masterpiece in progress, and this is your season to shine. Happy birthday—may every note of your life be beautiful and true.

items.name: Dream Meets Best Hits Avex
items.descriptionZh: 《Dream Meets Best Hits Avex》是日本流行组合Dream于2004年发行的精选专辑，收录了她们在艾回唱片期间的代表作。作品以电子舞曲和流行旋律为主线，展现了组合活力四射的舞台风格和甜美的和声特色。
items.descriptionEn: Dream Meets Best Hits Avex is a 2004 compilation album by Japanese pop group Dream, featuring their representative works during their Avex era. The album is centered on electronic dance music and pop melodies, showcasing the group's energetic stage style and sweet harmonies.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集发行时，Dream正值成员更替期，原成员松室麻衣刚宣布毕业。为纪念她的贡献，专辑特别收录了一首未公开的合唱版本《My will》，但麻衣因行程冲突未能参与混音，最终由制作人通过拼接旧录音完成，成为一张“跨越时间的合作”。
items.storiesEn: At the time of this compilation's release, Dream was undergoing member changes, with original member Mai Matsumuro having just announced her graduation. To honor her contributions, the album included an unreleased choral version of My will. However, due to scheduling conflicts, Mai could not participate in the remix, so the producer spliced together old recordings, creating a 'time-crossing collaboration.'
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张精选集标志着Dream从主流偶像组合向独立风格转型的过渡期，其销量在Oricon公信榜上连续八周进入前十，巩固了她们在J-Pop女团中的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: This compilation marked Dream's transition from mainstream idols to a more independent style, charting in the Oricon top 10 for eight consecutive weeks, solidifying their position in the J-Pop girl group scene.
items.artistIntroZh: Dream，日本流行女子组合，1999年出道，以电子舞曲和甜美和声著称，代表作包括《My will》和《Sincerely》。她们是艾回唱片旗下早期成功的女团之一，曾引领2000年代初的J-Pop舞曲潮流。
items.artistIntroEn: Dream is a Japanese pop girl group that debuted in 1999, known for electronic dance music and sweet harmonies, with hits like My will and Sincerely. They were one of Avex's early successful female groups, leading the J-Pop dance trend in the early 2000s.

12-08.birthdayZh: 12月8日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾被《Dream Meets Best Hits Avex》的节拍点亮——那些热烈舞动的音符，像极了你不曾停歇的追光脚步。愿你的生命永远拥有这样的旋律：在每一次律动中，听见自己灵魂的节拍；在每一个平凡日子里，都握得住那首名为“梦想”的主打歌。
12-08.birthdayEn: December 8 is your birthday. On this day, Dream’s “Dream Meets Best Hits Avex” was released—a compilation of radiant melodies that gather the best moments into one beautiful collection, much like your life weaving together joy and light. May your year ahead feel like that album’s spirit: a harmonious medley of cherished memories and new, hopeful beats. You are the centerpiece of your own greatest hits, and today the world celebrates the song that is you. Happy birthday.

items.name: Street Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Street Life》是美国爵士融合乐队The Crusaders于1979年发行的专辑，以放克爵士和灵魂乐为核心特色。作品以强劲的贝斯线、即兴萨克斯和节奏感十足的键盘编曲著称，展现了城市街头的生活气息与律动。
items.descriptionEn: Street Life is a 1979 jazz fusion album by American band The Crusaders, centered on funk jazz and soul music. The album is known for its strong bass lines, improvisational saxophone, and rhythmic keyboard arrangements, capturing the vibrant energy of urban street life.
items.storiesZh: 专辑同名曲《Street Life》原计划由乐队成员Joe Sample演唱，但他在录音前失声，临时邀请女歌手Randy Crawford救场。Crawford仅用两遍就完成了录制，其慵懒而充满力量的嗓音意外成为歌曲灵魂，使这首作品成为乐队最畅销的单曲之一。
items.storiesEn: The title track Street Life was originally intended to be sung by band member Joe Sample, but he lost his voice before recording. Singer Randy Crawford was called in as a last-minute replacement and completed the recording in just two takes. Her lazy yet powerful voice unexpectedly became the song's soul, making it one of the band's best-selling singles.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Street Life》被广泛认为是爵士融合流派的里程碑之作，其同名曲在Billboard R&B榜上排名前五，并成为1970年代放克爵士的代表性曲目，影响了后世多位嘻哈和R&B制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: Street Life is widely regarded as a milestone in jazz fusion. Its title track reached the top 5 on the Billboard R&B chart and became a defining funk-jazz piece of the 1970s, influencing later hip-hop and R&B producers.
items.artistIntroZh: The Crusaders，美国爵士融合乐队，1960年代成立于休斯顿，以放克、灵魂和爵士的混合风格闻名，代表作包括《Street Life》和《Put It Where You Want It》。他们是爵士融合流派的先驱之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Crusaders are an American jazz fusion band formed in Houston in the 1960s, known for blending funk, soul, and jazz. Their notable works include Street Life and Put It Where You Want It, and they are considered pioneers of the jazz fusion genre.

12-09.birthdayZh: 12月9日，是你的生日。这世界曾在同一天，把《Street Life》的节奏铺成街灯下的爵士放克，让流浪的脚步也能踏出华美的舞步。愿你像这张专辑的名字一样，即使走在寻常巷陌，心里也住着不灭的光与律动。不必去远方，你的存在本身就是一首温暖的歌。
12-09.birthdayEn: December 9 is your birthday. On this day, the world was gifted with the soulful, unstoppable groove of The Crusaders' "Street Life," an album that pulses with the vibrant energy of life itself. May your year ahead be like that title track—a rich, luminous melody of joy, resilience, and endless movement. Let your spirit dance through every season, knowing you were born on a day that celebrates both rhythm and light. Here's to you, and the beautiful music you bring to the world.

items.name: I Care 4 U
items.descriptionZh: 《I Care 4 U》是美国R&B歌手Aaliyah于2002年发行的遗作精选专辑，收录了她生前未发布曲目与经典作品。尽管标签标注为民谣/乡村，但实际风格以R&B和灵魂乐为主，融合了轻柔的吉他拨弦和细腻的电子节拍，展现了她柔美而富有感染力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: I Care 4 U is a posthumous compilation album by American R&B singer Aaliyah, released in 2002, featuring unreleased tracks and classics. Though tagged as folk/country, its actual style is primarily R&B and soul, blending gentle guitar plucking and delicate electronic beats, showcasing her soft and emotive vocals.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的发行充满争议：Aaliyah于2001年因空难去世后，唱片公司从她未完成的录音室素材中挑选曲目，其中《Miss You》原本只是她为电影《吸血鬼女王》录制的Demo。制作人R. Kelly曾试图阻止专辑发行，声称部分歌曲版权归属他，最终双方达成和解。
items.storiesEn: The album's release was controversial. After Aaliyah's death in a 2001 plane crash, the label selected tracks from her unfinished studio material. Miss You was originally just a demo for the film Queen of the Damned. Producer R. Kelly attempted to block the release, claiming copyright over some songs, but a settlement was eventually reached.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《I Care 4 U》在Billboard 200榜上首周排名第三，全球销量超过300万张，巩固了Aaliyah作为2000年代初R&B标志性人物的地位，并推动了遗作精选辑的市场模式。
items.historicalImpactEn: I Care 4 U debuted at No. 3 on the Billboard 200 and sold over 3 million copies worldwide, solidifying Aaliyah's status as an iconic R&B figure of the early 2000s and popularizing the posthumous compilation album model.
items.artistIntroZh: Aaliyah，美国R&B女歌手、演员，以独特的低音嗓音和融合嘻哈的R&B风格著称，代表作包括《Try Again》和《One in a Million》。她是2000年代初最具影响力的R&B艺人之一，2001年因空难去世。
items.artistIntroEn: Aaliyah was an American R&B singer and actress known for her distinctive low vocal range and hip-hop-infused R&B style, with hits like Try Again and One in a Million. She was one of the most influential R&B artists of the early 2000s and tragically died in a plane crash in 2001.

items.name: MCMXC a.D.
items.descriptionZh: 《MCMXC a.D.》是Enigma于1990年发行的首张专辑，融合了流行、新世纪、氛围音乐和Gregorian圣咏，创造出一种神秘而空灵的声音景观。其核心特色在于将宗教 chant 与电子节拍、德语旁白结合，形成独特的跨界流行风格，开创了“神秘音乐”的先河。
items.descriptionEn: MCMXC a.D. is Enigma's 1990 debut album, blending pop, new age, ambient music, and Gregorian chants to create a mystical, ethereal soundscape. Its core feature combines religious chants with electronic beats and German narration, forming a unique cross-genre pop style that pioneered 'mystery music'.
items.storiesZh: 专辑的主创Michael Cretu在罗马尼亚录制专辑时，因使用大量未经授权的Gregorian圣咏采样，曾引发版权争议。他后来与教堂达成协议，并成功将这种宗教元素转化为全球流行符号。
items.storiesEn: During recording in Romania, main creator Michael Cretu faced copyright disputes due to extensive use of unauthorized Gregorian chant samples. He later reached an agreement with the church, successfully transforming this religious element into a global pop icon.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专��在全球售出超过1400万张，并凭借单曲《Sadeness (Part I)》引发全球现象，推动新世纪音乐进入主流视野。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album sold over 14 million copies worldwide and sparked a global phenomenon with the single 'Sadeness (Part I)', pushing new age music into the mainstream.
items.artistIntroZh: Enigma是一个德国音乐项目，由Michael Cretu创立，风格融合新世纪、氛围、流行和世界音乐。代表作包括《MCMXC a.D.》和《Le Roi Est Mort, Vive Le Roi!》，以其神秘主义和跨界实验著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Enigma is a German music project founded by Michael Cretu, blending new age, ambient, pop, and world music. Notable works include MCMXC a.D. and Le Roi Est Mort, Vive Le Roi!, known for its mysticism and cross-genre experimentation.

12-10.birthdayZh: 12月10日，是你的生日。这一天，Aaliyah唱着《I Care 4 U》，像一种温柔的确认——你值得被珍视，被世界深深记得。而Enigma的《MCMXC a.D.》在宿命的旋律中启示我们：生命本就如神秘的圣咏，在黑暗中升起光。你的存在，就是这宇宙最动人的和弦。
12-10.birthdayEn: December 10 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with the release of Aaliyah’s “I Care 4 U,” a heartfelt echo of timeless love and memory, and Enigma’s “MCMXC a.D.,” a mystical journey that blends ancient chants with new horizons. Like these albums, your life is a beautiful compilation—woven from sweet devotion and adventurous wonder. May your year ahead be a harmonious melody of joy, depth, and discovery. Warmest wishes for a soul-stirring day and a luminous year to come.

items.name: Someday My Prince Will Come
items.descriptionZh: 《Someday My Prince Will Come》是Miles Davis六重奏于1961年发行的爵士专辑，风格为硬波普与调式爵士。核心特色在于对迪士尼经典歌曲的爵士化改编，以及Davis标志性的小号独奏与Wynton Kelly、John Coltrane等顶尖乐手的默契配合，呈现出优雅而充满张力的即兴对话。
items.descriptionEn: Someday My Prince Will Come is a 1961 jazz album by the Miles Davis Sextet, blending hard bop and modal jazz. Its core features a jazz adaptation of a Disney classic, Miles Davis's iconic trumpet solos, and seamless interplay with top musicians like Wynton Kelly and John Coltrane, delivering elegant yet tense improvisational dialogues.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑录制于1961年3月，当时John Coltrane已离开Davis的乐队，但为了这次录音临时回归。据说Coltrane在录音前刚结束欧洲巡演，状态极佳，他在这首标题曲中的独奏被Davis本人评价为“完美”。
items.storiesEn: Recorded in March 1961, John Coltrane had already left Davis's band but returned temporarily for this session. Said to be in top form after a European tour, Coltrane's solo on the title track was praised by Davis himself as 'perfect'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是Miles Davis六重奏最后一张经典专辑，也是John Coltrane与Davis合作的告别之作，对后波普爵士发展具有里程碑意义。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is the final classic work of the Miles Davis Sextet and the farewell collaboration between John Coltrane and Davis, marking a milestone in post-bop jazz development.
items.artistIntroZh: Miles Davis（1926-1991）是美国爵士小号手、作曲��与乐队领袖，现代爵士乐的革新者。主要风格包括调式爵士、融合爵士与硬波普，代表作有《Kind of Blue》和《Bitches Brew》。
items.artistIntroEn: Miles Davis (1926-1991) was an American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader, a pioneer of modern jazz. His styles include modal jazz, fusion jazz, and hard bop, with notable works like Kind of Blue and Bitches Brew.

items.name: Jesus Piece
items.descriptionZh: 《Jesus Piece》是The Game于2012年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格为西海岸匪帮说唱与硬核嘻哈。核心特色在于其充满街头叙事性的歌词、沉重低音节拍，以及邀请Kanye West、Jay-Z、Rick Ross等巨星客串，展现出West Coast hip-hop的霸气与自省。
items.descriptionEn: Jesus Piece is The Game's fifth studio album, released in 2012, blending West Coast gangsta rap and hardcore hip-hop. Its core features street-narrative lyrics, heavy bass beats, and guest appearances by Kanye West, Jay-Z, and Rick Ross, showcasing West Coast hip-hop's bravado and introspection.
items.storiesZh: 专辑原定名为《The R.E.D. Album Part 2》，但The Game在录音过程中经历了一次信仰觉醒，因此改名为《Jesus Piece》。他表示这张专辑是他对上帝与街头生活的反思，录制期间他甚至邀请牧师到录音室进行祈祷。
items.storiesEn: Originally titled The R.E.D. Album Part 2, The Game renamed it Jesus Piece after a spiritual awakening during recording. He described the album as a reflection on God and street life, even inviting a pastor to pray in the studio during sessions.
items.artistIntroZh: The Game（原名Jayceon Terrell Taylor）是美国说唱歌手，来自加利福尼亚州康普顿，以西海岸匪帮说唱和硬核风格著称。代表作包括《The Documentary》和《Jesus Piece》，是2000年代后西海岸嘻哈的重要人物。
items.artistIntroEn: The Game (born Jayceon Terrell Taylor) is an American rapper from Compton, California, known for West Coast gangsta rap and hardcore style. Notable works include The Documentary and Jesus Piece, a key figure in post-2000s West Coast hip-hop.

items.name: Home for the Holidays
items.descriptionZh: 《Home for the Holidays》是Lynn Anderson于1999年发行的圣诞专辑，风格为流行乡村与节日音乐。核心特色在于Anderson温暖而清澈的嗓音，搭配经典圣诞曲目的乡村化编曲，如《Jingle Bells》和《Silent Night》，营造出温馨怀旧的节日氛围。
items.descriptionEn: Home for the Holidays is a 1999 Christmas album by Lynn Anderson, blending pop country and holiday music. Its core features Anderson's warm, clear vocals with country-tinged arrangements of classic Christmas songs like Jingle Bells and Silent Night, creating a cozy, nostalgic holiday atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Anderson在1990年代后期重返乐坛的作品，录制于纳什维尔。她特意挑选了童年时期最爱的圣诞歌曲，并在录音室中与家人一起庆祝，许多歌曲的伴唱部分由她的子女完成，增添了家庭温情。
items.storiesEn: This album marked Anderson's return to the music scene in the late 1990s, recorded in Nashville. She specifically chose her childhood favorite Christmas songs and celebrated with family in the studio, with backing vocals performed by her children, adding a familial warmth.
items.artistIntroZh: Lynn Anderson（1947-2015）是美国乡村女歌手，以流行乡村风格闻名，代表作包括《Rose Garden》和《Home for the Holidays》。她曾获得格莱美奖，是1970年代乡村音乐的代表性女声之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Lynn Anderson (1947-2015) was an American country singer known for pop country style, with notable works including Rose Garden and Home for the Holidays. A Grammy winner, she was one of the iconic female voices of 1970s country music.

12-11.birthdayZh: 12月11日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾写下不同的旋律——《Someday My Prince Will Come》里藏着温柔的等待，《Home for the Holidays》唱出归途的暖意。你像一部独特专辑，既在岁月里从容铺展自己的节奏，也让每一个靠近的人，听见回家的声音。
12-11.birthdayEn: December 11 is your birthday, a date that sings with history and heart. On this day, the world was gifted the cool, searching beauty of Miles Davis’s “Someday My Prince Will Come,” a reminder that dreams are worth the patient, jazzy wait. In that same spirit, may your year unfold like a classic holiday album—warm, familiar, and full of moments that feel like coming home. Here’s to you: a melody of strength and tenderness, unwrapping joy with every turn of the season.

items.name: The Köln Concert
items.descriptionZh: 《The Köln Concert》是Keith Jarrett于1975年在德国科隆歌剧院举行的现场独奏钢琴音乐会录音，风格为自由即兴爵士与古典。核心特色在于整场音乐会完全即兴创作，无任何预定主题或乐谱，Jarrett通过极富情感的张力和惊人的技巧，创造出长达66分钟的史诗级钢琴独奏。
items.descriptionEn: The Köln Concert is a 1975 live solo piano recording by Keith Jarrett at the Cologne Opera House, blending free improvisation jazz and classical. Its core feature is completely improvised performance with no pre-set themes or scores, with Jarrett using emotional tension and stunning technique to create a 66-minute epic solo piano work.
items.storiesZh: 音乐会当晚，Jarrett因长途旅行疲惫且钢琴音色不佳（琴键偏轻且高音区音准有问题），一度想取消演出。但主办方坚持，他最终决定即兴演奏。结果这张专辑成为史上最畅销的钢琴独奏专辑之一。Jarrett后来回忆说，那架“糟糕”的钢琴反而迫使他探索新的音色。
items.storiesEn: On the concert night, Jarrett was exhausted from travel and found the piano subpar (light keys and out-of-tune upper register), nearly canceling. The promoter insisted, so he improvised. The album became one of the best-selling solo piano albums ever. Jarrett later recalled that the 'bad' piano forced him to explore new timbres.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是爵士乐史上最著名的即兴独奏录音之一，极大地推动了自由即兴爵士与独奏钢琴的普及，销量超过350万张。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is one of the most famous improvised solo recordings in jazz history, greatly popularizing free improvisation jazz and solo piano, with over 3.5 million copies sold.
items.artistIntroZh: Keith Jarrett（1945年生）是美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，以即兴独奏和标准三重奏闻名。主要风格包括自由即兴、后波普与古典跨界，代表作有《The Köln Concert》和《Standards》系列。
items.artistIntroEn: Keith Jarrett (born 1945) is an American jazz pianist and composer, known for improvised solos and standard trios. His styles include free improvisation, post-bop, and classical crossover, with notable works like The Köln Concert and the Standards series.

items.name: Rockbound Neighbors
items.descriptionZh: 《Rockbound Neighbors》是水树奈奈于2012年发行的流行专辑，融合了J-Pop与动画歌曲元素，以高亢有力的嗓音和富有节奏感的编曲为核心特色，展现了其作为声优歌手的独特魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Rockbound Neighbors" is a pop album released by Nana Mizuki in 2012, blending J-Pop and anime song elements, characterized by her powerful vocals and rhythmic arrangements, showcasing her unique charm as a voice actress and singer.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑发行前，水树奈奈在2012年夏季的Animelo Summer Live上首次演唱了主打曲《Rockbound Neighbors》，现场反响热烈。录制过程中，她特别注重情感表达，以贴合动画《DOG DAYS》的主题。
items.storiesEn: Before the album's release, Nana Mizuki premiered the title track "Rockbound Neighbors" at Animelo Summer Live in summer 2012, receiving an enthusiastic response. During recording, she focused on emotional expression to match the theme of the anime "DOG DAYS."
items.artistIntroZh: 水树奈奈（Nana Mizuki），日本女性声优、��手，出生于爱媛县。以高亢的嗓音和强大的现场演唱能力著称，代表作包括《ETERNAL BLAZE》和《Synchrogazer》，是首位登上东京巨蛋的声优歌手。
items.artistIntroEn: Nana Mizuki is a Japanese voice actress and singer from Ehime Prefecture, known for her powerful vocals and live performances. Her representative works include "ETERNAL BLAZE" and "Synchrogazer," and she is the first voice actress to perform at Tokyo Dome.

12-12.birthdayZh: 12月12日，是你的生日。这一天，诞生过《The Köln Concert》那样自由的即兴——仿佛在说，你可以像Keith Jarrett那样，在孤独的琴键上建造整座星空。也诞生过《Rockbound Neighbors》的热忱，用爆发与温柔告诉你，世界再坚硬，你也有能力让它变得温暖。生日快乐，愿你像这些旋律一样，活着便是奇迹。
12-12.birthdayEn: December 12 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Keith Jarrett’s "The Köln Concert," a spontaneous piano masterpiece that proves beauty can bloom from silence and struggle. And Nana Mizuki’s "Rockbound Neighbors" sings of resilience and connection, blending strength with tenderness. May your year ahead be a solo of your own making—improvised, bold, and deeply felt—surrounded by neighbors who lift you higher. You are a melody worth celebrating, today and always.

12-13.birthdayZh: 12月13日，是你的生日。世界在这一天曾将《Rumours》的坚韧与勇气藏进旋律，告诉我们要在破碎中依然相信爱；而《The Dark Side of the Moon》则用年轮般的音轨提醒，奔跑的时光里总有星光引路。你来到这人间，便像这些音符一样，既承载过脆弱，也握得住光亮。愿每一岁，都长出比昨日更温柔的力气。
12-13.birthdayEn: December 13 is your birthday—a date marked by music and light. On this day, Fleetwood Mac’s Rumours arrived, carrying a spirit of finding harmony through life’s storms, and The Beatles’ Let It Be whispered hope into quiet corners. Like these albums, your journey holds both struggle and song. May the year ahead echo with resilience, tenderness, and the quiet joy of being exactly where you are. You were born on a day that reminds the world to keep believing, keep dreaming, and keep the music playing. Happy birthday.

items.name: Time Out
items.descriptionZh: 《Time Out》是戴夫·布鲁贝克四重奏于1959年发行的爵士专辑，以实验性的非标准拍号（如5/4和9/8）为核心特色，融合了古典与爵士元素，被誉为冷爵士和西海岸爵士的里程碑之作。
items.descriptionEn: "Time Out" is a jazz album released by The Dave Brubeck Quartet in 1959, featuring experimental non-standard time signatures (such as 5/4 and 9/8), blending classical and jazz elements, and is hailed as a milestone in cool jazz and West Coast jazz.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于哥伦比亚唱片公司，主打曲《Take Five》由中音萨克斯手保罗·戴斯蒙德创作，最初因采用罕见的5/4拍而遭到发行商质疑。但戴夫·布鲁贝克坚持实验，最终单曲成为爵士史上最畅销的曲目之一。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Columbia Records, the lead track "Take Five" was composed by alto saxophonist Paul Desmond and initially faced skepticism from distributors due to its rare 5/4 time signature. However, Dave Brubeck insisted on the experiment, and the single became one of the best-selling jazz tracks in history.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Time Out》是首张销量超过百万张的爵士专辑，推动了非标准拍号在爵士乐中的普及，对后世爵士乐和流行音乐产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Time Out" was the first jazz album to sell over a million copies, popularizing non-standard time signatures in jazz and leaving a lasting impact on both jazz and pop music.
items.artistIntroZh: 戴夫·布鲁贝克（Dave Brubeck），美国爵士钢琴家、作曲家，出生于加利福尼亚州。以复杂的节奏结构和冷爵士风格闻名，代表作包括《Take Five》和《Blue Rondo à la Turk》，是西海岸爵士的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Dave Brubeck was an American jazz pianist and composer from California, known for complex rhythms and cool jazz. His representative works include "Take Five" and "Blue Rondo à la Turk," and he is a key figure in West Coast jazz.

items.name: Love Letter
items.descriptionZh: 《Love Letter》是R. Kelly于2010年发行的R&B/Soul专辑，以复古灵魂乐为核心特色，融合了70年代Motown和芝加哥灵魂乐元素，展现了其深情而富有感染力的嗓音。
items.descriptionEn: "Love Letter" is an R&B/Soul album by R. Kelly released in 2010, centered on retro soul music, blending 1970s Motown and Chicago soul elements, showcasing his heartfelt and emotive vocals.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于芝加哥的Blast Off Studios，R. Kelly受到经典灵魂歌手如Sam Cooke和Marvin Gaye的启发，刻意采用模拟录音设备以获得温暖音质。他还在专辑封面中模仿了经典灵魂专辑的复古风格。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Blast Off Studios in Chicago, R. Kelly was inspired by classic soul singers like Sam Cooke and Marvin Gaye, deliberately using analog recording equipment to achieve a warm sound. The album cover also mimics the retro style of classic soul albums.
items.artistIntroZh: R. Kelly，美国R&B歌手、词曲作者和制作人，出生于芝加哥。以流畅的嗓音和情感丰富的灵魂乐风格著称，代表作包括《I Believe I Can Fly》和《Ignition》，是90年代至2000年代R&B的代表人物。
items.artistIntroEn: R. Kelly is an American R&B singer, songwriter, and producer from Chicago, known for his smooth vocals and emotive soul style. His representative works include "I Believe I Can Fly" and "Ignition," and he is a leading figure in 1990s-2000s R&B.

items.name: THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 4~
items.descriptionZh: 《THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 ~名侦探柯南主题曲合集4~》是2011年发行的流行合辑，收录了多首动画《名侦探柯南》的片头曲和片尾曲，以J-Pop和动画歌曲为核心特色，汇集了仓木麻衣、B'z等艺人。
items.descriptionEn: "THE BEST OF DETECTIVE CONAN 4 ~Detective Conan Theme Song Collection 4~" is a pop compilation album released in 2011, featuring multiple opening and ending themes from the anime "Detective Conan," centered on J-Pop and anime songs, with artists like Mai Kuraki and B'z.
items.storiesZh: 这张合辑是《名侦探柯南》系列主题曲合集的第四弹，收录了从2009年至2011年的热门曲目。其中仓木麻衣的《PUZZLE》和B'z的《Don't Wanna Lie》均为动画量身定制，录制时艺人团队与动画制作组密切沟通以确保歌词契合剧情。
items.storiesEn: This compilation is the fourth volume of the "Detective Conan" theme song series, featuring popular tracks from 2009 to 2011. Songs like Mai Kuraki's "PUZZLE" and B'z's "Don't Wanna Lie" were custom-made for the anime, with artists' teams closely coordinating with the animation production team to ensure lyrics matched the story.
items.artistIntroZh: 该合辑由多位艺人参与，包括日本流行歌手仓木麻衣（以《Secret of my heart》闻名）和摇滚乐队B'z（代表作《ultra soul》），均为J-Pop和动画歌曲领域的代表，多次为《名侦探柯南》献声。
items.artistIntroEn: This compilation features multiple artists, including Japanese pop singer Mai Kuraki (known for "Secret of my heart") and rock band B'z (representative work "ultra soul"), both prominent in J-Pop and anime songs, having contributed frequently to "Detective Conan."

12-14.birthdayZh: 12月14日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏好一份温柔的礼物——《Time Out》里挣脱节奏的旋律，像你从不被定义的勇敢；《Love Letter》将深情写成信笺，提醒你值得被珍重。而你来到人间，就是最动听的和弦。生日快乐，愿你永远自由地歌唱。
12-14.birthdayEn: December 14 is your birthday. On this day in history, the world gifted us the cool, timeless swing of Dave Brubeck’s *Time Out*, a reminder that life’s beauty is found in its offbeat, unexpected rhythms. You share your day with that same spirit of bold, joyful creativity. May your year ahead unfold like a perfect melody—full of surprising harmony, deep love, and the soundtrack of all your brightest dreams. Happy birthday, and may every moment feel as classic and uplifting as your special day.

items.name: The Chronic
items.descriptionZh: 《The Chronic》是Dr. Dre于1992年发行的西海岸嘻哈专辑，以G-Funk风格为核心特色，融合了放克旋律、慢速节奏和合成器音效，定义了90年代西海岸嘻哈的声音。
items.descriptionEn: "The Chronic" is a West Coast hip-hop album by Dr. Dre released in 1992, centered on the G-Funk style, blending funk melodies, slow grooves, and synthesizer sounds, defining the sound of 1990s West Coast hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 专辑录制于洛杉矶的Death Row Records，Dr. Dre在制作中大量采样了70年代放克乐队如Parliament-Funkadelic的音乐。主打曲《Nuthin' but a 'G' Thang》由Snoop Dogg客串，录制时两人即兴创作，最终成为经典。
items.storiesEn: Recorded at Death Row Records in Los Angeles, Dr. Dre heavily sampled 1970s funk bands like Parliament-Funkadelic during production. The lead track "Nuthin' but a 'G' Thang" featured Snoop Dogg, and the duo improvised during recording, creating a classic.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《The Chronic》被广泛认为是G-Funk的奠基之作，推动了西海岸嘻哈的商业成功，并帮助Snoop Dogg开启职业生涯，对90年代嘻哈文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: "The Chronic" is widely regarded as the foundational work of G-Funk, driving the commercial success of West Coast hip-hop, launching Snoop Dogg's career, and profoundly impacting 1990s hip-hop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Dr. Dre（安德烈·罗梅勒·杨），美国嘻哈制作人、说唱歌手，出生于加利福尼亚州康普顿。作为G-Funk风格的先驱，代表作包括《The Chronic》和《2001》，培养了Eminem、Snoop Dogg等巨星。
items.artistIntroEn: Dr. Dre (André Romelle Young) is an American hip-hop producer and rapper from Compton, California. As a pioneer of G-Funk, his representative works include "The Chronic" and "2001," and he has mentored stars like Eminem and Snoop Dogg.

items.name: The Young Ones
items.descriptionZh: 《The Young Ones》是Cliff Richard在1961年发行的流行专辑，与同名电影同步推出。作品以轻快明朗的英式流行曲风为主，融合了摇滚节奏与抒情旋律，展现了早期60年代青少年文化的朝气。Cliff Richard清澈的嗓音与吉他主导的编曲，使其成为当时英国流行乐坛的代表性作品。
