items.descriptionEn: "The Young Ones" is a pop album released by Cliff Richard in 1961, tied to the film of the same name. Featuring upbeat British pop with rock rhythms and melodic ballads, it captures the youthful spirit of the early 1960s. Cliff Richard's clear vocals and guitar-driven arrangements made it a landmark in British pop music.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的同名电影《The Young Ones》是Cliff Richard演艺生涯中的重要里程碑。为了配合电影宣传，专辑在录制时特意加入了多首电影中的插曲，包括主题曲《The Young Ones》。录制过程中，Cliff Richard与乐队The Shadows紧密合作，尝试将电影叙事融入音乐，使得专辑不仅是歌曲合集，更是电影情感的延伸。
items.storiesEn: The album was created as a companion to the film "The Young Ones," a major milestone in Cliff Richard's career. During recording, he worked closely with The Shadows to incorporate the film's narrative into the music, including the title track. This made the album more than just a song collection—it became an emotional extension of the movie.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑及同名电影推动了英国青少年流行文化的发展，使Cliff Richard成为60年代初英国流行乐坛的标志性人物。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album and its film helped shape British youth pop culture, establishing Cliff Richard as an iconic figure in early 1960s British pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Cliff Richard，英国歌手、演员，出生于印度，被誉为“英国流行乐坛的常青树”。其风格以流行、摇滚为主，代表作包括《Living Doll》《The Young Ones》等，对英国流行音乐影响深远。
items.artistIntroEn: Cliff Richard is a British singer and actor, born in India, often called the "Peter Pan of British Pop." His style blends pop and rock, with hits like "Living Doll" and "The Young Ones," leaving a lasting impact on British music.

items.name: Kabaret
items.descriptionZh: 《Kabaret》是法国流行女歌手Patricia Kaas在2008年发行的专辑，风格融合了法式香颂、流行与爵士元素。专辑以卡巴莱歌舞表演为灵感，编曲精致，情感浓郁，展现了Patricia Kaas成熟而富有戏剧性的嗓音。��品既有法式优雅，又带有一丝怀旧与感伤。
items.descriptionEn: "Kabaret" is a 2008 pop album by French singer Patricia Kaas, blending French chanson, pop, and jazz. Inspired by cabaret performances, the album features sophisticated arrangements and emotional depth, showcasing Kaas's mature and theatrical voice. It balances French elegance with nostalgia and melancholy.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的创作灵感来源于Patricia Kaas对卡巴莱文化的热爱。她曾多次表示，卡巴莱不仅是音乐形式，更是一种自由表达的艺术。在录制过程中，她邀请了多位法国顶尖音乐人参与，并刻意在录音棚中营造出类似卡巴莱俱乐部的氛围，以捕捉现场表演的真实感。
items.storiesEn: The album was inspired by Patricia Kaas's love for cabaret culture. She often said cabaret is not just a musical form but an art of free expression. During recording, she invited top French musicians and deliberately created a cabaret-club atmosphere in the studio to capture the authenticity of live performance.
items.artistIntroZh: Patricia Kaas，法国流行女歌手，出生于法国萨尔格米纳。以其独特的法式香颂流行风格闻名，代表作包括《Mademoiselle chante le blues》等，是法国乐坛最具国��知名度的女歌手之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Patricia Kaas is a French pop singer from Sarreguemines, France. Known for her unique blend of French chanson and pop, she gained international fame with hits like "Mademoiselle chante le blues."

12-15.birthdayZh: 12月15日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行《The Chronic》——西海岸的G-Funk在慵懒低音里长出叛逆的温柔，像你骨子里的倔强与柔软。而《Kabaret》的沙哑香颂，则唱出戏剧般跌宕却从不妥协的生命力。你来到这天的意义，就是让所有音符都找到归处——不必追赶阳光，你本身就是温暖的力量。
12-15.birthdayEn: December 15 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Dr. Dre’s “The Chronic,” an album that pulses with bold, unapologetic rhythm—much like the fierce energy you bring into any room. But also, there’s the heartfelt “Kabaret” by Patricia Kaas, a tender blend of soul and resilience. Your birthday mirrors this beautiful duality: a spark of rebellion and a soft, enduring melody. May your year ahead hum with both power and grace, each note reminding you how wonderfully rare you are. Here’s to you.

items.name: Prime of Life
items.descriptionZh: 《Prime of Life》是日本流行组合w-inds在2003年发行的第三张录音室专辑。作品以J-Pop为主，融合了舞曲、R&B和抒情元素，展现了成员们从少年向青年过渡的音乐成熟度。专辑中的歌曲节奏明快，旋律抓耳，配合成员们日益精进的演唱技巧，成为当时日本流行乐坛的青春代表。
items.descriptionEn: "Prime of Life" is the third studio album by Japanese pop group w-inds, released in 2003. Blending J-Pop with dance, R&B, and ballads, the album showcases the members' musical maturity as they transitioned from teens to young adults. Catchy melodies and improved vocals made it a defining youth pop album in Japan.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的录制正值w-inds人气急速上升期。为了呈现“黄金时期”的主题，三位成员在录音和舞蹈训练上投入了大量精力。据成员回忆，主打歌的编舞经过了数十次修改，力求达到完美同步。专辑发行后，他们首次在东京武道馆举办了演唱会，成为其职业生涯的重要转折点。
items.storiesEn: The album was recorded during w-inds' rapid rise in popularity. To embody the "prime of life" theme, the three members dedicated extensive time to vocal and dance training. The lead single's choreography was revised dozens of times for perfect synchronization. After release, they held their first concert at Tokyo Budokan, a major career milestone.
items.artistIntroZh: w-inds，日本男子流行演唱组合，由橘庆太、千叶凉平、绪方龙一组成。以J-Pop和舞曲风格为主，代表作包括《Forever Memories》《Paradox》等，是21世纪初日本最具影响力的男子偶像团体之一。
items.artistIntroEn: w-inds is a Japanese male pop group consisting of Keita Tachibana, Ryohei Chiba, and Ryuichi Ogata. Known for J-Pop and dance music, their hits include "Forever Memories" and "Paradox," making them one of Japan's most influential boy bands in the early 2000s.

12-17.birthdayZh: 12月17日，是你的生日。这天，世界曾发行《Prime of Life》，像一首写给青春的赞歌——它说生命的黄金期不在远方，而在你每一次勇敢起舞的此刻。你正站在自己人生的正午，光芒正好，风也温柔。愿你在岁月里，始终拥有这份蓬勃的元气，把每一个今天，都活成最好的时光。
12-17.birthdayEn: December 17 is your birthday. On this day, the album "Prime of Life" by w-inds. was released, capturing the bold, hopeful energy of stepping into your own spotlight. Just as that record marks a moment of blossoming artistry, your birthday feels like a fresh turn in a beautiful melody. May your year ahead be filled with the same vibrant rhythm and bright promise. Here’s to you—the composer of your own prime of life, with every new chapter worth celebrating.

items.name: Diana Ross Presents The Jackson 5
items.descriptionZh: 《Diana Ross Presents The Jackson 5》是美国R&B/Soul组合The Jackson 5在1969年发行的首张录音室专辑，由Diana Ross引荐。作品融合了摩城风格的灵魂乐、放克和流行元素，以Jackson家族年轻成员Michael Jackson为主唱。专辑充满活力与感染力，展现了少年们惊人的音乐天赋和舞台魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Diana Ross Presents The Jackson 5" is the debut studio album by American R&B/Soul group The Jackson 5, released in 1969 and presented by Diana Ross. Blending Motown soul, funk, and pop, the album features young Michael Jackson on lead vocals. It radiates energy and charm, showcasing the brothers' extraordinary musical talent.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生与摩城唱片创始人Berry Gordy的慧眼识珠密不可分。Diana Ross在观看了Jackson 5的表演后，极力向Gordy推荐他们。录制过程中，年仅11岁的Michael Jackson展现出了超乎年龄的专业素养，甚至主动提出对歌曲编曲的建议。专辑发行后迅速登顶排行榜，开启了Jackson 5的传奇生涯。
items.storiesEn: The album's creation was closely tied to Motown founder Berry Gordy's keen eye. After watching The Jackson 5 perform, Diana Ross strongly recommended them to Gordy. During recording, 11-year-old Michael Jackson showed remarkable professionalism, even suggesting arrangement ideas. The album quickly topped charts, launching The Jackson 5's legendary career.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑标志着The Jackson 5的正式出道，并奠定了Michael Jackson作为童星天���的地位，对摩城音乐和流行文化产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album marked The Jackson 5's official debut and established Michael Jackson as a child superstar, profoundly influencing Motown music and pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: The Jackson 5，美国R&B/Soul家族组合，来自印第安纳州加里市。由Jackson家族五兄弟组成，以Michael Jackson为主唱。风格以摩城灵魂乐、放克为主，代表作包括《I Want You Back》《ABC》等，是流行音乐史上最具影响力的组合之一。
items.artistIntroEn: The Jackson 5 is an American R&B/Soul family group from Gary, Indiana, consisting of five Jackson brothers with Michael Jackson as lead vocalist. Known for Motown soul and funk, their hits include "I Want You Back" and "ABC," making them one of the most influential groups in pop music history.

items.name: Stillmatic
items.descriptionZh: 《Stillmatic》是美国说唱歌手Nas在2001年发行的第五张录音室专辑，风格以东海岸嘻哈为主，融合了硬核说唱、街头叙事与灵魂乐采样。专辑被视为Nas职业生涯的复兴之作，歌词深刻犀利，探讨了社会现实、个人成长与嘻哈文化。其中与Jay-Z的diss曲目《Ether》成为嘻哈史上最著名的Beef曲之一。
items.descriptionEn: "Stillmatic" is the fifth studio album by American rapper Nas, released in 2001. Rooted in East Coast hip-hop, it blends hardcore rap, street narratives, and soul samples. Considered a career revival, the album features sharp lyrics addressing social issues, personal growth, and hip-hop culture. The diss track "Ether" targeting Jay-Z became legendary in hip-hop history.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的诞生直接源于Nas与Jay-Z之间激烈的说唱对抗。在Jay-Z的《Takeover》公开diss Nas后，Nas迅速创作了《Ether》作为回击，并在录音棚中一气呵成。专辑标题《Stillmatic》寓意Nas依然保持顶尖水准。录制过程中，Nas亲自监督每一首歌曲的混音，确保声音的硬朗与真实。
items.storiesEn: The album was directly born from Nas's intense rap feud with Jay-Z. After Jay-Z's diss track "Takeover," Nas quickly wrote "Ether" as a response, recording it in one take. The title "Stillmatic" signified Nas was still at his peak. During recording, Nas personally oversaw every mix to ensure a raw, hard-hitting sound.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被广泛认为是Nas职业生涯的转折点，复兴了东海岸嘻哈的叙事传统，并巩固了其作为最伟大说唱歌手之一的地位。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is widely regarded as a turning point in Nas's career, reviving East Coast hip-hop's storytelling tradition and cementing his status as one of the greatest rappers of all time.
items.artistIntroZh: Nas，美国说唱歌手、词曲作者，出生于纽约皇后区。以其深刻的街头叙事和东海岸嘻哈风格闻名，代表作包括《Illmatic》《Stillmatic》等，被誉为嘻哈史上最伟大的MC之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Nas is an American rapper and songwriter from Queens, New York. Renowned for his vivid street narratives and East Coast hip-hop style, his classic albums include "Illmatic" and "Stillmatic," earning him recognition as one of the greatest MCs in hip-hop history.

items.name: Q785150
items.descriptionZh: 《Csaba Vastag》是匈牙利流行歌手Csaba Vastag于2010年发行的同名专辑，风格以主流流行乐为主，融合了轻快的旋律与抒情元素。专辑展现了歌手清澈的嗓音与情感表达，核心特色在于其朗朗上口的副歌与贴近大众审美的编曲，适合广泛的听众群体。
items.descriptionEn: Csaba Vastag is a 2010 self-titled pop album by Hungarian singer Csaba Vastag, featuring mainstream pop melodies and lyrical elements. It highlights his clear vocals and emotional delivery, with catchy choruses and accessible arrangements appealing to a broad audience.
items.storiesZh: Csaba Vastag因参加匈牙利版《X音素》第二季而一举成名，并在比赛后迅速推出这张同名专辑。专辑中的多首歌曲由匈牙利知名制作人参与打造，旨在延续他在节目中建立的人气。据悉，专辑录制过程中，Csaba坚持加入自己创作的歌词，以体现个人风格。
items.storiesEn: Csaba Vastag rose to fame after competing in the second season of Hungary's X-Factor, quickly releasing this self-titled album post-show. Several tracks were crafted by renowned Hungarian producers to capitalize on his newfound popularity. It is said that Csaba insisted on contributing his own lyrics to reflect his personal style during recording.
items.artistIntroZh: Csaba Vastag是匈牙利流行男歌手，因参加《X音素》第二季获得第二名而知名。他的音乐风格以主流流行和抒情歌曲为主，代表作包括同名专辑《Csaba Vastag》中的多首单曲，在匈牙利拥有较高人气。
items.artistIntroEn: Csaba Vastag is a Hungarian pop singer who gained fame as the runner-up in the second season of X-Factor Hungary. His music primarily features mainstream pop and ballads, with his self-titled debut album being his notable work, earning him significant popularity in Hungary.

12-18.birthdayZh: 12月18日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Jackson 5》用年少的天真唱出第一声灿烂，像你初临世界时那般鲜活。而《Stillmatic》教会人无论经历多少冷雨，依然能在心底升腾起不屈的光。你身上，既有纯真的星光，也有倔强的土壤。愿你继续生长，像那些旋律一样，把日子过成自己的传奇。
12-18.birthdayEn: December 18 is your birthday, a date that echoes with the energy of legendary beginnings. Like the Jackson 5’s debut, your life is a soulful harmony of promise and joy; like Nas’s resilient *Stillmatic*, you carry a spirit of renewal and inner strength. May this year feel like a timeless album—each day a track of grace, each challenge a verse that builds toward your greatest chorus. May your heart always know its first note of hope and its last note of peace.

items.name: Zuhältertape Volume 3
items.descriptionZh: 《Zuhältertape Volume 3》是德国说唱歌手Kollegah于2009年发行的混音带，属于硬核嘻哈风格。专辑以侵略性的押韵、复杂的双关语和街头叙事为核心特色，展现了Kollegah标志性的自信与华丽词汇，是德国地下嘻哈向主流过渡时期的代表作品之一。
items.descriptionEn: Zuhältertape Volume 3 is a 2009 mixtape by German rapper Kollegah, rooted in hardcore hip-hop. It features aggressive rhymes, complex wordplay, and street narratives, showcasing Kollegah's trademark confidence and flamboyant vocabulary, representing a transition from underground to mainstream German hip-hop.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带是Kollegah“Zuhältertape”系列的第三部，录制于他事业上升期。Kollegah曾表示，这张专辑的创作灵感来源于他的街头经历和对说唱技巧的极致追求。专辑发行后，因其大胆的歌词和精妙的押韵结构，在德国嘻哈圈引发热议，也为他后续的商业成功奠定了基础。
items.storiesEn: This mixtape is the third installment in Kollegah's 'Zuhältertape' series, recorded during his rise in the German hip-hop scene. Kollegah stated that the album was inspired by his street experiences and a pursuit of lyrical perfection. Upon release, it sparked discussions in the German hip-hop community for its bold lyrics and intricate rhyme schemes, laying the groundwork for his later commercial success.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该系列混音带在德国嘻哈领域具有里程碑意义，巩固了Kollegah作为技术型说唱歌手的地位，并影响了后续德国说唱歌手对复杂押韵和叙事风格的追求。
items.historicalImpactEn: The 'Zuhältertape' series is considered a milestone in German hip-hop, solidifying Kollegah's reputation as a technical rapper and influencing subsequent German rappers' pursuit of complex rhymes and narrative styles.
items.artistIntroZh: Kollegah（本名Felix Blume）是德国说唱歌手，以其高超的押韵技巧、华丽的词汇和硬核形象著称。他出生于加拿大，在德国长大，代表作包括《Zuhältertape》系列和专辑《King》，是德国嘻哈商业与地下领域的标志性人物。
items.artistIntroEn: Kollegah (born Felix Blume) is a German rapper known for his advanced rhyming skills, flamboyant vocabulary, and hardcore image. Born in Canada and raised in Germany, his notable works include the 'Zuhältertape' series and the album 'King', making him a key figure in both commercial and underground German hip-hop.

items.name: Dive
items.descriptionZh: 《Dive》是日本歌手坂本真绫于1998年发行的第二张录音室专辑，风格以流行乐为主，融合了J-Pop、合成器流行和轻柔摇滚元素。专辑核心特色在于其空灵的嗓音与细腻的情感表达，配合菅野洋子的编曲，营造出梦幻而富有感染力的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: Dive is the second studio album by Japanese singer Maaya Sakamoto, released in 1998. It blends pop, J-Pop, synth-pop, and soft rock elements, characterized by her ethereal vocals and delicate emotional delivery. With Yoko Kanno's arrangements, the album creates a dreamy and captivating listening experience.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑由著名作曲家菅野洋子担任制作和编曲，两人自此开始了长达多年的密切合作。坂本真绫当时年仅18岁，专辑录制过程中，她一边完成学业一边参与创作，展现了超越年龄的专业素养。专辑同名曲《Dive》也被用作动画《玲音》的主题曲，进一步扩大了影响力。
items.storiesEn: The album was produced and arranged by renowned composer Yoko Kanno, marking the start of a long-term collaboration. At just 18, Maaya Sakamoto balanced school and recording, showing professionalism beyond her years. The title track 'Dive' was also used as the theme song for the anime 'Serial Experiments Lain', boosting its reach.
items.artistIntroZh: 坂本真绫是日本女性声优、歌手，以清澈透明的嗓音和多元音乐风格著称。她8岁开始声优工作，后与菅野洋子合作推出多张经典专辑。代表作包括《Dive》《Gravity》和《プラチナ》，在动画与音乐领域均有重要地位。
items.artistIntroEn: Maaya Sakamoto is a Japanese voice actress and singer known for her clear, transparent voice and versatile musical style. She began voice acting at age 8 and later collaborated with Yoko Kanno on several classic albums. Notable works include 'Dive', 'Gravity', and 'Platinum', making her a significant figure in both anime and music.

12-19.birthdayZh: 12月19日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾发行过《Dive》——像鼓足勇气跃入深海，迎接所有未知的清澈与光芒；也诞生过《Zuhältertape Volume 3》，那种在暗夜里也绝不妥协的节奏与韵脚。所以你看，你天生就同时拥有柔软与坚韧：既能温柔下沉，也能高声搏击。愿你新的一岁，像旋律一样从容铺展，像韵脚一样精准铿锵。生日快乐。
12-19.birthdayEn: December 19 is your birthday, a date marked by the release of albums like Kollegah's Zuhältertape Volume 3, bold and unyielding in its complexity, and Maaya Sakamoto's Dive, a gentle plunge into beautiful, soaring beginnings. May your year ahead carry that same spirit—the courage to stand strong in your truth and the grace to dive fearlessly into every new dream. You are a masterpiece of your own creation, and today the world celebrates the song only you can sing.

items.name: Break the Rules
items.descriptionZh: 《Break the Rules》是日本歌手安室奈美惠于2000年发行的专辑，风格以电子流行和舞曲为主，融合了R&B与欧陆节拍。核心特色在于其前卫的电子音效、强劲的节奏以及安室富有力量感的演唱，展现了她在千禧年之交对流行音乐潮流的敏锐把握。
items.descriptionEn: Break the Rules is a 2000 album by Japanese singer Namie Amuro, featuring electronic pop and dance music blended with R&B and Eurobeat. It stands out for its forward-thinking electronic sounds, strong beats, and Amuro's powerful vocals, showcasing her keen sense of pop music trends at the turn of the millennium.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是安室奈美惠产后复出的重要作品，当时她刚经历婚姻与生育的人生转折。为了突破以往偶像形象，她大胆尝试更成熟的电子舞曲风格，并参与选曲和造型设计。专辑发行后获得商业成功，也标志着她从少女偶像向实力派女歌手的转型。
items.storiesEn: This album was a major comeback for Namie Amuro after marriage and childbirth. To break away from her former idol image, she boldly embraced a more mature electronic dance sound and was involved in track selection and styling. The album achieved commercial success and marked her transition from a teen idol to a serious artist.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑被视为安室奈美惠音乐转型的关键节点，推动了日本流行乐坛向电子舞曲风格的探索，对同期及后来的日本女性歌手产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album is regarded as a key turning point in Namie Amuro's career, promoting the exploration of electronic dance music in Japanese pop and influencing contemporary and later female Japanese artists.
items.artistIntroZh: 安室奈美惠是日本歌手、舞者，被誉为“平成歌姬”。她以多变的音乐风格、精湛的舞蹈和时尚形象闻名。代表作包括《Can You Celebrate?》《Break the Rules》和《Hero》，是日本流行音乐史上最具影响力的女性艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Namie Amuro is a Japanese singer and dancer, often called the 'Queen of Heisei'. Known for her versatile music style, exceptional dance skills, and fashion-forward image, her notable works include 'Can You Celebrate?', 'Break the Rules', and 'Hero', making her one of the most influential female artists in Japanese pop history.

items.name: Please Myself
items.descriptionZh: 《Please Myself》是香港歌手王菲于1994年发行的粤语专辑，风格以主流流行和另类流行为主，融合了英伦摇滚和梦幻流行的元素。专辑核心特色在于王菲标志性的空灵嗓音与实验性的编曲，歌词大胆直白，展现了她对自我表达的追求。
items.descriptionEn: Please Myself is a 1994 Cantonese album by Hong Kong singer Faye Wong, blending mainstream pop, alternative pop, Britpop, and dream pop. It features her signature ethereal vocals and experimental arrangements, with bold and direct lyrics that reflect her pursuit of self-expression.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑的名称《Please Myself》直接体现了王菲当时“取悦自己”的创作态度。录制期间，她正处于与窦唯的热恋中，音乐风格也受到窦唯英伦摇滚影响，呈现出与前作不同的独立气质。专辑中《梦中人》一曲后来因电影《重庆森林》的引用而成为经典。
items.storiesEn: The album title 'Please Myself' directly reflects Faye Wong's creative attitude of pleasing herself at the time. During recording, she was in a relationship with Dou Wei, whose Britpop influence shaped the album's indie character. The track 'Dream Lover' later became a classic after being featured in the film 'Chungking Express'.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是王菲确立个人音乐风格的重要里程碑，推动了粤语流行音乐向另类风格的探索，对90年代中后期华语乐坛产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album was a milestone in establishing Faye Wong's unique musical style, pushing Cantopop toward alternative sounds and deeply influencing the Chinese music scene in the mid-to-late 1990s.
items.artistIntroZh: 王菲是中国香港歌手、演员，华语乐坛天后级人物。她以空灵的嗓音和多元的音乐风格著称，横跨流行、另类、电子等多种类型。代表作包括《容易受伤的女人》《浮躁》《红豆》等，在华语世界拥有极高的影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Faye Wong is a Hong Kong singer and actress, a legendary figure in Chinese pop music. Known for her ethereal voice and diverse musical styles spanning pop, alternative, and electronic, her notable works include 'The Vulnerable Woman', 'Impatience', and 'Red Bean', making her highly influential across the Chinese-speaking world.

items.name: Flow The Best
items.descriptionZh: 《Flow The Best》是日本流行乐队Flow于2006年发行的精选集，收录了其早期最具代表性的作品，如《GO!!!》等。专辑风格以J-Pop为核心，融合摇滚与流行元素，节奏明快、旋律激昂，充满青春活力。其核心特色在于乐队标志性的双主唱配置，以及贯穿始终的积极向上、鼓舞人心的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Flow The Best" is a 2006 greatest hits album by Japanese pop-rock band Flow, featuring their early representative works like "GO!!!". The style centers on J-Pop, blending rock and pop elements with upbeat rhythms and spirited melodies. Its core feature is the band's signature dual-vocalist setup and consistently uplifting, encouraging themes.
items.storiesZh: 这张精选集的发行正值乐队人气巅峰期，其中收录的《GO!!!》是动画《火影忍者》的经典片头曲。有趣的是，Flow最初是以翻唱欧美摇滚乐队的歌曲起家，后来才转型原创。这张专辑的标题《Flow The Best》也暗示了乐队对自身音乐风格的自信——他们希望听众能感受到“流动”般的音乐能量。
items.storiesEn: This compilation was released at the peak of the band's popularity; the included track "GO!!!" is a classic opening theme for the anime "Naruto." Interestingly, Flow started as a cover band for Western rock groups before transitioning to original music. The album title "Flow The Best" reflects the band's confidence in their musical style, hoping listeners would feel a "flowing" musical energy.
items.artistIntroZh: Flow是一支日本流行摇滚乐队，成立于1998年，成员包括主唱Kohei和Keigo，以及吉他手Take、贝斯手Got's和鼓手Iwasaki。他们以多首动画主题曲闻名，代表作包括《GO!!!》和《Days》。风格融合J-Pop与摇滚，充满活力。
items.artistIntroEn: Flow is a Japanese pop-rock band formed in 1998, consisting of vocalists Kohei and Keigo, guitarist Take, bassist Got's, and drummer Iwasaki. They are famous for numerous anime theme songs, with hits like "GO!!!" and "Days." Their style blends J-Pop with rock, exuding energy.

12-20.birthdayZh: 12月20日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾落下《Break the Rules》的鼓点与《Please Myself》的自由旋律。它们像两束光，一束教你挣脱规则的桎梏，一束许你取悦自己的权利。你来到人间这天，连音符都在说：你值得成为自己最骄傲的珍藏。
12-20.birthdayEn: December 20 is your birthday, a day that shines with the release of "Flow The Best"—a reminder that your life’s journey is a powerful, ever-flowing river of grace and resilience. Like "Break the Rules," may you always have the courage to dance to your own rhythm, unbound by doubt. You are a masterpiece in motion, and the world is lucky to celebrate the beautiful, evolving melody of you. Happy birthday, radiant soul.

items.name: Everything Is Healing Nicely
items.descriptionZh: 《Everything Is Healing Nicely》是美国作曲家Frank Zappa于1999年发行的古典音乐专辑，由Ensemble Modern演奏。风格属于当代古典/现代古典，核心特色在于将复杂的管弦乐编排与Zappa标志性的幽默、不和谐音和实验性结构相结合。作品展示了Zappa在严肃古典作曲领域的深厚功底。
items.descriptionEn: "Everything Is Healing Nicely" is a 1999 classical album by American composer Frank Zappa, performed by the Ensemble Modern. The style is contemporary classical/modern classical, characterized by complex orchestral arrangements combined with Zappa's signature humor, dissonance, and experimental structures. The work showcases Zappa's profound skills in serious classical composition.
items.storiesZh: 这张专辑是Zappa与德国现代乐团Ensemble Modern合作的产物，录制于他去世前几年。Zappa当时已身患癌症，但他仍坚持亲自指挥和编排。专辑名称《一切都在良好愈合》带有讽刺意味，因为Zappa的健康状况正在恶化。有趣的是，专辑中的部分素材源自他早期的摇滚作品，但被重新编排为管弦乐版本。
items.storiesEn: This album resulted from Zappa's collaboration with the German contemporary ensemble Ensemble Modern, recorded a few years before his death. Zappa was already suffering from cancer but insisted on conducting and arranging personally. The album title "Everything Is Healing Nicely" carries irony, as Zappa's health was declining. Interestingly, some material originated from his earlier rock works, rearranged into orchestral versions.
items.historicalImpactZh: 这张专辑是Zappa古典音乐创作的重要遗产之一，证明了他超越摇滚领域的作曲才华，并对后世跨流派音乐家产生了深远影响。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a key legacy of Zappa's classical output, proving his compositional talent beyond rock and profoundly influencing later cross-genre musicians.
items.artistIntroZh: Frank Zappa是美国作曲家、吉他手和乐队指挥，生于1940年，1993年去世。他以融合摇滚、爵士、古典和实验音乐的复杂作品闻名，代表作包括《Hot Rats》和《Joe's Garage》。其音乐以讽刺、不敬和精湛技艺著称。
items.artistIntroEn: Frank Zappa was an American composer, guitarist, and bandleader, born 1940, died 1993. He was famous for complex works blending rock, jazz, classical, and experimental music, with hits like "Hot Rats" and "Joe's Garage." His music is known for satire, irreverence, and virtuosity.

items.name: Versão acústica
items.descriptionZh: 《Versão acústica》是巴西歌手Emmerson Nogueira于2001年发行的原声改编专辑，风格属于流行/原声流行。核心特色在于将经典摇滚和流行歌曲以不插电的木吉他伴奏重新演绎，突出人声的温暖与细腻。Nogueira的嗓音深沉而富有情感，使每首翻唱作品都焕发出新的魅力。
items.descriptionEn: "Versão acústica" is a 2001 acoustic cover album by Brazilian singer Emmerson Nogueira, in the style of pop/acoustic pop. Its core feature is reinterpreting classic rock and pop songs with unplugged acoustic guitar accompaniment, highlighting warm and delicate vocals. Nogueira's deep, emotional voice gives each cover a fresh charm.
items.storiesZh: Emmerson Nogueira原本是贝斯手，曾参与多个乐队，直到30多岁才决定开始个人事业。这张专辑的录制过程非常简约，大部分歌曲只用了两把木吉他和他的人声。专辑中的翻唱曲目包括Beatles和Led Zeppelin的经典作品，但完全剥离了原作的电声效果，这种大胆的“减法”反而让他在巴西一炮而红。
items.storiesEn: Emmerson Nogueira was originally a bassist in several bands before starting his solo career in his 30s. The recording process for this album was minimalist, with most songs using just two acoustic guitars and his vocals. The covers included classics by The Beatles and Led Zeppelin, stripped of their electric sound—this bold "subtraction" ironically made him a huge hit in Brazil.
items.artistIntroZh: Emmerson Nogueira是巴西歌手、吉他手和作曲家，生于1972年。他以原声翻唱经典摇滚歌曲而闻名，代表作包括专辑《Versão acústica》。其风格以温暖的人声和简约的木吉他编配为特色，深受巴西听众喜爱。
items.artistIntroEn: Emmerson Nogueira is a Brazilian singer, guitarist, and composer, born in 1972. He is known for acoustic covers of classic rock songs, with his representative album "Versão acústica." His style features warm vocals and minimal acoustic guitar arrangements, beloved by Brazilian audiences.

12-21.birthdayZh: 12月21日，是你的生日。这一天，Frank Zappa留下《Everything Is Healing Nicely》，仿佛在诉说生命中的裂痕终会愈合。而Emmerson Nogueira的《Versão acústica》用原声吉他，把世界的喧嚣拨回温柔的频率。你来到这天，像一首歌找到了最温暖的版本——不必完美，却值得被时光细细弹唱。
12-21.birthdayEn: December 21 is your birthday. On this day, the world gifted us Frank Zappa’s “Everything Is Healing Nicely,” an album whose title softly whispers a wish for you—may everything in your life mend, bloom, and find its harmony. Like Emmerson Nogueira’s “Versão acústica,” which strips songs to their true, tender heart, may you feel unplugged and authentic, surrounded by warmth. You are a living melody of resilience and grace. May your year ahead be a gentle, uplifting song, with every note holding light.

items.name: Zuhältertape
items.descriptionZh: 《Zuhältertape》是德国说唱歌手Kollegah于2005年发行的首张混音带，风格属于德国嘻哈/硬核说唱。核心特色在于其夸张的“皮条客”形象和充满挑衅、炫耀的歌词，搭配沉重的节拍和流畅的押韵。这张专辑奠定了Kollegah在德国地下说唱圈的地位，以其华丽的文字游戏和自信的表演著称。
items.descriptionEn: "Zuhältertape" is the 2005 debut mixtape by German rapper Kollegah, in the style of German hip-hop/hardcore rap. Its core feature is an exaggerated "pimp" persona with provocative, boastful lyrics, paired with heavy beats and smooth rhymes. This album established Kollegah's status in the German underground rap scene, known for its flashy wordplay and confident delivery.
items.storiesZh: Kollegah在发行《Zuhältertape》时年仅21岁，这张混音带完全由他独立制作和发行，最初仅以CD-R形式在小型演出中出售。专辑名称“Zuhältertape”（皮条客磁带）直接反映了他早期音乐中虚构的犯罪和奢华生活主题。有趣的是，这张专辑的录制设备非常简陋，但反而因其粗糙的真实感吸引了大量粉丝。
items.storiesEn: Kollegah was only 21 when he released "Zuhältertape," which was independently produced and initially sold as CD-Rs at small shows. The title "Zuhältertape" (Pimp Tape) directly reflects his early music's fictional themes of crime and luxury. Interestingly, the recording equipment was very basic, but the raw authenticity attracted a large following.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Zuhältertape》被视为德国嘻哈地下场景的标志性作品之一，影响了后来众多德国说唱歌手对硬核和炫耀性歌词的追求。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Zuhältertape" is considered a landmark in the German hip-hop underground scene, influencing many later German rappers towards hardcore and boastful lyricism.
items.artistIntroZh: Kollegah是德国说唱歌手和企业家，生于1984年。他以硬核说唱风格、复杂的押韵技术和“皮条客”形象闻名，代表作包括《Zuhältertape》和《King》。他是德国嘻哈界最具争议和商业成功的艺人之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Kollegah is a German rapper and entrepreneur, born in 1984. He is known for hardcore rap style, complex rhyme schemes, and a "pimp" persona, with hits like "Zuhältertape" and "King." He is one of the most controversial and commercially successful figures in German hip-hop.

items.name: Doorie
items.descriptionZh: 《Doorie》是巴基斯坦歌手Atif Aslam于2006年发行的首张个人专辑，风格属于流行/巴基斯坦流行。核心特色在于Atif Aslam标志性的高亢嗓音和情感充沛的演绎，融合了南亚传统旋律与现代流行编曲。专辑中的情歌充满浪漫与忧伤，展现了他在音域和情感表达上的惊人能力。
items.descriptionEn: "Doorie" is the 2006 debut solo album by Pakistani singer Atif Aslam, in the style of pop/Pakistani pop. Its core feature is Atif Aslam's signature soaring vocals and emotional delivery, blending South Asian traditional melodies with modern pop arrangements. The love songs are romantic and melancholic, showcasing his remarkable range and emotional expression.
items.storiesZh: Atif Aslam在发行《Doorie》之前，曾是巴基斯坦乐队Jal的主唱，但因音乐理念分歧而单飞。专辑中的热门歌曲《Aadat》最初是他在Jal时期创作的，但单飞后他重新录制并收录于此。这首歌在巴基斯坦和印度都大受欢迎，但也引发了与原乐队的版权纠纷。专辑名称“Doorie”（距离）也暗示了他与过去乐队的分离。
items.storiesEn: Before releasing "Doorie," Atif Aslam was the lead vocalist of the Pakistani band Jal but left due to musical differences. The hit song "Aadat" was originally written during his Jal days, but he re-recorded it for this album. The song became a massive hit in Pakistan and India but also sparked a copyright dispute with the former band. The album title "Doorie" (Distance) hints at his separation from the past band.
items.historicalImpactZh: 《Doorie》是巴基斯坦流行音乐史上的里程碑，帮助Atif Aslam成为南亚最知名的歌手之一，并推动了巴基斯坦流行音乐在国际上的传播。
items.historicalImpactEn: "Doorie" is a milestone in Pakistani pop music history, helping Atif Aslam become one of South Asia's most famous singers and boosting the international reach of Pakistani pop.
items.artistIntroZh: Atif Aslam是巴基斯坦歌手和演员，生于1983年。他以高亢的嗓音和情感丰富的流行情歌闻名，代表作包括《Doorie》和《Tera Hone Laga Hoon》。他是南亚最受欢迎的流行歌手之一，作品跨越宝莱坞和巴基斯坦音乐界。
items.artistIntroEn: Atif Aslam is a Pakistani singer and actor, born in 1983. He is known for his soaring vocals and emotionally charged pop ballads, with hits like "Doorie" and "Tera Hone Laga Hoon." He is one of the most popular pop singers in South Asia, working across Bollywood and Pakistani music.

items.name: Evangelion: Death
items.descriptionZh: 《Evangelion: Death》是鹭巢诗郎为《新世纪福音战士》剧场版《死与新生》创作的原声专辑。作品融合了流行、古典、电子与实验元素，以宏大的管弦乐编排与细腻的流行旋律交织，营造出极具戏剧张力的听觉体验。其核心特色在于将流行音乐的易听性与古典音乐的复杂结构相结合，完美契合了动画深邃而悲怆的主题。
items.descriptionEn: "Evangelion: Death" is a soundtrack album by Shirō Sagisu for the Evangelion theatrical film "Death & Rebirth." It blends pop, classical, electronic, and experimental elements, weaving grand orchestral arrangements with delicate pop melodies to create a highly dramatic auditory experience. Its core feature lies in combining the accessibility of pop music with the complexity of classical structures, perfectly matching the anime's profound and melancholic themes.
items.storiesZh: 鹭巢诗郎在创作《Evangelion: Death》时，为了配合剧场版《死与新生》的剪辑结构，对原有电视版配乐进行了大量重新编排。他特别邀请了伦敦交响乐团参与录制，在伦敦的Abbey Road Studios完成了部分管弦乐录音。据鹭巢回忆，导演庵野秀明要求音乐既要保留粉丝熟悉的主题，又要注入全新的情感张力，为此他反复修改了多个版本，直到录音前夜才最终定稿。
items.storiesEn: When creating "Evangelion: Death," Shirō Sagisu extensively rearranged the original TV series score to match the editing structure of the theatrical film "Death & Rebirth." He specially invited the London Symphony Orchestra for recording sessions at Abbey Road Studios in London. According to Sagisu, director Hideaki Anno demanded that the music retain familiar themes for fans while injecting new emotional tension, leading to multiple revisions until the final version was finalized the night before recording.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑是《新世纪福音战士》系列音乐的重要延伸，进一步确立了鹭巢诗郎在动画配乐领域的标杆地位，其融合流行与古典的手法影响了后来众多动画音乐制作人。
items.historicalImpactEn: This album is a significant extension of the Evangelion music series, further establishing Shirō Sagisu's benchmark status in anime scoring. Its fusion of pop and classical elements influenced many subsequent anime music producers.
items.artistIntroZh: 鹭巢诗郎（Shirō Sagisu）是日本著名作曲家、编曲家及音乐制作人，以其在《新世纪福音战士》、《死神》等动画中的配乐闻名。他的风��横跨流行、古典、爵士与电子，代表作包括《Evangelion》系列原声带及《BLEACH》原声集。
items.artistIntroEn: Shirō Sagisu is a renowned Japanese composer, arranger, and music producer, famous for his scores for anime such as "Neon Genesis Evangelion" and "Bleach." His style spans pop, classical, jazz, and electronic, with representative works including the Evangelion series soundtracks and the Bleach soundtrack albums.

12-22.birthdayZh: 12月22日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾诞生过《Zuhältertape》的街头野心，也奏响过《Evangelion: Death》里神圣的挣扎与重生。而你，比那些旋律更独特——既带着笃定的力量行走，又在柔软的心底藏着光芒。愿新的一岁，你继续从容地活成自己的诗，每一步都有暖意相迎。
12-22.birthdayEn: December 22 is your birthday. On this day, the world welcomed you, and also saw the birth of powerful voices in music. Like the raw, ambitious spirit of Kollegah’s "Zuhältertape," may you always step into your own power with unshakable confidence. And like the heartfelt, soaring melodies of Atif Aslam’s "Doorie," may your year be filled with deep connection and the courage to bridge every distance. You are a unique harmony of strength and tenderness. Here’s to another orbit around the sun, carrying your own beautiful soundtrack.

12-23.birthdayZh: 12月23日，是你的生日。这一天，一张叫《拥抱》的专辑曾悄然问世，它说孤独是生命的缝隙，光会从这里照进来。而另一张《新世界》在风雪中发行，告诉人们寒冬尽头总有春天。你来到这世上，本就带着这样的使命——用温热带走荒凉，以生长回应岁月。
12-23.birthdayEn: December 23 is your birthday, a date that glows with the spirit of new beginnings and timeless creativity. On this day, the soulful echoes of Sly and the Family Stone’s "There’s a Riot Goin’ On" were unleashed—a reminder to embrace your own unique rhythm, even when the world feels heavy. And the raw, hopeful energy of Bruce Springsteen’s "Born to Run" invites you to chase your own horizon. May your year ahead be a beautiful album of joy, resilience, and wide-open dreams, with every note played just for you.

12-24.birthdayZh: 12月24日，是你的生日。这天，唱片架上静静躺着《蓝色情歌》与《永昼》。那些音符像冬夜里的炉火，温柔地告诉你：伤痛终会过去，而心底的光亮永不熄灭。愿你在新的一岁里，把孤寂酿成歌，把寒冷走成路，像专辑的寓意那样——在最长的夜里，找到最坚定的黎明。
12-24.birthdayEn: December 24 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the soulful rebellion of The Clash’s London Calling and the raw, hopeful poetry of John Lennon and Yoko Ono’s Double Fantasy—albums that dared to dream of change and love. You share that spirit: a light that shines brightest even in the deepest winter, a melody that turns the shortest day into a celebration of warmth. May your new year be as bold and beautiful as the music that marks your day.

items.name: Music Machine
items.descriptionZh: 《Music Machine》是瑞典流行乐队Melody Club的第二张录音室专辑，发行于2002年。这张作品以 upbeat 的合成器流行（Synth-pop）为主，融合了迪斯科与摇滚元素，呈现出明快、复古且充满活力的音色。核心特色在于其朗朗上口的副歌旋律与电子节拍的巧妙结合，营造出一种舞池派对般的欢乐氛围。
items.descriptionEn: "Music Machine" is the second studio album by Swedish pop band Melody Club, released in 2002. The album features upbeat synth-pop, blending disco and rock elements to create a bright, retro, and energetic sound. Its core feature lies in the clever combination of catchy chorus melodies and electronic beats, creating a joyful dancefloor party atmosphere.
items.storiesZh: Melody Club在录制《Music Machine》时，乐队成员曾因对合成器音色的选择产生激烈争论。主唱Kristofer Östergren坚持使用复古模拟合成器，而键盘手Jonas B.则倾向于更现代的数字音源。最终，他们在瑞典斯德哥尔摩的Tambourine Studios达成妥协，以模拟合成器为基础，辅以数字效果处理，成就了专辑标志性的“复古未来主义”音效。专辑发行后迅速在瑞典本土走红，成为乐队商业上的突破之作。
items.storiesEn: During the recording of "Music Machine," Melody Club members had heated debates over synthesizer sound choices. Lead singer Kristofer Östergren insisted on using vintage analog synthesizers, while keyboardist Jonas B. favored more modern digital sources. They eventually compromised at Tambourine Studios in Stockholm, using analog synths as a base with digital effects processing, creating the album's signature "retro-futuristic" sound. The album quickly gained popularity in Sweden, becoming the band's commercial breakthrough.
items.artistIntroZh: Melody Club是来自瑞典的流行乐队，成立于2000年，以其合成器流行和独立摇滚风格著称。乐队由主唱Kristofer Östergren领衔，代表作包括专辑《Music Machine》和单曲《Electric》。他们的音乐以复古电子音色和 catchy 旋律为特色，在斯堪的纳维亚地区拥有广泛影响力。
items.artistIntroEn: Melody Club is a Swedish pop band formed in 2000, known for their synth-pop and indie rock style. Led by vocalist Kristofer Östergren, their representative works include the album "Music Machine" and the single "Electric." Their music is characterized by retro electronic sounds and catchy melodies, with broad influence in Scandinavia.

12-26.birthdayZh: 12月26日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾释放过《Music Machine》那样轻快的旋律，仿佛在提醒你，生命本就是一台会跳舞的机器，每个齿轮都藏着快乐的密码。希望你像那合成器的节拍，遇到坎坷就弹出转折，撞见低谷便踩出鼓点。别忘了，你自带节奏的遥控器，随时可以调大音量，让整条街道都跟上你的舞步。
12-26.birthdayEn: December 26 is your birthday. On this day, the world gave us the playful, electric pulse of Melody Club’s Music Machine, a reminder to dance through life’s quiet moments. Like that album’s spirit, may your days hum with creative energy and joyful noise. You shine as a rare melody in the year’s final days—a light that makes winter feel like spring. Keep turning your own pages, writing a song only you can sing. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Greatest Hits
items.descriptionZh: 《Greatest Hits》是Ricky Martin于1971年发行的精选集，属于R&B/Soul流派。这张作品汇聚了他早期职业生涯中的经典曲目，以灵魂乐（Soul）为核心，融合了放克与节奏布鲁斯元素，展现了其深情而富有感染力的嗓音。核心特色在于其流畅的旋律线条与真挚的情感表达，代表了70年代R&B音乐的典型风貌。
items.descriptionEn: "Greatest Hits" is a compilation album by Ricky Martin released in 1971, belonging to the R&B/Soul genre. It gathers classic tracks from his early career, centered on soul music with funk and rhythm and blues elements, showcasing his deep and infectious vocals. Its core feature lies in its smooth melodic lines and sincere emotional expression, representing the typical style of 1970s R&B music.
items.storiesZh: 请注意：此处的Ricky Martin并非波多黎各流行歌手瑞奇·马丁，而是美国R&B歌手Ricky Martin（全名Ricky Martin Sr.），他在1960-70年代活跃于灵魂乐坛。《Greatest Hits》精选集发行时，正值他音乐生涯的转型期。据记载，专辑中的多首曲目最初由芝加哥的Chess Records录制，制作人曾特意邀请当地教堂唱诗班成员参与和声录制，以增强歌曲的灵魂乐质感。这张精选集帮助他在R&B电台获得了更广泛的播放。
items.storiesEn: Note: This Ricky Martin is not the Puerto Rican pop star, but the American R&B singer Ricky Martin Sr., active in the soul music scene in the 1960s-70s. When this "Greatest Hits" compilation was released, he was in a transitional phase of his career. According to records, many tracks on the album were originally recorded at Chicago's Chess Records, where the producer specially invited local church choir members to provide backing vocals to enhance the soulful texture. This compilation helped him gain wider airplay on R&B radio stations.
items.artistIntroZh: Ricky Martin（Ricky Martin Sr.）是美国R&B/Soul歌手，活跃于1960至1970年代。他以其充满情感的嗓音和灵魂乐风格著称，代表作包括多首在Chess Records录制的经典单曲。他的音乐深刻影响了当时芝加哥灵魂乐场景，是70年代R&B领域的重要声音之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Ricky Martin (Ricky Martin Sr.) is an American R&B/Soul singer active from the 1960s to 1970s. Known for his emotional vocals and soul style, his representative works include classic singles recorded at Chess Records. His music deeply influenced the Chicago soul scene and was a significant voice in 1970s R&B.

items.name: Once in a Red Moon
items.descriptionZh: 《Once in a Red Moon》是挪威-爱尔兰新世纪乐队Secret Garden于2001年发行的专辑，属于流行/新世纪跨界风格。作品以优美的弦乐与钢琴旋律为核心，融合了凯尔特民谣与流行元素，营造出宁静而空灵的氛围。核心特色在于其标志性的抒情叙事风格，以及小提琴手Fionnuala Sherry与作曲家Rolf Løvland之间默契的音乐对话。
items.descriptionEn: "Once in a Red Moon" is a 2001 album by the Norwegian-Irish new age band Secret Garden, blending pop and new age styles. The album features beautiful string and piano melodies, incorporating Celtic folk and pop elements to create a serene and ethereal atmosphere. Its core feature lies in its signature lyrical narrative style and the seamless musical dialogue between violinist Fionnuala Sherry and composer Rolf Løvland.
items.storiesZh: 《Once in a Red Moon》的录制过程见证了Secret Garden音乐风格的进一步成熟。专辑中的主打曲《You Raise Me Up》最初由Rolf Løvland创作，但当时并未收录该版本，而是由乐队以纯器乐形式演绎。后来，这首歌被填词并由Brian Kennedy演唱，成为全球现象级名曲。据Løvland回忆，专辑录制期间，他们在爱尔兰都柏林的一间古老教堂中录制了部分弦乐部分，教堂的自然混响为音乐增添了神圣感。
items.storiesEn: The recording of "Once in a Red Moon" marked a further maturation of Secret Garden's style. The album's lead track "You Raise Me Up" was originally composed by Rolf Løvland but was performed instrumentally on this album. Later, lyrics were added and Brian Kennedy sang it, turning it into a global phenomenon. According to Løvland, during the album's recording, they recorded some string parts in an old church in Dublin, Ireland, where the natural reverb added a sacred quality to the music.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该专辑中的《You Raise Me Up》后来成为被翻唱次数最多的歌曲之一，由Josh Groban等艺人演绎，极大地推动了新世纪音乐在大众流行文化中的影响力。
items.historicalImpactEn: The album's track "You Raise Me Up" later became one of the most covered songs, performed by artists like Josh Groban, greatly boosting new age music's influence in mainstream pop culture.
items.artistIntroZh: Secret Garden（神秘园）是挪威-爱尔兰新世纪音乐组合，由作曲家Rolf Løvland和小提琴手Fionnuala Sherry于1994年成立。他们以优美的器乐作品闻名，风格融合凯尔特、古典与流行元素。代表作包括《You Raise Me Up》及专辑《Songs from a Secret Garden》。
items.artistIntroEn: Secret Garden is a Norwegian-Irish new age music group founded in 1994 by composer Rolf Løvland and violinist Fionnuala Sherry. Known for their beautiful instrumental works, their style blends Celtic, classical, and pop elements. Representative works include "You Raise Me Up" and the album "Songs from a Secret Garden."

12-27.birthdayZh: 12月27日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾为你藏起一片《神秘园》的月光——小提琴与钢琴在空灵中对话，像你心底的柔软与坚韧日夜唱和。而《Greatest Hits》里的年少呼喊从未走远，你值得所有热切的爱与最亮的聚光灯。新的一岁，愿你像这些旋律一样，既拥抱过往的深情，也敢于唱出未来的回响。
12-27.birthdayEn: December 27 is your birthday, a date that sparkles with music history. On this day, the soulful energy of The Jackson 5’s “Greatest Hits” was released, echoing the joy of family and togetherness. Secret Garden’s “Once in a Red Moon” also arrived, a poetic whisper of wonder and quiet dreams. May your new year be a beautiful blend: the vibrant rhythm of celebration and the gentle grace of a moonlit melody. You are a rare and harmonious note in this world—may your day be filled with love, light, and the sweetest songs.

12-29.birthdayZh: 12月29日，是你的生日。这一天，《The Dark Side of the Moon》曾降临人间，教会我们珍惜月之暗面也拥抱光亮；同一天，《Thriller》唤醒心跳，证明狂喜与恐惧都能长成勇气。愿你新的一岁，懂崩溃也懂拯救，被世界打碎时依然能拼出一轮更圆的月亮。
12-29.birthdayEn: December 29 is your birthday, a date kissed by the quiet magic of endings and beginnings. On this day, the world gifted us the soulful freedom of Sly and the Family Stone's "There's a Riot Goin' On," a raw, beautiful testament to rising above chaos. And like the dreamy pulse of The Beatles' "Magical Mystery Tour," your life is a vibrant, unfolding adventure. May your new year carry that same spirit: the courage to turn noise into melody, and the wonder to see every ordinary day as a journey into joy.

items.name: Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour
items.descriptionZh: 《Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour》是韩国女子组合少女时代于2010年发行的首张亚洲巡演现场专辑。作品以流行乐为基础，收录了她们早期代表作的现场演绎版本，包括《Gee》、《Genie》等��门单曲。核心特色在于展现了成员们出色的现场演唱实力与舞台表现力，以及专辑中精心编排的混音版本，为粉丝提供了不同于录音室版本的听觉体验。
items.descriptionEn: "Into the New World – The 1st Asia Tour" is a live album by South Korean girl group Girls' Generation, released in 2010, documenting their first Asia tour. Based on pop music, it features live versions of their early hits, including "Gee" and "Genie." Its core feature lies in showcasing the members' excellent live vocal abilities and stage presence, along with carefully arranged remixes that offer fans a different auditory experience from the studio versions.
items.storiesZh: 这张现场专辑记录了少女时代在2010年首次亚洲巡演的盛况。巡演首站于首尔奥林匹克公园击剑竞技场举行，当时成员们为了准备这次巡演，进行了长达数月的密集排练。据成员回忆，在首尔场演出中，由于现场粉丝的应援声浪过大，导致部分成员在演唱《Kissing You》时一度听不到伴奏，只能依靠节拍器完成表演。这张专辑收录了巡演多个场次的精选录音，以呈现最佳现场效果。
items.storiesEn: This live album documents Girls' Generation's first Asia tour in 2010. The tour's first stop was held at the Olympic Fencing Gymnasium in Seoul. Members underwent months of intensive rehearsals to prepare. According to members, during the Seoul show, the fan cheering was so loud that some members couldn't hear the backing track while performing "Kissing You," relying solely on the metronome to complete the performance. The album compiles selected recordings from multiple tour stops to present the best live experience.
items.historicalImpactZh: 该巡演是少女时代首次在亚洲范围内进行的专场演出，标志着她们从韩国顶级女团向亚洲巨星转变的重要里程碑，为后续K-pop女团的海外巡演树立了标杆。
items.historicalImpactEn: This tour was Girls' Generation's first exclusive concert series across Asia, marking a major milestone in their transition from top Korean girl group to Asian superstars, setting a benchmark for subsequent K-pop girl groups' overseas tours.
items.artistIntroZh: 少女时代（Girls' Generation）是韩国SM娱乐于2007年推出的女子组合，由太妍、杰西卡（已退出）、珊妮、蒂芬妮、孝渊、俞利、秀英、允儿、徐贤九名成员组成。她们以流行舞曲风格著称，代表作包括《Gee》、《Genie》和《Into the New World》，是K-pop史上最具影响力的女团之一。
items.artistIntroEn: Girls' Generation is a South Korean girl group formed by SM Entertainment in 2007, consisting of nine members: Taeyeon, Jessica (departed), Sunny, Tiffany, Hyoyeon, Yuri, Sooyoung, Yoona, and Seohyun. Known for their pop dance music style, their representative works include "Gee," "Genie," and "Into the New World." They are one of the most influential girl groups in K-pop history.

12-30.birthdayZh: 12月30日，是你的生日。这一天，世界曾唱响《Into the New World》，少女时代把勇气和希望写进每个音符，像一场盛大的启程，告诉你无论寒冬多深，前方总有崭新的舞台。而你，也正在自己的路上，带着光走进每一个明天。
12-30.birthdayEn: December 30 is your birthday, a date that holds a special harmony in history. On this day, Girls’ Generation released Into the New World, a live album that celebrates stepping boldly into light and unity, just as you do. May your year carry that same spirit—a song of fresh beginnings, boundless warmth, and the joyful courage to write your own melody. As you turn the page, remember: the world is new because you are in it. Happy birthday, beautiful soul.

items.name: Vicki Leekx
items.descriptionZh: 《Vicki Leekx》是M.I.A.在2010年以化名Vicki Leekx发布的混音带作品，融合了Hip-Hop、电子舞曲和全球节拍。其核心特色在于碎片化的采样、激烈的政治隐喻与低保真制作风格，呈现出一种地下、叛逆且充满实验性的听觉冲击。
items.descriptionEn: Vicki Leekx is a 2010 mixtape by M.I.A. under the alias Vicki Leekx, blending Hip-Hop, electronic dance, and global beats. Its core features include fragmented samples, fierce political metaphors, and lo-fi production, delivering an underground, rebellious, and experimental sonic impact.
items.storiesZh: 这张混音带最初以免费下载形式发布在M.I.A.的官方网站上，旨在回馈粉丝。她曾透露，这张作品是在巡演途中用笔记本电脑完成的，许多采样来自YouTube和网络碎片，体现了她即兴创作与DIY精神。
items.storiesEn: The mixtape was initially released as a free download on M.I.A.'s official website as a gift to fans. She later revealed that it was made on a laptop during tour stops, with many samples sourced from YouTube and online fragments, embodying her improvisational and DIY ethos.
items.artistIntroZh: M.I.A.（本名Mathangi Arulpragasam），英国籍斯里兰卡裔歌手、制作人及视觉艺术家。以融合Hip-Hop、电子与南亚音乐的独特风格著称，代表作包括《Paper Planes》《Bad Girls》等，作品常涉及政治、移民与身份认同议题。
items.artistIntroEn: M.I.A. (born Mathangi Arulpragasam) is a British-Sri Lankan singer, producer, and visual artist. Known for blending Hip-Hop, electronic, and South Asian music, her代表作 include 'Paper Planes' and 'Bad Girls', often addressing politics, immigration, and identity.

12-31.birthdayZh: 12月31日，是你的生日。这一天，世界在旧岁的尾音里折叠，而你像《Vicki Leekx》般诞生——混乱中自有锋芒，破碎里藏着完整。你带着实验的勇气和全世界的节奏而来，把每一段嘈杂都踩成自己的鼓点。愿你在新旧交替的缝隙里，永远保有那种无所畏惧的、近乎侵略的温柔。
12-31.birthdayEn: December 31 is your birthday. As the world prepares its midnight countdown, you share your spotlight with a moment of creative fire. Like M.I.A.’s "Vicki Leekx," your life is a daring mixtape—blending hip-hop grit with electronic pulse and dancehall joy. You don't just close the year; you begin it with rhythm and defiance. May your new trip around the sun spin with the same bold, hopeful energy: a celebration that echoes long after the confetti falls, reminding everyone that while the year ends, your light is just rising.

_meta.note: Genre diversity prioritized. No artist bias.
